Psychic Sunder.description:
需求 该心灵感应蠼螋虫群的前一个动作是心灵感应弹幕，且某个生物豁免失败并受到精神伤害

效果 蠼螋虫群将其心灵感应力量集中于瓦解受害者的精神防御。虫群选择一个在对抗心灵感应弹幕的豁免中失败并受到精神伤害的生物。该生物变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{呆滞（状态） 1}。此效果可在多次使用心灵撕裂时累积，至多累积到 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{呆滞（状态） 4}。以此方式达到呆滞（状态）4的生物（或已处于呆滞（状态）4的生物）会暴露于虫群的蠼螋感染。由心灵感应撕裂造成的呆滞（状态）每小时降低1点。

Requirements The telepathic earwig swarm's previous action was Telepathic Barrage and a creature failed its saving throw and took mental damage

Effect The earwig swarm focuses its telepathic powers on breaking down the mental defenses of its victim. The swarm chooses a creature that failed its saving throw against the Telepathic Barrage and took mental damage. That creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}. This is cumulative across multiple uses of Psychic Sunder to a maximum of @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4}. A creature who reaches stupefied 4 in this way (or who is already stupefied 4) is exposed to the swarm's earwig infection. The stupefied condition from Telepathic Sunder decreases by 1 every hour.

Earwig Infection.name: 蠼螋感染 Earwig Infection
Earwig Infection.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

阶段 1 来自 Psychic Sunder 的呆滞（状态）不会自行降低（1 天）

阶段 2 同阶段 1，且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}（1 天）

阶段 3 同阶段 1、Drained 1，且该生物在进行任何动作前必须尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:5]，否则失去该动作（1 天）

阶段 4 同阶段 2，且该生物在进行任何动作前必须尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:11]，否则失去该动作（1 天）

阶段 5 该生物永久受到幼虫耳蠼螋虫群控制。若在被控制期间生命值降至 0，该生物死亡并孵化出一个新的心灵感应耳蠼螋虫群。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24]

Stage 1 stupefied condition from Psychic Sunder doesn't decrease on its own (1 day)

Stage 2 Same as stage 1 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 Same as stage 1, drained 1, and the creature must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] before taking any action or lose the action (1 day)

Stage 4 Same as stage 2 and the creature must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:11] before taking any action or lose the action (1 day)

Stage 5 The creature become permanently controlled by the larval earwig swarm. If reduced to 0 HP while controlled, the creature dies and spawns a new telepathic earwig swarm.

Telepathic Barrage.name: 心灵震爆 Telepathic Barrage
Telepathic Barrage.description:
虫群区域内的每个生物受到 @Damage[2d12[mental]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|basic:true] 豁免）

Each creature in the swarm's area takes @Damage[2d12[mental]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|basic:true] save)

Telepathic Earwig Swarm.publicNotes:
心灵感应蠼螋看起来像是微小的棕色昆虫，长着长触角，腹部末端有钳状附器。由于无法自行繁殖，这些蠼螋发展出一种独特的生命周期：它们将自己植入宿主体内，利用心灵感应力量控制宿主的心智，然后开始利用该生物来孵育新的蠼螋。在整个孕育期间，它们会在精神上控制宿主，以创造合适的活与繁殖环境。幼体蠼螋继续在宿主体内活着，接管其动作并维持其生命，直到宿主不再有用。必要时它们会利用宿主来保护自己，但凭借敏锐的智力与读取宿主思想的能力，它们往往能够避开危险与怀疑。当宿主的用处耗尽时，蠼螋会猛烈地从其体内喷出，以新的虫群形式从宿主大脑中爆裂而出。心灵感应蠼螋学会了在不寄生于宿主时用心灵感应将彼此的心智连接起来，其效果是增强它们的心灵感应力量，并使它们能够施放秘法法术。与心灵感应蠼螋虫群战斗不一定在于消灭每一只蠼螋，而更多在于充分切断蜂巢心智，使其无法再放大彼此潜藏的心灵感应能力，从而沦为不过是普通蠼螋。

今日在耳，明日无踪

蠼螋（earwig）这一名称源于一种流行的看法：这些生物会爬进人的耳朵里产卵。然而，耳罩和耳塞对心灵感应蠼螋虫群并无防护作用。它们的卵可以从身体任何部位进入，而它们的心灵感应能力会诱使身体放下防御并吸收其后代。不过，并非所有寄生都会致命。足够强力的灵能能量冲击可以使虫群提前离开宿主；在这种情况下，它们确实会在急于逃离精神伤害时从耳朵里涌出。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 盾牌，技能物品（杂技、运动、神秘学）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，能量抗性（正能量），力场，精神，法术（秘法：安抚情绪、魅惑、命令、困惑、恍惚、幽灵之声、念动力操控），狂野

Telepathic earwigs resemble tiny brown insects with long antennae and pincers on their abdomens. Unable to reproduce on their own, these earwigs have developed a unique life cycle: they insert themselves into a host's body, use their telepathic powers to control the mind of their host, and then begin the process of using the creature to incubate new earwigs. Throughout the gestation, they mentally control the host in order to create a suitable living and reproductive environment. The young earwigs continue to live within the host, taking over its actions and keeping it alive until it is no longer useful. They will use the host to defend themselves if required, but by using their keen intellect and ability to read the host's mind, they are often able to avoid danger and suspicion. When the host outlives their usefulness, the earwigs eject from its body violently, exploding from the host's brain as a new swarm. Telepathic earwigs have learned to use their telepathy to link their minds together when not inside a host, which has the effect of boosting their telepathic powers and allowing them to cast occult spells. Fighting a telepathic earwig swarm isn't necessarily about destroying every single earwig, but instead more about disconnecting the hivemind enough that they can no longer amplify each other's latent telepathic abilities, thereby becoming nothing more than regular earwigs.

Ear Today, Gone Tomorrow

The name earwig comes from the popular belief that the creatures crawl into people's ears to lay their eggs. Earmuffs and ear plugs are no defense against the telepathic earwig swarm, though. Their eggs can enter the body anywhere, with their telepathic abilities coaxing the body to let down its defenses and absorb their offspring. Not all infestations are lethal, however. A strong enough blast of psychic energy can cause a swarm to exit the host prematurely, in which case they do pour out of the ears in their rush to escape the mental damage.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements shield, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Occultism)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, energy resistant (positive), force, mental, spells (Occult: calm emotions, charm, command, confusion, daze, ghost sound, telekinetic maneuver), wild
Telepathic Earwig Swarm.prototypeToken: 心灵感应耳夹虫群 Telepathic Earwig Swarm

Susurration.name: 窃窃私语 Susurration

Lifesense 30 feet.name: 生命感应 30 尺 Lifesense 30 feet

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 颤动感知（不精确）60英尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet

Voice Thief.name: 声音窃贼 Voice Thief
Voice Thief.description:
10英尺。窸窣声被一圈寂静灵光包围，始终具有4级@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{Silence}法术的效果。为进行对抗的目的，此效果为3级，DC为21。

10 feet. The susurration is surrounded by an aura of silence, with the effects of a 4th level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{Silence} spell at all times. For the purposes of counteracting, this effect is level 3 and has a DC of 21.

Warding Horror.name: 守护恐怖体 Warding Horror
Warding Horror.description:
需求 低语者的上一个动作是以其万千舌头成功进行一次打击，并对一名生物造成了伤害

效果 扭曲、阴影般的负能量与身体恐怖的盘绕从最初被低语者那可怖舌头舔到的生物身上分叉蔓延。目标15英尺内至多另外两名生物受到 @Damage[2d6[void],2d6[mental]]{2d6负能量与2d6心灵}伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22|basic:true] 豁免。

Requirements The susurration's last action was a successfully Strike with its myriad tongues that dealt damage to a creature

Effect Twisting, shadowy coils of negative energy and body horror branch out from the creature initially licked by the susurration's horrifying tongues. Up to two other creatures within 15 feet of the target take @Damage[2d6[void],2d6[mental]]{2d6 negative and 2d6 mental} damage, with a @Check[type:will|dc:22|basic:true] save.

Hole in the World.name: 世界之孔 Hole in the World
Hole in the World.description:
窃窃私语释放一阵负能量波。所有处于窃窃私语的窃声灵光中的生物受到 @Damage[3d8[void]] 伤害，并进行一次基础 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22] 豁免。豁免失败的生物还会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 1}，大失败则获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 2}。只要窃窃私语未处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{被擒抱} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{被束缚} 状态，它随后可以选择传送至最多20尺外。此移动为传送效果；它不会触发反应动作（），且不受困难地形或障碍物影响。窃窃私语在 [[/br 1d4 #Hole in the World Recharge]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用“世界之洞”。

The susurration releases a wave of negative energy. All creatures in the susurration's voice thief aura take @Damage[3d8[void]] damage with a basic @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22] save. A creature that fails this save is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}, and one that critically fails is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}. As long as the susurration isn't @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained}, it can then choose to teleport up to 20 feet away. This movement is a teleportation effect; it doesn't trigger reactions and isn't impacted by difficult terrain or obstacles. The susurration can't use Hole in the World again for [[/br 1d4 #Hole in the World Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Susurration.publicNotes:
由一团无主的人形舌头聚合而成，窸窣低语体漂浮在离地几尺之处，懒散地旋转着，仿佛被卷入静谧河流的回涡。有什么东西位于舌团的核心，但无法清晰看见；而且由于它会在该生物被摧毁时消失，只有最初的创造者才知道那里是什么。沉默从窸窣低语体中强力地向外散发，将附近区域笼罩在几乎完全的无声之中。然而在这沉默之后，是一种听不见却能察觉到的、无尽而悲怆的低声絮语暗示。黑暗、冰冷的不死触须从那扭动的团块内部刺出。

隐居的施法者——往往是追求巫妖化甚至更卑劣权力之路的人——常会发现自己需要让高塔或巢穴对潜在入侵者设防。尽管许多人会用拟形怪或骷髅战士等常见且可靠的爪牙来建立一支守卫队伍，但只有最有天赋且最偏执的霸主才会将窸窣低语体赋予生命，使其现世。

驱动窸窣低语体行动的那种魔法究竟是什么，一直是严密守护的秘密，不过多年间也浮现出种种理论。那些舌头是否曾属于才华横溢的术士？不信神的异端？擅长以歌声引导世界之力的人？也有人悄声揣测：或许它们是自愿献给创造者事业的——来自某个沉默与恐怖的秘密教团，为了那亵渎的赋生仪式而割下自己的舌头。

无论它如何诞生，驱动窸窣低语体的魔法都赋予它一种无心智的守卫职责。它会以尘土覆盖的堆状形态一等就是数十年，直到活生物进入它被指定的领地。能从这种精确而顽固的恶意中安然无恙的，只有其他不死生物。活者不受欢迎于窸窣低语体的触及之内。

言不由衷

被摧毁时，窸窣低语体会径直散成一堆舌头。舌头的年代与腐朽会依据窸窣低语体存在的时长追上它们——古老者的舌头可能会碎成尘埃，而较年轻者则会如下雨般一条条舌头啪嗒落地。不知为何，多名冒险者都没能抵住诱惑，把其中一条舌头放进自己嘴里。那条无主舌头立刻苏醒，溶解掉傻瓜原本的舌头并取而代之。宿主从此再也无法发出任何声音，但除此之外不会遭受其他不良效果。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（中型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技，隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 魅力，体质，能量抗性（负能量），智力，负能量，狂野，有翼

Formed as a mass of disembodied humanoid tongues, a susurration floats a few feet off the ground, lazily swirling as if caught in the eddy of a quiet river. Something lies at the heart of the tongues, but it can't be clearly seen, and since it disappears when the creature is destroyed, only the original creator knows what's there. Silence emanates forcefully from the susurration, blanketing the nearby area in almost complete soundlessness. Behind the silence, however, is an inaudible but noticeable hint of endless, sorrowful whispering. Dark, frigid tendrils of undeath lance out from within the writhing mass.

Reclusive spellcasters, often those pursuing lichdom or even viler paths to power, find themselves warding their towers or lairs against potential intruders. While many build up a host of guardians with common and successful minions like mimics or skeletal warriors, only the most talented and paranoid overlords would animate a susurration into existence.

Whatever magic animates a susurration is a closely guarded secret, though over the years theories have risen to the surface. Did the tongues belong to talented sorcerers? Faithless heretics? People exceptional at channeling the power of the world through their songs? Others have mused quietly if perhaps they were donated willingly to the creator's cause, perhaps from some secret cult of silence and horror that removed their own tongues for the foul ritual of animation.

However it might have come to be, the magic driving a susurration imbues it with a mindless duty to defend. It waits for decades on end in a dusty heap until living creatures enter its designated territory. The only creatures safe from this calculated, unbending malice are other undead. The living are not welcome within the reach of a susurration.

Tongue In Cheek

When destroyed, a susurration simply falls apart into a pile of tongues. Age and decay catch up with the tongues based on how long the susurration has existed—ancient ones may have the tongues crumble to dust, while younger ones result in a rain of tongues flopping to the ground. For whatever reason, multiple adventurers have succumbed to the temptation of putting one of the tongues in their own mouths. The disembodied tongue springs to life, dissolving the fool's original one and replacing it. The host becomes unable to vocalize any sounds ever again but suffers no other ill effects.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties charisma, constitution, energy resistant (negative), intelligence, negative, wild, winged

Stiltwalker.name: 高跷行者 Stiltwalker

Vulnerable to Trip.name: 易受绊摔 Vulnerable to Trip
Vulnerable to Trip.description:
高跷行者修长而灵巧的四肢为其提供了大部分防御，而它的主体通常在其高跷般的腿支撑下离地30英尺，这意味着对高跷行者而言，被绊倒比其他生物要痛苦得多。被绊倒的高跷行者在其身体猛然砸向地面时会受到 @Damage[15[bludgeoning]] 伤害。当高跷行者因成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} 而处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} 状态时，它的AC会承受–4环境减值，而非通常的–2环境减值，因为它的敌人很容易直接攻击它的身体。

A stiltwalker's long dexterous limbs provide it most of its defense and its main body is usually 30 feet in the air on its stilt-like legs, which means that being tripped is even more painful for a stiltwalker than other creatures. A tripped stiltwalker takes @Damage[15[bludgeoning]] damage as its body slams into the ground. While @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} from being @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}, a stiltwalker takes a –4 circumstance penalty to AC instead of the usual –2 circumstance penalty, as its easy for its foes to attack its body directly.

Stunning Detritus.name: 震慑残渣 Stunning Detritus
Stunning Detritus.description:
当高跷行者用其投掷的杂物打出一次具有决定性的一击时，这些杂物会猛烈痛击其目标，使目标短暂恍惚，无法对高跷行者进一步的横冲直撞做出反应。当高跷行者以其杂物打击对一个生物造成大成功或大失败，且该大成功或大失败对该杂物打击的目标造成了伤害时，该杂物打击的目标变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。

When a stiltwalker makes a telling blow with its thrown detritus, the detritus clobbers its target so hard that it leaves the target momentarily stunned and unable to react to the stiltwalker's further rampage. When the stiltwalker critically hits a creature with its detritus Strike, and the critical hit deals damage to the detritus Strike's target, the target of the detritus Strike becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Trebuchet Toss.name: 配重投掷 Trebuchet Toss
Trebuchet Toss.description:
需求 高跷行者的一条肢体上抓住了一名生物，使其处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

效果 高跷行者甩动其细长的肢体，将一名被抓住的生物高高抛向远处的空气中。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:32] 豁免，并产生如下效果。高跷行者的多重攻击减值适用于“投石机投掷”的DC，尽管“投石机投掷”没有攻击检定。

大成功或大失败 该生物不仅没有被抛出，还会挣脱擒抱，不再处于被抓住状态。

成功 该生物没有被抛出。

失败 高跷行者将该生物抛至最高50英尺的空中，并且也能将该生物水平抛掷至多50英尺。由此次投掷导致的坠落通常会使该生物因坠落承受 @Damage[25[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并且倒地 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

Requirements The stiltwalker has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} in one of its limbs

Effect The stiltwalker winds up its lanky limb and tosses a grabbed creature high up into the air far away from itself. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:32] save, with the following effects. The stiltwalker's multiple attack penalty applies to Trebuchet Toss's DC, even though Trebuchet Toss doesn't have an attack roll.

Critical Success The creature not only isn't thrown, they also struggle free of the grapple and are no longer grabbed.

Success The creature isn't thrown.

Failure The stiltwalker throws the creature up to 50 feet up into the air, and can also throw the creature up to 50 feet laterally. Falling from this throw typically causes the creature to take @Damage[25[bludgeoning]] damage from falling and fall @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Stiltwalker.publicNotes:
高跷行者是由巨人扭曲而成、四肢异常修长的畸形怪物。尽管它们极为罕见，但一旦高跷行者现身，便是噩梦的化身，能够仅凭一己之力摧毁一个村庄或小镇的整支卫队。它的身体结构扭曲变形，却仍带着近似人形的解剖特征；即便与巨人相比，其比例也极端得骇人。

它的每条肢体都延伸至40英尺长，末端是一只巨大而单一的手。然而，它的躯干却是一个小小的、鼓胀的核心，由这些肢体支撑平衡。高跷行者以四足移动的方式游荡，并用其惊人的触及灵活攀爬，往往栖息在垂直落差极大的区域，例如峭壁表面、广阔的红杉林间，或深埋地下的巨大洞窟之中。

狩猎时，高跷行者会寻找机会将猎物拖拽、摔落或抛掷至毁灭之中，让重力去完成它的力量无法达成的工作。一旦它察觉到附近有猎物，便会栖身于区域的制高点，利用自身高度监视最细微的移动迹象；当猎物进入伏击的触及范围时，它便会以肢体俯冲而下。

高跷行者往往是独居的生物，但在极少数多个高跷行者同时袭击的情况下，传闻会描绘出数十条可怖的肢体交错划过天空，整座城镇的人被有条不紊地从藏身洞里一个接一个拖出、抛向空中，再重重砸在地上，化作血肉糜烂的泥浆。

潜藏之物

究竟是什么造就了高跷行者仍是个谜团。普通人认为，来自空间的异怪会把巨人吊在天空中，直到他们的肢体被拉伸、心智崩坏；而知情者则低声谈论着来自地下的手。或许，当高跷行者把受害者抛向天空时，它们是在试图把其他人从其造物主手中拯救出来。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 250/560/1,030 gp

可选精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型、中型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、威吓、隐匿、生存）

可选灌注属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，延伸，能量抗性（正能量），力量，投掷，野性

Stiltwalkers are incredibly long-limbed monstrosities twisted from giants. While they're only encountered rarely, when a stiltwalker appears, it is the stuff of nightmares, able to decimate a village or small town's entire guard contingent on its own. Its body has a twisted and warped but almost humanoid anatomy, with extreme proportions even compared to giants.

Each limb stretches 40 feet in length and ends in a single, vast hand. Its torso, however, is a small, bulbous core balanced off these limbs. A stiltwalker roams by moving on all fours and using its extreme reach to climb nimbly, tending to roost in areas of great verticality, such as along cliff faces, within vast redwood forests, or in immense caverns deep underground.

When hunting, a stiltwalker seeks out opportunities to drag, drop, or toss prey to their doom and let gravity do the work that their strength can't accomplish. Once they notice nearby prey, they perch themselves at the apex of the area, using their height to monitor for the slightest hint of movement before diving in with their limbs when prey arrives within reach of an ambush.

Stiltwalkers tend to be solitary creatures, but on the rare occasion that more than one stiltwalker attacks at a time, tales are told of dozens of awful limbs crisscrossing the sky and entire towns being methodically dragged out of their hiding holes one by one, tossed into the air, and dashed on the ground in bloody pulp.

What Lies Beneath

What creates stiltwalkers is a mystery. Common folk assume aberrations from space hang giants from the sky until their limbs stretch and their minds break, but those in the know whisper of hands from underground. Perhaps when stiltwalkers throw their victims skyward, they are trying to save others from their creators.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 250/560/1,030 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), strength, throwing, wild

Stick Tongue.name: 伸舌 Stick Tongue

Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）30尺 Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet

Clever Positioning.name: 巧妙站位 Clever Positioning
Clever Positioning.description:
黏舌怪会利用枝叶来保护并遮蔽自己。只要在树上，它总是可以 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Take Cover]{采取掩蔽}，并且无论站位或视觉线如何，它在树上都会获得采取掩蔽的益处。它倾向于尽可能频繁地获得更强的掩蔽，会选择那些在通常情况下即使不使用此能力也会给予掩蔽的站位。如果黏舌怪在树上使用隐匿来进行先攻，它在掷先攻时会将采取掩蔽作为其中的一部分来使用。

A stick tongue leverages foliage to shield and obscure itself. It can always @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Take Cover]{Take Cover} while in a tree and gains the benefits of Take Cover in a tree regardless of positioning or line of sight. It prefers to have greater cover as often as possible, by choosing positions that would normally grant cover without the use of this ability. If a stick tongue uses Stealth for initiative while in a tree, it uses Take Cover as part of rolling initiative.

Retract Tongue.name: 收回舌头 Retract Tongue
Retract Tongue.description:
触发 一名敌人以一次攻击将黏舌怪的舌头作为目标

效果 黏舌怪将舌头缩回口中。它在对抗该次触发攻击的AC上获得+2环境加值。任何被舌头@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained}的生物，会在该次攻击结算后立即被释放。

Trigger An enemy targets the stick tongue's tongue with an attack

Effect The stick tongue retracts its tongue back into its mouth. It gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. Any creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} by the tongue is released immediately after the attack resolves.

Vulnerable Tongue.name: 易受伤害之舌 Vulnerable Tongue
Vulnerable Tongue.description:
当一个生物被黏舌怪的舌头@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{擒拿}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{束缚}时，生物可以直接攻击该舌头来伤害黏舌怪。该舌头具有与黏舌怪通常相同的AC，但它无法从掩蔽带来的任何环境加值中获益。

When a creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} by a stick tongue's tongue, creatures can attack the tongue directly to harm the stick tongue. The tongue has the same AC as the stick tongue normally does, but it can't benefit from any circumstance bonuses due to cover.

Rehome.name: 重新安置 Rehome
Rehome.description:
黏舌怪离开栖身处，前往更安全的树。它至多移动三次，以其移动结束时紧邻另外三只为止，然后在那棵树中采取掩蔽。

The stick tongue abandons its perch for a safer tree. It Strides up to three times, ending its movement next to another three, then Takes Cover in that tree.

Snatch.name: 夺取 Snatch
Snatch.description:
需求 棍舌怪在树上，并用它的舌头使一个生物处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

效果 棍舌怪尝试进行一次运动检定，以用它的舌头对其猎物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple}。如果它掷骰得到成功，则改为得到大成功，并且棍舌怪随后将该生物向它拉近至多10英尺。

Requirements The stick tongue is in a tree and has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} with its tongue

Effect The stick tongue attempts an Athletics check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} its prey with its tongue. If it rolls a success, it gets a critical success instead, and the stick tongue then pulls the creature up to 10 feet toward it.

Stick Tongue.publicNotes:
对毫无防备的地精而言，刺舌就是那条从树叶间猛然弹出的巨大舌头——它缠住他们的腋下，把他们永远地掳走。事实上，它们是大型螳螂，拥有许多关节，能灵巧地穿行于树叶间；并且有一条像蟾蜍般的舌头，使它们能够触及下方的猎物。刺舌的四肢往往比树枝还粗，且覆盖着细小、常带鳞质的赘生物，看起来就像它们最喜爱的树木的叶片。

它们的天然伪装会随地区而变化。在闹鬼的森林中，那里满是枯死或不死的树木，它们可能呈现出渗汁、腐朽的树皮外观；也可能长出繁茂的绿色羽状赘生物，随柳树一同摇曳；甚至在热带环境中，长出巨大而浓密的叶片。

别去舔那个

在刺舌栖息的地区旅行的人会尝试各种把戏来保护自己。最常见的是穿易撕脱的衣物，或在他们的护甲上涂抹滑腻的油，但也有其他策略旨在让自己变得不那么可口，从而不易成为目标。有些人会携带装着辣椒粉的袋子，认为辛辣或许能把舌头辣到发晕。另一些民间传说则说薄荷的气味会让这些生物作呕，使它们无法吞咽。哪些策略最有效尚不明确，而且可能会因每只刺舌独特的口味而有所不同。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍），护甲（中型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、潜行、求生）

符合条件的灌注特性 酸蚀、灾祸、敏捷、延长、能量抗性（正能量）、力量、野性

To the unsuspecting goblin, a stick tongue is the enormous tongue that snapped out of a tree's foliage, wrapped itself around their armpits, and snatched them up forever. In reality, they are large mantids with numerous joints that allow them to navigate tree foliage nimbly and a toad-like tongue that lets them reach their prey below. A stick tongue's limbs are often thicker than the branches, and they are covered in small, often scaly growths that resemble the leaves of their favorite trees.

Their natural camouflage varies between regions. They may have a sappy, rotting bark appearance in haunted forests full of dead or undead trees or have lush green, feathery growths to sway alongside a willow tree or even large, bushy leaves in tropical environments.

Don't Lick That

Travelers in regions where stick tongues live try various tricks to protect themselves. The most common involve wearing tearaway clothing or coating their armor in slick oil, but other strategies aim to make themselves less appetizing targets. Some carry pouches of ground chili peppers, thinking the spiciness might stun the tongue. Other folk tales say that the smell of peppermint sickens the creatures, preventing them from swallowing. Which strategies work best is unknown and may vary depending on the unique tastes of each stick tongue.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Star Wyrm.name: 星辰巨龙 Star Wyrm

Bolster Ally.name: 强化盟友 Bolster Ally
Bolster Ally.description:
触发 星辰巨龙从另一个生物的“支援盟友”以外的来源获得临时生命值

效果 星辰巨龙30尺内的一名盟友获得相当于星辰巨龙所获得临时生命值一半的临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续1分钟。

Trigger the star wyrm gains temporary Hit Points from a source other than another creature's Bolster Ally

Effect One of the star wyrm's allies within 30 feet gains half as many temporary Hit Points as the star wyrm did. These temporary Hit Points last for 1 minute.

Extra Reaction.name: 额外反应动作（） Extra Reaction
Extra Reaction.description:
该巨龙在每轮其回合开始时获得2个反应动作（）。

The wyrm gains 2 reactions at the start of its turn each round.

Intercept Attack.name: 拦截攻击 Intercept Attack
Intercept Attack.description:
触发 星界巨龙的一名盟友被一次本可以以该巨龙为目标的打击命中

效果 该巨龙改为承受该次成功打击的效果。

Trigger One of the star wyrm's allies is hit by a Strike that could have targeted the wyrm

Effect The wyrm takes the effects of the successful Strike instead.

Leaking Power.name: 力量泄露 Leaking Power
Leaking Power.description:
当调谐至虚空时，星辰巨龙的下颚打击造成4d6负能量伤害。当调谐至星云时，其下颚打击造成4d6火焰伤害，或对不死敌人造成正能量伤害，以对每个不死敌人更不利者为准。

When attuned to void, the star wyrm's jaw Strikes do 4d6 negative damage. When attuned to nebula, their jaw Strikes do 4d6 fire damage, or positive damage to undead foes, whichever is worse for each undead foe.

Celestial Attunement.name: 天界调谐 Celestial Attunement
Celestial Attunement.description:
星辰巨龙会调谐于群星之间虚空的空寂，或星云的原初潜能之一。该调谐会持续，直到星辰巨龙再次使用天界调谐为止，因此在首次遭遇时，星辰巨龙已调谐于这两种宇宙源泉之一，由GM决定。

The star wyrm attunes to either the emptiness of the void between the stars or the primordial potential of a nebula. This attunement lasts until the star wyrm uses Celestial Attunement again, so when first encountered, the star wyrm is attuned to one of these two cosmic sources, determined by the GM.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
巨龙以两种方式之一进行吐息，由其“天界调谐”决定。巨龙在[[/br 1d4 #its Breath Weapon Recharge]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用其吐息武器。

  • 虚空（奥术，死灵，负能量）巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]中吐出群星之间吞噬灵魂的空无，造成@Damage[12d10[void]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:42|basic:true|traits:arcane,necromancy,void] 豁免）。巨龙获得等同于吐息武器对单个生物造成伤害一半的临时生命值；计算这些临时生命值时，以受到伤害最高的生物为准。这些临时生命值持续1分钟。
  • 星云（奥术，塑能，火焰，正能量）巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]中吐出原恒星的原初物质，对区域内的敌人造成[[/r 20d6[fire]]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:42|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire,vitality] 豁免）；或者对不死敌人造成正能量伤害，以对每个不死敌人来说更糟的那个为准。区域内的巨龙盟友则改为恢复一半数量的生命值。

The wyrm breathes in one of two ways, as determined by its Celestial Attunement. The wyrm can't use its Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #its Breath Weapon Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Void (arcane, necromancy, negative) The wyrm breathes out the soul-sucking emptiness between stars in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[12d10[void]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:42|basic:true|traits:arcane,necromancy,void] save). The wyrm gains temporary Hit Points equal to half the damage a single creature takes from the Breath Weapon; calculate these temporary Hit Points using the creature that took the most damage. These temporary Hit Points last 1 minute.
  • Nebula (arcane, evocation, fire, positive) The wyrm breathes the primordial stuff of proto-stars in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals [[/r 20d6[fire]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:42|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire,vitality] save) to the wyrm's foes in the area, or positive damage to undead foes, whichever is worse for each undead foe. The wyrm's allies in the area instead heal half as many Hit Points.

Share Attunement.name: 共享调谐 Share Attunement
Share Attunement.description:
星辰巨龙将其宇宙能量分享给30英尺内一名不具有天界调谐能力的盟友。每当该盟友在巨龙下个回合开始前用一次打击造成伤害时，他们会加上来自巨龙“泄漏之力”的额外伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.I4k1g6aaS6FbkKlv]{效果：分享调谐}

The star wyrm shares its cosmic energy with an ally that doesn't have the Celestial Attunement ability within 30 feet. Each time that ally deals damage with a Strike before the start of the wyrm's next turn, they add the additional damage from the wyrm's Leaking Power.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.I4k1g6aaS6FbkKlv]{Effect: Share Attunement}

Teamwork.name: 团队合作 Teamwork
Teamwork.description:
只要敌人位于星界巨龙的两名盟友的触及范围内，由于夹击，它便对星界巨龙的近战攻击处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}状态。

An enemy is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} to the star wyrm's melee attacks due to flanking as long as it is within reach of two of the star wyrm's allies.

No Breath.name: 无吐息 No Breath
No Breath.description:
星界巨龙不需要呼吸，并免疫于需要呼吸的效果（例如吸入性毒素）。

A star wyrm doesn’t breathe and is immune to effects that require breathing (such as an inhaled poison).

Star Wyrm.publicNotes:
星界巨龙是一种类似真龙的存在，栖居于太空的真空之中。它们呈现为无数光点，汇聚成巨龙的形态。它们是高度群居的生物，其社群——称为星座——在形而上学层面彼此相连。它们几乎从不被单独发现，偶尔会与其他种类的生物结成盟友。

作为由较小元素松散聚合而成的集合体，星界巨龙会被那些以精准打击攻击其组成星体、破坏其整体性的敌人严重伤害。

融合料理

星界巨龙的消化过程类似于恒星核心中对原材料的处理。其结果堪称炼金术士的梦想成真：有机物会转化为金属，贱金属则会变为贵金属。星界巨龙对宝藏的理解围绕哲学概念展开，否则它们的厕所就会成了它们的宝库。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 5,000/12,000/22,500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍），护甲（轻型、中型、重型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、交涉、威吓、神秘学、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、魅力、体质、延伸、能量抗性（正能量、负能量）、火焰、守序、光、负能量、正能量、力量、狂野、翼生

Star wyrms are beings similar to true dragons that live in the vacuum of space. They appear as countless motes of light that gather into the shape of a dragon. Intensely social creatures, their social groups—called constellations—are metaphysically connected. They are almost never found alone and occasionally ally with other kinds of creatures.

As a loose collection of smaller elements, star wyrms are greatly harmed by foes who disrupt their integrity with precise strikes at their component stars.

Fusion Cuisine

The star wyrm's digestion process resembles the processing of raw materials in the hearts of stars. The results are an alchemist's dream come true, with organic material transforming into metals and base metals turning into precious ones. A star wyrm's conception of treasure revolves around philosophical concepts, for otherwise their latrines would be their hoards.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 5,000/12,000/22,500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Occultism, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive, negative), fire, lawful, light, negative, positive, strength, wild, winged

Squichlek.name: 斯奎奇莱克 Squichlek

No Breath.name: 无吐息 No Breath
No Breath.description:
斯奎奇莱克不需要呼吸，并免疫于需要呼吸的效果（例如吸入性毒素）。

A squichlek doesn't breathe and is immune to effects that require breathing (such as inhaled poisons).

Weak Mind.name: 弱智力 Weak Mind
Weak Mind.description:
史奎奇莱克对灵能的敏感使其特别容易受到精神效果的影响。每当史奎奇莱克受到不造成伤害的精神能力或法术影响时，它会受到等同于其对精神伤害的弱点值的非致命伤害（[[/r 5]]）。

A squichlek's sensitivity to psychic energy makes it especially susceptible to mental effects. The squichlek takes nonlethal damage equal to its weakness to mental damage whenever it is affected by a non-damaging mental ability or spell ([[/r 5]]).

Disturbing Display.name: 骇人展示 Disturbing Display
Disturbing Display.description:
斯奎奇莱克以一种特别令人不安的方式扭动其触手，位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]内的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:19]意志豁免。一旦某个生物尝试过此次豁免，它将在1分钟内暂时免疫进一步的“令人不安的展示”。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}，直到其下个回合。

失败 该生物获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}，并在其处于恶心状态期间一直处于措手不及状态。

大失败 该生物获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}，并在其处于恶心状态期间一直处于措手不及状态。

The squichlek writhes its tentacles in a particularly disturbing manner, and creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:19] save. Once a creature attempts this save, it is temporarily immune to further Disturbing Displays for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until its next turn.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}, and is off-guard for as long as it is sickened.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2} and is off-guard for as long as it is sickened.

Agonizing Enzyme.name: 折磨酶 Agonizing Enzyme
Agonizing Enzyme.description:
斯奎奇莱克的触手会分泌一种酶，引发短暂但剧烈的疼痛。被斯奎奇莱克的触手打击命中的活生物，或被其@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{擒抱}的活生物，必须在一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]豁免中成功，否则因疼痛而在1轮内成为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{迟钝 1}。

A squichlek's tentacles secrete an enzyme that causes a brief, but intense pain. A living creature hit by a tentacle Strike or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} by the squichlek must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round from the pain.

Tearing Beak.name: 撕裂之喙 Tearing Beak
Tearing Beak.description:
斯奎奇莱克的鸟喙攻击对@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{措手不及}的生物额外造成[[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]]伤害。

The squichlek's beak attack does an additional [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] damage against @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Squichlek.publicNotes:
斯奎奇莱克是一种异界生物，由更强大的异怪被切断的卷须与触手纠缠在一起，融合成一小团触手并获得独立的生命而形成。斯奎奇莱克拥有类似乌贼的喙，以及三只均匀分布在身体周围的裂缝状眼睛；它们是会飞的触手团，体型如猫一般，外观隐约像一只乌贼。斯奎奇莱克触手的扭动尤其令人作呕。斯奎奇莱克深紫蓝色的体色与违抗重力的能力，揭示其起源于外层空间而非海底。虽然它们能够在真空中存活，但并不倾向于独自穿越漫长距离。相反，斯奎奇莱克更喜欢在更大型的虚空漂泊者经过之后随行旅行。它们依赖其他生物作为保护者与向导，穿行于这片浩瀚无垠的广袤空间。

斯奎奇莱克会被灵能所吸引，往往聚集在具有强大心灵能力的生物附近。斯奎奇莱克会服从那些展现出惊人心灵能力的生物，除非为了生存迫不得已，否则不会攻击此类生物。当它们受到惊扰时，会围住敌人，用其锋利、穿透力强的喙啄击，同时以触手令人不安的起伏摆动令对方失去方向。

一些富有进取心的法师，甚至少数爱冒险的吟游诗人，会将斯奎奇莱克当作宠物或奇珍饲养。通常只需一次尖锐的心灵斥责，就足以阻止这些生物攻击饲主。然而，它们远非温顺，最终会试图吃掉除饲主之外任何靠近的人。

意外召唤

构成斯奎奇莱克的那些断裂肢体，对脱落它们的更强大异怪而言并不比毛发或其他可替换部位更值得在意。然而，斯奎奇莱克对灵能的敏感意味着：如果足够多的斯奎奇莱克聚集在同一地点，一点点逸散的咒法魔法就可能把构成斯奎奇莱克的那些异怪召唤到它们所在的位置。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（光）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、运动、威吓、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、心灵、毒素、狂野

A squichlek is an alien creature formed when the severed tendrils and tentacles of greater aberrations fuse together into a tiny mass of tentacles and gain a life of their own. With a squid-like beak and three slitted eyes spaced equally around its body, squichleks are flying masses of tentacles the size of a cat that vaguely resemble a squid. The writhing of a squichlek's tentacles is particularly sickening to look upon. A squichlek's dark purple-blue coloration and ability to defy gravity reveal their origin from outer space rather than under the sea. While they are capable of surviving the vacuum of space, they aren't inclined to traverse the vast distances alone. Instead, squichleks prefer to travel in the wake of larger void wanderers. They rely on other creatures both as protectors and guides through the great expanse.

Squichleks are attracted to psychic energy and tend to congregate near creatures with powerful mental capabilities. Squichleks defer to creatures that demonstrate impressive mental abilities and won't attack such creatures except as a last resort for survival. When disturbed, they surround and peck at foes with their piercing, penetrative beak while disorienting them with unsettling undulations of tentacles.

Some enterprising wizards, and even a few adventuresome bards, keep squichleks as pets or curiosities. A sharp mental rebuke is usually enough to keep the creatures from attacking their keeper. They are far from docile, however, and eventually try to eat anyone else aside from their keeper who comes near.

Accidental Summonings

The severed body parts that comprise squichleks are of no more concern to the greater aberrations who shed them than hair or other replaceable parts are to humanoids. However, the psychic sensitivities of squichleks mean that if enough of them gather in one location, a bit of stray conjuration magic can end up summoning the aberrations that make up the squichleks to their location.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), mental, poison, wild

Mouthwatering Scent.name: 令人垂涎的气味 Mouthwatering Scent
Mouthwatering Scent.description:
30英尺（以肉车为中心）。灵光内吃肉的生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 豁免，否则将变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}，持续1轮。不吃肉的生物在该豁免上获得+2环境加值，且在豁免失败时不会着迷，而是变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}。任何成功通过其豁免的生物在接下来1分钟内获得对此的暂时免疫。

30 feet (centered on the meat cart). Creatures in the aura that eat meat must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} for 1 round. Creatures that don't eat meat gain a +2 circumstance bonus on the save and are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} instead of fascinated on a failed save. Any creature who succeeds on their save becomes temporarily immune to for 1 minute.

Spellfilcher.name: 法术窃贼 Spellfilcher

Glean Magic.name: 汲取魔法 Glean Magic
Glean Magic.description:
法术窃取者可以感知到60尺内施法者的存在，但无法得知其位置。这是一种朦胧感官。

The spellfilcher can sense the presence, though not the location, of spellcasters within 60 feet. This is a vague sense.

Wand Dependence.name: 魔杖依赖 Wand Dependence
Wand Dependence.description:
法术窃贼可以用其魔杖替代施放其窃取法术所需的任何材料成分。没有魔杖，它无法使用其窃取法术或施放窃取法术能力。

A spellfilcher can substitute its wand for any material component it needs to cast a stolen spell. It can't use its Steal Spell or Cast Stolen Spell abilities without its wand.

Spell Siphon.name: 法术虹吸 Spell Siphon
Spell Siphon.description:
触发 法术窃取者在对抗一个法术的豁免中大成功

效果 法术窃取者尝试对触发的法术进行窃取法术，而无需满足通常的需求。

Trigger The spellfilcher critically succeeds at a saving throw against a spell

Effect The spellfilcher attempts to Steal Spell on the triggering spell, without needing to meet the usual requirements.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Dancing Lights.name: 舞动的光 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光源，它们彼此之间任意两者相距不超过10尺。每个都像火把一样发出光。当你维持法术时，你可以将任意数量的光源移动至多60尺。每个光源都必须保持在你120尺内并且与所有其他光源相距不超过10尺，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，感知魔法的存在。你获得的信息仅限于魔法是否存在。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。

你只有在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术在射程内侦测到的、最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同等强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你还会锁定最高等级魔法的来源。与模糊感官相同，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若来源大于该范围，则为最接近的等效区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Electric Arc.name: 电弧 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跃向另一个。你造成等于 1d4 加上你的施法能力调整值的电击伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. You deal electricity damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之音 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个由简单声音构成的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个普通人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Light.name: 光 Light
Light.description:
该物体发出辉光，如同火把般在20尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你再次将此法术施放在第二个物体上，第一个物体上的光法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光}

强化（4环） 该物体在60尺半径内发出明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺内提供昏暗光照）。

The object glows, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) like a torch. If you cast this spell again on a second object, the light spell on the first object ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The object sheds bright light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的命令。只要你维持法术，你就可以施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 冷却、加热或为1磅非生物材料调味。
  • 抬升 缓慢地 将一个无人看管的光负载或更轻的物体缓慢抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且人工感十足，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法术材料。
  • 整理 为一个光负载或更轻的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮的专注影响一个1负载的物体，而更大的物体则需要每负载1分钟。

戏法伎俩不能造成伤害或引发不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除上述注明者外）仅在你维持法术期间持续存在。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Ray of Frost.name: 霜冻射线 Ray of Frost
Ray of Frost.description:
你发射一道冰冷射线。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。射线造成等同于1d4 + 你的施法能力调整值的寒冷伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害，并在1轮内其速度获得-10英尺状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{法术效果：冷冻射线}

成功 目标受到正常伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You blast an icy ray. Make a spell attack roll. The ray deals cold damage equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{Spell Effect: Ray of Frost}

Success The target takes normal damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，敞开思维以感知魔法灵光。当施法完成时，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法，而若其具有魔法，你将得知其所属的魔法学派。

如果该物体是幻象，只有当该效果的等级低于你的阅读灵光法术的等级时，你才能侦测到这一点。

强化（3环） 你可以以最多 10 个物体为目标。

强化（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the level of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Cast Stolen Spell.name: 施放窃取的法术 Cast Stolen Spell
Cast Stolen Spell.description:
窃法者可以用施法（行动）来施展其所窃取的任何法术，无论其来源或根源为何。之后它会失去该被窃取的法术。以此方式施放的法术会获得与该法术原始来源的魔法根源相对应的特征。例如，尽管窃法者的先天法术通常为奥术（特征），但如果窃法者从德鲁伊那里窃取@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}并施放它，该法术将具有原能（特征）而非奥术（特征）。

A spellfilcher can use the Cast a Spell activity with any spell it has stolen, regardless of the source or tradition. It then loses the stolen spell. A spell cast this way gains the trait corresponding to the magical tradition of the spell's original source. For example, even though a spellfilcher's innate spells are normally arcane, if a spellfilcher steals @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands} from a druid and casts it, the spell would have the primal trait instead of the arcane trait.

Feather Strike.name: 羽击 Feather Strike
Feather Strike.description:
法术窃贼用它的精灵魔杖轻轻点触一个生物，方式不会对其造成伤害，而且几乎不可能被察觉。它进行一次攻击掷骰，使用其精灵魔杖的攻击加值+11，但不造成伤害。如果法术窃贼处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{隐匿}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未侦测}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{未被注意}状态，则在使用羽落打击后（以及法术窃贼在羽落打击后使用窃取法术时的窃取法术后），它仍保持隐匿、未侦测或未被注意。

The spellfilcher gently taps its wand against a creature with its fae wand in a way that doesn't damage them and is almost impossible to notice. It makes an attack roll, uses its attack bonus with its fae wand of +11, but dealing no damage. If the spellfilcher is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}, it remains hidden, undetected, or unnoticed after using Feather Strike (as well as Steal Spell, if the spellfilcher uses Steal Spell after Feather Strike).

Steal Spell.name: 窃取法术 Steal Spell
Steal Spell.description:
需求 法术窃取者的上一个动作是用其妖精魔杖对一个生物进行打击或羽落打击

效果 法术窃取者从其打击到的生物那里偷取一个法术。法术窃取者选择该生物准备的一个法术，或该生物曲目表中的一个法术。如果该法术是已准备的，则该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 豁免，否则失去该已准备的法术。如果该生物施放自发法术，则它必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 豁免，否则失去一个相应等级的法术位。法术窃取者只能以这种方式偷取1环或2环法术。一个法术窃取者同时最多可储存三个被偷取的1环法术与三个被偷取的2环法术。法术窃取者无法偷取戏法。

Requirements The spellfilcher's last action was to Strike or Feather Strike a creature with its fae wand

Effect The spellfilcher steals a spell from the creature it struck. The spellfilcher chooses a spell prepared by the creature or in the repertoire of that creature. If the spell was prepared, the creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save or lose that prepared spell. If the creature casts spells spontaneously, it must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save or lose a spell slot of the appropriate level. The spellfilcher can only steal a 1st or 2nd level spell this way. A spellfilcher can store up to three stolen 1st-level spells and three stolen 2nd-level spells at the same time. A spellfilcher can't steal cantrips.

Spellfilcher.publicNotes:
法术窃贼是一种体型很小的妖精，热衷于恶作剧。他们似乎天生就明白哪些小型魔法在消失后最会让人懊恼。法术窃贼宣称自己源自那些在魔法上笨拙之人对更高明施法者的嫉妒。若此言属实，则可能存在更强大的法术窃贼，能够窃取更强大的魔法。

法术窃贼是微型生物，拥有一条色彩斑斓的龙的上半身，并携带一根微型魔杖；而其下半身则拖曳成神秘能量的火花。

法术窃贼珍视他们的魔杖。他们可以用一天的工作替换遗失或被偷走的魔杖，但他们很不情愿这么做，并且会为取回属于自己的魔杖而开出高昂的交换条件。

从盗贼那里偷窃

法术窃贼的妖精魔杖只对法术窃贼本人生效，因此夺走魔杖的生物无法用它来窃取法术。不过，如果法术窃贼偷走了一个法术但尚未施放，该魔杖会以相应等级作为该法术的卷轴来运作，并在施放该法术后化为尘埃。以这种方式摧毁魔杖会极大地激怒法术窃贼，因此与其讨价还价通常更为有利。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（Acrobatics, Arcana, Athletics, Crafting, Deception, Diplomacy, Nature, Occultism, Religion, Society, Stealth, Survival, Thievery）

可用灌注属性 bane, chaotic, 魅力, cold, 敏捷, electricity, energy resistant (positive), 智力, 光, 法术（Arcane: dancing lights, detect magic, electric arc, ghost sound, light, prestidigitation, ray of frost, read aura）, wild, winged

Spellfilchers are a small type of fey that delight in mischief. They seem to have an innate understanding of which minor magics would be missed the most if they were gone. Spellfilchers claim to be born out of the jealousy of the magically inept for more skilled magicians. If this is true, it means that more powerful spellfilchers likely exist, which would be capable of stealing more powerful magic.

Spellfilchers are tiny creatures that possess the upper half of a colorful dragon that carries a tiny wand, while their lower halves trail off into sparks of mystical energies.

Spellfilchers treasure their wands. They can replace a lost or stolen wand with one day of work, but they are loathe to do so and bargain dearly to get back a wand that belongs to them.

Stealing From A Thief

The spellfilcher's fae wand only works for the spellfilcher, so creatures who take one cannot use it to steal spells. However, if the spellfilcher stole a spell and has not cast it yet, the wand functions as a scroll of that spell at the appropriate level and crumbles to dust after casting the spell. Destroying a wand in this way greatly upsets the spellfilcher, so bargaining with it is usually more advantageous.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Arcana, Athletics, Crafting, Deception, Diplomacy, Nature, Occultism, Religion, Society, Stealth, Survival, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, cold, dexterity, electricity, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, light, spells (Arcane: dancing lights, detect magic, electric arc, ghost sound, light, prestidigitation, ray of frost, read aura), wild, winged

Sorrow Portrait.name: 哀恸肖像 Sorrow Portrait

Subject of Horror.name: 恐怖主题 Subject of Horror
Subject of Horror.description:
哀伤肖像会将一名生物传送进一个绘画世界，在那里它会成为画中所描绘恐怖的主角。哀伤肖像可以以30英尺内的一名生物为目标，且该目标必须在 @Check[type:will|dc:33] 豁免中成功，否则会被传送进哀伤肖像内的一个异次元空间，并成为画作的主角。未能通过意志豁免并被吸入画中，会对这名不幸的受害者产生与@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7]{Maze}法术相同的效果，除了以下差异：

  • 哀伤肖像不需要维持该效果。
  • 受害者也可以尝试通过进行与哀伤肖像所描绘内容相关的检定来逃离画作，由GM决定（例如：从沉船中游出所需的运动检定，或用一次打击来击退狼群）。
  • 在其回合结束时，若该主角仍在哀伤肖像之内，它会承受 @Damage[5d6[mental]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:29|basic:true] 豁免。伤害类型与豁免类型可能会为契合哀伤肖像的描绘而改变，由GM决定。若哀伤肖像被摧毁，该效果会立刻结束。
  • 哀伤肖像在同一时间内只能容纳一名主角；若主角逃脱，则其会对该哀伤肖像的恐怖主角免疫1分钟。
  • 若主角在绘画世界中死亡，则只要画作仍完好无损，任何试图复活该主角的行为都必须在 @Check[type:flat|dc:15] 中成功，否则复活魔法失败。

The sorrow portrait transports a creature into a painted world where it becomes the subject of the horrors it depicts. The sorrow portrait can target a creature within 30 feet, and the target must succeed a @Check[type:will|dc:33] save or be transported into an extradimensional space within the sorrow portrait and become the subject of the painting. Failing the Will save and being sucked into the painting has the effects of the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7]{Maze} spell on the unfortunate victim, except for the following differences:

  • The sorrow portrait doesn't need to Sustain the effect.
  • The victim can also attempt to escape the painting by attempting a check relevant to what the sorrow portrait depicts, as determined by the GM (such as Athletics check to Swim from a shipwreck, or a Strike to fend off wolves).
  • At the end of its turn, if the subject is still within the sorrow portrait, it takes @Damage[5d6[mental]] damage with a @Check[type:will|dc:29|basic:true] save. The damage type and save type might change to suit the sorrow portrait's depiction, as determined by the GM. If the sorrow portrait is destroyed, the effect ends immediately.
  • The sorrow portrait can only have one subject inside of it at one time, and if the subject escapes it becomes immune to that sorrow portrait's Subject of Horror for 1 minute.
  • If the subject dies within the painted world, any attempt to resurrect the subject must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:15] if the painting is still intact, or the resurrection magic fails.

Susceptible to Adamantine Slashing.name: 易受精金挥砍伤害影响 Susceptible to Adamantine Slashing
Susceptible to Adamantine Slashing.description:
哀伤肖像的物理抗力会被精金劈砍武器所绕过。

A sorrow portrait's physical resistance is bypassed by adamantine slashing weapons.

Sorrow Portrait.publicNotes:
据说哀伤肖像是用颜料混合仍然存活的受害者之血创作而成的。哀伤肖像是魔法画作，能够将其他生物困在其人造的绘画世界之中。施虐的庄园主人偏爱使用哀伤肖像，因为它们能同时带来两种好处：以某种骇人的审美装点宅邸，并为居所提供防护，抵御潜在的入侵者或其他不受欢迎之人。哀伤肖像以大型画作的形式出现，总会描绘某种悲剧的形态，但缺少一个居中的类人主体。

哀伤肖像通常大部分时间都处于休眠状态，伪装成一幅普通但阴森的画作。然而，当哀伤肖像察觉到不受欢迎的闯入者时，它会突然从原位飞起，试图将该闯入者转移进画中扭曲的领域。一旦新的对象被困住，哀伤肖像便会试图从任何其他潜在的袭击者处逃离，以使新近被绘入其中的受害者灵魂永远被囚禁。

萦绕之艺

任何其血液曾用于制作哀伤肖像的人，都会有一部分本质与这幅画相连。当他们死亡时，会成为萦绕在以其鲜血绘就的场景中的幽灵。这些幽灵无法离开画作，但他们可以开口警告潜在的受害者。该幽灵也可以援助或阻挠某个对象的逃脱尝试。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 250/560/1,030 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、奥术、欺瞒）

符合条件的注入属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），邪恶，精神，力量，坚固，狂野，有翼

Said to be created from paint mixed with the blood of a still-living victim, sorrow portraits are magical paintings that can trap other creatures within their artificial painted world. Sadistic manor owners favor the use of sorrow portraits, as they provide two benefits at once: they decorate the mansion with a certain horrific aesthetic, and they provide protection to the dwelling from potential intruders or other undesirables. Appearing as large paintings, sorrow portraits always depict some form of tragedy, but they lack a central humanoid subject.

Sorrow portraits typically spend most of their time dormant, impersonating a regular, albeit macabre, painting. However, when a sorrow portrait detects an unwelcome intruder, it suddenly flies from its placement and attempts to transport that intruder into the twisted realm within the painting. Once its new subject is trapped, the sorrow portrait attempts to flee from any other would-be assailant so that the soul of its newly painted victim remains imprisoned forever.

Haunting Art

Anyone whose blood contributed to a sorrow portrait has part of their essence tied to the painting. When they die, they become a ghost who haunts the scenes painted with their blood. These ghosts cannot leave the painting, but they can speak to warn potential victims. The ghost can also aid or hinder a subject's escape attempt.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 250/560/1,030 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Arcana, Deception)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), evil, mental, strength, sturdy, wild, winged

Coppersmyf.name: 铜匠斯迈夫 Coppersmyf

Disanimate.name: 去活化 Disanimate
Disanimate.description:
铜匠魔像能够使自身失活，将身体拆解并采取两只铜碗、四只铜杯和一把切肉刀的形态。在此形态下，铜匠魔像没有速度，且除使自身复活之外不能采取任何动作。处于其失活形态时，铜匠魔像还获得并能使用“威慑电击”反应动作（）。只要其所有部件彼此之间都在5尺以内，它就可以再次使用此动作以复活。

A coppersmyf can disanimate itself, disassembling its body and taking the form of two copper bowls, four copper mugs, and a meat cleaver. In this form, the coppersmyf has no Speed and can take no actions other than reanimating itself. While in its disanimated form, the coppersmyf also gains and can use the Deterrent Shock reaction. As long as all of its pieces are within 5 feet of each other, it can use this action again in order to reanimate.

Deterrent Shock.name: 威慑电击 Deterrent Shock
Deterrent Shock.description:
需求 铜匠仙处于其非动画形态

触发 一名生物触碰铜匠仙的其中一块碎片

效果 铜匠仙向触发的生物体内释放一道令人眩晕的电击。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] 豁免。随后铜匠仙重新动画。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 该生物为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}。

Requirements The coppersmyf is in its Disanimated form

Trigger A creature touches one of the coppersmyf's pieces

Effect The coppersmyf sends a stunning shock of electricity into the triggering creature's body. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] save. The coppersmyf then reanimates.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Glitterdust.name: 闪光粉尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
区域内的生物会被闪耀的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。若某个生物的隐形被此法术抵消，则其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}而非@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这既适用于该生物原本就处于隐形状态，也适用于其在此法术的隐形抵消效果结束前从新的隐形效果中获益的情况。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消2轮。

失败 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}1分钟，且其隐形被抵消1分钟。

大失败 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}1轮并目眩10分钟。其隐形被抵消10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Disintegration Beam.name: 解离射线 Disintegration Beam
Disintegration Beam.description:
铜匠精灵从眼中发射一道脉动的腐蚀能量光束，对位于 @Template[type:line|distance:15] 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[3d6[acid]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:18|basic:true] 豁免）。

The coppersmyf fires a pulsating beam of corroding energy from its eye, dealing @Damage[3d6[acid]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:18|basic:true] save) to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:15].

Coppersmyf.publicNotes:
被打磨出如镜面般的玫瑰金光泽、闪耀夺目的铜匠妖精（coppersmyf）是与妖精界有紧密联系的餐馆中的工人、看守、守卫与供应者。这些场所通常由勇敢活泼的侏儒餐馆主经营，以其秘制配方与来自妖精界的冷门食材而闻名。铜匠妖精不惜一切代价守护配方与稀有食材，是维持竞争优势的关键，并因此赢得了令人生畏的名声。

未被赋予动画的铜匠妖精，在未经训练者眼中不过是一堆不起眼的杂物：四个铜杯、两个铜碗，以及一把剁肉刀。开始动画时，这些铜器会被绿色的原初魔法卷起，魔力将各个部件纠缠在一起，塑成铜匠妖精的形态。在成形的身影中央，两个铜碗纠缠成一个球状的“躯干”，其上带着一只巨大的白色眼睛，反射出如同直射阳光照在金属上的辉光。其余部件组装成由魔法能量构成的“手臂”，其中一条手臂挥舞着那把锋利如剃刀的武器。

尽管它们通常把大部分闲暇时间都花在厨房里，但铜匠妖精会依据各自的性情与动画状态，以多种身份为餐馆服务。大多数会以军纪般的警惕守卫厨房，用会使目标瓦解的眼光射线对付任何潜在的窃贼，或挥舞剁肉刀追击。另一些铜匠妖精则是效率的典范，乐于切配食材并协助备餐。有些铜匠妖精更喜欢整天保持未动画形态，作为普通炊具使用；而当餐馆打烊后再苏醒，以便全天候有效巡守。

厨师们也垂涎铜匠妖精，因为它们可作为隐蔽的运输者，将来自妖精界的稀有美味运送而来。一只正在运送食材的铜匠妖精，可以在碗内藏匿多种昂贵食材，从而安全地往返运输。

格外狡黠的侏儒厨师与餐馆老板，会按照构成铜匠妖精所需的确切数量与布局摆放普通的铜器部件。尽管这无法真正形成铜匠妖精，但这种诡计足以有效震慑配方窃贼，而且肯定比委托打造一只铜匠妖精便宜得多。

匠妖精（smyf）是一类妖精构装体家族，其身躯由彼此不同的普通装备部件锻造而成，并以原初能量的丝缕将其连接为单一实体。每一种匠妖精都在与妖精界相连的餐馆中承担不同职责：铜匠妖精负责场地并收集物资；银匠妖精（silversmyf）为客人上菜；金匠妖精（goldsmyf）保护餐馆的财务。它们共同为妖精餐馆增添独特风格，同时守护顾客与员工。它们的名字源自构成身躯所用的物体类型：铜匠妖精使用铜锅与铜碗，银匠妖精使用银质餐具，而金匠妖精使用金币与钱币。

全能匠妖精

作为阶位最低的匠妖精，铜匠妖精比其他任何匠妖精都更需要学习在餐馆中执行多种任务，使其能够在需要时随处顶上。相较之下，银匠妖精与金匠妖精的职责更为专门，且通常会将其本职贯彻到底。尽管这可能意味着铜匠妖精样样通却样样不精，但它们以多用的“万事通”身份胜任多种岗位的能力，再加上制造一只铜匠妖精所需花费相对较低，使其在侏儒与妖精餐馆中远比其他更强大的匠妖精种类更为常见。

其他匠妖精

匠妖精本就不算常见；在其中，即便是在相对冷门的妖精餐馆这一生态位里，也只有铜匠妖精、银匠妖精与金匠妖精会较为规律地出现。然而，存在的匠妖精并不只有这些。以下匠妖精至少在故事与仙灵文献中有所记载，但它们究竟是杜撰出来的，还是仅仅极其罕见，仍不得而知。

  • 铂匠妖精（Platinumsmyfs）：其庞大身躯包含一座熔炉，能够烹制出全新的配方。
  • 琥珀金匠妖精（Electrumsmyfs）：会在银匠妖精或铜匠妖精外出递送稀有美味或采购食材的旅途中随行，以确保支付得当，并在返程时保护款项。
  • 秘银匠妖精（Mithralsmyfs）：据说是银匠妖精的进阶形态，专为快速递送特别易腐的货物而造，尤其当目的地遥远或位于危险区域时。
  • 星铁匠妖精（Orichalcumsmyfs）：仅见于传奇记载，它们凭借对时序魔法与时间管理的精通，协调横跨庞大餐馆帝国的其他所有匠妖精，以管理数十甚至数百名其他匠妖精。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（挥砍）、护甲（中型、重型）、盾牌、察觉物品、技能物品（杂技、制作、学识 [烹饪]、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀、灾祸、敏捷、电击、能量抗性（负能量、正能量）、力量、野性、有翼

Polished to a mirror-like rose gold sheen, gleaming coppersmyfs serve as the workers, custodians, guardians, and suppliers of eateries with close connections to the fey realm. These establishments, usually run by plucky gnome restaurateurs, are known for their secret recipes and obscure ingredients from the fey realm. Coppersmyfs, which protect recipes and rare ingredients at all costs, are key to a competitive advantage and have earned their formidable reputation.

A disanimated coppersmyf looks to the untrained eye like nothing more than an inconspicuous assortment of four copper mugs, two copper bowls, and a meat cleaver. When animating, the copperware swirls with green primal magic, binding the pieces together to create the coppersmyf form. At the formed figure's center, two copper bowls fuse into an orbed "torso," bearing a large white eye that reflects with the brilliance of direct sunlight on metal. The remaining pieces assemble to form "arms" of magical energy, one of which wields its razor-sharp weapon.

While they typically spend most of their spare time in kitchens, coppersmyfs serve in various capacities for restaurants according to their individual temperament and state of animation. Most guard their kitchens with militaristic vigilance, firing out a disintegrating eye beam at any would-be thieves or giving chase with their meat cleaver. Other coppersmyfs are paragons of efficiency who happily chop up ingredients and assist with preparing food. Some coppersmyfs prefer to spend the day in their disanimated form, functioning as ordinary cookware, springing to life when the restaurant is closed so they can be effective guards around the clock.

Chefs also covet coppersmyfs as covert transporters of rare delicacies from the fey realm. A coppersmyf transporting ingredients can have a variety of expensive ingredients hidden inside its bowls, allowing it to safely transport them to and fro.

Exceptionally cunning gnome chefs and restaurant owners put out mundane copperware components in the exact number and configuration that comprise a coppersmyf. Though this is incapable of forming a coppersmyf, the ruse can be an effective deterrent for recipe thieves, and it's certainly much less expensive than commissioning a coppersmyf.

Smyfs are a family of fey constructs, with bodies forged of disparate pieces of mundane equipment connected into a single entity by strands of primal energy. Each type of smyf serves a different role at restaurants connected to the realm of the fey. Coppersmyfs handle the venue and gather supplies; silversmyfs serve food to guests; and goldsmyfs protect the restaurant's finances. Together, they lend fey restaurants a unique style while guarding customers and staff alike. Their names arise from the type of object used to form their bodies: copper pots and bowls for a coppersmyf, silverware for a silversmyf, and gold coins for a goldsmyf.

Smyfs Of All Trades

As the lowest-ranking smyfs, coppersmyfs more so than any other smyfs learn how to perform a variety of tasks at the restaurant, allowing them to fill in wherever they are needed. Comparatively, silversmyfs and goldsmyfs have specialized roles, and they typically fulfill those roles thoroughly. While this might mean that coppersmyfs are masters of none, their ability to serve many roles as a versatile jack of all trades, combined with the relatively low expenses required to create a coppersmyf, make them much more prevalent in gnome and fey restaurants than the other more powerful varieties of smyf.

Other Smyfs

Smyfs aren't especially common to begin with, and of those, only coppersmyfs, silversmyfs, and goldsmyfs are seen on any kind of regular basis, even in the relatively obscure niche of fey restaurants. However, these aren't the only kinds of smyfs that exist. The following smyfs exist at least in stories and faerie texts, though whether they are fabricated or simply quite rare is still unknown.

  • Platinumsmyfs, whose enormous bodies include a furnace, are capable of cooking up new recipes.
  • Electrumsmyfs accompany silversmyfs or coppersmyfs on journeys delivering rare delicacies or purchasing ingredients in order to ensure appropriate payment and protect the payment on its return.
  • Mithralsmyfs are supposedly an advanced form of silversmyf, created to deliver especially perishable goods quickly, particularly when their destination is far away or in a dangerous area.
  • Orichalcumsmyfs, only mentioned in legends, coordinate all other smyfs across a vast restaurant empire, using their mastery over temporal magic and time management in order to manage dozens or even hundreds of other smyfs.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (medium, heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Crafting, Lore [Cooking], Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, dexterity, electricity, energy resistant (negative, positive), strength, wild, winged

Fragmentor.name: 碎片裂解者 Fragmentor

Visionsense (Imprecise) 120 feet.name: 幻视（不精确）120英尺 Visionsense (Imprecise) 120 feet
Visionsense (Imprecise) 120 feet.description:
碎片化者可以感知其120尺内任何与所有拥有视觉感官的生物。视觉感官被压制（或没有处理太多视觉信息，例如他们正闭上眼睛）的生物，无法用幻视感官被侦测到。

The fragmentor can sense any and all creatures who possess a visual sense that are within 120 feet of it. Creatures whose visual senses are suppressed (or who aren't processing much visual information, such as if they are closing their eyes) can't be detected using visionsense.

Phantasmal Defense.name: 幻象防御 Phantasmal Defense
Phantasmal Defense.description:
需求 碎片师至少显现了一个幻象

触发 碎片师将会被一次攻击命中。

效果 碎片师召唤其已有的一个幻象，该幻象立即出现在碎片师相邻的一个方格内，并在攻击路径上以身阻挡。攻击来源必须尝试一次@Check[type:flat|dc:11]；在一次失败时，幻象被摧毁，且碎片师将该次攻击的结果从大成功改为成功，或从成功改为失败。

Requirements The fragmentor has at least one phantasm manifested

Trigger The fragmentor would be hit by an attack.

Effect The fragmentor calls one of its existing phantasms, which instantly appears in a square adjacent to the fragmentor, and interposes itself in the path of the attack. The source of the attack must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:11]; on a failure, the phantasm is destroyed, and the fragmentor changes the result of the attack from a critical success to a success or a success to a failure.

Distorting Edges.name: 扭曲边缘 Distorting Edges
Distorting Edges.description:
碎片魔的无数碎片扭曲变形，以锋利如剃刀的边缘旋转穿过碎片魔的空间。每个在碎片魔空间内的敌人承受 @Damage[4d6[slashing]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免）。

The fragmentor's countless shards warp and distort, spinning through the fragmentor's space with razor sharp edges. Each foe in the fragmentor's space takes @Damage[4d6[slashing]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] save).

Phantasms.name: 幻象 Phantasms
Phantasms.description:
触发 fragmentor使用Distorting Edges，且至少有一名生物豁免失败

效果 fragmentor在10英尺内一处未被占据的方格中创造一个幻象（若触发的生物豁免大失败，则创造两个幻象）。幻象为中型、半真实的幻觉，其外形类似于触发的生物的形态（调整体型使其为中型，即使触发的生物并非中型）。幻象独立于fragmentor行动，其回合在fragmentor之前或之后立即进行。幻象每回合拥有2个动作，且只能用于飞行。幻象拥有30英尺的飞行速度，其豁免调整值与AC等同于fragmentor。幻象足够实体，可以提供夹击，且其他生物无法穿过其空间。若幻象被攻击命中或豁免失败，则其消失；在经过1分钟后消失；若fragmentor或其被创造所源自的生物死亡或获得濒死（状态），则其消失；或若其与fragmentor的距离曾经超过100英尺，则其消失。典型的fragmentor同时最多只能拥有七个幻象，但也可能存在更强大的fragmentor，能够拥有更多幻象。

Trigger The fragmentor uses Distorting Edges and at least one creature fails its save

Effect The fragmentor creates a phantasm (two phantasms if the triggering creature critically failed) in an unoccupied square within 10 feet. Phantasms are Medium, quasi-real illusions, which resemble the form of the triggering creature (changing size such that they are Medium, even if the triggering creature isn't). Phantasms act independently of the fragmentor, taking their turns either immediately before or after the fragmentor. Phantasms have 2 actions each turn that they can use only to Fly. Phantasms have a fly speed of 30 feet, and their saving throw modifiers and AC are equal to the fragmentor's. Phantasms are substantial enough to provide flanking, and other creatures cannot pass through their space. A phantasm disappears if it is hit by an attack or fails a save, after 1 minute passes, if the fragmentor or the creature it was created from dies or gains the dying condition, or if it is ever further than 100 feet away from the fragmentor. A typical fragmentor can only have at most seven phantasms at a time, but more powerful fragmentors might exist that can have more phantasms.

Shatter Phantasm.name: 粉碎幻影 Shatter Phantasm
Shatter Phantasm.description:
碎片化者摧毁其一个幻象，在该幻象所占据的空间内任意一点为中心创造一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]，造成 @Damage[3d6[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免）。碎片化者从下列额外效果中选择一项：

  • 碎片化者传送至先前由该幻象占据的空间。此额外效果具有咒法与传送（特征）。
  • 碎片化者获得10点临时生命值，因破碎幻象的碎片聚合成其自身形态。
  • 每个在对抗碎裂幻象的豁免中失败的生物还会 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{目眩} 1轮（大成功或大失败时为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{目盲} 1轮，且目眩1分钟）。碎裂幻象获得视觉（特征）。

     

The fragmentor destroys one of its phantasms, creating a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] centered at any point in the phantasm's space, which deals @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] save). The fragmentor chooses one of the following additional effects:

  • The fragmentor teleports to the space previously occupied by the phantasm. This additional effect has the conjuration and teleportation traits.
  • The fragmentor gains 10 temporary Hit Points as the shattered phantasm's fragments coalesce into its own form.
  • Each creature that failed their saving throw against Shatter Phantasm is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} for 1 round (@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} for 1 round and dazzled for 1 minute on a critical failure). Shatter Phantasm gains the visual trait.

Fragmentor.publicNotes:
碎片者是那些曾直面自身的另一版本者的残余——来自其他次元、分裂的时间线，或恶毒的诅咒——并在此过程中自我感被撕裂，只留下成千上万片无形的自我碎屑。这些碎屑会被其他有智慧的生物所吸引，常常在绝望中制造这些生物的拟像，试图重新夺回那些已不可逆转地失去的自我感的一部分。碎片者仍保有其前世的记忆，但这些记忆往往与其另一个自我的记忆纠缠得难解难分，使得交流往好里说也困难重重，往坏里说则足以扭曲心智。

碎片者有时也会在一只特别顽强的塔哈伽塔被摧毁时作为副产物产生。

镜裔是一类与星界位面以及镜中扭曲次元之外的无限替代现实都有联系的生物家族。就像@Compendium[pf2e.hazards.4jJxLlimyQaIVXlt]{Darkside Mirror}另一侧发现的邪恶复制体一样，大多数镜裔代表着多元宇宙的无限可能性——那些并未发生、却本可能发生之事。这一类镜裔包括塔哈伽塔与碎片者，这两种实体皆由“潜能”被悖论般扭曲并塑成有形形态而成。在较小程度上，奇拉鲁斯亦是如此：它们是那些不可能存在之倒影的化身，体现出诸如吸血鬼（特征）这类通常没有倒影的生物之倒影。最后，奥德拉祖是极为罕见的镜裔，因为它们由魔鬼与星界位面的共生杂交体形成，并混杂来自替代镜之次元的异界能量。

所有镜裔的共同点之一，是它们与镜子的物理联系：奥德拉祖以倒影为食；奇拉鲁斯呈现为二维倒影；塔哈伽塔采取由无数镜面构筑的形态；碎片者则由无数参差不齐的镜片碎片构成。但这并不意味着它们必然更常出现在镜子更常见的区域，因为每一种生物都会将其镜像般的物理形态一同带来。

尽管同属一类生物，镜裔彼此之间却很少互动。即便碎片者有时会由被摧毁的塔哈伽塔形成，它们也很少与塔哈伽塔交谈；而塔哈伽塔则觉得碎片者本质中那种支离破碎的潜能令人反感且刺痛，就像塔哈伽塔与原本的生物并置后，从对方身上所感到的那种“错误感”一样。

碎片者洞见

与碎片者交流异常困难，而理解它们所说的话则更难；然而，由于其混杂的记忆——其中一些来自自身的替代版本——碎片者对“现在是什么”“过去是什么”以及“本可能是什么”具有罕见的洞见。对那条未曾踏上的道路心存疑问之人，去咨询一名碎片者，怎么也不算太差的选择。

穿过镜中之境

除了会将被其映照之人的替代版本送出的darkside mirrors之外，也有可能——尽管罕见——通过一面普通镜子连接到其外的诸界并遭遇镜裔。此现象在充盈星界能量之处，或在凡世与镜外世界之间的帷幕曾被撕裂过、并在过程中变得愈发稀薄的地点，要更为常见。穿镜而入者会发现这些镜中领域遵循其自身怪诞的规则；而他们最终或许会从另一面镜子再度现身，但往往已然改变。

其他镜裔

此处呈现的镜裔只是冰山一角，因为无限镜之宇宙中的可能性与多元宇宙本身一样无穷无尽。关于其他镜裔的一些传闻包括：

  • 暗面行者，源自暗面镜并已成为此世永久居民的生物，它们要么试图从其现实带来更多“居民”，要么试图在此建立属于自己的封地。
  • 晶碎魔，由破碎水晶球的反光碎片形成的恶意实体，它们利用镜子窥探许多其他生物，并将情报用于自身卑劣的目的。
  • 镜中哑剧师，藏身于镜内并取代生物天然倒影的生物，以吞噬该生物的心灵为目的，试图通过在镜前模仿该生物的动作来保持不被察觉。
  • 反射者，在跟踪猎物时会在战场各处布置多面镜子的生物，它们发射会在镜面间反弹的光束，以出人意料的角度折射并照射其受害者。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、魅力、体质、能量抗性（正能量）、力量、wild、winged

Fragmentors are the remnants of those who have been confronted with alternate versions of themselves—from other dimensions, split timelines, or malicious curses—and, in the process, had their sense of self ruptured, leaving behind only thousands of formless slivers of themselves. These slivers are drawn to other sapient creatures, often creating simulacra of the creatures in a desperate bid to regain some of the sense of self that they have irrevocably lost. While fragmentors retain memories of their past lives, they are often inextricably tangled with memories of their alternate selves, which makes communication difficult at best and mindwarping at worst.

Fragmentors are also sometimes created as a byproduct when a particularly tenacious tahagata is destroyed.

Mirrorborn are a family of creatures with connections to both the Astral Plane and the infinite alternate realities beyond the twisted dimensions found within mirrors. Much like the evil duplicates found on the other side of a @Compendium[pf2e.hazards.4jJxLlimyQaIVXlt]{Darkside Mirror}, most mirrorborn represent the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, of things that aren't but could have been. This category of mirrorborn includes tahagatas and fragmentors, two entities formed from the paradoxical distortion of potential into a corporeal form. To a lesser extent, the same is true of chiraluses, the incarnations of the reflections that could never be, embodying reflections of creatures like vampires that ordinarily have no reflections. Finally, odrazu are highly unusual mirrorborn, as they form from a symbiotic hybrid between a devil and the Astral Plane, peppered with otherworldly energies from alternate mirror dimensions.

One commonality among all mirrorborn is their physical connection to mirrors: odrazu feed on reflections, chiraluses appear as two-dimensional reflections, tahagatas take a form built of myriad mirrored surfaces, and fragmentors are composed of countless jagged mirror shards. This doesn't mean that they are necessarily more likely to be found in areas where mirrors are more common, as each of the creatures brings their mirrored physicality along with them.

Despite being a family of creatures, mirrorborn rarely interact with each other. Even fragmentors, which can sometimes form out of a destroyed tahagata, rarely converse with tahagatas, and tahagatas for their part find the fragmented potential inherent to a fragmentor's essence distasteful and jarring, much like the sensation of wrongness they feel from an original creature after the tahagata juxtaposes with it.

Fragmentor Insight

While it's exceptionally difficult to commu- nicate with fragmentors and even harder to parse what they're saying, fragmentors possess a rare insight into what is, what was, and what could have been due to their jumbled memories, some of which come from alternate versions of themselves. Those who wonder about the path not taken could do worse than to consult a fragmentor.

Through The Looking Glass

In addition to darkside mirrors, which send forth alternative versions of those reflected within, it's possible, though rare, to connect to realms beyond an ordinary mirror and encounter mirrorborn. The phenomenon is far more likely in places brimming with astral energies or in locations where the veil between the mortal world and the world beyond the mirror has been torn before, becoming thinner and thinner in the process. Those who enter through a mirror find that these mirror realms operate on their own bizarre rules, and while they eventually might re-emerge from another mirror, they often do so changed.

Other Mirrorborn

The mirrorborn presented here are just the tip of the iceberg, as the possibilities in the infinite mirror universes are just as endless as the multiverse itself. Some rumors of other mirrorborn include:

  • Darksiders, creatures originating from a darkside mirror who have become permanent residents of this world, either seeking to bring more residents from their reality or to establish their own fiefdom in this one.
  • Kryshards, malevolent entities that form from the reflective shards of shattered crystal balls and use mirrors to spy on many other creatures and use the information for their own foul purposes.
  • Mirror Mimes, creatures who hide within mirrors and replace a creature's natural reflection in order to devour that creature's psyche, attempting to stay unnoticed by mimicking the creature's actions in front of mirrors.
  • Reflectors, creatures that position many mirrors across the battlefield when stalking their prey, shooting beams of light that bounce off the mirrors at unexpected angles and irradiate their victims.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (medium), perception item, skill items (Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild, winged

Silkwurm.name: 蚕虫 Silkwurm

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 100 feet.name: 颤动感知（不精确）100英尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 100 feet

Regeneration 25 (Deactivated By Fire).name: 再生 25（被火焰停用） Regeneration 25 (Deactivated By Fire)

Adhesive Webbing.name: 黏性蛛网 Adhesive Webbing
Adhesive Webbing.description:
任何以近战武器对丝蠕虫进行打击的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:29] 豁免。在一次失败时，该生物的武器被缴械，并黏在丝蠕虫的身体上；如果该次打击是徒手攻击，则该生物的肢体黏在丝蠕虫的身体上，且该生物变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}。生物必须在一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:24] 检定中成功才能取回一把黏住的武器。在一次失败时，该生物受到 @Damage[2d6[piercing]] 伤害且武器仍然黏住；在一次大失败时，该生物也会黏在丝蠕虫上并变为 immobilized。一名黏住的生物若仍黏在丝蠕虫上，会在其回合结束时每回合受到 [[/r 2d6[piercing]]] 伤害；并且它可以使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} 动作来尝试从该构装体上挣脱，Escape DC 为24。

Any creature that Strikes the silkwurm with a melee weapon must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:29] save. On a failure, the creature is disarmed of its weapon, which becomes stuck to the silkwurm's body; if the Strike was an unarmed attack, the creature's limb sticks to the silkwurm's body and the creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}. A creature must succeed at a @Check[type:athletics|dc:24] check to retrieve a stuck weapon. On a failure, the creature takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage and the weapon remains stuck, and on a critical failure, the creature also becomes stuck to the silkwurm and becomes immobilized. A stuck creature takes [[/r 2d6[piercing]]] damage each round at the end of its turn if it remains stuck to the silkwurm, and it can use an @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} action to try to free itself from the construct, with an Escape DC of 24.

Nest Defense.name: 巢穴防卫 Nest Defense
Nest Defense.description:
触发 丝虫受到来自相邻生物的挥砍伤害，或受到来自相邻生物的重击。

效果 丝虫体内的蜘蛛感知到一次重大的入侵并结成虫群以击退入侵者。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:30] 豁免。若失败，该生物受到 @Damage[6d6[piercing]] 伤害并成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}（若大失败则为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}），因为一大群蜘蛛跃到攻击者身上。

Trigger The silkwurm takes slashing damage from an adjacent creature or takes a critical hit from an adjacent creature.

Effect The spiders within the silkwurm sense a major intrusion and swarm to fend off the invaders. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:30] save. On a failure, the creature takes @Damage[6d6[piercing]] damage and becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1} (@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure) as a legion of spiders leap onto the attacker.

Implant Nest.name: 植入巢 Implant Nest
Implant Nest.description:
丝虫的毒刺里充满了贪婪的幼年蜘蛛。被丝虫的毒刺打击命中的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:32] 豁免。在一次失败时，该生物被蜘蛛寄生，并受到[[/r 3d6[persistent,piercing]]] 伤害。

The silkwurm's stinger is filled with ravenous infant spiders. A creature hit by the silkwurm's stinger Strike must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:32] save. On a failure, the creature if infested with spiders and takes [[/r 3d6[persistent,piercing]]] damage.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
蚕龙吐出大量蜘蛛，在@Template[type:cone|distance:60]范围内造成@Damage[13d6[piercing]]伤害，进行一次基本@Check[type:reflex|dc:32]豁免。蚕龙在[[/br 1d4 #its Breath Weapon Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用其吐息武器。

The silkwurm breathes out a host of spiders that deals @Damage[13d6[piercing]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] with a basic @Check[type:reflex|dc:32] save. The silkwurm can't use its Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #its Breath Weapon Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Silkwurm.publicNotes:
由于生物学家和整个学术界都无法解释的原因，有时一大群节肢动物（主要是蜘蛛）会聚集在一起，并通过未知手段利用某个生物的尸体建造一个可移动、可防御的家园，以供汹涌的群体取食。丝蠕虫是这种现象最知名的例子，它像饥饿的洞穴蠕虫一样横冲直撞。

这一现象为何会发生仍是激烈争论的话题，因为显然其中涉及某种智力与魔法，然而在将丝蠕虫拆解并研究后，却找不到任何明显迹象。秘学家提出，制造丝蠕虫是普通蜘蛛从源自梦境之地的智慧蜘蛛那里学来的行为。与此同时，博物学家认为有某个原初灵体在帮助蜘蛛，以保护众多巢群；奥术师确信丝蠕虫是某种类似魔像的构造物；而宗教狂热者则将丝蠕虫视为献给其神祇的怪诞偶像。

从垃圾到宝藏

黏附在丝蠕虫身上的武器与其他物品会妨碍其旅行能力。丝蠕虫在一场胜利的战斗后会进行“休息”，让蜘蛛有时间吞食有机物并丢弃一切不可食用之物。因此，它在继续移动时可能会留下一座货真价实的宝藏堆。由于丝蠕虫缺乏用于策略的智力，拾荒者有把握跟随它们回收残余物，而无需担心那是用来引诱更多猎物的陷阱。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 250/560/1,030 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（中甲，重甲），察觉 物品，技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 灾祸，体质，延长，能量抗性（正能量，负能量），尖刺，狂野

For reasons unknown to biologists and the academic community as a whole, sometimes a megacolony of arachnids (primarily spiders) congregate together and, through unknown means, use the carcass of a creature to build a mobile, defensible home that can feed the teeming masses. The silkwurm is the most well-known example of this phenomenon, rampaging like a hungry cave worm.

Why this happens in the first place remains a hotly debated topic, as clearly some kind of intelligence and magic are involved, yet no obvious signs of them exist within silkwurms that are disassembled and studied. Esoterics posit that creating silkwurms is a behavior that normal spiders learned from intelligent spiders that descended from the Dreamlands. Meanwhile, naturalists think that a primal spirit helps the spiders in order to protect numerous colonies, arcanists are certain that silkwurms are some kind of golem-like construction, and religious zealots view silkwurms as grotesque idols for their gods.

From Trash To Treasure

The weapons and other items that stick to a silkwurm hinder its ability to travel. The silkwurm "rests" after a successful battle to give the spiders time to consume organic material and discard anything inedible. It can therefore leave behind a literal treasure trove when it moves on.
