The creature has trouble moving, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} and giving it a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is affected for 1 round.

Failure The target is affected for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} as it attempts to process the sensory shifts.

Heightened (9th) You can target up to five creatures.

Confusion.name: 困惑 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你用古怪的冲动使你的目标迷乱，导致其随机行动。效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标语无伦次，并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}，持续1分钟。其可在它每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以结束混乱。

大失败 目标混乱1分钟，且无法通过豁免提前结束。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly. The effects are determined by the target's Will save. You can Dismiss the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Object Reading.name: 物体解读 Object Reading
Object Reading.description:
你将一只手放在一个物体上，以了解过去一周内发生的、涉及该物体的一次情感事件的一条信息，具体由GM决定。如果你对同一件物品多次施放物体解读，你可以选择专注于单一事件，以获得关于该事件的更多信息片段；或者你也可以获得在适用时间范围内另一场情感事件的一条信息。

升阶（2环）你可以了解发生在过去一个月内的事件。

升阶（4环）你可以了解发生在过去一年内的事件。

升阶（6环）你可以了解发生在过去十年内的事件。

升阶（8环）你可以了解发生在过去一世纪内的事件。

升阶（9环）你可以了解发生在该物体全部历史期间内的事件。

You place a hand on an object to learn a piece of information about an emotional event that occurred involving the object within the past week, determined by the GM. If you cast object reading on the same item multiple times, you can either concentrate on a single event to gain additional pieces of information about that event, or you can gain a piece of information about another emotional event in the applicable time frame.

Heightened (2nd) You can learn about an event that occurred within the last month.

Heightened (4th) You can learn about an event that occurred within the last year.

Heightened (6th) You can learn about an event that occurred within the last decade.

Heightened (8th) You can learn about an event that occurred within the last century.

Heightened (9th) You can learn about an event that occurred within the entirety of the object's history.

Phantasmal Killer.name: 魅影杀手 Phantasmal Killer
Phantasmal Killer.description:
你创造出一个对目标而言最可怕的生物的幻影形象。只有该法术的目标能看见这名杀手，不过你能看见这道幻象疾驰向前发动攻击时的模糊轮廓。杀手的效果取决于目标的意志豁免结果。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到4d6点心灵伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标受到8d6点心灵伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 目标恐惧到可能死亡。它必须尝试一次强韧豁免；若目标失败，则其死亡。若强韧豁免成功，则目标受到12d6点心灵伤害，在其下一回合结束前获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}。此效果具有失能（特征）。

强化（+1） 在失败时伤害增加2d6，在大成功或大失败时伤害增加3d6。

You create a phantasmal image of the most fearsome creature imaginable to the target. Only the spell's target can see the killer, though you can see the vague shape of the illusion as it races forth to attack. The effect of the killer is based on the outcome of the target's Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes 4d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes 8d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is so afraid it might die. It must attempt a Fortitude save; if the target fails, it dies. On a successful Fortitude save, the target takes 12d6 mental damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} until the end of its next turn, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}. This effect has the incapacitation trait.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 on a failure and by 3d6 on a critical failure.

Fear.name: 恐惧 Fear
Fear.description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续1轮。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Impending Doom.name: 迫近的末日 Impending Doom
Impending Doom.description:
你筛选无数种可能的未来，抓住其中一个目标以格外可怖而致命的方式迎来终结的瞬间，然后向它展示自己即将死亡的视野。随着厄运逼近，这强烈的精神视野在目标眼中会变得越来越恐怖，并需要3轮才能走向结局。目标必须进行一次意志豁免以决定效果。在法术持续时间结束时，若目标受到了影响，目标将目睹自己的死亡并受到6d6精神伤害。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内不受影响。第2轮时，它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。最后，在第3轮时，它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。在第3轮结束时，它受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物立刻处于off-guard状态。第2轮时，它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。最后，在第3轮时，它还会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。在第3轮结束时，该生物受到全额伤害。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物立刻处于off-guard状态并变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。第2轮时，它变为stunned 1。最后，在第3轮时，它还会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}。在第3轮结束时，该生物受到双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

You sift through myriad potential futures, seize upon one potential moment in which the target meets a particularly gruesome and fatal end, and then show it a vision of its impending demise. The intense mental vision grows more and more terrifying to the target as the doom grows closer, and it takes 3 rounds to reach its conclusion. The target must attempt a Will saving throw to determine the effects. At the end of the spell's duration, if the target was affected, the target witnesses its death and takes 6d6 mental damage.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is unaffected for 1 round. On the second round, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}. Finally, on the third round, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}. At the end of the third round, it takes half damage.

Failure The creature is immediately off-guard. On the second round, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}. Finally, on the third round, it also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. At the end of the third round, the creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature is immediately off-guard and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}. On the second round, it becomes stunned 1. Finally, on the third round, it also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. At the end of the third round, the creature takes double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
通过一次粗略的精神接触，你尝试读取目标的心智。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后目标会对你的读心效果获得暂时免疫，持续 1 小时。

大成功或大失败 成功 当你施放法术时，目标会从你这里感知到模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

失败 当你施放法术时，你会从目标那里感知到模糊的表层想法，并且你得知其智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，并且在法术的持续时间内，你可以维持法术以再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得任何额外豁免。

With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind. It must attempt a Will save. The target then becomes temporarily immune to your mind reading for 1 hour.

Critical Success The target perceives vague surface thoughts from you when you Cast the Spell.

Success You find out whether the target's Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Failure You perceive vague surface thoughts from the target when you Cast the Spell, and you find out whether its Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Critical Failure As failure, and for the duration of the spell, you can Sustain the Spell to detect the target's surface thoughts again. The target doesn't receive any additional saves.

Invisibility.name: 隐形 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
目标被幻术所笼罩，变得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉}状态，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，从而使其改为对它们而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}状态。若目标使用敌对动作，则该法术在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续 1 分钟，但若目标使用敌对动作也不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Hideous Laughter.name: 骇人狂笑 Hideous Laughter
Hideous Laughter.description:
目标被无法控制的笑声所淹没。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被无法控制的笑声所折磨。它无法使用反应动作。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 且无法使用反应动作。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 且在1轮内无法使用动作或反应动作。随后它承受失败效果。

The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter. It must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is plagued with uncontrollable laugher. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and can't use actions or reactions for 1 round. It then suffers the failure effects.

Déjà Vu.name: 既视感 Déjà Vu
Déjà Vu.description:
你在目标的心智中循环一段思维过程，迫使它一遍又一遍地重复相同的动作。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。如果目标失败，那么无论目标在其下个回合使用了什么动作，它都必须在其随后的回合重复这些动作。这些动作必须以相同的顺序重复，并尽可能贴近相同的细节。例如，如果目标进行了一次攻击，它必须在可能的情况下对同一个生物重复该次攻击；如果目标移动，它必须在可能的情况下于其下个回合以相同的距离与方向移动。

如果目标无法重复某个动作，例如已耗尽的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}，或需要以已死亡的生物为目标，则它可以就该动作按其意愿行动，但会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，直到其回合结束。

You loop a thought process in the target's mind, forcing it to repeat the same actions over again. The target must attempt a Will save. If the target fails, whatever actions the target uses on its next turn, it must repeat on its following turn. The actions must be repeated in the same order and as close to the same specifics as possible. For example, if the target makes an attack, it must repeat the attack against the same creature, if possible, and if the target moves, it must move the same distance and direction, if possible, on its next turn.

If the target can't repeat an action, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Casting a Spell} that has been exhausted or needing to target a creature that has died, it can act as it chooses for that action but becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of its turn.

Schadenfreude.name: 幸灾乐祸 Schadenfreude
Schadenfreude.description:
触发 你对抗敌人的效果进行豁免时大失败。

你用敌人在你惨败时那种洋洋得意的快感来分散其注意力。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物因自得其乐而分心，在1轮内其察觉检定和意志豁免承受-1状态减值。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TjGHxli0edXI6rAg]{法术效果：幸灾乐祸（成功）}

失败 该生物被自己的乐趣所淹没，在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

大失败 该生物沉迷于自己的乐趣，在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，并且处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

Trigger You critically fail a saving throw against a foe's effect.

You distract your enemy with their feeling of smug pleasure when you fail catastrophically. They must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is distracted by its amusement and takes a -1 status penalty on Perception checks and Will saves for 1 round. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TjGHxli0edXI6rAg]{Spell Effect: Schadenfreude (Success)}

Failure The creature is overcome by its amusement and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is lost in its amusement and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Soothe.name: 安抚 Soothe
Soothe.description:
你抚慰目标的心灵，增强其精神防御并治疗其伤口。当你施放法术时，目标恢复1d10+4点生命值，并在持续时间内，对抗精神效果的豁免获得+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{法术效果：安抚术}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加1d10+4。

You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds. The target regains 1d10+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell and gains a +2 status bonus to saves against mental effects for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{Spell Effect: Soothe}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d10+4.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你放出一道脉冲以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得其他信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。

只有当幻术魔法的效果等级低于你侦测魔法法术的等级时，你才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你会得知该法术在射程内所侦测到的最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同等强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会定位最高等级魔法的来源。类似于模糊感官，你不会得知确切位置，但能将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体之内（若来源大于该范围，则定位到距离最近的那个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Daze.name: 恍惚 Daze
Daze.description:
你令目标的心智蒙上阴影，并用一次精神冲击使其恍惚。该冲击造成等同于你施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声动唇，但这些话语并非从你口中发出，而是直接传到目标的耳中。其他人听你的话并不会比你正常动唇时更清楚，但目标能听见你的话，就如同他们正站在你身旁一样。

若目标愿意，他们可以以反应动作（）作出简短回应，或在其下一回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能看见你且在射程内才能这样做。若他们回应，其回应会像原始讯息一样，直接送入你的耳中。

升阶（3环） 该法术的射程提升至500尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造一只单个的魔法之手，可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并缓慢移动，最多移动20英尺。因为你在使物体悬浮，你可以让它向任何方向移动。当你维持法术时，你可以让物体额外移动20英尺。如果法术结束时物体在空气中，物体会坠落。

强化（3环） 你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

强化（5环） 射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

强化（7环） 射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为2或更低的物体为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Shield.name: 盾牌 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面魔法力场护盾。这视为使用举盾动作，使你在直到你下个回合开始前对AC获得+1环境加值，但不需要空出一只手来使用。

当该法术效果持续期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡}反应动作（）。该护盾具有硬度5。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，且你在10分钟内不能再次施放它。不同于普通的盾牌格挡，你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来对抗@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{魔法飞弹}法术。

升阶该法术会提高护盾的硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

升阶（3环） 该护盾具有硬度10。

升阶（5环） 该护盾具有硬度15。

升阶（7环） 该护盾具有硬度20。

升阶（9环） 该护盾具有硬度25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Tongues (Constant).name: 万语通（恒定） Tongues (Constant)
Tongues (Constant).description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论是什么语言，并且也能说其他生物的语言。当处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话时，它可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标不知道那是什么语言。

强化（第7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Swarming Bites.name: 蜂拥啃咬 Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description:
灵能鼠王空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[4d12[piercing]] 伤害，且必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:31|basic:true] 豁免。豁免失败的生物会暴露于灵能热病。

Each enemy in the psychic rat king's space takes @Damage[4d12[piercing]] damage and must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:31|basic:true] save. A creature that fails its Reflex save is exposed to psychic fever.

Psychic Fever.name: 灵能热病 Psychic Fever
Psychic Fever.description:
由心灵热病导致的迟钝和失去意识（特征）状态不会自行改善，直到疾病被治愈。

豁免 @Check[type:will|dc:34]

阶段 1 携带者且无不良效果（1d4 小时），

阶段 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{迟钝 2}（1 天），

阶段 3 迟钝 2 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{困惑}（1 天），

阶段 4 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷}（1 天），

阶段 5 死亡

The stupefied and unconscious conditions suffered from psychic fever don't improve on their own until the disease is cured.

Saving Throw @Check[type:will|dc:34]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1d4 hours),

Stage 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} (1 day),

Stage 3 stupefied 2 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} (1 day),

Stage 4 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious} (1 day),

Stage 5 dead

Psychic Rat King.publicNotes:
普通的鼠王是一群老鼠，其尾巴被物理地缠绕并绑在一起；而心灵鼠王则是一群十几只或更多老鼠，它们的心智以几乎相同的方式被缠绕并束缚在一起。由于它们的互联纯粹是精神层面的，心灵鼠王之间没有任何物理连接，从远处看它们可能会被误认为是普通的鼠群——至少要等到旁观者注意到它们发光的紫色眼睛或它们变大而暴露在外的大脑为止。

心灵鼠王极度高智力，但仍保有老鼠的天性本能；许多心灵鼠王可以在大城市的下水道中找到，它们将其他老鼠纳入控制以壮大集体，并实现某种未知目的。许多初出茅庐的冒险者走进下水道时以为对付老鼠会很轻松，结果却遭到一个智力与力量都远远超过他们自身的虫群袭击。

接管世界

心灵鼠王似乎有着无穷无尽的野心。它们并不满足于成为下水道的顶级掠食者，而是把目标锁定在席卷整座城市上。这一议程之所以为人所知，源于某座城镇里一则不幸的警世故事：一个孩子收养了心灵鼠王，以为其成员只是普通啮齿动物。老鼠们将计就计，任由孩子给它们穿上华丽衣服、戴上可爱的软帽，从而遮掩那些会暴露其本性的生理特征。它们把完美宠物的戏演得天衣无缝，以至于当老鼠开始在街上袭击人们时也没人怀疑它们。等到这家人意识到自己窝藏的是入侵背后的主谋时，已经只剩下他们了——只剩下他们，以及成千上万只小爪子在他们门外抓挠的声音。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 560/1,250/2,300 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉物品，技能物品（Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Stealth）

可用灌注属性 bane, energy resistant（positive）, evil, 智力, 法术（Occult: command, confusion, daze, detect magic, dominate, déjà vu, fear, feeblemind, hideous laughter, impending doom, invisibility, mage hand, message, mind reading, object reading, paralyze, paranoia, paranoia, phantasmal killer, phantom pain, retrocognition, schadenfreude, shield, soothe, synesthesia, tongues, visions of danger, warp mind）, wild

While a normal rat king is a group of rats whose tails have been physically intertwined and bound together, a psychic rat king is a group of a dozen or more rats whose minds have been intertwined and bound together in much the same way. Since their interconnection is purely mental, psychic rat kings have no physical connection, and they could be mistaken for an ordinary rat swarm from a distance, at least until the onlooker notices their glowing purple eyes or their enlarged exposed brains.

Hyperintelligent but still possessing the natural instincts of rats, many psychic rat kings can be found in the sewers of large cities, bringing other rats under their control to grow the collective and fulfill some unknown purpose. Many fledgling adventurers have gone down into the sewers expecting an easy time fighting rats, only to be assailed by a swarm with an intelligence and power far exceeding their own.

To Take Over The World

Psychic rat kings appear to have limitless ambition. Not content with becoming the apex predator of the sewer, they set their sights on overrunning entire cities. This agenda became known due to the unfortunate cautionary tale of one town where a child adopted the psychic rat king, thinking its members were normal rodents. The rats played along as the child dressed them in fancy clothes and cute bonnets, disguising the physical features that would have given their nature away. They played the perfect pet so well that no one suspected them when rats began attacking people in the streets. By the time the family realized they were harboring the masterminds behind the invasion, they were the only ones left. Just them and the thousands of little paws scratching at their door.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 560/1,250/2,300 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, energy resistant (positive), evil, intelligence, spells (Occult: command, confusion, daze, detect magic, dominate, déjà vu, fear, feeblemind, hideous laughter, impending doom, invisibility, mage hand, message, mind reading, object reading, paralyze, paranoia, paranoia, phantasmal killer, phantom pain, retrocognition, schadenfreude, shield, soothe, synesthesia, tongues, visions of danger, warp mind), wild
Psychic Rat King.prototypeToken: 灵媒鼠王 Psychic Rat King

Proselytizer.name: 传教士 Proselytizer

Painsight.name: 痛悟 Painsight
Painsight.description:
宣教者会自动知晓其所见的生物是否具有任何@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{天谴}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{垂死}和@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤（状态）}状态，以及这些状态的数值。

A proselytizer automatically knows whether a creature it sees has any of the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying}, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} conditions, as well as the value of those conditions.

Regeneration 25 (Deactivated by Good or.name: 再生 25（被善良或银停用） Regeneration 25 (Deactivated by Good or Silver)

Pain Link.name: 痛苦链接 Pain Link
Pain Link.description:
触发 传教士受到伤害，且用其锁链使一个生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained}

效果 传教士与被擒抱的生物分享其痛苦，使该生物受到等同于传教士因本次触发所受总伤害的精神伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:36|basic:true] 豁免。

Trigger The proselytizer takes damage and has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} with its chain

Effect The proselytizer shares its pain with the grappled creature, causing the creature to take mental damage equal to the total triggering damage the proselytizer took, with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:36|basic:true] save.

Unnerving Gaze.name: 慑人凝视 Unnerving Gaze
Unnerving Gaze.description:
30英尺。当一个生物在灵光内结束其回合时，它必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:will|dc:33] 豁免，否则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}。

30 feet. When a creature ends its turn in the aura, it must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:33] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Hidden Shadow Chain.name: 隐秘暗影链 Hidden Shadow Chain
Hidden Shadow Chain.description:
数百条锁链从传教士兜帽的袖口中涌出并射出，将路径上的一切穿刺贯穿。@Template[type:line|distance:30] 内的每个生物根据一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:36] 豁免，受到 [[/r 10d4[slashing],5[bleed]]]{10d4 挥砍伤害与5持续流血} 伤害。传教士在接下来的 [[/br 1d4 #Hidden Shadow Chain Recharge]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用暗影锁链。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，并被传教士的带刺链条 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{抓住}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并被传教士的带刺链条 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{束缚}。

Hundreds of chains emerge from the sleeves of the proselytizer's hood and shoot out, skewering everything in their path. Each creature in a @Template[type:line|distance:30] takes [[/r 10d4[slashing],5[bleed]]]{10d4 slashing damage and 5 persistent bleed} damage, depending on a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:36] save. The proselytizer can't use Hidden Shadow Chain again for [[/br 1d4 #Hidden Shadow Chain Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} by the proselytizer's spiked chain .

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} by the proselytizer's spiked chain.

Infinite Chains.name: 无尽锁链 Infinite Chains
Infinite Chains.description:
传教者可以用它的锁链使任意数量的生物处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}状态，并且即使它的锁链抓住了一个生物，也可以继续用它的锁链进行打击。

The proselytizer can have any number of creatures @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} with its chain and can continue to Strike with it's chain even if it has a creature grabbed with its chain.

Painful Determination.name: 痛苦的决意 Painful Determination
Painful Determination.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 传教者用一根尖刺刺入自己的一处要害，并让尖刺嵌在他们的血肉之中。他们受到 [[/r 50]] 伤害，这种伤害无法以任何方式被防止（但他们可以使用 Pain Link 与另一名生物分担该伤害）。随后，传教者选择一个正影响他们的法术或状态，以 8 的反制等级与 [[/r 1d20+30 #Counteract]]{+30} 的反制调整值尝试反制该法术或状态。这不会阻止该状态在之后再次影响传教者，并且它无法移除情境性或位置性的状态，例如处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} 或因被夹击而处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}。

Frequency once per round

Effect The proselytizer stabs themselves in a vital point with a spike, leaving the spike embedded in their flesh. They take [[/r 50]] damage, which can't be prevented in any way (though they can share the damage with another creature using Pain Link). The proselytizer then chooses one spell or condition affecting them, attempting to counteract the spell or condition with a counteract level of 8 and a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+30 #Counteract]]{+30}. This doesn't prevent the condition from affecting the proselytizer again later, and it can't remove situational or positional conditions such as being @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} or being @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} due to being flanked.

Proselytizer.publicNotes:
传教者是维尔斯特拉克社会的斥候与间谍。他们搜寻四方，将自己关于痛苦与欢愉的哲学传播给所有愿意倾听的人。由于他们用黑袍遮蔽了维尔斯特拉克的特征，乍看之下，他们可能与普通类人生物无异。这使他们能够混入聚居地，大大有助于他们秘密地将他人转化到自己的事业之中。

对于那些仍犹豫是否要接受传教者所能提供的赋礼的人，传教者可以强迫他们接触传教者的锁链，同时传教者残害自己，让对方共同体验那令人难以忍受的剧痛。这段经历往往会让受害者昏迷，但也永远地改变了他们：他们如今知晓痛苦的极限，并且不再被其束缚。

让我们猎食

传教者的吸引力在理解一点之前或许显得怪异：皈依者往往本就身处痛苦之中。传教者会寻找社会中脆弱的人——那些看不到自身苦难尽头的人——并向他们提供信念：他们的经历服务于更伟大的目的。一个击败传教者的社群最好回收其锁链。这些链节仍保留着让一名生物体验另一者痛苦的能力。它们可能会被卖给赏金猎人，后者用它们来确保囚犯不会攻击自己。然而它们也不一定只能用于惩罚；相反，它们还能通过让人们学习他人的感受来促进共情。

建议怪物部位

怪物部位 810/1,850/3,400 gp

合格精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（光）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（特技动作、交涉、威吓、学识［拷问］、医疗、宗教）

合格灌注属性 祸害、魅力、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（寒冷、正能量）、邪恶、守序、心灵、投掷、野性

Proselytizers are the scouts and spies of velstrac society. They scour the land, spreading their philosophy of pain and pleasure to all who are willing to listen. Thanks to their dark robe shrouding their velstrac features, at first glance, they can appear like a normal humanoid. This allows them to blend into a settlement, greatly aiding in clandestinely converting others to their cause.

For those who are hesitant to consider the gifts the proselytizer has to offer, the proselytizer can have them share in experiencing excruciating pain by forcing them to touch the proselytizer's chain while the proselytizer maims themselves. This experience oftentimes leaves the victim unconscious but forever changed, as they now know the limits of pain and are no longer bound by them.

Let Us Prey

A proselytizer's appeal may seem strange until one understands that those who convert are often people who are already in pain. Proselytizers seek out the vulnerable in society who do not see an end to their suffering and instead offer them faith that their experience serves a greater purpose. A community that defeats a proselytizer would do well to recover its chains. The links retain the ability for a creature to experience another's pain. They may be sold to bounty hunters, who use them to ensure their prisoners do not attack them. Yet they do not have to be used for punishment and can instead promote empathy by allowing people to learn how someone else feels.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 810/1,850/3,400 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Lore [Torture], Medicine, Religion)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (cold, positive), evil, lawful, mental, throwing, wild

Precognate.name: 预知者 Precognate

Instinct Driven.name: 本能驱动 Instinct Driven
Instinct Driven.description:
对于无心智生物而言，先知体具有极强的适应性，并会使用异常复杂的战术。然而，它们仍然有一套可预测的惯例：除非其猎物已处于某种负面状态（例如 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}），否则先知体在每个回合的第一个敌对动作都是使用运动技能来进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip}，以阻碍其猎物。多只先知体一同狩猎时，若有可能，它们总是选择不同的目标。若其预言能力变为无效，例如处于反魔法力场中，先知体会漫无目的地游荡，并且在其预言能力恢复之前不进行任何其他动作；而随着预言能力的回归，它的本能也会一并回归。

For mindless creatures, precognates are highly adaptive and use unusually complex tactics. However they still have a predictable routine: unless their prey already has a negative condition (such as @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}), precognates' first hostile action each turn is to use Athletics to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} in order to hamper their prey. Multiple precognates hunting together always select different targets if possible. If its divinations become inactive, such as in an antimagic field, a precognate wanders aimlessly and takes no other actions until its divinations return, and with them, its instincts.

Predictive Measure.name: 预测措施 Predictive Measure
Predictive Measure.description:
触发 一个生物试图以预知者为目标，或试图将预知者纳入一个效果区域

效果 预知者移动（Step）或疾走（Stride）。若预知者不再是有效的目标，或若预知者移出该区域，触发生物可以选择另一个动作。

Trigger A creature attempts to target the precognate, or attempts to include the precognate in an area of effect

Effect The precognate Steps or Strides. The triggering creature can select another action if the precognate is no longer a valid target, or if the precognate moves out of the area.

Efficient Takedown.name: 高效放倒 Efficient Takedown
Efficient Takedown.description:
预知者的预言确定了使猎物失能的最优方案。它最多进行三次运动学动作，在 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Disarm]{缴械}、@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{擒抱}、@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{绊摔}或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{推撞}之间选择。预知者在一次高效制伏期间，不能对同一目标使用同一种运动学动作超过一次。例如，它不能对同一目标绊摔两次或三次。预知者的利爪一次擒抱最多可以同时抓住3个生物，但它只能束缚其中一个。预知者的多重攻击减值直到所有检定都已尝试之后才会增加。

The precognate's divinations determine an optimal plan to disable prey. It takes up to three Athletics actions, choosing between @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Disarm]{Disarm}, @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple}, @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip}, or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove}. The precognate can't use the same Athletics action against the same target more than once during an Efficient Takedown. For example, it can't Trip the same target twice or three times. A precognate's claws can hold up to 3 creatures in a grapple at once, but it can restrain only one of them. The precognate's multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after all the checks have been attempted.

Optimal Avoidance.name: 最优规避 Optimal Avoidance
Optimal Avoidance.description:
预知者先踏步，然后以其速度的一半进行疾奔。

The precognate Steps and then Strides up to half its Speed.

Precognate.publicNotes:
难以捉摸的预知体运用强力的占卜来弥补其缺乏心智的不足。预知体起初被认为是极其聪明、能够窥见未来的野兽，这也导致了它们具有误导性的名字。在一群猎人成功活捉了一只之后，学者通过尸体解剖发现，预知体不仅没有任何自身的认知功能，甚至连一个集中的心智都没有。相反，它们如同水母一般，其功能分散在身体各处。

预知体强大的占卜能力控制着它们的每一次移动，因此它们受本能驱使去执行一些非常特定的行为，乍看之下仿佛很聪明。这种极端层级的占卜魔法使它们能在战士来得及完成挥砍之前，就避开一次剑的打击。预知体的身体能力相当不均衡。它们的反射如闪电般迅捷，但它们大多数的运动本领都来自于瞄准猎物自己都未察觉的弱点。

预知体可以被驯服并训练，但方式与有心智的生物不同，因为它们无法学习，只能依靠自身的魔法来适应。就预知体而言，训练进展更多在于训练者敏锐地理解它们的魔法例行程序如何运作，并加以利用，使之对训练者有利。在野外，预知体是独行的猎手，但也有报告称它们有时会组成群体。

使命：不可思议

预知体在探索地城以及其他布满陷阱的环境时需求极高。它们的操控者会将其放开，让它们向不同方向行动，并仔细观察它们如何沿着安全路线前进、以及如何避开那些可能杀死任何其他生物的怪物。预知体的体型与大多数类人生物大致相当，因此它们比更小的野兽更适合作为测试对象；后者可能仅因体型缘故就能躲开陷阱。然而，使用预知体并不能保证安全，因为它们可能对某些触发机制的预判精确到能以细微的方式绕过它们，而这些方式几乎不可能被察觉或模仿。许多过度自信的冒险队伍在击败墓穴的守卫后，却反而死于一个简单的箭矢陷阱。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（劈砍），护甲（轻型，中型），技能物品（特技动作，运动，隐匿，求生）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），力量，野性

The elusive precognate uses potent divination to make up for its lack of a mind. Precognates were originally believed to be highly intelligent beasts with the ability to see into the future, which led to their misleading name. After a group of hunters managed to capture one alive, scholars discovered through an autopsy that precognates not only have no cognitive functions of their own, but they don't even have a centralized mind. Instead, like a jellyfish, their functions are distributed throughout their bodies.

Precognates' powerful divination abilities control their every movement, and thus they are driven by instinct to perform very specific behaviors that seem intelligent at first glance. This extreme level of divinatory magic allows them to avoid a sword strike before the warrior has time to complete the swing. The physical abilities of precognates are quite lopsided. They have lightning- quick reflexes, but most of their athletic prowess comes from targeting weak points that their prey aren't even aware of.

Precognates can be tamed and trained, but not in the same way as creatures with minds can be, since they can't learn and only have their magic to adapt. In the case of precognatess, training progress is more about being keenly aware of how their magical routines work and exploiting them in the trainer's favor. In the wild, precognates are solitary hunters, but they have been reported to sometimes form packs.

Mission: Incredible

Precognates are in high demand for exploring dungeons and other trap-ridden environments. Their handlers let them loose in different directions and watch carefully as they navigate the safe routes and evade the monsters that might kill any other creature. Precognates are about the same size as most humanoids, so they make better test subjects than smaller beasts, who might avoid a trap simply due to their size. Using a precognate does not guarantee safety, however, as they may anticipate some trigger mechanisms so precisely that they bypass them in subtle ways that are impossible to notice or emulate. Many an overconfident adventuring party has defeated a tomb's guardian only to fall victim to a simple arrow trap.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Arrongtata Swarm (Expanded).name: 阿龙格塔塔虫群（扩展） Arrongtata Swarm (Expanded)
Arrongtata Swarm (Expanded).tokenName: 阿隆塔塔虫群 Arrongtata Swarm

Telepathy 50 feet.name: 心灵感应 50 尺 Telepathy 50 feet

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Speak with Plants (Constant).name: 与植物交谈（恒定） Speak with Plants (Constant)
Speak with Plants (Constant).description:
你可以向植物和真菌提问并获得回答，但该法术不会让它们变得比平常更友善或更聪明。大多数普通植物和真菌对周围世界有其独特的视角，因此它们无法辨认关于生物的细节，也不了解其近邻范围之外的世界。狡猾的植物或真菌怪物很可能言辞简短且闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的则常常发表些愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal. Most normal plants and fungi have a distinctive view of the world around them, so they don't recognize details about creatures or know anything about the world beyond their immediate vicinity. Cunning plant or fungus monsters are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Expanded Formation.name: 扩展阵型 Expanded Formation
Expanded Formation.description:
阿隆格塔塔使用一个动作来散开，使其AC和反射豁免承受–2环境减值，但将虫群的体型增至超大型。扩展阵型效果持续生效，直到虫群使用另一种阵型，或以单动作退出扩展阵型。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.loj6doNxK9ngYGG9]{效果：扩展阵型}

The arrongtata use an action to spread out, taking a –2 circumstance penalty to AC and Reflex saves but increasing the swarm's size to Huge. The Expanded Formation remains in effect until the swarm uses another formation or exits Expanded Formation as a single action.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.loj6doNxK9ngYGG9]{Effect: Expanded Formation}

Dazing Glare.name: 目眩怒视 Dazing Glare
Dazing Glare.description:
阿隆格塔塔虫群的所有眼睛同时对其周围的敌人闪烁，迫使30尺内的所有敌人尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 意志豁免。

大成功 该生物免疫“目眩眩光”1分钟。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在一轮内为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}。

大失败 该生物在一轮内为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}。

All of the eyes of the arrongtata swarm flash simultaneously at its surrounding enemies, forcing all enemies within 30 feet to attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save.

Critical Success The creature is immune to Dazing Glare for 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for one round.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for one round.

Phalanx Attack.name: 方阵攻击 Phalanx Attack
Phalanx Attack.description:
虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[2d10[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] 豁免）。

Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[2d10[piercing]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] save).

Spear Storm.name: 长矛风暴 Spear Storm
Spear Storm.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 阿隆格塔塔虫群掷出一阵长矛齐射，瞄准其敌人的弱点，目标为一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]。该区域内的敌人受到 @Damage[6d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] 豁免。

大成功或大失败成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并受到 @Damage[1[bleed]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并受到 [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] 伤害。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The arrongtata swarm hurls a barrage of spears targeting its enemies' weak points in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]. Enemies in this area take @Damage[6d6[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and @Damage[1[bleed]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] damage.

Arrongtata Swarm (Expanded).publicNotes:
阿隆格塔塔虫群是一支由约400名阿隆格塔塔组成的凝聚且忠诚的营。由于阿隆格塔塔的心灵感应连接与严苛的军事训练，这支营能像蜂巢思维一样运作。阿隆格塔塔虫群通常由一名阿隆格塔塔指挥官统领。

阿隆格塔塔是微型的双足灵体，长着短粗、尖锐的尾巴，用来托举它们脱离身体的面孔作为盾牌。这些面孔具有两只圆形、不眨眼的眼睛，可依命令发出辉光，并能协同闪耀强光以削弱它们的敌人。这些面孔覆盖了它们方块状身体的全部，并且灵体与其盾牌面孔之间存在心灵感应连接。

阿隆格塔塔会敌视任何它们认为可能伤害自然的生物。这些灵体尚武，持续磨练其战争技能。它们结成营，而营中每名阿隆格塔塔之间的联结使它们能毫不费力地对齐并重新排列它们的盾牌面孔与长矛，从而娴熟地攻击它们的敌人。有时，虫群中的某个阿隆格塔塔会打完整场战斗都从未握持过自己的盾牌面孔。

阿隆格塔塔曾是神灵（kami），它们抛弃了自己的守护职责，去追猎圣地中的闯入者。放弃作为神灵的义务使它们得以自由游荡，但尽管它们受到的惩罚远不如恶鬼（oni）严厉，这一选择仍让它们失去了视野与大部分魔法力量。为克服这一点，阿隆格塔塔将自己的身体绑定在一个盾牌面孔上，该面孔由它们用天然材料制作而成。阿隆格塔塔会敌视任何它们认为将伤害自然的生物，不过它们与非邪恶的恶鬼相处得出奇地好，因为双方能够共情彼此的过去、各自的选择，以及所承受的过于严苛的惩罚。若其盾牌面孔被毁，它们能在一周内制作一个新的，而且其坚固程度足以让那些成功击败它们的人将其作为盾牌材料使用。

解读面孔

阿隆格塔塔用来制作盾牌面孔的材料具有个人意义。大多数会选择与它们作为神灵时所守护之物相匹配的材料，也有些会选择它们在新角色中希望保护的事物。前线战士往往拥有由坚硬木材或金属制成的面孔，以获得更好的防护。谋士则拥有岩石面孔，以引导大地的感知；而草或毛皮面孔能帮助斥候融入它们的环境。但最可怖的阿隆格塔塔是那些拥有骨质面孔的——它们是复仇的灵体，已无所可失，因为它们所求守护的一切都已死去。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、学识[战争]、自然）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），强化，精神，法术（原初：与植物交谈），力量，坚固，野性

An arrongtata swarm is a cohesive and loyal battalion of approximately 400 arrongtata. The battalion works like a hive mind due to arrongtata's telepathic connection and rigorous military training. Arrongtata swarms are often commanded by an arrongtata commander.

Arrongtata are tiny, bipedal spirits with stubby, pointed tails that hold their detached faces as shields. These faces contain two round, unblinking eyes that glow on command and can be used in unison to flash brightly to weaken their enemies. The faces cover the entirety of their blocky bodies, and there is a telepathic connection between the spirit and its shield face.

Arrongtata are hostile to any creature they believe are likely to harm nature. These spirits are militaristic, constantly honing their skills in warfare. They form battalions, and the bonds between each arrongtata in the battalion allow them to effortlessly align and rearrange their shield faces and spears to skillfully attack their enemies. Sometimes, an arrongtata in a swarm will go an entire battle without ever holding their own shield face.

Arrongtata were once kami who forsook their wards to seek out trespassers on sacred grounds. Abandoning their duty as kami allowed them to roam freely, but while they weren't punished nearly as harshly as oni, their choice still cost them their vision and most of their magical powers. To overcome this, arrongtata bound their bodies to a shield face that they crafted from natural materials. Arrongtata are hostile to any creature they believe will harm nature, though they get along surprisingly well with non-evil oni, as the two can empathize with each other's pasts, their choices, and the overly harsh punishments they've received. If their shield face is destroyed, they can craft a new one in a week, and it is sturdy enough to be used as shield material by those who manage to defeat them.

Reading Faces

The material an arrongtata uses to craft a shield face carries personal significance. Most choose a material matching what they defended as kami, though others select something they wish to protect in their new roles. Front-line fighters often have faces made of hardy wood or metal for better protection. Strategists have rock faces that channel the wisdom of the earth, while grass or fur faces help scouts blend into their environments. But the most fearsome arrongtata are those with bone faces—they are spirits of vengeance with nothing left to lose, for all they sought to defend has died.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Lore [Warfare], Nature)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), fortification, mental, spells (Primal: speak with plants), strength, sturdy, wild
Arrongtata Swarm (Expanded).prototypeToken: 阿隆塔塔虫群 Arrongtata Swarm

Twistwere Wolf.name: 扭曲狼人 Twistwere Wolf

Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 气味（不精确）30尺 Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet

Twisted Vitality.name: 扭曲生命力 Twisted Vitality
Twisted Vitality.description:
需求 扭曲狼人处于动物形态

触发 扭曲狼人受到超过10点伤害

效果 扭曲狼人立即转变为其混合形态，并且必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:20] 豁免中成功，否则将进入失控狂乱，获得月光狂乱的效果，持续1分钟或直到被变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷}。

Requirements The twistwere wolf is in animal form

Trigger The twistwere wolf takes more than 10 points of damage

Effect The twistwere wolf immediately shifts into its hybrid form and must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:20] save or else enter an out of control frenzy with the effects of moonlight frenzy for 1 minute or until being rendered @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious}.

Change Shape.name: 变形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
扭变狼人变为其混合形态或动物形态。每种形态都有特定且持续的外观。其自然形态看起来像一只普通的狼，而其混合形态看起来像一只扭曲版本的狼。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The twistwere wolf changes into their hybrid or animal shape. Each shape has a specific, persistent appearance. Its natural form looks like a normal wolf, whereas its hybrid form looks like a twisted version of a wolf.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Curse of the Twistwere.name: 扭曲狼人诅咒 Curse of the Twistwere
Curse of the Twistwere.description:
此诅咒仅影响动物

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]。在每个满月，受诅咒的生物必须再次成功进行一次强韧豁免，否则会变成同种类的狼人形态生物直到黎明。该生物由GM控制，并在半夜中暴走，随后坠落 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷} 直到黎明。

This curse affects only animals

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]. On each full moon, the cursed creature must succeed at another Fortitude save or turn into the same kind of werecreature until dawn. The creature is under the GM's control and goes on a rampage for half the night before falling @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious} until dawn.

Moonlight Frenzy.name: 月光狂乱 Moonlight Frenzy
Moonlight Frenzy.description:
当满月的光照在其身上时，扭曲狼人必须进入混合形态，此后无法 Change Shape，体型增大一档，触及增加5尺，其颚部打击的伤害增加2。当月落或日出时，该狼人返回动物形态，并陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued} 状态，持续 [[/br 2d4 #hours]]{2d4小时}。

@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-effects.dRe8n1nBWMIXd8jh]{效果：月狂}

When the light of a full moon shines upon them, the twistwere wolf must enter hybrid form, can't Change Shape thereafter, becomes one size larger, increases their reach by 5 feet, and increases the damage of their jaws Strike by 2. When the moon sets or the sun rises, the werecreature returns to animal form and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued} for [[/br 2d4 #hours]]{2d4 hours}.

@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-effects.dRe8n1nBWMIXd8jh]{Effect: Moon Frenzy}

Primal Shock.name: 原初震击 Primal Shock
Primal Shock.description:
需求 扭曲狼人本轮使用了改变形态或扭曲活力

效果 扭曲狼人进行一次打击。若命中，它尝试对其打击到的生物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize}，无视因不共享语言而产生的减值。

Requirements The twistwere wolf used Change Shape or Twisted Vitality this round

Effect The twistwere wolf makes a Strike. If it hits, it attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize} the creature it struck, ignoring the penalty for not sharing a language.

Twistwere Wolf.publicNotes:
当人们想到狼人类生物时，脑海中通常浮现的是那些注定会在满月之下变形为动物、以及凶残的动物—类人混合形态的类人生物；它们被诅咒着在自己的社群中横冲直撞。然而最近，这道原始的诅咒以一种微妙却令人震惊的人畜共患式跃迁，从类人转移到了动物身上，造就了被称为“扭曲狼人”的变形野兽。

扭曲狼人的动物形态可以是任何体型，且只影响动物。最早已知的此类生物是家猫、鸣禽与小型啮齿动物，但后来也有人声称见过狗、家畜与野生动物。处于动物形态时，扭曲狼人表现得与同类的普通动物完全无异——直到满月的光照在它们身上。扭曲狼人能将诅咒传给后代，或通过咬伤传播诅咒。与其他真正的狼人类生物一样，天生带有诅咒者对自身的变形能力拥有完全控制，唯独在满月期间变形不可抗拒，不过它们通常只会在生命受到威胁时才会选择变形。

在混合形态下，扭曲狼人看起来像其动物形态被拉长并扭曲的版本，肌肉隆起、肢体延展，使任何不幸沦为其失控狂怒猎物的人都心生恐惧。

其他扭曲狼人

下方数据代表一只扭曲狼人狼，但也存在其他扭曲狼人。你可以通过调整这些数据来获得与其他动物相关的能力，移除击倒，并可能调整其等级，以构筑这些其他扭曲狼人。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍），护甲（光、中型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、欺瞒、威吓、隐匿、求生）

符合条件的灌注属性 灾祸，体质，延展，能量抗性（正能量），力量，荒野

When one thinks of werecreatures, the mind's eye typically goes to those humanoids doomed to transform into animals and their vicious animal- humanoid hybrid shapes beneath the full moon, cursed to rampage through their own communities. Recently, though, this primal curse made a subtle but startling zoonotic jump from humanoids to animals, resulting in shapechanging beasts called twistweres.

A twistwere's animal form can be of any size and only affects animals. The first known creatures of this kind were house cats, songbirds, and small rodents, but later it was said that dogs, livestock, and wild animals had been seen as well. While in their animal form, twistweres behave as perfectly normal animals of their type, that is, until the light of the full moon shines upon them. Twistweres can pass on their curse to their offspring, or they can transmit the curse through their bite. As with other true werecreatures, those born with the curse have full control over their shapechanging abilities except during a full moon, when the transformation is irresistible, though they typically only transform by choice when their lives are in danger.

In hybrid form, a twistwere appears as a stretched-out and distorted version of their animal form, with muscular bulges and elongated appendages that drive fear into the hearts of any who are unfortunate enough to fall prey to their uncontrollable rage.

Other Twistweres

The statistics below represent a twistwere wolf, but other twistweres exist. You can build these other twistweres by adjusting these statistics to gain abilities relevant to the other animal, removing Knockdown, and potentially adjusting its level.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Intimidation, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Possibility Golem.name: 可能性魔像 Possibility Golem

Cloud of Possibility.name: 可能性之云 Cloud of Possibility
Cloud of Possibility.description:
可能性魔像同时存在并不存在于一个60英尺×60英尺的正方形区域内的每一个空间中。正因如此，其他生物可以自由穿过它的空间，不过对其他生物而言，该空间是困难地形。由于它持续在每个空间中既存在又不存在，可能性魔像始终处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{隐匿} 状态。即使是 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility} 也无法揭露它，尽管 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Dimensional Lock} 或类似魔法会将可能性魔像缩减为一个大型生物的通常空间，即10英尺×10英尺。可能性魔像的触及从其可能性之云中并在其中延伸。

A possibility golem simultaneously exists and does not exist in every space within a 60 foot by 60 foot square area. Because of this, other creatures can move through its space freely, though the space is difficult terrain for other creatures. As it continually exists and doesn't exist in each space, the possibility golem is always @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}. Even @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility} won't reveal it, although @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Dimensional Lock} or similar magic reduces the possibility golem to the usual space of a Large creature, 10 feet by 10 feet. A possibility golem's reach extends from and within its Cloud of Possibility.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Collapse Wave.name: 坍缩波 Collapse Wave
Collapse Wave.description:
当一具可能性魔像的生命值降至0时，它会复制成多个自身的复制体，出现在多个位置以进行最后一次攻击。魔像对其在过去1分钟内曾造成过伤害的每个目标进行一次相位拳 打击。这些攻击不受其多重攻击减值影响。随后，它被摧毁。

When a possibility golem is reduced to 0 Hit Points, it duplicates into multiple copies of itself in multiple positions for one final attack. The golem makes a phase fist Strike against each target to which it previously dealt damage within the last minute. These attacks are unaffected by its multiple attack penalty. Afterward, it is destroyed.

Golem Antimagic.name: 魔像反魔法 Golem Antimagic
Golem Antimagic.description:
受到力场与音波伤害（[[/r {8d10}]]，来自区域或持续伤害则为 [[/r {2d10}]])；被火焰与电击治疗（区域 @Damage[2d10[healing]]）；被寒冷减缓

魔像免疫于法术与魔法能力（除了它自身的法术与魔法能力），但每一种魔像都会以特殊方式受到少数几种魔法影响。这些例外会以缩略形式列在魔像的数据表中，完整规则如下所示。若某条目列出多种类型（例如“寒冷与水”），则任一类型的法术都能影响该魔像。

  • 受到伤害 任何此类型、以魔像为目标的魔法，会使其承受所列数值的伤害（此伤害没有类型），而非通常效果。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，或受到相应类型的持续效果影响，则它承受括号中所列的伤害。
  • 被治疗 任何此类型、以魔像为目标的魔法，会使魔像失去缓慢（状态）并恢复等同于该法术原本将造成伤害的一半的HP。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，则它恢复括号中所列的HP。
  • 被减缓 任何此类型、以魔像为目标的魔法，会使其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 1}，持续 [[/br 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 轮}，而非通常效果。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，则它在该轮缓慢 1。
  • 易受影响于 每个魔像都易受一种或多种特定法术影响，其效果如其数据表所述。

harmed by force and sonic ([[/r {8d10}]], [[/r {2d10}]] from areas or persistent damage); healed by fire and electricity (area @Damage[2d10[healing]]); slowed by cold

A golem is immune to spells and magical abilities other than its own, but each type of golem is affected by a few types of magic in special ways. These exceptions are listed in shortened form in the golem's stat block, with the full rules appearing here. If an entry lists multiple types (such as "cold and water"), either type of spell can affect the golem.

  • Harmed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to take the listed amount of damage (this damage has no type) instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of magic of this type or is affected by a persistent effect of the appropriate type, it takes the damage listed in the parenthetical.
  • Healed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem makes the golem lose the slowed condition and gain HP equal to half the damage the spell would have dealt. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it gains the HP listed in the parenthetical.
  • Slowed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for [[/br 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 rounds} instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it's slowed 1 for that round.
  • Vulnerable To Each golem is vulnerable to one or more specific spells, with the effects described in its stat block.

Vulnerable to Observation.name: 易受观察影响 Vulnerable to Observation
Vulnerable to Observation.description:
对魔像的潜行DC进行一次成功的 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Seek]{Seek} 动作会使魔像的波形暂时坍缩，将其锁定在一个位置。这会移除“可能性之云”的效果，直到进行Seek的生物下个回合结束为止，使魔像像正常的大型生物一样被锁定在单一的空间内。进行Seek的生物可以在其Seek动作与魔像“可能性之云”重叠的范围内选择魔像出现的位置。

A successful @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Seek]{Seek} action against the golem's Stealth DC collapses the golem's waveform temporarily, locking it into one position. This removes the effect of Cloud of Possibility until the end of the Seeking creature's next turn, locking the golem into a single space like a normal Large creature. The Seeking creature can choose where the golem appears within the overlap of their Seek action and the golem's Cloud of Possibility.

Impossible Flank.name: 不可能夹击 Impossible Flank
Impossible Flank.description:
魔像对位于魔像的可能性之云内的一名生物进行两次拳击打击，先从正面攻击一次，然后立刻从背后跟进一次攻击。无论第一次攻击是否命中，第二次攻击都会额外造成2d6力场伤害。对这些打击正常应用多重攻击减值。

The golem makes two fist Strikes against a creature within the Golem's Cloud of Possibility, attacking once from the front and then immediately following up with an attack from behind. Whether or not the first attack hits, the second attack deals 2d6 additional force damage. Apply the multiple attack penalty to the Strikes normally.

Omnipunch.name: 全能拳 Omnipunch
Omnipunch.description:
可能性魔像对其可能性之云内的每个目标各进行一次拳击打击。这些攻击计入魔像的多重攻击减值，但其多重攻击减值直到所有攻击完成后才会增加。魔像在 [[/br 1d4 #Rounds]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用此能力。

The possibility golem makes a fist Strike against each target within its Cloud of Possibility. These attacks count toward the golem's multiple attack penalty, but its multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks. The golem cannot use this ability again for [[/br 1d4 #Rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Untether from Reality.name: 挣脱现实 Untether from Reality
Untether from Reality.description:
用其相位拳打击生物后，魔像可以尝试切断对手与现实的联系。目标必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:31] 意志豁免。之后，该生物在1分钟内暂时免疫。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在存在与不存在之间闪烁。其获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 1}。

失败 目标从其当前位置消失，并在由GM决定的随机方向上、10尺外重新出现；该移动不会触发反应动作（）。目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 2}。

大成功或大失败失败 同失败，但目标恶心2，并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{困惑}，持续1分钟。

Upon Striking a creature with its phase fist, the golem can attempt to sever its opponent's connection to reality. The target must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:31] save. Afterward, the creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target flickers in and out of existence. It is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The target vanishes from its current position and reappears 10 feet away in a random direction determined by the GM; the movement doesn't trigger reactions. The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is sickened 2 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} for 1 minute.

Possibility Golem.publicNotes:
当魔像制造以灾变性的方式出错，导致预定的形态被毁时，赋予其活动的灵体有时并不会就此消散。在这些罕见的情况下，灵体保留了对形态的记忆，并以“可能存在的魔像之云”的状态维持某种等级的存在。被这种不稳定的半衰期所扭曲后，这些魔像可能会漫无目的地寻求毁灭所有活的事物。

不知所梦将至何方

没有任何魔像创造者会希望经历那种会造就“可能魔像”的事故，但他们都渴望有机会研究一个真正出现的样本。可能魔像之云包含一切可能的魔像，包括那些尚未被想象出来的。研究显现出来的魔像，并对所见进行逆向工程，可能会让发明者获得巨大的优势——前提是他们能在遭遇中活下来。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 560/1,250/2,300 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（重型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根，体质，延展，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），力场，镜像，力量，坚固，狂野

When golem-making goes cataclysmically wrong, causing the destruction of the intended form, the animating spirit sometimes does not simply dissipate. In these rare cases, the spirit maintains a memory of form and a level of existence as a cloud of possible golems. Broken by this unstable half-life, it is possible that golems will mindlessly seek out the destruction of all living things.

What Dreams May Come

No golem creator ever wants to experience the type of accident that creates the possibility of a golem, but they all want the opportunity to study one that comes into existence. The cloud of possible golems includes all possible golems, including ones that have not yet been imagined. Studying the golems that manifest and reverse engineering what they see could give inventors an immense advantage, provided they can survive the encounter.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 560/1,250/2,300 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (negative, positive), force, mirrored, strength, sturdy, wild

Plug-Tailed Wolly.name: 插尾毛绒兽 Plug-Tailed Wolly

Split From Tail.name: 从尾巴分离 Split From Tail
Split From Tail.description:
每当塞尾沃利被 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{抓住}、因造成挥砍伤害的攻击而遭受大成功或大失败命中，或某个生物尝试从 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Crawl]{爬行} Down Throat 的 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{逃脱} 中脱身时，有一定几率该生物抓住的是一条尾巴而非沃利本体，从而将沃利分裂为两个生物。若塞尾沃利至少还剩 4 HP（在对塞尾沃利结算任何伤害之后），它便分裂成两个相同的塞尾沃利，每个都拥有原本生命值的一半。当塞尾沃利分裂时，一个留在原本的空间中，另一个出现在最近的未被占据的空间。

Whenever the plug-tailed wolly is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}, the plug-tailed wolly takes a critical hit from an attack that deals slashing damage, or a creature attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} from @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Crawl]{Crawl} Down Throat, there's a chance the creature grabs a tail instead of the wolly, splitting the wolly into two creatures. If the plug-tailed wolly has at least 4 HP remaining (after applying any damage to the plug-tailed wolly), it splits into two identical plug-tailed wollys, each with half the original's Hit Points. When the plug-tailed wolly splits, one remains in the same space and the other appears in the nearest unoccupied space.

Claw Throat.name: 爪喉 Claw Throat
Claw Throat.description:
需求 塞尾沃利已爬进一个生物的喉咙

效果 塞尾沃利凶狠地抓挠该生物喉咙内侧。这造成 @Damage[1d6[slashing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|basic:true] 豁免。

Requirements The plug-tailed wolly has crawled down a creature's throat

Effect The plug-tailed wolly viciously claws the inside of the creature's throat. This deals @Damage[1d6[slashing]] damage with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|basic:true] save.

Crawl Down Throat.name: 钻入喉咙 Crawl Down Throat
Crawl Down Throat.description:
需求 塞尾沃利的上一个动作是对一名中型或更大的生物成功进行了一次爪 打击

效果 塞尾沃利爬进目标的喉咙，收缩并扩张其身体以填满喉咙，且其尾巴卡在该生物的口中伸出。这类似于擒抱该生物，但塞尾沃利会随该生物一起移动，而不是将其固定在原地。塞尾沃利在另一名生物的喉咙里时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}。塞尾沃利在生物的喉咙里时会干扰该生物说话的能力。当尝试需要言语成分的法术或需要精确发声的动作时，该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:7]，否则失去该法术或动作。生物可以通过一次成功的 DC 17 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} 检定，将塞尾沃利从目标的喉咙中拉出。

Requirements The plug-tailed wolly's last action was a successful claw Strike against a Medium or larger creature

Effect The plug-tailed wolly crawls down the target's throat, contracting and expanding its body to fill the throat, with its tail stuck out of the creature's mouth. This is similar to Grabbing the creature, but the plug-tailed wolly moves with that creature rather than holding it in place. The plug-tailed wolly is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} while down another creature's throat. The plug- tailed wolly interferes with the creature's ability to speak while in a creature's throat. When attempting verbal spell components or actions requiring precise vocalizations, the creature must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:7] or lose the spell or action. A creature can pull the plug-tailed wolly out of the target's throat with a successful DC 17 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} check.

Deep Breath.name: 深度吐息 Deep Breath
Deep Breath.description:
塞尾伍利可以屏住吐息300轮（30分钟）。

A plug-tailed wolly can hold their breath for 300 rounds (30 minutes).

Plug-Tailed Wolly.publicNotes:
塞栓尾沃利是一种类似獾的生物，拥有各种颜色的鲜艳毛皮，并以黑白条纹为点缀。每当塞栓尾沃利感到受威胁时，它要么试图逃跑，要么爬进一个更安全的空间，甚至可能包括其攻击者的嘴里！

为了钻进某个生物的喉咙，塞栓尾沃利会收缩并膨胀其身体（有时甚至能达到数英尺的直径），并试图从内部用爪子抓挠该生物，让它那许多尾巴还露在生物口外。当有人拉扯一只卡在生物喉咙里的塞栓尾沃利的尾巴时，一只新的塞栓尾沃利会立刻从被拉扯的尾巴中生成。

若不受打扰，塞栓尾沃利通常好奇而爱玩，但一旦受到威胁，它们会迅速变得胆怯或暴躁。许多农夫、林务员与捕兽人都讲过塞栓尾沃利袭击过一个过于吵闹的同伴或一只狂吠的狗的故事。在这类情况下，塞栓尾沃利通常会凭借其奇异能力成功躲避捕捉。

水手最好的朋友

驯化的塞栓尾沃利在船上很常见。这些生物并未完全被驯养，但已适应类人生物的存在，到了不会攻击船员的程度。它们的多彩外表令水手们喜爱，对士气大有裨益；但在紧急情况下它们也同样重要。若船体被什么东西刺穿，船员会用塞栓尾沃利及其分裂出的复制体来堵住漏水处，直到有更永久的解决方案为止。至于当船上补给不足的情况……沃利肉吃起来像纤维很粗的鸡肉，而原本的沃利永远不需要知道它的衍生体后来发生了什么。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 3.5/7/13 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（轻型），技能物品（杂技、运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），力量，狂野

A plug-tailed wolly is a badger-like creature with brightly colored fur of various colors, highlighted with black and white stripe markings. Whenever a plug- tailed wolly feels threatened, it either attempts to flee or crawls into a safer space, potentially including its attacker's mouth!

In order to crawl down a creature's throat, a plug-tailed wolly contracts and expands its body (sometimes even to several feet in diameter) and tries to claw the creature from the inside, leaving its many tails sticking outside the creature's mouth. When someone pulls on the tail of a plug-tailed wolly inside a creature's throat, a new plug-tailed wolly instantly spawns from the pulled tail.

If left alone, a plug-tailed wolly is usually inquisitive and playful, but they can quickly turn skittish or violent if threatened. Many farmers, foresters, and trappers have shared tales of a plug-tailed wolly attacking a too-noisy companion or a barking dog. In such cases, the plug-tailed wolly typically manages to evade capture thanks to its strange abilities.

A Sailor's Best Friend

A tame plug-tailed wolly is a common sight aboard ships. The creatures are not fully domesticated but have acclimated to the presence of humanoids to the point that they will not attack the crew. They are excellent for morale, as the sailors delight in their colorful appearance, but they are also important during emergencies. Should anything puncture the hull, the crew uses the plug-tailed wolly and its split duplicates to plug leaks until a more permanent solution is available. As for situations where the ship runs low on supplies… wolly meat tastes like stringy chicken, and the original wolly never needs to know what happens to its spawns.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light), skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild
Plug-Tailed Wolly.prototypeToken: 塞栓尾绒毛兽 Plug-Tailed Wolly

Silversmyf.name: 银匠斯迈夫 Silversmyf

Disanimate.name: 去除活性 Disanimate
Disanimate.description:
银器精能够使自身失活，并变为10件银餐具（通常为5把叉子和5把刀）以及一个带罩盖的银制托盘的形态。处于此形态时，银器精没有速度，且除了使自身重新活化之外不能执行任何动作。处于其失活形态时，银器精还获得并能使用“威慑刺击”反应动作（）。若其所有部件彼此之间都在5英尺以内，银器精可以再次使用此动作以重新活化。

A silversmyf can disanimate itself and take the form of 10 pieces of silverware (usually 5 forks and 5 knives) and a silver serving tray with a clouche. In this form, the silversmyf has no Speed and can take no actions other than reanimating itself. While in its disanimated form, the Silversmyf also gains and can use the Deterrent Stab reaction. If all of its pieces are within 5 feet of each other, the silversmyf can use this action again in order to reanimate.

Deterrent Stab.name: 威慑刺击 Deterrent Stab
Deterrent Stab.description:
需求 银匠妖处于其失动形态

触发 一名生物触碰银匠妖的一件银器餐具

效果 该件银器餐具攻击触发生物，即使银匠妖在失动时通常无法这样做，它仍进行一次银器餐刀打击。随后银匠妖重新活化。

Requirements The silversmyf is in its Disanimated form

Trigger A creature touches one of the silversmyf's silverware pieces

Effect The piece of silverware attacks the triggering creature, making a silverware knife Strike even though the silversmyf can't normally do so while Disanimated. The silversmyf then reanimates.

Silvering Aura.name: 镀银灵光 Silvering Aura
Silvering Aura.description:
20英尺。处于银匠精灵灵光范围内的所有武器，在判定弱点、抗力等时均视为银制。银匠精灵的银餐刀打击即使此灵光以某种方式被取消，也仍然是银制。

20 feet. All weapons within the silversmyf's aura count as silver for the purposes of determining weaknesses, resistances, and the like. The silversmyf's silverware knife Strike is silver even if this aura is somehow canceled.

Crushed Ice Grenade.name: 碎冰手雷 Crushed Ice Grenade
Crushed Ice Grenade.description:
银霜斯迈夫投掷一枚由碎冰制成的手榴弹，对30英尺内处于@Template[type:burst|distance:5]中的生物造成@Damage[4d6[cold]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true]豁免。失败时，该生物还会倒地@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

A silversmyf throws a grenade made of crushed ice, dealing @Damage[4d6[cold]] damage to creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] within 30 feet with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true] save. On a failure, a creature also falls @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Freeze Beam.name: 冻结射线 Freeze Beam
Freeze Beam.description:
银匠发射一道脉动的冰寒能量光束从它的眼睛射出，对一条位于 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[4d6[cold]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true] 豁免）。

The silversmyf fires a pulsating beam of freezing cold energy from its eye, dealing @Damage[4d6[cold]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true] save) to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30].

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Plane Shift (Self Only; To The Fey Realm.name: 位面转移（仅自身；仅可前往妖精界或返回物质位面） Plane Shift (Self Only; To The Fey Realm Or Back To The Material Plane Only)
Plane Shift (Self Only; To The Fey Realm.description:
你和你的盟友穿越存在于位面之间的屏障。各个目标移动到另一个位面，例如火元素位面、暗影位面或深渊。你必须对目的地位面有特定的了解，并使用一支由来自该位面的材料制成的魔法调谐音叉作为法术的焦点。虽然大多数著名位面的调谐音叉都很少见，就像法术“位面转移”一样，但更为晦涩的位面与半位面往往拥有稀有的调谐音叉。该法术极其不精确，你会出现在距离上一次某个目标（由你选择）位于该位面时所在的最后地点1d20x25英里之外的位置。如果对所有目标而言这都是第一次旅行到某个位面，你会出现在该位面的随机地点。位面转移并不提供返回旅行的手段，不过再次施放位面转移可以让你返回先前的位面，除非存在特殊的环境。

You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence. The targets move to another plane, such as the Plane of Fire, the Shadow Plane, or the Abyss. You must have specific knowledge of the destination plane and use a magic tuning fork created from material from that plane as a focus for the spell. While the tuning forks for most prominent planes are uncommon, just like the spell plane shift, more obscure planes and demiplanes often have rare tuning forks. The spell is highly imprecise, and you appear 1d20x25 miles from the last place one of the targets (of your choice) was located the last time that target traveled to the plane. If it's the first time traveling to a particular plane for all targets, you appear at a random location on the plane. Plane shift doesn't provide a means of return travel, though casting plane shift again allows you to return to your previous plane unless there are extenuating circumstances.

Web.name: 蛛网 Web
Web.description:
你在该区域内创造出一片黏稠的蛛网，每当生物试图穿过它时都会阻碍其移动。被蛛网填满的方格为困难地形。每个方格都可以通过一次造成至少5点挥砍伤害或1点火焰伤害的单次攻击或效果来清除蛛网。一个方格的AC为5，并且它会自动在其豁免上失败。

每当蛛网中的生物开始使用一个移动动作，或在一个移动动作中进入蛛网时，它必须尝试一次运动检定或反射豁免，对抗你的法术DC，以避免其速度受到环境减值，或变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}。离开蛛网的生物不再因蛛网而对其速度承受环境减值。

大成功或大失败 成功该生物不受影响，且在本回合中不需要再针对蛛网进行进一步的运动检定或豁免。若它使用的是运动检定，则它在离开一个方格后，会清除其离开的每个方格中的蛛网。

成功该生物在其动作期间不受影响。若它使用的是运动检定，则它在离开一个方格后，会清除其离开的每个方格中的蛛网。

失败该生物的速度受到-10尺环境减值，直到其下个回合开始。

大成功或大失败 失败该生物禁足（状态），直到其下个回合开始；此后，它的速度受到-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它可以尝试逃脱以移除其禁足（状态）。

升阶（4环）该法术的区域增加为20尺爆发，且其射程增加为60尺。

You create a sticky web in the area that impedes creatures' movement each time they try to move through it. Squares filled with the web are difficult terrain. Each square can be cleared of the web by a single attack or effect that deals at least 5 slashing damage or 1 fire damage. A square has AC 5, and it automatically fails its saving throws.

Each time a creature in the web begins to use a move action or enters the web during a move action, it must attempt an Athletics check or Reflex save against your spell DC to avoid taking a circumstance penalty to its Speeds or becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. A creature that gets out of the web ceases to take a circumstance penalty to its Speed from the web.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected, and it doesn't need to attempt further Athletics checks or saving throws against the web this turn. If it used an Athletics check, it clears the web from every square it leaves after leaving the square.

Success The creature is unaffected during its action. If it used an Athletics check, it clears the web from every square it leaves after leaving the square.

Failure The creature takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until the start of its next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is Immobilized until the start of its next turn, after which it takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape to remove its Immobilized condition.

Heightened (4th) The spell's area increases to a 20-foot burst, and its range increases to 60 feet.

Silversmyf.publicNotes:
由妖精操持的精致餐饮世界吸引着利润丰厚的客户群，而最富有的顾客则要求只有银匠妖仆才能提供的全套服务。较低级的员工与铜匠妖仆也许只是在妖精界与现世之间往返运送食材，但银匠妖仆享有令人称羡的殊荣：将最稀有、已精心烹制的珍馐直接带到挑剔的食客面前并予以上桌，无论对方身在何处。

未被激活的银匠妖仆外形是一只华丽的银色托盘，上覆一顶刻工繁复的圆罩。它还由十件银餐具组成，通常是五把叉与五把刀，但不同的银匠妖仆会有不同的餐具组合。银匠妖仆以绝不让餐桌凌乱为荣，会忙着重新摆放餐具与桌面装饰，有时会让侍者不胜其扰。

当银匠妖仆重新活动时，它会形成一只蟹状生物，带着一只发光的白色眼睛；托盘与圆罩充当躯干，而银餐具则充当肢体。尽管它们不会说话，银匠妖仆却彬彬有礼，举止极尽礼仪，在送上奢华餐点时还会向食客鞠躬致意。

银匠妖仆在店内时既端庄又有礼，但在运送珍馐的途中，它们会以暴烈的攻击捍卫这些异域菜肴。银匠妖仆用身体与银餐具肢体向窃贼发射冰冻光束，并投掷压碎冰块制成的手雷来拖慢他们的逃离。银匠妖仆的美味货物是保质期有限的预制食物，但只要这些味觉享受能立刻售出，它们就可能价值不菲。

妖仆是一族妖精构装体，其身体由彼此不相干的寻常装备碎件锻造而成，并以原初能量的丝缕连接为单一实体。每一种妖仆在与妖精界相连的餐馆中承担不同职责。铜匠妖仆负责场地并收集补给；银匠妖仆为客人上菜；金匠妖仆则守护餐馆的财务。它们共同为妖精餐馆增添独特风格，同时保护顾客与员工。它们的名字来自构成其身体的物体类型：铜匠妖仆由铜锅与铜碗组成，银匠妖仆由银餐具组成，而金匠妖仆由金币与钱币组成。

银匠妖仆的待客之道

银匠妖仆对客人从不失礼，尽管在守护顾客餐食方面它们冷酷无情。当无法确定入侵者最终会是顾客还是偷盗的匪徒时，银匠妖仆通常会默认采取礼貌的方式。毕竟，如此一来，最糟的情况也不过是对罪犯施以过度的礼仪；但若它们默认不采取礼貌态度，就可能犯下冒犯宾客这一大罪。

其他妖仆

妖仆本就不算常见，而在其中，即使是在相对冷门的妖精餐馆领域里，也只有铜匠妖仆、银匠妖仆与金匠妖仆会较为经常地出现。然而，存在的妖仆并不只有这些。下列妖仆至少在故事与妖精文献中有所记载，但它们究竟是捏造之物还是仅仅极为稀少，仍不得而知。

  • 铂匠妖仆，其庞大的身体包含一座熔炉，能够烹制新的食谱。
  • 琥珀金匠妖仆会在运送稀有珍馐或采购食材的旅途中陪同银匠妖仆或铜匠妖仆，以确保支付得当，并在返程时保护款项。
  • 秘银匠妖仆据说是银匠妖仆的进阶形态，专为快速送达特别易腐的货物而造，尤其当目的地遥远或位于危险区域时。
  • 星铁匠妖仆只在传奇中被提及，它们凭借对时间魔法与时间管理的精通，协调一个庞大餐馆帝国中所有其他妖仆，能够管理数十甚至数百个其他妖仆。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（中甲、重甲），技能物品（特技动作、交涉、社交、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根，寒冷，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），法术（原初：位面转移，蛛网术），尖刺，力量，投掷，野性

The world of fey-operated fine dining attracts a lucrative clientele, and the most affluent customers demand full service that only a silversmyf can provide. While lesser staff members and coppersmyfs might merely ferry ingredients back and forth from the fey realm, silversmyfs have the enviable distinction of bringing and serving the rarest prepared delicacies directly to discerning patrons, wherever they might be.

A disanimated silversmyf presents itself as a fancy silver serving tray capped with an intricately engraved cloche. It also consists of ten pieces of silverware, usually five forks and five knives, but different silversmyfs have different combinations of utensils. A silversmyf prides itself on never leaving the table untidy and fusses to reposition the serving ware and table décor, sometimes to the wait staff's vexation.

When a silversmyf reanimates, it forms a crab-like creature with a glowing white eye, with the tray and clouche acting as a body and the silverware acting as appendages. Though they do not speak, silversmyfs are cordial and comport themselves with the utmost decorum, bowing to patrons as they deliver their extravagant meals.

As decorous and polite as silversmyfs are while they are within their establishment, while en route to deliver their delicacies, they defend their exotic dishes with violent attacks. Using their bodies and silverware appendages, silversmyfs shoot thieves with freezing beams and throw grenades of crushed ice at them to slow their escape. The silversmyf's delicious cargo is premade food with a limited shelf life, but as long as these gustatory delights are sold right away, they could be quite valuable.

Smyfs are a family of fey constructs, with bodies forged of disparate pieces of mundane equipment connected into a single entity by strands of primal energy. Each type of smyf serves a different role at restaurants connected to the realm of the fey. Coppersmyfs handle the venue and gather supplies; silversmyfs serve food to guests; and goldsmyfs protect the restaurant's finances. Together, they lend fey restaurants a unique style while guarding customers and staff alike. Their names arise from the type of object used to form their bodies: copper pots and bowls for a coppersmyf, silverware for a silversmyf, and gold coins for a goldsmyf.

Silversmyf Hospitality

Silversmyfs never fail to be courteous to a guest, even though they are ruthless when it comes to guarding their customers' meals. When it isn't clear whether an intruder will eventually prove to be a customer or a larcenous bandit, silversmyfs typically default to a polite approach. After all, if they do so, in the worst case, they act with excessive decorum toward a criminal, whereas if they default away from a polite attitude, they might commit the grave sin of offending a guest.

Other Smyfs

Smyfs aren't especially common to begin with, and of those, only coppersmyfs, silversmyfs, and goldsmyfs are seen on any kind of regular basis, even in the relatively obscure niche of fey restaurants. However, these aren't the only kinds of smyfs that exist. The following smyfs exist at least in stories and faerie texts, though whether they are fabricated or simply quite rare is still unknown.

  • Platinumsmyfs, whose enormous bodies include a furnace, are capable of cooking up new recipes.
  • Electrumsmyfs accompany silversmyfs or coppersmyfs on journeys delivering rare delicacies or purchasing ingredients in order to ensure appropriate payment and protect the payment on its return.
  • Mithralsmyfs are supposedly an advanced form of silversmyf, created to deliver especially perishable goods quickly, particularly when their destination is far away or in a dangerous area.
  • Orichalcumsmyfs, only mentioned in legends, coordinate all other smyfs across a vast restaurant empire, using their mastery over temporal magic and time management in order to manage dozens or even hundreds of other smyfs.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (medium, heavy), skill items (Acrobatics, Diplomacy, Society, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, cold, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), spells (primal: plane shift, web), spiked, strength, throwing, wild

Paintbrush Fox.name: 画笔狐 Paintbrush Fox

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Ventriloquism (At Will).name: 腹语术（随意施放） Ventriloquism (At Will)
Ventriloquism (At Will).description:
每当你说话或以发声方式发出任何其他声音时，你可以让你的发声看起来起源于60英尺内的其他地方，并且在你发声时可以自由改变该表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加为1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的音调、质感与其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻术之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音进行互动。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Form Oil Creature.name: 形态 油 生物 Form Oil Creature
Form Oil Creature.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 狐狸旋转它们的尾巴并描绘出一个它们以前见过的中型或更小生物的复制品。@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-actors.Actor.JB5u52YYTj7pQe2J]{油墨生物}是一个爪牙，并且只会按画笔狐狸的指示行动。油墨生物具有以下数据：10 HP、15 AC，以及一个近战拟足徒手攻击，其攻击掷骰调整值为+9，造成1d6+1钝击伤害。对于任何其他调整值或DC，油墨生物使用画笔狐狸的数值。除第一回合外的每个回合，画笔狐狸必须花费一个带有专注（特征）的动作，以在精神上命令油墨生物，否则它会坍塌成墨水；不过与大多数爪牙不同的是，油墨生物获得三个动作。10分钟后，或在画笔狐狸有一个回合未命令其油墨生物之后，油墨生物会溶解成一滩无用的黑色水洼。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The fox twirls their tail and paints a copy of a Medium or smaller creature they've seen before. The @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-actors.Actor.JB5u52YYTj7pQe2J]{Oil Creature} is a minion, and only acts as directed by the paintbrush fox. Oil Creatures have the following statistics: 10 HP, 15 AC, and a melee pseudopod unarmed attack with an attack roll modifier of +9 that deals 1d6+1 bludgeoning damage. For any other modifier or DC, oil creatures use the paintbrush fox's value. Each turn after the first, the paintbrush fox must spend an action, which has the concentrate trait, to mentally command the oil creature or it collapses into ink, though unlike most minions, the oil creature gains three actions. After 10 minutes, or after the paintbrush fox spends a turn without commanding its oil creature, the oil creature dissolves into a useless black puddle.

Leaping Pounce.name: 跃扑 Leaping Pounce
