Leaping Pounce.description:
狐狸要么疾行至其速度，要么跳跃，并在该次移动结束时进行一次打击。若狐狸在开始此动作时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{隐蔽} 状态，则其在该能力的打击之后才失去隐蔽。

The fox either Strides up to their Speed or Leaps, making a Strike at the end of that movement. If the fox began this action @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}, they remain hidden until after this ability's Strike.

Paintbrush Fox.publicNotes:
画笔狐看起来像一只普通的狐狸，但它们的银色毛皮被从它们的尾巴上大量滴落的黑色油污所玷污。画笔狐产生的油呈深黑色，几乎会黏附在任何它接触到的表面上。通过将原初魔法引导入油中，画笔狐能够塑造出坚固的形状，以模拟画笔狐先前观察过的生物。狐狸可以命令这些油造生物，使其在困境之时成为额外的盟友，或在无聊之时成为简单的伙伴。若被迫战斗，画笔狐通常会伏击猎物，利用油造盟友来分散注意并进行防护。

成熟之后，狐狸会离开家族巢穴，出走以在森林或植被茂盛的平原中占据自己的领地。画笔狐有个奇特的习惯：为了标记领地，它们会在树木和其他物体上绘制图案与形象；不过，只要进入画笔狐地盘的生物不去破坏或篡夺它，通常就不会受到伤害。尽管画笔狐一般更喜欢保持孤立，它们却热衷于观察穿行其领地的旅人。它们甚至会尽其所能去模仿这些旅人的古怪举止，从独特的步态到坐立不安的小动作都不放过。若被更强大的生物发现，画笔狐往往会惊慌逃跑，但也有一些会在耐心的潜在盟友的哄劝下与之结为友伴。

画笔狐的油造生物只要经由一名有智慧的生物稍作检查，就很容易被识别为人造之物，但它们仍能骗过野生动物或漫不经心的旁观者。油造生物的颜色总是黑与灰的不同深浅，皮肤表面带有光泽。依照狐狸加入的细节程度，旁观者甚至能看出这份复制品是否以自己认识的某个对象为蓝本。尽管油造生物不具备言语能力，熟练的狐狸却学会了投射自己听过的常见短语与声响，让它们的复制品看起来完全能够说话。

狐狸画了什么？

画笔狐用来标记领地的绘画通常描绘的是它们近期见过的事物。它们可能会描绘领地中的地标，或是那些未曾打扰狐狸、却从此经过的有趣生物。当它们遇到其他具备艺术能力的生物时，会变得兴奋并模仿对方的作品。一些德鲁伊教过画笔狐如何绘制精致的场景或用于法术的仪式标记。还有些情况下，流氓会教画笔狐粗俗的涂鸦或下流的短语，并在看到结果时乐在其中，同时还对任何涂鸦破坏行为保持“合理否认”。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、制作、欺瞒、表演、隐匿、生存）

符合条件的注入属性 祸根，魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），法术（原初：腹语术），野性

A paintbrush fox appears as a normal fox, but their silver fur is marred by a black oil that profusely drips from their tail. The oil produced by a paintbrush fox is deep black and clings to almost any surface it contacts. By channeling primal magic through their oil, a paintbrush fox can form solid shapes that can emulate creatures the paintbrush fox has previously observed. The fox can command these oil creatures, giving an additional ally in times of distress or a simple companion in times of boredom. If forced to fight, paintbrush foxes generally ambush prey, using an oily ally to distract and defend.

After maturing, a fox leaves their family den and ventures off to claim their own territory in a forest or vegetated plain. Paintbrush foxes have a strange habit of drawing designs and figures on trees and other objects in order to mark their territory, though a creature that enters a paintbrush fox's turf is usually safe from harm as long as it doesn't damage or usurp it. While paintbrush foxes generally prefer to remain isolated, they adore observing travelers that pass through their territory. They even mimic the peculiar mannerisms of these travelers as best they can, down to their peculiar gaits and fidgety motions. If spotted by a more powerful creature, a paintbrush fox tends to panic and flee, but some have been coaxed into friendship by patient would-be allies.

A paintbrush fox's oil creatures can easily be identified as artificial beings with a brief examination from a sapient creature, but they can still fool wildlife or inattentive onlookers. The oil creatures are always a varied shade of black and gray with a glossy sheen over their skin. With the amount of detail the fox includes, onlookers can even tell if the copy was based on someone they recognize. While the oil creatures aren't capable of speech, adept foxes have picked up on projecting common phrases and noises they've heard to make their copies seem fully capable of speech.

What Does The Fox Draw?

The paintings that paintbrush foxes draw to mark their territory usually depict what they have recently seen. They may depict landmarks in their territory or interesting creatures that passed through without disturbing the fox. The foxes become excited when they meet other creatures with artistic ability and imitate their work. Some druids have taught paintbrush foxes how to draw elaborate scenes or ritual marks for spells. In other cases, hooligans may teach a paintbrush fox crude drawings or vulgar phrases and delight in the results while maintaining plausible deniability of any vandalism.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Crafting, Deception, Performance, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), spells (Primal: ventriloquism), wild

Convolute Keyweed.name: 盘卷钥草 Convolute Keyweed

Encroachment.name: 侵占 Encroachment
Encroachment.description:
盘绕钥草可以穿过小至一英寸的开口而无需挤过。由于它们拥有大量藤蔓，它们在攀爬或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grab an Edge]{抓住边缘} 时不需要空闲的手。

Convolute keyweeds can pass through openings as small as one inch without needing to Squeeze. Thanks to their many vines, they don't need free hands to Climb or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grab an Edge]{Grab an Edge}.

Tripping Vine.name: 绊倒藤蔓 Tripping Vine
Tripping Vine.description:
触发 一个位于盘绕钥草触及范围内的生物使用一个移动动作，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格

效果 盘绕钥草伸出一根藤蔓并尝试对触发的生物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{绊摔}。

Trigger A creature within the convolute keyweed's reach uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using

Effect The convolute keyweed extends a vine and attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} the triggering creature.

Freeze.name: 冻结 Freeze
Freeze.description:
纠结钥草停止移动，并试图显得只不过是一丛普通的微型灌木。直到它下次行动之前，纠结钥草在欺瞒和隐匿检定及DC上自动获得45的结果，以显得像一丛普通的灌木。

The convolute keyweed stops moving and attempts to appear as nothing more than a mundane tiny shrubbery. Until the next time it acts, the convolute keyweed gets an automatic result of 45 on Deception and Stealth checks and DCs to appear to be an ordinary shrubbery.

Intrusion.name: 侵入 Intrusion
Intrusion.description:
卷曲钥草 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}、疾走或攀爬最多两次。一旦其移动完成，卷曲钥草随后解除装置或开锁，使用其自身身体作为合适的工具来执行该任务。只要卷曲钥草在入侵的最初动作中成功潜行，那么解除装置或开锁并不会在其先前处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{隐匿} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 时自动使卷曲钥草变为被观察到。卷曲钥草在用于判定其能够解除哪些危害时，于盗窃上具有大师熟练度；并且在用于判定其能够侦测哪些危害时，于察觉上具有大师熟练度。

The convolute keyweed @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneaks}, Strides, or Climbs up to two times. Once their movement is complete, the convolute keyweed then Disables a Device or Picks a Lock, using its own body as a suitable tool to perform the task. Disabling the Device or Picking the Lock does not automatically cause the convolute keyweed to become observed if it was previously @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, as long as the convolute keyweed successfully Sneaks for its first actions of the Intrusion. The convolute keyweed has master proficiency in Thievery for the purpose of determining what hazards it is capable of disabling, and it has master proficiency in Perception for the purpose of determining what hazards it is capable of detecting.

Joint-Locking Strike.name: 关节锁定打击 Joint-Locking Strike
Joint-Locking Strike.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 目标在对抗盘结钥草时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}

效果 盘结钥草扭曲其藤蔓以锁住其敌人的关节。盘结钥草进行一次剃刀藤蔓打击，并以藤蔓与复杂动作束缚目标的关节。若该打击命中，目标变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2}（若大成功或大失败命中，则为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 3} 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3}），并且其速度受到 –10英尺状态减值。目标可以通过一次成功的DC 30检定以 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} 来终止该效果；否则，该效果最多持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.iWAZgQ6UdAOmpktS]{效果：关节锁定打击}

Frequency once per round

Requirements The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} against the convolute keyweed

Effect The convolute keyweed contorts its vines to lock down its foe's joints. The convolute keyweed makes a razor vine Strike and binds the target's joints with vines and intricate motions. If the Strike hits, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} (or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 3} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3} on a critical hit), and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. The target can end this effect with a successful DC 30 check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape}; otherwise, the effect lasts for a maximum of 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.iWAZgQ6UdAOmpktS]{Effect: Joint-Locking Strike}

Mobility.name: 机动性 Mobility
Mobility.description:
当盘绕钥草进行跨步或攀爬动作以移动其速度的一半或更少时，该次移动不会触发反应动作（）。

When the convolute keyweed takes a Stride or Climb action to move half their Speed or less, that movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Snagging Strike.name: 绊缠打击 Snagging Strike
Snagging Strike.description:
盘绕钥草猛然抽击，试图用其锋利如剃刀的藤蔓缠住敌人。盘绕钥草进行一次剃刀藤蔓打击。若此打击命中并造成伤害，则目标处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} 状态，直到盘绕钥草下个回合开始，或直到目标不再处于其剃刀藤蔓的触及范围内，以先发生者为准。

The convolute keyweed lashes out, attempting to snag its foe with its razor sharp vines. The convolute keyweed makes a razor vine Strike. If this Strike hits and deals damage, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until the start of the convolute keyweed's next turn or until it's no longer within the reach of its razor vine, whichever comes first.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
纠结钥草的打击对措手不及的生物造成额外2d6精准伤害。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

The convolute keyweed's Strikes deals 2d6 extra precision damage to off-guard creatures.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

Unlock Ailment.name: 解锁病症 Unlock Ailment
Unlock Ailment.description:
缠曲钥草以一种奇异且形而上的方式扭曲一个自愿生物的身体，使其能够以其盗贼调整值对抗该疾病或毒素的DC，来尝试反制正在折磨该生物的疾病或毒素，以结束该苦难，反制等级为6。无论成功与否，目标都会因缠曲钥草以其身体从未被设计为能做出的方式扭曲其身体而陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}，随后该生物在24小时内对“解锁病灶”获得暂时免疫。

The convolute keyweed contorts a willing creature's body in a strange and metaphysical way, allowing it to attempt to counteract a disease or poison afflicting the creature using its Thievery modifier against the disease or poison's DC, in order to end the affliction, with a counteract level of 6. Regardless of success, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2} by the way the convolute keyweed contorts their body in ways their body was never meant to move, and the creature is then temporarily immune to Unlock Ailment for 24 hours.

Convolute Keyweed.publicNotes:
当一些钥草变得更年长、更狡猾时，它们会经历一次生理与心智上的蛹化。它们的生育力与分泌孢子的能力会逐渐消退。这些年长的钥草似乎会向内盘卷自身，变得越来越紧实，但又像上紧的弹簧一样蓄势待发，随时会爆发行动。

这种被称为盘卷钥草的个体，已不再有交配的生物本能；但操弄装置的直觉仍然存在，而且事实上变得更加强烈。盘卷体处理这种驱动力的方式各不相同；许多个体会去寻找某种能赋予其存在意义的事物。

有些盘卷体在挑战中找到意义，例如寻觅越来越安全的地点以加以渗透，或与宿敌展开竞争，试图复制并超越彼此的功绩。盗贼公会常常流传关于功成名就的成员引来某个盘卷体强烈关注的幽灵（特征）故事。

另一些盘卷体则会投身于某项事业。年轻的钥草往往对类人生物的阴谋诡计相当天真，而盘卷体却会把自己投入复杂性之中。它们可能会大费周章来掩盖自己的参与。有则故事讲述一位强大的十字军骑士曾发誓，在一场阴险的阴谋被击败之前绝不掀起她的面甲。最终在对其据点的最后一次突袭后，人们才发现原来是一只盘卷体从护甲内部操纵着整套护甲。

钥草是一类微小植物家族，以进行古怪且出人意料的活动而闻名，例如撬开锁具、与其他生物并游，甚至创作音乐来安抚亡者的灵体。这个名字既指该家族，也指其中最著名的成员——被称为“钥草”的那种生物：一种热衷于撬锁并使装置失效的植物。

尽管钥草的起源并不完全清楚，许多学者已开始相信传播最广的那些传奇：钥草由德鲁伊创造，用以填补各式各样、其他植物不可能胜任的特殊生态位。也存在其他理论，包括一些学者认为钥草最初是类人生物，在自然神祇的祝福或诅咒之下变形为植物。例如，父母常对被抓到顺手牵羊的小孩讲一个童话：如果他们不乖、偷窃他人之物，绿人可能会在夜里来到家中，把他们变形成一株钥草，并将他们永远带入森林，从此再也见不到家人。

钥草与莱西之间基于相似与差异而形成一种不寻常的关系。两者都是小型、有感知的植物生物；若传闻属实，两者也都起源于德鲁伊的魔法。但莱西是自然灵体，或称维泰，通过一个原初仪式直接在凡人的植物躯体中化身。尽管它们的祖先或许确实由德鲁伊所创造，钥草却从头到尾都是凡俗植物：像任何其他植物一样活、繁殖、并死亡。

盘卷的阴谋

与年轻的钥草不同，盘卷钥草对复杂的故事与情节有着特殊的喜爱（越复杂越好），这会使它们卷入比其他钥草范围更广的局势之中。它们认为这让自己得以扭转并锻炼心智的柔韧性，就像它们一路以来不断锤炼身体那样。因此，盘卷钥草也喜欢谜题、谜语与脑筋急转弯，以及谜团故事。当它们解开一个谜团或阴谋时，会把自己想象成沿着谜题的“躯体”旅行，仿佛那是一株蜿蜒的植物，缓慢地抵达问题的根源。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 175/390/720 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、制作、社交、潜行、盗窃）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane, chaotic, 魅力, 敏捷, elongating, energy resistant (positive), 力量, throwing, wild

When some keyweed grow older and more cunning, they undergo a physical and mental chrysalis. Their fertility and ability to exude spores fade. These elder keyweeds seem to wind in on themselves, becoming more and more compact but poised to explode into action like a tightly wound spring.

Convolute keyweeds, as they're called, no longer have the biological imperative to mate, but the instinct to manipulate devices remains and, in fact, becomes even stronger. Convolutes vary in how they deal with this drive; many search for some kind of meaning to their existence.

Some convolutes find meaning in challenges, like seeking out ever more secure locations to penetrate or waging a competition with a rival, seeking to copy and exceed each other's exploits. Thieves' guilds often share ghost stories of accomplished members drawing the intense attention of a convolute.

Other convolutes become invested in causes. Whereas younger keyweeds tend to be quite naive about humanoid intrigues, convolutes throw themselves into complexity. They might go to elaborate lengths to mask their involvement. One story tells of a powerful crusading knight who had sworn not to lift her visor until an insidious conspiracy had been defeated. After the final raid on their stronghold, it turned out that a convolute had been puppeteering the armor from within.

Keyweeds are a family of diminutive plants who are known to perform quirky and unexpected activities, such as breaking into locks, swimming alongside other creatures, or even creating music to calm the spirits of the dead. The name refers to both the family as well as the most famous member of the family, the creature known as keyweed, a plant that loves to pick locks and disable devices.

While keyweeds' origin aren't entirely clear, many scholars have come to believe the most widely spread legends, which tell that keyweeds were created by druids to fulfill a variety of unusual niches where no other plants possibly could. Other theories exist, including those of some scholars who believe that keyweeds were originally humanoids who transformed into plants due to the blessing or curse of a deity of nature. For instance, one fairy tale parents tell to little children who are caught filching something is that if they misbehave and steal from others, the Green Man might come to the house at night and transform them into a keyweed, spiriting them away into the woods forever, never to see their families again.

Keyweeds have an unusual relationship with leshies based on their similarities and differences. Both are small sapient plant creatures, and if the stories are true, both originated from druidic magic, but leshies are nature spirits, or vitae, that directly incarnated in a mortal plant body through a primal ritual. While their progenitors might have been created by druids, keyweeds are mortal plants through and through, living, reproducing, and dying just like any other plant does.

Convoluted Conspiracies

Unlike younger keyweeds, convolute keyweeds have a special love of complicated stories and plots (the more complex, the better), which can cause them to become involved in situations with a much broader scope than other keyweeds. They believe that this allows them to contort and exercise their minds' flexibility in the same way that they've been building up their bodies all along. As such, convolute keyweeds are also fans of puzzles, riddles, and brain teasers, as well as mystery stories. When unraveling a mystery or conspiracy, they think of themselves as traveling along the puzzle's body as if it were a winding plant, slowly getting to the root of the problem.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 175/390/720 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Crafting, Society, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), strength, throwing, wild

Unscaled Tyrant.name: 无尺度的暴君 Unscaled Tyrant
Unscaled Tyrant.tokenName: 未缩放的暴君 Unscaled Tyrant

Command Presence.name: 指挥威仪 Command Presence
Command Presence.description:
60英尺。

灵光内等级2或更低且未受其他方式控制的无心智亡灵会本能地服从未缩放暴君的命令，将后裔及其狗头人爪牙视为盟友。

60 feet.

Mindless undead of level 2 or lower within the aura that are not otherwise controlled follow an unscaled tyrant's commands reflexively, treating the scion and its kobold minions as allies.

Eternal Service.name: 永恒服役 Eternal Service
Eternal Service.description:
触发 一名狗头人盟友在无鳞暴君30尺内被杀死

效果 堕落的子嗣立刻向倒下的盟友射出一道负能量箭矢。该盟友的皮肤剥落，并以小型@Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.5H8ZX7y5IkUBhvhF]{骷髅卫兵}的形态复起，在先攻顺序中位于其原本的位置行动。新的骷髅卫兵在其回合开始时处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{倒地}，并持用该狗头人在倒下时所持的任意武器，而非通常的弯刀。

Trigger A kobold ally is slain within 30 feet of the unscaled tyrant

Effect The fallen scion immediately sends a bolt of negative energy towards the fallen ally. The ally sloughs off its skin and rises as a Small-sized @Compendium[pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.5H8ZX7y5IkUBhvhF]{Skeleton Guard}, acting at its same spot in the initiative order. The new skeleton guard begins its turn @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} and holding any weapons the kobold held when it fell, rather than the usual scimitar.

Petulant Demand.name: 任性要求 Petulant Demand
Petulant Demand.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 未缩放的暴君命令一名等级2或更低的无心智不死族盟友对暴君所选择的敌人进行一步移动与打击，顺序任意。与通常在该不死族盟友的回合之外进行的攻击一样，此攻击不会适用或增加该不死族盟友的多重攻击减值。

Frequency Once per round

Effect The unscaled tyrant commands one mindless undead ally of level 2 or lower to Step and Strike against a foe of the tyrant's choice, in either order. As normal for an attack made off the undead ally's turn, this attack doesn't apply or increase the undead ally's multiple attack penalty.

Tyrant's Desire.name: 暴君的渴望 Tyrant's Desire
Tyrant's Desire.description:
未缩放的暴君向其盟友高声下达指令。60尺内所有盟友狗头人和无心智的不死生物在对抗恐惧的攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰和豁免上获得+1状态加值，持续1轮。

The unscaled tyrant belts out direction to its allies. All allied kobolds and mindless undead within 60 feet receive a +1 status bonus on attack rolls, damage rolls, and saving throws against fear for 1 round.

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Animate Dead.name: 死灵术 Animate Dead
Animate Dead.description:
你的魔法从坟土中拖出一具尸体或骷髅，并以死灵魔法的生命灌注其中，你迫使亡者在你的命令下战斗。你召唤一个具有不死（特征）且等级为-1的普通生物；该生物获得被召唤（特征）。以更高环阶施放该法术会提高你能够召唤的生物的最高等级。

高度强化（2环） 等级1。

高度强化（3环） 等级2。

高度强化（4环） 等级3。

高度强化（5环） 等级5。

高度强化（6环） 等级7。

高度强化（7环） 等级9。

高度强化（8环） 等级11。

高度强化（9环） 等级13。

高度强化（10环） 等级15。

Your magic dredges up a corpse or skeleton and fills it with necromantic life, and you force the dead to fight at your command. You summon a common creature that has the undead trait and whose level is -1; this creature gains the summoned trait. Heightening the spell increases the maximum level of creature you can summon.

Heightened (2nd) Level 1.

Heightened (3rd) Level 2.

Heightened (4th) Level 3.

Heightened (5th) Level 5.

Heightened (6th) Level 7.

Heightened (7th) Level 9.

Heightened (8th) Level 11.

Heightened (9th) Level 13.

Heightened (10th) Level 15.

Mirror Image.name: 镜像术 Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
三个你的幻象在你的空间内盘旋，可能会导致那些攻击你的人击中其中一个幻象而非你本人。任何本应命中你的攻击，都有一定的随机几率改为命中你的一个幻象。若三个幻象都还在，则命中你的概率为 1/4（在 [[/r 1d4]] 中掷出 1）。若剩余两个幻象，则命中你的概率为 1/3（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个幻象，则命中你的概率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个幻象被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但未大失败，它会摧毁一个幻象但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常会在失败时产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本应命中某个幻象，则会摧毁一个幻象，并且该次攻击掷骰改为对你成功。所有幻象都被摧毁后，该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果：镜像术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

Fear.name: 恐惧 Fear
Fear.description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Magic Missile.name: 魔法飞弹 Magic Missile
Magic Missile.description:
你发射一枚力场飞镖，呼啸着射向一个你能看见的生物。它会自动命中并造成1d4+1点力场伤害。你在施放法术时每额外使用1个动作，发射的飞弹数量就增加1枚；以3个动作时最多发射3枚飞弹。你为每一枚飞弹分别选择目标。若你将多枚飞弹射向同一目标，在应用对伤害的加值或减值、抗力、弱点等之前，先将伤害合并。

升阶（+2） 你每花费1个动作，就额外发射1枚飞弹。

You send a dart of force streaking toward a creature that you can see. It automatically hits and deals 1d4+1 force damage. For each additional action you use when Casting the Spell, increase the number of missiles you shoot by one, to a maximum of three missiles for 3 actions. You choose the target for each missile individually. If you shoot more than one missile at the same target, combine the damage before applying bonuses or penalties to damage, resistances, weaknesses, and so forth.

Heightened (+2) You shoot one additional missile with each action you spend.

Ray of Enfeeblement.name: 衰弱射线 Ray of Enfeeblement
Ray of Enfeeblement.description:
一道削弱敌人力量的射线从你的手中闪现。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击尝试。若你成功，该生物进行一次强韧豁免以决定该法术的效果。若你的攻击掷骰为大成功或大失败，使用其豁免结果低一级成功度的结果。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。

大成功或大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}。

A ray that saps a foe's strength flashes from your hand. Attempt a ranged spell attack against the target. If you succeed, that creature attempts a Fortitude save to determine the spell's effect. If your attack roll is a critical success, use the outcome for one degree of success worse than the result of its save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Critical Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以感知魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。

你只有在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，才能侦测到该幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术在射程内所侦测到的、等级最高的效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同等强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你也能精确定位等级最高的魔法来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（若来源大于该范围，则为最接近的范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Shield.name: 盾牌 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道魔法力场护盾。这视同使用举起盾牌动作，使你在AC上获得+1环境加值，直到你下一回合开始为止，但它不需要一只手来使用。

当该法术处于效果中时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡} 反应动作（）。该护盾的硬度为5。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，且你在10分钟内不能再次施放它。不同于普通的盾牌格挡，你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{魔法飞弹} 法术。

升阶该法术会提高护盾的硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

升阶（3环） 护盾的硬度为10。

升阶（5环） 护盾的硬度为15。

升阶（7环） 护盾的硬度为20。

升阶（9环） 护盾的硬度为25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Unscaled Tyrant.publicNotes:
有时，某个狗头人幼崽会因极其强大的潜在魔法能力而脱颖而出。当年轻狗头人社区中的施法者认出这一点时，他们往往会将该幼崽标记为注定不凡、未来的领袖。然而，在极少数情况下，这位天命领袖会过早被谋杀——可能死于嫉妒的同窝同伴、怪物般的竞争对手，甚至是社区中偏执的领导者之手。若这位准统治者的尸体未被彻底毁灭，其永恒的统治欲望可能会促使年轻狗头人的灵魂升起为无鳞暴君，继续追逐被早逝夺走的伟业。

在杀死几只离群的狗头人并展示出指挥不死生物的能力后，大多数无鳞暴君都能掌控自己的社区。由无鳞暴君统治的狗头人社区往往变得残酷却杀戮般高效，而随着活的狗头人数量骤降，这种残酷与效率会双双上升。

无鳞暴君通常在后方指挥，让其活与死的狗头人同胞去做脏活。与这些狗头人或不死生物交战的对手，往往甚至不会意识到操控敌对方的是一只小小的不死狗头人。这些不幸的灵魂或许很难活得足够久，才发现自己犯下的错误。

尽管无鳞暴君相当罕见，即便在狗头人之中也是如此，但也有传言称其他祖源也存在类似的不死生物。

让你的敌人更靠近

无鳞暴君常把谋杀他们的人留作副官。他们沉溺于让昔日的敌人屈从于自身的心血来潮，并在这些副官战败后将其复活，使其继续遭受羞辱。有时，暴君会因观看敌人杀死这些副官而获得过多乐趣，从而分心，降低对针对自身的攻击的戒备。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 12/27/50 gp

合格的精炼项 护甲（中型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（杂技，交涉，威吓，宗教，隐秘）

合格的灌注属性 魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，智力，守序，精神，负能量，坚固，投掷，狂野

Sometimes a kobold hatchling stands out due to extreme latent magical ability. When spellcasters in the young kobold's community recognize this, they tend to mark the hatchling for greatness and future leadership. However, on rare occasions, this destined leader is murdered prematurely, whether by their own jealous clutch-mates, monstrous rivals, or even the community's own paranoid leader. If the would-be ruler's body is not destroyed utterly, their eternal desire to lead could cause the soul of the young kobold to rise as an unscaled tyrant, continuing their pursuit of greatness stolen from them by an early death.

After killing a few stray kobolds and demonstrating the ability to command the undead, most unscaled tyrants are able to take control of their community. Communities of kobolds ruled by an unscaled tyrant often become brutal but murderously efficient, and their brutality and efficiency both increase as the number of living kobolds plunges.

Unscaled tyrants usually lead from the rear, letting both their living and dead kobold brethren do their dirty work. Often, opponents fighting these kobolds or undead might not even realize a tiny undead kobold is controlling their opposition. These unfortunate souls might have a difficult time living long enough to realize their mistake.

While unscaled tyrants are fairly rare, even among kobolds, whispers of similar undead for other ancestries are rumored.

Keep Your Enemies Close

Unscaled tyrants often keep the ones who murdered them as their lieutenants. They revel in making their former foes obey their whims and reanimating them after defeats to suffer further humiliation. Sometimes tyrants gain so much amusement watching enemies kill these lieutenants that they become distracted and lower their guard to attacks against themselves.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements armor (medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Religion, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, intelligence, lawful, mental, negative, sturdy, throwing, wild
Unscaled Tyrant.prototypeToken: 未扩阶的暴君 Unscaled Tyrant

Vaspertil.name: 瓦斯珀提尔 Vaspertil

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Nondetection.name: 无踪蔽探 Nondetection
Nondetection.description:
你竖起防护结界，使目标难以被魔法侦测到。无侦测会在持续时间内尝试反制所有针对目标或目标的道具进行的侦测、启示与探知占卜，将戏法视为1环法术以用于此目的。成功反制一个以区域或多个目标为目标的占卜时，仅对无侦测的目标消除其效果。

You erect protective wards that make the target difficult to detect via magic. Nondetection attempts to counteract all detection, revelation, and scrying divinations made against the target or the target's gear throughout the duration, counting cantrips as 1st-level spells for this purpose. Successfully counteracting a divination that targets an area or multiple targets negates the effects only for nondetection's target.

Darkness.name: 黑暗 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造出一层黑暗帷幕，阻止光在区域内穿透或发散。光无法进入该区域，且任何非魔法的光源，例如火把或提灯，在区域内都不会发出任何光，即使其光照半径本应延伸到黑暗之外也是如此。这也会压制你黑暗法术的等级或更低等级的魔法光。光无法穿过，因此区域内的生物无法看见外面。从外部看去，它如同一个纯粹黑暗的球体。

升阶（4环） 即使拥有黑暗视觉的生物（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）也只能勉强看穿这片黑暗。它们将透过这片黑暗所看见的目标视为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area. Light does not enter the area and any non-magical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, do not emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the darkness. This also suppresses magical light of your darkness spell's level or lower. Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside. From outside, it appears as a globe of pure darkness.

Heightened (4th) Even creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness. They treat targets seen through the darkness as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Freedom of Movement (Constant).name: 行动自如（恒定） Freedom of Movement (Constant)
Freedom of Movement (Constant).description:
你会排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标无视任何会使其 速度 受到环境减值的效果。当他们尝试对一个使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 状态的效果进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} 时，他们会自动成功，除非该效果是魔法的且其等级高于自由移动法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Dimension Door.name: 任意门 Dimension Door
Dimension Door.description:
打开一扇绕过正常空间的门，你立即将自己以及你所穿戴和持握的所有物品从你当前的空间传送至射程内你能看见的一处空旷空间。若这会让另一名生物与你一同到达——即使你正把它装在异次元容器中携带——该法术将失效。

强化（5环） 射程提升至1英里。你不需要能够看见你的目的地，只要你过去曾到过那里并知晓其相对于你的位置与距离即可。你在1小时内暂时免疫。

Opening a door that bypasses normal space, you instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to a clear space within range you can see. If this would bring another creature with you-even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container-the spell is lost.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 1 mile. You don't need to be able to see your destination, as long as you have been there in the past and know its relative location and distance from you. You are temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Telepathy 100 feet.name: 心灵感应 100 尺 Telepathy 100 feet

Drain Life.name: 汲取生命 Drain Life
Drain Life.description:
当蝠魔对一名生物造成伤害时，该生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] 豁免中成功，否则成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{流失 1（状态）}；在一次失败时，蝠魔获得10点临时生命值。后续的失败会使流失（状态）的数值在一次失败的豁免时提高1，最高至 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{流失 4（状态）}。

When the vaspertil damages a creature, the creature must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}; on a failure, the vaspertil gains 10 temporary Hit Points. Further failures increases the drained condition value by 1 on a failed save, to a maximum of @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 4}.

Proliferate.name: 增殖 Proliferate
Proliferate.description:
触发 蝠臂兽受到挥砍伤害且其手臂少于四条

效果 蝠臂兽从伤口处长出一条新手臂。若“增殖”是由“强夺”触发，则新长出的手臂可能会类似于目标生物的某条肢体。若蝠臂兽的生命值曾恢复至满值，则其所有伤口闭合，增殖出的手臂会枯死并掉落在地面上，这也会额外结束“强夺”的任何持续增益。

Trigger The vaspertil takes slashing damage and has fewer than four arms

Effect The vaspertil grows a new arm from the wound. If Proliferate is triggered by vigorous acquisition, the new arms might resemble one of the targeted creature's limbs. If the vaspertil ever reaches full Hit Points, all its wounds close and the proliferated arms fall dead to the ground, which additionally ends any ongoing benefits of vigorous acquisition.

Vigorous Aquisition.name: 强力获取 Vigorous Aquisition
Vigorous Aquisition.description:
需求 瓦斯珀提尔因汲取生命而获得临时生命值，并且能够使用 Proliferate

效果 瓦斯珀提尔以迅捷的动作切开自身血肉，造成 @Damage[1d6[slashing]] 伤害。若瓦斯珀提尔因该挥砍伤害成功进行 Proliferate，则最近一次被汲取生命所汲取的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响，并在 1 分钟内获得暂时免疫。

成功 直到其下一个回合结束，瓦斯珀提尔获得该目标生物的一项专长的收益（由 GM 选择），且目标失去所被取得的专长的收益。GM 通常应选择瓦斯珀提尔有能力使用的专长、目标过度依赖的专长，或最好两者兼具的专长。

失败 同成功，但瓦斯珀提尔窃取两项专长的收益，且该效果持续至瓦斯珀提尔仍拥有临时生命值为止，或持续至瓦斯珀提尔下一个回合结束为止，取持续时间较长者。从其下一个回合开始，在瓦斯珀提尔每个回合结束时，作为目标的生物可以针对 vigorous acquisition 再尝试一次新的豁免。

大成功或大失败 同成功，但瓦斯珀提尔窃取三项专长的收益，且效果持续 1 分钟。从其下一个回合开始，在瓦斯珀提尔每个回合结束时。

Requirements The vaspertil has temporary hit points from drain life and is able to use Proliferate

Effect With a swift motion the vaspertil cuts into its own flesh, dealing @Damage[1d6[slashing]] damage. If the vaspertil successfully Proliferates from this slashing damage, the creature most recently drained by drain life must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Success Until the end of the its next turn, the vaspertil gains the benefit of one of the targeted creature's feats, chosen by the GM, and the target loses the benefits of the acquired feat. The GM should typically choose a feat the vaspertil would be capable of using, a feat on which the target overrelies, or preferably both.

Failure As success, but the vaspertil steals the benefits of two feats, and the effect lasts as long as the vaspertil has temporary Hit Points or until the end of the vaspertil's next turn, whichever is longer. At the end of each of the vaspertil's turns, starting from its next turn, the targeted creature can attempt a new saving throw against vigorous acquisition.

Critical Failure As success, but the vaspertil steals the benefit of three feats and the effects persists for 1 minute. At the end of each of the vaspertil's turns, starting from its next turn.

Vaspertil.publicNotes:
瓦斯珀提尔是潜能之镜，一张洁净的白纸：那些决定踏上救赎之路的恶魔。无论是被召唤而来还是出于自身意愿，瓦斯珀提尔都会寻找那些以自己的力量与天赋为傲的人，并迫使他们质疑真正定义自己的究竟是什么。

为其邪魔本性赎罪使瓦斯珀提尔失去面孔且残缺不全，但摒弃其深渊根源也为其存在带来了一种珍视感——这种感受通常只有在失去曾经习以为常之物后才会获得。

尽管具备心灵感应，瓦斯珀提尔几乎只通过肢体语言交流。

直到我们再次相遇

瓦斯珀提尔将战斗视为对其敌人的考验。凡是在公平战斗中击败瓦斯珀提尔者，将赢得其尊重，并获得与瓦斯珀提尔哲学相称的恩赐。它们可能愿意加入一场直面冒险者恐惧的任务，或提供对抗深渊威胁的情报。瓦斯珀提尔不会替人打仗，但愿意帮助他们弥补并克服自身弱点。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 125/275/500 gp

可选精炼 护甲（光、中型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、宗教、社会、隐匿、求生）

可选灌注属性 灾祸，混沌，黑暗，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），法术（秘传：黑暗，次元门，自由移动，回避侦测），力量，狂野

Vaspertil are mirrors of potential, a clean slate: demons who decided to follow a path of redemption. Whether through summons or of their own volition, vaspertil seek out those who pride themselves on their powers and talents and force them to question what really defines them.

While atoning for their fiendish nature has left vaspertils faceless and mutilated, dismissing their abyssal roots has also introduced a sense of appreciation to their existence, one that is usually only acquired by the loss of something previously taken for granted.

Despite being telepathic, vaspertils almost exclusively communicate through body language.

Til We Meet Again

Vaspertils consider their battles to be tests of their foes. Those able to defeat a vaspertil in fair combat earn its respect and a boon appropriate to vaspertil philosophy. They may be willing to join a quest that confronts an adventurer's fears or provide information against abyssal threats. Vaspertils won't fight people's battles for them but are willing to help them supplement and overcome their weaknesses.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Religion, Society, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, darkness, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), spells (Occult: darkness, dimension door, freedom of movement, nondetection), strength, wild

Vengewhisper.name: 复仇低语 Vengewhisper

Claim Victim.name: 索取受害者 Claim Victim
Claim Victim.description:
触发 复仇低语者的尸体对抗@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt]{Talking Corpse}或类似用以许可访问其记忆的效果时大成功。

效果 复仇低语者在施法者相邻处显现，可从任意距离出现，并处于@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}的效果之下。复仇低语者将施法者指定为其受害者。施法者将一直被指定为复仇低语者的受害者，直到复仇低语者被摧毁，或复仇低语者再次使用“认领受害者”为止。

Trigger The vengewhisper's corpse critically succeeds against @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt]{Talking Corpse} or a similar effect to access its memories.

Effect The vengewhisper manifests adjacent to the spellcaster, appearing from any distance, under the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}. The vengewhisper designates the spellcaster as its victim. The spellcaster remains designated as the vengewhisper's victim until the vengewhisper is destroyed or the vengewhisper uses Claim Victim again.

Assail Curiosity.name: 突袭好奇心 Assail Curiosity
Assail Curiosity.description:
触发 复仇耳语者的受害者尝试回忆知识。

效果 复仇耳语者用诉说骇人真相的低语将其受害者包围。在结算回忆知识的效果后，受害者变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}，若受害者通过回忆知识获得了两条或更多信息（无论真假），则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}。受害者在以这种方式陷入恐惧期间，不能再次回忆知识。

Trigger The vengewhisper's victim attempts to Recall Knowledge.

Effect The vengewhisper surrounds its victim in whispers that speak terrifying truths. After resolving the effects of Recall Knowledge, the victim becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} if the victim received two or more pieces of information (true or otherwise) from Recalling Knowledge. The victim can't Recall Knowledge again while frightened in this way.

Vengeance Surge.name: 复仇涌动 Vengeance Surge
Vengeance Surge.description:
需求 复仇低语者受到@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}的影响。

效果 复仇低语者解除invisibility，飞行至多其飞行速度的两倍，并对一名受害者进行一次近战打击。受害者在此次打击中处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}状态。

Requirements The vengewhisper is affected by @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}.

Effect The vengewhisper Dismisses invisibility, Flies up to twice its fly Speed, and makes a melee Strike against a victim. The victim is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} against this Strike.

Victim Strike.name: 受害者打击 Victim Strike
Victim Strike.description:
触发 复仇低语者以低语之手打击命中其受害者。

效果 受害者变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}（大成功或大失败时为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}）。

Trigger The vengewhisper hits its victim with a whisper hand Strike.

Effect The victim becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1} (@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on a critical hit).

Haunt Victim.name: 缠灵受害者 Haunt Victim
Haunt Victim.description:
每天，复仇低语者除了通过其“宣称受害者”反应动作（）所维持的任何受害者之外，还可以额外选择一名受害者来纠缠。它必须正在观察一名生物，才能选择该生物作为当天的受害者。只要复仇低语者在其受害者60尺内且拥有效果线，被纠缠的受害者执行探索活动所需的时间变为两倍，并且在投掷先攻后的第一个回合里处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}。如果被纠缠的受害者通过传送效果进行旅行，复仇低语者可以选择与其一同旅行。

Each day, the vengewhisper can choose one victim to haunt, in addition to any victim it maintains with its Claim Victim reaction. It must be observing a creature to choose that creature as its victim for the day. As long as the vengewhisper is within 60 feet of its victim and has line of effect, it takes the haunted victim twice as long to carry out exploration activities and they're @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for their first turn after rolling initiative. If the haunted victim travels via a teleportation effect, the vengewhisper can choose to travel with them.

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动力投射物 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你向目标投掷一个在射程内、松散且无人持用的物体，该物体的负载为1或更低。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，你造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——视你投掷的物体而定——数值等于1d6加上你的施法能力调整值。被投掷物品的任何特征或魔法属性都不会影响该攻击或该伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage-as appropriate for the object you hurled-equal to 1d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造一只魔法手，可以是隐形或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并缓慢移动它，最多移动20尺。由于你在使物体悬浮，你可以将其朝任意方向移动。当你维持该法术时，你可以使该物体额外移动20尺。若该法术结束时物体仍在空气中，该物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以负载为1或更低的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程提升至60尺，且你可以以负载为1或更低的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程提升至60尺，且你可以以负载为2或更低的无主物体为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之声 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时大喊。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Nightmare.name: 梦魇 Nightmare
Nightmare.description:
你向你的目标送去令人不安的噩梦。目标下一次入睡时，必须尝试一次意志豁免。如果你只知道目标的名字并且从未见过对方，则目标在这次意志豁免上获得+4环境加值。

大成功 目标不承受任何不利效果，并在1周内暂时免疫。

成功 目标经历噩梦，但除了令人不快的记忆外不承受任何不利效果。

失败 目标经历噩梦并醒来时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}。

大失败 目标经历噩梦，醒来时处于Fatigued，并且处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} 直到它不再处于Fatigued。

You send disturbing nightmares to your target. The next time the target falls asleep, it must attempt a Will save. If you know the target only by name and have never met them, the target gets a +4 circumstance bonus to the Will save.

Critical Success The target suffers no adverse effects and is temporarily immune for 1 week.

Success The target experiences the nightmares but suffers no adverse effects other than unpleasant memories.

Failure The target experiences the nightmares and awakens @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

Critical Failure The target experiences the nightmares, awakens Fatigued, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} until it is no longer Fatigued.

Invisibility (At Will) (Self Only) (Unli.name: 隐形（意志）（仅自身）（无限持续时间） Invisibility (At Will) (Self Only) (Unlimited Duration)
Invisibility (At Will) (Self Only) (Unli.description:
目标被幻术笼罩，获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 状态，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找该目标，使其对他们而言改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}。如果目标使用敌对动作，该法术会在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续 1 分钟，但即使目标使用敌对动作也不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Confusion.name: 困惑 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你用奇异的冲动迷惑你的目标，使其随机行动。其效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解除该法术。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标语无伦次地胡言乱语，且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}，持续1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以终止该困惑。

大成功或大失败：失败 目标陷入Confused，持续1分钟，且无法通过豁免提前终止。

升阶（8环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly. The effects are determined by the target's Will save. You can Dismiss the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Phantom Pain.name: 魅影疼痛 Phantom Pain
Phantom Pain.description:
幻觉般的痛苦折磨着目标，造成2d4精神伤害和1d4持续精神伤害。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受全部初始伤害但不承受持续伤害，并且该法术立即结束。

失败 目标承受全部初始伤害与持续伤害，并且目标成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。如果目标从恶心中恢复，持续伤害结束且该法术结束。

大失败 如失败，但目标成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d4，持续伤害增加1d4。

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]{按等级的持续精神伤害}

Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and 1d4 persistent mental damage. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes full initial damage but no persistent damage, and the spell ends immediately.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If the target recovers from being Sickened, the persistent damage ends and the spell ends.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d4 and the persistent damage by 1d4.

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]{Leveled Persistent Mental Damage}

Vengewhisper.publicNotes:
复仇低语是在尸体对@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt]{会说话的尸体}或类似效果大成功后，萦绕在施法者身旁的逝去灵体。它们可能是在守着可怕秘密时死去；可能因遗骸被打扰而心怀怨恨；或可能对施法者抱有特定的仇怨。据悉，在被诅咒的会说话的尸体卷轴被启动后，也会滋生复仇低语。复仇低语在被发现时能自我防卫，但多数复仇低语更喜欢对受害者保持隐形，并在对方搜寻知识的过程中不断与其作对。尽管如此，偶尔被逼入绝境、走投无路或格外暴怒的复仇低语会选择投入战斗而非更隐蔽的折磨手段，而它们也会是格外棘手的敌人。

猜谜游戏

复仇低语在挑动受害者好奇心时会说真话，并可能无意间暗示出受害者试图从其尸体口中套出的答案。无论是出于尴尬还是魔法强迫，猜出这些答案往往会驱散复仇低语。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 175/390/720 gp

可选精炼 察觉物品，技能物品（威吓、学识[生命]、隐匿）

可选灌注属性 混乱、魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、负能量、音波）、邪恶、力场、心灵、音波、法术（奥秘：困惑、幽灵之声、隐形术、法师之手、梦魇、魅影之痛、念动力投射物）、狂野、有翼

Vengewhispers are departed spirits that haunt a spellcaster after a corpse critically succeeds against @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt]{Talking Corpse} or a similar effect. They might have died keeping a terrible secret, they might resent having their remains disturbed, or they might hold a specific vendetta against the spellcaster. Vengewhispers are also known to spawn after a cursed scroll of talking corpse is activated. A vengewhisper can defend itself when discovered, but most vengewhispers prefer to remain invisible to their victims and antagonize them throughout their search for knowledge. Nevertheless, occasionally a vengewhisper that's cornered, desperate, or particularly enraged chooses to engage in battle instead of subtler torments, and they can be particularly troublesome foes.

Guessing Games

Vengewhispers tell the truth when they assail a victim's curiosity and can accidentally hint at the answers the victim tried to get out of its corpse. Whether by embarrassment or magical compulsion, guessing those answers often dismisses the vengewhisper.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 175/390/720 gp

Eligible Refinements perception item, skill items (Intimidation, Lore [Life], Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, negative, sonic), evil, force, mental, sonic, spells (Occult: confusion, ghost sound, invisibility, mage hand, nightmare, phantom pain, telekinetic projectile), wild, winged

Vile Ascender.name: 邪恶飞升者 Vile Ascender

Potion of Expeditious Retreat.name: 迅捷撤退药水 Potion of Expeditious Retreat
Potion of Expeditious Retreat.description:
启动 1 交互

迅捷撤退药水的瓶塞经过特殊制作，以便在危急情况下轻松弹开。当你饮用这瓶药水时，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃窜} 状态，持续 1 分钟，并且在你处于逃窜状态期间，你的所有速度获得 +40 英尺的状态加值，持续时间同上。你立刻疾行。

Activate 1 Interact

The stopper for a potion of expeditious retreat is crafted to easily snap open in dire circumstances. When you drink this potion, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 minute, and you gain a +40-foot status bonus to all your Speeds for the duration as long as you are fleeing. You immediately Stride.

Ascending Critical.name: 递增大成功或大失败 Ascending Critical
Ascending Critical.description:
被邪秽升华者的爪子重击命中的生物会暴露于升华诅咒。

A creature critically hit by the vile ascender’s claw is exposed to curse of ascendance.

Thrallspeech.name: 尸仆语 Thrallspeech
Thrallspeech.description:
每当邪秽飞升者获得一个奴仆时，它会学会该奴仆会说的一种语言，通常是该奴仆最常使用的语言。

Whenever the vile ascender gains a thrall, it learns one language that the thrall speaks, typically the thrall’s most commonly used language.

Curse of Ascendance.name: 飞升诅咒 Curse of Ascendance
Curse of Ascendance.description:
未能识别邪恶飞升者之飞升诅咒的生物会相信飞升诅咒是一种神圣祝福、魔法恩赐或其他有益效果。若邪恶飞升者被杀死，诅咒结束，并同时移除其有益与有害效果。

豁免 @Check[type:will|dc:29]

阶段 1 每当目标掷先攻时，其将获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{加速} 状态，持续至其第一个回合结束。其只能将该额外动作用于打击或疾行（1天）

阶段 2 同阶段 1，且目标获得每天一次施放一个由GM选择的天生法术的能力，通常其等级至多为受害者等级的一半 – 1。该法术旨在诱惑受害者并符合受害者的兴趣（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段 2，且受害者可将该法术的使用频率改为每小时一次，而非每天一次（1天）

阶段 4 同阶段 3，且目标成为由邪恶飞升者控制的NPC奴仆（永久）。

A creature who fails to identify the vile ascender's curse of ascendance believes that the curse of ascendance is a divine blessing, magical boon, or other beneficial effect. The curse ends if the vile ascender is slain, removing both the beneficial and detrimental effects.

Saving Throw @Check[type:will|dc:29]

Stage 1 Whenever the target rolls initiative, they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened} until the end of their first turn. They can use the extra action only to Strike or Stride (1 day)

Stage 2 As Stage 1, and the target gains the ability to cast an innate spell chosen by the GM once per day, typically of a level up to half the victim's level – 1. The spell is intended to tempt the victim and suit the victim's interests (1 day)

Stage 3 As Stage 2, and the victim can use the spell once per hour instead of once per day (1 day)

Stage 4 As Stage 3, and the target becomes an NPC thrall controlled by the vile ascender (permanent).

Ascending Gift.name: 升华赋礼 Ascending Gift
Ascending Gift.description:
邪恶升格者抽出并向另一名生物呈上一份奇妙的赋礼。若该生物接受邪恶升格者所提供的赋礼，他们便会暴露于升格诅咒之下。

The vile ascender draws and presents a wondrous gift to another creature. If the creature accepts the gift the vile ascender offers, they are exposed to curse of ascendance.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
邪恶升天者对处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{措手不及}状态的生物造成@Damage[2d6[precision]]伤害。当一个生物因邪恶升天者而受到精准伤害时，其将暴露于升天诅咒。

The vile ascender deals @Damage[2d6[precision]] damage against @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} creatures. When a creature takes precision damage from a vile ascender, they are exposed to curse of ascendance.

Wanderer's Bane.name: 流浪者之祸 Wanderer's Bane
Wanderer's Bane.description:
邪恶攀升者清楚地知道如何在他们的目标被环境分心时利用他人。处于困难地形中的生物对邪恶攀升者而言处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} 状态。

Vile ascenders know exactly how to take advantage of others when their targets are distracted by the environment. Creatures in difficult terrain are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} to the vile ascender.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Locate (Thrall Only).name: 定位（仅奴仆） Locate (Thrall Only)
Locate (Thrall Only).description:
你会得知目标的方向（如果你选择了特定的物体，例如“我母亲的剑”），或是最近的目标（如果你选择了一类物体，例如“剑”）。如果目标是特定的物体，你必须曾以自己的感官亲自直接观察过它。如果目标是一类物体，你仍需要对该类物体有准确的心像。如果你与目标之间有铅或流动的水，这个法术无法定位该物体。这意味着如果最近的那件物体被铅或流动的水阻隔，你可能会找到更远处的同类物体。

升阶（5环） 你可以改为以特定的生物或族裔作为目标而非物体，但你必须曾与想要作为目标的该生物或族裔见过面或近距离看过。

You learn the direction to the target (if you picked a specific object, such as "my mother's sword") or the nearest target (if you picked a type of object, such as "swords"). If the target is a specific object, you must have observed it directly with your own senses. If it's a type of object, you still need to have an accurate mental image of the type of object. If there's lead or running water between you and the target, this spell can't locate the object. This means you might find a type of object farther away if the nearest one is behind lead or running water.

Heightened (5th) You can target a specific creature or ancestry instead of an object, but you must have met or seen up close the creature or ancestry you want to target.

Darkness.name: 黑暗 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造一层黑暗帷幕，阻止光穿透或在该区域内向外散发。光不会进入该区域，且任何非魔法光源，例如火把或提灯，在该区域内都不会散发任何光，即使它们的光半径本应延伸到黑暗之外。这也会压制你的黑暗法术的等级或更低等级的魔法光。光无法穿过，因此区域内的生物无法看见外面。从外面看，它像一个纯粹黑暗的球体。

升阶（4环） 即使拥有黑暗视觉（但不包括强效黑暗视觉）的生物，也只能勉强看穿黑暗。他们将透过黑暗看到的目标视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area. Light does not enter the area and any non-magical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, do not emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the darkness. This also suppresses magical light of your darkness spell's level or lower. Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside. From outside, it appears as a globe of pure darkness.

Heightened (4th) Even creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness. They treat targets seen through the darkness as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Dimension Door.name: 次元门 Dimension Door
Dimension Door.description:
打开一扇绕过正常空间的门，你会立刻将你自己以及你穿戴和持有的所有物品从你当前的空间传送到射程内你能看见的一处空旷空间中。若这会把另一名生物一同带上——即使你正把它装在一个异次元容器里携带——该法术会失效。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至 1 英里。你不需要能看见目的地，只要你过去去过那里，并且知道它相对于你的位置与距离即可。你会暂时免疫 1 小时。

Opening a door that bypasses normal space, you instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to a clear space within range you can see. If this would bring another creature with you-even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container-the spell is lost.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 1 mile. You don't need to be able to see your destination, as long as you have been there in the past and know its relative location and distance from you. You are temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的力量。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将额外动作用于打击与疾走动作。

升阶（7环） 你最多可以以6个生物为目标。

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

Entangle (At Will).name: 纠缠（随意施放） Entangle (At Will)
Entangle (At Will).description:
区域 以20英尺爆发为范围内所有包含植物或真菌的方格

植物和真菌缠绕生物。该区域为困难地形。每一轮中，生物在该区域内开始其回合时，必须尝试一次反射豁免。若失败，它的速度在离开该区域前受到-10英尺的环境减值；若大成功或大失败，则它还会在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}。生物可以以entangle的DC尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}以移除这些效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{法术效果：Entangle}

Area all squares in a 20-foot burst that contain plants or fungi

Plants and fungi entangle creatures. The area is difficult terrain. Each round that a creature starts its turn in the area, it must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, it takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it leaves the area, and on a critical failure, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. Creatures can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} at entangle's DC to remove these effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{Spell Effect: Entangle}

Acid Splash.name: 酸液飞溅 Acid Splash
Acid Splash.description:
你泼洒出一团酸液，飞溅在你的目标以及附近的生物身上。进行一次法术攻击。若你命中，你造成 1d6 点酸蚀伤害外加 1 点飞溅酸蚀伤害。在大成功时，目标还会受到 1 点持续性酸蚀伤害。

升阶（3级） 初始伤害提升至 1d6 + 你的施法能力调整值，且持续性伤害提升至 2。

升阶（5级） 初始伤害提升至 2d6 + 你的施法能力调整值，持续性伤害提升至 3，且飞溅伤害提升至 2。

升阶（7级） 初始伤害提升至 3d6 + 你的施法能力调整值，持续性伤害提升至 4，且飞溅伤害提升至 3。

升阶（9级） 初始伤害提升至 4d6 + 你的施法能力调整值，持续性伤害提升至 5，且飞溅伤害提升至 4。

[[/r (ceil(@item.level/2))[persistent,acid]]]{Leveled Persistent Acid Damage}

You splash a glob of acid that splatters your target and nearby creatures. Make a spell attack. If you hit, you deal 1d6 acid damage plus 1 splash acid damage. On a critical success, the target also takes 1 persistent acid damage.

Heightened (3rd) The initial damage increases to 1d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, and the persistent damage increases to 2.

Heightened (5th) The initial damage increases to 2d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, the persistent damage increases to 3, and the splash damage increases to 2.

Heightened (7th) The initial damage increases to 3d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, the persistent damage increases to 4, and the splash damage increases to 3.

Heightened (9th) The initial damage increases to 4d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier, the persistent damage increases to 5, and the splash damage increases to 4.

[[/r (ceil(@item.level/2))[persistent,acid]]]{Leveled Persistent Acid Damage}

Tanglefoot.name: 缠足袋 Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一条覆满黏稠树脂的藤蔓从空气中出现，从你手中甩出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击。

大成功或大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态，并且其速度在1轮内承受-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试进行挣脱，对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态。

成功 目标的速度在1轮内承受-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试进行挣脱，对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠足}

失败 目标不受影响。

强化（2环） 效果持续2轮。

强化（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tanglefoot}

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Geas.name: 誓约 Geas
Geas.description:
你对一个自愿的目标强加一条魔法规则，迫使其要么执行某个行为，要么避免实施某个行为。要求执行某个行为的geas通常是有条件的，例如：“始终为寻求落脚处的陌生人提供款待。”要求执行某个特定行为的无条件geas并不要求目标只能做那件事，但它必须将该任务置于所有消遣追求之上优先完成。最常见的要求避免实施某个行为的geas，是指定目标避免违反一份契约。在这些情况下，通常由次要施法者负责确保契约措辞与仪式的魔法正确契合。由于目标是自愿的，geas可以拥有持续时间，长达目标同意的时间。如果目标无法履行geas，它会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）1}，并且每连续一天被阻止遵循geas，恶心（状态）就增加1，最高至恶心（状态）4。当它再次遵循geas时，恶心（状态）立即结束；它无法用任何其他方式移除恶心（状态）。只有诸如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{祈愿}法术这类强大的魔法，才能从自愿目标身上移除geas的效果。

大成功或大失败 geas成功，并且目标在直接维护geas的技能检定上获得+1状态加值（由GM酌情决定）。

成功 geas成功。

失败 geas失败。

大成功或大失败 geas失败，且你反而受到你试图施加在目标身上的geas影响。你被视为不自愿的目标，因此该geas可以用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{净化苦难}法术进行反制。

升阶（5环） 你可以将geas用于一个不自愿的生物；它可以尝试一次意志豁免以否定该效果。如果目标这次意志豁免失败，geas最多持续1周。除了诸如祈愿法术这类强大的魔法外，移除诅咒法术也可以反制施加在不自愿生物上的geas。聪明的不自愿生物可以通过刻意制造使其无法遵从的情境来破坏geas，但在那种情况下它会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）}（如上所述）。

升阶（7环） 同5环，但geas在不自愿生物身上最多持续1之年。

升阶（9环） 同5环，但geas在不自愿生物身上持续你选择的持续时间（甚至无限）。

You enforce a magic rule on a willing target, forcing it to either perform or refrain from carrying out a certain act. A geas to perform an act is usually conditional, such as, "Always offer hospitality to strangers seeking a place to stay." An unconditional geas to perform a certain act doesn't require the target to perform that act exclusively, though it must prioritize the task above all leisurely pursuits. The most common geas to refrain from carrying out an act is a specification to avoid violating a contract. In those cases, the secondary caster usually takes charge of making sure the wording of the contract is attuned correctly with the ritual's magic. Because the target is willing, geas can have a duration that lasts for as long as the target agrees to. If the target is unable to fulfill the geas, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and the sickened condition increases by 1 for each consecutive day it is prevented from following the geas, to a maximum of sickened 4. The sickened condition ends immediately when it follows the geas again; it can't remove the sickened condition in any other way. Only powerful magic such as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish} spell can remove the effects of geas from a willing target.

Critical Success The geas succeeds, and the target receives a +1 status bonus to skill checks that directly uphold the geas (at the GM's discretion).

Success The geas succeeds.

Failure The geas fails.

Critical Failure The geas fails, and you are instead affected by the geas you were attempting to place on the target. You are considered an unwilling target, so the geas can be counteracted with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction} spell.

Heightened (5th) You can use geas on an unwilling creature; it can attempt a Will save to negate the effect. If the target fails this Will save, the geas lasts up to 1 week. A remove curse spell can counteract a geas on an unwilling creature, in addition to powerful magic such as a wish spell. A clever unwilling creature can subvert the geas by contriving situations that prevent it from complying, but in that case it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} (as described above).

Heightened (7th) As 5th level, but the geas lasts for up to 1 year on an unwilling creature.

Heightened (9th) As 5th level, but the geas lasts for a duration you choose (even unlimited) on an unwilling creature.

Vile Ascender.publicNotes:
卑劣飞升者是阴影中的诡术师，他们提供被玷污的赋礼，将他人置于卑劣飞升者的意志之下。他们很快就会对无辜的旅人施展诡计——那些冒险经过他们居所的人——并假装自己是独居的贤者，能够向造访其家园的人赐予强大的恩惠。更顽皮且热衷的卑劣飞升者会主动寻找受害者来赐予他们赋礼，他们会伪装成侏儒，以便更容易接近更广泛范围的潜在受害者。

一旦卑劣飞升者以其飞升诅咒折磨某个生物，它通常会逃离，等待目标屈从于它的意志。这些卑劣飞升者中最年长者保有一整支由此类受害者组成的军队，并将他们派往世界各地完成其命令。尽管他们阴险狡诈，但也有些卑劣飞升者会受雇于寻求征募军队的强大存在。

贪婪是好事

讽刺的是，最贪婪的旅人不会屈从于卑劣飞升者。飞升诅咒适用于那些接受其赋礼的人，而不适用于那些抢走他们全部财物的人。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（轻型），技能物品（特技动作、制作、欺瞒、自然、社会、隐匿、生存、盗窃）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀、灾祸、魅力、体质、黑暗、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、心灵、法术（原初：酸液飞溅、黑暗、任意门、纠缠术、加速术、定位术、绊足包）、力量、野性

Vile ascenders are shadowy tricksters who offer tainted gifts that bring others under the vile ascender's will. They are quick to practice their wiles on innocent travelers who venture past their dwellings, pretending to be solitary sages capable of bestowing powerful boons upon those who visit their homes. The more mischievous and enthusiastic vile ascenders actively seek out victims to bestow with their gifts, disguising themselves as gnomes to more easily approach a wider range of potential victims.

Once a vile ascender afflicts a creature with its curse of ascendance, it typically flees, waiting for the target to succumb to its will. The eldest of these vile ascenders retains an entire army of such victims, sending them out into the world to accomplish their bidding. Although they are treacherous, some vile ascenders hire themselves out to powerful beings looking to conscript an army.

Greed Is Good

Ironically, the most greedy travelers don't succumb to vile ascenders. The curse of ascendance applies to those who accept their gifts, not to those who rob them of all their possessions.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light), skill items (Acrobatics, Crafting, Deception, Nature, Society, Stealth, Survival, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, charisma, constitution, darkness, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), mental, spells (Primal: acid splash, darkness, dimension door, entangle, haste, locate, tanglefoot), strength, wild

Owlpaca.name: 猫头鹰羊驼 Owlpaca

Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 嗅觉（模糊）30英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet

Eye Peck.name: 啄眼 Eye Peck
Eye Peck.description:
猫头羊驼啄击一名生物的眼睛，用它的长脖子触及目标。猫头羊驼对一名拥有眼睛的大型或更小的生物进行一次喙部打击。如果打击命中，该生物受到[[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]]伤害，并在其移除流血伤害前处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled}。如果该生物也因猫头羊驼的唾液而处于恶心（状态），则它处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded}，直到它移除流血伤害或恶心（状态）。

The owlpaca pecks a creature's eyes, using its long neck to reach them. The owlpaca makes a beak Strike against a Large or smaller creature with eyes. If the Strike hits, the creature takes [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} until it removes the bleed damage. If the creature is also sickened by owlpaca spit, it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} until it either removes the bleed damage or the sickened condition.

Herd Alarm.name: 兽群警报 Herd Alarm
Herd Alarm.description:
需求 猫头羊驼在60尺内且附近有2名或更多盟友

效果 当作为兽群的一员时，猫头羊驼会本能地保护其他成员并警示它们危险，发出一声响亮的尖啸来恐吓潜在的掠食者。@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]范围内的每个生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:19] 豁免。无论结果如何，这些生物在1分钟内暂时免疫。其他猫头羊驼自动获得大成功或大失败中的大成功，并且若另一个盟友掷骰结果差于成功，则改为成功。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3} 且获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} 持续1轮。

Requirements The owlpaca is within 60 feet of two or more allies

Effect When part of a herd, the owlpaca instinctively protects the others and alert them of danger, unleashing a loud screech that terrifies potential predators. Each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:19] save. Regardless of the result, creatures are temporarily immune for 1 minute. Other owlpacas automatically get a critical success, and if another ally rolls worse than a success, they get a success instead.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Owlpaca Spit.name: 鸮羊驼唾液 Owlpaca Spit
Owlpaca Spit.description:
如果被激怒，猫头羊驼会向15英尺内一个生物的眼睛喷出一团胆汁。命中时，目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心（状态） 1}，并且只要其仍处于恶心（状态），就会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{目眩}。如果该生物还因为眼啄而具有持续流血伤害，则它会处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{失明}，直到其移除流血伤害或恶心（状态）。

If agitated, the owlpaca spews out a lob of bile at a creature's eyes within 15 feet. On a hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} as long as it remains sickened. If the creature also has persistent bleed damage from Eye Peck, it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} until it either removes the bleed damage or the sickened condition.

Owlpaca.publicNotes:
这种由猫头鹰与羊驼拼合而成的生物，源于一位古怪的魔法牧羊人进行的离奇实验；他们想让自家牧群免受当地地精侵扰——那些地精不断杀死先前的看门犬。目睹这种新动物在保护牧羊人羊群方面的成效后，附近其他牧民也开始请求获得猫头鹰羊驼，于是它们便从那里开始扩散。

与羊驼相似，猫头鹰羊驼是守护牧群的绝佳卫士。也因此，若队伍里无人具备在昏暗光照中视物的能力，冒险者偶尔会带上一只，这并不罕见。又如同猫头鹰，猫头鹰羊驼的眼睛固定不动，因此必须转动头部才能改变视野。凭借更长的脖子，猫头鹰羊驼在幼年时就能将颈部旋转得比猫头鹰更远，最大可达270度而不会撕裂任何肌腱。若有多只猫头鹰羊驼看守同一群牧畜，脖子最长的两只会分列两翼，以提供最大覆盖。

尽管猫头鹰羊驼那种类似羊毛的纤维不如其他牧群动物柔软，但如今仍有一些牧民的牧群已完全由猫头鹰羊驼组成。猫头鹰羊驼每两年需要剪毛一次，但剪毛者在过程中必须小心避开羽毛，否则猫头鹰羊驼可能会攻击他们。更棘手的是，每只猫头鹰羊驼的羽毛生长图样都不标准化。粗心的饲主往往宁可让羽毛周围的毛纤维打结纠缠，也不愿冒险在附近剪毛。

羊驼与其他骆驼科动物无法与猫头鹰羊驼杂交。研究者明智地避免因尝试验证猫头鹰羊驼与猫头鹰是否也如此而招致嘲笑。

晚餐前的鸣叫

猫头鹰羊驼是杂食动物，偏好以草类与啮齿动物混合为食。与普通羊驼一样，它的唾液由胃中半消化的食物构成。最近进食过的猫头鹰羊驼，会根据其餐食构成，使其唾液额外造成钝击伤害或附加恶心（状态）。一团半消化的老鼠糊到脸上，足以让多数掠食者转身离开。

当猫头鹰羊驼飞行

有些猫头鹰羊驼天生带翼。飞行对它们并非天性，但这些罕见的突变（特征）在成熟后仍能获得10尺的飞行速度。尽管这使它们略微更强，但由于它们没有能造成伤害的远程手段，这种调整不足以显著提升猫头鹰羊驼的整体能力。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技，运动，威吓）

符合条件的灌注属性 破邪，体质，能量抗性（正能量），精神，力量，投掷，野性

This amalgamation of an owl and an alpaca came about after an eccentric magical shepherd performed bizarre experiments to keep their herd safe from local goblins who kept killing the previous guard dogs. After seeing the effectiveness of the new animal in protecting the shepherd's flock, other herders in the area started requesting owlpacas as well, and they've begun to spread from there.

Much like alpacas, owlpacas make excellent guards for their herds. For this reason, it isn't unheard of for adventurers to occasionally bring one along if no one in the party has the ability to see in dim light. Much like owls, an owlpaca's eyes are fixed in place, so they have to turn their heads in order to change their view. With a longer neck, owlpacas are able to rotate their necks even further than an owl, to a maximum of 270 degrees in their youth, without tearing any tendons. If more than one owlpaca is watching over a herd, the two with the longest necks flank the rest to give the most coverage.

While an owlpaca's wool-like fiber isn't as soft as that of other herd animals, there are some herders whose herds now consist entirely of owlpacas. Owlpacas need to be sheared every two years, but the shearer must be careful to avoid the feathers in the process or the owlpaca might attack them. What makes this more difficult is that each owlpaca has a non-standardized pattern of feather growth. Neglectful owners often let the wool around the feathers get matted rather than risk shearing nearby.

Alpacas and other camelids are unable to crossbreed with owlpacas. Researchers have wisely avoided ridicule by not experimenting to see if that is true of owlpacas and owls.

Hoots For Dinner

The owlpaca is an omnivore that prefers a mix of grasses and rodents. Like regular alpacas, its spit consists of partially digested meals from its stomach. An owlpaca that recently ate may add bludgeoning damage or the sickened condition to its spit depending on what comprised its meal. A partially digested mouse to the face gives most predators cause to turn away.

When Owlpacas Fly

Some owlpacas are born with wings. Flight does not come naturally to them, but these rare mutants manage a fly speed of 10 feet when they reach maturity. While this makes them slightly more powerful, since they don't have a damaging ranged option, this adjustment isn't enough to noticeably increase the owlpaca's overall capabilities.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), mental, strength, throwing, wild

Money-Grubber Swarm.name: 钱扒虫群 Money-Grubber Swarm

Coinsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 钱感（模糊）60尺 Coinsense (Imprecise) 60 feet
Coinsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.description:
财迷可以将钱币侦测作为一种模糊感官。若他们通过搜寻将感官专注于某个生物，他们会得知对方携带了多少钱币，以及这些钱币有多闪亮。

Money-grubbers can detect coins as an imprecise sense. If they focus their senses on a creature by Seeking, they learn how many coins they are carrying and how shiny these coins are.

Greedy Souls.name: 贪婪之魂 Greedy Souls
Greedy Souls.description:
钱贪者的存在与它们偷走的钱币相连。如果一名生物成功从虫群那里偷取钱币，虫群会受到 @Damage[1d4[mental]] 伤害，或等同于被偷走的钱币数量的精神伤害，取较低者。

A money-grubber's existence is linked to the coins they steal. If a creature successfully Steals coins from the swarm, the swarm is dealt @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage, or mental damage equal to the number of coins stolen, whichever is lower.

Nourishing Spirits.name: 滋养灵体 Nourishing Spirits
Nourishing Spirits.description:
任何位于钱贪虫群内的灵体、不死生物，或具有负向治疗的生物，都可以执行一次带有邪恶特征的操控动作，以吞食一把钱贪虫。此举对虫群造成 @Damage[1d4[mental]] 伤害，并使该生物获得等同于所造成伤害的临时生命值，持续1分钟。若该生物是不死灵体，它还会在1分钟内获得+1状态加值于攻击掷骰和伤害掷骰。生物每小时只能通过食用钱贪虫获得一次这些好处。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.sr3HmSgwjQyIsuDH]{效果：滋养灵体}

Any spirit, undead, or creature with negative healing inside a money- grubber swarm can take a single manipulate action with the evil trait to consume a handful of money-grubbers. This deals @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage to the swarm, and the creature gains temporary hit points equal to the damage dealt for 1 minute. If the creature was an undead spirit, it also gains a +1 status to attack rolls and damage rolls for 1 minute. A creature can only gain these benefits from eating money-grubbers once per hour.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.sr3HmSgwjQyIsuDH]{Effect: Nourishing Spirits}

Penny Pinching.name: 精打细算 Penny Pinching
Penny Pinching.description:
钱-贪虫群翻找其空间内所有生物的随身物品以窃取它们最闪亮的钱币，尝试一次盗窃检定，对抗所有生物的反射DC。

成功 钱-贪虫可从该生物处偷取至多[[/br 1d4]]枚钱币，由GM酌情决定，优先偷取最闪亮的。持续的挠痒和掐捏也会对该生物造成@Damage[1d4[mental]]伤害。

失败 钱-贪虫未能偷到任何钱币，但仍会对该生物造成@Damage[1[mental]]伤害。

The money- grubber swarm rummages through the possessions of all the creatures within its space in order to steal their shiniest coins, attempting a Thievery check against all the creatures' Reflex DCs.

Success The money-grubbers can steal up to [[/br 1d4]] coins from the creature, prioritizing the shiniest ones, at the GM's discretion. The constant tickling and pinching also deal @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage to the creature.

Failure The money-grubbers fail to steal any coins, but they still deal @Damage[1[mental]] damage to the creature.

Money-Grubber Swarm.publicNotes:
钱扒子是微小的不死生物，会聚集在一起偷窃闪亮的钱币。人们对这些微小生物的目击报告常常不以为然，认为只是输钱的赌徒胡言乱语或健忘的挥霍者在抱怨；但凡是活在被钱扒子纠缠的城市中心的人，迟早有一天会发现，自己的钱袋因为这些害虫而比平时轻了不少。

单个钱扒子完全无害，通常只要把它们赶走就足以摆脱它们。即使它们设法溜进钱袋里，通常也只能偷走一枚钱币。因为它们总是优先挑最闪亮的钱币，所以在受钱扒子侵扰的社区里，随身带上一把擦得锃亮的铜币是一种常见且有效的做法。

然而，当大量钱扒子聚在一起时，它们就能压倒新手冒险者，并把他们的所有钱币都偷走。这通常伤到的更多是新手的自尊而非身体，但在还没来得及花掉之前就丢失了最近一次地城探索的战利品，对许多人来说可能足以断送职业生涯。这些贪婪的游荡灵魂会拿偷来的钱币做什么无人知晓，因为从未有人发现过钱扒子的宝藏堆。

灵性补给

钱扒子的灵性精华对大多数不死生物与灵体而言都出奇地有滋养作用；学者声称，他们记录过几乎每一种灵体都会吞食钱扒子的事件。有些人甚至说，在大量吞食钱扒子之后，即便是仁善的灵体也可能被腐化为强大的不死憎恶。钱扒子对任何不携带钱币之物的彻底无视，使它们成了容易入口的点心；更强大的灵体有时会在身边养一群虫群，把它们当作在遭受攻击时快速增强力量的手段。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 1.5/3.5/6.5 gp

符合条件的精炼 察觉物品，技能物品（隐匿、盗窃）

符合条件的灌注属性 体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），心灵，原野

Money-grubbers are tiny undead that gather together to pilfer shiny coins. Sightings of the tiny creatures are often dismissed as the ramblings of losing gamblers or forgetful spenders, but everyone living in urban centers haunted by money-grubbers will, one day or later, find their purses lighter than usual because of these pests.

A single money-grubber is completely harmless and simply shooing them away will often be enough to get rid of them. Even if they manage to sneak their way into a purse, they will usually only be able to steal a single coin. Because they always prioritize the shiniest coins, carrying a handful of polished copper pieces is a common and effective practice around communities haunted by money-grubbers.

However, when a great number of money-grubbers gather, they can overwhelm beginner adventurers and steal away all their coins. This usually ends up hurting the novices' pride more than their bodies, but losing the spoils of a recent dungeon delve before getting to spend them can be a career-ending event for many. What these greedy wandering souls do with the coins they steal is unknown, as no money-grubber hoard has ever been found.

A Spiritual Supplement

The spiritual essence of money-grubbers is strangely nourishing for most undead and spirits, and scholars have claimed to have recorded events of pretty much every kind of spirit eating money-grubbers. Some even say that after consuming money-grubbers in great quantities, even benevolent spirits can be corrupted into powerful undead abominations. The total disregard the money-grubbers have toward anything not carrying coins makes them easy snacks, and stronger spirits sometimes keep a swarm of them around as a quick way to power up when attacked.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 1.5/3.5/6.5 gp

Eligible Refinements perception item, skill items (Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), mental, wild

Mirage Crawler.name: 幻蜃爬行者 Mirage Crawler

Tremorsense (Variable).name: 颤动感知（可变） Tremorsense (Variable)
Tremorsense (Variable).description:
蜃景爬行者的颤动感知在60英尺内为精确感官，并在120英尺内为模糊感官。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

A mirage crawler's tremorsense is a precise sense out to 60 feet, and an imprecise sense out to 120 feet.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

Project Mirage.name: 幻影计划 Project Mirage
Project Mirage.description:
触发 海市蜃楼爬虫成为一次攻击的目标

需求 海市蜃楼爬虫的沙云处于激活状态

效果 海市蜃楼爬虫在其沙云中投射出多个自身的幻象，可能导致攻击者转而命中其中一个影像。掷骰 [[/br 1d4]]。除非结果为1，否则触发的攻击会命中影像而非海市蜃楼爬虫，且无效果。无论结果如何，这些影像都会消失，且爬虫的沙云会被压制，直到再次激活为止。

Trigger The mirage crawler is targeted by an attack

Requirements The mirage crawler's sand cloud is active

Effect The mirage crawler projects multiple illusions of itself within its sand cloud, potentially causing the attacker to hit one of the images instead. Roll [[/br 1d4]].
