On any result other than a 1, the triggering attack hits the image instead of the mirage crawler, with no effect. Either way, the images disappear, and the crawler's sand cloud is suppressed until activated again.

Sand Cloud.name: 沙尘云 Sand Cloud
Sand Cloud.description:
30英尺。蜃景爬行者的腿部水疱能够持续喷射沙尘爆发，使该生物从中获益。任何被卷入该区域的生物为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{隐蔽}，且灵光外的生物对灵光内的生物而言为隐蔽。蜃景爬行者可以使用具有专注（特征）的单动作来压制该灵光或再次启动它。

30 feet. The mirage crawler's leg blisters can constantly eject bursts of sand, which the creature uses to its advantage. Any creature caught within the area is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed}, and creatures outside the aura are concealed to creatures within. The mirage crawler can suppress this aura or activate it again using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Mucous Residue.name: 黏液残留物 Mucous Residue
Mucous Residue.description:
受到蜃景爬行者黏液打击伤害的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:29] 豁免中成功，否则在1轮内变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}；若大失败，则在1轮内变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 2}。

A creature damaged by the mirage crawler's mucus Strike must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:29] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 2} for 1 round on a critical failure.

Constrict.name: 缠勒 Constrict
Constrict.description:
[[/r (2d12+9)[钝击]]], @Check[type:强韧|dc:29|基础:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

[[/r (2d12+9)[钝击]]], @Check[type:强韧|dc:29|基础:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

[[/r (2d12+9)[钝击]]], @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29|basic:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

[[/r (2d12+9)[bludgeoning]]], @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29|basic:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

Caging Rush.name: 笼困冲锋 Caging Rush
Caging Rush.description:
海市蜃楼爬行者以其速度进行掘地或疾走。若其结束移动时位于某个敌人的触及范围内，则对单一生物进行两次腿部打击。若两次打击均命中，则该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{被抓住} 状态，持续至海市蜃楼爬行者下个回合结束。

失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{被束缚} 状态，持续至海市蜃楼爬行者下个回合结束。

大失败 该生物在海市蜃楼爬行者下个回合结束前处于被束缚状态，并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{目眩 2} 状态。

The mirage crawler Burrows or Strides up to its Speed. If it ends its movement within reach of an enemy, it makes two leg Strikes against a single creature. If both Strikes hit, the creature must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} until the end of the mirage crawler's next turn.

Failure The creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} until the end of the mirage crawler's next turn.

Critical Failure The creature becomes restrained until the end of the mirage crawler's next turn and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}.

Mirage Crawler.publicNotes:
蜃景爬行者潜伏在沙漠道路附近，是一种凶残的伏击型掠食者。它常被误认为一块巨大的岩石，外形像一只巨大的、不对称的蛤蜊，拥有沙色的贝壳。当爬行者张开身体时，其中所包裹的海绵状血肉与黏液团会向外鼓胀。随后，它那细长、间距不均的腿被挤出，显露出这些结晶状附肢上覆着由感应囊泡与充满沙粒的水疱构成的网状结构。它在地表移动缓慢，但在地下掘行时却快得不可思议。狩猎时，蜃景爬行者的腿持续不断地窸窣爬动与抽搐，会释放出一团包围其身的沙云，使其得以抓住毫无防备的猎物。尽管其智力并不出众，蜃景爬行者却能对始终环绕自身的沙云施加极强的控制力，使其能在沙云中塑造影像来分散敌人的注意。

尽管这些爬行者通常是独行掠食者，这点令人庆幸，但在某些天文合相期间，它们偶尔会聚集，进入近乎不可预测的交配季。随之而来的觅食狂潮常常蹂躏附近的聚落，只留下蜃景爬行者受害者的残骸——被其异样的消化道塑造成中空、长椭圆形的石化骨珍珠。

感知之珠

一些鲁莽的寻宝者会寻找蜃景爬行者的骨珍珠，理由是既然普通珍珠值钱，那这些想必也一样。然而事实并非如此，明智的做法是别去碰它们。受精的蜃景爬行者卵与被消化后的残留物几乎一模一样，会孵化出贪婪的幼虫，吞食任何它们能用口器咬住的有机物。它们外形类似洞穴蠕虫，但并没有那么强大，并会停留在该生命阶段，直到吃下足够的岩石与水晶，长出贝壳与腿。若冒险者在幼虫变形为蜃景爬行者之前将其杀死，或许能在其胃里找到一些贵金属，但其价值很少值得冒此风险。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（中型，重型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动，隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀，克星，体质，能量抗性（火焰，正能量），邪恶，力量，狂野

Lurking near desert roads, the mirage crawler is a vicious ambush predator. Often mistaken for a large boulder, it resembles a massive, asymmetrical clam with sand-colored shells. When the crawler opens itself, the spongy mass of flesh and mucus contained within bulges outward. Its spindly, unevenly spaced legs are then pushed out, revealing these crystalline appendages to be covered in a network of sensory bulbs and sand-filled blisters. Slow to move on the surface, mirage crawlers move with uncanny speed when digging underground. When hunting, the constant skittering and twitching of a mirage crawler's legs releases a cloud of sand that surrounds the creature and allows it to grab unsuspecting prey. Despite its unimpressive intelligence, a mirage crawler exerts a great deal of control over the sand cloud that constantly surrounds it, allowing it to form images in the cloud to distract its foes.

Although it is fortunate that these crawlers are typically lone predators, they occasionally gather during certain astronomical conjunctions for their nigh- unpredictable mating season. The ensuing feeding frenzy often ravages nearby communities, leaving behind the remains of the mirage crawlers' victims, shaped by their alien digestive tracts into hollow, oblong pearls of petrified bone.

Pearls Of Wisdom

Foolhardy treasure hunters search for mirage crawler bone pearls with the reasoning that since regular pearls are valuable, these must be as well. They are not, and the wise move is to leave them alone. Fertilized mirage crawler eggs look almost identical to the digested remains and spawn ravenous larvae that devour any organic material they can wrap their maws around. They resemble cave worms, though they are not as powerful, and remain in that life stage until they eat enough rock and crystal to grow a shell and legs. Should adventurers kill a larva before it transforms into a mirage crawler, they may find some precious metals in its stomach, but the value is rarely worth the risk.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, energy resistant (fire, positive), evil, strength, wild

Odrazu.name: 立刻 Odrazu

Greater Darkvision.name: 强效黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

Self-Absorption.name: 自我沉溺 Self-Absorption
Self-Absorption.description:
对于因奥德拉祖以外的任何事物而处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} 状态的生物，奥德拉祖对其而言是 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} 的。

The odrazu is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} to creatures who are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} by anything other than the odrazu itself.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Weakness 10 to Visual Effects.name: 对视觉效果弱点 10 Weakness 10 to Visual Effects

Attack of Opportunity (Eyestalk Only).name: 借机攻击（仅限眼柄） Attack of Opportunity (Eyestalk Only)

Narcissistic Compulsion.name: 自恋强迫症 Narcissistic Compulsion
Narcissistic Compulsion.description:
60英尺。odrazu持续用一件绝对的虚荣与自我沉溺的斗篷包裹自身。任何非魔鬼生物在其回合结束时处于该灵光中，必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:18] 意志豁免。若其失败，则只要它仍留在该灵光中，若它在该灵光半径内的反光表面中看见自己的倒影，它就会对自己的倒影变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}，持续1分钟或直到它无法再看见自己的倒影为止，以先发生者为准。处于Fascinated时，该生物无法自愿停止观看自己的倒影，或以使自己无法再看见倒影的方式移动。豁免危急成功的生物将对自恋强迫获得1小时的暂时免疫。

60 feet. An odrazu constantly surrounds itself in a cloak of absolute vanity and self-absorption. A non-devil creature that ends its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:18] save. If it fails, then as long as it remains in the aura, if it sees its reflection in a reflective surface within the aura's radius, it becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} with its own reflection for 1 minute or until it can no longer see its reflection, whichever comes first. While fascinated, the creature can't willingly stop viewing its own reflection, or move such that it can no longer see its reflection. A creature that critically succeeds on their saving throw becomes temporarily immune to narcissistic compulsion for 1 hour.

Clouded Vision.name: 朦胧视野 Clouded Vision
Clouded Vision.description:
被奥德拉祖的眼柄击中的生物会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{目眩} 状态，持续 1 轮；若为大成功则持续 2 轮。

A creature struck by an odrazu's eyestalk is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} for 1 round, or for 2 rounds on a critical hit.

Taste Reflection.name: 味觉反射 Taste Reflection
Taste Reflection.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 Odrazu 能够啜饮一个 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{迷魂（状态）} 生物的倒影，并且它们会定期这么做，既因为它们喜爱这种味道，也为了抽干受害者的灵魂能量并据为己有。odrazu 对一个未处于 doomed 的迷魂生物进行一次舌头打击；该迷魂生物在对抗此打击时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{措手不及}。若该打击命中并对受害者造成伤害，odrazu 获得等同于受害者等级两倍的临时生命值，并在接下来 24 小时内获得 +2 状态加值于以 魅力 为基础的技能检定。被打击的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21] 豁免，失败则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 1}，大失败则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 2}。当该生物处于 doomed 时，它不会在任何反光表面上投下倒影。尽管迷魂通常会在一次敌对动作后结束，但此打击不会以其他方式结束该生物的迷魂（状态）。然而，若该生物因自恋强迫而处于迷魂，倒影的缺失意味着迷魂将自动结束，因为该生物不再能看到自己的倒影。若在品尝倒影之前，该生物未察觉或未探知到 odrazu，则在品尝该生物的倒影之后它仍保持如此，即使一次打击通常会暴露其存在。被 Taste Reflection 施加 doomed 期间，除非 odrazu 对该生物采取另一次敌对动作，否则该生物无法观察到 odrazu，使得 odrazu 对该生物而言实际上等同于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{隐形}。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.oWzADnlo1URowvSC]{Effect: Taste Reflection}

Frequency once per round

Effect Odrazu are capable of sipping away at a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} creature's reflection, and they do so regularly, both because they adore the taste and to drain their victim's soul energy away and take it for themselves. The odrazu makes a tongue Strike against a fascinated creature who isn't doomed; the fascinated creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} against this Strike. If the Strike hits and deals damage to the victim, the odrazu gains temporary Hit Points equal to twice the victim's level and a +2 status bonus to Charisma-based skill checks for 24 hours. The struck creature must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21] saving throw, becoming @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 1} on a failure or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 2} on a critical failure. While the creature is doomed, it doesn't cast a reflection in any reflecting surface. This Strike doesn't otherwise end the fascinated condition on the creature even though fascination normally ends after a hostile action. However, if the creature was fascinated due to narcissistic compulsion, the lack of reflection means that the fascination automatically ends, as the creature can no longer see its own reflection. If the odrazu was unnoticed or undetected by the creature before Tasting its Reflection, it remains so after Tasting the creature's Reflection, even though a Strike would normally reveal its presence. While doomed by Taste Reflection, a creature can't observe the odrazu unless the odrazu takes another hostile action against the creature, rendering the odrazu effectively @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} to the creature.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.oWzADnlo1URowvSC]{Effect: Taste Reflection}

Odrazu.publicNotes:
亦被称为镜中魔鬼，欧德拉祖（odrazu）是那些自恋生物的畸形残渣：它们在生前为了进一步增强自身魅力而愚蠢地与一名魔鬼达成契约。它们死后，这些凡人被转化为魔鬼，并被灌注以星界碎片以及镜中实体的残片——这些残片构成了诸如碎裂者（fragmentors）与塔哈加塔（tahagatas）之类的生物——从而形成一种介于魔鬼与星界镜生物之间的怪异混合体。庇主魔鬼所提出的条件往往令人难以抗拒：惊人的美貌、巧舌如簧，或无可否认的性格魅力。作为交易的代价，灵魂在地狱中的服役会使它们去寻找同样自我中心的凡人——这些人是它们的始祖最终加以利用的轻易目标。不过在此期间，欧德拉祖乐于对受害者施加一些小小的折磨。

凡人的倒影是一扇通往其灵魂微小碎片的门户。尽管对大多数魔鬼而言这点收获过于微薄，不值得费力追逐，但像欧德拉祖这般又卑劣又虚荣的邪魔却极其渴望舔食这种残羹剩饭，享受倒影能量为它们带来的短暂荣光复归之刻。

被欧德拉祖折磨的生物往往对它的存在毫无察觉，只会在生活的各个性相上体验到一种普遍而无法解释的萎靡与绝望感。然而，当他们无休止地痴痴凝望自己的倒影时，这种强迫性的举止可能会令旁人起疑。话虽如此，对于欧德拉祖最可能下手的目标而言，如此可憎的自我迷恋或许一点也不显得反常。

镜裔（mirrorborn）是一类与星界位面以及镜中扭曲次元之外的无限替代现实都有关联的生物家族。它们很像@Compendium[pf2e.hazards.4jJxLlimyQaIVXlt]{Darkside Mirror}另一侧出现的邪恶复制体，多数镜裔象征着多元宇宙的无限可能——那些并未发生但本可以发生之事。这一类镜裔包括塔哈加塔与碎裂者，两种由“潜能”在悖论式扭曲中凝成有形之躯的实体。在较小程度上，手性体（chiraluses）亦是如此：它们是那些永不可能存在之倒影的化身，体现了诸如吸血鬼（特征）这类通常没有倒影的生物之倒影。最后，欧德拉祖是极其罕见的镜裔，因为它们由魔鬼与星界位面的共生混合体构成，并点缀着来自替代镜次元的异界能量。

所有镜裔的共同点之一，是它们在肉体上与镜子相连：欧德拉祖以倒影为食；手性体以二维倒影之姿出现；塔哈加塔采取由无数镜面构成的形态；碎裂者则由无数尖利的镜片碎片组成。这并不意味着它们一定更常出现在镜子更普遍的区域，因为每一种生物都会将其镜像般的肉体特征一并带到所到之处。

尽管镜裔是一类生物家族，它们彼此之间却很少互动。即便碎裂者有时可能由被摧毁的塔哈加塔形成，也很少与塔哈加塔交谈；而塔哈加塔则认为碎裂者本质中所固有的破碎潜能令人厌恶且刺眼，这种感觉与塔哈加塔与原本生物并置后，从原生体身上感受到的“错位感”颇为相似。

虚荣的代价

当欧德拉祖将虚荣的灵魂带入地狱却不将其塑造成新的欧德拉祖时，这些生物通常会在镜厅或映照池间遭受折磨；镜面与水面会显现他们面容的扭曲版本，使其充满绝望。这些反射表面与镜次元相连，也使欧德拉祖及其庇主能够试图将地狱的腐化扩散到其他领域。

穿越镜中

除darkside mirrors会放出其中映照之人的替代版本之外，也存在（虽罕见）通过普通镜子连接到更遥远领域并遭遇镜裔的可能。这种现象在充盈星界能量之地，或是在凡世与镜中彼界之间的帷幕曾被撕裂、并在过程中变得愈发稀薄之处，更容易发生。穿镜而入的人会发现这些镜之领域遵循其自身怪异的规则；尽管他们最终可能从另一面镜子重新出现，但往往已然改变。

其他镜裔

此处呈现的镜裔只是冰山一角，因为无限镜宇宙中的可能性与多元宇宙本身一样无穷无尽。关于其他镜裔的一些传闻包括：

  • 暗面者（Darksiders），源自暗面镜子的生物，已成为此世的永久居民；它们要么试图从其现实带来更多“居民”，要么试图在此建立自己的封地。
  • 晶碎魇（Kryshards），由破碎水晶球的反射碎片形成的恶意实体；它们利用镜子窥探许多其他生物，并将所得信息用于自身卑劣目的。
  • 镜中哑剧者（Mirror Mimes），藏身镜中的生物；它们会取代生物天然的倒影以吞噬该生物的心智，并试图在镜前模仿该生物的动作以不被察觉。
  • 折光者（Reflectors），在追猎猎物时会在战场各处布置许多镜子的生物；它们发射在镜面间反弹、以意想不到角度折转的光束，并照射其受害者。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 12/27/50 gp

可选精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型，中型），盾牌，察觉 物品，技能 物品（欺瞒，交涉，威吓，表演，宗教，社会，隐匿）

可选灌注属性 bane, 魅力, 敏捷, elongating, energy resistant（火焰，毒素，正能量）, evil, 智力, mental, wild, winged

Also known as mirror devils, odrazu are the grotesque remnants of narcissistic creatures that, while they were still alive, made a foolish pact with a devil in order to further enhance their own charm. After their demise, these mortals were transformed into devils and infused with astral shards and fragments of mirror entities that make up creatures like fragmentors and tahagatas to form a bizarre type of hybrid being between a devil and an astral mirror creature. The patron devil's offers are often irresistible: incredible good looks, a silver tongue, or an undeniable force of personality. As payment for their bargain, the soul's infernal servitude sees them seeking out likewise egoistic mortals—easy marks for their progenitor to eventually exploit. In the intervening time, however, odrazus delight in inflicting small torments upon their victims.

A mortal's reflection is a gateway to a tiny fragment of their soul. Though far too meager a bounty for most devils to deign spending effort pursuing, fiends as wretched and vain as odrazu are all too eager to lap up such table scraps, delighting in the brief moment of restored glory that the reflection's energy affords them.

Creatures tormented by an odrazu often remain completely unaware of its presence, beyond experiencing a general, inexplicable feeling of malaise and hopelessness across all aspects of their lives. However, their obsessive behavior might start to seem suspicious to others as they stare longingly at their own reflection at interminable length. Then again, for an odrazu's most likely victims, such loathsome self-infatuation might not appear at all out of the ordinary.

Mirrorborn are a family of creatures with connections to both the Astral Plane and the infinite alternate realities beyond the twisted dimensions found within mirrors. Much like the evil duplicates found on the other side of a @Compendium[pf2e.hazards.4jJxLlimyQaIVXlt]{Darkside Mirror}, most mirrorborn represent the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, of things that aren't but could have been. This category of mirrorborn includes tahagatas and fragmentors, two entities formed from the paradoxical distortion of potential into a corporeal form. To a lesser extent, the same is true of chiraluses, the incarnations of the reflections that could never be, embodying reflections of creatures like vampires that ordinarily have no reflections. Finally, odrazu are highly unusual mirrorborn, as they form from a symbiotic hybrid between a devil and the Astral Plane, peppered with otherworldly energies from alternate mirror dimensions.

One commonality among all mirrorborn is their physical connection to mirrors: odrazu feed on reflections, chiraluses appear as two-dimensional reflections, tahagatas take a form built of myriad mirrored surfaces, and fragmentors are composed of countless jagged mirror shards. This doesn't mean that they are necessarily more likely to be found in areas where mirrors are more common, as each of the creatures brings their mirrored physicality along with them.

Despite being a family of creatures, mirrorborn rarely interact with each other. Even fragmentors, which can sometimes form out of a destroyed tahagata, rarely converse with tahagatas, and tahagatas for their part find the fragmented potential inherent to a fragmentor's essence distasteful and jarring, much like the sensation of wrongness they feel from an original creature after the tahagata juxtaposes with it.

The Wages Of Vanity

When odrazu bring vain souls to Hell and don't form them into new odrazus, the creatures are typically tortured amid halls of mirrors or reflecting pools that show off distorted versions of their visage, filling them with despair. These reflective surfaces connect to mirror dimensions, which also allow odrazu and their patrons to attempt to spread Hell's corruption into other realms.

Through The Looking Glass

In addition to darkside mirrors, which send forth alternative versions of those reflected within, it's possible, though rare, to connect to realms beyond an ordinary mirror and encounter mirrorborn. The phenomenon is far more likely in places brimming with astral energies or in locations where the veil between the mortal world and the world beyond the mirror has been torn before, becoming thinner and thinner in the process. Those who enter through a mirror find that these mirror realms operate on their own bizarre rules, and while they eventually might re-emerge from another mirror, they often do so changed.

Other Mirrorborn

The mirrorborn presented here are just the tip of the iceberg, as the possibilities in the infinite mirror universes are just as endless as the multiverse itself. Some rumors of other mirrorborn include:

  • Darksiders, creatures originating from a darkside mirror who have become permanent residents of this world, either seeking to bring more residents from their reality or to establish their own fiefdom in this one.
  • Kryshards, malevolent entities that form from the reflective shards of shattered crystal balls and use mirrors to spy on many other creatures and use the information for their own foul purposes.
  • Mirror Mimes, creatures who hide within mirrors and replace a creature's natural reflection in order to devour that creature's psyche, attempting to stay unnoticed by mimicking the creature's actions in front of mirrors.
  • Reflectors, creatures that position many mirrors across the battlefield when stalking their prey, shooting beams of light that bounce off the mirrors at unexpected angles and irradiate their victims.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Performance, Religion, Society, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (fire, poison, positive), evil, intelligence, mental, wild, winged
Odrazu.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

Midnight Lily.name: 午夜百合 Midnight Lily

Phototropic Bloom.name: 向光绽放 Phototropic Bloom
Phototropic Bloom.description:
触发 一件光源在午夜百合的空间内移动或亮起，且午夜百合具有缓慢（状态）

效果 午夜百合使用刺痛荆棘，并在该光源仍留在午夜百合的空间内期间，以及在光离开该区域后的1轮内，失去其枯萎能力造成的缓慢（状态）与状态减值。

Trigger A light source moves or lights up inside the midnight lily's space and the midnight lily has the slowed condition

Effect The midnight lily uses Stinging Thorns and loses the slowed condition and status penalty from its desiccation ability for as long as the light source remains in the midnight lily's space and for 1 round after the light leaves the area.

Desiccation.name: 干涸 Desiccation
Desiccation.description:
在黑暗中，午夜百合处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}，并且其速度承受–10英尺的状态减值

In darkness, a midnight lily is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}, and has a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds

Midnight Lily Venom.name: 午夜百合毒液 Midnight Lily Venom
Midnight Lily Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

最长持续时间 1 minute

阶段 1 1d4 毒素并像火把一样散发光（1 轮）

阶段 2 [[/r 1d6 #poison]]{1d6 毒素}，像火把一样散发光，并具有光致失明（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 1 minute

Stage 1 1d4 poison and sheds light like a torch (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 1d6 #poison]]{1d6 poison}, sheds light like a torch, and light blindness (1 round)

Stinging Thorns.name: 刺痛荆棘 Stinging Thorns
Stinging Thorns.description:
每个处于午夜百合的空间内的生物承受 @Damage[2d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] 豁免。豁免失败的生物会暴露于午夜百合毒液。

Each creature within the midnight lily's space takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] save. A creature that fails its save is exposed to midnight lily venom.

Midnight Lily.publicNotes:
午夜百合是一种掠食性植物的虫群，大部分时间都以不起眼、干枯的荆棘丛形态存在。它们会在花园里聚集成四到五个百合虫群；而在自然环境中——即那种树冠层极其浓密、没有任何光能抵达地面的丛林，以及午夜百合称之为家园的深邃地下洞窟系统——这些植物即使几十年不移动分毫、不吞食一餐也能生存。在这些生物已经适应黑暗的地方，午夜百合会利用光来狩猎。当暴露在明亮光照下时，午夜百合的荚囊会爆裂般绽放为肉质的白色花朵，每一朵都从一根带有毒液的针状刺中放射开来。

随后植物会猛烈抽打，试图将毒液注入猎物体内。一旦承受了构成午夜百合毒液的诡异魔法混合物，生物的内脏便开始被腐蚀；更令人不安的是，还会散发出一种病态、苍白的淡红色光。这种光会使其他百合绽放，进而引发连锁反应般的进食狂潮，确保这种植物能够继续移动并蜇刺。等到猎物因伤势而屈服后，午夜百合会把根系扎入该生物体内，并

回到其干枯状态以休息并进食。拥有黑暗视觉且避免使用光的生物几乎无须畏惧午夜百合。正因如此，再加上它们稀有而美丽的花朵，午夜百合深受深居地下的园丁与花卉学家喜爱。这种植物也会被用于致命用途：心术不正的园丁会把它们种在地表居民可能用来抵达地下巢穴或宝藏堆的路径上，用作预警系统。

活迷宫

一些隧道居民会在关键的咽喉要道种植午夜百合，以防御来自地表的入侵者。拥有黑暗视觉、探索迷宫般巢穴的敌人可能以为自己已经将其绘制清楚；然而只要有其他人闯入、触发某些百合，植物便会移动到新的位置，从而改变整个布局。防御者也可能将午夜百合与会散发光的陷阱结合使用，使得即便拥有黑暗视觉者也可能沦为受害者。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（光），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），毒素，尖刺，狂野

Midnight lilies are swarms of predatory plants that spend most of their time as an unremarkable, desiccated bramble. They flock together in gardens of four to five swarms of lilies, and under natural conditions, in the thickly canopied jungles where no light reaches the ground and the deep subterranean cave systems that a midnight lily calls home, the plants can go decades without so much as moving or consuming a meal. In these places where creatures have adapted to the darkness, midnight lilies hunt using light. When exposed to bright light, a midnight lily's pods blossom explosively into fleshy white flowers, each radiating from a single venomous needle-like thorn.

The plant then thrashes violently, seeking to inject its prey with venom. Once subjected to the strange magical cocktail that makes up a midnight lily's venom, a creature's insides begin to corrode and, more disturbingly, shed a sickly pale red light. This light can cause other lilies to blossom and result in a chain reaction feeding frenzy, ensuring that the plant can continue to move and sting. Once its prey succumbs to its injuries, a midnight lily plants its roots in the creature and

returns to its desiccated state to rest and feed. Creatures with darkvision who avoid the use of light have little to fear from midnight lilies. Because of this as well as their rare and beautiful flowers, midnight lilies are favorites of deep-dwelling gardeners and floriculturists. The plant is also used for deadly purposes, with wicked gardeners planting them in paths that a surface dweller might take to reach a subterranean lair or treasure horde, functioning as an early warning system.

Living Maze

Some tunnel dwellers plant midnight lilies at strategic choke points to protect against intruders from the surface. Foes with darkvision who explore the maze-like lair may think they have it mapped out, only for others to wander in, trigger some lilies, and change the entire layout due to the plants moving into new positions. Defenders may also combine midnight lilies with snares that shed light so that even those with darkvision may fall victim to them.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), shield, perception item, skill items (Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), poison, spiked, wild

Mercurial Knight.name: 水银骑士 Mercurial Knight

Mercurial Form.name: 水银形态 Mercurial Form
Mercurial Form.description:
骑士在战斗中于固态与液态之间流转，根据其所处的形态获得与失去效果；除了其重塑反应动作（）外，它还可以以单动作改变其形态。骑士默认为固态形态；若其数据存在差异，则除非另有说明，所列数据适用于其固态形态。在其液态形态下，骑士能够穿过任何足以让水通过的开口。骑士还会根据其形态拥有不同的打击：固态形态为水银战锤，液态形态为水银长剑。

The knight flows from solid to liquid throughout combat, gaining and losing effects based on the form it occupies; in addition to its Reform reaction, it can change its form as a single action. The knight defaults to its solid form, and where its statistics differ, the listed statistics apply for its solid form unless stated otherwise. While in its liquid form, the knight is able to move through any opening large enough for water. The knight also has a different Strike depending on its form, a mercury hammer in solid form and a mercury sword in liquid form.

Reform.name: 重塑 Reform
Reform.description:
触发 水银骑士将要受到其具有弱点的物理伤害

效果 骑士变为液态或固态形态，以其当前形态以外的那一种为准。在变化之后结算触发的伤害。

Trigger The Mercurial Knight would take physical damage that it is weak to

Effect The knight changes to a liquid or solid form, whichever is not its current form. Apply the triggering damage after the change.

Mercury Splash.name: 水银飞溅 Mercury Splash
Mercury Splash.description:
需求 水银骑士处于其液态形态

效果 骑士从其身体喷射出原生水银，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]。所有在该锥形范围内的生物受到 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning],1d4[poison]]{2d6钝击伤害和1d4毒素} 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true] 豁免。

Requirements The Mercurial Knight is in its liquid form

Effect The knight sprays raw mercury from its body in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15]. All creatures within this cone take @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning],1d4[poison]]{2d6 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 poison} damage, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true] save.

Mercurial Knight.publicNotes:
水银骑士是适应性极强的构装体，能在固态与液态形态之间切换。据传奇所言，一名古代工匠在追寻打造完美保镖的旅途中，用纯净的水银构筑了第一名水银骑士。制作者无法——或许是不愿——在笨重的骑士与敏捷的斗士之间做出选择，便试图制造一名兼具两者的守卫，能随心所欲地改变形态，以更好地防御可能的入侵者。这项发明究竟是天才之举，还是汞中毒导致的愚行，通常取决于你站在骑士之剑的哪一端。

乍看之下，水银骑士如同一套标准的护甲，但其形态表面细微的涟漪暗示了它的真实本质。水银骑士几乎完全由水银构成，能以意志令自身凝固，成为威严而坚毅的防卫者。在液态形态下，骑士会失去部分防护，却获得速度与优雅，使其成为致命的战斗者；其液态身体还能穿过最细小的裂缝。这使其能够在战场上快速移动，无论是迎击入侵者，还是迅速撤离。

在战斗中，水银骑士常以固态形态直面入侵者，凭借坚固的护甲偏转打击并吸收伤害。待到时机成熟，它便会液化，使构装体获得纤巧的形态与强力的攻击，将入侵者逼退。任何面对这类造物的队伍都必须谨慎行事并运用聪明的战术，否则就有被完美保镖以机动性压制的风险。

善变的效忠

水银骑士可能会一时兴起改变其认定为盟友的对象。这些决定有时基于谁占上风，但有时又难以捉摸。因此，在战斗期间，它们往往会被部署在远离其主人的位置。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、运动、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星、敏捷、能量抗性（负能量、正能量）、毒素、力量、野性

Mercurial knights are adaptable constructs that can change between solid and liquid forms. According to legend, an ancient artificer, on a quest to create the perfect bodyguard, constructed the first mercurial knight out of pure quicksilver. Unable, or perhaps unwilling, to choose between a bulky knight and an agile fighter, the crafter attempted to make a guard capable of both, able to shift on a whim to better protect against possible intruders. Whether this invention was a stroke of genius or a sign of mercury-induced foolishness usually depends on which end of the knight's sword you find yourself on.

At first glance, a mercurial knight appears as a standard suit of armor, though slight ripples across its form hint at its true nature. Composed almost entirely of quicksilver, mercurial knights can will themselves to solidify, becoming imposing and stalwart defenders. In liquid form, a knight loses some protection but gains the speed and grace to make it a deadly combatant, and its liquid body is able to fit through the smallest crack. This allows for quick movement throughout the battlefield, either to confront intruders or to make a rapid escape.

In battle, a mercurial knight often confronts an intruder while in its solid form, using strong armor to deflect blows and soak up damage. When the time is right, it liquefies, providing the construct with a lithe form and powerful attacks to force the intruders back. Any party facing such a creation must approach with caution and employ smart tactics or risk being outmaneuvered by the perfect bodyguard.

Volatile Allegiance

Mercurial knights may change who they consider to be allies on a whim. These decisions are sometimes based on who is winning, but other times they are inscrutable. As a result, they often end up stationed far from their masters during a fight.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), poison, strength, wild

Wandering Plague.name: 流浪瘟疫 Wandering Plague

Motion Sense.name: 运动感官 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
徘徊瘟疫可以通过振动以及空气或水的移动来感知附近的生物。

A wandering plague can sense nearby creatures through vibration and air or water movement.

Plaguehive.name: 疫巢 Plaguehive
Plaguehive.description:
游荡疫灾能以超自然的方式察觉到1英里内其他同类的存在。此外，若至少两只游荡疫灾彼此相距在100尺以内，它们在先攻检定与察觉检定上获得+2环境加值。

A wandering plague is preternaturally aware of others of its kind within 1 mile. Additionally, if at least two wandering plagues are within 100 feet of each other, they gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative checks and Perception checks.

Plaguesense.name: 疫病感知 Plaguesense
Plaguesense.description:
游荡瘟疫可以感知任何感染食肉瘟疫的生物，并且它知晓射程内任何感染该疾病的生物所处的当前阶段。

A wandering plague senses any creature infected with carnivorous plague, and it knows the current stage of any creature within range infected by that disease.

Virulent Nature.name: 剧毒本性 Virulent Nature
Virulent Nature.description:
被@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.RneiyehRO6f7LP44]{Remove Disease}以为目标的游荡瘟疫每法术等级受到2d10伤害，并进行一次对抗施法者法术DC的基础强韧豁免。失败时，游荡瘟疫为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。大成功或大失败时，游荡瘟疫改为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 4}。

A wandering plague targeted by @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.RneiyehRO6f7LP44]{Remove Disease} takes 2d10 damage per spell level, with a basic Fortitude save against the caster's spell DC. On a failure, the wandering plague is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}. On a critical failure, the wandering plague is instead @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 4}.

Carnivorous Plague.name: 食肉瘟疫 Carnivorous Plague
Carnivorous Plague.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28]

阶段 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 1} (1 day)

阶段 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 2} (1 day)

阶段 3 恶心 2 并且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1} (1 day)

阶段 4 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 4} 并且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drain 3} (1 day)

阶段 5 同阶段 4 (1 day);

阶段 6 死亡，并且一场独立游荡的瘟疫从尸体中爆发。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28]

Stage 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2} (1 day)

Stage 3 sickened 2 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 day)

Stage 4 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 4} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 3} (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day);

Stage 6 dead, and an independent wandering plague bursts from the corpse.

Cannibalize Plague.name: 瘟疫侵蚀 Cannibalize Plague
Cannibalize Plague.description:
需求 漫游瘟疫与一名受阶段2或更高阶段食肉瘟疫折磨的生物相邻，且漫游瘟疫为大型或更小

效果 漫游瘟疫回收自身的碎片，对受瘟疫折磨的生物进行一次伪足打击。若该打击命中，该生物的食肉瘟疫的阶段降低1，并且漫游瘟疫在1分钟内变为大型，其触及增加5尺，并恢复[[/r (4d8+10)[healing]]]{4d8 + 10 Hit Points}。若漫游瘟疫因先前使用此能力而已为大型，则它改为在1分钟内变为巨型。在此情况下，它的触及改为增加10尺而非5尺，并恢复[[/r (6d8+15)[healing]]]{6d8 + 15 Hit Points}而非4d8+10 Hit Points。

Requirements The wandering plague is adjacent to a creature afflicted by stage 2 or higher carnivorous plague, and the wandering plague is Large or smaller

Effect Reclaiming pieces of itself, the wandering plague makes a pseudopod Strike against the plagued creature. If the Strike hits, the creature's carnivorous plague's stage is reduced by one, and the wandering plague becomes Large for 1 minute, increasing its reach by 5 feet, and regaining [[/r (4d8+10)[healing]]]{4d8 + 10 Hit Points}. If the wandering plague is already Large due to a previous use of this ability, it instead becomes Huge for 1 minute. In that case, it increases its reach by 10 feet instead of 5, and regains [[/r (6d8+15)[healing]]]{6d8 + 15 Hit Points} instead of 4d8+10 Hit Points.

Pestilent Assault.name: 疫病突袭 Pestilent Assault
Pestilent Assault.description:
游荡瘟疫猛烈地抽打其目标，通过留下自身松散的肉块来加速其传染性繁殖的进程。游荡瘟疫移动一次，然后对其触及内的一名生物进行一次伪足打击。命中时，若该生物已受食肉瘟疫折磨，则必须针对该疾病进行一次强韧豁免，如同已过去足够的时间使其进展到下一阶段。

Violently thrashing at its target, the wandering plague hastens the progress of its infectious reproduction by leaving behind loose lumps of its own flesh. The wandering plague Strides once, then makes a pseudopod Strike against a creature within its reach. On a hit, if the creature is already afflicted by carnivorous plague, it must attempt a Fortitude save against the disease as if enough time had passed for it to progress to its next stage.

Engulf.name: 吞没 Engulf
Engulf.description:
@Check[type:reflex|dc:28]，[[/r (2d8+6)[void]]] 伤害，逃脱DC 28，破裂20

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

@Check[type:reflex|dc:28], [[/r (2d8+6)[void]]] damage, Escape DC 28, Rupture 20

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

Wandering Plague.publicNotes:
令人作呕的秘法实验的产物，游荡瘟疫是一种掠食性的灾厄，通过以其溃烂的接触感染活的有机体来复制自身。一旦某个活的生物成为这些生物携带的食肉性疾病的宿主，它的生命力便会衰败，因为初生的游荡瘟疫会从内部缓慢地将其消化。待其完全成熟后，该实体会从先前的宿主体内爆裂而出，杀死宿主，并向深处钻掘，寻找同类。

这团由血污脂肪与筋腱交织而成的团块若不加以遏制，足以蹂躏整个国家。尽管大多数学者认为这种活的疫病的扩散确实可能构成严重威胁，但某些诡秘典籍则暗示着更为阴森的关联，提及栖居于现实边缘的远古存在——其饥饿仅能与其冷酷且无情的不懈残忍相匹敌。

缓解期

当游荡瘟疫感知到附近有同类被杀死时，它可能会进入冬眠状态，要么潜入地下，要么藏身于深邃洞窟之中。在此期间，它会缩小至小型（体型），并将新陈代谢减缓到多数法术都无法将其作为活的生物侦测出来的程度。它几乎可以无限期地维持这种状态，但若与潜在宿主发生接触，便会迅速恢复到完全警觉的状态，准备再次开始传播。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根，体质，能量抗性（正能量），坚固化，负能量，力量，狂野

The result of abhorrent occult experiments, the wandering plague is a predatory scourge that replicates itself by infecting living organisms with its festering touch. Once a living creature becomes host to the carnivorous disease borne by these creatures, its vitality degrades as it is slowly digested from within by the nascent wandering plague. Upon becoming fully grown, the entity bursts out of its former host, killing it, and burrows deep, seeking others of its kind.

This interwoven mass of bloodstained fat and sinew is capable of ravaging entire nations if left unchecked. While most scholars believe the spread of this living sickness could indeed pose a grave threat, certain eldritch tomes suggest even grimmer connections, alluding to ancient beings dwelling at the edge of reality whose hunger is only rivaled by their callous, unrelenting cruelty.

In Remission

When a wandering plague senses others of its kind being killed nearby, it may go into hibernation either underground or within a deep cave. During this time, it shrinks to a small size and slows down its metabolism to the point that most spells can't detect its presence as a living creature. It can stay in this state nearly indefinitely, but will quickly spring back to full alertness if it comes into contact with a potential host, ready to begin its spread again.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), fortification, negative, strength, wild

Contortion Crown.name: 扭曲王冠 Contortion Crown

Improvised Block.name: 即兴格挡 Improvised Block
Improvised Block.description:
触发 扭曲王冠在寄居于一个物体时将要受到伤害

效果 王冠用其临时拼凑的甲壳抵御打击。该物体的硬度最多可防止15点伤害。王冠与该物体共同承受任何剩余伤害，可能会破坏或摧毁该物体并将王冠逐出。该物体有60点生命值，且破坏阈值为30。

Trigger The contortion crown would take damage while Inhabiting an object

Effect The crown wards off the blow with its improvised carapace. The object's Hardness prevents up to 15 damage. The crown and the object both take any remaining damage, possibly breaking or destroying the object and expelling the crown. The object has 60 Hit Points and a Break Threshold of 30.

Inhabit.name: 栖居 Inhabit
Inhabit.description:
需求 扭曲王冠当前未寄居于任何物体

效果 扭曲王冠寄居于一个超巨型物体，例如小型建筑、载具或类似居所，而该居所的硬度变为15，具有60生命值与30破坏阈值。该物体变为一个异次元空间，其内部足以容纳潜行者进入，无论该物体的外部体积如何。寄居于物体期间，扭曲王冠获得AC+2环境加值，并失去其对挥砍伤害的弱点。王冠会一直寄居于该物体，直到该物体被破坏或王冠寄居于新的物体。当未寄居于物体时，王冠无法使用其废物甲壳打击。

Requirements The contortion crown doesn't currently Inhabit an object

Effect contortion crown inhabits a Gargantuan object such as a small building, vehicle, or similar dwelling, and the dwelling’s Hardness becomes 15, with 60 Hit Points and a Break Threshold of 30. The object becomes an extradimensional space with an interior large enough for the creeper to fit inside, regardless of the object's exterior volume. While Inhabiting an object, the contortion crown gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and loses its weakness to slashing damage. The crown remains Inhabiting the object until the object breaks or the crown Inhabits a new object. When not Inhabiting an object, the crown can't use its junk carapace Strike.

Retract.name: 收回 Retract
Retract.description:
需求 扭曲王冠寄居于一件物体中

效果 王冠完全缩回他们临时形成的甲壳中。他们对AC的环境加值提高至+4，且他们除了使用强化格挡、强制统御，或再次使用此动作以从甲壳中出来之外，无法采取动作。

Requirements The contortion crown Inhabits an object

Effect The crown fully withdraws into their improvised carapace. Their circumstance bonus to AC increases to +4, and they can't take actions except to use Improved Block, Enforce Dominion, or this action again to come out of their carapace.

Enforce Dominion.name: 强制支配 Enforce Dominion
Enforce Dominion.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 一个适合作为居所的超大型或巨型物体或建筑在扭曲王冠的触及范围内，且该物体或居所内有生物

效果 扭曲王冠试图将所有生物（除其自身外，如适用）从该物体或居所中强行驱逐出去。占据其中的生物必须对抗扭曲王冠的运动 DC 进行一次强韧豁免。豁免失败时，生物被推出该物体并移动到一个相邻的方格。大成功或大失败时，生物被推出该物体 15 尺远，然后该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

Frequency once per round

Requirements A Huge or Gargantuan object or building suitable for a dwelling is within the contortion crown's reach, and there are creatures inside of that object or dwelling

Effect The contortion crown attempts to force out all creatures (except itself, if applicable) from the object or dwelling. The occupying creatures must succeed on a Fortitude save against the contortion crown's Athletics DC. On a failed save, a creature is pushed out of the object and to an adjacent square. On a critical failure, a creature is pushed 15 feet away from the object and then the creature falls @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Forceful Seizure.name: 强力夺取 Forceful Seizure
Forceful Seizure.description:
以横扫般的动作，扭曲王冠进行交互动作以拾取一个小型、中型或大型物体，并使用其肢体打击对其10尺内至多两个生物进行打击。其多重攻击减值在进行两次肢体打击之后才会增加，且其来自横扫特征的对攻击掷骰的+1环境加值适用于两次打击。

With a sweeping motion, the contortion crown Interacts to pick up a Small, Medium, or Large object and Strikes up to two creatures within 10 feet of it using its limb Strike. Its multiple attack penalty does not increase until after it makes both limb Strikes, and its +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls from the sweep trait applies to both Strikes.

Throw Junk.name: 投掷垃圾 Throw Junk
Throw Junk.description:
扭曲王冠拾取触及内的一件物体（通常是一块垃圾）并将其掷出，进行一次远程垃圾打击。

The contortion crown picks up an object within reach (typically a piece of junk) and throws it, making a ranged junk Strike.

Contortion Crown.publicNotes:
扭曲潜行者随着年代缓慢生长，并在其异次元空间内积累一批偷窃来的物品。收藏中的魔法物品会加速这一过程，因为它们的力量渗入生物的身体。极少数能积累起如此宝库的个体会变成巨大而危险的生物，能够迅速征服一个村庄或小镇。一旦潜行者大到足以栖身于一栋小建筑，贪得无厌的欲望便驱使它夺取其不断增长的触及范围内任何与所有物体。马车、牲畜、纪念碑、集市，甚至小型船只，都会成为其宝藏的新添品。如此强大的潜行者会从一个住处迁移到另一个住处，驱逐那些无力阻止它的居民。无法与这头怪物抗衡的人们必须撤离家园，最终抛弃他们的村庄，而潜行者则将其据为己有。这样的悲剧为这种潜行者赢得了“扭曲王冠”的称号。

扭曲体是一类畸变生物家族，共享一种独特行为：它们像寄居蟹一样，会寻找并栖居于被丢弃的物体中，将其作为居所，以保护其脆弱的身体免受伤害。然而，与寄居蟹不同，扭曲体往往栖居在类人生物聚居地里发现的垃圾，而非海滩上的贝壳。和寄居蟹一样，扭曲体会持续生长，并不断更换为越来越大的居所。最小的可能住在一只鞋里，而最大的则大到足以栖身于小型建筑。

扭曲群落

当一只成熟的扭曲潜行者或扭曲王冠遇到足够大量的垃圾时，这座新宝藏库带来的狂喜会令其手臂根部周围的息肉膨胀。最终，这些息肉会爆裂，释放出一小群婴幼扭曲体。群落成员栖居于较小的垃圾碎片中，直到它们长到足以形成扭曲虫群。

王冠协作

多至三只扭曲王冠可以共同统治一座废弃村庄或小镇，而那里会被它们的子嗣占据——由扭曲虫群与更小的潜行者组成。每一只新的扭曲潜行者都诞生在一件属于其亲代收藏的物体之中。扭曲王冠的贪婪最终会将其幼体从家中驱逐出去，去别处寻求宝藏。由多只扭曲王冠占据的城镇，往往会堕落为这些庞大暴君之间的政治战场。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 250/560/1,030 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（Athletics, Society, Stealth, Thievery）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane, 体质, elongating, energy resistant (positive), 智力, 力量, wild

A contortion creeper grows slowly as it ages and amasses a collection of pilfered items within its extradimensional space. Magical items within the collection accelerate the process as their power permeates into the creature's body. The rare few that accumulate such a hoard become a massive and dangerous creature that can rapidly conquer a village or small town. Once a creeper becomes large enough to inhabit a small building, insatiable greed drives it to seize any and all objects within its ever-growing reach. Wagons, livestock, monuments, marketplaces, and even small ships become new additions to its hoard. Such a powerful creeper transitions from dwelling to dwelling, driving out inhabitants powerless to stop it. Folk unable to combat the monstrosity must evacuate their homes and eventually abandon their village, which the creeper claims as its dominion. Such tragedies earn this type of creeper the title contortion crown.

Contortions are a family of aberrations that share a distinctive behavior: like hermit crabs, they find and inhabit discarded objects, which they use as dwellings to protect their vulnerable bodies from harm. However, unlike hermit crabs, contortions tend to inhabit junk found in humanoid settlements rather than shells on the beach. Like hermit crabs, contortions continue to grow and trade up to larger and larger dwellings. While the smallest might live in a shoe, the largest are big enough to inhabit small buildings.

Contortion Colonies

When a mature contortion creeper or contortion crown comes across a large enough quantity of junk, the glee from this new treasure trove causes polyps to swell up around the base of their arms. Eventually, these polyps explode, releasing a small colony of infant contortions. The members of the colony inhabit the smaller pieces of junk until they grow enough to form a contortion swarm.

Crown Collaborations

Up to three contortion crowns can collectively dominate an abandoned village or small town, which becomes overrun with their spawn, consisting of contortion swarms and smaller creepers. Each new contortion creeper is born inside an object belonging to its parents' collection. The greed of a contortion crown eventually drives its young out of the home to seek treasures elsewhere. Towns inhabited by multiple contortion crowns often devolve into political battlegrounds between the enormous tyrants.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 250/560/1,030 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Society, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, strength, wild

Wackadodo.name: 疯疯癫癫 Wackadodo

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Mental.name: 对所有对抗精神效果的豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Mental

Duo Bird Brains.name: 双鸟笨脑袋 Duo Bird Brains
Duo Bird Brains.description:
疯头怪的每个头分别掷自己的先攻，并且各自拥有自己的回合。疯头怪的两个头都不能延后。在疯头怪其中一个头的回合开始时，该头获得2个动作和1个反应动作（）。任一头或两者都可以在任意给定的回合中移动疯头怪的腿。任何会斩下疯头怪头颅的能力（例如斩首武器词条）只要疯头怪仍保有另一个头完好，就不会导致疯头怪死亡，但会使疯头怪失去通常由被斩下的头所提供的回合、动作与反应动作（）。只能以单一生物为目标的心灵效果只影响疯头怪的其中一个头，而非两个。

Each of a wackadodo's heads rolls their own initiative and has their own turn. Neither of the wackadodo's heads can Delay. At the start of one of the wackadodo's heads' turns, that head gets 2 actions and 1 reaction. Either of the heads, or both, can move the wackadodo's legs on any given turn. Any ability that would sever a wackadodo's head (such as the vorpal weapon property) doesn't cause the wackadodo to die as long as the wackadodo still has their other head intact, but it does cause the wackadodo to lose the turns, actions, and reactions that would ordinarily come from the severed head. Mental effects that can only target a single creature affect only one of the wackadodo's heads, but not both.

Awkward Dance.name: 尴尬之舞 Awkward Dance
Awkward Dance.description:
怪模怪样鸟一边点头，一边抖动它的尾巴羽毛，并以疾走移动至多其速度的一半。每个在其移动结束时位于怪模怪样鸟30尺内的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 豁免。

Critical Success 该生物不受影响，并在24小时内暂时免疫“尴尬之舞”。

Success 该生物在1轮内陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}，并在24小时内暂时免疫“尴尬之舞”。

Failure 该生物被怪模怪样鸟的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} 所影响，并在其处于着迷期间陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}。对该着迷生物的盟友采取的敌对动作不会结束此着迷，但对该着迷生物自身采取的敌对动作会结束该生物的着迷。

Critical Failure 该生物在 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} 内陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused}。一旦困惑结束，该生物承受失败效果。

The wackadodo bobs its head while shaking its tail feathers and Strides up to half its speed. Each creature within 30 feet of the wackadodo at the end of their movement must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Awkward Dance for 24 hours.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round and is temporarily immune to Awkward Dance for 24 hours.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} by the wackadodo, and it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} as long as it's fascinated. Hostile actions against the fascinated creature's allies don't end this fascination, though hostile actions against the fascinated creature itself ends the fascination for that creature.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. Once the confusion ends, the creature suffers the failure effects.

Opportune Chomp.name: 伺机啃咬 Opportune Chomp
Opportune Chomp.description:
触发 在歪头鸟的某个头的先攻上，歪头鸟在其回合结束时紧挨着一名 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} 的敌人

效果 另一个头对触发的敌人进行一次喙 打击。

Trigger On one of the wackadodo heads' initiative, the wackadodo ends its turn next to a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} enemy

Effect The other head makes a beak Strike against the triggering enemy.

Gyrating Fever.name: 旋舞热病 Gyrating Fever
Gyrating Fever.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

阶段 1 你无法对怪里怪气的笨拙之舞获得暂时免疫（1天）

阶段 2 同阶段1，并且你必须在你每个回合的第一个动作上使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Perform]{Perform} 来跳舞（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段1，并且你必须在你每个回合的前两个动作上使用 Perform 来跳舞（1天）

阶段 4 死亡

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Stage 1 You can't become temporarily immune to the wackadodo's Awkward Dance (1 day)

Stage 2 As Stage 1, and you must spend the first action on each of your turns to use @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Perform]{Perform} to dance (1 day)

Stage 3 As Stage 1, and you must spend the first two actions on each of your turns to use Perform to dance (1 day)

Stage 4 dead

Wackadodo.publicNotes:
瓦卡多多是一种双头鸟类，通过令人迷惑的移动和它们传播的一种怪异疾病来战斗；这种疾病会让受害者产生日益强烈的跳舞冲动。它们身高约5到6英尺，脖颈细长，翅膀短小，长腿末端长着巨大的利爪。与典型鸟类不同的是，这种鸟的喙里长着锋利的牙齿。该物种会张开一把巨大的羽扇作为尾巴，由多种颜色的羽毛组成，用来进行异常的舞蹈。这些舞蹈是瓦卡多多之间的交流手段，但也同时用来吸引猎物。有时，在罕见的占星事件期间，许多瓦卡多多会一同起舞，但这种古怪仪式的含义仍不为人知。

赶潮的舞者

对瓦卡多多来说，跳舞能让它们从盲目的攻击性中分心。专家建议跟上新的潮流，因为瓦卡多多喜欢研究并模仿它们以前没见过的舞蹈。当目睹熟悉的舞蹈时，它们往往会将其解读为一种讯息，通常会导致它们要么对舞者变得友善，要么暴怒并攻击舞者。另一方面，当目睹一种新舞蹈时，舞者也必须小心；如果在瓦卡多多尚未吸收其中的细微之处前就结束新舞蹈，可能会导致这只鸟去咬舞者，以鼓励舞蹈继续。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、技能物品（运动、欺瞒、威吓、表演、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根、魅力、敏捷、延伸、能量抗性（正能量）、尖刺、力量、野性

Wackadodos are two-headed birds that fight via discombobulating movements and a strange disease they spread that gives their victims a growing urge to dance. They stand between 5 and 6 feet tall with elongated necks, stubby wings, and long legs that end in large talons. Uncharacteristically for avians, the bird has sharp teeth in its beaks. The species brandishes a large fan of feathers for a tail, consisting of many colors, which they use to engage in abnormal dances. These dances are a means of communication between wackadodos, but they also double as a way to attract prey. Sometimes, during a rare astrological event, many wackadodos engage in dancing together, but the meaning of this odd ritual is unknown.

Trendy Dancer

Dancing for wackadodos can distract them from blind aggression. Experts recommend keeping up with new trends as wackadodos enjoy studying and imitating dances they haven't seen before. When witnessing familiar dances, they often interpret them as a message that usually causes them to either become friendly with the dancer or fly into a rage and attack the dancer. On the other hand, when witnessing a new dance, the dancer must be careful as well, as ending a new dance before the wackadodo has absorbed its nuances may cause the bird to bite the dancer to encourage the dance to continue.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), skill items (Athletics, Deception, Intimidation, Performance, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), spiked, strength, wild

Wannabe Knight.name: 见习骑士 Wannabe Knight

Sturdy Shield (Lesser).name: 坚固盾牌（次等） Sturdy Shield (Lesser)
Sturdy Shield (Lesser).description:
凭借卓越的设计与精良的工艺，这面钢盾比其非魔法同类拥有更高的硬度，使其更难被打破与摧毁。

此盾牌的硬度为10，HP为80，BT为40。

With a superior design and excellent craftsmanship, this steel shield has higher Hardness than its non-magical counterparts, making it harder to break and destroy.

The shield has Hardness 10, HP 80, and BT 40.

Motion Sense.name: 运动感官 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
一名未来的骑士可以通过振动以及空气或水的移动来感知附近的生物。

A wannabe knight can sense nearby creatures through vibration and air or water movement.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Bastard Sword Pseudopod.name: 私生剑拟足 Bastard Sword Pseudopod

Issue Challenge.name: 发出挑战 Issue Challenge
Issue Challenge.description:
这个伪骑士指向一名敌人，通常是它所能看见的外表最强壮的生物，发起一场单挑挑战。该生物可以选择是否接受。如果该生物拒绝挑战，伪骑士默认获胜。如果该生物接受，它和骑士都获得50点临时生命值，这些临时生命值只会保护他们免受彼此对对方造成的伤害。在挑战的持续时间内，他们只能攻击彼此，并且如果任何盟友协助被挑战的对手，则被挑战的对手弃权并失败。当任一战斗者将对方因“发起挑战”获得的临时生命值降低至0时，其为胜者，并在1分钟内获得对攻击掷骰、豁免和技能检定的+2状态加值。此外，如果伪骑士获胜，其对手变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}。之后，被挑战的生物在1个月内暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.Ny7avkVmbodeOwUp]{效果：发起挑战（参与者）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.JSWho9M2QqePR4f5]{效果：发起挑战（胜者）}

The wannabe knight points at a foe, usually the strongest looking creature it can see, issuing a challenge to single combat. That creature can choose whether to accept. If the creature denies the challenge, the wannabe knight wins by default. If the creature accepts, both it and the knight gain 50 temporary Hit Points, which only protect them from damage they each deal to the other. They can only attack each other for the duration of the challenge and if any ally assists the challenged opponent, the challenged opponent forfeits and loses. When either combatant reduces the other's temporary Hit Points from Issue Challenge to 0, they are the victor and gain a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks for 1 minute. Additionally if the wannabe knight wins, its opponent becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. Afterward, the challenged creature is temporarily immune for 1 month.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.Ny7avkVmbodeOwUp]{Effect: Issue Challenge (Participants)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.JSWho9M2QqePR4f5]{Effect: Issue Challenge (Victor)}

Mount Up.name: 上马 Mount Up
Mount Up.description:
这名自称骑士创造出一团赘生物，从其下方延伸并穿出其护甲形成一匹坐骑，通常看起来像一匹无面孔的黑马，外形略显怪异。当“骑乘”时，自称骑士的体型增至大型，它的速度获得+20尺环境加值，且它的AC承受–2减值。

The wannabe knight creates a growth that extends below it and out of its armor to form a mount, which typically resembles a featureless black horse whose shape is slightly off. While "mounted," the wannabe knight's size increases to Large, it gains a +20-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed, and it takes a –2 penalty to its AC.

Pseudopod Weapons.name: 伪足武器 Pseudopod Weapons
Pseudopod Weapons.description:
冒牌骑士形成一条伪足，看起来像是它手中握着的一把长枪或一把手半剑。这条武器化的伪足会一直存在，直到它再次使用该动作来改变其类型或将其移除。冒牌骑士的伪足一次仅限一条；并且在持用其盾牌时，它只能腾出一只“手”来使用伪足武器；这意味着它用手半剑伪足造成d8伤害，并且只能在通过带有比武特征的Mount Up骑乘时使用长枪伪足。若没有盾牌，它可以用手半剑伪足造成d12伤害，并以双手使用长枪伪足以造成其完整伤害。

The wannabe knight forms a pseudopod that appears to be a lance or bastard sword held in its hand. The weaponized pseudopod remains until it uses this action again to change its type or remove it. The wannabe knight's pseudopods are limited to one at a time, and while wielding its shield, it can spare only one "hand" for the pseudopod weapons; this means it deals d8 damage from the bastard sword pseudopod and can only use the lance pseudopod when mounted via Mount Up with the jousting trait. Without the shield, it can deal d12 damage with the bastard sword pseudopod and use the lance pseudopod in both hands for its full damage.

Whirlwind Charge.name: 旋风冲锋 Whirlwind Charge
Whirlwind Charge.description:
这名自封的骑士沿直线疾走最多两倍于其速度，并能在整个移动过程中对其触及内的每名敌人进行一次打击。这些攻击会增加其多重攻击减值，但只在旋风冲锋完成后才生效。

The wannabe knight Strides up to twice its Speed in a straight line and can make a Strike against each foe within its reach throughout the movement. These attacks increase its multiple attack penalty, but only after the Whirlwind Charge is complete.

Wannabe Knight.publicNotes:
冒牌骑士看起来像身着闪亮护甲、长枪在侧的威严骑士。然而细看之下，会发现有闪烁的黑色黏液从其护甲缝隙中渗出并蔓延。更令人震惊的是骑士的“坐骑”——它完全由与其身体相同的黑色黏液构成。

冒牌骑士是骑士与骑士精神故事的狂热爱好者，因此它们会试图遵守那些传奇中的骑士据说遵循的准则。它们像童话书里沉默的骑士一样行事，重视公平的战斗，并接受战斗挑战以证明自己的技能。冒牌骑士对荣耀的渴求太过常见，常常导致它攻击所遭遇到的真正英雄。另一些时候，冒牌骑士可能会向某个说服它去效忠的实体宣誓效命，并为其服务、守护一片区域。

我的王国换一匹马

对冒牌骑士来说，有些装备比其他装备更重要。骑士欢迎新的护甲，但认为自己的伪足已足够充当武器。它们最渴望的是一匹真正的马，这能解放它们的形态，使其能塑造更长的武器并延伸其触及。马匹会成为骑士最好的朋友，得到悉心照料。然而失去坐骑是毁灭性的；许多老练的冒牌骑士再也不会去寻找替代品，因为失去最初坐骑的痛苦实在太过深重，不愿再次体验。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 375/840/1,560 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、察觉物品、技能物品（运动、学识[传奇]、社交）

可用灌注属性 破邪、体质、延伸、能量抗性（正能量）、加固、尖刺、力量、狂野

Wannabe knights appear as regal knights clad in shining armor with a lance at their side. However, upon closer inspection, it has glistening black ooze creeping out of its armor. More jarring yet is the knight's "steed," which is composed of nothing more than the same black ooze that makes up its body.

Wannabe knights are huge fans of tales of knights and chivalry, so they try to stick to the code that the knights of legend supposedly follow. Acting like a silent knight out of a storybook, wannabe knights value a fair fight and accept the challenge of battle to prove their skill. Far too often, a wannabe's need for glory leads it to attack the actual heroes it encounters. Other times, a wannabe knight might pledge its sword to an entity that convinces it to serve and protect an area.

My Kingdom For A Horse

Some equipment goes further for wannabe knights than others. Knights welcome new armor but find their own pseudopods to be sufficient weaponry. Their greatest desire is a real horse, which frees their form to create longer weapons and extend their reach. The horse becomes the knight's best friend, receiving doting care. Losing the steed is devastating, though, and many veteran wannabe knights never seek out a replacement as the pain of losing their original mount is simply too great to experience again.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 375/840/1,560 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Lore [Legend], Society)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), fortification, spiked, strength, wild

War Tortoise.name: 战龟 War Tortoise

Fire Cannons.name: 火炮 Fire Cannons
Fire Cannons.description:
战龟背甲上层甲板上的矮人攻城组员准备、瞄准并发射战龟的火炮，对以战龟为中心200尺内的一点为中心的@Template[type:burst|distance:10]{10尺半径爆发}内的所有生物造成@Damage[6d10[bludgeoning]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true]豁免。

发射火炮后，战龟在接下来的2轮内无法再次发射火炮，因为矮人攻城组员需要2轮工作来装填火炮。若在矮人攻城组员装填火炮期间，战龟在其整个回合都无法行动，则该回合攻城组员无法装填火炮，因此在战龟能够再次发射火炮之前需要额外1轮。

The dwarven siege crew on the upper deck of the war tortoise's shell ready, aim, and fire the war tortoise's cannons, dealing @Damage[6d10[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10]{10-foot radius burst}, which is centered within 200 feet of the war tortoise, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] save.

After Firing its Cannons, the war tortoise can't Fire its Cannons again for 2 rounds, as it takes the dwarven siege crew 2 rounds of work to reload the cannons. If the war tortoise can't act for its entire turn while the dwarven siege crew are reloading the cannons, the team are unable to reload the cannons on that turn, and so it takes 1 additional round before the war tortoise can Fire its Cannons again.

Shell Defense.name: 甲壳防御 Shell Defense
Shell Defense.description:
战龟将四肢与头部安全地缩回壳内，也将其攻城乘员一并带入壳中以保护他们。随后战龟结束其回合。缩回壳内使战龟的AC获得+3环境加值，但战龟在壳内时无法行动，除非再次现身；它可以通过花费一个单动作来做到这一点。

The war tortoise retracts its limbs and head safely into its shell, bringing its siege crew inside the shell along with it in order to protect them as well. The war tortoise then ends its turn. Retracting into its shell gives the war tortoise a +3 circumstance bonus to AC, but the war tortoise can't act while inside its shell except to reemerge, which it can do by spending a single action.

Siege Crew.name: 攻城组员 Siege Crew
Siege Crew.description:
战争陆龟的龟壳顶部有一处可收回的平台甲板，上面有一支矮人攻城小队，使战争陆龟能够发射其攻城武器，但这些武器并没有陆龟本体那么坚固。一旦陆龟的生命值降至60或更低，小队便会死亡，使陆龟无法使用开火火炮。

A dwarven siege crew on a retractable deck atop the war tortoise's shell allows the war tortoise to fire off its siege weapons, but they aren't as sturdy as the tortoise itself. Once the tortoise is reduced to 60 Hit Points or lower, the crew perish, preventing the tortoise from using Fire Cannons.

War Tortoise.publicNotes:
动员攻城装备的问题长期困扰着军队。推车笨重，难以在崎岖的地形上移动，而马匹又很容易受惊。通过精心的培育，居住在沙漠的矮人创造出了一种创新的新方案来解决这些问题：一种巨大的、受过训练的攻城巨龟，被称为战龟。

战龟拥有坚固的装甲龟壳、稳定的步伐、可靠的立足点，并且倾向于用头去冲撞东西，是完美的攻城运输工具。它们的龟壳上加装了大型甲板，可配备一系列攻城武器。

矮人攻城小组至少要训练十年，才能彼此之间以及与他们的战龟完美协同。这种配合使他们能够像一个单一团队那样协作，类似于一个部队。

时髦舞者

矮人在最终选定龟之前，曾试验过数种动物。其中一个竞争者是巨人沙漠野兔，其迅捷使其进入候选。该项目失败了，因为当火炮开火时，它们往往会被吓得当场猝死。巨人蝎很有效，但攻城小组对头顶悬着一根巨大的毒刺感到不安。巨鹏太难驯服，而大象又太容易被敌人的回击火力命中。关于将小组容纳在其体内的巨型魔像的传闻一直存在，但军事专家坚称那只是异想天开的故事。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 64/140/250 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺），护甲（中型、重型），技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、chaotic、魅力、体质、敏捷、elongating、energy resistant（positive）、力量、wild

The problem of mobilizing siege equipment has long plagued armies. Carts are unwieldy and difficult to move over rough terrain, and horses are easily spooked. With careful breeding, desert-dwelling dwarves created an innovative new solution to those problems: an enormous, trained siege turtle known as a war tortoise.

With a tough armored shell, a steady pace, stable footing, and a propensity for ramming things with their heads, war tortoises are perfect siege transports. Their shells are augmented with large decks, which can be outfitted with an array of siege weapons.

Dwarven siege crews train for at least a decade in order to work in perfect tandem with each other and with their war tortoise. This coordination allows them to work together as a single team, similarly to a troop.

Trendy Dancer

Dwarves experimented with several animals before settling on the tortoise. One contender was the giant desert hare, whose swiftness brought it into contention. That project failed because they had a tendency to drop dead from fright when cannons were fired. Giant scorpions were effective, but siege crews were uneasy about having a massive stinger hanging over their heads. Rocs were too difficult to tame, and elephants were too easy for enemies to hit with return fire. Rumors persist about gargantuan golems that hold crews within their bodies, but military experts insist they are only fanciful tales.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (medium, heavy), skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Many Faces.name: 千面万相 Many Faces

Telepathic Aura.name: 心灵感应灵光 Telepathic Aura
Telepathic Aura.description:
20尺。万面者会不断从其心灵感应灵光射程内的周遭生物那里攫取潜意识思绪，使其能够使用其“魔宠面容”能力，但也让其心智更易遭受灵能袭击。当万面者在其心灵感应灵光处于激活状态时受到精神伤害，万面者必须成功通过一次@Check[type:will|dc:40]意志豁免，否则陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}（若大失败则为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}）。若某个法术或效果使万面者的心灵感应灵光被压制，则在该法术或效果的持续时间内，万面者也不再具有对精神伤害的弱点。万面者可以以单动作压制该灵光持续1轮，该动作具有专注与操作（特征）特性，但该灵光会在其下个回合开始时自动恢复。

20 feet. The many faces constantly plucks subconscious thoughts from those around it within the range of its telepathic aura, allowing it to use its Familiar Face ability, but also leaving its mind more open to psychic assault. When the many faces takes mental damage while its telepathic aura is active, the many faces must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:40] save or be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1} (or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2} on a critical failure). If a spell or effect causes the many faces's telepathic aura to be suppressed, the many faces also no longer possesses the weakness to mental damage for the duration of the spell or effect. The Many Faces can suppress this aura for a round as a single action, which has the concentrate and manipulate traits, but the aura returns automatically at the start of its next turn.

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Tongues (Constant).name: 通晓语言（持续） Tongues (Constant)
Tongues (Constant).description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论语言如何，也能说出其他生物的语言。当处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标开口说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言交谈，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（7环） 持续时间为 8 小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Change Shape.name: 改变形态 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
千面者可以变形为任何大型或更小的类人生物形态，甚至是特定的生物。这不会改变它的能力或数据，但可能会将其打击伤害的类型改变为与新形态相匹配。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

A many faces can transform into any Large or smaller humanoid form, even a specific creature. This doesn't change its abilities or statistics, but it might change the type of its Strike damage to match the new form.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Familiar Face.name: 熟悉的面孔 Familiar Face
Familiar Face.description:
千面者从其心灵感应灵光范围内一个目标的潜意识中抽取一张脸，并改变自身形态以匹配这张脸。目标必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:40] 豁免。千面者可以再次使用该能力来选择一个新目标以解除这张脸，或以具有专注（特征）的单动作恢复其真实形态。若千面者在某个豁免失败的目标仍因“魔宠之面”而承受惊惧（状态）期间变为一张新脸，则该惊惧（状态）会提前结束。

大成功或大失败：成功 千面者意外选到了一张目标厌恶的脸。直到千面者解除或更换面孔前，目标对千面者的攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{惊惧 2}。

大成功或大失败：失败 目标陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{惊惧 3}，并在其仍处于惊惧期间，对千面者处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{措手不及}。

The many faces plucks a face from the subconscious mind of one target within its telepathic aura and alters its form to match this face. The target must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:40] saving throw. The many faces can dismiss this face by using this ability again to choose a new target, or revert to its true form as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. If the many faces changes to a new face while a target who failed their save is still suffering from the frightened condition from Familiar Face, the frightened condition ends early.

Critical Success The many faces accidentally chooses a face the target hates. The target gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls against the many faces until it dismisses or changes faces.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} to the Many Faces as long as they are frightened.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
多面手的打击对措手不及的生物造成额外 2d6 精确伤害。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

The many faces's Strikes deal an additional 2d6 precision damage to off-guard creatures.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

Trickster's Feint.name: 骗徒佯攻 Trickster's Feint
Trickster's Feint.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 千面之相极其擅长欺瞒，并在战斗中将其发挥得淋漓尽致。千面之相进行一次欺瞒检定以 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Feint]{佯攻}，并将其与20英尺内所有敌人的察觉DC进行比较。

Frequency once per round

Effect The Many Faces is highly adept at deception, and uses it to great effect in combat. The Many Faces rolls a single Deception check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Feint]{Feint}, and compares it to the Perception DC of all enemies within 20 feet.

Many Faces.publicNotes:
诡计神祇的狡诈天性众所周知；事实上，这样的举止绝对是这位神祇本性中不可或缺的一部分。这份狡诈从诡计神祇的精华中提炼而来，有时会在物质位面凝聚成一种被称为“千面”的奇异变形者。

如同创造他们的那位神祇一般，这些异怪生物反复无常且狡黠。它们并非彻头彻尾地恶毒，却乐于扰乱凡人的日常生活，很少去考虑自己伤害他人所带来的后果。它们以欺骗为生，不为物质收益或残忍，只为欺骗这一行为本身。

诡计回响是强大诡计神祇的行动所遗留的碎片，随着诡计之举的余波在宇宙中漂流。诡计者是世界各处不同万神殿与文化中诸多神祇里常见的一种原型。传统上，诡计神祇会采取多种形态，运用它们的伪装与欺骗来令周遭之人迷惘、困惑并误入歧途。诡计神祇为何不断欺骗身边所有人，则因诡计者而异。有些诡计者是强迫性说谎者。另一些则有其追求的目的，或只是觉得成功恶作剧的念头令人兴奋或滑稽。还有一些诡计者在道德准则之间游移不定，尝试一段时间与英雄神祇结盟，却又不可避免地在无数次立场变动与忠诚调整中背叛他们的盟友，甚至背叛他们的同胞手足。

伪装是凡人乃至其他神祇都忍不住持续与诡计神祇打交道的重要原因之一，因为他们可能始终无法意识到自己究竟在与谁周旋，或直到为时已晚才发现那位提供建议的神秘人物其实是诡计者。然而，仅有欺骗还不够。诡计者往往在多种不同技能上真正多才多艺，拥有惊人的天赋与无与伦比的技艺。因此，在其突然而必然的背叛之前，诡计者会是卓越的盟友，能够代表盟友——无论是神祇还是其他——达成各种看似不可能的壮举。

当诡计神祇做出某次尤为引人注目的恶作剧、背叛或其他诡计行径时，它们可能会留下一个强力的回响，称为诡计回响。依据诡计者的行为与体态，会凝结或固化出不同种类的诡计回响。比如，诡计者的技能与狡黠天性能够催生“捣乱之手”；而诡计者的谎言，连同其欺瞒的口舌与面部特征，则会导致“千面”的诞生。当诡计者为误导周遭之人或毁坏他人名誉而在多种形态之间变换伪装时，会蜕落出“一千张皮”。与此同时，诡计神祇笑声中那种无思的恶意会孕育出“凝结笑声”。

千面，千谎

诡计神祇——例如阿拉卡尔世界的女神塞娃——以为欺骗他人并达成目标而采取多种形态而闻名。通过遮蔽其真实身份，诡计者甚至能说服那些本来足够精明、若知道话出自诡计者之口便会过度怀疑而不肯倾听的受害者。

诡计者的踪迹

与诡计者为敌、追逐神祇阴谋诡计之踪迹的冒险者，常会发现自己的道路被各式各样由诡计神祇亲自抛出的敌人所阻。其对手之中最主要的便是诡计回响——无论它们是诡计者的行动自然而无意地产生，还是诡计者为对抗那些可能当场抓住自己的人而刻意创造。

这可能引出一整个冒险或战役：首先，冒险者挑战正在布置诡计者计谋的“捣乱之手”。接着，在诡计者因计划将近完成而得意咯咯发笑之时，他们会遭遇“凝结笑声”。当冒险者开始拆解诡计者的谎言，他们将与“千面”面对面（或许是面对“多张脸”？）。在他们尚未强大到足以直接挑战诡计者之前，诡计者会派出“一千张皮”来结果他们。最终，冒险者直面诡计者，一劳永逸地解开这场宇宙笑话。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 3,000/7,000/13,000 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍），盾牌，技能物品（特技动作、欺瞒、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害，魅力，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），精神，坚固，野性

A trickster deity's duplicitous nature is well known; in fact, such a demeanor is absolutely integral to the god's nature. That duplicity, distilled from the trickster god's essence, sometimes coalesces on the Material Plane into a strange shapeshifter called many faces.

Like the god from which they were created, these aberrant creatures are capricious and clever. While not outright malicious, they delight in disrupting the everyday lives of mortal folk without much thought to the consequences for those they hurt. They live to deceive, not for material gain or cruelty, but simply for the act itself.

Trickster echoes are fragments left behind due to the actions of a powerful trickster deity, drifting throughout the universe in the wake of the trickster's mischief. Tricksters are a popular archetype among the many different deities across the world's various pantheons and cultures. Traditionally, trickster deities take many forms, using their disguises and deceptions to bewilder, confuse, and mislead all those around them. Why trickster deities continually deceive all those around them varies from trickster to trickster. Some tricksters are compulsive liars. Others have an agenda they seek to pursue or simply find the idea of successfully pulling off pranks exhilarating or hilarious. Still other tricksters flit between moral codes, attempting to join with heroic deities for a time, only to inevitably betray their allies, or even their siblings, in a series of countless shifting adjustments of allegiance.

Disguises are a big part of the reason mortals and other deities alike can't help but continue engaging with trickster deities, as they might never come to realize exactly with whom they are dealing or only discover that the mysterious figure offering advice was a trickster after it was too late. However, deception alone isn't sufficient. Tricksters tend to be legitimately multi-talented in a variety of different skills, with incredible talent and unparalleled techniques. Thus, before their sudden but inevitable betrayal, a trickster is a superlative ally, capable of achieving all sorts of impossible feats on behalf of their allies, deific or otherwise.

When trickster deities perform an especially notable prank, betrayal, or other act of mischief, they might leave behind a powerful echo, known as a trickster echo. Depending on the trickster's actions and physicality, various sorts of trickster echoes congeal or coagulate. For instance, a trickster's skills and clever nature can give rise to a meddling hands, while a trickster's lies, alongside its deceptive tongue and facial features, lead to the birth of a many faces. A thousand skins slough off when a trickster changes guises between various forms in order to mislead all around them or ruin another's reputation. Meanwhile, the mindless malice of a trickster deity's laughter births a congealed laughter.

Many Faces, Many Lies

Trickster deities, such as the goddess Sewa on the world of Alacar, are known for taking various forms in order to deceive others and achieve their goals. By obfuscating their true identity, tricksters are able to convince even savvy victims who would otherwise be too skeptical to listen to anything a trickster said if they knew it came from the tongue of a trickster.

Trickster's Trail

Adventurers who find themselves at odds with a trickster, chasing after the deity's trail of plots and schemes, often find their path obstructed by a variety of foes thrown in their way by the trickster deity themselves. Chief among these opponents are the trickster echoes, whether they arise naturally and inadvertently through the trickster's actions or the trickster intentionally creates them in order to oppose those who threaten to catch them in the act.

This could lead to an entire adventure or campaign: First, the adventurers challenge the meddling hands setting up the trickster's schemes. Then come across a congealed laughter while the trickster chortles with glee as their plans near completion. As the adventurers begin to unravel the trickster's lies, they come face to face (or perhaps face to faces?) with a many faces. Before they have grown strong enough to challenge the trickster directly, the trickster sends a thousand skins to finish them off. Finally, the adventurers confront the trickster to solve this cosmic jest once and for all.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3,000/7,000/13,000 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), shield, skill items (Acrobatics, Deception, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), mental, sturdy, wild

Congealed Laughter.name: 凝固的笑声 Congealed Laughter

Emotionsense 100 feet.name: 情感感知 100 尺 Emotionsense 100 feet
Emotionsense 100 feet.description:
凝结笑声可以以精确感官感知附近具有情绪的生物。此能力无法让凝结笑声感知字面上没有情绪的生物，例如无心智生物，但也包括某些没有情绪的有感知生物。通常，没有情绪的生物会列出对情绪或精神效果的免疫。

A congealed laughter can sense nearby creatures with emotions as a precise sense. This doesn't allow the congealed laughter to sense creatures with literally no emotions, such as mindless creatures, but also certain sapient creatures without emotions. Typically, creatures without emotions list an immunity to emotion or mental effects.

Distracting Aura.name: 扰乱灵光 Distracting Aura
Distracting Aura.description:
40尺。凝结笑声在其无定形态周围的灵光中持续发出一阵不和谐的笑声合唱。在凝结笑声的分心灵光内开始其回合的活生物必须成功通过一次@Check[type:will|dc:33]意志豁免。若失败，该生物会被一阵阵咯咯笑折磨。直到其回合结束，该生物若要执行任何具有操作（特征）的行动，或任何带有语言成分的法术，都必须成功通过一次@Check[type:flat|dc:5]纯骰检定。若纯骰检定失败，则该动作或行动被浪费。

40 feet. The congealed laughter emits a constant discordant chorus of laughter in an aura around its amorphous form. Living creatures who begin their turn inside the congealed laughter's distracting aura must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:33] saving throw. On a failure, the creature is afflicted with fits of giggles. Until the end of their turn, the creature must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] to perform any activity with the manipulate trait, as well as any spell with a verbal component. Failing the flat check means the action or activity is wasted.

Split.name: 分裂 Split
Split.description:
每当一个凝结笑声在拥有10或更多HP时，被一次将对凝结笑声造成穿刺或挥砍伤害的攻击命中后，在将伤害应用于凝结笑声之后，凝结笑声会分裂成两个相同的泥怪，每个都拥有原本剩余生命值的一半。一个凝结笑声位于与原本相同的空间，另一个位于相邻且未被占据的空间。若没有相邻空间未被占据，新产生的凝结笑声会自动将生物和物体推开以填满一个空间（GM决定某个物体或生物是否太大或太重，以至于新产生的凝结笑声无法推动）。

Whenever a congealed laughter that has 10 or more HP is hit by an attack that would deal the congealed laughter piercing or slashing damage, after applying the damage to the congealed laughter, the congealed laughter splits into two identical oozes, each with half the original's remaining Hit Points. One congealed laughter is in the same space as the original, and the other is in an adjacent, unoccupied space. If no adjacent space is unoccupied, the new congealed laughter automatically pushes creatures and objects out of the way to fill a space (the GM decides if an object or creature is too big or heavy for the new congealed laughter to push).

Giggle Fits.name: 咯咯笑发作 Giggle Fits
Giggle Fits.description:
被凝结笑声吞没或被其颚部打击命中的生物，会受到一种可怕且无法控制的冲动影响，想要跟着它一起大笑。该生物承受丑恶狂笑法术的效果，并进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:34] 意志豁免，持续至凝结笑声下个回合开始。

A creature Engulfed by the congealed laughter or struck by its jaws Strike is afflicted with a horrible, uncontrollable urge to laugh along with it. The creature suffers the effects of a hideous laughter spell with a @Check[type:will|dc:34] save until the beginning of the congealed laughter's next turn.

Engulf.name: 吞没 Engulf
Engulf.description:
@Check[type:reflex|dc:35]，@Damage[5d6[acid]] 伤害，逃脱DC 35，破裂25。

任何在其回合开始时被凝结的笑声吞没的生物都会受到其咯咯笑发作能力的影响。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

@Check[type:reflex|dc:35], @Damage[5d6[acid]] damage, Escape DC 35, Rupture 25.

A creature that begins their turn Engulfed by the congealed laughter is affected by its giggle fits ability.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

Devour Laughter.name: 吞噬笑声 Devour Laughter
Devour Laughter.description:
需求 凝结笑声吞没了一个活生物，且被吞没的生物在其最近一次对抗咯咯笑发作的豁免中失败或大成功或大失败

效果 凝结笑声以被吞没生物的笑声为食。被吞没的生物受到 @Damage[16d6[mental]] 伤害，且必须尝试一次意志豁免。若凝结笑声将该生物降至 0 生命值，则该生物死亡并喂养凝结笑声，为其治疗所受伤害的一半（最多不超过该生物剩余生命值）。若凝结笑声已分裂，则此治疗改为等于所受伤害的四分之一，而非一半。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，并在 1 轮内获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，并在 1 轮内获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}。

大成功或大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并在 1 分钟内获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4}，且在 1 分钟内获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused}。

Requirements The congealed laughter has a living creature Engulfed, and the Engulfed creature failed or critically failed its most recent saving throw against giggle fits

Effect The congealed laughter feeds on the Engulfed creature's laughter. The Engulfed creature suffers @Damage[16d6[mental]] damage and must attempt a Will saving throw. If the congealed laughter brings the creature to 0 Hit Points, the creature dies and feeds the congealed laughter, healing it for half the damage taken (to a maximum of the creature's remaining Hit Points). If the congealed laughter has split, this healing is equal to only one quarter of the damage taken, instead of one half.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage, and it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target takes full damage, and it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4} for 1 minute and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} for 1 minute.

Congealed Laughter.publicNotes:
大多数诡计神祇都有许多面貌，而这些面貌中通常至少有一张是恶毒的。诡计神祇的恶意体现为对他人痛苦的幸灾乐祸，并嘲笑堕落与残忍的展示。这种残酷的笑声在群星之间的黑暗中回荡，也在那些追随其更邪恶冲动之人的心智中回响。有时，这笑声会抵达虚空中奇异的魔法异常现象，二者结合并凝结成一种浓稠、无心智的物质；它会寻找灵魂吞噬，以便成长，并将其卑劣的嘲弄散播到整个宇宙。

凝结笑声是一团灵质的块状物，外形像翻涌的暗色风暴云，里面翻滚着无数邪秽的嘴巴，发出不协调的咯咯笑声；其间脉动着明亮的纹理，如同某种奇异的异位面能量的血管，漂浮穿行于诸位面之间，寻找灵魂吞噬。

诡计回响是强大诡计神祇的行为所遗留下来的碎片，随着诡计者的恶作剧余波在宇宙间漂流。在世界各地不同的万神殿与文化中，诡计者都是许多神祇常见的原型。传统上，诡计神祇会采取多种形态，运用他们的伪装与欺骗来使周遭所有人困惑、迷乱并误入歧途。诡计神祇为何不断欺骗身边所有人，因诡计者而异。有些诡计者是强迫性的撒谎者；另一些则有他们想推进的计划，或只是觉得成功耍弄他人令人兴奋或滑稽。还有一些诡计者在道德准则之间游移，试图暂时与英雄神祇结盟，却又不可避免地在无数次不断变换的立场调整中背叛他们的盟友，甚至背叛他们的手足。

伪装是凡人以及其他神祇都忍不住继续与诡计神祇打交道的重要原因之一，因为他们可能始终没意识到自己究竟在与谁周旋，或直到为时已晚才发现那位提供建议的神秘人物其实是个诡计者。然而，单靠欺骗并不足够。诡计者往往在多种不同的技能上都确实多才多艺，拥有惊人的天赋与无与伦比的技艺。因此，在他们突然而必然的背叛之前，诡计者会是卓越的盟友，能够代表其盟友——无论是神祇还是其他存在——完成各种不可能的壮举。

当诡计神祇施展一次尤为显著的恶作剧、背叛或其他恶作剧行径时，他们可能会留下一个强大的回响，称为诡计回响。根据诡计者的行为与形体，不同种类的诡计回响会凝结或凝固。例如，诡计者的技能与机敏天性可能催生出“多管闲事之手”，而诡计者的谎言连同其欺诈的舌头与面部特征则会导致“多张面孔”的诞生。当诡计者在不同形态之间变换伪装以误导周遭所有人或毁坏他人名誉时，“千层皮”会一层层蜕落。与此同时，诡计神祇笑声中那无心智的恶意则孕育出“凝结笑声”。

无心智的笑声

凝结笑声并没有自己的心智。它仅仅体现了诡计神祇那种怪诞而异界的幽默感。有些人可能会觉得奇怪：由笑声这种复杂的心理与情绪现象构成的生物竟能在没有心智的情况下达成其目的；但凝结笑声以致命的确定性证明了这种事完全可能。

诡计者的踪迹

与某位诡计者敌对、追逐神祇阴谋与诡计踪迹的冒险者，常会发现他们的道路被各种各样的敌人所阻；这些敌人正是诡计神祇亲自抛到他们面前的。此类对手中首要的便是诡计回响——无论它们是因诡计者的行为自然且无意间产生，还是诡计者为对抗那些可能当场逮住自己的人而刻意创造。

这可能引出一整段冒险或战役：首先，冒险者挑战正在布置诡计者计划的“多管闲事之手”。接着，当诡计者因计划将近完成而得意窃笑时，他们遭遇“凝结笑声”。当冒险者开始揭开诡计者的谎言时，他们将面对一张脸（或也许是许多张脸？）——“多张面孔”。在他们强大到足以直接挑战诡计者之前，诡计者会派出“千层皮”来结果他们。最终，冒险者直面诡计者，彻底解开这场宇宙玩笑。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 810/1,850/3,400 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀，灾祸，混沌，体质，延伸，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，固守，心灵，力量，野性

Most trickster gods have many faces, and usually at least one of those faces is malicious. A trickster god's malice embodies schadenfreude at the suffering of others and laughs at displays of depravity and cruelty. This cruel laughter echoes across the darkness between the stars and in the minds of those who follow their more wicked urges. Sometimes, this laughter reaches strange magical anomalies in the void, and the two conjoin and congeal into a thick, mindless substance that seeks out souls to devour so that it may grow and spread its heinous mockery across the universe.

Congealed laughter is an ectoplasmic mass that resembles a dark storm cloud roiling with countless vile mouths that cackle discordantly, pulsing with bright veins of some strange extraplanar energy, floating through the planes in search of souls to devour.

Trickster echoes are fragments left behind due to the actions of a powerful trickster deity, drifting throughout the universe in the wake of the trickster's mischief. Tricksters are a popular archetype among the many different deities across the world's various pantheons and cultures. Traditionally, trickster deities take many forms, using their disguises and deceptions to bewilder, confuse, and mislead all those around them. Why trickster deities continually deceive all those around them varies from trickster to trickster. Some tricksters are compulsive liars. Others have an agenda they seek to pursue or simply find the idea of successfully pulling off pranks exhilarating or hilarious. Still other tricksters flit between moral codes, attempting to join with heroic deities for a time, only to inevitably betray their allies, or even their siblings, in a series of countless shifting adjustments of allegiance.

Disguises are a big part of the reason mortals and other deities alike can't help but continue engaging with trickster deities, as they might never come to realize exactly with whom they are dealing or only discover that the mysterious figure offering advice was a trickster after it was too late. However, deception alone isn't sufficient. Tricksters tend to be legitimately multi-talented in a variety of different skills, with incredible talent and unparalleled techniques. Thus, before their sudden but inevitable betrayal, a trickster is a superlative ally, capable of achieving all sorts of impossible feats on behalf of their allies, deific or otherwise.

When trickster deities perform an especially notable prank, betrayal, or other act of mischief, they might leave behind a powerful echo, known as a trickster echo.
