Depending on the trickster's actions and physicality, various sorts of trickster echoes congeal or coagulate. For instance, a trickster's skills and clever nature can give rise to a meddling hands, while a trickster's lies, alongside its deceptive tongue and facial features, lead to the birth of a many faces. A thousand skins slough off when a trickster changes guises between various forms in order to mislead all around them or ruin another's reputation. Meanwhile, the mindless malice of a trickster deity's laughter births a congealed laughter.

Mindless Laughter

Congealed laughter doesn't have a mind of its own. It merely embodies the eldritch and otherworldly sense of humor of a trickster deity. Some might find it strange that a creature composed of a complex mental and emotional phenomenon such as laughter can fulfill its purpose without a mind, but congealed laughter proves with deadly certainty just how possible such a thing could be.

Trickster's Trail

Adventurers who find themselves at odds with a trickster, chasing after the deity's trail of plots and schemes, often find their path obstructed by a variety of foes thrown in their way by the trickster deity themselves. Chief among these opponents are the trickster echoes, whether they arise naturally and inadvertently through the trickster's actions or the trickster intentionally creates them in order to oppose those who threaten to catch them in the act.

This could lead to an entire adventure or campaign: First, the adventurers challenge the meddling hands setting up the trickster's schemes. Then come across a congealed laughter while the trickster chortles with glee as their plans near completion. As the adventurers begin to unravel the trickster's lies, they come face to face (or perhaps face to faces?) with a many faces. Before they have grown strong enough to challenge the trickster directly, the trickster sends a thousand skins to finish them off. Finally, the adventurers confront the trickster to solve this cosmic jest once and for all.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 810/1,850/3,400 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, chaotic, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), evil, fortification, mental, strength, wild

Meatmonger.name: 肉贩 Meatmonger

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Placate.name: 安抚 Placate
Placate.description:
如果一名生物提出购买价值50gp的肉，或提供5负载的新鲜肉，并在一次@Check[type:diplomacy|dc:23]检定中成功，则肉贩会变为友好。处于友好状态时，肉贩会试图以每1负载肉10gp的价格向该生物出售更多的肉。购买的1负载肉若在购买后10分钟内食用，则具有精制切肉的效果。一旦友好的肉贩无法再出售肉，他们便会离开并变为冷漠；他们不会试图为获取更多肉而加害其顾客。

If a creature offers to buy 50gp worth of meat or provides 5 bulk worth of fresh meat and succeeds at a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:23] check the meatmonger becomes friendly. While friendly, a meatmonger attempts to sell the creature more meat at a cost of 10gp per 1 Bulk of meat. 1 Bulk of purchased meat eaten within 10 minutes of purchase has the effects of Fine Cuts. Once a friendly meatmonger is no longer able to sell meat, they leave and becomes indifferent; they don't attempt to victimize their customer for more meat.

Mouthwatering Scent.name: 令人垂涎的香气 Mouthwatering Scent
Mouthwatering Scent.description:
30英尺（以肉车为中心）。灵光内吃肉的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 意志豁免中成功，否则将变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} ，持续1轮。不吃肉的生物在该豁免上获得+2环境加值，并且在豁免失败时不会着迷，而是获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} 。任何生物在其豁免中成功后，在接下来的1分钟内获得暂时免疫。

30 feet (centered on the meat cart). Creatures in the aura that eat meat must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} for 1 round. Creatures that don't eat meat gain a +2 circumstance bonus on the save and are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} instead of fascinated on a failed save. Any creature who succeeds on their save becomes temporarily immune to for 1 minute.

Barreling Butcher.name: 横冲直撞的屠夫 Barreling Butcher
Barreling Butcher.description:
肉贩疾行两次并进行一次短斧打击。

The meatmonger strides twice and makes a hatchet Strike.

Fine Cuts.name: 精细切割 Fine Cuts
Fine Cuts.description:
需求 肉贩与一辆装有至少 1 负载肉的肉车相邻，或正在推动该肉车

效果 肉贩品尝其产品并消耗 1 负载的肉。它恢复 [[/r 3d8+10[healing]]] 点生命值，并尝试以 3 级反制等级和 [[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{+15} 的反制调整值反制一个影响它的苦难。

Requirements The meatmonger is adjacent to or pushing a Meat Cart with at least 1 Bulk worth of meat in it

Effect The meatmonger samples its products and consumes 1 Bulk worth of meat. It heals [[/r 3d8+10[healing]]] hit points and attempts to counteract one affliction affecting it with a counteract level of 3 and a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{+15}.

Meatmonger.publicNotes:
肉贩是群居的妖精商人，会和平地从他们的大型木制推车上售卖美味、偶尔也可疑的肉类……除非他们的存货不足！

肉贩有一个简单的需求：为顾客提供美味的肉食。但肉贩的顾客永远无法确定自己吃的究竟是什么肉。许多人因为肉贩而走上食人之路。而更多人则成了肉贩获取新食材需求的受害者。

肉贩也不避讳把他们的商品卖给不择手段的人。看到他们向一帮巨魔（特征）或饥饿的亡者兜售货物并不罕见。

没你的肉

肉贩不进行以物易物，只接受钱币来换取其商品。饥饿的家庭若想用自家的一员来换一顿饭，会发现肉贩对他们冷眼相待——不，不是推车里的那块肩肉。不过，它愿意为已提供的服务付费。肉贩总是在寻找美味的香料与腌料，也会寻找铁匠来磨利他们的刀刃。作为所得收入的加值，肉贩通常不会屠宰那些被他们认为有帮助的人。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 护甲（光、中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（运动、制作、交涉、学识[烹饪]）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，魅力，体质，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，守序，力量，狂野

Meatmongers are gregarious fey merchants who peacefully sell delectable and occasionally dubious meat from their large wooden carts... except when they're low on stock!

A meatmonger has a simple need to serve delicious meats to clients. But a meatmonger's client can never be sure exactly what kind of meat they are eating. Many people have taken to cannibalism because of a meatmonger. And many more have fallen victim to the meatmonger's need for new ingredients.

Meatmongers don't shy away from selling their wares to unscrupulous individuals either. It's not uncommon to find one peddling their goods to a gang of trolls or the hungry dead.

No Meat For You

The meatmonger does not barter and only accepts coins for its goods. Hungry families who try to trade one of their own for a meal will find the meatmonger giving them the cold shoulder—no, not the one in the cart. It is willing to pay for services rendered, though. Meatmongers are always looking for delectable spices and marinades, as well as blacksmiths to sharpen their blades. As a bonus to the income earned, meatmongers do not usually butcher those they find helpful.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Crafting, Diplomacy, Lore [Cooking])

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, energy resistant (positive), evil, lawful, strength, wild

Zakurak.name: 扎库拉克 Zakurak

Scent 120 feet.name: 气味 120 英尺 Scent 120 feet

Easy to Call.name: 易于召唤 Easy to Call
Easy to Call.description:
邪灵的等级在被@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.2ykmAVKrsAWcazcC]{异界束缚}仪式召来时视为低2级（以及可能用于其他仪式，由GM酌情决定），但除非主施法者的检定为大成功，否则它总是可以自由地选择攻击或离开，而非进行谈判。

A sahkil's level is considered 2 lower for the purpose of being conjured by the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.2ykmAVKrsAWcazcC]{Planar Binding} ritual (and potentially other rituals, at the GM's discretion), but it is always free to attack or leave instead of negotiate unless the primary caster's check is a critical success.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity
Attack of Opportunity.description:
如果一个处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状态的生物触发借机攻击，扎库拉克可以对该生物进行2次爪子打击，而不是1次打击。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

If a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} creature triggers an attack of opportunity, Zakurak can make 2 claw Strikes against that creature instead of 1 Strike.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

Feed on Fear.name: 以恐惧为食 Feed on Fear
Feed on Fear.description:
只要任何 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧} 生物在其100尺范围内，Zakurak便会在其回合开始时恢复 @Damage[50[healing]]{50点生命值}。

Zakurak regains @Damage[50[healing]]{50 Hit Points} at the start of their turn as long as any @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} creature is within 100 feet of them.

Mindcrushing Aura.name: 碎心灵光 Mindcrushing Aura
Mindcrushing Aura.description:
10英尺，[[/r (2d6)[spirit],(4d6)[mental]]]{2d6 灵体伤害和4d6 心灵伤害} @Check[type:will|basic:true|dc:45] 豁免。

10 feet, [[/r (2d6)[spirit],(4d6)[mental]]]{2d6 spirit damage and 4d6 mental damage} @Check[type:will|basic:true|dc:45] save.

Telepathy 200 feet.name: 心灵感应 200 尺 Telepathy 200 feet

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
Zakurak在其用一次打击造成重击时，便会为其吐息武器重新充能。

Zakurak recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they critically hit with a Strike.

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Summon Dragon (Adult Red Dragon Only).name: 召唤巨龙（仅限成年红龙） Summon Dragon (Adult Red Dragon Only)
Summon Dragon (Adult Red Dragon Only).description:
你召唤一条龙为你作战。这与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{召唤动物}的效果相同，但你召唤的是一只拥有龙类（特征）的普通生物，且其等级为5或更低。

升阶（6环） 等级7

升阶（7环） 等级9

升阶（8环） 等级11

升阶（9环） 等级13

升阶（10环） 等级15

You conjure a dragon to fight for you. This works like@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}, except you summon a common creature that has the dragon trait and whose level is 5 or lower.

Heightened (6th) Level 7

Heightened (7th) Level 9

Heightened (8th) Level 11

Heightened (9th) Level 13

Heightened (10th) Level 15

Summon Draconic Legion.name: 召唤龙族军团 Summon Draconic Legion
Summon Draconic Legion.description:
你短暂地召唤一支强大的巨龙军团，它们在降临你所在之处时释放出湮灭性的爆破。这些巨龙如同一体行动，并共同占据一个巨型生物的空间。它们拥有100尺的飞行速度。当你施放该法术时，选择它召唤彩色龙或金属龙。

抵达（塑能）能量湮灭 巨龙军团吐出两道能量爆破：一条 @Template[type:line|distance:120] 与一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:60]，二者不能重叠。任一区域内的每个生物受到10d8伤害（基础反射豁免）。巨龙会根据所召唤的巨龙类别，选择每个吐息武器的伤害类型。彩色龙可以为锥形选择寒冷、火焰或毒素，并为线形选择酸蚀或电击；金属龙可以为锥形选择寒冷或火焰，并为线形选择酸蚀、电击或火焰。

离去 巨龙旋风 巨龙军团怒然打击，对其所在位置内或20尺内的所有敌方生物造成[[/r 9d8[slashing]]]伤害（基础反射豁免）。

You momentarily summon an army of powerful dragons that unleash annihilating blasts as they descend upon your location. These dragons act as one and collectively occupy the space of a Gargantuan creature. They have a fly Speed of 100 feet. When you Cast this Spell, choose whether it summons chromatic or metallic dragons.

Arrive (evocation) Energy Annihilation The draconic legion breathes out two blasts of energy: a @Template[type:line|distance:120] and a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] that can't overlap. Each creature in either of the areas takes 10d8 damage (basic Reflex save). The dragons choose the damage type of each breath weapon, depending on the category of dragons summoned. Chromatic dragons can choose cold, fire, or poison for the cone and acid or electricity for the line; metallic dragons can choose cold or fire for the cone and acid, electricity, or fire for the line.

Depart Draconic Whirlwind The draconic legion strikes with fury, dealing [[/r 9d8[slashing]]] damage (basic Reflex save) to all enemy creatures in its location or within 20 feet.

Summon Dragon (Adult Blue or Green Drago.name: 召唤巨龙（仅限成年蓝龙或绿龙） Summon Dragon (Adult Blue or Green Dragon Only)
Summon Dragon (Adult Blue or Green Drago.description:
你召唤一条龙为你战斗。这如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{召唤动物}，但你召唤的是一个常见生物，该生物具有龙类（特征），且其等级为5或更低。

升阶（6环） 等级7

升阶（7环） 等级9

升阶（8环） 等级11

升阶（9环） 等级13

升阶（10环） 等级15

You conjure a dragon to fight for you. This works like@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}, except you summon a common creature that has the dragon trait and whose level is 5 or lower.

Heightened (6th) Level 7

Heightened (7th) Level 9

Heightened (8th) Level 11

Heightened (9th) Level 13

Heightened (10th) Level 15

Dispel Magic (At Will).name: 解除魔法（随意） Dispel Magic (At Will)
Dispel Magic (At Will).description:
你解开法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Divine Aura.name: 神圣灵光 Divine Aura
Divine Aura.description:
神圣力量守护诸多目标，使每个目标在区域内时获得AC与豁免检定+1状态加值。

选择你的神祇拥有的一种阵营（混乱、邪恶、善良或守序）。如果你没有神祇，或你的神祇为绝对中立，你无法施放此法术。此法术获得你所选择阵营的特征。该法术提供的加值在对抗由与该法术阵营相反的阵营生物进行的攻击，以及由其创造的效果时提升至+2（若你选择混乱则相反为守序；若你选择善良则相反为邪恶）。这些加值在对抗由此类生物创造、试图对你神圣灵光的一个目标施加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{被控制（状态）} 状态的效果时提升至+4；同样也适用于对抗由任何与您的神圣灵光阵营相反之事物所召唤的生物进行的攻击。

当一个相反阵营的生物以近战攻击命中一个目标时，该生物必须成功通过一次意志豁免，否则将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1分钟。之后该生物在1分钟内暂时免疫。

在每一轮中，你第一次维持法术时，神圣灵光的半径扩大10尺。

Divine power wards the targets, granting each a +1 status bonus to AC and saves while in the area.

Choose an alignment your deity has (chaotic, evil, good, or lawful). You can't cast this spell if you don't have a deity or your deity is true neutral. This spell gains the trait of the alignment you chose. The bonuses granted by the spell increase to +2 against attacks by-and effects created by-creatures with an alignment opposite to the spell (lawful if you chose chaotic, evil if you chose good). These bonuses increase to +4 against effects created by such creatures that attempt to impose the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition on a target of your divine aura, as well as against attacks made by creatures summoned by anything opposite in alignment to your divine aura.

When a creature of opposite alignment hits a target with a melee attack, the creature must succeed at a Will save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute. It's then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

The first time you Sustain the Spell each round, the divine aura's radius grows 10 feet.

Tempest of Shades.name: 暗影风暴 Tempest of Shades
Tempest of Shades.description:
你引导不死之力，短暂召来由被你的敌人与盟友同样杀死的复仇亡者所组成的聚合体。该聚合体显现为一股由无形的、嚎叫的面孔构成的巨大龙卷风。它占据一个巨型生物的空间，并具有60尺的速度。

抵达（负能量）死亡漩涡 每个位于60尺放射范围内的敌方生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免，产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}。

离去（情绪、恐惧、心灵）永恒嚎叫 复仇亡者发出一声痛苦的尖啸。你在100尺放射范围内的所有敌人必须尝试 @Check[type:will|name:Tempest of Shades Depart|traits:necromancy,emotion,fear,mental] 意志豁免，产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

大成功或大失败 该生物陷入 frightened 3。它也会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续1轮或直到它不再 frightened，以先发生者为准。

You channel the forces of undeath to briefly call forth an amalgam of the vengeful dead slain by your enemies and allies alike. This amalgam manifests as a large tornado of insubstantial, howling faces. It occupies the space of a Huge creature and has a Speed of 60 feet.

Arrive (negative) Vortex of Death Each enemy creature within a 60-foot emanation must attempt a Fortitude save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}.

Depart (emotion, fear, mental) Howl of Eternity The vengeful dead lets out an anguished scream. All your enemies within a 100-foot emanation must attempt @Check[type:will|name:Tempest of Shades Depart|traits:necromancy,emotion,fear,mental] saves with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Critical Failure The creature is frightened 3. It's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round or until it's no longer frightened, whichever comes first.

Shadow Raid.name: 暗影突袭 Shadow Raid
Shadow Raid.description:
你在区域内编织出飞舞阴影的幻象。阴影打击并嬉戏，伤害你的敌人，并以扭曲的阴影遮挡其视野。当你施放法术时，区域内的敌人因阴影爆裂成形而承受6d8钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:reflex|basic:true|traits:illusion]或@Check[type:will|basic:true|traits:illusion]豁免。你在施放法术时选择伤害类型，而每个生物在掷骰进行豁免前选择其尝试的豁免类型。随后阴影在区域内持续1分钟，对任何在区域内结束其回合的敌人造成你所选择类型的[[/r 3d8]]伤害。由于幻象阴影虫群般覆盖其上并阻挡光，区域内的所有生物对其中的敌人而言都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

花费一个动作进行搜索（Seek）或以其他方式与这次阴影突袭互动的生物，可以尝试一次察觉检定以识破它。成功时，该生物受到的阴影伤害减半，且阴影不再妨碍其视野。这些益处持续至法术结束。

升阶（9环） 初始伤害增加2d8，而在区域内结束其回合的生物所受伤害增加1d8（[[/r 4d8]]）。

You spin illusions of flying shadows throughout the area. The shadows strike and cavort, harming your foes and blocking their vision with twisting shadow. Enemies in the area when you Cast the Spell take 6d8 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, with a @Check[type:reflex|basic:true|traits:illusion] or @Check[type:will|basic:true|traits:illusion] save, as shadows explode into being. You choose the damage type when you Cast the Spell, and each creature chooses the type of save it attempts before it rolls the save. The shadows then persist in the area for 1 minute, dealing [[/r 3d8]] damage of the type you chose to any enemy that ends its turn in the area. All creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to enemies in the area, as the illusory shadows swarm over them and block light.

A creature that spends an action to Seek or otherwise interact with the shadow raid can attempt a Perception check to disbelieve it. On a success, the creature halves the damage it takes from the shadows, and the shadows no longer impede its vision. These benefits last until the spell ends.

Heightened (9th) The initial damage increases by 2d8, and the damage to a creature that ends its turn in the area increases by 1d8 ([[/r 4d8]]).

Warp Mind.name: 扭曲心智 Warp Mind
Warp Mind.description:
你扰乱一名生物的心智能力与感官输入。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。无论该次豁免的结果如何，目标随后在10分钟内暂时免疫。扭曲心智的效果会立即发生，因此解除魔法与其他能反制法术的效果都无法反制它们。然而，改变现实、奇迹、原初异象、复原术或祈愿仍然可以反制这些效果。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在其下一回合的第一个动作中带有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑（状态）}状态。

失败 目标陷入困惑（状态）1分钟。

大成功或大失败失败 目标永久陷入困惑（状态）。

You scramble a creature's mental faculties and sensory input. The target must attempt a Will saving throw. Regardless of the result of that save, the target is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes. Warp mind's effects happen instantly, so dispel magic and other effects that counteract spells can't counteract them. However, alter reality, miracle, primal phenomenon, restoration, or wish can still counteract the effects.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target spends the first action on its next turn with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} condition.

Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is Confused permanently.

Spellwrack.name: 法术摧残 Spellwrack
Spellwrack.description:
你使施加在目标身上的任何法术都会将其能量溢出为有害的脉冲。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响。

成功 每当目标受到一个具有持续时间的法术影响时，目标受到[[/r 2d12[persistent,force]]]伤害。每当其因法术溃烂造成的持续力场伤害而受到伤害时，它会将影响它的法术的剩余持续时间减少1轮。只有一次针对你法术DC的成功奥秘检定才能帮助目标从@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{持续伤害}中恢复；该诅咒与持续伤害在1分钟后结束。

失败 同成功，但该诅咒与持续伤害不会自行结束。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但持续力场伤害为[[/r 4d12[persistent,force]]]伤害。

You cause any spells cast on the target to spill out their energy in harmful surges. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success Whenever the target becomes affected by a spell with a duration, the target takes [[/r 2d12[persistent,force]]] damage. Each time it takes persistent force damage from spellwrack, it reduces the remaining duration of spells affecting it by 1 round. Only a successful Arcana check against your spell DC can help the target recover from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{Persistent Damage}; the curse and the Persistent Damage end after 1 minute.

Failure As success, but the curse and Persistent Damage do not end on their own.

Critical Failure As failure, but the persistent force damage is [[/r 4d12[persistent,force]]] damage.

Fear (At Will).name: 恐惧（意志） Fear (At Will)
Fear (At Will).description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

True Seeing (Constant).name: 真知术（持续） True Seeing (Constant)
True Seeing (Constant).description:
你看见60尺内的事物如其真实一般。GM会针对区域内任何幻术或变化系效果进行一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于判定你是否看穿它（例如，若该检定成功反制一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会终止该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Mindcrushing Breath.name: 碎心吐息 Mindcrushing Breath
Mindcrushing Breath.description:
Zakurak 吐息出一股凝聚的恐惧能量爆发，造成[[/r (12d12)[mental],(4d12)[spirit]]]{12d12 mental and 4d12 evil}伤害，范围为@Template[type:cone|distance:60]（@Check[type:will|dc:48|basic:true]豁免）。

他们在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用心灵碾压吐息。

Zakurak breathes a blast of concentrated fear energy that deals [[/r (12d12)[mental],(4d12)[spirit]]]{12d12 mental and 4d12 evil} damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] (@Check[type:will|dc:48|basic:true] save).

They can't use Mindcrushing Breath again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Skip Between.name: 穿梭跳跃 Skip Between
Skip Between.description:
萨希基尔从物质位面移动到以太位面，或反之亦然，具有@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.D2nPKbIS67m9199U]{Ethereal Jaunt}的效果，但该效果具有无限持续时间且可以被解消。被召唤的萨希基尔不能使用“位面跳跃”。

The sahkil moves from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane or vice-versa, with the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.D2nPKbIS67m9199U]{Ethereal Jaunt} except that the effect has an unlimited duration and can be Dismissed. A summoned sahkil can't use Skip Between.

Snatch Between.name: 夹缝夺取 Snatch Between
Snatch Between.description:
当使用“跳跃穿梭”时，扎库拉克可以带上任何他们已使其处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{被擒抱}状态的生物。

When using Skip Between, Zakurak can bring along any creatures they have @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}.

Swallow Whole.name: 吞噬整吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
超大型，[[/r (4d12+12)[钝击],1d8[灵体]]], 破裂 44

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Huge, [[/r (4d12+12)[bludgeoning],1d8[spirit]]], Rupture 44

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Unsettled Mind.name: 不安定的心智 Unsettled Mind
Unsettled Mind.description:
任何生物受到扎库拉克的任何精神法术或能力影响时，在该效果的持续时间内以及之后的[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}期间，都会变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 3}。

Any creature affected by any of Zakurak's mental spells or abilities becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 3} for the duration of that effect and for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} thereafter.

Zakurak.publicNotes:
萨希基折磨者扎库拉克是凡人对巨龙恐惧的化身，也是真龙所拥有的可怖龙之威压的体现。扎库拉克是龙、骷髅（特征）与蛛形生物的巨大混合体，常常从以太位面旅行至梦境界，侵染古龙的心智，以赐予力量为承诺，换取它们散播恐惧。

信徒增益

扎库拉克可以作为一位神祇被崇拜。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-deities.Item.xr9JkrQyTUAwI5J1]{Zakurak}

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 35,000/70,000/120,000 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（光、中型、重型）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技、运动、欺瞒、威吓、学识[巨龙]、自然、奥秘、宗教）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、魅力、体质、延伸、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、精神、法术（神圣：解除魔法、神圣灵光、恐惧、暗影突袭、法术溃解、召唤龙裔军团、召唤巨龙、影之风暴、真知术、扭曲心智）、尖刺、狂野、翼生

The sahkil tormentor Zakurak is the manifestation of mortals' fear of dragons, as well as the terrifying draconic presence possessed by true dragons. A massive blend of dragon, skeleton, and arachnid, Zakurak often travels from the Ethereal Plane to the Dreamlands to infect the minds of ancient dragons, promising them power in exchange for spreading terror.

Devotee Benefits

Zakurak can be worshipped as a deity.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-deities.Item.xr9JkrQyTUAwI5J1]{Zakurak}

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 35,000/70,000/120,000 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Intimidation, Lore [Dragon], Nature, Occultism, Religion)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), evil, mental, spells (Divine: dispel magic, divine aura, fear, shadow raid, spellwrack, summon draconic legion, summon dragon, tempest of shades, true seeing, warp mind), spiked, wild, winged

Maramacula.name: 马拉玛库拉 Maramacula

Greater Darkvision.name: 强化黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 20 feet.name: 颤动感知（不精确）20尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 20 feet

Malevolent Call.name: 恶意呼唤 Malevolent Call
Malevolent Call.description:
马拉马库拉可以通过在“欺骗”技能的“说谎”行动中成功通过一次检定，来拟态它听过的任何声音，例如泛泛的交谈声或婴儿的啼哭声。马拉马库拉在此检定上获得+4环境加值。这不能让马拉马库拉拟态特定的词语。

Maramacula can mimic any sound it has heard, such as generic chatting noises or an infant's cries, by succeeding at a Deception check to Lie. Maramacula has a +4 circumstance bonus to this check. This doesn't allow Maramacula to mimic specific words.

Cheat the Cheater.name: 欺骗骗子 Cheat the Cheater
Cheat the Cheater.description:
玛拉玛库拉喜欢戏耍它的猎物，即使这会导致它失去一顿饭。一名生物可以花费一个带有专注（特征）的单动作，尝试进行一次欺瞒或交涉检定，对抗玛拉玛库拉的察觉DC（@Check[type:deception|dc:resolve(@actor.system.perception.dc)] 或 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:resolve(@actor.system.perception.dc)]）。在一次成功后，玛拉玛库拉获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{缓慢（状态） 1}，持续1轮，因为它被迫用缺失的动作来给出更好的回应或谎言。如果生物在同一轮中多次成功，该效果可叠加；并且如果以这种方式使缓慢（状态）提升至3或更高，玛拉玛库拉会停止其攻击，并对触发生物及其盟友变为友善，只要他们也停止敌对行为即可。如果在它以这种方式变为友善后有生物攻击玛拉玛库拉，玛拉玛库拉会在10分钟内暂时免疫“骗过骗子”。

Maramacula loves to play with its prey, even if results in losing its meal. A creature can spend a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to attempt a Deception or Diplomacy check against Maramacula's Perception DC (@Check[type:deception|dc:resolve(@actor.system.perception.dc)] or @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:resolve(@actor.system.perception.dc)]). On a success, Maramacula is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round, as it's compelled to spend the missing action to respond with a better reply or lie. The effect is cumulative if creatures succeed several times in the same round, and if the slowed condition increases to 3 or more in this way, Maramacula ceases its attack and becomes friendly to the triggering creature and its allies, as long as they cease hostilities as well. If a creature attacks Maramacula after it becomes friendly in this way, Maramacula becomes temporarily immune to Cheat the Cheater for 10 minutes.

Aquatic Ambush.name: 水栖（特征）伏击 Aquatic Ambush

Swallow Whole.name: 整吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
大型，[[/r (1d6+10)[钝击],2d6[酸蚀]]], 破裂 22

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Large, [[/r (1d6+10)[bludgeoning],2d6[acid]]], Rupture 22

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Fast Swallow.name: 快速吞咽 Fast Swallow
Fast Swallow.description:
触发 Maramacula 抓住一名生物。

效果 Maramacula 使用吞噬。

Trigger Maramacula Grabs a creature.

Effect Maramacula uses Swallow Whole.

Hey! Look Out!.name: 嘿！当心！ Hey! Look Out!
Hey! Look Out!.description:
需求 Maramacula 听过某个特定生物说话，或使用带有听觉或语言（特征）特征的动作

效果 Maramacula 模仿该生物的声音并大声喊出不准确的警告，使该生物及其盟友困惑。被模仿的生物及其位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的盟友必须尝试进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:34] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物识破 Maramacula 的阴谋，并在 1 小时内暂时免疫。

成功 该生物没有上 Maramacula 的当，且不受影响。

失败 该生物在 Maramacula 下个回合结束前处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}。

大成功或大失败 该生物无法完全摆脱从 Maramacula 声音中传来的谎言，也无法将其与原本的声音区分开来，即使那是它自己的声音也是如此。该生物变为 off-guard，并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}，持续 1 分钟。

Requirements Maramacula has heard a specific creature speak, or use an action with the auditory or the linguistic trait

Effect Maramacula imitates the creature's voice and shouts inaccurate warnings, befuddling the creature and its allies. The mimicked creature and its allies in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:34] save.

Critical Success The creature recognizes Maramacula's schemes and is temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Success The creature doesn't fall for Maramacula's schemes and is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until the end of Maramacula's next turn.

Critical Failure The creature can't completely shake off the lies coming from Maramacula's voice and distinguish it from the original's voice, even if it was their own. The creature becomes off-guard and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute.

Slippery Slope.name: 滑坡 Slippery Slope
Slippery Slope.description:
Maramacula 会在其行进路径上留下黏稠、湿滑的痕迹。每当它离开陆地上的一个方格时，该方格会对所有其他生物成为困难地形，持续 1 轮。

Maramacula leaves a sticky, slippery trail on its path. Whenever it leaves a square on land, that square becomes difficult terrain for every other creature for 1 round.

Maramacula.publicNotes:
马拉马库拉是一头古老的野兽，以顽皮的骗子而闻名。据传奇所言，马拉马库拉是一条奇妙的鱼，拥有金色与彩虹般的鳞片，但真相是……略有不同。这种外表不过是一层伪装，是马拉马库拉自己散布的流言。这些流言帮助它在下水道或沼泽中安顿下来，然后编造一个又一个谎言，引诱无辜之人走向毁灭。

拟形怪大师

马拉马库拉是致命的诡计家，会拟仿各种声音来吸引猎物。为了诱捕父母，马拉马库拉会发出他们走失孩子的哭喊（也许那孩子已被马拉马库拉吃掉）。为了困住守卫，只需发出来自盟友或上级的呼喊即可。少数能从马拉马库拉手下幸存的人，是那些设法迷住这只生物，并说服它放自己离开的人。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 250/560/1,030 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、欺瞒、交涉、社会、潜行）

可用灌注属性 酸蚀、破敌、魅力、敏捷、延展、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、精神、野性

Maramacula is an ancient beast renowned as a mischievous liar. According to legend, Maramacula is a marvelous fish with golden and rainbow scales, but the truth is... slightly different. This appearance is merely a facade, a rumor spread by Maramacula itself. These rumors assist it in settling down in a sewer or swamp and then making up lie after lie to lure innocent people to their doom.

Master Mimic

Maramacula is a lethal trickster, mimicking all sorts of voices to attract prey. To ensnare a parent, Maramacula sends the cries of their lost child (perhaps a child Maramacula has already eaten). To trap a guard, all it takes are shouts from allies or superiors. The few who survive Maramacula are those who manage to captivate the creature and convince it to let them leave.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 250/560/1,030 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Deception, Diplomacy, Society, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, charisma, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), evil, mental, wild

Whorl Ooze.name: 涡旋泥怪 Whorl Ooze

Motion Sense.name: 运动感官 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
涡旋软泥怪可以通过振动以及空气或水的移动来感知附近的运动。

A whorl ooze can sense nearby motion through vibration and air or water movement.

Extra Reaction.name: 额外反应 Extra Reaction
Extra Reaction.description:
旋涡软泥怪每轮获得额外一次反应动作（）。它只能用此反应动作（）来旋转漩涡。

A whorl ooze gains an extra reaction each round. It can only use this reaction to Spin Whorls.

Spin Whorls.name: 旋涡纹 Spin Whorls
Spin Whorls.description:
触发 一名旋涡软泥怪能以其感官察觉到的生物进行一次以旋涡软泥怪为目标的远程攻击；

效果 旋涡软泥怪身上的图案与螺旋开始催眠般地旋转与转动，使该生物的心智过载并扭曲其空间推理能力。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:26] 豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[4d10[mental]] 伤害并陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到 [[/r 8d10[mental]]] 伤害并陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}，且该生物的远程攻击自动失败。

Trigger A creature that the whorl ooze can sense makes a ranged attack targeting the whorl ooze;

Effect The patterns and spirals on the whorl ooze begin to spin and rotate hypnotically, overloading the creature's mind and distorting the creature's spatial reasoning. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:26] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[4d10[mental]] damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes [[/r 8d10[mental]]] damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}, and the creature's ranged attack automatically fails.

Transfixing Display.name: 穿刺式展示 Transfixing Display
Transfixing Display.description:
10英尺。

进入或在灵光内开始其回合的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] 豁免中成功，否则将获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 1}，并且还会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{目眩} 持续1轮。无论豁免的结果如何，该生物在24小时内暂时免疫该能力。

10 feet.

A creature that enters or begins its turn within the aura must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] save or be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} and also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} for 1 round. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this ability for 24 hours.

Gelatinizing Strike.name: 明胶化打击 Gelatinizing Strike
Gelatinizing Strike.description:
当旋涡软泥对一名生物的攻击造成重击成功时，该生物会液化为一团软泥，如同@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.0gdZrT9lwO17EIxc]{软泥形态}法术，除非它在一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:26]豁免中成功。与该法术一样，此效果持续1分钟，但在每一轮，于目标的回合时，它必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:26]豁免，否则它将在变形的剩余持续时间内变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{困惑}。当处于困惑时，目标不会攻击其他软泥。掷1d4以决定战斗形态，结果如下。

d4 形态
1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.EKdqKCuyWSkpXpyJ]{黑布丁}
2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3zdBGENpmaze1bpq]{凝胶魔方}
3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.7tfF8ifVvOKNud8t]{灰软泥}
4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PpkOZVoHkBZUmddx]{黄褐凝胶}

When a whorl ooze critically succeeds at an attack against a creature, the creature liquefies into an ooze, as per the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.0gdZrT9lwO17EIxc]{Ooze Form} spell unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] save. Like the spell, this effect lasts for 1 minute, but each round, on the target's turn, it must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:26] save or it becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} for the remaining duration of the transformation. While confused, the target doesn't attack other oozes. Roll 1d4 to determine the battle form, with the following results.

d4 Form
1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.EKdqKCuyWSkpXpyJ]{Black Pudding}
2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3zdBGENpmaze1bpq]{Gelatinous Cube}
3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.7tfF8ifVvOKNud8t]{Gray Ooze}
4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PpkOZVoHkBZUmddx]{Ochre Jelly}

Mind Vice.name: 心灵恶习 Mind Vice
Mind Vice.description:
需求 涡旋软泥怪擒抱了一名生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

效果 当被擒抱时，涡旋软泥怪可以压制该生物的大脑，使察觉变得迟钝并造成 [[/r (2d12+9)[mental]]] 伤害，需要进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:26|basic:true] 豁免。若为大失败，该生物还会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。

Requirements The whorl ooze has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

Effect While grabbed, the whorl ooze can overwhelm the creature's brain, dulling perception and dealing [[/r (2d12+9)[mental]]] damage, with a @Check[type:will|dc:26|basic:true] save. On a critical failure, the creature is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Whorl Ooze.publicNotes:
常见于废弃实验室的化学泄漏周围成群出现，涡纹软泥怪是炼金实验的产物：那些用于扭曲心智或增强情绪的药剂可怕地出了岔子。尽管大多数软泥怪都令人不安，但察觉到涡纹软泥怪更是一场感官噩梦。其同心旋涡状纹路违逆并遮蔽视空间推理，使旁观者在迷惘中踉跄失措。面对涡纹软泥怪毁灭性的假足攻击，最不走运的受害者会在自己转化为软泥怪之前，先经历身体逐渐胶化的恐怖。

一些从涡纹软泥怪手中逃得性命的人，会出现嗅觉缺失、持续恶心，或骨头正在变成果冻的骇人感觉。更离奇的是，某些在特别险恶的遭遇后幸存下来的人，会喃喃提及炼金术士之间的一场地下战争，坚称涡纹软泥怪将被武器化，作为即将到来大战中的棋子。只有同样目睹过涡纹软泥怪的人，才往往会相信这些看似幻觉般的呓语。

心灵的囚笼

冒险者曾发现某些村落，那里的居民仿佛活在另一种可怖的现实中。他们无法察觉外来者，行为举止像陷入酒精诱发的恍惚。随后在其中一栋建筑里发现的涡纹软泥怪表明：这些软泥怪已粉碎了村民的心智，将他们困在共享的幻觉之中。尽管他们的身体逃离了软泥怪，但他们的心灵却永远遗落了一部分。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 克敌，体质，延展，能量抗性（正能量），加固，心灵，法术（神秘：软泥怪形态），力量，野性

Often found clustered around chemical spills in abandoned laboratories, whorl oozes are the spawn of alchemical experiments with mind-altering or moodenhancing potions gone terrifyingly wrong. While most oozes are disquieting to behold, perceiving a whorl ooze is a sensory nightmare. The ooze's concentric swirling patterns defy and cloud visuospatial reasoning, causing onlookers to stumble about in disorientation. With a whorl ooze's devastating pseudopod attack, the unluckiest victims experience the horror of their bodies gelatinizing before they turn into oozes themselves.

Some who escape whorl oozes with their lives experience anosmia, persistent nausea, or the disturbing sensation of their bones turning to jelly. Stranger still, other survivors of particularly nasty encounters murmur about an underground war among alchemists, insisting that whorl oozes will be weaponized as pawns in a great coming battle. Only others who have beheld whorl oozes tend to believe these seemingly hallucinatory mutterings.

A Prison Of The Mind

Adventurers have discovered villages where inhabitants seem to live in an alternate, terrifying reality. They don't perceive outsiders and behave as though in an alcohol-induced daze. The subsequent discovery of whorl oozes in one of the buildings revealed the oozes had shattered the villagers' minds, trapping them in a shared hallucination. Though their bodies had escaped the oozes, they'd left part of their psyches behind forever.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), fortification, mental, spells (Occult: ooze form), strength, wild

Goldsmyf.name: 金匠 Goldsmyf

Disanimate.name: 解除动画 Disanimate
Disanimate.description:
金匠妖可以使自身失活并采取3枚金币的形态。在此形态下，金匠妖没有速度，且除了让自身再活化之外不能采取任何动作。当处于失活形态时，金匠妖还会获得并能使用“威慑染料”反应动作（）。如果它的所有金币彼此之间都在5尺内，它就可以再次使用此动作以再活化。

A goldsmyf can disanimate itself and take the form of 3 gold coins. In this form, the goldsmyf has no Speed and can take no actions other than reanimating itself. While in its disanimated form, the goldsmyf also gains and can use the Deterrent Dye reaction. If all of its gold pieces are within 5 feet of each other, it can use this action again in order to reanimate.

Deterrent Dye.name: 威慑染料 Deterrent Dye
Deterrent Dye.description:
需求 金匠怪处于其失活形态

触发 一名生物触碰金匠怪的一枚金币碎片

效果 金匠怪强行喷出蓝色染料，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]。范围内的无人持有的物体会被永久染上染料（不过污渍可按一般染料的方式正常去除）。范围内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:29] 豁免，并承受以下效果。随后金匠怪重新活化。

大成功 该生物避开被染料覆盖且不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1} 且被永久染上染料。

失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}，被永久染上染料，并受到 @Damage[2d10[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

大失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 3}，被永久染上染料，并受到 [[/r 4d10[bludgeoning]]] 伤害。

Requirements The goldsmyf is in its Disanimated form

Trigger A creature touches one of the goldsmyf's gold coin pieces

Effect The goldsmith forcibly expels blue dye in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]. Unattended objects within the radius are permanently covered with dye (though the stain can be removed as normal for dye). Creatures within the radius must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:29] save with the following effects. The goldsmyf then reanimates.

Critical Success The creature avoids getting covered with dye and is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1} and is permanently covered with dye.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}, is permanently covered with dye, and takes @Damage[2d10[bludgeoning]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 3}, is permanently covered with dye, and takes [[/r 4d10[bludgeoning]]] damage.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Plane Shift (Self Only; To The Fey Realm.name: 位面转移（仅限自身；仅能前往精灵位面或返回物质位面） Plane Shift (Self Only; To The Fey Realm Or Back To The Material Plane Only)
Plane Shift (Self Only; To The Fey Realm.description:
你和你的盟友穿越存在的各个位面之间的屏障。目标移动到另一个位面，例如火焰位面、暗影位面或深渊。你必须对目的地位面有特定的了解，并使用一把由该位面的材料制成的魔法调谐音叉作为法术的法器。虽然大多数著名位面的调谐音叉都较为罕见，就像法术“位面转移”一样，但更为晦涩的位面与半位面往往拥有稀有的调谐音叉。该法术极其不精确，你会出现在距离某个目标（由你选择）上一次该目标旅行到该位面时所在位置1d20x25英里处。如果对所有目标而言这都是第一次旅行到某个位面，你会出现在该位面的一个随机位置。位面转移不提供返回旅行的方式，不过再次施放位面转移可以让你回到你先前的位面，除非存在特殊环境。

You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence. The targets move to another plane, such as the Plane of Fire, the Shadow Plane, or the Abyss. You must have specific knowledge of the destination plane and use a magic tuning fork created from material from that plane as a focus for the spell. While the tuning forks for most prominent planes are uncommon, just like the spell plane shift, more obscure planes and demiplanes often have rare tuning forks. The spell is highly imprecise, and you appear 1d20x25 miles from the last place one of the targets (of your choice) was located the last time that target traveled to the plane. If it's the first time traveling to a particular plane for all targets, you appear at a random location on the plane. Plane shift doesn't provide a means of return travel, though casting plane shift again allows you to return to your previous plane unless there are extenuating circumstances.

Passwall.name: 穿墙 Passwall
Passwall.description:
你在所选区域的墙壁中创造一条可见的隧道，用空的空间替换该区域。如果墙壁厚度超过10尺，则隧道只会向内延伸10尺。即使墙壁中只有一层很薄的金属也会阻止该法术生效。该法术不会降低结构的完整性。当法术结束时，隧道内的任何人都会被挤出到最近的出口。

强化（7环） 隧道最深可达20尺。包含你隧道入口的墙壁区域看起来完全正常（除非以真实视觉或类似效果观察），尽管隧道确实存在。隧道入口表现为坚固的墙壁，但你可以指定一个口令或一个触发，使生物能够自由进入隧道。

You create a visible tunnel through the wall in the chosen area, replacing the area with empty space. If the wall is thicker than 10 feet, the tunnel ends 10 feet in. Even a small layer of metal in the wall prevents this spell from functioning. This spell doesn't reduce the integrity of the structure. When the spell ends, anyone inside the tunnel is shunted to the nearest exit.

Heightened (7th) The tunnel can be up to 20 feet deep. The areas of the wall that contain your tunnel's entrance appear completely normal (unless viewed with true seeing or a similar effect), despite the tunnel's existence. The tunnel's entrance functions as a solid wall, but you can specify a password or a trigger, allowing creatures to enter the tunnel freely.

Fire Shield.name: 火焰护盾 Fire Shield
Fire Shield.description:
你用幽灵般的火焰缠绕自身，获得寒冷抗力5。此外，邻接的生物以近战攻击命中你时，以及接触你或以徒手攻击命中你的生物，每次这么做时都会受到2d6点火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.1RsScTvNdGD9zGWe]{法术效果：火焰护盾}

升阶（+2） 寒冷抗力提高5，且火焰伤害提高1d6。

You wreathe yourself in ghostly flames, gaining cold resistance 5. Additionally, adjacent creatures that hit you with a melee attack, as well as creatures that touch you or hit you with an unarmed attack, take 2d6 fire damage each time they do.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.1RsScTvNdGD9zGWe]{Spell Effect: Fire Shield}

Heightened (+2) The cold resistance increases by 5, and the fire damage increases by 1d6.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果影响下，目标无视任何会使其速度获得环境减值的效果。当其尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}使其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于行动自如法术，否则其会自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Solid Fog.name: 固体迷雾 Solid Fog
Solid Fog.description:
你召唤出一团浓雾，浓厚到足以阻碍移动与视线。此效果如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist}，但该区域同时也是困难地形。你可以解消该法术。

You conjure a bank of fog so thick it impedes movement as well as sight. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist}, except that the area is also difficult terrain. You can Dismiss the spell.

Faerie Fire.name: 妖精之火 Faerie Fire
Faerie Fire.description:
你施放该法术时处于区域内的所有生物，在持续时间内都会被你选择颜色的、绚丽且不散发热量的火焰勾勒轮廓。可见的生物在受到妖火影响时不能处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}状态。若这些生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}状态，则在受到妖火影响时它们处于Concealed状态，而非@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}状态。

All creatures in the area when you cast the spell are limned in colorful, heatless fire of a color of your choice for the duration. Visible creatures can't be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} while affected by faerie fire. If the creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, they are Concealed while affected by faerie fire, rather than being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}.

Glitterdust.name: 闪光粉尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
区域内的生物被闪烁的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。若某个生物的隐形被此法术抵消，则它处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 而非 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。无论该生物原本就处于隐形状态，还是在此法术的隐形抵消效果结束前获得新的隐形效果，此规则都适用。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消，持续2轮。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1分钟，且其隐形被抵消，持续1分钟。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续1轮，并目眩持续10分钟。其隐形被抵消，持续10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你放出一道脉冲，用以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法存在与否之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。

你仅在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（第3环） 你得知该法术在射程内侦测到的最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同样强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（第4环） 同第3环，但你还会锁定最高等级魔法的来源。如同模糊感官，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小至一个5尺立方体内（若来源大于该范围，则锁定至最近的等效区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Tanglefoot.name: 缠足 Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一条覆盖着黏稠树液的藤蔓从无中生有地出现，从你的手中甩出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击。

大成功或大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）} 状态，并在1轮内其速度承受-10尺环境减值。目标可以尝试以你的法术DC为对抗进行挣脱，以移除该减值与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）} 状态。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度承受-10尺环境减值。目标可以尝试以你的法术DC为对抗进行挣脱，以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠足}

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 这些效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 这些效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tanglefoot}

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Aurumfire Explosion.name: 金焰爆炸 Aurumfire Explosion
Aurumfire Explosion.description:
金币匠可以使自己在炽热的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 中爆炸。区域内每个生物受到 @Damage[8d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true] 豁免）。在爆炸期间，金币匠可以释放构成其身体的三枚金币，并将其用作投射武器。金币匠可以以30尺放射内至多三个生物为目标，使这些生物在爆炸中额外受到 [[/r 2d12[piercing]]] 伤害；该伤害属于爆炸的一部分，并同样受到与火焰伤害相同的基础反射豁免影响。金币火爆炸结束时，金币匠重组回其被活化的蚂蚁形态，出现在其以钱币为目标的某个生物相邻的位置（若它选择以钱币为目标的生物不超过两个，则可出现在放射内的任意位置）。

The goldsmyf can cause itself to explode in a fiery @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[8d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true] save). During the explosion, the goldsmyf can release the three gold coins that make up its body and use them as projectile weapons. The goldsmyf can target up to three creatures within the 30-foot emanation, dealing and additional [[/r 2d12[piercing]]] damage to those creatures with the explosion; this damage is part of the explosion and is subject to the same basic Reflex save as the fire damage. At the end of the Aurumfire Explosion, the goldsmyf reforms back to its animated ant form adjacent to one of the creatures it targeted with coins (or anywhere in the emanation if it chose to target two or fewer creatures with coins).

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
金匠妖吐出一股火焰爆发，形成一个@Template[type:cone|distance:15]，造成@Damage[11d6[fire]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true] 豁免）。金匠妖在[[/br 1d4 #its Breath Weapon Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用其吐息武器。

The goldsmyf breathes a blast of flame in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[11d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true] save). The goldsmyf can't use its Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #its Breath Weapon Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Goldsmyf.publicNotes:
金斯密夫是危险的妖精族所有的餐饮业中最受追捧的守卫者。它们被强大的魔法所灌注，守护着任何生意最珍贵的东西——钱。金斯密夫会以其失活形态——三枚金币——在收银台或保险箱旁等待那些毫无戒心、靠得太近的窃贼而不被察觉。这些守卫者不仅能释放一团爆裂的永久染料云雾给窃贼上色，而且在被挑衅时还会爆炸成火焰。

失活的金斯密夫的三枚钱币通常带有标记，让知情者可以避免触碰这些假钱币并引爆染料炸弹。未经训练的眼睛不容易发现这些雕刻，但即使是不知道其存在的人，只要仔细观察并战胜金斯密夫将自己伪装成普通钱币的天赋，也能找到它们。

活化的金斯密夫会用它的三枚钱币组成一只蚂蚁的三段身躯，腿由绿色的原初魔法构成，带有颚状钳口，以及发光的祖母绿眼睛。

斯密夫是一类妖精构装体家族，其身体由各式各样的寻常装备碎片锻造而成，并由原初能量的丝缕连接成一个整体。每一种斯密夫在与妖精界相关联的餐馆中担任不同职责：铜斯密夫负责场地并收集补给；银斯密夫为客人上菜；而金斯密夫保护餐馆的财务。它们共同为妖精餐馆增添独特风格，同时守护顾客与员工。它们的名字源自构成其身体的物体类型：铜斯密夫由铜锅与碗组成，银斯密夫由银餐具组成，而金斯密夫由金币组成。

金斯密夫会计

有时，金斯密夫会厌倦仅仅伪装成普通钱币待在餐馆金库里。这样的金斯密夫会把智力投向其他追求；鉴于它们周围充斥着钱币、钱与财务表格，它们常常把会计当作兴趣爱好。金斯密夫会计或许不是数学天才，但它们的耐心以及长时间专注于财务话题的能力，仍使它们在填写表格、清点钱或执行餐馆税务时令人印象深刻且不可动摇。

其他斯密夫

斯密夫本就不算常见，而其中只有铜斯密夫、银斯密夫与金斯密夫会以任何程度的规律性出现，即便是在相对冷门的妖精餐馆这一小众领域也是如此。然而，这些并不是存在的唯一斯密夫种类。以下斯密夫至少存在于故事与仙灵文本之中，不过它们究竟是杜撰的还是只是极其稀有，仍未可知。

  • 铂斯密夫，其庞大的身体包含一座熔炉，能够烹制出新食谱。
  • 琥珀金斯密夫会在运送稀有珍馐或采购食材的旅途中陪伴银斯密夫或铜斯密夫，以确保适当付款并在回程时保护款项。
  • 秘银斯密夫据说是银斯密夫的高级形态，被创造用于快速运送尤其易腐的货物，特别是在目的地很远或处于危险区域时。
  • 奥利哈钢斯密夫只在传奇中被提及，它们凭借对时序魔法与时间管理的精通，协调横跨庞大餐馆帝国的所有其他斯密夫，以管理数十乃至数百个其他斯密夫。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（中型、重型），技能物品（特技动作、潜行、盗窃）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），火焰，光，法术（原初：侦测魔法、妖精之火、火焰护盾、行动自如、闪光尘、穿墙术、位面转移、凝固迷雾、缠足袋），投掷，狂野

Goldsmyfs are the most sought-after guardians in the dangerous enterprise of fey- owned gastronomy. Imbued with powerful magic, these creatures guard the thing most precious to any business—the money. A goldsmyf waits undetected in its disanimated form of three gold coins for unsuspecting thieves who veer too close to the till or the safe. Not only can these guardians release a bursting puff of permanent dye that paints the thieves, but they also explode into flames when provoked.

The three coins of a disanimated goldsmyf are usually marked so those in the know can avoid touching the faux coins and setting off the dye bomb. Untrained eyes can't easily detect these engravings, but they can be found even by those who don't know of them if they look carefully and beat the natural talent of goldsmyf to disguise itself as normal coins.

An animated goldsmyf uses its three coins to form the three segments of an ant, with legs formed from green primal magic, mandibular pincers, and glowing emerald eyes.

Smyfs are a family of fey constructs, with bodies forged of disparate pieces of mundane equipment connected into a single entity by strands of primal energy. Each type of smyf serves a different role at restaurants connected to the realm of the fey. Coppersmyfs handle the venue and gather supplies; silversmyfs serve food to guests; and goldsmyfs protect the restaurant's finances. Together, they lend fey restaurants a unique style while guarding customers and staff alike. Their names arise from the type of object used to form their bodies: copper pots and bowls for a coppersmyf, silverware for a silversmyf, and gold coins for a goldsmyf.

Goldsmyf Accountants

Sometimes, a goldsmyf becomes bored of simply remaining in a restaurant's vault disguised as ordinary coins. Such goldsmyfs turn their intellect toward other pursuits, and, given that they're surrounded by coins, money, and financial forms, they often take up accounting as a hobby. Goldsmyf accountants might not be mathematical geniuses, but their patience and ability to focus for long stretches on financial topics still make them impressive and implacable when it comes to filing forms, counting money, or implementing a restaurant's taxes.

Other Smyfs

Smyfs aren't especially common to begin with, and of those, only coppersmyfs, silversmyfs, and goldsmyfs are seen on any kind of regular basis, even in the relatively obscure niche of fey restaurants. However, these aren't the only kinds of smyfs that exist. The following smyfs exist at least in stories and faerie texts, though whether they are fabricated or simply quite rare is still unknown.

  • Platinumsmyfs, whose enormous bodies include a furnace, are capable of cooking up new recipes.
  • Electrumsmyfs accompany silversmyfs or coppersmyfs on journeys delivering rare delicacies or purchasing ingredients in order to ensure appropriate payment and protect the payment on its return.
  • Mithralsmyfs are supposedly an advanced form of silversmyf, created to deliver especially perishable goods quickly, particularly when their destination is far away or in a dangerous area.
  • Orichalcumsmyfs, only mentioned in legends, coordinate all other smyfs across a vast restaurant empire, using their mastery over temporal magic and time management in order to manage dozens or even hundreds of other smyfs.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (medium, heavy), skill items (Acrobatics, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), fire, light, spells (primal: detect magic, faerie fire, fire shield, freedom of movement, glitterdust, passwall, plane shift, solid fog, tanglefoot), throwing, wild

Wildcat Gorger.name: 野猫饕餮者 Wildcat Gorger

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Pouncing Swallow.name: 突袭燕吞 Pouncing Swallow
Pouncing Swallow.description:
野猫吞食者猛扑而出，巨大的口器展开以吞没其受害者。它疾跑并用其口器进行一次颚部打击。成功时，若该生物为中型或更小，野猫吞食者尝试将其整吞。若野猫吞食者以此动作开始时处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}，它在此能力的打击之后仍保持隐藏。

The wildcat gorger pounces, its large maw unfurling to envelop its victim. It Strides and makes a jaws Strike with its maw. On a success, if the creature is Medium or smaller, the wildcat gorger attempts to Swallow it Whole. If the wildcat gorger began this action @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}, it remains hidden until after this ability's Strike.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
野猫吞噬者对@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}的生物造成额外2d6点精准伤害。

The wildcat gorger deals 2d6 extra precision damage to @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Swallow Whole.name: 吞噬整吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
中型，[[/r (2d6+6)[穿刺],2d6[强酸]]], 破裂 20

如果野猫吞噬者已吞下一个生物，它无法用其颚部进行打击。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Medium, [[/r (2d6+6)[piercing],2d6[acid]]], Rupture 20

The wildcat gorger cannot Strike with its maw if it has a creature swallowed.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Wildcat Gorger.publicNotes:
野猫吞噬者以其几乎与身体等长的巨口而闻名，是自然界中令人胆寒的顶级掠食者。作为大型猫科中较大的物种之一，它们依靠蛮力压制猎物，同时也擅长跟踪与潜行。

进行狩猎时，野猫吞噬者会先跟踪猎物，然后猛扑上去将其吞入巨口。一旦以这种方式捕获一只生物，它们会一直将其含在口中直到完全消化；除非它们愿意失去当前这顿餐食，否则就很难再次使用巨口。当数量处于劣势时，它们会先通过吞下一名敌人来将其孤立，然后用蛮力与凶狠的爪击击退其他敌人。 

尽管它们通常会避免与更大的生物发生冲突，但如果这些生物在野猫吞噬者的领地里停留一段时间，对抗几乎不可避免。在这种情况下，野猫吞噬者通常依靠自身力量，以不懈的物理暴力猛攻对方。同样的情况也适用于进入其领地旅行的小队冒险者或人群。 

野猫吞噬者最常见于森林、草原与山地。它们偏好较为温和的气候，不过在更寒冷的区域也并非闻所未闻。它们的被毛会依其环境而呈现从棕色到灰色的不同色调，通常带有更深的条纹。生活在森林或林地区域的野猫吞噬者往往偏棕色，而栖息在更为多山地形中的个体则更偏灰色。与老虎一样，野猫吞噬者的领地意识极强，常在洞穴中筑巢。在某个区域立足后，除了交配之外，它们很少离开，并通常会在此度过余生。这部分源于它们好斗的天性与独特的进食方式，使得任何协作或分享食物都变得困难。 

由于其好斗且独居的天性，野猫吞噬者很少交配。即便交配，母兽也会独自抚养少数幼崽，而且仅持续到幼崽足以在野外自立为止。因此，幼崽往往早至四个月大就必须独自生存，这也促成了它们为求生而变得更加好斗。

别在嘴里塞满时说话

野猫吞噬者与体型更小的猫科近亲拥有相似的发声方式，这意味着它们在受惊时容易嘶嘶作响，在面对不愉快的处境时会发出嚎叫。若有人无法击败野猫吞噬者，当这只猫科吞下他们的一名伙伴时，或许能利用这种倾向来占便宜。向其脚部猛戳一下或跳到它背上，可能触发不由自主的叫声，从而让受害者有更好的机会逃脱。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀、克星、体质、能量抗性（正能量）、力量、野性

Wildcat gorgers, best known for their almost body-length mouths, are fearsome apex predators of the natural world. One of the larger species of big cats, they rely on brute strength to overwhelm prey, though they also excel at stalking and stealth.

To hunt, wildcat gorgers first stalk their prey before pouncing to engulf them in their maw. Once they have caught a creature in this way, they hold it there until it is entirely digested, making it challenging to use their maw again unless they're willing to lose their current meal. When outnumbered, they first isolate an enemy by swallowing them and then fend off any others with brute strength and vicious claw attacks. 

Though they usually avoid conflicts with bigger creatures, a confrontation is almost inevitable if such creatures remain in a wildcat gorger's territory for any length of time. In these situations, wildcat gorgers usually rely on their strength and assault the creature with unrelenting physical force. The same applies to small groups of adventurers or people traveling within their territory. 

Wildcat gorgers are most commonly found in forests, grasslands, and mountains. They prefer more temperate climates, though they are not unheard of in colder areas. Their coats range from browns to grays depending on their environment, usually with darker stripes. Wildcat gorgers in forested or woodland areas tend to be brown, whereas those in more mountainous terrains tend to be grayer. Like tigers, wildcat gorgers are extremely territorial and often make their dens in caves. After establishing themselves in an area, they rarely leave other than to mate and generally remain there for the rest of their lives. This is partly due to their aggressive nature and unique way of feeding, which make any collaboration or sharing of meals difficult. 

Due to their aggressive and solitary natures, wildcat gorgers seldom mate. When they do, the mother raises the few cubs alone, and even then, only until they're big enough to hold their own in the wild. Thus, often as early as four months old, the cubs have to survive on their own, contributing to their aggressive nature as a means of survival.

Don't Talk With Your Mouth Full

Wildcat gorgers share similar vocalizations to their smaller feline counterparts, meaning they are prone to hiss when surprised or yowl when faced with an unpleasant situation. Those who are unable to defeat a wildcat gorger may be able to use this tendency to their advantage if the feline swallows one of their companions. A jab at a foot or a leap onto its back can trigger involuntary cries that give the victim a better chance of escaping.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Lucent Demonsheep.name: 辉光恶魔绵羊 Lucent Demonsheep

Demon in Sheep's Clothing.name: 披着羊皮的恶魔 Demon in Sheep's Clothing
Demon in Sheep's Clothing.description:
一只光辉恶魔羊可以以恶魔般的轻松在一群普通绵羊中伪装其邪恶的存在。当它混在羊群中时，生物必须在一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:27] 察觉检定中成功，才能通过 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Seek]{Seek} 找到它；而且即使没有任何其他掩蔽或隐蔽，它也能在羊群中 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} 并 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Sneak]{Sneak}。处于恶魔之魂效果影响下的光辉恶魔羊无法使用此能力。

A lucent demonsheep can disguise its malevolent presence among a flock of ordinary sheep with fiendish ease. A creature must succeed in a @Check[type:perception|dc:27] check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Seek]{Seek} it when it's among a flock of sheep and it can @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} and @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Sneak]{Sneak} among the flock even without any other cover or concealment. A lucent demonsheep under the effects of Demon Soul can't use this ability.

Demon Soul.name: 恶魔之魂 Demon Soul
Demon Soul.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 亮光恶魔羊回忆起前世与昔日荣光的一瞥，在 1 分钟内恢复其昔日恶魔能力的一部分。亮光恶魔羊体型变为中型（体型），其身体燃起火焰，使其打击额外造成 1d6 火焰伤害。它的羊毛化作一团浓密的、令人窒息的黑烟云，使其对所有其他生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。最后，亮光恶魔羊获得烟雾视野，使其能看穿烟雾。来自恶魔灵魂的所列效果适用于一只最初由纵火恶魔形成的亮光恶魔羊。对于由不同种类的恶魔形成的亮光恶魔羊，在 GM 的裁量下，也可能适用其他契合主题的恶魔灵魂效果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.oJ4MUG572UfHaBED]{效果：恶魔灵魂}

Frequency once per hour

Effect The lucent demonsheep remembers a glimpse of its past life and former glory, regaining a fraction of its former demonic abilities for 1 minute. The lucent demonsheep grows to Medium size, and its body lights on fire, causing its Strikes to deal 1d6 additional fire damage. Its wool becomes a dense cloud of choking black smoke, granting it @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealement} to all other creatures. Finally, the lucent demonsheep gains smoke vision, allowing it to see through smoke. The listed effects from Demon Soul are appropriate for a lucent demonsheep that was originally formed from an arson demon. Other thematic Demon Soul effects might apply for lucent demonsheep formed from different sorts of demons, at the GM's discretion.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.oJ4MUG572UfHaBED]{Effect: Demon Soul}

Demonsheep Charge.name: 恶魔绵羊冲锋 Demonsheep Charge
Demonsheep Charge.description:
辉光恶魔羊疾行两次，并在移动结束时对其触及内的一名敌人进行一次角打击。若命中，辉光恶魔羊可以尝试对目标进行一次 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove}，且在该次 Shove 尝试后才会增加其多重攻击减值。

The lucent demonsheep Strides twice and makes a horn Strike against a foe within its reach at the end of the movement. If it hits, the lucent demonsheep can attempt to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove} the target, without increasing its multiple attack penalty until after the Shove attempt.

Fearful Bites.name: 恐惧噬咬 Fearful Bites
Fearful Bites.description:
明光恶魔羊进行三次颚部打击，正常应用明光恶魔羊的多重攻击减值。如果两次或更多次攻击命中同一目标，则其变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}。

The lucent demonsheep makes three jaws Strikes, applying the lucent demonsheep's multiple attack penalty normally. If two or more attacks hits the same target, it becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Lucent Demonsheep.publicNotes:
在深渊——一个由毁灭、权力、仇恨与贪婪所驱动的凶险位面——试图推翻恶魔领主王座的阴谋屡见不鲜。这些妄图篡位者大多会被轻易处置；随后，冒名者及其同伙往往会受到严酷惩罚，以儆效尤，借此劝阻其他恶魔继续叛乱。

对纵火恶魔或其他嗜好暴力的恶魔而言，一种极其羞辱性的归宿，是将它们的灵魂囚禁在最无害的生物之一——绵羊——的躯体之中。

若绵羊活得足够久，恶魔的灵魂终将拥有足够的time在囚笼中找到细小裂隙，使恶魔的感知能力得以部分复苏。当这种情况发生时，这只如今被对毁灭的无尽渴望所驱使的绵羊将被不可逆转地改变，并由此诞生出一只光辉恶魔羊。

即便随着恶魔的浮现，光辉恶魔羊的行为逐渐改变，缓慢却确实地变得更加狡诈而危险，它们的外表却并不会随之变化。唯有在这些短暂的清明时刻，恶魔的灵魂才能完全浮现，并将其宿主体态扭曲为一种绵羊与恶魔的诡异混合体。

咩——恶之恋

光辉恶魔羊本就足够危险，但在恶魔牧羊人的带领下，它们几乎势不可挡。只要有一丝其存在的风声，就可能引发对整群羊的屠宰，以防更危险的恶魔现身。

害群之羊

是否有人想过，绵羊或许并不像它们看上去那般无辜？也许农场动物的生活有着某种阴郁之处，足以在最温顺的生物心中也滋长恶魔影响。被附身的牛、恶魔绵羊、被腐化的鸡……与此同时，水豚以其悠然的天性而闻名，而且从未有人听说过恶魔水豚。

建议怪物部件

怪物部件 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（杂技、运动、威吓）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星、混沌、魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、精神、力量、狂野

Attempts to overthrow the thrones of demon lords are a regular occurrence in the Abyss, a baleful realm driven by destruction, power, hate, and greed. Most of these would-be usurpers are easily dispatched, after which both the pretender and their cohorts tend to be punished harshly as an example for other demons to discourage further rebellion.

A humiliating destination for arson demons or other demons who love violence is to trap their souls inside the body of one of the most harmless creatures, a sheep.

If the sheep lives long enough, the soul of the demon eventually has enough time to find small cracks in its confinement, allowing the demon's sapience to partly re-emerge. When this happens, the sheep, now driven by an insatiable thirst for destruction, is irretrievably changed, giving birth to a lucent demonsheep.

Even as a lucent demonsheep's behavior changes with the demon's emergence, slowly but surely becoming more cunning and dangerous, their appearance does not. It is only in these brief moments of clarity that the demon's soul is able to fully emerge and twist the body of its host into a strange mix of sheep and demon.

Baaaad Romance

Lucent demonsheep are dangerous enough on their own, but they are nigh unstoppable when led by a demon shepherd. The slightest hint of their existence can lead to cullings of entire herds to prevent those more dangerous demons from emerging.

Black Sheep

Has anyone considered that sheep are not as innocent as they appear? Perhaps there is a bleakness to the lives of farm animals that encourages demonic influences in even the meekest of creatures. Possessed cows, demon sheep, corrupted chickens… meanwhile, capybaras are famed for their relaxed nature, and no one has ever heard of a demonic capybara.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), evil, mental, strength, wild
Lucent Demonsheep.prototypeToken: 明辉恶魔绵羊 Lucent Demonsheep

Lorekith.name: 洛雷基斯 Lorekith

Fantastical Illusions.name: 奇幻幻象 Fantastical Illusions
Fantastical Illusions.description:
当一名lorekith讲述故事时，他们会被代表故事事件的影像所环绕。对大多数生物而言，这些显然是幻象，不过动物和幼儿可能需要进行一次察觉检定，对抗该lorekith的法术DC来识别它，由GM酌情决定。

When a lorekith tells a story, they are surrounded by images representing the tale's events. These are obviously illusory to most creatures, though animals and small children might need to make a Perception check against the lorekith's spell DC to recognize it, at the GM's discretion.

Myth Masks.name: 神话面具 Myth Masks
Myth Masks.description:
一名典型的lorekith会携带三副面具，并根据需要进行改造；英雄、导师与反派。它们可以用一个互动动作交换面具，并根据当前佩戴的面具获得不同收益。它们的面具具有硬度3与12生命值，破损阈值为6；生物可以使用lorekith的AC与豁免，以lorekith的面具为目标，不过当面具在lorekith持有期间，面具通常不受区域效果影响。若其面具破损，lorekith将失去该面具的收益，直到它们制作一副新的为止；这不会花费任何贵重材料且只需要1天。更稀有的lorekith可能比这基本三副面具拥有更多面具许可。

  • 英雄 lorekith获得快速治疗2。
  • 导师 lorekith在技能检定上获得+1状态加值。
  • 反派 lorekith在攻击与伤害掷骰上获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.clrJTekoo1YAGPVq]{效果：神话面具}

额外的lorekith面具

尽管几乎每个lorekith都曾为故事中不可或缺的关键角色佩戴面具，但有些lorekith的品味更为具体，会创造诸如烈焰、巨龙或小丑之类的面具。

  • 烈焰 lorekith获得火焰抗力5，并且其影子木偶打击的伤害变为火焰。
  • 巨龙 lorekith的威吓加值变为+13。
  • 小丑 lorekith在对抗心智效果的豁免上获得+2状态加值。

A typical lorekith carries three masks that they modify as needed; the hero, the mentor, and the villain. They can swap masks with an Interact action, and they gain benefits based on which mask they currently wear. Their masks have a Hardness of 3 and 12 Hit Points, with a Broken Threshold of 6, and a creature can target a lorekith's mask using the lorekith's AC and saves, though the masks aren't normally affected by area effects while in the lorekith's possession. If their mask is broken, a lorekith loses access to that mask's benefits until they Craft a new one, which costs them no valuable materials and takes only 1 day. Rarer lorekith might have access to more masks than these basic three.

  • Hero The lorekith gains fast healing 2.
  • Mentor The lorekith gains a +1 status bonus to skill checks.
  • Villain The lorekith gains a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.clrJTekoo1YAGPVq]{Effect: Myth Mask}

Additional Lorekith Masks

While nearly every lorekith has worn a mask for the essential roles of a story, some have more specific tastes, creating masks such as the conflagration, the dragon, or the fool.

  • The Conflagration The lorekith gains resistance 5 to fire, and its shadow puppet Strike's damage changes to fire.
  • The Dragon The lorekith's Intimidation bonus becomes +13.
  • The Fool The lorekith gains a +2 status bonus to saves against mental effects.

Storyspeaker.name: 故事述说者 Storyspeaker
Storyspeaker.description:
传说基斯除了在讲故事时不能说话。虽然这些狡猾的妖精已经发展出多种技巧，能将任何对话变成一则故事，但那些依赖传说基斯说话、通常至少需要1分钟的活动会花费双倍时间，而且当它们以故事的形式表述时，可能很难解读。

A lorekith can't speak except when telling tales. While the wily fey have developed a variety of techniques to turn any conversation into a story, activities that depend on the lorekith speaking that would normally take at least 1 minute take twice as long, and they might be hard to interpret when phrased as a story.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或更小体型生物的幻象影像。它会产生相应的声音与气味，并且在接触时也显得可信。如果你与该影像之间的距离曾超过500英尺，则该法术结束。

该影像不能说话，但你可以用你的动作通过该生物说话，法术会将你的声音适当地伪装。由GM决定，你可能需要尝试一次欺瞒或表演检定来模仿该生物。若你试图模仿某个特定人物并与认识该人物的人互动，这种情况尤其常见。

在战斗中，该幻象每回合可以使用2个动作，你在维持法术时由它使用这些动作。它的攻击掷骰使用你的法术攻击掷骰，而它的AC使用你的法术DC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够“实体”，因此能够与其他生物形成夹击。如果该影像被一次攻击命中或一次豁免失败，则该法术结束。

该幻象可以通过让目标相信其攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外它无法直接影响物理世界。若该幻象生物的打击命中，目标受到等于1d4加上你的施法关键属性调整值的精神伤害。这是一个精神效果。该幻象的打击为非致命。若该伤害与怪物的影像不相符——例如，一个幻象大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标立即尝试一次察觉检定来识破该法术。若目标认为相关抗力与弱点适用，则在GM裁定下同样适用。例如，若幻象挥舞战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害具有抗力的生物，该生物将受到更少的精神伤害。然而，幻象伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他要求特定伤害类型的效果。GM应追踪该幻象造成的幻象伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜寻动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻象。当一个生物识破该幻象时，它会从其已受到的一半伤害中恢复（若有），并且不会再从该幻象受到任何进一步的伤害。

升阶（+1） 该影像的打击伤害增加1d4，且你可创造的生物最大体型提高一级（最大至超巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Illusory Object (At Will).name: 幻象物体（随意） Illusory Object (At Will)
Illusory Object (At Will).description:
你创造一个静止物体的幻觉视觉影像。整个影像必须完全容纳于该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地活动，但不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会从一处幻觉瀑布倾泻而下，但将会是无声的。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用探索动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环） 你的影像会发出恰当的声音，产生正常的气味，并且触感正确。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

升阶（5环） 同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Daze.name: 恍惚 Daze
Daze.description:
你使目标的心智变得混乱，并用一次心灵冲击使其目眩神迷。该冲击造成等同于你的施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标在该豁免中大失败，则其还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Haunting Hymn.name: 萦魂圣歌 Haunting Hymn
Haunting Hymn.description:
你回响一段刺耳的圣歌，只有区域内的生物能听见。该圣歌造成等同于你的施法能力调整值的音波伤害，需进行一次基础强韧豁免。若目标在该豁免中大失败，它还会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 1 分钟。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加 1d6。

You echo a jarring hymn that only creatures in the area can hear. The hymn deals sonic damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Fortitude save. If a target critically fails the save, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Inspire Courage.name: 鼓舞勇气 Inspire Courage
Inspire Courage.description:
你用鼓励的话语或曲调激励自己和盟友。你和区域内的所有盟友获得+1状态加值，适用于攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰，以及对抗恐惧效果的豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.beReeFroAx24hj83]{法术效果：激励勇气}

You inspire yourself and your allies with words or tunes of encouragement. You and all allies in the area gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and saves against fear effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.beReeFroAx24hj83]{Spell Effect: Inspire Courage}

Inspire Defense.name: 鼓舞防御 Inspire Defense
Inspire Defense.description:
你激励自己和盟友更有效地保护自己。你和区域内所有盟友获得AC与豁免的+1状态加值，以及等同于法术等级一半的抗力以对抗物理伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DLwTvjjnqs2sNGuG]{法术效果：激励防御}

You inspire yourself and your allies to protect themselves more effectively. You and all allies in the area gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws, as well as resistance equal to half the spell's level to physical damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DLwTvjjnqs2sNGuG]{Spell Effect: Inspire Defense}

Lorekith.publicNotes:
洛瑞基斯是痴迷于神话与民间传说的妖精生物，他们旅行四方，收集自己最喜爱故事的各种变体、属于他们自己的个人史诗，并将其复述给他人取乐。洛瑞基斯身材矮小纤细，看起来像有着长袖与数张彩绘面具的木制木偶，面具上绘着怪物与英雄的肖像。

尽管他们也可能乐于讲述宏大战役的故事，洛瑞基斯仍更倾向于尽可能避免战斗；当谈判失败时，他们会使用幻觉魔法来逃脱，或让对峙降温。然而，当与更强大的角色并肩作战时，洛瑞基斯又会迅速激励他们攀至新的高度，渴望记录他们的功绩，以便日后复述。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 技能物品（制作、交涉、威吓、学识［神话］、表演、社交、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、魅力、寒冷、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、智力、精神、音波、法术（原始：恍惚、萦回圣歌、幻觉生物、幻觉物体、激励勇气、激励防御）、wild

Lorekith are fey creatures obsessed with myths and folklore, traveling the land collecting variations on their favorite stories, their own personal epics, and retelling them to the delight of others. Short, slight creatures, lorekith look like wooden puppets with long sleeves and several painted masks, bearing the likenesses of monsters and heroes.

Though they may delight in stories of great battles, lorekith prefer to avoid combat whenever possible, using their illusion magic to escape or deescalate a confrontation when negotiation fails. When fighting alongside more powerful figures, however, lorekith are quick to inspire them to new heights, eager to record their deeds to retell later.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements skill items (Crafting, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Lore [Myth], Performance, Society, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, cold, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, mental, sonic, spells (Primal: daze, haunting hymn, illusory creature, illusory object, inspire courage, inspire defense), wild

Living Origami.name: 活折纸 Living Origami

Bolt.name: 闪电箭 Bolt
Bolt.description:
触发 活折纸被近战武器攻击

效果 在结算该次攻击后，活折纸迈步或疾走远离。

Trigger The living origami is attacked with a melee weapon

Effect After resolving the attack, the living origami Steps or Strides away.

Change Shape.name: 改变形态 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
活折纸可以将自己折叠成多种微小的形态。这不会改变其攻击，但如果它们变成有翅膀的东西，则获得30英尺的飞行速度；如果它们变成鱼的形态，则获得30英尺的游泳速度。该能力不赋予在水下呼吸的能力。

Living origamis can fold themselves into a variety of tiny forms. This doesn't change its attacks but gives them a fly Speed of 30 feet if they take the shape of something with wings or a swim Speed of 30 feet if they take the shape of a fish.
