This ability does not grant the ability to breathe underwater.

Folded Flurry.name: 折叠连击 Folded Flurry
Folded Flurry.description:
活折纸折起一阵锯齿状纸屑的风暴，并将它们疾射向敌人。处于 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的生物受到 @Damage[2d4[slashing]] 伤害，需进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:16|basic:true] 豁免。活折纸在 [[/br 1d4 #Folded Flurry Recharge]]{1d4 轮} 内无法再次使用此能力。

The living origami folds a flurry of jagged paper scraps and sends them flurrying at their foes. Creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] take @Damage[2d4[slashing]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:16|basic:true] save. The living origami can't use this ability again for [[/br 1d4 #Folded Flurry Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Freeze.name: 冻结 Freeze
Freeze.description:
活折纸停止移动，试图将自己伪装成普通折纸。它在欺骗检定和DC上有自动结果32，以伪装成无生命的折纸，直到它再次行动。

The living origami stops moving, attempting to disguise itself as ordinary origami. It has an automatic result of 32 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as inanimate origami until it acts again.

Living Origami.publicNotes:
活折纸是一种奇异的天然生物，看起来与其纸质同名物无异。这种微小的生物经常呈现为一条小白龙、野兽或鸟的 形态，但它总是由一张单独的纸折成。有些人认为这些生物源自附魔书籍或纸张，而另一些人则相信它们是由一种罕见的叶片制成，那叶片与白纸极为相似。活折纸通常只有几英寸长，重量也和构成它们的纸一样轻。它们往往十分长寿，可活到70–80岁。

在它们被自己选中的伙伴所吸引之前，活折纸常见于花园与森林之中。在那里，它们由莱西培育；莱西将它们视作远房表亲，直到它们离开独自去寻找一位伙伴。一旦活折纸选定了伙伴，它便会将一生奉献于对方的福祉与安全。有时，人们还知道这些生物会设法提升其伙伴的生活质量，例如帮助修复破裂的人际关系，甚至充当浪漫的红娘。

活折纸常在图书馆、学校与艺术画廊等知识与艺术之地筑巢，并会寻找年轻人和富有创造力的人。它们经常与梦想家和孩子交好，担任朋友、向导、间谍，甚至是守护者。法师有时甚至会收活折纸为魔宠，而孩子则把它们视为友善的宠物。当为其收养的伙伴进行防卫时，活折纸会变得相当有防备，常常亲自决定他人是否会对其伙伴造成不良影响。善行以及一团团新鲜墨水的美味滴落，能赢得这些生物的好感。

活折纸没有天敌，但它们畏惧火焰生物。某些不择手段的猎人有时会捕捉这些生物，将其当作宠物、新奇物品或间谍出售；由于它们能够在众目睽睽之下隐蔽自身，使其成为无价的线人。这些不幸的活折纸注定要在牢笼中度过不快乐的一生。解救这些俘虏的人往往会在余生中获得忠诚的伙伴。

活折纸虫群

尽管它们倾向于与其他生物建立纽带，但有些活折纸更偏好同类的陪伴。这些野生生物远离文明生活，并会形成最多达1,000只的虫群。它们往往用翅膀与利爪攻击敌人，以无数细小的伤口将其杀死。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 2.25/5/9 gp

符合条件的精炼项 武器（挥砍），技能物品（杂技、欺瞒、自然、隐秘）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星，魅力，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），善良，智力，狂野，有翼

A living origami is a strange, natural creature that appears no different than its paper namesake. This tiny creature often takes the form of a tiny white dragon, beast, or bird, but it always comes from a single sheet of paper. Some believe that these creatures came into being from enchanted books or paper, while others believe that they are made of a rare leaf that closely resembles white paper. Living origami are only a few inches long and are as light as the paper they are made from. They are often very long-lived, living to 70–80 years.

Before they gravitate towards their chosen companions, living origamis are often found in gardens and forests. Here, they are cultivated by leshies, who consider them to be distant cousins before taking off on their own to find a companion. Once a living origami chooses a companion, it devotes its life to their well-being and safety. Sometimes, these creatures have been known to seek out ways to improve the quality of their companions' lives by helping to repair broken relationships or even acting as romantic matchmakers.

Living origamis often nest in places of knowledge and art such as libraries, schools, and art galleries and seek out the young and the creative. They often befriend dreamers and children, acting as friends, guides, spies, and even defenders. Wizards sometimes even take on living origamis as familiars, while children see them as friendly pets. When defending their adopted companions, living origamis can become quite defensive, often taking it into their own hands to decide whether or not others are good influences for their companions. These creatures can be won over by good deeds and delicious dollops of fresh ink.

Living origamis have no natural enemies, but they do fear creatures of fire. Unscrupulous hunters sometimes capture these creatures to sell them as pets, novelty items, or spies, as their ability to hide in plain sight makes them invaluable informers. These unlucky living origamis are doomed to an unhappy life confined to cages. Those who free these captives often find devoted companions for the rest of their lives.

Living Origami Swarms

Though they tend to bond with other creatures, some living origamis prefer the company of their own kind. These wild creatures live far from civilization and form swarms of up to 1,000. They tend to use wings and claws to attack their enemies, killing them with countless tiny cuts.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 2.25/5/9 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), skill items (Acrobatics, Deception, Nature, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), good, intelligence, wild, winged

Living Figment.name: 活幻象 Living Figment

All in Your Head.name: 全都在你脑海里 All in Your Head
All in Your Head.description:
作为非实体存在，活幻影无法自行影响物质世界，它们的攻击依赖其目标在不经意间的配合——通过相信幻象——来造成伤害。当活幻影未被察觉时，它无法直接伤害一个生物。

As insubstantial beings, living figments are unable to affect the physical world on their own, and their attacks rely on their target's inadvertent cooperation, through their belief in the illusion, to cause harm. A living figment is incapable of directly harming a creature while they are undetected.

Psychosomatic Strike.name: 心身打击 Psychosomatic Strike
Psychosomatic Strike.description:
活的拟像的攻击会造成伤害，因为目标相信它们是真实的。每轮中，生物第一次被活的拟像的打击命中时，它们可以尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:25] 意志豁免来识破幻象攻击。失败时，它们照常承受伤害。成功时，该生物识破该幻象，使活的拟像随后对该生物进行的幻象武器打击获得非致命（特征），并且对该生物造成一半伤害。

A living figment's attacks deal damage because the target believes they are real. The first time each round a creature is hit by a living figment's Strike, they can attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save to disbelieve the illusory attack. On a failure, they take damage as normal. On a success, the creature disbelieves the illusion, causing the living figment's subsequent illusory weapon Strikes to gain the nonlethal trait against that creature and deal half damage to that creature.

Fanciful Forms.name: 奇幻形态 Fanciful Forms
Fanciful Forms.description:
一个活的幻象不受任何形态束缚；它们可以呈现为任何能塞进一个 10 英尺×10 英尺方格内的东西。一个未与敌对生物相邻的活的幻象可以选择完美拟形其所处的地形，使其即使在被直接观察时也能hide。活的幻象在使用 Fanciful Forms 的过程中进行一次隐匿检定，成功则成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}。此外，它还可以通过变成一种能遮挡或掩盖它们的形态来隐藏区域内的陷阱或其他危害；若幻象的隐匿或隐匿 DC 更高，则使用幻象的而非该危害的。

A living figment is unbound to any form; they can appear as anything that can fit inside a 10 foot by 10 foot square. A living figment that isn't adjacent to a hostile creature can choose to perfectly mimic the terrain in which it finds itself, allowing it to hide even while it's directly observed. The living figment makes a Stealth check as part of using Fanciful Forms, becoming @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden} on a success. In addition, it can choose to conceal traps or other hazards in the area by changing into a form that obscures them or covers them up, using the figment's Stealth or Stealth DC instead of the hazard's, if it is higher.

Sensory Overload.name: 感官过载 Sensory Overload
Sensory Overload.description:
活的幻象采取令人困惑、毫无意义的声音、景象，甚至气味的混乱嘈杂形态，以扰乱其敌人。每个处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:22]豁免。此能力只能影响具有精确听觉、嗅觉或视觉感官的生物，但不能影响活的幻象。

大成功或大失败中的大成功 该生物不受影响，且在1分钟内暂时免疫。

成功 该生物在1轮内处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{目眩}。它可以花费一个交互动作以结束该效果。

失败 该生物在1分钟内处于目眩。它可以花费一个交互动作将持续时间减少[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。

大成功或大失败中的大失败 该生物在1分钟内处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{目盲}。它可以花费一个交互动作将该效果降低为目眩。

The living figment takes the form of a bewildering cacophony of nonsensical sounds, sights, and even smells to disorient its enemies. Each creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:22] save. This ability can only affect creatures with precise auditory, olfactory, or visual senses, but not living figments.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} for 1 round. It can spend an Interact action to end the effect.

Failure The creature is dazzled for 1 minute. It can spend an Interact action to reduce the duration by [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} for 1 minute. It can spend one Interact action to reduce the effect to dazzled.

Living Figment.publicNotes:
也被称为“活幻象”，活拟像偶尔会从极其复杂、持续时间极长的幻术中诞生，这些幻术最终会产生自我意识。活拟像的态度与兴趣如同它们的外表一样千差万别，但它们的个性往往反映其最初用途。旨在娱乐的幻象会产生更奇想、更合群的活拟像；而更隐秘、更具敌意的活拟像则会从旨在掩盖陷阱或迷惑敌人的法术中出现。

尽管罕见，活拟像是善于交际的生物，并且它们热衷于彼此协作，以创造出比单独行动时更宏大、更壮观的幻象。一旦脱离创造者而独立，活拟像就不太信任有形的存在，但它们有时会把自己的才能借给那些能赢得其信任的人。

少管闲事

商人们发现，活拟像在鼓励人们购买商品方面非常有效。有些人会创造有魅力的形象来展示他们正在出售的东西，而另一些人则偏好精力充沛的生物，持续骚扰人们直到他们完成购买。确实没有比这更好的方式能钻进顾客的脑子里。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 技能物品（欺瞒、威吓、表演、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、音波）、精神、狂野、长翼

Also known as "living illusions," living figments occasionally arise from highly complex, long-lasting illusions that eventually take on a mind of their own. The attitudes and interests of living figments vary as widely as their appearances, but their personalities tend to reflect their original purposes. Illusions intended to entertain produce more whimsical and gregarious living figments, while more secretive and hostile living figments arise from spells intended to conceal traps or bewilder foes.

Though rare, living figments are sociable creatures, and they eagerly cooperate among themselves to create larger and grander illusions than they would be capable of creating alone. Once independent of their creators, living figments are less trusting of physical beings, but they sometimes lend their talents to those who can win their confidence.

Mind Your Own Business

Merchants have discovered that living figments are effective at encouraging people to buy their wares. Some create charismatic figures who model what they are selling, while others prefer energetic creatures who annoy people until they make a purchase. There really is no better way of getting inside a customer's head.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements skill items (Deception, Intimidation, Performance, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, cold, electricity, fire, sonic), mental, wild, winged

Living Constellation.name: 活星座 Living Constellation

Consume Fear.name: 吞噬恐惧 Consume Fear
Consume Fear.description:
触发 一名生物在距离活星座30尺内变得惊惧。

效果 活星座试图以目标的恐惧为食，迫使其进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:29] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[2d12[mental]] 伤害。

失败 该生物受到 [[/r 3d12[mental]]] 伤害，并在1轮内变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{迟缓 1}。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到 [[/r 4d12[mental]]] 伤害，并在1轮内变为迟缓1，或直到其不再惊惧为止，以较长者为准。

Trigger A creature becomes frightened within 30 feet of the living constellation.

Effect The living constellation attempts to feed off of the fear of the target, forcing it to attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:29] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[2d12[mental]] damage.

Failure The creature takes [[/r 3d12[mental]]] damage and becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes [[/r 4d12[mental]]] damage and becomes slowed 1 for 1 round or as long as it is frightened, whichever is longer.

Alter Form.name: 改变形态 Alter Form
Alter Form.description:
宇宙的多变性使星座能够改变其形态。它采取以下一种架势。

  • 弓手架势 活星座呈现为类人生物的形态，仿佛弓手优雅的射击。处于此架势时，星座唯一能进行的攻击是流星打击。
  • 螃蟹架势 活星座将自身压扁，长出螃蟹的肢体。处于此架势时，活星座获得对 AC 的+2 状态加值，且星座唯一能进行的攻击是宇宙钳爪打击。
  • 蝎子架势 活星座收缩成一只巨大蝎子的形态。处于此架势时，活星座的速度获得+25 尺 状态加值，且星座唯一能进行的攻击是星界毒刺打击。

The variability of the cosmos allows the constellation to alter its form. It assumes one of the following stances.

  • Archer Stance The living constellation takes on a humanoid form, resembling the graceful shots of an archer. While in this stance, the only attacks the constellation can make are shooting star Strikes.
  • Crab Stance The living constellation flattens itself, growing the limbs of a crab. While in this stance, the living constellation gains a +2 status bonus to AC and the only attack the constellation can make are cosmic claw Strikes.
  • Scorpion Stance The living constellation contracts into the form of a large scorpion. While in this stance, the living constellation gains a +25-foot status bonus to its Speeds, and the only attack the constellation can make are astral stinger Strikes.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Searing Light.name: 灼热之光 Searing Light
Searing Light.description:
你射出一道炽烈的光线，带有神圣能量的余辉。进行一次远程法术攻击。该光线造成 5d6 火焰伤害。若目标是邪魔或不死生物，你额外造成 5d6 灵体伤害。

如果光线穿过一片魔法黑暗区域，或以受魔法黑暗影响的生物为目标，灼热之光将尝试反制该黑暗。若你需要判断光线是否穿过一片黑暗区域，在你与该法术的目标之间画一条线

大成功或大失败 目标受到双倍火焰伤害；若其为邪魔或不死生物，还会受到双倍善良伤害。

成功 目标受到全额伤害

升阶（+1） 火焰伤害增加 2d6，且对邪魔与不死生物的善良伤害增加 2d6。

[[/r ((@item.level*2)-1)d6[spirit]]]{随等级变化的善良伤害}

You shoot a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy. Make a ranged spell attack. The ray deals 5d6 fire damage. If the target is a fiend or undead, you deal an extra 5d6 spirit damage.

If the light passes through an area of magical darkness or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, searing light attempts to counteract the darkness. If you need to determine whether the light passes through an area of darkness, draw a line between yourself and the spell's target

Critical Success The target takes double fire damage, as well as double good damage if a fiend or undead.

Success The target takes full damage

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 2d6, and the good damage against fiends and undead increases by 2d6.

[[/r ((@item.level*2)-1)d6[spirit]]]{Leveled Good Damage}

Guiding Star (At Will).name: 指引之星（意志） Guiding Star (At Will)
Guiding Star (At Will).description:
你召唤夜空的星座来引导一个生物前往你施放该法术的位置。每当目标观看星星时，它都会受到一个指向你所选位置的精神暗示，但不会被强迫跟随。目标能够认出你是来源。若该生物前往另一颗行星或位面，法术的效果将被压制，但若该生物返回，效果将恢复。

You call on the constellations of the night sky to guide a creature to the location where you Cast the Spell. Each time the target views the stars, it receives a mental nudge toward your chosen location, though it isn't compelled to follow. The target can recognize you as the source. If the creature goes to another planet or plane, the spell's effects are suppressed, but they resume if the creature returns.

Guidance.name: 引导 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你祈求神圣的引导，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免或技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪次掷骰。若目标使用该加值，则法术结束。无论如何，随后目标会暂时获得1小时的免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：引导}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：引导免疫}

You ask for divine guidance, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Light.name: 光 Light
Light.description:
该物体发出辉光，如同火把一般，在20尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你再次将此法术施放于第二个物体上，第一个物体上的光法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光}

升阶（4环）该物体在60尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺内提供昏暗光照）。

The object glows, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) like a torch. If you cast this spell again on a second object, the light spell on the first object ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The object sheds bright light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Living Constellation.publicNotes:
尽管星辰的光常被视为希望的象征，活星座却代表着截然相反的意义。它们异界而神秘，栖居于夜空中寻常星辰之间。它们的身体由病态的绿色星星构成，并以线条相连，如同关节一般。它们以不可预测的位置绕世界无规律运行，会降临下来并呈现为人们熟知的星座形态，以吸引那些在夜里仰望群星之人的注意。

当凡人看见它们时，活星座会试图将这些凡人引向险境，以汲取其恐惧为食。这种效果在近距离时最为强烈，因此活星座会离开外层空间中的家园，前来饱餐恐惧。迄今为止，学者们对活星座的研究尝试都以失败告终，研究者不是困惑不解，就是因恐惧而战栗数周不止。然而，这些恶毒的异怪对此乐见其成——更多的关注意味着更庞大的观众群，供它们操弄并收割恐惧。

不可名状的恐怖

有诸多猜测认为，活星座是伟大旧日支配者的代理者，被派来判断某个世界是否已成熟到足以征服。偶尔出现的一只活星座或许不必引发重大警觉，但若在短时间内接连出现成群个体，即便是最沉着的人也会被激起末日将临的念头。无论真假，这些信念都会为活星座达成目的，因为它们会激起更多可供其吞噬的恐惧。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 125/275/500 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（奥秘学、欺瞒、威吓、自然、秘法学、隐匿）

可用灌注属性 bane, chaotic, 魅力, 敏捷, elongating, energy resistant (positive), evil, fire, good, 光, mental, 法术（原初：引导, guiding star, 光, searing light）, 力量, sturdy, throwing, wild, winged

While the light of a star is often seen as a sign of hope, living constellations represent the exact opposite. Otherworldly and enigmatic, they live among the normal stars of the night sky. Their bodies are made up of sickly green stars with lines joining them like joints. They orbit the world erratically with unpredictable positioning, descending and taking on the forms of well-known constellations to garner the attention of those who look to the stars in the night.

When mortals see them, living constellations attempt to lead those mortals into perilous situations in order to feed off of their fear. This effect becomes strongest in close proximity, and so living constellations leave their homes in outer space to feast on fear. Scholarly attempts to study living constellations have thus far resulted in failure, leaving the researchers befuddled or trembling with fear for weeks on end. The malignant aberrations welcome this, however, as more attention grants them a greater audience to manipulate for their fear.

Unspeakable Horror

Speculation abounds that living constellations are agents of the Great Old Ones sent to determine if a world is ripe for conquest. While the occasional living constellation may not be cause for great alarm, multitudes appearing in rapid succession can stir thoughts of the apocalypse in even the most composed individuals. True or not, these beliefs serve the living constellation's purpose by arousing more fear for it to consume.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Arcana, Deception, Intimidation, Nature, Occultism, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), evil, fire, good, light, mental, spells (Primal: guidance, guiding star, light, searing light), strength, sturdy, throwing, wild, winged

Living Bones.name: 活骸骨 Living Bones

Chain Mail.name: 链甲 Chain Mail
Chain Mail.description:
一套锁子甲由数件护甲组成，这些护甲由相互连接的小金属环构成防护网。它通常包括锁子衫、护腿、一对护臂和头套，共同保护身体的大部分部位。

A suit of chain mail consists of several pieces of armor composed of small metal rings linked together in a protective mesh. It typically includes a chain shirt, leggings, a pair of arms, and a coif, collectively protecting most of the body.

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
如同木制盾牌一样，钢制盾牌有各种形状和体型。虽然比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们更加耐用。

硬度 HP BT
5 20 10

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

Hardness HP BT
5 20 10

Positive Healing.name: 正能量治疗 Positive Healing
Positive Healing.description:
与其他骷髅（特征）不同，活骨会从正能量中汲取健康。尽管它们是灵体，但它们是活生物，这意味着它们会被正能量的治疗效果治疗，它们在生命值降至 0 时不会被摧毁，并且它们会受到负能量伤害而不是被通常会治疗不死生物的效果治疗（比如冠军的腐化接触）。

Unlike other skeletons, living bones draw health from positive energy. Despite being spirits, they are living creatures, which means they're healed by positive healing effects, they aren't destroyed when reduced to 0 Hit Points, and they're damaged by negative damage and not healed by effects that would normally heal undead (like a champion's touch of corruption).

Soothing Glow.name: 抚慰辉光 Soothing Glow
Soothing Glow.description:
20英尺。活骨周身散发辉光，传递积极的态度，并以灿烂的露齿微笑安抚他人的心灵。只要活骨不采取任何敌对动作，它就会散发一道和平灵光。灵光中的生物若尝试进行敌对动作，必须尝试进行一次@Check[type:will|dc:17]豁免。豁免成功的生物会在1分钟内获得暂时免疫；否则，它们不会对活骨采取该动作且该动作被浪费，但它们可以通过花费更多动作再次尝试该豁免。若活骨采取了敌对动作，这种安抚辉光会在1分钟内失效，使他人能够轻松地攻击它。

20 feet. Living bones have a glow about them that radiates a positive attitude and soothes the mind of others with a wide, toothy smile. As long as the living bones takes no hostile actions, it exudes a peaceful aura. Creatures in the aura who attempt a hostile action must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:17] save. A creature who succeeds on their saving throw is temporarily immune for 1 minute; otherwise, they don't take the action against the living bones and the action is wasted, but they can attempt the saving throw again by spending more actions. If the living bones takes a hostile action, the soothing glow deactivates for 1 minute, allowing others to attack them with ease.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Merciful Strikes.name: 仁慈打击 Merciful Strikes
Merciful Strikes.description:
活骨的攻击被一圈正能量光晕所环绕。它们的打击额外造成 @Damage[1[vitality]] 伤害，因为赋予它们行动的正能量并未被完全束缚。如同正能量伤害的常规规则，这只会伤害不死生物以及其他具有负向治疗的生物。此外，活骨可以进行非致命攻击而不承受通常的 –2 环境减值。

Living bones' attacks are surrounded by a nimbus of positive energy. Their Strikes deal an extra @Damage[1[vitality]] damage, as the positive energy that animates them is not fully contained. As normal for positive damage, this harms only undead and other creatures with negative healing. Additionally, living bones can make nonlethal attacks without taking the usual –2 circumstance penalty.

Living Bones.publicNotes:
很久才会发生一次，当一具骷髅（特征）接触到正能量时，它们非但不会被伤害或摧毁，反而会发生转化。使它们活动并滋养其憎恨的负能量几乎被完全熄灭，并被正能量取代，创造出某种本不应存在之物。对无心智的不死生物而言，这甚至能在原本不存在之处创造出心智与灵魂。然而，这种状态并不完全稳定，因为它们体内残存的负能量会不断试图压倒其对应的正能量。因此，暴露在大量负能量之下对活骨极为有害。

在更为冷僻的学术圈中，人们就“由正能量驱动的不死生物在技术上是否仍算不死生物”展开了热烈争论，但这对当事个体而言意义不大。它们仍保有先前那副骨质面容，周身环绕着温暖的辉光，这使它们与他人的互动变得相当复杂。但这并不会遮蔽它们阳光的性情；它们不知疲倦地劳作，尽其所能去帮助他人。它们平静而积极的态度使其有机会融入偏远区域的小型社群，尽管这绝非必然。那些成功加入社群者几乎无一例外会选择更为和平的职业：尽管具备武艺能力，仍成为农夫、工匠或医者。

此处给出的数据代表一名被转化的骷髅（特征）冠军，但理论上任何类型的骷髅（特征）（或可能的其他不死生物）都可能受影响。不过，这极其罕见。

两个世界之间

普通骷髅（特征）对活骨的敌意并不像它们对其他活生物那样强烈。那些难以被社会接纳的活骨可能会在存在不死生物行动的地区边界组建自己的社群，定居在活人不敢涉足之地，并为不死生物的入侵提供早期预警。这类社群甚至可能包含动物活骨。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（重型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、交涉、社会）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，敏捷，能量抗性（寒冷、电击、火焰、正能量），善良，正能量，尖刺，力量，坚固，野性

Once in a long while, when a skeleton comes in contact with positive energy, instead of being damaged or destroyed, they are transformed. The negative energy that animates them and feeds their hatred is almost completely extinguished and replaced with positive energy, creating something that shouldn't be possible. For mindless undead, it can even create a mind and soul where there was none. However, this state is not entirely stable, as the remaining negative energy within them constantly tries to overwhelm its counterpart. As such, exposure to significant quantities of negative energy is extremely harmful to living bones.

There is lively debate in the more obscure academic circles on whether or not an undead animated by positive energy is technically still an undead, but this changes little for the individuals in question. They still retain their previous bony visage with a warm glow around them, which makes interaction with other people rather complicated. But this doesn't cloud their sunny disposition, and they toil restlessly to help wherever they can. Their calm and positive attitude gives them a chance to integrate into smaller communities in remote areas, but that is by no means guaranteed. The ones who succeed in joining a community almost inevitably choose more peaceful professions, becoming farmers, artisans, or healers despite their martial capabilities.

The presented statistics represent a skeletal champion that was transformed, but theoretically any type of skeleton (or potentially other undead) can be affected. This is an extremely rare occurrence, though.

Of Two Worlds

Regular skeletons don't respond with as much animosity toward living bones as they do toward other living creatures. Living bones who have a hard time being accepted into societies may form their own communities on the borders of regions with undead activity, settling in places the living wouldn't dare and providing early warnings of undead incursions. Such communities may even include animal living bones.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Diplomacy, Society)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, energy resistant (cold, electricity, fire, positive), good, positive, spiked, strength, sturdy, wild

Lantern Leshy.name: 灯笼莱希 Lantern Leshy

Eternal Flame.name: 永恒之焰 Eternal Flame
Eternal Flame.description:
在创造过程中，一团魔法火焰被点燃在灯笼莱西的头部内部。这团火焰在15英尺半径内创造明亮光照。当灯笼莱西被摧毁时，用来创造这团火焰的那块煤可以作为一枚闪光弹药使用。

During creation a magical fire is lit inside a lantern leshy's head. This fire creates a bright light in a 15-foot radius. When a lantern leshy is destroyed, the piece of coal used to create this flame can be used as a piece of shining ammunition.

Withering Burst.name: 凋零爆发 Withering Burst
Withering Burst.description:
当灯笼莱希被摧毁时，它会在一阵死灵能量的爆炸中炸裂。由于其起源，这股能量只影响植物，对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的每个植物生物造成 @Damage[1d10[void]] 伤害，并需要进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15|basic:true] 豁免。这次爆发会使区域内的植物腐烂，产生一股令人作呕的瘴气，在空气中停留 1 分钟。瘴气持续期间，任何需要呼吸的生物在进入该区域或在该区域内结束其回合时，都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] 豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物对瘴气暂时免疫 1 天。

成功 该生物在本回合不受影响。

失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}。

When a lantern leshy is destroyed, it explodes in a blast of necromantic energy. Due to its origin, this energy only affects plants, doing @Damage[1d10[void]] damage to each plant creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15|basic:true] save. This burst causes plants in the area to rot, creating a disgusting miasma that lingers in the air for 1 minute. Any creature that breathes must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15] save any time it enters or ends its turn in the area while the miasma lasts.

Critical Success The creature is temporarily immune to the miasma for 1 day.

Success The creature is unaffected this turn.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.

Head Toss.name: 头部投掷 Head Toss
Head Toss.description:
灯笼莱希可以移除自己的头并将其掷出以攻击一名敌人。它对一名敌人进行一次头部打击；此能力是它进行头部打击的唯一方式。无论该打击命中或未命中，灯笼莱希或该打击的目标之一方20尺内的任何生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:18] 豁免，否则陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}（在大成功或大失败的失败时为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}）。灯笼莱希的头在被掷出后不会返回，直到它将其取回并重新接上为止。在此之前它处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}，不过它总能精确地感知到自己的头。拾起并重新接上头需要灯笼莱希以一个单一的交互动作来完成，只要该头位于它的触及范围内，它就可以这么做。

The lantern leshy can remove its head and toss it to attack a foe. It makes a head Strike against a foe; this ability is the only way it can make a head Strike. Whether the Strike hits or misses, any creature within 20 feet of either the lantern leshy or the Strike's target must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:18] save or be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1} (@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure). The lantern leshy's head does not return after being thrown until it retrieves and reattaches it. It is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until then, though it always precisely senses its own head. Picking up and reattaching the head requires a single Interact action by the lantern leshy, which it can do as long as the head is within its reach.

Spooky Decorations.name: 诡异装饰品 Spooky Decorations
Spooky Decorations.description:
灯笼莱西倒塌成一堆树枝与枯叶，发光的头部坐落在顶部。遇到处于此形态的灯笼莱西的生物必须成功通过一次对抗其欺骗DC的 @Check[type:perception|dc:resolve(@actor.skills.deception.dc)] 检定，才能识别它并非只是装饰品。此效果持续至其再次使用该动作以恢复其原本形态为止。

The lantern leshy collapses into a pile of sticks and withered leaves with its illuminated head sitting on top. Creatures who come across the lantern leshy in this form must succeed a @Check[type:perception|dc:resolve(@actor.skills.deception.dc)] check against its Deception DC to recognize that it is not simply a decoration. This lasts until it uses this action again to regain its original form.

Lantern Leshy.publicNotes:
树灵的灵体离开其物理躯体的瞬间通常戏剧性十足且会引发爆炸，但那些足够聪明或意志足够坚定的人能够在事后回收树灵的形态，或干脆在一开始就阻止爆炸发生——往往通过魔法手段。一旦收集齐树灵的遗骸，这类人要再进一步将其复活便相对容易。

当作为对象的是葫芦树灵时，结果便是灯笼树灵。灯笼树灵的身体是枯萎藤蔓与叶片纠结成的一团，但它们的葫芦头却出奇地新鲜完整。它们的创造者常在这些头颅上雕刻可怕的面孔、图画或符号，使其更为骇人。当然，一团魔法火焰会从葫芦头内部散发辉光，这也正是灯笼树灵得名的原因。

即便是看起来最友善的灯笼树灵也拥有残忍的智慧，而没有什么能比折磨受害者更令它们快乐。灯笼树灵可能会连续多个夜晚跟踪猎物，玩弄残酷的把戏。最终，它们会对这些游戏感到厌倦并杀死其目标，往往以缓慢且富有创意的方式。

制造灯笼树灵的过程不会让它们与创造者产生任何纽带，因此它们的忠诚度变化极大。灯笼树灵的创造者有时会得到一个相伴终生的邪恶同伴，但也同样常会意外造出自己的杀人者。

更糟糕的“脑内空间”

灯笼树灵仍能像葫芦树灵一样将物体储存在头部内部，但魔法火焰会摧毁可燃物体。灯笼树灵可能携带的典型物品是金属武器与刑讯器具。它们会将这些物体围绕火焰摆放，使火焰将其放大的影子投射到自身面孔上，让受害者在恐惧中预感到接下来它可能施加何等残酷。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（欺瞒、威吓、神秘学、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane，魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，火焰，光，精神，负能量，毒素，力量，投掷，wild

The moment a leshy's spirit leaves its physical body is generally dramatic and explosive, but those clever or driven enough can either salvage the leshy's form afterward or prevent the explosion in the first place, often through magical means. Once the leshy's remains are gathered, it's relatively easy for such individuals to take the next step and reanimate them.

When a gourd leshy is the subject, the result is a lantern leshy. A lantern leshy's body is a tangle of withered vines and leaves, but their gourd heads remain surprisingly fresh and intact. Their creators often carve frightening faces, pictures, or symbols into these heads to make them more terrifying. And of course, a magical fire glows from within the gourd head, giving the lantern leshy its name.

Even the friendliest-looking lantern leshy possesses a vicious intellect, and nothing brings them more joy than tormenting victims. A lantern leshy might stalk their prey multiple nights in a row, playing cruel tricks. Eventually, they grow bored with such games and kill their targets, often in slow and creative ways.

Nothing about the process of creating a lantern leshy bonds them to their creator, and thus their loyalty varies wildly. A lantern leshy's creator gains a lifelong evil companion as often as they accidentally create their own murderer.

A Worse Headspace

A lantern leshy can still store objects in its head in the same manner as a gourd leshy, but the magical flame destroys objects that are flammable. Typical items a lantern leshy might carry are metallic weapons and torture implements. They arrange the objects around the flame so that it casts enlarged shadows of them against its face, giving their victims the terror of anticipating what cruelty it may inflict next.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Deception, Intimidation, Occultism, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, fire, light, mental, negative, poison, strength, throwing, wild

Keyweed.name: 钥草 Keyweed

Clever Vines.name: 灵巧藤蔓 Clever Vines
Clever Vines.description:
钥草至多疾走一次，随后将自身塑形成合适的工具并@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{停用装置}或@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}。为确定它能停用哪些危害之目的，它在巧手上拥有专家熟练度；为确定它能侦测到哪些危害之目的，它在察觉上拥有专家熟练度。

The keyweed Strides up to once, and it then shapes itself into a suitable tool and @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disables a Device} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Picks a Lock}. It has an expert proficiency in Thievery for the purpose of determining what hazards it can disable, and it has an expert proficiency in Perception for the purpose of determining what hazard it can detect.

Freeze.name: 冻结 Freeze
Freeze.description:
直到下一次它行动前，钥草在用于伪装成普通灌木丛的欺瞒与隐匿检定和DC上自动获得30的结果。

Until the next time it acts, the keyweed gets an automatic result of 30 on Deception and Stealth checks and DCs to appear to be an ordinary shrubbery.

Puffball.name: 马勃 Puffball
Puffball.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 钥叶草在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内散播孢子云团，其持续 1 轮。在持续时间内，区域内所有生物均为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{隐蔽}，并且所有其他生物对它们也处于隐蔽状态。处于区域内、且在钥叶草首次射出孢子球时在区域内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] 豁免，并产生以下效果。钥叶草免疫该效果。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{反胃 1}。

大失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{反胃 2}，并在其仍处于反胃状态时陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{迟缓 1}。

Frequency once per day

Effect The keyweed scatters spore puffs in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], which remain for 1 round. For the duration, all creatures in the area are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. Creatures in the area when the keyweed first shoots out the Puffball must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] save, with the following effects. Keyweeds are immune to this effect.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} as long as it remains sickened.

Snagging Strike.name: 绊制打击 Snagging Strike
Snagging Strike.description:
钥草进行一次藤蔓打击。若该次打击命中，目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} 状态，直到钥草下个回合开始，或直到目标不再处于其藤蔓的触及范围内，以先发生者为准。

The keyweed makes a vine Strike. If this Strike hits, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until the start of the keyweed's next turn or until it's no longer within the reach of its vine, whichever comes first.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭攻击 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
钥草的打击对措手不及的生物造成额外1d6点精准伤害。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

The keyweed's Strikes deal 1d6 extra precision damage to flat- footed creatures.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]

Keyweed.publicNotes:
钥草是体型很小、不起眼的灌木丛，被赋予了移动能力，并拥有将叶片与藤蔓折叠起来的卓越本领。这使它们能够操纵锁与其他装置，并潜入城市环境——而它们对此乐在其中。

尽管钥草具有智慧，并且能够熟练地用手语交流，但大多数钥草对其所居住的城市的政治与社会并不怎么感兴趣。它们清楚自己在意什么，并始终如一：它们会寻找自己能找到的最棘手的锁，并学习如何打开它们。随后，它们将开启这些锁所需的奇特藤蔓扭转动作作为求偶展示。它们通常会在隐蔽地点练习，比如废弃且杂草丛生的建筑物，但也有传闻说，一些年轻的游荡者会专门寻找这些地方来观看与学习。

钥草是称职的战斗者，但往往会回避对抗，更倾向于躲藏并避免不必要的危险。想把一株正在探查自己安保措施的钥草逼入绝境相当困难。当真的被逼到角落时，惊慌的钥草常会使用它们的孢子绒球来制造干扰，从而趁机逃脱。

钥草的起源晦涩难明，且几乎可以确定并非完全自然。传奇称，是一位冒险者-德鲁伊为了向一位游荡者朋友证明：城市在原初魔法面前不值一提。无论真假，德鲁伊们都发现钥草作为仆从相当有用。大多数钥草与德鲁伊的关系尤其融洽，但即便如此，它们也并不受德鲁伊支配。

一些盗贼公会设法与一株或多株钥草建立了合作关系，在劫掠行动中招募钥草担任开保险柜者或撬锁者，并以提供特殊的小装置供钥草把玩作为报酬。

钥草是一类小型植物家族，以会进行古怪且出人意料的活动而闻名，例如撬开锁、与其他生物并肩游泳，甚至用音乐来安抚亡者的灵体。这个名称既指该家族，也指家族中最著名的成员——名为“钥草”的生物：一种热爱撬锁并使装置失效的植物。

尽管钥草的起源并不完全清楚，许多学者仍逐渐相信流传最广的那些传奇：钥草是由德鲁伊创造出来的，用以填补多种非同寻常的生态位，而这些生态位可能没有其他植物能胜任。也存在其他理论，包括一些学者认为钥草原本是类人生物，因自然神祇的祝福或诅咒而变形为植物。例如，父母对那些被抓到偷拿东西的小孩讲的一个童话是：如果他们行为不端并偷窃他人之物，绿人可能会在夜里来到家中，将他们变形成一株钥草，把他们永远带进森林，再也见不到自己的家人。

钥草与莱西之间有一种基于相似与差异的特殊关系。两者都是小型、有智慧的植物生物；如果这些故事属实，它们都源自德鲁伊的魔法。然而，莱西是自然灵体，或称“vitae”，通过一场原初仪式直接在凡俗的植物躯体中化身。尽管它们的祖先可能由德鲁伊创造，钥草自始至终都是凡俗植物——像任何其他植物一样活着、繁衍、并死亡。

钥草伙伴关系

尚未成为缠结体的年轻钥草往往仍与阴谋诡计的复杂纠葛保持距离，但它们仍比某些其他种类的植物生物更具社交性，并享受伙伴相伴——无论是与其他植物还是非植物。钥草尤其喜欢与德鲁伊以及其他拥有原初魔法的生物一起闲逛。与钥草相处过一段时间的伙伴常会发现这位新朋友的视角古怪且难以预测，不过有时也相当令人耳目一新，尤其是与他们习以为常的遭遇相比。冒险者伙伴认为钥草的技能尤其有用，因为锁、陷阱与装置可能会成为缺少游荡者或其他擅长排除此类阻碍之专家的队伍的障碍。钥草会从伙伴那里慢慢了解周遭世界，这种援助能帮助它们获得某天成为缠结体钥草所需的成长（既包括身体也包括心理）。通过让自己接触多种多样的观点，它们能提高成长速度，并确保自己在缠结体钥草的行列中备受尊敬。

钥草纪念品

钥草有时喜欢保留自己过去成就的实体纪念物，比如留着自己第一次撬开的那把锁，或第一次撬开保险柜时从里面取出的某样东西。这可能会让一名冒险者偶然发现一批令人困惑、彼此看似毫不相关的小玩意宝藏。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

可用精炼项 武器（钝击），护甲（光），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、制作、社交、隐秘、盗窃）

可用注入属性 破敌，混沌，魅力，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），毒素，野性

Keyweeds are small, inconspicuous shrubberies gifted with locomotion and a remarkable ability to fold their leaves and vines. This enables them to manipulate locks and other devices and infiltrate urban environments, which they do gleefully.

Although keyweeds are sapient and are able to communicate fluently in sign language, most keyweeds aren't deeply interested in the politics and societies of the cities they inhabit. They know what interests them, and they stick to that: they seek out the trickiest locks they can find and learn to open them. Then, they use the peculiar vine-twistings required as a mating display. They usually practice this in discreet locations such as abandoned and overgrown buildings, but there are stories of young rogues who seek out these places to watch and learn.

Keyweeds are capable combatants but tend to avoid confrontation, preferring to hide and avoid unnecessary danger. Cornering a keyweed that's been probing one's security measures can be quite difficult. When so cornered, a panicked keyweed often uses their spore puffball in order to create a distraction, allowing them to escape.

The origins of keyweeds are obscure and almost certainly not entirely natural. Legend holds that it was an adventurer-druid who wished to make a point to a roguish friend about how cities had nothing on primal magic. Whether that's true or not, druids have found that keyweeds are quite useful minions. Most keyweeds get along especially well with druids, but even so, they are not beholden to them.

Some thieves' guilds have managed to establish a working relationship with one or more keyweeds, enlisting the keyweeds in heists to serve as safecrackers or lockpickers and paying the keyweeds by giving them special contraptions to play with.

Keyweeds are a family of diminutive plants who are known to perform quirky and unexpected activities, such as breaking into locks, swimming alongside other creatures, or even creating music to calm the spirits of the dead. The name refers to both the family as well as the most famous member of the family, the creature known as keyweed, a plant that loves to pick locks and disable devices.

While keyweeds' origin aren't entirely clear, many scholars have come to believe the most widely spread legends, which tell that keyweeds were created by druids to fulfill a variety of unusual niches where no other plants possibly could. Other theories exist, including those of some scholars who believe that keyweeds were originally humanoids who transformed into plants due to the blessing or curse of a deity of nature. For instance, one fairy tale parents tell to little children who are caught filching something is that if they misbehave and steal from others, the Green Man might come to the house at night and transform them into a keyweed, spiriting them away into the woods forever, never to see their families again.

Keyweeds have an unusual relationship with leshies based on their similarities and differences. Both are small sapient plant creatures, and if the stories are true, both originated from druidic magic, but leshies are nature spirits, or vitae, that directly incarnated in a mortal plant body through a primal ritual. While their progenitors might have been created by druids, keyweeds are mortal plants through and through, living, reproducing, and dying just like any other plant does.

Keyweed Companionship

While younger keyweeds that haven't yet become convolute tend to remain separated from the complexities of intrigue, they are still more social than some other kinds of plant creatures and enjoy companionship, both with other plants as well as non-plants. Keyweeds especially enjoy hanging out with druids and other creatures with primal magic. Companions who've spent time with a keyweed often find their new friend's perspective unusual and difficult to predict, though sometimes quite refreshing compared to what they are used to encountering. Adventuring companions consider keyweeds' skills especially useful, as locks, traps, and devices can prove an impediment to parties without a rogue or other expert in those types of impediments. Slowly, keyweeds learn more about the world around them from their companions, which aids them in the growth (both physical and psychological) that they need in order to become a convolute keyweed some day. By exposing themselves to a broad variety of perspectives, they increase their rate of growth and ensure that they will become especially well-respected among the ranks of convolute keyweeds.

Keyweed Keepsakes

Keyweeds sometimes like to keep physical mementos of their past accomplishments, such as hanging onto the first lock they ever picked or something from inside the first safe they cracked. These can lead an adventurer to come across a bewildering trove of otherwise unrelated knickknacks.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Crafting, Society, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), poison, wild

Kolufs Krafsa.name: 科卢夫的克拉夫萨 Kolufs Krafsa
Kolufs Krafsa.tokenName: 科卢夫的克拉夫萨 Kolufs Krafsa

Split Ends.name: 分叉发梢 Split Ends
Split Ends.description:
触发 kolufs krafsa被一名拥有毛发的哺乳类类人生物的攻击造成重击

效果 因被分心而愤怒地反击，kolufs krafsa迫使触发生物的毛发撕裂并变得毛躁，同时向其展示自身被诅咒变形为kolufs krafsa的视野。触发生物必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免中成功，否则将陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} 且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} 持续1轮。

Trigger The kolufs krafsa is critically hit by an attack from a mammalian humanoid who possesses hair

Effect Retaliating in anger for being distracted, the kolufs krafsa forces the triggering creature's hair to tear and frizz up while showing visions of its own cursed transformation into a kolufs krafsa. The triggering creature must succeed a @Check[type:will|dc:21] save or be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

Clinging Grab.name: 黏附抓握 Clinging Grab
Clinging Grab.description:
科卢夫斯·克拉夫萨紧贴着其@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{被擒抱}的受害者。此举使其进入它所擒抱的中型或更小生物的同一空间，或进入大型或更大生物空间中的一个方格。科卢夫斯·克拉夫萨一次只能擒抱单一生物，并且当科卢夫斯·克拉夫萨正在擒抱一名生物时，科卢夫斯·克拉夫萨处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 2}状态。

The kolufs krafsa clings to its @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} victim. This causes it to enter the same space as a Medium or smaller creature it has grabbed, or one square of a Large or larger creature's space. The kolufs krafsa can only have a single creature grabbed, and while the kolufs krafsa is grabbing a creature, the kolufs krafsa is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}.

Curse of the Kolufs Krafsa.name: 科鲁夫斯·克拉夫萨的诅咒 Curse of the Kolufs Krafsa
Curse of the Kolufs Krafsa.description:
该诅咒只影响哺乳类人形生物。

豁免 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免

效果 每天夜里入睡前，受诅咒的生物都会感觉到自己的身体正在变化，头发也开始变得陌生且具有侵扰性。他们会把自己的头发一把把扯下来，直到入睡，并在睡眠中@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷}般地继续这样做。受诅咒的生物承受 @Damage[2d10[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21|basic:true] 豁免；此效果为非致命。他们还会在醒来时获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued}。如果诅咒使该生物降至0生命值，或该生物被诅咒持续整整一个月，该生物将完全变形为一只kolufs krafsa。

The curse affects only mammalian humanoids.

Saving Throw @Check[type:will|dc:21] save

Effect Each night before going to sleep, the cursed creature feels their body changing, and their hair begins to feel foreign and invasive. They tear their own hair out until they fall asleep, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious}ly continue to do so as they sleep. The cursed creature takes @Damage[2d10[piercing]] damage with a @Check[type:will|dc:21|basic:true] save; this effect is nonlethal. They also awaken @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued}. If the curse brings the creature to 0 Hit Points, or if the creature remains cursed for a full month, the creature fully transforms into a kolufs krafsa.

Tearing the Hair.name: 撕扯头发 Tearing the Hair
Tearing the Hair.description:
需求 kolufs krafsa抓住了一名拥有毛发的哺乳类类人生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

效果 kolufs krafsa猛烈地将其抓住的生物的毛发撕扯下来。该生物受到 @Damage[2d6[piercing]] 伤害与 [[/r 1d6[persistent,bleed]]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并暴露于Kolufs Krasa的诅咒。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并暴露于Kolufs Krasa的诅咒，且该诅咒的初始豁免改为 @Check[type:will|dc:21|traits:curse,occult,transmutation] 而非DC 21。

Requirements The kolufs krafsa has a mammalian humanoid who possesses hair @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

Effect The kolufs krafsa violently rips the hair off of the creature it has grabbed. The creature takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage and [[/r 1d6[persistent,bleed]]] damage, with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is exposed to Curse of the Kolufs Krasa.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is exposed to Curse of the Kolufs Krasa, and the curse's initial save is @Check[type:will|dc:21|traits:curse,occult,transmutation] instead of DC 21.

Kolufs Krafsa.publicNotes:
Kolufs krafsa 是一种哺乳类类人生物，受一种怪异的诅咒影响，这种诅咒会将它们变形为另一种存在——在通往某种可怖而崭新之物的道路上所经历的蛹状阶段。作为变成非哺乳类生物这一变形过程的一部分，所有 kolufs krafsa 的毛发都会脱落。对于矮人等极为看重浓密光泽胡须的族裔而言，这种诅咒尤其骇人。

奇怪的是，kolufs krafsa 并不总是随机选择受害者。尽管诅咒在它们体内滋长着邪恶，它们却更偏好攻击那些确实罪有应得的人。因此，许多 kolufs krafsa 会回应受压迫的平民的恳求。kolufs krafsa 会倾听那些呼唤其名之人的请求，并在夜深人静时打击其目标。它会将受害者剖割肢解，而那些被它杀死的“幸运儿”因摆脱了生物的诅咒而得以解脱。那些在与 kolufs krafsa 的遭遇中幸存的人，则必须为无眠之夜做好准备：他们会扯掉自己的头发直到精疲力竭，同时身体变形成新的 kolufs krafsa。

以恶制恶并非正道

一些 kolufs krafsa 会去寻找狼人等兽化生物，让对方咬自己。它们希望新的诅咒能反制当前的诅咒，或至少帮助它们重新长出毛发。遗憾的是，它们最终只是双重受诅咒、无毛的怪物，在夜里游荡，甚至连道德罗盘也不再能带来半点慰藉。

建议的怪物素材

怪物素材 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（运动、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 体质、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、力量、野性

Kolufs krafsas are mammalian humanoids afflicted with a bizarre curse that transforms them into something else, a pupal stage on the path to something terrifying and new. As a part of that transformation into a nonmammalian creature, all the kolufs krafsa's hair falls out. For ancestries like dwarves that place great value on their thick, lustrous beards, the curse is especially horrifying.

Curiously, kolufs krafsas don't always choose their victims randomly. Despite the burgeoning evil of the curse within them, they prefer to attack those who truly deserve it. Because of that, many kolufs krafsas respond to the pleas of oppressed commoners. A kolufs krafsa listens to those who invoke its name and strikes its victim in the quiet of the night. It carves up its victims, killing the lucky ones as they are free from the creature's curse. Those who survive an encounter with a kolufs krafsa must prepare for sleepless nights, tearing their hair out to the point of exhaustion as their body transforms into a new kolufs krafsa.

Two Wrongs Don't Make A Right

Some kolufs krafsas seek out werecreatures to bite them. They hope that the new curse will counteract their current one, or at the very least help them grow hair again. Sadly, they just end up doubly cursed, hairless monstrosities who roam the night without even their moral compass for consolation.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties constitution, energy resistant (positive), evil, strength, wild
Kolufs Krafsa.prototypeToken: 科卢夫的克拉夫萨 Kolufs Krafsa

Kelpsteed.name: 海藻坐骑 Kelpsteed

Kelpsteed Venom.name: 海藻坐骑毒液 Kelpsteed Venom
Kelpsteed Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最大持续时间 4轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害（1轮）

阶段 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{虚弱 1}（1轮）。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round).

Hoist.name: 升起 Hoist
Hoist.description:
海藻坐骑游入相邻一名自愿的中型或更小生物所在的方格，然后以一种类似带鳍斗篷的方式缠绕在对方身上。当海藻坐骑以这种方式被举起时，被其举起到的生物获得30英尺的游泳速度；这不会以其他方式妨碍该生物。当被海藻坐骑举起到的生物移动时，海藻坐骑也随之移动；这是强迫移动。被举起期间，海藻坐骑无法移动或使用其擒抱动作，并且海藻坐骑处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{迟缓 1}。海藻坐骑可以再次使用此动作来将自己解开。

The kelpsteed Swims into the square of an adjacent willing Medium or smaller creature, and then wraps itself around them in a way reminiscent of a finned cloak. While the kelpsteed is hoisted in this way, the creature to which they're hoisted gains a Swim speed of 30 feet; this doesn't otherwise hinder the creature. When the creature the kelpsteed is hoisted to moves, the kelpsteed is moved with it; this is forced movement. While hoisted the kelpsteed can't move or use their Grab action, and the kelpsteed is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}. The kelpsteed can use this action again to detach themselves.

Kelpsteed.publicNotes:
海藻坐骑是好奇、具智慧的植物，渴望见识整个水下世界。然而它们的体型相对纤细，单独行动时游得并不快。海藻坐骑之名源于它们克服这一点的方式：它们喜欢与更强壮的生物结成伙伴关系，并赋予对方机动性，好让双方能一同抵达遥远的奇观。

大多数学者将海藻坐骑归类为与匙草同一类的植物生物家族（同名的“匙草”家族），据说也是进取的德鲁伊所创造的另一种产物。依照传奇，这些德鲁伊在某次古老的海洋冲突期间需要一种方法，让他们的盟友能从一处运送到另一处——理论大致如此。海洋德鲁伊至今仍常与海藻坐骑结伴，但海藻坐骑意志自由，往往会讨价还价以换取回报，例如寄望城对方承诺前往海藻坐骑想探索的地点旅行。

水手们将海藻坐骑视为吉凶参半的征兆。它们确实能帮助人们在水下快速移动，但并不会提供吐息的能力。流传着一些骇人的故事：水手被幼年海藻坐骑拖入深处，在它们的纠缠中溺亡——这些幼体只是想找个伙伴。这也可能与凯尔皮混为一谈；凯尔皮是邪恶的类植物马，会故意淹死他人。在更热带的水域里，水手们学会像与海豚同游那样与海藻坐骑一同游泳：浮上海面深深吸入空气的吐息，然后迅速继续前进。

海藻坐骑通常没有自己独立的社群；它们往往与游泳伙伴为伍。它们能从数英里外嗅到气味踪迹，判断附近是否有其他海藻坐骑；一旦如此，它们常会鼓励伙伴前去会合。对海藻坐骑而言，这是结识新朋友与配偶并交换故事的时代。海藻坐骑能活上许多几十年；若有人学会一种相容的手语，它们往往能分享覆盖广阔区域的学识。

匙草是一类体型极小的植物家族，以进行古怪且出人意料的活动而闻名，例如撬开锁、与其他生物并游，甚至创作音乐以安抚亡者的灵体。这个名字既指该家族，也指家族中最著名的成员——名为“匙草”的生物：一种热衷于撬锁与解除装置的植物。

尽管匙草的起源并不完全清楚，许多学者已开始相信流传最广的传奇：匙草是德鲁伊为了填补各种其他植物都无法胜任的奇特生态位而创造的。也存在其他理论，例如有些学者认为匙草原本是类人生物，由于自然神祇的祝福或诅咒而变形为植物。比如，父母常对被抓到顺手牵羊的小孩讲的一个童话是：若他们行为不端、偷窃他人之物，绿人可能会在夜里来到家中，将他们变形成匙草，把他们带入森林永远带走，再也无法见到家人。

匙草与莱西之间基于相似与差异而形成一种不寻常的关系。两者都是小型、具智慧的植物生物；若传闻属实，两者都源自德鲁伊的魔法。但莱西是自然灵体，或称“生命灵（vitae）”，通过一场原初仪式直接在凡俗的植物躯体中化身。尽管它们的始祖或许由德鲁伊创造，匙草从头到尾都是凡俗植物：如同其他任何植物一样活着、繁殖，并最终死亡。

海藻坐骑与凯尔皮

海藻坐骑通常友善、好奇，并愿意与任何想与它们同游的人交朋友。然而，它们对被称为凯尔皮的邪恶马形妖精怀有深刻仇恨。这份憎恨源于：凯尔皮同样外貌类植物，却会用欺诈与强迫手段诱使猎物在水中骑乘自己，随后将受害者淹死并吞食。这导致海藻坐骑被误解为凯尔皮，从而遭到潜在新朋友的不信任——甚至有时会被攻击。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 3.5/7/13 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（光）、技能物品（特技动作、学识[海洋]、自然、求生）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害、混沌、魅力、体质、延展、能量抗性（正能量）、毒素、力量、野性

Kelpsteeds are curious, sapient plants with a drive to see the whole underwater world. They have relatively slight frames, however, and on their own they can't swim very fast. Kelpsteeds take their name from the way they overcome this: they like to form a partnership with a sturdier creature and provide it with the mobility to get to faraway marvels together.

Most scholars classify kelpsteeds into the same family of plant creatures as keyweeds (the eponymous "keyweed" family), another supposed creation of enterprising druids. According to legend, these druids needed a way to transport their allies from place to place during some ancient oceanic conflict, or so the theory goes. Marine druids still often partner with kelpsteeds, but kelpsteeds are free-willed and often bargain for something in return, such as a promise to travel to places the kelpsteed wishes to explore.

Kelpsteeds are seen as a mixed omen by sailors. While they can help one get around quickly underwater, they don't provide the ability to breathe. Grisly stories circulate of sailors being pulled down into the depths and drowning in the grip of young kelpsteeds who were just looking for a partner. This can be conflated with kelpies, malevolent plantlike horses that intentionally drown others. In more tropical waters, sailors have learned to swim with kelpsteeds much like dolphins, surfacing for deep breaths of air and then swiftly swimming on.

Kelpsteeds don't usually have separate communities of their own; they tend to keep company with a swimming partner. They're able to pick up scent trails from many miles away, indicating other kelpsteeds are in the area, and when they do, they often encourage their partners to rendezvous. For kelpsteeds, this is a time to meet new friends and mates and to swap stories. Kelpsteeds can live for many decades, and if someone learns a compatible sign language, they can often share lore covering a vast region.

Keyweeds are a family of diminutive plants who are known to perform quirky and unexpected activities, such as breaking into locks, swimming alongside other creatures, or even creating music to calm the spirits of the dead. The name refers to both the family as well as the most famous member of the family, the creature known as keyweed, a plant that loves to pick locks and disable devices.

While keyweeds' origin aren't entirely clear, many scholars have come to believe the most widely spread legends, which tell that keyweeds were created by druids to fulfill a variety of unusual niches where no other plants possibly could. Other theories exist, including those of some scholars who believe that keyweeds were originally humanoids who transformed into plants due to the blessing or curse of a deity of nature. For instance, one fairy tale parents tell to little children who are caught filching something is that if they misbehave and steal from others, the Green Man might come to the house at night and transform them into a keyweed, spiriting them away into the woods forever, never to see their families again.

Keyweeds have an unusual relationship with leshies based on their similarities and differences. Both are small sapient plant creatures, and if the stories are true, both originated from druidic magic, but leshies are nature spirits, or vitae, that directly incarnated in a mortal plant body through a primal ritual. While their progenitors might have been created by druids, keyweeds are mortal plants through and through, living, reproducing, and dying just like any other plant does.

Kelpsteeds And Kelpies

Kelpsteeds are generally friendly, curious, and willing to make friends with anyone who wishes to swim with them. However, they hold a deep enmity for the malevolent equine fey known as kelpies. This hatred comes about because kelpies, which also have a plantlike appearance, use trickery and compulsion to fool their prey into riding in the water with them, only to drown and devour their victim. This leads to kelpsteeds being mistrusted—and even sometimes attacked—by potential new friends who mistake them for kelpies.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), skill items (Acrobatics, Lore [Ocean], Nature, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), poison, strength, wild

Kayman Bacoo.name: 开曼巴库 Kayman Bacoo

Rum Weakness.name: 朗姆酒弱点 Rum Weakness
Rum Weakness.description:
酒精能迅速制服凯曼巴库。凯曼巴库免疫酒精成瘾，但其对抗酒精的每次强韧豁免都视为比其掷出的结果低一个成功等级。当其正遭受酒精的效果影响时，凯曼巴库获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢（状态）}，其数值等于该酒精的毒素阶段。若凯曼巴库的缓慢（状态）达到或超过3，则其陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷}，持续[[/br 2d4 #hours]]{2d4小时}。凯曼巴库倾向于饮用任何他人提供给它的酒精饮品。

Alcohol quickly subdues kayman bacoos. A kayman bacoo is immune to alcohol addiction but treats every Fortitude saving throw against alcohol as one degree of success worse than they rolled. While suffering from the effects of alcohol, a kayman bacoo gains the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} condition with a value equal to the alcohol's poison stage. If a kayman bacoo's slowed condition equals or exceeds 3, they fall @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious} for [[/br 2d4 #hours]]{2d4 hours}. A kayman bacoo is inclined to drink any alcohol they are offered.

Toothy Grin.name: 利齿狞笑 Toothy Grin
Toothy Grin.description:
触发 凯门巴库对敌人的豁免掷骰获得大成功或大失败，或敌人对凯门巴库的攻击掷骰获得大成功或大失败

效果 鳄鱼般的微笑令那些失败取悦了凯门巴库幽默感的人困惑并恐惧。触发的敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免。之后，触发的敌人获得 1 分钟的暂时免疫。

大成功或大失败：成功 触发的敌人不受影响。

成功 触发的敌人获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{恐惧 1}。

失败 触发的敌人获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{恐惧 2}，并在 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}内获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{迟钝 1}。

大成功或大失败：失败 触发的敌人获得 恐惧 2 与 迟钝 1，持续 1 分钟。

Trigger The kayman bacoo critically succeeds on a saving throw against a foe, or a foe's attack roll critically fails against the kayman bacoo

Effect A crocodile smile confounds and frightens those whose failure piques the kayman bacoo's humor. The triggering foe must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:21] save. Afterwards, the triggering foe is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The triggering foe is unaffected.

Success The triggering foe is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The triggering foe is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The triggering foe is frightened 2 and stupefied 1 for 1 minute.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Glitterdust.name: 闪光尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
区域内的生物会被闪烁的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。如果某个生物的隐形被此法术抵消，则其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，而非 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这既适用于该生物原本就处于隐形状态的情况，也适用于其在本法术的隐形抵消效果结束前从新的隐形效果中获益的情况。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消2轮。

失败 目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态1分钟，且其隐形被抵消1分钟。

大失败 目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 状态1轮，并目眩10分钟。其隐形被抵消10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Vomit Swarm.name: 呕吐虫群 Vomit Swarm
Vomit Swarm.description:
你喷吐出一团魔法虫群。你从自己的想象中唤起并塑造这些生物，使你能够改变这些生物的外观（通常是蜈蚣、蟑螂、黄蜂与蠕虫的混合），但这不会改变该法术的效果。害虫会爬满区域内的任何人，它们的啃咬与蛰刺造成[[/r 2d8[piercing]]]伤害（基础反射豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。一旦法术结束，虫群就会消失。

升阶（+1） 将伤害提高[[/r 1d8[piercing]]]。

You belch forth a swarm of magical vermin. You evoke and shape the creatures from your own imagination, allowing you to change the appearance of the creatures (typically a mix of centipedes, roaches, wasps, and worms), but this doesn't change the effect of the spell. The vermin swarm over anyone in the area, their bites and stings dealing [[/r 2d8[piercing]]] damage (basic Reflex save). A creature that fails its saving throw also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. Once the spell ends, the swarm disappears.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by [[/r 1d8[piercing]]].

Jump.name: 跳跃 Jump
Jump.description:
你的双腿迸发出力量，随时准备高跳远跃。你可以向任意方向跳跃30英尺而不接触地面。你必须在距离你30英尺内的坚实地面空间着陆，否则在你使用下一个动作后你会坠落。

升阶（3环） 射程变为接触，目标改为1个被接触的生物，持续时间变为1分钟，使目标在每次执行“跃步”动作时，都能如上所述进行跳跃。

Your legs surge with strength, ready to leap high and far. You jump 30 feet in any direction without touching the ground. You must land on a space of solid ground within 30 feet of you, or else you fall after using your next action.

Heightened (3rd) The range becomes touch, the target changes to one touched creature, and the duration becomes 1 minute, allowing the target to jump as described whenever it takes the Leap action.

Mud Pit.name: 泥坑 Mud Pit
Mud Pit.description:
厚重且黏附的泥浆覆盖着地面，深达1英尺。泥浆是困难地形。

Thick, clinging mud covers the ground, 1 foot deep. The mud is difficult terrain.

Pest Form.name: 害虫形态 Pest Form
Pest Form.description:
你变形为微型动物的战斗形态，例如猫、昆虫、蜥蜴或老鼠。你可以决定具体的动物类型（例如老鼠或螳螂），但这不会影响该形态的体型或数据。处于此形态时，你获得动物（特征），且你不能进行打击。你可以解消该法术。

你获得以下数据与能力：

  • AC = 15 + 你的等级。忽略你的护甲的检定减值与速度减值。
  • 速度 20 尺。
  • 对物理伤害弱点 5。（如果你在此形态下受到物理伤害，你会额外受到 5 点伤害。）
  • 昏暗视野与不精确的嗅觉 30 尺。
  • 特技与隐匿调整值为 +10，除非你自身的调整值更高；运动调整值 -4。

升阶（4环） 你可以变为一种会飞的生物，例如鸟，这会赋予你 20 尺的飞行速度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ydsLEGjY89Akc4oZ]{法术效果：害虫形态}

You transform into the battle form of a Tiny animal, such as a cat, insect, lizard, or rat. You can decide the specific type of animal (such as a rat or praying mantis), but this has no effect on the form's Size or statistics. While in this form, you gain the animal trait and you can't make Strikes. You can Dismiss the spell.

You gain the following statistics and abilities:

  • AC = 15 + your level. Ignore your armor's check penalty and Speed reduction.
  • Speed 20 feet.
  • Weakness 5 to physical damage. (If you take physical damage in this form, you take 5 additional damage.)
  • Low-light vision and imprecise scent 30 feet.
  • Acrobatics and Stealth modifiers of +10, unless your own modifier is higher; Athletics modifier -4.

Heightened (4th) You can turn into a flying creature, such as a bird, which grants you a fly Speed of 20 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ydsLEGjY89Akc4oZ]{Spell Effect: Pest Form}

Restyle.name: 重新调整样式 Restyle
Restyle.description:
你永久改变你或一名盟友当前穿着的一件衣物的外观，使其更符合你的审美偏好。你可以改变其颜色、质地、图案以及设计中的其他细微部分，但这些改变不能改变该衣物的整体形状、体型或用途。这些改变不能提升这件衣物的工艺或艺术品质，但若为新颜色与图案做出特别俗气的选择，可能会降低其美观度。此法术将现有材料变形为所需的外观，且绝不会改变材料本身，也不会创造出比该物体原本组成部分更多的材料。该物体的数据也保持不变。

You permanently change the appearance of one piece of clothing currently worn by you or an ally to better fit your aesthetic sensibilities. You can change its color, texture, pattern, and other minor parts of its design, but the changes can't alter the clothing's overall shape, size, or purpose. The changes can't increase the quality of the craftsmanship or artistry of the piece of clothing, but particularly gauche choices for the new color and pattern might decrease its aesthetic appeal. This spell transforms existing materials into the desired appearance and never alters the material or creates more material than what's originally part of the object. The object's statistics also remain unchanged.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光点，且任意两个之间相距不超过10尺。每个光点都像火把一样发出光。当你维持法术时，你可以将任意数量的光点移动至多60尺。每个光点必须始终在你120尺范围内，且与所有其他光点保持在10尺内，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Spout.name: 喷吐 Spout
Spout.description:
区域 5尺立方或5尺爆发

水向上喷涌，从地面涌出、从水池中升起，甚至从稀薄的空气中显现。区域内的任何生物受到等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的钝击伤害，进行一次基础反射豁免。

你可以将此法术的区域改为5尺爆发，但你必须将该爆发的中心置于一片水域中。该水域可以小到池塘或小溪，但不能小到水坑或浴缸。

升阶 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

Area 5-foot cube or 5-foot burst

Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air. Any creatures in the area take bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Reflex saving throw.

You can change this spell's area to a 5-foot burst, provided you center the burst in a body of water. This body of water can be as small as a pond or creek, but not as small as a puddle or bathtub.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Kayman Bacoo.publicNotes:
在妖精界被洪水淹没的海岸线上，妖精红树林森林的根系向深处延伸，缠绕着物质位面对应红树林的根系。很久以前，被称为巴库（bacoo）的妖精沿着这些根爬入物质位面，想看看凡人如何行事。当他们目睹物质位面的冷酷与残暴时，巴库们认定这些人一定是被当作一个残忍的玩笑才放在这里的。其中一些自称为开曼巴库（kayman bacoo）的家伙，从朗姆酒的甜蜜谎言中找到了最多的幽默。

开曼巴库是小型鳄类妖精，以暴躁的脾气与尖刻的幽默感官为特征。对开曼巴库而言，供奉朗姆酒、甜食或血肉，是他们愿意让当地人类获得片刻安宁的唯一理由。他们热爱朗姆酒，尽管酒量很差，却仍拒绝克制自己的口腹之欲。

白天，他们懒散地躺在小村庄或其他人类聚居地边缘的树上，常常在宿醉中醒转。但到了夜里，开曼巴库会在屋檐下游荡，寻找那些可能在喝朗姆酒却没先分给他们一口的聚会者或寻欢作乐的人。当他们闻到某人吐息中的朗姆酒气味时，会悄无声息地排在其身后，试图一路尾随到对方家中。若被发现，他们会用诸如“出来喝一杯？有给我留吗？”之类的话质问他们的猎物。

生活在开曼巴库出没的区域的人都知道，若不在门口留下一份朗姆酒供奉，最好别去狂欢或举办派对。聪明的本地人便能如实回答：他们已经把朗姆酒留给妖精了。任何措手不及的人都必须做出选择：要么邀请开曼巴库进来喝一杯，要么承受他们的怒火。开曼巴库很快就会屈服于酒精的镇静效果，但他们对“派对”的理解通常包含粪便主题的恶作剧，以及对喧闹魔法的极度滥用。

多数社群容忍本地的开曼巴库，因为它们会消灭老鼠和其他害兽。即便人们不喜欢这些满身鳞片的邻居，想把这些贪吃的妖精赶走通常也超出了地方当局的能力范围。

巴库角色

开曼巴库是若干种被称为巴库（bacoo）的近亲妖精之一，这些妖精喜欢诸如朗姆酒、香蕉与牛奶之类的食物与饮料供奉。关于扮演巴库PC的完整规则，请参阅World of Battlezoo: Indigo Isles!

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉物品，技能物品（Acrobatics，Intimidation，Nature，Performance，Stealth，Thievery）

可用灌注属性 bane，魅力，敏捷，earth，energy resistant（positive），evil，智力，光，mental，法术（Primal: dancing lights, glitterdust, jump, mud pit, pest form, restyle, spout, vomit swarm），water，wild

On the flooded coasts of the fey realm, the roots of fey mangrove forests reach deep to entangle the roots of Material Plane counterparts. Long ago, fey called bacoos climbed the roots into the Material Plane to see how mortals behaved. When they witnessed the callousness and brutality of the Material Plane, bacoos decided the people must have been put here as a cruel joke. Some, who called themselves kayman bacoos, found the most humor in the sweet lies of rum.

Kayman bacoos are small crocodilian fey characterized by wild tempers and prickly senses of humor. To kayman bacoos, offerings of rum, sweets, or flesh are the only reasons to grant the local humans any peace. They love rum despite their low tolerance for drink and refuse to restrain their appetites.

By day, they lounge in the trees bordering small villages or other human settlements, often nursing hangovers. But by night, kayman bacoos stalk the eaves, looking for partygoers or merrymakers who might be drinking rum without offering them a sip first. When they smell rum on someone's breath, they silently fall into line behind them and attempt to follow them home. If noticed, they ask their prey some variation of "Out for a drink? Did you leave me any?"

Those who live in an area haunted by kayman bacoos know better than to go carousing or host a party without leaving an offering of rum on their doorstep. Wise locals can then answer truthfully that they have left rum out for the fey. Anyone caught unprepared must make a choice: either invite the kayman bacoos in for a drink or suffer their wrath. Kayman bacoos quickly succumb to the sedative effects of alcohol, but their idea of what constitutes a party typically involves scatological pranks and profound overapplication of rowdy magic.

Most communities tolerate their local kayman bacoos because they exterminate rats and other pests. Even if they don't appreciate their scaly neighbors, driving off these gluttonous fey usually proves beyond the means of the local authorities.

Bacoo Characters

Kayman bacoo are one of several types of related fey called bacoo, which enjoy food and drink offerings like rum, bananas, and milk. For full rules on playing a bacoo PC, check out World of Battlezoo: Indigo Isles!

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Intimidation, Nature, Performance, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, earth, energy resistant (positive), evil, intelligence, light, mental, spells (Primal: dancing lights, glitterdust, jump, mud pit, pest form, restyle, spout, vomit swarm), water, wild

Contortion Creeper.name: 扭曲潜行者 Contortion Creeper

Contortion.name: 柔术 Contortion
Contortion.description:
扭曲爬行者可以使其身体变形以穿过微小的空间。它可以以其正常速度进行挤入而无需进行检定，并且不会将狭小空间视为困难地形。

The contortion creeper can deform its body to fit through tiny spaces. It can Squeeze at its normal Speed without a check and does not consider small spaces as difficult terrain.

Improvised Block.name: 即兴格挡 Improvised Block
Improvised Block.description:
触发 扭曲潜行者在寄居于某个物体内时将要受到伤害

效果 潜行者用其临时拼凑的甲壳挡开这一击。该物体的硬度最多防止 5 点伤害。潜行者与该物体都会承受任何剩余的伤害，可能会使物体破裂或被摧毁，并将潜行者驱逐出来。

Trigger The contortion creeper would take damage while Inhabiting an object

Effect The creeper wards off the blow with its improvised carapace. The object's Hardness prevents up to 5 damage. The creeper and the object both take any remaining damage, possibly breaking or destroying the object and expelling the creeper.

Junk Carapace.name: 垃圾甲壳 Junk Carapace
Junk Carapace.description:
模块化 [B 和 推撞，P 和 背刺者，S 和 横扫]

modular [B and shove, P and backstabber, S and sweep]

Inhabit.name: 居住 Inhabit
Inhabit.description:
需求 扭曲匍匐者当前未寄居于某个物体内

效果 扭曲匍匐者爬入一个相邻的、无人看管的超小型物体（硬度5或更低）内，例如金属罐、小袋子或类似的容器。该容器变为一个异次元空间，其内部足够大到能容纳匍匐者进入，不论该物体外部的体积如何。当寄居于物体内时，扭曲匍匐者获得+2环境加值至AC，并失去其对挥砍伤害的弱点。该物体的硬度提高至5，且其生命值与破坏阈值在扭曲匍匐者的异次元魔法作用下提高至20与10。匍匐者会一直寄居于该物体内，直到该物体被破坏，或匍匐者寄居于一个新的物体。当未寄居于物体内时，匍匐者不能使用其垃圾甲壳打击。

Requirements The contortion creeper doesn't currently Inhabit an object

Effect The contortion creeper crawls inside an adjacent unattended Tiny object with Hardness 5 or less, such as a metal can, a small bag, or similar container. The container becomes an extradimensional space with an interior large enough for the creeper to fit inside, regardless of the object's exterior volume. While Inhabiting an object, the contortion creeper gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and loses its weakness to slashing damage. The object's Hardness increases to 5 and its Hit Points and Break Threshold increase to 20 and 10 via the contortion creeper's extradimensional magic. The creeper remains Inhabiting the object until the object breaks or the creeper Inhabits a new object. When not Inhabiting an object, the creeper can't use its junk carapace Strike.

Pilfering Strike.name: 窃取打击 Pilfering Strike
Pilfering Strike.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 扭曲爬行者对一名相邻生物进行一次近战打击。若目标受到伤害，爬行者可以尝试从该生物处 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{偷窃} 一件物品，即使该生物正积极投入战斗也一样。

Frequency once per round

Effect The contortion creeper makes a melee Strike against an adjacent creature. If the target takes damage, the creeper can attempt to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{Steal} an item from the creature, even if the creature is actively engaged in combat.

Retract.name: 收回 Retract
Retract.description:
需求 扭曲爬行者栖身于一件物体中

效果 爬行者完全缩回其临时甲壳中。其对AC的环境加值提高至+4，且除非使用改良格挡或再次使用此动作以从其甲壳中出来，否则不能采取动作。

Requirements The contortion creeper Inhabits an object

Effect The creeper fully withdraws into their improvised carapace. Their circumstance bonus to AC increases to +4, and they can't take actions except to use Improved Block or this action again to come out of their carapace.

Contortion Creeper.publicNotes:
扭曲潜行者是一种胆怯的异怪，它通过躲藏在比自身更小的普通物体内来保护其脆弱、畸形的身体。这种生物很少显露真身，往往只从一个不成比例的小容器（如酒杯或水囊）里露出一对黄豆般的黄色眼睛与一条畸形的手臂。

每个扭曲潜行者都拥有一个私人异次元空间，可通过既有物体的开口创造传送门进入。潜行者通过使自身解剖结构变形以挤入狭窄开口，从而栖身于此类物体之中。

潜行者将该物品当作临时甲壳，穿梭于城市环境，在街道垃圾或屋内杂物之间以显眼之处隐匿身形。尽管具备自卫能力，大多数潜行者会避免暴力，更倾向于逃跑或躲藏以规避威胁。扭曲潜行者天性好奇，喜欢收集引人入胜的物品，如餐具、工具与损坏的发条装置，以琢磨其用途与功能。这些物品会填满潜行者的私人异次元空间，而这只异怪珍视自己那不为人见的收藏。只要对方拿出能令该生物着迷的物品作为交换，潜行者就可能被说服进行交易或提供情报。

扭曲体是一类异怪家族，具有一种鲜明的共同行为：如同寄居蟹一般，它们会寻找并栖居于被丢弃的物体之中，将其作为居所，以保护其脆弱身体免受伤害。然而，与寄居蟹不同，扭曲体往往栖身于类人生物聚居地中发现的废品，而非海滩上的贝壳。如同寄居蟹，扭曲体会持续生长，并不断更换到更大更大的居所。最小的个体可能住在一只鞋里，而最大的则大到足以栖居在小型建筑中。

扭曲殖群

当成熟的扭曲潜行者或扭曲王冠遭遇到数量足够庞大的废品时，这座新宝藏库带来的狂喜会使其手臂根部周围的息肉肿胀起来。最终，这些息肉会爆裂，释放出一小群幼年扭曲体。殖群成员会栖身于更小块的废品中，直到它们长到足以形成扭曲虫群。

潜行者收藏

若扭曲潜行者的临时甲壳破裂或被摧毁，其收藏与异次元巢穴将变得无法进入。当扭曲潜行者被杀死时，它的收藏会倾泻到物质位面，并出现在其尸体旁。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、技能物品（特技动作、欺瞒、隐秘、巧手）

符合条件的灌注属性 破邪、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、力量、野性

A contortion creeper is a skittish aberration that protects its fragile, deformed body by hiding inside ordinary objects smaller than itself. The creature seldom reveals itself, often displaying only a pair of beady yellow eyes and a deformed arm protruding from a disproportionately small container such as a stein or water skin.

Each contortion creeper possesses a personal extradimensional space accessed by creating a portal from the openings of existing objects. A creeper inhabits such an object by deforming its anatomy to fit inside the narrow opening.

Using the item as an improvised carapace, the creeper scurries through urban environments, hiding in plain sight among garbage in the streets or junk littering dwellings. Though capable of defending themselves, most creepers avoid violence and prefer to flee or hide from threats. Naturally curious, contortion creepers enjoy collecting intriguing items such as dining utensils, tools, and broken clockwork to ponder their use and function. Such items fill a creeper's personal extradimensional space, where the aberration prizes its unseen collection. A creeper can be persuaded to trade or provide information in exchange for items that fascinate the creature.

Contortions are a family of aberrations that share a distinctive behavior: like hermit crabs, they find and inhabit discarded objects, which they use as dwellings to protect their vulnerable bodies from harm. However, unlike hermit crabs, contortions tend to inhabit junk found in humanoid settlements rather than shells on the beach. Like hermit crabs, contortions continue to grow and trade up to larger and larger dwellings. While the smallest might live in a shoe, the largest are big enough to inhabit small buildings.

Contortion Colonies

When a mature contortion creeper or contortion crown comes across a large enough quantity of junk, the glee from this new treasure trove causes polyps to swell up around the base of their arms. Eventually, these polyps explode, releasing a small colony of infant contortions. The members of the colony inhabit the smaller pieces of junk until they grow enough to form a contortion swarm.

Creeper Collections

A contortion creeper's collection and extradimensional nest become inaccessible if its improvised carapace breaks or is destroyed. When a contortion creeper is slain, its collection spills out into the Material Plane and appears beside its corpse.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Acrobatics, Deception, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Kawakami.name: 川上 Kawakami

River's Mind.name: 河之心智 River's Mind
River's Mind.description:
川上存在两种状态之一：破坏性或复原性。“治疗波”与“窒息涟漪”能力会在战斗中改变川上的状态，但在战斗开始时，其状态由其当前的性情决定。

A kawakami exists in one of two states: destructive or restorative. The Healing Waves and Suffocating Ripple abilities change the kawakami's state during combat, but at the beginning of combat their state is determined by their current temperament.

Ward.name: 守护 Ward
Ward.description:
每个神灵都被绑定于一个护持：某个特定的动物、植物、物体或地点。神灵可以以单动作与其护持融合或从中现身，该动作具有专注（特征）。在融合期间，神灵既能以其通常的感官观察其周围环境，也能使用其护持的感官，但不能移动、与其护持交流，或控制其护持。此外，与其护持融合的神灵每分钟恢复生命值，如同他们进行了整整一天的休息。川神的护持是一条河流，并且在融合期间，他们可以观察河流范围内的任何事物。

Every kami is bound to a ward: a specific animal, plant, object, or location. A kami can merge with or emerge from their ward as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. While merged, the kami can observe their surroundings with their usual senses as well as the senses of their ward, but can't move, communicate with, or control their ward. Additionally, a kami merged with their ward recovers Hit Points each minute as if they spent an entire day resting. A kawakami's ward is a river, and they can observe anything within the river while merged.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Control Water.name: 操控水 Control Water
Control Water.description:
通过将你的意志强加于水之上，你可以使所选区域内的水位上升或下降10英尺。区域内的水生生物将受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}的效果影响。

区域 50英尺长，50英尺宽

By imposing your will upon the water, you can raise or lower the level of water in the chosen area by 10 feet. Water creatures in the area are subjected to the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}.

Area 50 ft long by 50 ft wide

Hydraulic Torrent.name: 液压激流 Hydraulic Torrent
Hydraulic Torrent.description:
一道旋转的激流沿着一条直线显现，猛击路径上的生物与无人看管的物体，并可能将它们推离你。激流造成 8d6 钝击伤害。区域内的每个生物必须进行一次基础强韧豁免；无人看管的物体自动失败。

强化 (+1) 伤害增加 2d6。

A swirling torrent of water manifests along a straight line, battering creatures and unattended objects in its path and possibly pushing them away from you. The torrent deals 8d6 bludgeoning damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a basic Fortitude save; unattended objects automatically fail. Creatures that fail the save are also knocked back 5 feet (10 feet on a critical failure).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Healing Waves.name: 治疗波浪 Healing Waves
Healing Waves.description:
需求 川上妖目前处于复苏状态

效果 川上妖用复苏且遮蔽视线的水包围30尺内至多两个生物（可以包括其自身），然后回归其毁灭状态，并且在 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} 内无法使用该能力。目标生物恢复 @Damage[10d6[healing]] 生命值，并在一轮内对所有敌人获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Requirements The kawakami is currently in a restorative state

Effect The kawakami surrounds up to two creatures within 30 feet (which can include itself) in restorative, obscuring water, and then reverts to their destructive state and can't use this ability for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. The targeted creatures recover @Damage[10d6[healing]] Hit Points, and gains @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealement} against all enemies for one round.

Intercepting Swell.name: 拦截涌浪 Intercepting Swell
Intercepting Swell.description:
需求 川上当前处于复原状态

触发 15英尺内的一个生物对川上或相邻的盟友造成伤害

效果 治疗之水挡下这一击，使伤害减少8，并使受伤害的生物在接下来的2轮获得快速治疗5。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.ODsXzZcN89GBDAJa]{Effect: Intercepting Swell}

Requirements The kawakami is currently in a restorative state

Trigger A creature within 15 feet damages the kawakami or an adjacent ally

Effect Healing water blocks the blow, reducing the damage by 8, and granting the damaged creature fast healing 5 for the next 2 rounds.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.ODsXzZcN89GBDAJa]{Effect: Intercepting Swell}

Hydropulse.name: 水脉冲 Hydropulse
Hydropulse.description:
需求 川上目前处于破坏状态

频率 每轮一次

效果 川上释放出强大的水爆炸。所有在川上 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的生物受到 @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] 豁免）。若失败，该生物还会被击倒 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

Requirements The kawakami is currently in a destructive state

Frequency Once per round

Effect The kawakami unleashes a powerful explosion of water. All creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the kawakami take @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] save). On a failure, the creature is also knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Suffocating Ripple.name: 窒息涟漪 Suffocating Ripple
Suffocating Ripple.description:
需求 该川上目前处于破坏状态

效果 川上以100尺内的一名生物为目标，其周围迅速膨胀出一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 的水与泥，然后其回归至恢复状态，且在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内无法使用此能力。灵光范围内的所有生物受到 @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true] 豁免）。在失败时，该目标还必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28] 豁免，且若再次失败，他们必须开始屏住吐息。受影响的生物或任何相邻生物可以使用一个交互 动作来清理该窒息生物的气道。

Requirements The kawakami is currently in a destructive state

Effect The kawakami targets a creature within 100 feet from which a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of water and mud rapidly swells, and then reverts to a restorative state and can't use this ability for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. All creatures within the emanation take @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true] save). On a failure, the target must also attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28] save, and they must start holding their breath on a failure. The affected creature, or any adjacent creature, can use an Interact action to clear the suffocating creature's airway.

Kawakami.publicNotes:
外表为由流动之水构成的无实体类人生物，在愤怒时会变得浑浊含泥，川上是守护灵体。它们是罕见的神祇与原初灵体的混合体，起源于为了解决两方之间关于由谁来守护河流体系的争端。这些混合生物会强烈守护某条特定的河流——它们的守护对象——并拥有反复无常的性情，在拥抱河水泛滥所带来的破坏力量与河流丰饶所赐予的修复赋礼之间摇摆。尽管对尊重其河流的人并不敌对，川上仍愿意采取极端手段来保护其守护对象。若它们未能做到——往往是由于附近社会造成的过度污染——它们可能会被困在两种状态之一，进而对依赖这条河流的人们或邻近生态系统造成伤害。

水总会获胜

尊重河流的社会可以与其守护者合作，造福所有人。川上乐于向农民建议哪些地方更可能发生洪水，以便他们不要在这些区域建造永久性建筑。作为交换，当洪水退去时，这些区域会成为肥沃土地，带来丰收的作物产量；同时河流也能通过冲刷自身来清除淤泥堆积，从而保持健康。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），技能物品（特技动作、威吓、自然、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害、魅力、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、智力、法术（原初：操控水流、液压激流）、水、狂野、翼

Appearing as an incorporeal humanoid made from flowing water that turns silty when angered, kawakami are protector spirits.
