They are a rare hybrid of kami and primal spirits that came about to resolve a dispute over which group would protect river systems. These hybrid creatures are highly protective of a specific river, their ward, and have a mercurial temperament that changes between embracing the destructive power of their river's flooding and the restorative gift of their river's bounty. Although not hostile to those who respect their river, a kawakami is willing to take extreme action to protect their ward. If they fail to do so, often due to excessive pollution from nearby societies, they can become stuck in one of their two states, causing damage to those relying on the river or the nearby ecosystem.

Water Always Wins

Societies that respect a river can work with its guardian for the benefit of all. Kawakami are happy to advise farmers where floods are likely to occur so that they don't build permanent structures in those areas. In exchange, those areas become fertile land for a bountiful yield of crops when the waters recede, and the river remains healthy by purging itself of silt buildup.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), skill items (Acrobatics, Intimidation, Nature, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, spells (Primal: control water, hydraulic torrent), water, wild, winged

Writer's Block.name: 写作障碍 Writer's Block

Occult Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Tongues (Constant).name: 巧言术（恒定） Tongues (Constant)
Tongues (Constant).description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论是什么语言，并且也能说出其他生物的语言。当处于由多种生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Linguistic Ef.name: 对抗语言学效果时所有豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Linguistic Effects

Creative Plagiarism.name: 创意剽窃 Creative Plagiarism
Creative Plagiarism.description:
触发 写作阻滞块100尺内的一名生物施放一个带有言语成分且等级不高于写作阻滞块等级一半（向上取整，通常为3）的法术；一名生物启动一个带有口令成分且等级不高于写作阻滞块等级（通常为5）的物品；或一名等级不高于写作阻滞块等级（通常为5）的生物使用一个带有语言（特征）的动作

效果 持续1分钟，写作阻滞块可以复制一次触发的效果，仿佛它自己施放了该法术、启动了该物品，或自己进行了该动作或行动。这需要正常所需数量的动作，但使用与触发效果相同的调整值和DC。

Trigger A creature within 100 feet of the writer's block Casts a Spell with a verbal component of a level no greater than half the writer's block's level rounded up (usually 3), a creature Activates an Item with a command component of a level no greater than the writer's block's (usually 5), or a creature of a level no greater than the writer's block's (usually 5) uses an action with the linguistic trait

Effect For 1 minute, the writer's block can replicate the triggering effect a single time, as if it had Cast the Spell, Activated the Item, or taken the action or activity itself. This takes the normal required number of actions, but uses the same modifiers and DCs as the triggering effect.

Pithy Retorts.name: 辛辣回嘴 Pithy Retorts
Pithy Retorts.description:
每当一个生物对写作障碍使用语言学效果（例如妙语连珠或威吓）时，该生物的成功等级比其掷出的结果降低一级。若该生物在此调整后大失败，其心智将被写作障碍充满，并且在1分钟内无法使用语言学能力。

Whenever a creature uses a linguistic effect, such as Bon Mot or Demoralize, against the writer's block, the creature's degree of success is one step worse than it rolled. If the creature critically fails after this adjustment, their mind is filled with writer's block, and they can't use a linguistic ability for 1 minute.

Forced Reading.name: 强制阅读 Forced Reading
Forced Reading.description:
作家障碍喷洒出的超自然墨水在接触到生物时，会自行塑形成作者未完成的散文段落。这些文字令人分心：承受作家障碍持续精神伤害的生物在恢复之前处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} 状态。每回合一次，受影响的生物可以以单动作进行一次 @Check[type:society|dc:20|traits:action:decipher-writing] 检定来“破译文字”，从而对这些文字作出尖刻的批评。检定成功会结束该持续伤害；在大成功时，该生物还会对作家障碍的精神伤害获得 1 小时的暂时免疫，并且作家障碍变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}。这些批评不受作家障碍“机智反驳”能力的影响。

The supernatural ink sprayed by a writer's block shapes itself into passages of the author's unfinished prose upon making contact with a creature. The writing is distracting: creatures suffering from the writer's block's persistent mental damage are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until they recover. Once per turn, an affected creature can make a @Check[type:society|dc:20|traits:action:decipher-writing] check to Decipher Writing as a single action to make a scathing critique of the writing. Succeeding on the check ends the persistent damage; on a critical success, the creature additionally becomes temporarily immune to the writer's block's mental damage for 1 hour, and the writer's block becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}. These critiques are not subject to the writer's block's pithy retorts ability.

Writer's Block.publicNotes:
许多作家都梦想着用一部才华横溢到令人震撼的作品在世界上留下印记，使自己在所属时代过去很久之后仍被铭记，并通过自己的鸿篇巨制获得某种形式的不朽。然而，对这种杰作的追逐，总会不可避免地付出惨痛的价格。无眠的夜晚与日渐衰败的健康、遁入与世隔绝的生活，以及与异界存在进行亵渎交易——这些都是描写追求完美的作者时常见的主题。面对如此劳苦人生的现实，许多人干脆选择放弃，在其他形式中寻找意义与幸福。然而，也有一些抄写员完全执迷于目标，直至最后一口吐息仍死死攥紧鹅毛笔，却依旧未能交出他们那部不朽之作，距离伟大只差一步。当这些偏执作者作品最后几页上的墨迹迅速干涸，他们那股渴望创作的强烈力量却仍然萦绕不散。他们那本闹鬼的手稿被残余情绪的纠结所赋予行动：执念、挫败与悔恨，孕育出一个新生的文学灵体，其中不包含作者灵魂的任何成分。作者没能创造出一份手稿，却把别的东西带到了世上。

有些学者推测，强大的妖精会在第一世界故意制造写作障碍，以便在某些格外宏伟的私人图书馆中创造生动的娱乐来源，或用以向已故作者致敬。在某些情况下，人们发现写作障碍被嗜好反讽的炼狱生物当作阴森的镇纸使用。

写作障碍变体

某些写作障碍可能会具有与其写作内容相关的额外能力，例如：若其内容是一则恐怖故事，则“强制阅读”可能会改为造成惊惧（状态），而非措手不及。

未竟之事

对死去作家而言，最糟的结局就是变成一个执着于完成手稿的幽灵（特征），却只遇上自己留下的写作障碍。这两个生物通常会陷入僵局，需要第三方来裁决谁胜出；但在极少数情况下，他们最终会合作，创作出一篇萦绕心头的新故事。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（欺瞒、交涉、威吓、表演、社交、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星，混沌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），智力，精神，投掷，野性

Many writers dream of leaving their mark on the world with a work of such staggering genius that they will be remembered long after their time has passed, achieving a sort of immortality through their magnum opus. The pursuit of such a masterpiece, however, invariably comes at a dire price. Sleepless nights and failing health, the descent into a hermetic life, and profane deals with otherworldly entities are all frequently encountered themes in tales told of authors in pursuit of perfection. Upon confronting the realities of a life of such toil, many simply give up, finding meaning and happiness in other forms. However, some scribes, utterly fixated on their goal, keep a white-knuckled grip on their quills until their final breath yet still fail to deliver their timeless work, falling just short of greatness. While the ink on the final pages of these obsessive writers' works quickly dry, the visceral force of their drive to create lingers on. Their haunted manuscript becomes animated by a tangle of their remaining emotions: obsession, frustration, and regret, creating a newborn literary spirit that doesn't contain any components of the author's soul. While the author failed to create a manuscript, they've brought something else into the world.

Some scholars have posited that powerful fey intentionally create writer's blocks in the First World in order to create lively sources of entertainment in particularly grand personal libraries or to pay tribute to deceased authors. In some cases, writer's blocks have been found being used as macabre paperweights by infernal creatures with a penchant for irony.

Writer's Block Variants

Some writer's blocks may have additional abilities related to the contents of their writing, such as Forced Reading causing the frightened condition instead of flat-footed for a tale of horror.

Unfinished Business

The worst outcome for dead writers is to become a ghost fixated on finishing their manuscript only to encounter the writer's block they left behind. The two creatures typically deadlock and require a third party to decide who wins out, but on rare occasions they end up collaborating to produce a haunting new story.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Performance, Society, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, mental, throwing, wild
Writer's Block.allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. linguistic effects

Jadrani.name: 贾德拉尼 Jadrani

Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Good or.name: 再生 20（被善良或正能量停用） Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Good or Positive)

Jadrani Death Curse.name: 贾德拉尼死亡诅咒 Jadrani Death Curse
Jadrani Death Curse.description:
当一个生物杀死一名jadrani时，进行杀戮的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:41] 豁免中成功，否则将成为该jadrani自我复活的容器。若失败，该jadrani在[[/br 1d4 #Rounds]]{1d4轮}后以不死之身归来并完全治愈，具有一个第7等级@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO]{Resurrect}仪式的效果。这会对宿主造成 @Damage[10d10[void]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:37|basic:true] 豁免）。若一名jadrani是在由@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Dbd5W6G8U2vzWolN]{Consecrate}仪式奉献给善良神祇的区域内死亡，则无法自我复活；并且每名jadrani每之年只能自我复活一次。

When a creature slays an jadrani, the slaying creature must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:41] save or become a vessel for the jadrani's self-resurrection. On a failure, the jadrani returns to unlife fully healed [[/br 1d4 #Rounds]]{1d4 rounds} later, with the effects of a 7th-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO]{Resurrect} ritual. This deals @Damage[10d10[void]] damage to the host (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:37|basic:true] save). An jadrani who died within an area devoted to a good deity by a @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Dbd5W6G8U2vzWolN]{Consecrate} ritual can't self-resurrect, and an jadrani can self-resurrect only once per year.

Fountain of Youth.name: 青春之泉 Fountain of Youth
Fountain of Youth.description:
60尺。当一个活生物在灵光内结束其回合时，它必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] 豁免。若该生物失败，它的身体会倒退，逆转肌肉发育、平衡与协调能力。该生物在外表上显得年轻1天，但在年轻外表持续期间也会处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙1} 与 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{衰弱1} 状态。

60 feet. When a living creature ends its turn in the aura, it must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] save. If the creature fails, its body regresses, reversing muscle development, balance, and coordination. The creature appears superficially youthful for 1 day but is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} while the appearance of youth lasts.

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天赋秘传法术 Occult Innate Spells

Spirit Song.name: 灵体之歌 Spirit Song
Spirit Song.description:
你的秘法之歌发出脉动的灵性能量波，攻击区域内生物的灵体，造成18d6力场伤害。由于灵体之歌会影响生物的灵体，即使目标的身体在别处，它也能伤害正在投射其意识（例如通过投影影像）或正在附身于另一个生物的目标。灵性之歌的振动波会渗入但不会穿透实体障碍物，能够伤害藏在区域内实体物体中的虚体生物，但不会继续传播以伤害其他房间中的生物。被附身的生物不会受到这首歌的伤害。这首歌不会伤害没有灵体的生物，例如构装体。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

Your eldritch song sends pulsing waves of ethereal energy to attack creatures' spirits in the area, dealing 18d6 force damage. Because spirit song affects creatures' spirits, it can damage a target projecting its consciousness (such as via project image) or possessing another creature even if the target's body is elsewhere. The vibrating waves of spiritual song penetrate into, but not through, solid barriers, damaging incorporeal creatures hiding in solid objects in the area but not passing onward to damage creatures in other rooms. Possessed creatures aren't harmed by the song. The song doesn't harm creatures that have no spirit, such as constructs.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Bone Shards.name: 碎骨片 Bone Shards
Bone Shards.description:
贾德拉尼猛拍双翼，向@Template[type:cone|distance:50]内抛射骨片，对区域内的生物造成@Damage[14d6[piercing]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true]豁免。豁免失败的生物还会变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}，直到他们花费一个交互动作将自己挣脱。贾德拉尼在[[/br 1d4 #Bone Shards Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用骨片。

The jadrani snaps its wings and throws shards of bones in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[14d6[piercing]] damage to creatures in the area with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] save. A creature that fails its save is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} until they spend an Interact action to wrench themselves free. An jadrani can't use Bone Shards again for [[/br 1d4 #Bone Shards Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Jadrani.publicNotes:
迦卓拉尼是一种巨型不死鸟类，由被杀死并遭腐化的凤凰形成。迦卓拉尼栖身于黑暗洞穴之中，睡卧在尸山上——那些愚勇之人自以为能寻得所谓的青春之泉，却不知这传说真正的源头。迦卓拉尼的枯萎与复苏标志着其本性中的矛盾：据说它的灵光能逆转活生物的衰老，但其存在本身却是对生命的亵渎。迦卓拉尼会利用这些故事达成自身卑劣的目的，有时甚至会放过一些请求者，让其活着去传播它们的传奇，并引来更多傻子进入它们的巢穴。不同于凤凰之歌，这种生物的歌声无法抚慰任何心灵。

若迦卓拉尼的某个猎手成功将其杀死，迦卓拉尼受诅咒的血肉与骨骼会化为尘埃，并在其杀手周身凝聚成一道致命诅咒。它会饱餐对方的生命力，并在数秒之后自其血肉与骨骼中破出，常常当场将其击倒，并再添一具尸体到那堆尸骸之上。

熄灭的希望

死灵魔法与邪恶行径并不足以将凤凰变形为迦卓拉尼。凤凰是善意与希望的灯塔。敌人必须将这些特质彻底掐灭，把凤凰逼入绝望，才能腐化这只生物。尽管如此结局令人悲恸，但也并非全无慰藉：迦卓拉尼性情隐居——它们不会像凤凰那样四处旅行以治愈与慰藉，而是不会主动走向世界散播毁灭。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 1,250/2,800/5,150 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（光型、中型、重型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、欺瞒、威吓、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane，敏捷，elongating，energy resistant（负能量），evil，force，lawful，negative，法术（秘传：灵体之歌），throwing，wild，winged

A jadrani is a giant undead bird formed from a slain and corrupted phoenix. Jadrani lair in dark caves and sleep in mountains of corpses of those foolhardy enough to seek their so-called fountain of youth, not knowing the true source of this myth. The withering and rejuvenation of a jadrani mark a contradiction in its nature. Where its aura is said to reverse the aging of living creatures, its very being is an affront to life itself. Jadrani use these tales for their own vile ends, sometimes even allowing petitioners to live to spread their legend and attract additional fools to their lair. Unlike a phoenix's song, this creature's song soothes no hearts.

Should one of an jadrani's hunters manage to slay it, the jadrani's cursed flesh and bones turn to dust and coalesce around its killer in a deadly curse. It helps itself to a banquet of their life force and emerges from their flesh and bones only seconds later, often felling them instantly and adding another corpse to the pile.

Extinguished Hope

Necromantic magic and acts of evil are not sufficient to transform a phoenix into a jadrani. Phoenixes are beacons of kindness and hope. Foes must snuff out those qualities entirely, driving a phoenix into despair, before they can corrupt the creature. While such an end is tragic, it does bear the silver lining that jadrani are reclusive—they do not actively go out into the world to spread destruction in the same way that phoenixes travel widely to heal and console.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 1,250/2,800/5,150 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (negative), evil, force, lawful, negative, spells (Occult: spirit song), throwing, wild, winged
Jadrani.hp: negative healing, regeneration 20 (deactivated by good or positive)

Nafirus.name: 纳菲鲁斯 Nafirus

Swarm Rejuvenation.name: 虫群 复苏 Swarm Rejuvenation
Swarm Rejuvenation.description:
纳菲鲁斯的虫群是其真实自我的一部分。击败纳菲鲁斯后，它的虫群会四散而逃，并在[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后，只要其中哪怕有一只组成生物成功逃脱，其中一只就会成长为新的纳菲鲁斯。尽管确切的环境与周围环境会决定纳菲鲁斯的敌人在这些@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing}生物逃走前有多长时间将其消灭，但通常它的敌人只有1轮时间。一般而言，这需要在1轮内对纳菲鲁斯倒下的那处空间施加一个区域效果或使用溅射武器。对该空间造成任意数量的区域或溅射伤害后，造成伤害的角色必须尝试一次@Check[type:flat|dc:15]。此后在该区域上进行的每一次后续区域或溅射伤害效果，都会使这次纯骰检定的DC降低2，最低降至DC 5。若这些纯骰检定中任意一次成功，则没有生物会逃脱，纳菲鲁斯将被永久摧毁。由GM酌情裁定，巧妙的陷阱或以其他方式扣留这些害兽的手段，可能会延长允许彻底消灭纳菲鲁斯的时间。

A nafirus's swarm is part of its true self. After defeating a nafirus, its swarm disperses, and [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} later, one of the constituent creatures grows into a new nafirus if even a single one escapes. While the exact circumstances and surroundings determine how long the nafirus's foes have to dispatch the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} creatures before they escape, usually its foes have only a single round. Typically, this requires the application of an area effect or splash weapon within 1 round to the space where the nafirus collapsed. After any amount of area or splash damage is dealt to that space, the character dealing the damage must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:15]. Each subsequent area or splash damage effect performed on the area reduces the DC of this flat check by 2, to a minimum of DC 5. If any of these flat checks succeed, none of the creatures escapes, and the nafirus is destroyed permanently. At the GM's discretion, clever means of trapping or otherwise detaining the vermin may extend the time allowed to finish off the nafirus.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天赋法术 Primal Innate Spells

Animal Vision (At Will).name: 动物视野（任意） Animal Vision (At Will)
Animal Vision (At Will).description:
你与目标的感官连结，使你能在法术的持续时间内看见、听见并以其他方式感知其所感知的一切。若目标希望阻止你这么做，它可以尝试进行一次意志豁免；成功则使法术失效，但大多数动物并不会费心这么做。在连结目标的感官期间，你无法使用自己身体的感官，但你可以以具有专注（特征）的单动作，在自己身体的感官与目标的感官之间来回切换。

You tap into the target's senses, allowing you to see, hear, and otherwise sense whatever it senses for the spell's duration. If the target wishes to prevent you from doing so, it can attempt a Will save, negating the spell on a success, but most animals don't bother to do so. While tapping into the target's senses, you can't use your own body's senses, but you can change back and forth from your body's senses to the target's senses using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Caterwaul Sling.name: 嚎叫投石索 Caterwaul Sling
Caterwaul Sling.description:
由闪亮的棕色皮革制成，这把+1 强袭投石索的索绳中交织着一缕白线。

启动 D 交互（音波）

频率 每日一次

效果 你将白线抽出，然后以极高的速度旋转投石索。它会发出刺耳的声波。@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内的每个生物受到[[/r 4d6[sonic]]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|basic:true|traits:sonic] 豁免）。任何失败的生物将陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}状态1轮；若为大成功或大失败中的大失败，则持续1小时。

Made of shiny brown leather, this +1 striking sling has a single white thread interwoven into its cord.

Activate D Interact (sonic)

Frequency once per day

Effect You pull the white thread free, then whirl the sling in circles at high speed. It lets out an ear-piercing wave of sound. Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] takes [[/r 4d6[sonic]]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:21|basic:true|traits:sonic] save). Any creature that fails is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round, or 1 hour on a critical failure.

Lightning Storm.name: 闪电风暴 Lightning Storm
Lightning Storm.description:
你创造一片黑色、轰鸣的暴风云，并在该法术的区域内召下一道闪电。闪电是一条从暴风云顶端垂直劈向下方地面的直线，对直线上的生物造成 4d12 点电击伤害（基础反射豁免）。在后续轮中，每轮你第一次维持法术时，你可以在该区域内再召下一道闪电。如果你在户外施放该法术，你可以创造两片互不重叠的云而非一片，不过每回合你仍只能召下一道闪电。

升阶（+2） 每道闪电的伤害增加 [[/r 1d12[electricity]]] 点伤害。

You create a black, rumbling storm cloud and call down one lightning bolt within the spell's area. The bolt is a vertical line from the top of the storm cloud to the ground below, dealing 4d12 electricity damage to creatures in the line (basic Reflex save). On subsequent rounds, the first time you Sustain the Spell each round, you can call another lightning bolt within the area. If you Cast this Spell outdoors, you can create two non-overlapping clouds instead of one, though you can still call down only one bolt per turn.

Heightened (+2) The damage of each bolt increases by [[/r 1d12[electricity]]] damage.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果期间，目标无视任何会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当他们尝试以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 来摆脱使其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚} 的效果时，他们会自动成功，除非该效果具有魔法性质且其等级高于行动自如法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Wall of Wind.name: 风墙 Wall of Wind
Wall of Wind.description:
你创造一道狂风屏障，阻碍任何穿过它的东西。旋转狂风之墙厚5英尺、长60英尺、高30英尺。风墙竖直矗立，但你可以塑造它的路径。尽管风墙会扭曲空气，但不会妨碍视线。风墙具有以下效果。

  • 来自物理远程攻击的弹药——例如箭矢、弩矢、投石索弹丸，以及其他体型相近的物体——无法穿过风墙。使用更大的远程武器（例如标枪）进行的攻击，若其路径穿过风墙，其攻击掷骰承受-2环境减值。巨型远程武器与不创造实体物体的法术效果可无减值穿过风墙。
  • 对于试图以陆地移动穿过风墙的生物而言，风墙属于困难地形。气体（包括处于气态形态的生物）无法穿过风墙。
  • 生物若试图使用移动动作飞越风墙，则必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败：大成功 该生物本回合可以正常穿过风墙。

成功 该飞行生物本回合可以穿过风墙，但风墙为困难地形。

失败 风墙阻止该飞行生物的移动，其当前动作中任何剩余的移动均被浪费。

大成功或大失败：大失败 同失败，并且该生物被推离风墙10英尺。

You create a barrier of gusting winds that hinders anything moving through it. The wall of swirling winds is 5 feet thick, 60 feet long, and 30 feet high. The wall stands vertically, but you can shape its path. Though the wall of wind distorts the air, it does not hamper sight. The wall has the following effects.

  • Ammunition from physical ranged attacks-such as arrows, bolts, sling bullets, and other objects of similar size-can't pass through the wall. Attacks with bigger ranged weapons, such as javelins, take a -2 circumstance penalty to their attack rolls if their paths pass through the wall. Massive ranged weapons and spell effects that don't create physical objects pass through the wall with no penalty.
  • The wall is difficult terrain to creatures attempting to move overland through it. Gases, including creatures in gaseous form, can't pass through the wall.
  • A creature that attempts to fly through the wall using a move action must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature can move through the wall normally this turn.

Success The flying creature can move through the wall this turn, but the wall is difficult terrain.

Failure The wall stops the movement of the flying creature, and any remaining movement from its current action is wasted.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is pushed 10 feet away from the wall.

Ash Cloud.name: 灰烬云 Ash Cloud
Ash Cloud.description:
你召唤出一团翻涌的灰烬与烟雾之云。该云团对飞行生物而言为困难地形，而云团中的生物无法使用它们的嗅觉感官探测任何事物。在云团内开始其回合的生物会因肺部充满灼热刺鼻的烟雾而受到2d4火焰伤害，并进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You summon a tumultuous cloud of ash and smoke. The cloud is difficult terrain for flying creatures, and creatures in the cloud can't detect anything using their sense of smell. Creatures that start their turn within the cloud take 2d4 fire damage as their lungs fill with the hot, acrid smoke, with a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Gust of Wind.name: 狂风阵 Gust of Wind
Gust of Wind.description:
一阵猛烈的狂风从你的手掌喷涌而出，从你施放该法术时所在的位置吹向该线段的另一端。狂风会熄灭微小的非魔法火焰，驱散浓雾与薄雾，吹动负载为光或更低的物体，并推动更大的物体。区域内大型或更小的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。之后进入这阵疾风的大型或更小的生物在进入时必须尝试该豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物无法逆风移动。

失败 该生物被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。如果它正在飞行，则改为承受大成功或大失败的效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物沿风向被推开30尺，被击倒为Prone，并受到2d6钝击伤害。

A violent wind issues forth from your palm, blowing from the point where you are when you cast the spell to the line's opposite end. The wind extinguishes small non-magical fires, disperses fog and mist, blows objects of light Bulk or less around, and pushes larger objects. Large or smaller creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save. Large or smaller creatures that later move into the gust must attempt the save on entering.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature can't move against the wind.

Failure The creature is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If it was flying, it suffers the effects of critical failure instead.

Critical Failure The creature is pushed 30 feet in the wind's direction, knocked Prone, and takes 2d6 bludgeoning damage.

Electric Arc.name: 电弧 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跃向另一个目标。你造成等于 1d4 加上你的施法能力调整值的电击伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. You deal electricity damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Cacophonous Call.name: 刺耳呼唤 Cacophonous Call
Cacophonous Call.description:
鸣禽虫群释放一阵声波爆发，在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内造成 @Damage[5d6[sonic]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免。）由于虫群是爆发的起点，这个锥形范围可以从纳菲鲁斯60尺内的任意一点发出，而不只是从纳菲鲁斯的空间发出。

The songbird swarm releases a blast of sound, dealing @Damage[5d6[sonic]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] save.) Because the swarm is the origin of the blast, the cone can originate at any point within 60 feet of the nafirus, rather than just in the nafirus's space.

Down to Earth.name: 脚踏实地 Down to Earth
Down to Earth.description:
鸣禽虫群包围一名飞行的目标，用它们的重量将其拖拽下坠，并以歌声扰乱其方向感。目标尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:25] 意志豁免。

成功 目标下坠至多60尺。若因此落地，则不受伤害。

失败 目标下坠至多80尺。若因此落地，则受到 @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

大失败 目标下坠至多100尺。若因此落地，则受到 [[/r 12d6[bludgeoning]]] 伤害并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。若目标未触及地面，则其必须在其下一回合开始时再尝试一次对抗 Down to Earth 的豁免。

The songbird swarm surrounds a flying target, dragging it down with their weight and disrupting its sense of direction with their song. The target attempts a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save.

Success The target falls up to 60 feet. If this brings it to the ground, it is unharmed.

Failure The target falls up to 80 feet. If this brings it to the ground, it takes @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

Critical Failure The target falls up to 100 feet. If this brings it to the ground it takes [[/r 12d6[bludgeoning]]] damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}. If the target doesn't reach the ground, it must attempt another save against Down to Earth at the beginning of its next turn.

Go For the Eyes.name: 攻其眼睛 Go For the Eyes
Go For the Eyes.description:
纳菲鲁斯派出它的鸣禽虫群攻击120英尺内的一名对手。目标受到 @Damage[6d8[piercing]] 伤害，并且必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:26] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受伤害，且一只发动攻击的鸟受伤，对纳菲鲁斯造成 [[/r 1d8]] 伤害。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标受到全部伤害，并在1轮内处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{目盲} 状态。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并永久目盲。

The nafirus sends its swarm of songbirds to attack an opponent within 120 feet. The target takes @Damage[6d8[piercing]] damage and must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:26] save.

Critical Success The target takes no damage and one of the attacking birds is injured, dealing [[/r 1d8]] damage to the nafirus.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is blinded permanently.

Snatch.name: 夺取 Snatch
Snatch.description:
纳菲鲁斯在爪中抓着处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} 状态的生物时，可以以一半的速度飞行，并携带该生物一起移动。

A nafirus can Fly at half Speed while it has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} in its talons, carrying that creature along with it.

Sling Bullets.name: 投石索弹丸 Sling Bullets
Sling Bullets.description:
这些是小型金属球，通常由铁或铅制成，设计用于作为投石索的弹药。

These are small metal balls, typically either iron or lead, designed to be used as ammunition in slings.

Nafirus.publicNotes:
高耸的山峰通常是荒无人烟、荒凉的所在，而这正合纳菲鲁斯的心意。纳菲鲁斯将几乎任何活生物的存在——尤其是陆生生物，甚至更尤其是类人生物——视为对这些洁净之地冷峻之美的亵渎。因此，它们会迅速而暴烈地攻击任何闯入其领域的不速之客。

与其他伊鲁斯不同，纳菲鲁斯对含蓄微妙毫不在意。相反，它们会以喧嚣、五彩斑斓的狂怒俯冲向受害者。战斗中，它们狂热地运用自身的移动能力，把正在攀爬的对手从崖壁上夺下，令其坠落至死；并将飞行生物逼落地面。

纳菲鲁斯的身体类似大型滑翔鸟类，如秃鹫或鹰，覆有朴素的褐色羽毛。然而，在其双翼上方生长的并非鸟首，而是一具类人生物的躯干与头颅，配有手臂与双手，并另有一对长满羽毛的额外翅膀。

一只纳菲鲁斯由一大群鸣禽侍从相伴，每只都不比人类手掌更大。这些鸟虽外形结构一致，却有着极为多样的羽色与花纹。鸣禽虫群拥有惊人的音域，能奏出优美的歌声，但也能发出令人痛苦的不和谐音。

伊鲁斯是一族妖精生物，它们能在大多数类人生物与其他凡俗之民忽视的偏远之地发现美。遗憾的是，对那些穿行其领域的人而言，伊鲁斯会认定任何踏入其领地者都是来玷污此地，并以暴力回应。

每只伊鲁斯由一个主躯体与一群较小躯体的虫群组成，而这些较小躯体各具不同的物理形态。然而，主躯体与虫群同属一个生物，伊鲁斯能像控制手臂或腿一样轻易地控制这些较小躯体。若主躯体被摧毁，其中一只较小生物会缓慢生长为新的主躯体。

有一些证据表明，所有伊鲁斯实际上都是同一物种，只是适应了不同的环境。例如，某一类型伊鲁斯的虫群躯体可以分离出来，并在遭遇合适的环境时，形成另一类型的新主躯体。

纳菲鲁斯交响曲

纳菲鲁斯或许邪恶，但它们热爱音乐，常常谱写复杂而萦绕心头的交响曲，由其自有的鸣禽演奏。尽管纳菲鲁斯通常是伊鲁斯中领地意识最强者，但也有传闻称，技艺高超的吟游诗人能够以恭敬的方式踏入纳菲鲁斯的山岭，并通过与纳菲鲁斯分享自己的音乐作品而在这场遭遇中幸存。

虫群复苏：对该领域的勘察与分析

虫群复苏的形而上过程十分复杂。在试图理解它的学者之中，许多人在遭到伊鲁斯攻击后丧命，直到一位极其执着的研究者终于设法出版了一篇题为《虫群复苏：对该领域的勘察与分析》的论文集；该著作现被公认为关于此主题最重要的理论与数据汇编。

据该文本所述，当伊鲁斯的核心躯体被击败时，它会将其妖精自我的原初能量扩散至构成其延展躯体的生物虫群之中。这些生物彼此之间，并与主躯体之间，以一张无形的魔法链接之网相连，类似动脉或地脉线网络；即便躯体死亡，这张网络仍会持续存在。

这意味着，无论虫群的组成个体被杀死多少，伊鲁斯都能迅速将能量转移至任何设法存活下来的个体之中。然而，这种转移并非无损，过程中会有不可预测的本质外溢，尤其是在虫群的组成生物也有大量死亡时更为明显。这导致伊鲁斯复苏所需时间存在显著差异：其损失的能量越多，返回所需时间就越长。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型），技能物品（特技，运动，欺瞒，威吓，自然，表演，潜行，生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 空气，克星，混乱，魅力，体质，敏捷，电击，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，火焰，精神，音波，法术（原初：动物视野，灰烬云，电弧，自由移动，阵风术，闪电风暴，风墙），原始，飞翼

High mountain peaks are generally deserted, desolate places, and that's just how a nafirus likes it. Nafiruses view the presence of almost any living creature, particularly landbound creatures and even more especially humanoids, as a desecration of these pristine places' stark beauty. As such, they rapidly and violently attack any interlopers in their domain.

Unlike other iruses, nafiruses care little for subtlety. Instead, they dive down on their victims in cacophonous, multicolored fury. In combat, they zealously use their mobility, snatching climbing opponents off of walls to plummet to their doom and driving flying creatures to the ground.

A nafirus has a body like a large gliding bird, such as a condor or eagle, with plain brown plumage. However, just above its wings, instead of an avian head, a humanoid torso and head grow, complete with arms, hands, and an additional set of feathered wings.

A nafirus is attended by a mass of songbirds, each no larger than a human hand. While these birds all have the same shape and structure, they have wildly varying colorations and patterns. The songbird swarm has an impressive range of notes and can make beautiful songs, but they are also capable of painfully discordant tones.

Iruses are a family of fey creatures who find beauty in remote places most humanoids and other mortal folk overlook. Unfortunately for those who pass through their domains, they assume anyone in their territory is there to despoil it and react violently.

Each irus is made up of a main body and a swarm of smaller bodies, each with a different physical shape. Both body and swarm are a single creature, however, and an irus can control the smaller bodies as easily as an arm or leg. Should the main body be destroyed, one of the smaller creatures will slowly grow into a new main body.

There is some evidence that all iruses are actually the same species adapted to different environments. For example, a swarm body from one type of irus can cleave off and form a new main body of a different type if it encounters the correct environment.

Nafirus Symphonies

Nafiruses might be evil, but they love music, and they often compose complex, haunting symphonies to be performed by their own songbirds. While nafiruses are ordinarily the most territorial of iruses, there are tales of accomplished bards managing to encroach on a nafirus's mountain respectfully and survive the encounter by sharing their own musical compositions with the nafirus.

Swarm Rejuvenation: A Survey And Analysis Of The Field

The metaphysical process of swarm rejuvenation is complicated, and among the scholars who sought to understand it, many died to irus attacks before one extremely persistent researcher managed to publish a treatise named Swarm Rejuvenation: A Survey and Analysis of the Field, which is currently recognized as the most prominent collection of theories and data on the subject.

According to the text, when an irus's central body is defeated, it spreads the primal energy of its fey self throughout the swarm of creatures that make up its extended body. Each of these creatures is connected to the others and the main body by an invisible web of magical links, similar to arteries or a ley line network, and the web persists after the body's death.

This means that no matter how many of the swarm's constituents are killed, the irus can quickly shift their energy into whichever manages to survive. However, the transfer isn't lossless, and an unpredictable amount of the essence spills out during the process, especially if many of the swarm's constituent creatures also perish. This leads to a significant variation in how long it takes for the irus to rejuvenate, as the more energy it loses, the longer it takes to return.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Intimidation, Nature, Performance, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties air, bane, chaotic, charisma, constitution, dexterity, electricity, energy resistant (positive), evil, fire, mental, sonic, spells (Primal: animal vision, ash cloud, electric arc, freedom of movement, gust of wind, lightning storm, wall of wind), wild, winged

Iron Houndmaster.name: 铁猎犬训导师 Iron Houndmaster
Iron Houndmaster.tokenName: 铁猎犬驯导师 Iron Houndmaster

Split Anatomy.name: 分裂解剖 Split Anatomy
Split Anatomy.description:
铁猎犬驯导师的两个半身并未完全接线以协同运作。当铁猎犬驯导师掷先攻时，其猎犬半身使用其正常的先攻掷骰，而其主人半身使用其先攻掷骰结果–5。任一半身都不能延迟。它不再像通常那样获得三个动作和一个反应，而是铁猎犬驯导师的每个半身在其各自的回合获得两个动作和一个反应。两个半身分别计算其多重攻击加值。只有主人能够使用金属拳与电击棍打击，且只有猎犬能够使用金属獠牙与飞镖枪打击。

The iron houndmaster's two halves are not fully wired to function in unison. When the iron houndmaster rolls initiative, its hound half uses its normal initiative roll and its master half uses the result of its initiative roll –5. Neither half can Delay. Instead of getting three actions and one reaction as normal, each half of the iron houndmaster gains two actions and one reaction on its respective turn. The halves calculate their multiple attack bonus separately. Only the master can use the metal fist and shock stick Strikes, and only the hound can use the metallic fangs and dart gun Strikes.

Release the Hound.name: 释放猎犬 Release the Hound
Release the Hound.description:
当铁猎犬驯犬师被降低至60或更少生命值时，其两个半身分离。其剩余生命值在猎犬与主人之间分配，取整向上。分离期间，两半身在各自的回合获得3个动作和1个反应动作（），猎犬的速度提升至50尺，且两半身的AC均降低至24。

When the iron houndmaster is reduced to 60 or fewer Hit Points, its two halves separate. Its remaining Hit Points are split between the hound and the master, rounding up. While separated, the two halves gain 3 actions and a reaction on each of their turns, the hound's Speed increases to 50 feet, and both halves have their AC reduced to 24.

Bring Down.name: 击落 Bring Down
Bring Down.description:
需求 只有猎犬半身可以使用此动作

效果 猎犬进行一次金属獠牙打击。命中时，它还会将目标击倒为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}，且在大成功或大失败命中时，目标额外受到 [[/r 1d8[persistent,bleed]]] 伤害。

Requirements Only the hound half can use this action

Effect The hound performs a metallic fangs Strike. On a hit, it also knocks the target @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}, and on a critical hit, the target takes an additional [[/r 1d8[persistent,bleed]]] damage.

Net Cannon.name: 网炮 Net Cannon
Net Cannon.description:
需求 只有猎犬半身可以使用此动作

效果 猎犬半身向60英尺内的一个目标发射一张网。目标尝试一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:26]豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物成为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}直到猎犬下一回合结束，不过它可以使用一个交互动作提前结束该效果。

失败 该生物被网缠住。它成为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}且off-guard，直到它成功逃脱，且@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} DC为26。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该生物还会被击倒为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。铁猎犬训犬师在[[/br 1d4 #Net Cannon Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用网炮。

Requirements Only the hound half can use this action

Effect The hound half launches a net at a target within 60 feet. The target attempts a @Check[type:reflex|dc:26] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until the end of the hound's next turn, though it can use an Interact action to end the effect early.

Failure The creature is caught in the net. It is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} and off-guard until it Escapes, with an @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} DC of 26.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is also knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}. The iron houndmaster can't use Net Cannon again for [[/br 1d4 #Net Cannon Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Subduing Strike.name: 制伏打击 Subduing Strike
Subduing Strike.description:
需求 只有主导的一半可以使用此动作

效果 主导者进行一次近战打击。命中时，目标承受该打击的正常伤害，并尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23] 豁免；此额外效果具有失能（特征）。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}。

大失败 目标为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 4}。

Requirements Only the master half can use this action

Effect The master makes a melee Strike. On a hit, the target takes the normal damage from the Strike and attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23] save; this additional effect has the incapacitation trait.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 4}.

Iron Houndmaster.publicNotes:
当某个构装体工坊停止生产猎犬型与卫士型构装体并将剩余型号当作废料处理后，一名离经叛道的构装体工匠找到了这些废料并试图让它们重新运作。结果便是一批铁猎犬主——由不匹配的机械巡逻单位拼凑而成，尤擅于定位并捕获任何愚蠢到踏入其巡逻区域的闯入者。

分离焦虑

允许铁猎犬主分离是一项高风险的提议，因为其两半可能无法正确地重新组合。当战场上有多个猎犬主时，最近的两半会在战斗结束时试图将自身重新接线并结合。结果可能是两个“主”或两个“猎犬”被融合在一起，并导致其能力出现重复。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 64/140/250 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（重型）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、运动、潜行、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害、敏捷、电击、能量抗性（负能量、正能量）、力量、投掷、野性

When a construct workshop ceased production of hound and guard type constructs and scrapped the remaining models, a rogue construct crafter found the scrap and tried to make them work again. The result was a batch of iron houndmasters, mismatched mechanical patrol units that excelled at locating and capturing any trespasser foolish enough to enter their patrol field.

Separation Anxiety

Allowing an iron houndmaster to separate is a risky proposition because the halves may not combine back together correctly. When multiple houndmasters are on the field, the closest halves attempt to rewire themselves together at the end of combat. The result may be two masters or two hounds fused together, with a resulting duplication in their abilities.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, dexterity, electricity, energy resistant (negative, positive), strength, throwing, wild
Iron Houndmaster.prototypeToken: 钢铁猎犬驯犬师 Iron Houndmaster

Inkblot Ooze.name: 墨渍软泥怪 Inkblot Ooze

Ink Sense.name: 墨水感官 Ink Sense
Ink Sense.description:
墨渍泥怪拥有一种特殊的感官，使其能够侦测墨水中存在的颜料，并在所列射程内对墨水的存在及其大致数量保持警觉。

The inkblot ooze has a special sense allowing it to detect the pigments present in ink, alerting it to the presence and general quantity of ink within the listed range.

Motion Sense.name: 动作感官 Motion Sense
Motion Sense.description:
墨渍泥怪可以通过震动以及空气或水的移动来感知附近的移动。

An inkblot ooze can sense nearby motion through vibration and air or water movement.

Curious Symmetry.name: 好奇的对称性 Curious Symmetry
Curious Symmetry.description:
60英尺。墨迹泥怪不断变换、对称的形态会刺激附近生物的想象力，引诱它们陷入催眠般的恍惚。任何位于该区域内且能看见墨迹泥怪的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 豁免。失败时，该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}，持续[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}；在大失败时，它们还会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}，持续时间相同。在该持续时间结束时，或当某生物在其豁免中成功时，它随后会对该灵光暂时免疫1分钟。

60 feet. The inkblot ooze's constantly-shifting, symmetrical form stimulates the imaginations of nearby creatures, luring them into a hypnotic daze. Any creature within the area that can see the inkblot ooze must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save. On a failure, the creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}, and on a critical failure they are also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for the same duration. At the end of this duration, or if a creature succeeds at its save, it is then temporarily immune to the aura for 1 minute.

Inkspill.name: 墨溢 Inkspill
Inkspill.description:
每当墨渍软泥怪对一名生物或无人看管的物体以其伪足打击成功时，墨渍软泥怪会将自身的一部分形态溢到其触及范围内的一份文本上（例如书籍或卷轴），试图将其毁坏。该文本必须是该次打击的目标，或位于目标所持用或穿戴的物体上。若该文本由某个生物持用或穿戴，则该生物可以尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] 豁免以保护该文本。若失败，则该文本被墨汁般的软泥覆盖，使其无法使用。若大成功或大失败为大失败，或对抗无人看管的物体，则除失败效果外，该文本内的一个随机法术、配方或页面会被永久抹除。以此方式被毁坏的文本可以在1小时内通过一次成功的 @Check[type:crafting|dc:25] 检定来恢复；而因大成功或大失败为大失败而被抹除的法术或配方，可以在过程中使用该页面，以其通常花费的一半成本重新学会。

Whenever an inkblot ooze makes a successful pseudopod Strike against a creature or unattended object, the inkblot ooze spills some of its form over a text within its reach, such as a book or scroll, in an attempt to ruin it. The text must be either the target of the Strike or on an object held or worn by the target. If the text is held or worn by a creature, that creature can attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] save to protect the text. On a failure the text is covered in inky ooze, rendering it unusable. On a critical failure, or against an unattended object, in addition to the failure effects, a random spell, formula, or page within the text is permanently erased. A text ruined in this way can be recovered over the course of an hour with a successful @Check[type:crafting|dc:25] check, and a spell or formula erased by a critical failure can be relearned for half its usual cost by using the page in the process.

Hide in Pages.name: 页面中的兽皮 Hide in Pages
Hide in Pages.description:
需求 墨迹泥怪与一本至少有10页的书相邻

效果 墨迹泥怪渗入书页之中。它在用于伪装成书本的常规特性时，其欺瞒检定与DC自动取35。它无法采取行动，除非用于终止该效果——要么再次使用此能力，要么在书被打开时作为一个反应动作。當其在书中处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden} 状态时，墨迹泥怪的“好奇对称”灵光被压制。

Requirements The inkblot ooze is adjacent to a book with at least 10 pages

Effect The inkblot ooze seeps into the pages of the book. It has an automatic result of 35 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a regular feature of the book. It can't act except to dismiss the effect, either by using this ability again, or as a reaction to the book being opened. While @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden} within a book, the inkblot ooze's Curious Symmetry aura is suppressed.

Inkblot Ooze.publicNotes:
据认为最初是由一瓶洒出的魔法墨水与一本塞得过满的法术书相互作用而诞生，墨渍软泥怪因其能毁掉整座图书馆的习性，而在全世界范围内被公认为书呆子们的克星。即便在战斗中，墨渍软泥怪也倾向于把注意力集中在携带最多读物的那个敌人身上；这种行为被推测是在通过模仿自身的诞生来繁衍同类。当它们找不到更多可供玷污的文本时，已知墨渍软泥怪会在书中冬眠，并在书被打开时从中猛然跃出。

墨渍测验

墨渍测验是一种相当知名的检查，用于判定某人是否存在思维障碍。检查者向受试者展示纸上的墨迹图像，往往是对称图案，并询问受试者墨迹描绘了什么。不那么为人所知的是，墨渍测验其实是由一位学者临场编出来的——当时他正在查阅一本被墨渍软泥怪侵染的书。软泥怪从书中跃出，沿着令人目眩的图案舞动一阵后便逃走了。面对要么因书籍受损而失去客户、要么临时编造新测验的选择，这位惊慌失措的医生假装早就预料到软泥怪会出现，并问道：“那么，那让你感觉如何？”

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根，体质，能量抗性（正能量），精神，力量，狂野

Thought to have first been created by the interactions between a spilled bottle of magical ink and an overstuffed spellbook, inkblot oozes are well known for being the bane of bookish types the world over due to their propensity for ruining entire libraries. Even in combat, an inkblot ooze tends to focus its attentions on whichever foe is carrying the most literature, a behavior that is theorized to be an attempt to propagate its kind by emulating its creation. When they can't find further texts to spoil, inkblot oozes are known to hibernate inside books and spring out of them once they are opened.

The Inkblot Test

The inkblot test is a fairly well-known exam for determining if a person has thought disorders. The examiner presents images of ink on paper, often in symmetrical patterns, and asks the patient what the ink depicts. Not so well-known is the fact that the inkblot test was made up on the spot by an academic who was consulting a book infested by an inkblot ooze. The ooze leapt out of the book and danced in dizzying patterns before fleeing. Faced with the choice of losing a client due to damaged books or improvising a new test, the panicked doctor pretended to have planned the ooze's appearance and asked, "So how did that make you feel?"

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), mental, strength, wild
Inkblot Ooze.prototypeToken: 墨迹斑点软泥怪 Inkblot Ooze

Imaginary Friend.name: 想象朋友 Imaginary Friend

Telepathy 100 feet (Can Only Communicate.name: 心灵感应 100 尺（只能与缔结羁绊的朋友沟通） Telepathy 100 feet (Can Only Communicate With Bonded Friend)

Friend Bond.name: 友谊羁绊 Friend Bond
Friend Bond.description:
一个想象朋友会与想象出它的生物绑定，并且它必须始终保持在该生物120尺内。如果它偏离超过120尺，它会消失，并在1天内于其绑定的朋友10尺内重新出现。如果其绑定的朋友死亡，它就会被摧毁。

An imaginary friend is bound to the creature that imagined it, and it must remain within 120 feet of that creature. If it strays further than 120 feet, it vanishes and reappears within 1 day within 10 feet of its bonded friend. It is destroyed if its bonded friend dies.

Natural Invisibility.name: 天生隐形 Natural Invisibility
Natural Invisibility.description:
一个想象朋友天生对除其缔结朋友之外的所有生物都处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} 状态。

A imaginary friend is naturally @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} to all creatures except for its bonded friend.

Imaginary Shield.name: 幻影盾 Imaginary Shield
Imaginary Shield.description:
触发 一个生物尝试对虚构朋友的契友进行一次近战打击

效果 虚构朋友进行一步移动。若其在移动结束时与其契友相邻，则虚构朋友改为承受该次打击的伤害而非其契友。虚构朋友的抗力适用于此伤害，但即使该攻击为非魔法，该抗力也不会加倍。

Trigger A creature attempts a melee Strike against the imaginary friend's bonded friend

Effect The imaginary friend Steps. If it ends its movement adjacent to its bonded friend, the imaginary friend takes the damage from the Strike instead of its bonded friend. The imaginary friend's resistance applies to this damage, but the resistance isn't doubled even if the attack was non-magical.

Together, Charge!.name: 一同冲锋！ Together, Charge!
Together, Charge!.description:
触发 虚构朋友的契约伙伴进行疾行。

效果 虚构朋友疾行两次并进行一次虚构之剑打击。只要虚构朋友至少移动了20英尺，它在其攻击上获得+2环境加值。若契约伙伴的等级等于或低于虚构朋友，则契约伙伴在其下一次攻击上获得+2环境加值。使用此能力后，虚构朋友成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.zXOxw4fmCG8oS9ry]{效果：一起，冲锋！}

Trigger The imaginary friend's bonded friend Strides.

Effect The imaginary friend Strides twice and makes an imaginary sword Strike. As long as the imaginary friend moved at least 20 feet, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus on its attack. If the bonded friend is equal or lower level than the imaginary friend, the bonded friend gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its next attack. After using this ability, the imaginary friend is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.zXOxw4fmCG8oS9ry]{Effect: Together, Charge!}

Knee Whack.name: 膝击 Knee Whack
Knee Whack.description:
随后，想象朋友Steps用一把想象之剑对触及范围内的一个目标进行打击。如果该攻击命中，想象朋友立即尝试对目标进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{绊摔}；该次绊摔尝试不会适用或增加想象朋友的多重攻击减值。

The imaginary friend Steps then makes an imaginary sword Strike against a target within reach. If the attack hits, the imaginary friend immediately attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} the target; this Trip attempt doesn't apply or increase the imaginary friend's multiple attack penalty.

Imaginary Friend.publicNotes:
幻想朋友是白日梦的具象化体现，带着强烈的守护欲。导致梦境界与现实之间出现裂隙的异常现象，可能使幻想朋友从最初想象他们之人的思想、记忆与坚定不移的信念中显现出来。他们常以其创造者的理想形态出现，通常与创造者拥有相同的年代与传承；不过，也有一些幻想朋友会以动物、构装体、恐龙或神话生物的样貌出现。

幻想朋友勇敢无畏、胆识过人，而他们为保护同伴甘愿牺牲自身存在的意愿无与伦比。不过，幻想朋友并非天生好斗；他们是友善的伙伴，其无私也在很大程度上解释了他们为何随时准备为伙伴献出生命。

其他幻想朋友

中型幻想朋友很常见，由于其较大的体型，他们不会获得任何增益或减益。大型生物通常会有大型幻想朋友；在这种情况下，你也可以选择套用《Pathfinder Bestiary》中描述的精英调整。通常，具有飞行与水栖（特征）类人生物会拥有一位具备相当飞行或游泳速度的幻想朋友。以动物或神话生物形态出现的幻想朋友，会将其幻想武器替换为可比的徒手攻击，并造成力场伤害。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、欺瞒）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、力场、心灵、野性

Imaginary friends are fiercely protective manifestations of daydreams. Anomalies that cause tears between the Dreamlands and reality can cause an imaginary friend to manifest from the thoughts, memories, and unwavering belief of those who first imagined them. They often appear as the ideal form of their creator and are usually of the same age and heritage, though some imaginary friends appear as animals, constructs, dinosaurs, or mythical creatures.

Imaginary friends are brave and daring, and their willingness to sacrifice their own existence to protect their comrade is unparalleled. Imaginary friends aren't naturally aggressive, though; they're amicable companions whose selflessness goes a long way toward explaining their readiness to lay down their life for a companion.

Other Imaginary Friends

Medium imaginary friends are common, and they gain no benefits or penalties because of their larger size. Large creatures usually have Large imaginary friends, in which case you might choose to also apply the elite adjustments described in Pathfinder Bestiary. Flying and aquatic humanoids usually have an imaginary friend with a comparable fly or swim Speed. Imaginary friends that appear as animals or mythical creatures replace their imaginary weapons with comparable unarmed attacks that deal force damage.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), force, mental, wild

Illiceru.name: 伊利塞鲁 Illiceru

Tremorsense (Precise) 60 feet.name: 颤动感知（精确）60尺 Tremorsense (Precise) 60 feet

Scent (Imprecise) 120 feet.name: 嗅觉（模糊）120英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 120 feet

Naturally Invisible.name: 天生隐形 Naturally Invisible
Naturally Invisible.description:
伊利塞鲁始终处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible}状态，不过其触手末端的人类般部分始终可见。因此，无法看见伊利塞鲁的生物不会因其触手打击而处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}状态。这些触手可以作为打击和法术的目标、而非以伊利塞鲁自身为目标，从而避免对@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}生物进行以其为目标时所需的纯骰检定；不过当目标是触手时，伊利塞鲁的AC与反射豁免获得+2环境加值。

The illiceru is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} at all times, though the human- like ends of its tentacles are always visible. Due to this, creatures that can't see the illiceru are not @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} to its tentacle Strikes. These tentacles can be targeted by Strikes and spells instead of the illiceru itself to avoid the flat check to target a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creature, although the illiceru has a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC and Reflex saves when the target is a tentacle.

Gluttonous Capture.name: 贪食擒拿 Gluttonous Capture
Gluttonous Capture.description:
需求 illiceru的上一个动作是以触手打击成功

效果 illiceru将其命中的生物拉入相邻的空间，然后对其进行一次颚部打击。若成功，illiceru随后擒抱目标。

Requirements The illiceru's last action was a success with a tentacle Strike

Effect The illiceru pulls the creature it hit into an adjacent space, then makes a jaws Strike against it. On a success, the illiceru then Grabs the target.

Plea for Help.name: 求助 Plea for Help
Plea for Help.description:
伊利塞鲁的一条触手畏缩并乞求帮助，使一名敌人分心并感到恐惧。伊利塞鲁尝试进行一次欺瞒检定，对抗一个生物的意志 DC。无论该检定结果如何，目标都会在 1 分钟内对该怪物的“乞求帮助”暂时免疫。

大成功 目标变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3}，并且在本回合内对伊利塞鲁下一次触手打击处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}。

成功 同大成功，但目标变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}。

One of the illiceru's tentacles cowers and begs for help, distracting and frightening a foe. The illiceru attempts a Deception check against a creature's Will DC. Regardless of the result of the check, the target is temporarily immune to this monster's Plea for Help for 1 minute.

Critical Success The target becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3} and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} to the illiceru's next tentacle Strike this turn.

Success As a critical success, except the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Swallow Whole.name: 整吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
大型，[[/r (2d8+8)[钝击],2d6[酸蚀]]], 破裂 20，illiceru 对其内部的生物并非 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Large, [[/r (2d8+8)[bludgeoning],2d6[acid]]], Rupture 20, the illiceru is not @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} to creatures inside it.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Illiceru.publicNotes:
伊利塞鲁是噩梦般的生物，它们永久隐形，唯有两条触手的末端可见，而这两条末端几乎是对人类的完美复制品。它们像操纵木偶一样操纵这些触手，在村庄与城市间潜行，站在拥挤人群之上，并用蛛形的腿攀爬建筑。伊利塞鲁的每条触手都能说话，它们便用这种能力与猎物交谈。它们说服人们离开城镇，或跟随它们走进小巷，在那里伊利塞鲁可以在不引起注意的情况下将其吞下。

尽管伊利塞鲁的触手几乎是完美的仿制品，但仍可能被受过显著训练或格外多疑的人识破。每只伊利塞鲁都有两条触手。它们常常呈现为一男一女的外貌，并通常扮作夫妻。它们的眼睛是假的，因此往往不会进行眼神交流。当人们知道某个区域内有伊利塞鲁出没时，往往会对任何一对陌生人保持警惕。在极端情况下，多疑之人可能会强迫陌生人分开，并证明他们不是伊利塞鲁的触手。

随着伊利塞鲁老去，它的傀儡也会一同老去。每个傀儡的衰老速度远快于人类，每五年便从青年步入老年。当它的傀儡变得过于年迈时，伊利塞鲁会进入冬眠状态。傀儡会在此期间脱落，而新的、更年轻的傀儡会取而代之。偶尔，一只幼年伊利塞鲁会从被丢弃傀儡的腐败残骸中出现，并攀附在其亲代身上；亲代会喂养它，直到它长出属于自己的、孩童大小的傀儡。

与伊利塞鲁共舞

胆大且脚步灵活的人，可能会通过与两人共舞来测试他们是否为伊利塞鲁的傀儡：不断旋转穿梭，直到其触手扭结成团。当然，许多并非傀儡的人也会对与陌生人跳舞感到不适；而一只认为自己即将暴露、心生恼怒的伊利塞鲁，可能会选择用颚部迅速终结这场闹剧。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 175/390/720 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动，欺瞒，交涉，隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀，克星，魅力，体质，敏捷，延伸，能量抗性（正能量），智力，精神，力量，野性

Illiceru are nightmarish creatures that are permanently invisible except for the ends of their two tentacles, which are nearly perfect duplications of humans. They puppet these tentacles as they stalk villages and cities, standing above crowds and climbing on buildings with their spider-like legs. Each of an illiceru's tentacles can speak, and they use this ability to talk to their prey. They convince people to leave town or follow them to alleys, where the illiceru can swallow them without drawing attention.

While an illiceru's tentacles are almost perfect imitations, they can be spotted by a notably trained or particularly paranoid individual. Each illiceru has two tentacles. They often take the appearance of one man and one woman, and they usually act as husband and wife. Their eyes are fake, so they commonly don't make eye contact. When an illiceru is known to be in the area, people tend to be wary of any pair of strangers. In extreme cases, suspicious folk might force strangers to separate and prove they aren't the tentacles of an illiceru.

As an illiceru ages, so too do its puppets. Each puppet ages at a much faster rate than a human, growing from young adulthood to elderly every five years. When its puppets get too old, an illiceru enters a state of hibernation. The puppets fall off during this time, and new, younger puppets take their place. Occasionally, a baby illiceru will emerge from the decay of a discarded puppet and cling to its parent, who feeds it until it grows child-sized puppets of its own.

Dances With Illiceru

Those who are daring and quick on their feet may test whether two people are illiceru puppets by dancing with them, spinning and weaving until its tentacles get twisted in knots. Of course, plenty of people who aren't puppets are uncomfortable dancing with strangers, and a frustrated illiceru that thinks it is about to be exposed may choose to cut the shenanigans short with its jaws.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 175/390/720 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Deception, Diplomacy, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, mental, strength, wild

Ictioctor.name: 伊克提奥克托尔 Ictioctor

Swarm Telepathy.name: 虫群心灵感应 Swarm Telepathy
Swarm Telepathy.description:
鱼形督导者可以用心灵感应交流，但它的虫群心智总是以一阵充满暴力威胁、毫无意义的问题与深奥的胡言乱语的喧嚣向外伸展。试图对鱼形督导者进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Sense Motive]{洞悉动机}、读取它的心智，或以心灵感应效果将其作为目标的生物必须先在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:18] 意志豁免中成功，否则会变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{迟钝 1}。

The ictioctor can communicate with telepathy, but its swarm mind always reaches out with a cacophony of violent threats, nonsensical questions, and esoteric ravings. Creatures who attempt to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Sense Motive]{Sense Motive} against the ictioctor, read its mind, or target it with a telepathic effect must first succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:18] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}.

Jellyfish Venom.name: 水母毒液 Jellyfish Venom
Jellyfish Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 1} (1 轮)

阶段 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 2} (1 轮)

阶段 3 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 3} (1 轮)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 3} (1 round)

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Vomit Swarm (Jellyfish).name: 呕吐虫群（水母） Vomit Swarm (Jellyfish)
Vomit Swarm (Jellyfish).description:
你喷吐出一团魔法虫群。你从自己的想象中唤起并塑造这些生物，使你能够改变这些生物的外观（通常是蜈蚣、蟑螂、黄蜂和蠕虫的混合），但这不会改变该法术的效果。害虫在区域内爬满任何人，它们的啃咬与蜇刺造成[[/r 2d8[piercing]]]伤害（基础反射豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。一旦该法术结束，虫群便会消失。

升阶（+1） 将伤害提高[[/r 1d8[piercing]]]。

You belch forth a swarm of magical vermin. You evoke and shape the creatures from your own imagination, allowing you to change the appearance of the creatures (typically a mix of centipedes, roaches, wasps, and worms), but this doesn't change the effect of the spell. The vermin swarm over anyone in the area, their bites and stings dealing [[/r 2d8[piercing]]] damage (basic Reflex save). A creature that fails its saving throw also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. Once the spell ends, the swarm disappears.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by [[/r 1d8[piercing]]].

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一次脉冲，用以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法的存在与否外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。

你仅在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术在射程内侦测到的、最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同样强，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你还会锁定最高等级魔法的来源。如同模糊感官，你不会得知确切位置，但能将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（或若其大于该范围，则缩小到最近的等效区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Split Skull.name: 碎颅 Split Skull
Split Skull.description:
鱼脑怪提取一名死亡不超过1分钟的生物的大脑，并吸收该生物的知识。持续1分钟，鱼脑怪针对该死亡生物的盟友进行的攻击掷骰、技能检定、豁免和AC获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.3wsDr1mTuxGTpydS]{效果：裂颅}

The ictioctor extracts the brain of a creature that has been dead for no more than 1 minute, and absorbs the creature's knowledge. For 1 minute, the ictioctor gains a +2 circumstance bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, saving throws, and AC against the dead creature's allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.3wsDr1mTuxGTpydS]{Effect: Split Skull}

Swarming Display.name: 蜂群展示 Swarming Display
Swarming Display.description:
鱼操者分离其虫群的一半，盘旋成一种分散注意力且带有威胁性的展示。在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:18] 豁免，之后它们在1分钟内对进一步的虫群展示暂时免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}，直到其下一回合开始。

失败 该生物成为off-guard，直到鱼操者下一回合结束。

大失败 同失败，且当该生物处于off-guard时不能Step。

The ictioctor detaches half of its swarm to swirl around in a distracting and threatening display. Creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:18] save, after which they are temporarily immune to further Swarming Displays for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until the beginning of their next turn.

Failure The creature is off-guard until the end of the ictioctor's next turn.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature can't Step while they are off-guard.

Ictioctor.publicNotes:
鱼触古魔（特征）是具有蜂巢思维意识的昆虫类古魔（特征）。鱼触古魔（特征）没有可称之为面孔的东西。取而代之的是，它的几丁质胸部顶部覆盖着一团翻涌的水母虫群。这团虫群并非仅仅是装饰，而是该生物分裂意识的所在。鱼触古魔（特征）对拥有单一心智的生物着迷，而古魔（特征）可能会试图研究这类样本，或将其独特的心智加入自己的集合。当然，这两种行为通常都以劈开该生物的头骨作为开端。鱼触古魔（特征）有时会与收脑者谈判，以换取为这些异族指引它们穿越深渊领域的通道，从而获得样本。

由于缺乏协调虫群的中央权威，鱼触古魔（特征）的心智很容易自相攻讦。虫群成员可能决定追求不同目标，导致主体做出怪异行为，例如原地绕圈行走，甚至用爪子抓挠自己。若鱼触古魔（特征）最近整合了新生物的知识，这类分裂更可能发生。信息可能比其他部分更早抵达虫群的某些区域，或引发它们以不同方式作出反应。

不同心态

已观察到其他鱼触古魔（特征）变体，它们具有不同类型的虫群：蜱虫、变形虫、老鼠，或任何其他具有虫群心智的生物。你可以通过改变“虫群啃咬”造成的伤害类型（例如老鼠虫群使用穿刺伤害）以及让目标暴露于的苦难（例如老鼠虫群的秽物热），来体现这些差异，而不是水母毒液。一些基于飞行虫群的变体，可能会让鱼触古魔（特征）获得飞行速度而非游泳速度。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

合格精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、盾牌、察觉物品、技能物品（杂技、运动、威吓、神秘学）

合格灌注属性 破邪、混乱、魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、智力、毒素、法术（隐秘：呕吐虫群）、力量、坚固、投掷、狂野

Ictioctors are insectoid qlippoth with a hivemind consciousness. An ictioctor has no face to speak of. Instead, its chitinous thorax is topped with a teeming swarm of jellyfish. This swarm is not merely an adornment but the seat of the creature's schismatic consciousness. Ictioctors are fascinated by creatures with a solitary mind, and the qlippoth might attempt to study such specimens or add their unique minds to their own assembly. Of course, either of these activities usually begins by splitting open the creature's skull. Ictioctors sometimes parlay with brain collectors to obtain specimens in exchange for showing the aliens passageways through their abyssal realms.

Ictioctor minds are prone to turning on themselves due to the lack of a central authority to coordinate the swarm. Members may decide to pursue different goals, leading to the main body engaging in strange behaviors such as walking in circles or even clawing itself. Such schisms are more likely when the ictioctor has recently integrated a new creature's knowledge. The information may reach some parts of the swarm sooner than others or cause them to react in different ways.

Different Mind-sets

Other variants of ictioctors have been observed, with different types of swarms: ticks, amoebas, rats, or any other creature with a swarm mind. You can represent these differences by changing the type of damage dealt by Swarming Bites (such as piercing for a rat swarm) and the affliction to which the target is exposed (such as filth fever for a rat swarm) instead of jellyfish venom. Some variations based on flying swarms might grant the ictioctor a fly Speed instead of a swim Speed.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (light, medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation, Occultism)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, poison, spells (Occult: vomit swarm), strength, sturdy, throwing, wild

Heat Glutton.name: 噬热者 Heat Glutton

Heat Sense.name: 热感官 Heat Sense
Heat Sense.description:
噬热者可以在所列射程内感知并定位热源。

A heat glutton can sense and locate heat sources within the listed range.

Hunger Frenzy.name: 饥饿狂乱 Hunger Frenzy
Hunger Frenzy.description:
触发 一个生物对噬热者造成火焰伤害，且距离足够近，使噬热者能以一次 Stride 的移动触及该生物

效果 噬热者猛扑到触发该反应的生物身上。

Trigger A creature deals fire damage to the heat glutton and is close enough for the heat glutton to reach with a single Stride

Effect The heat glutton Pounces on the triggering creature.

Personal Tundra.name: 个人苔原 Personal Tundra
Personal Tundra.description:
60英尺。贪热者持续吸收热量，会在其灵光内形成一片冰面，其为困难地形。贪热者在该区域内以全速度移动。一旦贪热者移开，冰面通常会融化到不再是困难地形，不过霜迹在之后仍会保留一段时间。如果温度足够低以正常维持结冰，冰面会一直保留，直到环境条件变暖。

60 feet. The constant heat absorption of the heat glutton creates an ice patch within the aura, which is difficult terrain. The heat glutton moves at full Speed in the area. Once the heat glutton moves away, the ice typically melts enough to no longer be difficult terrain, though the signs of rime remain for some time thereafter. If the temperature is cold enough to support ice normally, the ice remains until conditions warm up.

Feed.name: 喂食 Feed
Feed.description:
贪热者吞食其在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内的所有热源，熄灭附近的火焰。它会自动熄灭非魔法火焰，并尝试反制魔法火焰（反制等级 5，反制调整值 [[/br 1d20+18 #Counteract]]{+18}）。如果贪热者熄灭了任意火焰，它会治疗 @Damage[1d8[healing]] 生命值；此外，每以此方式熄灭一个魔法火焰，额外治疗 1d8 生命值，最多为熄灭九个或更多魔法火焰而治疗 [[/r 10d8[healing]]] 生命值。

The heat glutton feeds on all heat sources in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], putting out nearby fires. It extinguishes non-magical fires automatically and attempts to counteract magical fires (counteract level 5, counteract modifier [[/br 1d20+18 #Counteract]]{+18}). The heat glutton heals @Damage[1d8[healing]] Hit Points if it extinguishes any fires, plus an additional 1d8 Hit Points per magical fire extinguished this way, to a maximum of [[/r 10d8[healing]]] Hit Points for extinguishing nine or more magical fires.

Ice Grip.name: 寒冰之握 Ice Grip
Ice Grip.description:
需求 嗜热者抓住了一名生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

效果 嗜热者以被抓住生物的体热为食，造成 [[/r (2d12+5)[cold]]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29|basic:true] 豁免。

Requirements The heat glutton has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

Effect The heat glutton feeds on the body heat of the grabbed creature, dealing [[/r (2d12+5)[cold]]] damage with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29|basic:true] save.

Pounce.name: 猛扑 Pounce
Pounce.description:
炽热饕餮移动并在该次移动结束时进行一次打击。如果炽热饕餮在开始此动作时处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}，它在攻击之后才会解除隐藏。

The heat glutton Strides and makes a Strike at the end of that movement. If the heat glutton began this action @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}, it remains hidden until after the attack.

Heat Glutton.publicNotes:
作为巨人狼獾的智慧魔法分支，噬热者同样好斗而喜怒无常，但相似之处也仅止于此。噬热者是游牧生物，在沙漠与荒地间游荡，绝望地试图满足它们对热量永无止境的饥渴。噬热者会制造属于自己的永久私人苔原，吸入周遭的一切热量，拼命把体温维持在足以避免被永久冻死的水平。

根据传奇记载，一位追逐荣耀的游牧英雄曾试图驯化一对噬热者。他坚信自己能用魔法让它们保持饱足，于是为它们提供了几乎无限的热量供其吞噬。但噬热者不断长大，无论是体型还是饥饿都持续膨胀，最终它们大到即便他最强大的术士也无法再让它们温顺。它们的体型已大到私人苔原覆盖整片沙漠，吞噬方圆数里内的每一个活之物。若非一条银龙挺身而出解决此事，没人能说它们还会游荡到多远、造成多大的伤害。这个故事是一则警示：最好别去招惹噬热者。

狩猎噬热者

围绕噬热者的私人苔原使它们格外容易追踪与避开，因为它们身后会留下寒冷的轨迹。然而，对毫无防备的旅人来说，沙漠里一片来历不明的冰地可能会显得像个需要解开的谜团，从而将好奇者引向很可能的毁灭。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 125/275/500 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（杂技、运动、威吓、潜行、生存）

可用灌注属性 克星、寒冷、体质、敏捷、延伸、能量抗性（火焰、正能量）、邪恶、尖刺、力量、野性

Intelligent magical offshoots of giant wolverines, heat gluttons are just as aggressive and temperamental, but the resemblance stops there. Heat gluttons are nomadic creatures roaming deserts and wastelands in a desperate attempt to satisfy their insatiable hunger for heat. Heat gluttons create their own permanent personal tundra, sucking in all the heat around them, desperately trying to keep their body temperature high enough to avoid permanently freezing to death.

According to legend, a glory-hunting nomadic hero once attempted to domesticate a pair of heat gluttons. Convinced he could keep them satiated through magical means, he supplied them with nearly unlimited heat upon which to feed. But the heat gluttons kept growing, both in size and hunger, until they eventually reached a size where even his most powerful sorcerers could no longer keep them docile. They had reached such a size that their personal tundra covered the whole desert, feeding on every living thing for miles around. None can tell how far they would have roamed and the damage they could have done if a silver dragon hadn't taken it upon themselves to solve the issue. The story provides a cautionary tale: heat gluttons are better left alone.

Hunting Heat Gluttons

The personal tundra surrounding a heat glutton makes them remarkably easy to track and avoid, since they leave a trail of cold behind them. For an unaware traveler, however, the presence of an unexplained patch of ice in the desert might appear as a mystery to be resolved, leading the curious to their likely demise.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, cold, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (fire, positive), evil, spiked, strength, wild

Haunting Spoon.name: 闹鬼的勺子 Haunting Spoon

Lifesense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 生命感知（模糊）60尺 Lifesense (Imprecise) 60 feet

Construct Armor.name: 构筑护甲 Construct Armor
Construct Armor.description:
与普通物体一样，闹鬼汤匙也有硬度。闹鬼汤匙的硬度会使闹鬼汤匙受到的任何伤害减少等同于该硬度的数值。一旦闹鬼汤匙的生命值降至少于其一半，或在被大成功或大失败命中造成伤害时立即，其构装护甲便会破裂，移除硬度并将其护甲等级降至12。

Like normal objects, a haunting spoon also has Hardness. The haunting spoon's Hardness reduces any damage the haunting spoon takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once a haunting spoon is reduced to fewer than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks, removing the Hardness and reducing its Armor Class to 12.

Sounds of Distress.name: 痛苦之声 Sounds of Distress
Sounds of Distress.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发 一名生物进入闹鬼汤匙生命感知的射程

效果 闹鬼汤匙创造其先前目击过的一段声音的听觉幻象。幻象从闹鬼汤匙生命感知射程内的某个位置显现。由于闹鬼汤匙的性质与其起源，听觉幻象通常呈现为人们因恐惧或痛苦而尖叫、激烈的争吵、情绪激动的对话或类似情形。这些声音总是仿佛来自汤匙所在房间之外的另一间房间，并且其最大音量相当于四名普通人同时喊叫。检定成功的生物在进行一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:20] 察觉检定后，可以辨别这些声音是幻象。

Frequency once per round

Trigger A creature enters the range of the haunting spoon's lifesense

Effect The haunting spoon creates an auditory illusion of a snippet of sound it has previously witnessed. The illusion manifests from a location within the range of the haunting spoon's lifesense. Due to the nature of haunting spoons and their origin, the auditory illusion usually takes the form of people shouting in fear or agony, a violent argument, a heated conversation, or the like. The sounds always seem to originate from another room than the one the spoon is in and have a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. Creatures who succeed at a @Check[type:perception|dc:20] check can tell that the sounds are an illusion.

Big Scoop.name: 大勺一舀 Big Scoop
Big Scoop.description:
任何生物只要因鬼魅勺子的舀取打击而遭受一次大成功或大失败命中，就必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:17] 豁免。若为失败，该生物将陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} 状态，持续2轮，因为其会经历一场生动的幻觉：鬼魅勺子试图从其头颅中把眼睛舀出来，或以类似方式伤害任何视觉器官。

Any creature that suffers a critical hit from a haunting spoon's scoop Strike must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:17] save. On a failure, the creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} for 2 rounds, as they experience a vivid hallucination of the haunting spoon attempting to scoop out their eyes from their head or similarly damage any visual organs.

Haunting Spoon.publicNotes:
萦响勺是一种相当无害的构装体，与活化物体密切相关。萦响勺对大多数人几乎没有威胁，因为它们只会在直接受到暴力威胁时才会移动或攻击。其余时间里，它们会通过充当对话与类似声音的储存库来给任何与其同处一地的人带来轻微烦扰：将声音记录下来，并在有人靠近时随机回放整段内容。它们偶尔会出现在鬼婆（特征）的家中，或作为曾发生过暴力事件的住宅所产生的副产物。

虽然萦响勺及类似构装体可以被刻意制造，也可能以不同的形态出现，例如盘子或其他餐具，但它们最常见的情况是自然形成，并呈勺子形态。在一座房屋经历了大量争吵，或其内外频繁发生犯罪后，区域内的普通勺子中就可能诞生一把萦响勺。

萦响勺最常回放的声音，是它们最初“听到”的、促成其诞生的第一段内容，通常是一场暴力事件或措辞特别激烈的争吵。不止一起谋杀案曾因萦响勺开始回放案发现场而被意外侦破。这促使执法机关、犯罪组织与间谍组织尝试利用萦响勺进行实验，但不幸的是，勺子记录的内容太多，导致它们很快就无法作为工具去记录并复现任何特定内容——除了孕育它们的那起事件本身。

一勺糖

一名侦探曾注意到，清洗一把沾血的勺子会使其以低得多的频率回放创造它的那起谋杀案。进一步实验揭示，将不同物质放在勺子上，会使萦响勺更偏好回放它上一次承载那些物质时所经历的内容。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 3.5/7/13 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型，中型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量，正能量），精神，坚固，狂野，有翼

A haunting spoon is a fairly harmless construct closely related to animated objects. Haunting spoons are of little threat to most folk since they only move or attack when directly threatened with violence. They spend the rest of their time as a mild annoyance for anyone who would dwell in the same locale by acting as a repository for conversations and similar sounds, recording them, and replaying entire pieces at random whenever people come close. They are occasionally found in the households of hags or as a byproduct of homes that have seen violent incidents in the past.

While haunting spoons and similar constructs can be created intentionally and can come in variant forms, like plates or other cutlery, most often they occur naturally and in spoon form. After a house has seen many arguments or frequent crimes in or around it, a haunted spoon might arise from regular spoons in the area.

The sound that haunting spoons replay most frequently is the first thing they "heard" that catalyzed their original creation, which is usually a violent incident or a particularly strongly worded argument. More than one murder case has been accidentally solved when a haunting spoon began replaying the scene. This has led to experiments by law enforcement, criminal, and espionage organizations to make use of haunting spoons, but unfortunately, the spoons record so much that they quickly become useless as a tool to record and reproduce anything in particular other than the incident that spawned them.

A Spoonful Of Sugar

A detective once noticed that cleaning a bloody spoon caused it to replay the murder that created it on a much less frequent basis. Further experimentation revealed that placing different substances on the spoon causes a haunting spoon to prefer replaying what it experienced when it last held those substances.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), mental, sturdy, wild, winged

Handless Mage.name: 无手法师 Handless Mage

Proprioception.name: 本体感觉 Proprioception
Proprioception.description:
无手法师处于一个恒定的@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.LQzlKbYjZSMFQawP]{定位}法术的效果之下，该法术以无手法师的特定法师之手为目标。此外，任何在无手法师的视觉线范围内佩戴其配对法师之手的生物，都会始终被无手法师观察到，即使其正处于@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{隐形}或类似状态也是如此。

A handless mage is under the effects of a constant @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.LQzlKbYjZSMFQawP]{Locate} spell, targeting the handless mage's specific hand of the mage. In addition to this, any creature wearing their paired hand of the mage within line of sight of the handless mage is always observed by the handless mage, even if it's @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hiding}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible}, or the like.

Spellbook.name: 法术书 Spellbook
Spellbook.description:
法术书保存着学习与准备各种法术所必需的书面知识，这是法师的必需品（他们通常会免费获得一本），同时对其他想要学习额外法术的施法者而言也是一种实用的奢侈品。每本法术书最多可容纳100个法术。所列的价格适用于一本空白的法术书。

A spellbook holds the written knowledge necessary to learn and prepare various spells, a necessity for wizards (who typically get one for free) and a useful luxury for other spellcasters looking to learn additional spells. Each spellbook can hold up to 100 spells. The Price listed is for a blank spellbook.

Fear of the Cut.name: 对割伤的恐惧 Fear of the Cut
Fear of the Cut.description:
无手法师是在一具尸体被刀刃亵渎后形成的，因此他们对被切割有着强烈的厌恶。每当无手法师受到挥砍伤害时，他们也会变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}，若他们因一次大成功或大失败而受到挥砍伤害，则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}。

The handless mage was formed when a corpse was desecrated with a blade, and thus they have an intense revulsion to being cut. Whenever a handless mage takes slashing damage, they also become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} if they take slashing damage from a critical hit.

Now You Know How I Feel.name: 现在你知道我的感受了 Now You Know How I Feel
Now You Know How I Feel.description:
触发 一个位于无手法师60英尺内的生物执行了一个具有操作（特征）的动作

效果 无手法师用其残肢指向触发生物，迫使其进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:30] 意志豁免。若失败，触发的动作被扰乱。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet of the handless mage performs an action with the manipulate trait

Effect The handless mage points their residual limb at the triggering creature, forcing it to make a @Check[type:will|dc:30] save. On a failure, the triggering action is disrupted.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
只要他们的法师之手仍然完好无损，无手法师就无法被真正杀死。若被杀死，无手法师会在[[/br 1d6+1 #Days]]]天后再次复起，即使他们的身体被摧毁也是如此。只有在无手法师取回他们的法师之手并持有整整一之年后，灵体才会继续前行，同时在此过程中将该魔法物品化为一只普通的手。

As long as their hand of the mage remains intact, a handless mage can't be truly slain. If killed, the handless mage rises [[/br 1d6+1 #Days]]] days later, even if their body is destroyed. Only after the handless mage retrieves their hand of the mage and possesses it for a full year does the spirit move on, reducing the magic item to a mundane hand in the process.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Phantom Pain.name: 魅影之痛 Phantom Pain
Phantom Pain.description:
幻觉般的痛苦折磨着目标，造成2d4精神伤害以及1d4持续精神伤害。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受全部初始伤害但不承受持续伤害，且法术立即结束。

失败 目标承受全部初始伤害与持续伤害，且目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。如果目标从恶心状态恢复，持续伤害结束且法术结束。

大失败 同失败，但目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加2d4，持续伤害增加1d4。

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]{随等级提升的持续精神伤害}

Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and 1d4 persistent mental damage. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes full initial damage but no persistent damage, and the spell ends immediately.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If the target recovers from being Sickened, the persistent damage ends and the spell ends.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d4 and the persistent damage by 1d4.

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]]{Leveled Persistent Mental Damage}

Charitable Urge.name: 慈善冲动 Charitable Urge
Charitable Urge.description:
你宣讲慈善的美德，强迫目标施舍其财物。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。若目标身上没有任何物品，则该法术失败。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在与冲动搏斗时陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 在其下个回合，在做任何其他事情之前，目标必须将其持有的一件物品呈交给最近的生物；目标选择要给予的物品；若其唯一的物品是当前正用于自我防卫的物品，例如在战斗遭遇中使用的武器，则它可以选择改为在1轮内陷入Stunned，而不是放弃该物品。这可能要求目标使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} 取出物品或移动以触及最近的生物，并且将物品交给目标总是需要一次Interact动作。

大失败 如同失败，但持续时间为4轮，且目标必须在其每个回合重复失败的效果。在其每个回合结束时，目标可以尝试一次新的意志豁免以将剩余持续时间减少1轮，并在大成功时完全结束该效果。

You speak on the virtue of charity, compelling the target to give away its possessions. The target must attempt a Will save. If the target has no items on its person, the spell fails.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it wrestles with the urge.
