Failure On its next turn, before it does anything else, the target must present the nearest creature with an item in its possession; the target chooses which item to give, and if the only item it has is one that it's currently using to defend itself, such as a weapon during a combat encounter, it can choose to be Stunned for 1 round instead of giving up the item. This might require the target to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} to retrieve an item or move to reach the nearest creature, and handing the item to the target always requires an Interact action.

Critical Failure As failure, except the duration is 4 rounds, and the target must repeat the effects of failure on each of its turns. At the end of each of its turns, the target can attempt a new Will save to reduce the remaining duration by 1 round, ending it entirely on a critical success.

Telekinetic Maneuver.name: 念动力操控 Telekinetic Maneuver
Telekinetic Maneuver.description:
随着一阵念动力量的迸发，你移动一个敌人或他们携带的某件物品。你可以尝试对目标进行缴械、推撞或绊摔，使用一次法术攻击掷骰来代替一次运动检定。

With a rush of telekinetic power, you move a foe or something they carry. You can attempt to Disarm, Shove, or Trip the target using a spell attack roll instead of an Athletics check.

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动力投射物 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你向目标投掷一件处于射程内的松散、无人持用的物体，该物体的负载为1或更低。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，则你造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——视你投掷的物体而定——其数值等于1d6加上你的施法能力调整值。被投掷的物品不具备任何会影响此次攻击或伤害的特征或魔法属性。

大成功或大失败 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成完整伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage-as appropriate for the object you hurled-equal to 1d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造出一只单独的魔法之手，可能是隐形的或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并将其缓慢移动至多20英尺。因为你在使物体漂浮，你可以将其朝任何方向移动。当你维持该法术时，你可以额外移动该物体20英尺。若法术结束时物体仍在空气中，物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以负载为1或更低的无人看管物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以负载为1或更低的无人看管物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以负载为2或更低的无人看管物体为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Locate (Constant, Linked Hand of the Mag.name: 定位（恒定，仅与法师之手的手部相连） Locate (Constant, Linked Hand of the Mage Only)
Locate (Constant, Linked Hand of the Mag.description:
你得知 目标 的方向（若你选择了特定 物体，例如“我母亲的剑”）或最近的 目标（若你选择了某类 物体，例如“剑”）。若 目标 是特定 物体，你必须用自己的 感官 亲自直接观察过它。若是某类 物体，你仍需要对该类 物体 有准确的心智影像。若你与 目标 之间有铅或流动的水，此 法术 无法定位该 物体。这意味着如果最近的那件在铅或流动的水之后，你可能会找到更远处的同类 物体。

强化（5环） 你可以以特定 生物 或 族裔 作为 目标 而非 物体，但你必须曾与想要作为 目标 的 生物 或 族裔 见过面或近距离见过。

You learn the direction to the target (if you picked a specific object, such as "my mother's sword") or the nearest target (if you picked a type of object, such as "swords"). If the target is a specific object, you must have observed it directly with your own senses. If it's a type of object, you still need to have an accurate mental image of the type of object. If there's lead or running water between you and the target, this spell can't locate the object. This means you might find a type of object farther away if the nearest one is behind lead or running water.

Heightened (5th) You can target a specific creature or ancestry instead of an object, but you must have met or seen up close the creature or ancestry you want to target.

Phantom Limb Pain.name: 魅影肢体痛 Phantom Limb Pain
Phantom Limb Pain.description:
无手法师挥动其残肢划出一道弧线，攻击区域内每个生物的心智。无手法师对@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内的每个生物造成 @Damage[8d6[mental]] 伤害，并要求其进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28] 豁免。无论结果如何，该生物获得持续1分钟的暂时免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}，并成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。

大失败 同失败，外加该生物放开其一只手中所持有的物品（由无手法师选择）。

The handless mage sweeps their residual limb in an arc, assailing the minds of every creature in the area. The handless mage deals @Damage[8d6[mental]] damage to each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:28] save. Regardless of the result, they are temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage, becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure As failure, plus the creature Releases what it's holding in one of its hands (the handless mage's choice).

Handless Mage.publicNotes:
尽管在一些人看来颇为骇人，《法师之手》这件魔法物品的制作需要用到一只被切下的手，通常取自一名已故的奥术施法者。然而，有时死者并不甘心被人掠夺，尤其是被夺走自己身体的一部分。当一名失手法师从坟墓中复起时，他们不会休息，直到他们的尸身恢复到原本的状态。

每一名失手法师都必然与某一只特定的《法师之手》相对应；由于失手法师自坟中复起只为夺回被偷走之物，他们会将自己的时代花在无尽的搜寻之中，常常徒劳地试图将其取回。唯有在他们纠正了这份不公之后，失手法师方能休息，并欣然前往来世。

有些失手法师可能会对持有其特定《法师之手》的人诉诸肉体暴力；但也有些则很乐意用自己所能提供的少量货物或服务来交换他们失去的肢体。视该法师而定，他们也许愿意拿出一根魔法法杖，或在少数罕见情况下，交出他们旧日的法术书。

顺手交易

不少人通过请求失手法师去取得另一只《法师之手》，用以交换取回自己的那只手，而获得了成功。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（奥秘、欺瞒、交涉、求生）

符合条件的灌注属性 能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，智力，心灵，法术（奥术：慈善冲动、法师之手、魅影之痛、念动机动、念动投射物），狂野

Although considered macabre by some, the creation of the hand of the mage magic item requires the use of a severed hand, generally sourced from a deceased arcane spellcaster. Sometimes, however, the dead aren't so content with being robbed, especially of a part of their body. When a handless mage rises from their grave, they won't rest until their corpse is returned to its original state.

A handless mage is always paired with a specific hand of the mage, and since the handless mage rose from its grave only to return what was stolen, they spend their time searching endlessly for it in often futile attempts to recover it. Only after they've righted this wrong can a handless mage rest, gladly moving on to the afterlife.

While some handless mages may resort to physical violence against those who hold their specific hand of the mage, others are more than content to trade what few goods or services they can offer for their missing extremity. Depending on the mage, they might consider parting with a magic staff or, in some rare cases, their old spell book.

Handy-dandy Trade

No small number of people have found success asking a handless mage to obtain another hand of the mage to trade for their own hand back.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Arcana, Deception, Diplomacy, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties energy resistant (negative), evil, intelligence, mental, spells (Arcane: charitable urge, mage hand, phantom pain, telekinetic maneuver, telekinetic projectile), wild

Gunpowder Bear.name: 火药熊 Gunpowder Bear

Euphoria.name: 欣快感 Euphoria
Euphoria.description:
如果一只火药熊处于距离一个具有爆炸潜力的易燃物体30尺以内，它必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:20] 意志豁免。若为失败，它会迷恋于引爆该物体，并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}；若为大失败，火药熊必须在它的每个回合都花费动作向该物体疾行，直到它能够使用 Pull The Cord 来引爆该物体。若意志豁免成功，火药熊对欣快感获得10分钟的临时免疫。若引爆该物体会导致至少两名其他非小魔怪生物受伤，则意志豁免的DC提高至 @Check[type:will|dc:25]，且火药熊失去其临时免疫。

If a gunpowder bear is within 30 feet of a flammable object with the potential to explode, it must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:20] save. On a failure, it becomes infatuated with detonating the object and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}; on a critical failure, the gunpowder bear must spend each of its turns to Stride towards the object until it can use Pull The Cord to detonate the object. On a successful Will save, the gunpowder bear is temporarily immune to euphoria for 10 minutes. If exploding the object would result in injury to at least two other non-gremlin creatures, the DC of the Will save increases to @Check[type:will|dc:25] and the gunpowder bear loses its temporary immunity.

Tindertwig.name: 引火枝 Tindertwig
Tindertwig.description:
启动 A 交互

涂在这根细小木棍一端的炼金物质在粗糙表面上划擦时会点燃。用引火枝生火比用燧石和打火钢生火快得多。你可以在同一个交互动作中点燃引火枝并将其接触到可燃的物体上。

Activate A Interact

An alchemical substance applied to one end of this tiny wooden stick ignites when struck against a rough surface. Creating a flame with a tindertwig is much faster than creating a flame with flint and steel. You can ignite the tindertwig and touch it to a flammable object as part of the same Interact action.

Exploding Fluff.name: 爆炸绒毛 Exploding Fluff
Exploding Fluff.description:
当一只火药熊因受到火焰伤害而被降至 0 生命值时，它会自动爆炸，如同它使用了 Pull The Cord 一样。

When a gunpowder bear is reduced to 0 Hit Points by taking fire damage, it automatically explodes as if it had used Pull The Cord.

Latch.name: 闩锁 Latch
Latch.description:
需求 火药熊的上一个动作是用其颚部命中一个比它体型更大的目标

效果 火药熊的牙齿咬住它咬到的生物。这类似于 @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{擒抱} 该生物，但火药熊会随该生物一起移动，而不是将其固定在原地。火药熊在咬住一个生物时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{措手不及} 状态。被火药熊咬住的生物在对抗其 Pull The Cord 的豁免上承受 –1 环境减值。

Requirements The gunpowder bear's last action was to hit a target larger than itself with its jaws

Effect The gunpowder bear's teeth latch onto the creature it bit. This is similar to @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{Grabbing} the creature, but the gunpowder bear moves with that creature rather than holding it in place. The gunpowder bear is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} while latched onto a creature. A creature a gunpowder bear has latched to takes a –1 circumstance penalty on their save against its Pull The Cord.

Pull The Cord.name: 拉动拉绳 Pull The Cord
Pull The Cord.description:
火药熊拉动系在其背上的引线并立即爆炸。该生物周围 @Template[type:burst|distance:5] 内的生物与物体受到 @Damage[2d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true]）。可燃物体自动如同在豁免中失败一般受到伤害，并可能爆炸（由GM裁定）。火药熊在使用此动作后立即被摧毁，并化为细粉。

The gunpowder bear pulls the cord attached to its back and immediately explodes. Creatures and objects in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] around the creature take @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:17|basic:true]). Objects that are flammable automatically take damage as if they had failed the save and might explode (GM's discretion). The gunpowder bear is immediately destroyed upon using this action and is reduced to a fine powder.

Gunpowder Bear.publicNotes:
火药熊是一种由 vexgit 小魔怪赋予生命的微型构装生物。它们看起来像是带着背包、背后伸出一根拉绳的毛绒玩具熊。尽管外表无害，火药熊却是凶残的生物，长着锋利如剃刀的牙齿，乐于咬住任何胆敢把它们捡起来的生物。火药熊以强烈的驱动力而闻名：寻找并引爆具有爆炸潜力的物体；为此，它们会利用随身携带的小袋引火枝，帮助点燃任何必要的火焰。

火药熊也因会操纵不了解其恶毒本性的对象而闻名，它们会引诱对方靠近自己计划引爆的物体。在一阵欣快发作中，沉醉的火药熊会拉动背后的拉绳，使该生物在炽烈的爆炸中自毁。自第一批火药熊被发明以来，它们的 vexgit 创造者发现这些生物很难控制，导致无数事故与意外后果。即便如此，当被部署到敌方领地时，它们依然很有用。

信号弹熊

爆炸并不总是按计划进行。如果有人移除了火药熊的触发机构，或它的拉绳因任何原因失灵，熊就会转而尝试自焚。它可能把一根引火枝用在自己身上，或扑向附近的火源。如果有一群熊在场，它们甚至可能试图互相帮助，出现一幕既惹人怜爱又令人胆寒的景象：一只未点燃的熊跑进一只正燃烧着的熊的怀里。这些尝试会燃烧得不均匀，导致这些熊在最终爆炸前先朝随机方向喷射飞出。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 3.5/7/13 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（工艺、欺瞒、潜行、盗窃）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、混乱、敏捷、能量抗性（负能量、正能量）、邪恶、火焰、智力、狂野

Gunpowder bears are tiny construct creatures that were given life by vexgit gremlins. They resemble cuddly toy bears with a knapsack and a string coming out of their back. Despite this benign appearance, gunpowder bears are vicious creatures with razor-sharp teeth that they will gladly sink into any creature that dares pick them up. Gunpowder bears are known for their driving need to seek and detonate objects with the potential to explode, in which case they make use of the small bag of tindertwigs they carry to help them set any necessary fires.

Gunpowder bears are known to manipulate those unaware of their malign nature by luring them closer to objects they plan to detonate. In a fit of euphoria, an enraptured gunpowder bear pulls the string on its back, causing the creature to self-destruct in a fiery explosion. Since the invention of the first gunpowder bears, their vexgit creators have found the creatures difficult to control, which has resulted in countless accidents and unintended consequences. Even so, they still prove useful when deployed in enemy territory.

Flare Bears

Detonations don't always go according to plan. If someone removes a gunpowder bear's trigger mechanism or its cord doesn't work for any reason, the bear attempts to self-immolate instead. It may turn a tindertwig on itself or throw itself on a nearby flame source. If a group of bears are present, they may even attempt to help each other, resulting in the endearing but terrifying sight of an unlit bear running into the arms of a flaming one. These attempts burn unevenly, resulting in the bears blasting off in random directions before finally exploding.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Crafting, Deception, Stealth, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), evil, fire, intelligence, wild

Guiltbound.name: 罪缚 Guiltbound

Murdersense.name: 谋杀感知 Murdersense
Murdersense.description:
罪缚者只能用其任何一种感官察觉在过去24小时内伤害过它的生物，或那些杀死过另一名活的、有感知的存在（不包括动物或无心智生物）的生物。其他生物因此对罪缚者而言是 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible}、无声且以其他方式无法被察觉。

A guiltbound can only sense creatures that have damaged it within the last 24 hours, or those who have killed another living, sapient being (not animals or mindless creatures) with any of its senses. Other creatures are thus @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible}, inaudible, and otherwise undetectable to a guiltbound.

Mounting Terror.name: 乘骑恐惧 Mounting Terror
Mounting Terror.description:
被罪缚者击中的生物开始经历导致谋杀的片段，最终重温受害者死前那令人窒息的一瞬。他们必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:23] 豁免，且若他们在上一轮中对罪缚者造成过伤害，则其豁免承受–2环境减值。

大成功或大失败成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}，并受到 @Damage[1d8[void]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 1}，并受到 [[/r 4d8[void]]] 伤害。

A creature struck by the guiltbound begins to experience the moments that led up to the murder, eventually reliving the heart- stopping instant before the victim's death. They must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:23] save, and they take a –2 circumstance penalty to their save if they've damaged the guiltbound in the last round.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} and takes @Damage[1d8[void]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 1}, and takes [[/r 4d8[void]]] damage.

Victim's Scorn.name: 受害者的蔑视 Victim's Scorn
Victim's Scorn.description:
需求 在罪缚者的触及范围内没有敌人。

效果 悬垂的尸体蔑视那些怯懦到无法将其从折磨中拯救出来的人，在一条 @Template[type:line|distance:80] 内倾泻仇恨的洪流，造成 @Damage[8d6[void]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] 豁免）。在上一轮内以近战攻击对罪缚者造成过伤害的生物，将其豁免结果视为比掷出的结果高一个等级。

Requirements There are no enemies within the guiltbound's reach.

Effect The dangling corpse scorns those who are too cowardly to save it from its torment, launching a torrent of hate in an @Template[type:line|distance:80], dealing @Damage[8d6[void]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] save). Creatures that damaged the guiltbound with a melee attack within the last round treat their save result as one degree better than they rolled.

Dangling Corpse Arm.name: 悬垂尸臂 Dangling Corpse Arm

Guiltbound.publicNotes:
当一个杀人者与其受害者以及凶器同葬一穴（无论是被埋入乱葬岗、葬身海底，还是纯属巧合），屠杀所引发的亵渎能量会将三者纠缠在一起，使其从坟墓中以可憎的混合体之姿复起。被束缚在一起，杀人者将永恒地面对其生前所犯行径的骇人提醒：受害者的尸体同样被再度唤起，永远被恐惧攫住，取代其一只手臂，从杀人者身上垂吊而下。

罪缚者无法离其埋葬之地太远，经常能在其坟旁徘徊。矛盾的是，它们可怖的外表与其行为相悖：它们往往无视从未犯下谋杀之人，通常也不会对过着和平生活者构成立即威胁。尽管如此，大多数人仍会对它们敬而远之。此外，一些社群将罪缚者用作判定有罪的手段：若罪缚者能看见某个疑似杀人者，那么此人很可能就是真凶。在这种情况下，罪缚者也往往会顺势（且方便地）充当刽子手的角色。

骇人哨卫

罪缚者常会在无意间充当小型社群的守卫，对无辜居民浑然不觉，却会毫不偏差地追猎那些有杀戮过往的闯入者。罪缚者对于它所认定的“杀人者”毫无分寸可言；以自卫为名的辩解，将完全无法成为任何辩护。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（光），察觉物品，技能物品（运动，威吓）

符合条件的灌注属性 混乱，魅力，延伸，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，负能量，力量，狂野

When a murderer shares a grave with their victim and the murder weapon (whether interred in a mass grave, buried at sea, or through sheer coincidence), the profane energies of the massacre fuse the three together, causing them to rise from the grave as a hideous amalgam. Bound together, the murderer is eternally presented with a grisly reminder of the deed they committed in life: the victim's corpse, likewise reanimated and perpetually gripped by fear, dangles from the murderer in place of one of its arms.

A guiltbound is unable to venture far from its burial site and can often be found lingering near its grave. Paradoxically, their horrific appearance contradicts their behavior, as they tend to ignore those who have never committed murder and usually don't pose an immediate danger to those who have lived a peaceful life. Most give them a wide berth regardless. Moreover, some communities have used guiltbound as a way of determining guilt: if a guiltbound can see a suspected murderer, they are likely the perpetrator. In such cases, the guiltbound often also conveniently fulfill the role of executioner.

Grisly Sentry

A guiltbound can often unintentionally act as a guard for small communities, remaining unaware of innocent denizens while unerringly pursuing interlopers with a history of killing. A guiltbound possesses no nuance about who it sees as a murderer; justifications of self-defense will prove to be no defense at all.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Intimidation)

Eligible Imbued Properties chaotic, charisma, elongating, energy resistant (negative), evil, negative, strength, wild

Guillotine Head.name: 断头台头部 Guillotine Head
Guillotine Head.tokenName: 断头台斩首剑 Guillotine Head

Grinding Teeth.name: 磨牙 Grinding Teeth
Grinding Teeth.description:
断头台头颅磨着牙齿，发出令人作呕的噪音。断头台头颅周围15英尺内的所有活生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:14] 豁免。断头台头颅在 [[/br 1d4 #Grinding Teeth Recharge]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用“磨牙”。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 1}。

失败 目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 2}。

大失败 目标获得恶心2，并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{逃窜} 1轮。

The guillotine head grinds its teeth, producing a sickening noise. All living creatures within 15 feet of the guillotine head must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:14] save. The guillotine head can't use Grinding Teeth again for [[/br 1d4 #Grinding Teeth Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is sickened 2 and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Rolling Movement.name: 滚动移动 Rolling Movement
Rolling Movement.description:
每当断头台之首进行疾行时，它只能滚动，并且只能上爬缓坡。断头台之首无法攀爬楼梯，但在必要时可以从楼梯上跌落。如果断头台之首下行斜坡，它在该段移动期间的速度翻倍。

Whenever the guillotine head Strides, it is only capable of rolling and can only ascend gentle slopes. The guillotine head is unable to climb stairs but can fall down them if necessary. If the guillotine head descends a slope, its Speed is doubled during that part of its movement.

Torn Flesh.name: 撕裂血肉 Torn Flesh
Torn Flesh.description:
当断头台头部以颌部攻击造成重击时，它会造成 1d4 持续流血伤害。

When the guillotine head critically hits with a jaws attack, it deals 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

Guillotine Head.publicNotes:
断头台头颅是一种无身、会滚动的亡灵头颅，是“断头者”的近亲。在大规模杀戮与死亡的时代，官员会将那些被断头台或刀刃处死者的头颅作为战利品，放入巨大的篮筐中向公众展示。死亡如此之多，死灵能量便可能将不死的触须伸入这些头颅之中，使它们苏醒。断头台头颅只有一个目标：杀死那个砍下他们头颅的人，然后尽可能让那些曾为此欢呼的人付出更多死亡。

断头台头颅受其用牙齿撕咬与扯裂的需求驱使；若在过去几小时内没有进食的机会，它们往往会徒劳地在空气中咬牙切齿。断头台头颅并没有通过食物来满足其亡灵饥饿的生理需求，因为它们的形态不过是一颗正在腐烂的头颅。然而，观察过这些生物尝试进食的人声称：任何穿过它们口中的肉块，都会很快从其被切开的颈部底端掉出来。

单个断头台头颅并不算巨大的威胁，但有时它们会聚合成庞大的亡灵头颅虫群，如同愤怒的不死浪潮般席卷整座城市。这通常发生在某个血腥刽子手屠杀了无数人之时，因为受害者会协同狩猎共同的刽子手以施行复仇。在这种情况下，它们能成为势不可挡的虫群，吞噬所过之处的一切，只留下一片被啃嚼的血肉与内脏的狼藉。

当这些断头台头颅聚集时，它们喋喋作响与碾磨般的牙齿声足以清空整片城市街区。那是种极其骇人的噪音，甚至曾有人因此耳朵出血、肠胃失禁。

如果断头台头颅能成功找到它们原本的躯体，它们便能将自己重新接回去，并可能转化为另一种有实体的亡灵。

一家之主

断头台头颅可能会在同样为至亲猝然遭斩首而寻求复仇的家人中找到盟友。世上几乎没有什么能比一群孤儿提着装着父母头颅的野餐篮冲锋、更令人恐惧了——随时准备把它们投掷到这世上最残酷的躲避球游戏里。此策略确有缺陷：若断头台头颅的受害者在攻击者先吞食其躯体后死亡，他们自身也可能复活为断头台头颅。

别眨眼

曾有一名研究者请求一位即将受刑的同僚，在被斩首时尽可能多地眨眼，以便判断一颗离体头颅能保有意识多久。不幸的是，那位同僚变成了断头台头颅。传言说，他至今仍在眨眼。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 2.25/5/9 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），察觉物品，技能物品（潜行，求生）

符合条件的灌注属性 敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，力量，野性

A guillotine head is a disembodied, rolling undead head, a cousin of the beheaded. During times of great killing and death, officials place the heads of those killed by a guillotine or blade in great baskets as trophies to display to the public. With so much death, necromantic energies can send tendrils of unlife into these heads, causing them to awaken. A guillotine head has but one goal: to kill the one who removed their head and then cause as much death as possible to those who cheered them on.

A guillotine head is driven by its need to rip and tear with its teeth, often gnashing its teeth uselessly in the air if it hasn't had a chance to feed within the past few hours. Guillotine heads have no physical need to sate their undead hunger for food, though, as their form is simply a decomposing head. Those who have observed these creatures attempting to eat have claimed that any flesh that passes through their mouth quickly comes out of the base of their sliced neck.

A single guillotine head is not a great threat, though sometimes they form into a massive swarm of undead heads, sweeping across a city as an angry wave of undeath. This typically happens if a single bloody executioner kills countless people, as the victims work together to hunt down their shared executioner to enact their vengeance. In this event, they can become an unstoppable swarm, consuming anything in their wake and leaving behind a mess of chewed flesh and offal.

When these guillotine heads gather, their chittering and grinding teeth are enough to clear whole city blocks. It is such a horrific noise that it's been known to cause people's ears to bleed and their bowels to loosen.

If the guillotine heads can successfully locate their original bodies, they can reattach themselves, potentially transforming into another type of corporeal undead.

Head Of The Family

Guillotine heads may find allies in family members who also seek revenge for their loved one's untimely decapitation. Few things in the world are as terrifying as a charge of orphans with their parents' heads in picnic baskets, ready to be thrown in the world's grisliest game of dodgeball. This strategy does have drawbacks, as victims of guillotine heads may themselves reanimate as guillotine heads if their attackers devour their bodies first.

Don't Blink

A researcher once asked a colleague facing execution to blink as many times as possible during his beheading so that they could determine how long a disembodied head retained consciousness. Unfortunately, the colleague became a guillotine head. Rumors say that he is still blinking to this day.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 2.25/5/9 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), perception item, skill items (Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, strength, wild

Groundgullet.name: 地吞兽 Groundgullet

Tremorsense (Precise) 500 feet.name: 颤动感知（精确）500英尺 Tremorsense (Precise) 500 feet

Churn.name: 搅动 Churn
Churn.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 地吞兽搅动其内脏，对其中的生物造成伤害。被地吞兽吞入的生物受到[[/r (2d8+6)[bludgeoning]]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true]豁免。豁免失败的生物若正尝试@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{攀爬}出来，也会坠落。

Frequency once per round

Effect The groundgullet churns its insides, damaging the creatures within. Creatures Swallowed inside the groundgullet take [[/r (2d8+6)[bludgeoning]]] damage, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] save. Creatures that fail this save also fall if they were attempting to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb} out.

Cover Pit.name: 掩蔽坑洞 Cover Pit
Cover Pit.description:
地咽兽在其开口上方闭合一层厚膜，其外观会立刻与周围的地形一致。它获得标准掩蔽并尝试进行躲藏。若有一名小型或中型生物进入地咽兽的空间，它可以如常使用吞噬。否则，它的掩蔽最多可支援至多2负载的无人看管物体。拥有陷阱搜寻者专长或类似能力的生物，在对抗使用“掩蔽陷坑”的地咽兽时获得相应的好处。

The groundgullet closes a thick membrane above its opening, which immediately matches the appearance of the surrounding terrain. It gains standard cover and attempts to Hide. If a Small or Medium creature moves into the groundgullet's space, it can use Swallow as normal. Otherwise, its cover can support up to 2 Bulk of unattended objects. Creatures with the Trap Finder feat or similar abilities gain the benefits against a groundgullet using Cover Pit.

Decomposing Belch.name: 分解嗝气 Decomposing Belch
Decomposing Belch.description:
所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] 豁免。与地喉相邻或与其共享空间的生物在此次检定中承受 -2 环境减值。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在接下来 1 小时内暂时免疫。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}。

大失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}。

All creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save. Creatures adjacent to or sharing the groundgullet's space take a -2 circumstance penalty to this check.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.

Shifting Earth.name: 移土术 Shifting Earth
Shifting Earth.description:
一只地吞兽的身体是一个15英尺深的坑。它可以在土质材料中掘地，使其开口始终保持在地表。当它这样做时，它会沿途明显扰动泥土，将其变为困难地形。它也可以选择以一半速度掘地且不留下任何痕迹。地吞兽可以穿过其他生物的空间，并且可以与其他中型或更小的生物共享空间。

A groundgullet's body is a 15-foot deep pit. It can Burrow through earthen material such that its opening remains on the surface. When it does, it visibly disturbs the earth along its path, turning it into difficult terrain. It can instead choose to Burrow at half Speed and leave no trail. A groundgullet can move through other creatures' spaces, and it can share the space of other Medium or smaller creatures.

Spray.name: 喷射 Spray
Spray.description:
地吞怪喷射出搅碎的岩石和胃酸。它对@Template[type:cone|distance:20]内的生物造成@Damage[2d6[bludgeoning],2d6[acid]]{2d6钝击伤害和2d6强酸}伤害，并需要进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true]豁免。

The groundgullet sprays churned rock and stomach acid. It deals @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning],2d6[acid]]{2d6 bludgeoning damage and 2d6 acid} damage to creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:20], with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true] save.

Swallow.name: 吞噬 Swallow
Swallow.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 地噬腹内未包含任何生物

触发 地噬腹进入另一生物的空间，或另一生物进入地噬腹的空间

效果 该生物跌入地噬腹。它可以尝试 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grab an Edge]{抓住边缘}（@Check[type:reflex|dc:26] 豁免）；在大成功时，该生物可以将“跨步”作为该反应动作（）的一部分，若其如此做并离开地噬腹的空间，则不会跌落。位于地噬腹内的生物会被迫随其一同移动，并在其回合开始时受到 [[/r (3d6+8)[acid]]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|basic:true] 豁免），并受到“腐解喷嗝”的影响。地噬腹在采取该动作时会失去其“掩蔽坑”能力所给予的掩蔽。当它吞下一个生物时，地噬腹在掘洞时其开口必须保持在地表。生物可以通过成功的 @Check[type:athletics|dc:26] 检定从地噬腹中攀爬出来；其DC可以使用绳索或其他工具降低；若其有方法触及15尺深坑的顶部，则可以用一个带有移动（特征）的单动作直接将自己拉出来。

Frequency once per round

Requirements The groundgullet doesn't contain a creature inside it

Trigger The groundgullet enters another creature's space or another creature enters the groundgullet's space

Effect The creature falls into the groundgullet. It can attempt to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grab an Edge]{Grab an Edge} (@Check[type:reflex|dc:26] save); on a critical success, the creature can Step as part of the reaction, and if it does and leaves the groundgullet's space it doesn't fall. Creatures inside the groundgullet are forced to move along with it, and at the beginning of their turn they take [[/r (3d6+8)[acid]]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|basic:true] save) and are affected by Decomposing Belch. The groundgullet loses the cover granted by its Cover Pit ability when taking this action. While it has a creature swallowed, a groundgullet's opening must remain on the surface as it Burrows. A creature can Climb out of the groundgullet with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:26] check, which they can reduce using rope or other tools; if they have a way to reach to the top of the 15-foot pit, they can simply pull themselves out with a single action, which has the move trait.

Groundgullet.publicNotes:
乍一看，地喉兽似乎不过是地面上一处恶臭、黏滑、略带红色的坑洞。事实上，它的身体由构成坑壁的膜质组织组成，这些组织会在其缓慢掘进穿行于地下时起伏蠕动。在其内部，你会发现强壮的触须、酸性腺体，以及一个强效而分散的神经系统。当地喉兽合拢其巨口进行遮蔽时，它们能与周围环境无缝融合，使其成为危险的伏击型掠食者。

地喉兽的起源

据信最初的地喉兽是由某个古老的独眼巨人王国培育出来的，用作一种怪诞的垃圾处理手段，但此后仍有少量该生物扩散到了世界各地的其他地区。

地喉兽遭遇

尽管通常并不残忍，但有些地喉兽逐渐养成了嗜食人肉的癖好，并潜伏在聚居地外以吞食流浪者。当地喉兽受到威胁时，它们会用成片的碎屑、消化酸液，以及先前餐食腐烂所散发的恶臭来猛击袭击者。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 64/140/250 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（隐匿）

可用灌注属性 酸蚀，灾祸，体质，能量抗性（正能量），力量，狂野

At first glance, a groundgullet might appear to be nothing more than a rank, slimy, and slightly red pit in the ground. In fact, its body is composed of membranes that make up the walls of the pit, which undulate as they slowly burrow through the ground. Inside, one finds muscular feelers, acidic glands, and a potent, decentralized nervous system. Groundgullets can seamlessly blend into their surroundings when covering their maw, making them dangerous ambush predators.

Groundgullet Origins

The first groundgullets are believed to have been bred by an ancient cyclops kingdom as a bizarre means of garbage disposal, but a small number of the creatures have since spread to other regions around the world.

Groundgullet Encounters

Though usually not cruel, some groundgullets have developed a predilection for human flesh and lurk outside settlements to feed on wanderers. When threatened, groundgullets pummel their assailants with volleys of debris, digestive acids, and the stench of their decomposing previous meals.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Gorehed.name: 戈雷赫德 Gorehed

Corpse Incubation.name: 尸体孵化 Corpse Incubation
Corpse Incubation.description:
在杀死一名生物后，血噬者会将尸体拖入水下，并在其颈部根部植入一个卵囊。血噬者宁芙在尸体内生长，以死肉为食，并将头部作为安全的空间来生长，直到其成熟，大约在1周后。

After killing a creature, a gorehed drags the corpse underwater and inserts an egg sack into the base of its neck. The gorehed nymph grows within the corpse, feeding on the dead flesh and utilizing the head as a safe space to grow until it matures, roughly 1 week later.

Sound Imitation.name: 拟声 Sound Imitation
Sound Imitation.description:
戈尔赫德在以欺骗检定进行说谎时若成功，可以拟态他们听过的任何声音。他们在此检定上获得+4环境加值。

A gorehed who succeeds at a Deception check to Lie can mimic any voice they have heard. They have a +4 circumstance bonus to this check.

Fleeing Leap.name: 逃离跳跃 Fleeing Leap
Fleeing Leap.description:
触发 一名敌人结束其回合，且gorehed位于该敌人的触及范围内

效果 gorehed跳跃，最多移动至其速度的一半，远离触发的敌人。它不能以移动结束时紧邻另一名敌人。此移动不会触发反应动作（）。

Trigger A foe ends their turn, and the gorehed is within that foe's reach

Effect The gorehed Leaps up to half its Speed away from the triggering foe. It can't end the movement adjacent to another foe. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Demoralizing Mimicry.name: 挫志拟态 Demoralizing Mimicry
Demoralizing Mimicry.description:
血角怪会用它的拟声能力来惊吓一名生物，可能通过制造听起来像受害者的尖叫声，或用朋友的声音说些令人不安的话。它对一名生物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize}，但使用欺瞒而非威吓来这么做。

The gorehed uses its mimicry to frighten a creature, potentially by creating what sound like the shrieks of victims or saying something unsettling in a friend's voice. They @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize} a creature, using Deception instead of Intimidation to do so.

Pack Attack.name: 群袭 Pack Attack
Pack Attack.description:
血角兽的打击会对处于至少两名血角兽盟友触及范围内的生物造成额外1d4伤害。

A gorehed's Strikes deal an additional 1d4 damage to creatures within the reach of at least two of the gorehed's allies.

Swamp Stride.name: 沼泽迈步 Swamp Stride
Swamp Stride.description:
戈尔赫德会无视由沼泽地形特性导致的困难地形。

A gorehed ignores difficult terrain caused by swamp terrain features.

Gorehed.publicNotes:
血头怪是类人生物与青蛙的混合体：它们的头部类似只有一只眼的类人生物，拥有布满锯齿状牙齿的巨口以便更好地撕裂血肉；身体则像青蛙一样紧凑多褶，配有巨大的蹼手与长爪的脚。它们能够以双足进行旅行，但为了获得更多支援，血头怪通常四足行进。血头怪喜爱类人生物的血肉，并会用拟声的嗓音将猎物引诱进巢穴。血头怪在泥泞的沼泽地区筑巢，在那里它们能淹死猎物并用幼体感染对方。血头怪的巢穴会改变自然环境，有时会给区域内的居民带来麻烦。这些巢穴由泥、石头与树木构成，建造得足以抵御风雨侵袭。

血头怪很聪明，但似乎不会使用任何制作出来的工具或武器，而更偏好依靠自身的天生能力。它们保留的任何织物或物品都来自猎物，而非血头怪自己制作。血头怪本能地倾向于不信任并畏惧魔法。一旦它们注意到施法者，通常会撤退，除非它们在数量上超过潜在的猎物。血头怪通常以四只或更多组成的群体进行狩猎，以确保自己对单个目标占据优势；而在追捕大型猎物时，它们有时会动用多达十号成年个体组成狩猎队伍。

血头怪通常为了进食与繁殖而狩猎，但即便已经吃得很饱，它们也乐于仅仅为了取乐就把猎物引诱至死亡。无人知晓这些怪异生物的起源。有传言称它们来自天空中的一道裂口，但从未找到任何证据证明这一点。

管好你的舌头

血头怪对自我价值有着膨胀的认知。它们彼此吹嘘自己头有多大、跳得多高、模仿得多么精准……几乎是关于自身的一切性相；这也让它们唯一的自卑更加显眼：血头怪嫉妒青蛙的舌头。它们被迫使用类人生物那可怜、短小的舌头，因此羡慕青蛙舌头能伸得那么远。这就是它们割下受害者舌头的原因——不是为了作为战利品展示，而是为了把舌头绑在自己舌头的末端，希望它们能以某种方式融合成一条延长的器官。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、欺骗、自然、潜行、生存）

符合条件的注入属性 破敌，魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，力量，野性

Goreheds are a conglomeration of humanoid and frog, with a head that resembles that of a humanoid with one eye, a large maw of serrated teeth to better tear flesh, and a wrinkled, compact body like a frog with large webbed hands and clawed feet. While capable of bipedal travel, for more support, goreheds travel on all fours. Goreheds love humanoid flesh, and they use their mimicking voices to lure prey into their lairs. Goreheds make their lairs in swampy regions, where they can drown their prey and infect them with their young. Gorehed lairs modify the natural environment, sometimes causing a nuisance for those in the area. These lairs are made of mud, stone, and trees and built to withstand the elements.

Goreheds are intelligent but don't seem to use any crafted tools or weapons, preferring to rely on their natural abilities instead. Any fabric or items goreheds retain are from prey, not crafted by the goreheds themselves. Goreheds instinctually tend to distrust and fear magic. Once they notice a spellcaster, goreheds usually retreat unless they outnumber their potential prey. Goreheds typically hunt in packs of four or more to make sure they have the advantage over a single target, and they sometimes employ as many as ten adults in a hunting party when going after large prey.

Goreheds usually hunt to eat and breed, but even when they are already well- fed, they enjoy luring prey to their deaths just for fun. No one is sure of the origin of these bizarre creatures. Rumors say they came from an opening in the sky, but nothing has been found to prove this.

Hold Your Tongue

Goreheds have an inflated sense of self- worth. They boast to each other about the size of their heads, the height of their leaps, the precision of their imitations... pretty much every aspect of themselves, which makes their one inferiority complex stand out even more: goreheds are jealous of frog tongues. Stuck with the pathetic, stubby tongues of humanoids, goreheads envy frogs for how far their tongues reach. That is why they cut tongues from their victims, not for display as trophies but to tie to the ends of their own tongues in hopes that they will somehow merge into an extended organ.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Nature, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), evil, strength, wild

Golem of Wonder.name: 奇迹魔像 Golem of Wonder
Golem of Wonder.tokenName: 奇迹魔像 Golem of Wonder

Golem Antimagic.name: 魔像反魔法 Golem Antimagic
Golem Antimagic.description:
受到守序和音波伤害（[[/r {5d10}]]{5d10 damage}、来自区域或持续性伤害的 [[/r {2d8}]]{2d8 damage}）；被混沌治疗（区域 @Damage[2d8[healing]]{2d8 Hit Points}）；被预言系所缓慢

魔像免疫除了其自身之外的法术与魔法能力，但每种魔像都会以特殊方式受到少数几类魔法的影响。这些例外会以缩写形式列在魔像的数据表中，而完整规则如下所示。若某条目列出多种类型（例如“寒冷与水”），则任一类型的法术都能影响该魔像。

  • 受到伤害 任何此类型的魔法若以该魔像为目标，则它改为承受所列数值的伤害（该伤害没有类型），而非通常效果。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，或受到适当类型的持续性效果影响，则它承受括号内所列的伤害。
  • 被治疗 任何此类型的魔法若以该魔像为目标，会使该魔像失去缓慢（状态）并回复等同于该法术原本会造成伤害一半的生命值。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，则它回复括号内所列的生命值。
  • 被缓慢 任何此类型的魔法若以该魔像为目标，则它改为变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，持续 [[/br 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 rounds}，而非通常效果。若魔像在其回合开始时处于此类型魔法的区域内，则它在该轮中缓慢 1。
  • 易伤于 每个魔像都易伤于一个或多个特定法术，其效果如其数据表所述。

harmed by lawful and sonic ([[/r {5d10}]]{5d10 damage}, [[/r {2d8}]]{2d8 damage} from areas or persistent damage); healed by chaotic (area @Damage[2d8[healing]]{2d8 Hit Points}); slowed by divination

A golem is immune to spells and magical abilities other than its own, but each type of golem is affected by a few types of magic in special ways. These exceptions are listed in shortened form in the golem's stat block, with the full rules appearing here. If an entry lists multiple types (such as "cold and water"), either type of spell can affect the golem.

  • Harmed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to take the listed amount of damage (this damage has no type) instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of magic of this type or is affected by a persistent effect of the appropriate type, it takes the damage listed in the parenthetical.
  • Healed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem makes the golem lose the slowed condition and gain HP equal to half the damage the spell would have dealt. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it gains the HP listed in the parenthetical.
  • Slowed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for [[/br 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 rounds} instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it's slowed 1 for that round.
  • Vulnerable To Each golem is vulnerable to one or more specific spells, with the effects described in its stat block.

Last Throes of Chaos.name: 混沌的最后挣扎 Last Throes of Chaos
Last Throes of Chaos.description:
当奇迹魔像被摧毁时，位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的生物会受到“唤起奇迹”的效果影响，并且对每个生物分别掷骰决定其效果。

When the golem of wonder is destroyed, creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] are affected by Invoke Wonder, rolling the effect separately for each creature.

Vulnerable to Sensory Magic.name: 易受感官魔法影响 Vulnerable to Sensory Magic
Vulnerable to Sensory Magic.description:
影响奇迹魔像感官的魔法效果，例如@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.OAt2ZEns1gIOCgrn]{Synesthesia}法术，会正常影响奇迹魔像。这会绕过魔像对精神效果的通常免疫，但仅限于此类法术。

Magical effects that affect the golem of wonder's senses, such as a @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.OAt2ZEns1gIOCgrn]{Synesthesia} spell, affect the golem of wonder normally. This bypasses the golem's normal immunity to mental effects, but only for such spells.

Chaos Damage.name: 混沌伤害 Chaos Damage
Chaos Damage.description:
当奇迹魔像进行一次拳头打击时，掷骰 [[/br 1d6]] 以决定伤害的类型与严重程度

1: [[/r (2d8+10)[slashing]]]

2–3: [[/r (2d10+12)[force]]]

4–5: [[/r (2d12+15)[bludgeoning]]]

6: [[/r (2d12+22)[electricity]]]

When a golem of wonder makes a fist Strike, roll [[/br 1d6]] to determine type and severity of damage

1: [[/r (2d8+10)[slashing]]]

2–3: [[/r (2d10+12)[force]]]

4–5: [[/r (2d12+15)[bludgeoning]]]

6: [[/r (2d12+22)[electricity]]]

Invoke Wonder.name: 唤起奇迹 Invoke Wonder
Invoke Wonder.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 魔像用手指指向60尺内的一个目标，释放其构造所依赖的混沌魔法。在下表中掷一次[[/br 1d20]]{d20}以决定效果。目标仅在效果要求时才进行豁免。任何所需DC为30。

1： 掷两次，每次以射程内不同的生物为目标。忽略这些掷骰中任何进一步掷出1的结果。

2–3： 大颗玻璃珠在目标的手臂上成形，使其沉重下坠。其获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1}直到其花费一个具有操作（特征）的单动作来打碎玻璃珠。

4–5： 目标与魔像30尺内另一个随机生物互换位置。

6–8： 目标的心智被混沌淹没，使其陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{呆滞（状态） 2}持续1分钟。其可以花费一个具有专注（特征）的动作尝试进行一次@Check[type:will|dc:30]豁免。成功时，呆滞（状态）提前结束。

9–11： 魔像施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.piMJO6aYeDJbrhEo]{Solid Fog}。掷[[/r 1d4]]。若结果为1或2，雾以魔像为中心；若结果为3或4，则以目标为中心。

12–13： 魔像获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened}持续3轮。它只能用额外的动作来Invoke Wonder。

14–15： 魔像对目标施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:30|traits:spell,transmutation|overrideTraits:true]）。

16–17： 目标必须在一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:30]豁免中成功，否则其四肢将暂时伸长2轮。于持续时间内，若其触及短于10尺，则其触及增加至10尺，但其获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}。

18–19： 目标所有非魔法物品，包括任何衣物，都会以无害的蓝色光辉发光10分钟。这会在10尺半径内投射昏暗光照，且无法被熄灭。

20： @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]]{10d6 pebbles}从奇迹魔像的手中射出，对朝向目标方向一条@Template[type:line|distance:60]内的所有生物造成等量的钝击伤害，并可进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true]豁免。

Frequency once per round

Effect The golem points its finger at a target within 60 feet and unleashes the chaotic magic upon which it was built. Roll a [[/br 1d20]]{d20} on the following table to determine the effect. Targets only receive a saving throw if the effect calls for it. Any DC required is 30.

1: Roll twice, targeting different creatures within range each time. Ignore any further results of 1 on these rolls.

2–3: Large glass beads form on the target's arms, weighing them down. They are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} until they take a single action, which has the manipulate trait, to break the beads.

4–5: The target switches places with another random creature within 30 feet of the golem.

6–8: The target's mind is overwhelmed by the chaos, causing them to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute. They can spend an action, which has the concentrate trait, to attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:30] save. On a success, the stupefied condition ends early.

9–11: The golem casts @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.piMJO6aYeDJbrhEo]{Solid Fog}. Roll [[/r 1d4]]. On a 1 or 2, the fog is centered on the golem, and on a 3 or 4, it's centered on the target.

12–13: The golem is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened} for 3 rounds. It can only use the additional action to Invoke Wonder.

14–15: The golem casts @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:30|traits:spell,transmutation|overrideTraits:true]) on the target.

16–17: The target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:30] save or their limbs temporarily lengthen for 2 rounds. For the duration, their reach increases to 10 feet if it's shorter, but they are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}.

18–19: All the target's nonmagical items, including any clothing, glow with a harmless blue light for 10 minutes. This casts dim light in a 10 foot radius and can't be extinguished.

20: @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]]{10d6 pebbles} shoot from the golem of wonder's hand, doing the same amount of bludgeoning damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:60] in the direction of the target, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] save.

Golem of Wonder.publicNotes:
奇想权杖与相关的奇物长久以来一直俘获了工匠师与施法者的想象力。因此，几乎可以说迟早会有人把这些古怪物品中发现的混沌魔法灌注到某个魔法生物之中。

这些色彩鲜艳、镶嵌宝石的构装体之所以令人畏惧，并非因为它们具备任何高超的施法或造成巨量伤害，而是因为它们太难以应对。它们的攻击建立在混沌与随机之上，使人几乎不可能猜到它们接下来会做什么。这种不可预测性使奇想魔像成为强大的敌人。

令人疑惑的理由

与大多数奇物一样，奇想魔像的制造极其困难且昂贵，以至于制造者不禁思索：究竟有什么用途会比魔像本身更有价值。与更致命的同类相比，它们作为守卫并不那么可靠，而且还额外惧怕感官魔法。一些奇想魔像最终出现在赌场里，在那里，它们炫目的外表与混沌的能力使其既能充当景点又能担任安保。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 175/390/720 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍），护甲（中甲、重甲），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 灾厄，混沌，体质，敏捷，电击，延展，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），力场，力量，坚固，狂野

Rods of wonder and related artifacts have long captured the imagination of artificers and spellcasters. So, it was all but inevitable that someone would imbue a magical creature with the chaotic magic found in these curious items.

These brightly colored and bejeweled constructs are feared, not because of any expert spellcasting or massive damage, but because it is so hard to prepare for them. Their attacks are based on chaos and randomness, making it virtually impossible to guess what they will do next. This unpredictability makes a golem of wonder a formidable foe.

Wondering Why

Like most artifacts, golems of wonder are so difficult and expensive to construct that their makers are left pondering what purposes they could serve that would be more valuable than the golem itself. They are less consistent guardians than their more lethal counterparts, and they have additional weaknesses to sensory magic. A few have ended up at casinos, where their scintillating appearances and chaotic abilities allow them to double as both an attraction as well as security.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 175/390/720 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (medium, heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, constitution, dexterity, electricity, elongating, energy resistant (negative, positive), force, strength, sturdy, wild
Golem of Wonder.prototypeToken: 奇迹魔像 Golem of Wonder

Golden Coinivore Swarm.name: 金色食币虫群 Golden Coinivore Swarm
Golden Coinivore Swarm.tokenName: 金色食币虫群 Golden Coinivore Swarm

Scent(Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 气味（模糊）60英尺 Scent(Imprecise) 60 feet

Fool's Gold.name: 愚人金 Fool's Gold
Fool's Gold.description:
直到它下一次行动前，金色食币虫群看起来像是一堆普通的金币。作为该动作的一部分，它可以进入一个相邻的、能够容纳至少 8 负载物品的打开容器。它在欺骗检定和 DC 上有自动结果 38，以伪装成普通钱币。

Until the next time it acts, the golden coinivore swarm appears to be a normal pile of golden coins. As part of this action it can enter an adjacent open container capable of holding at least 8 Bulk of items. It has an automatic result of 38 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as normal coins.

All That Glitters.name: 闪闪发光的一切 All That Glitters
All That Glitters.description:
60英尺。灵光范围内任何既能看见金色噬币虫群又重视黄金的生物，都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:23] 豁免以抵抗被迷住。

成功 该生物不受影响，并在24小时内暂时免疫。

失败 该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}，并且它必须将其每个动作都用于尽可能迅速地向金色噬币虫群靠近，同时避免明显的危险。若一名被迷住的生物与金色噬币虫群相邻，则它保持不动且不采取动作。若被金色噬币虫群攻击，则该生物在金色噬币虫群的回合结束时从迷惑中解脱。否则，该迷惑持续1分钟，并且针对被迷住生物及其盟友的敌对动作不会提前结束该迷惑。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但若被金色噬币虫群攻击，则该生物可以在其下个回合开始时尝试一次新的豁免以对抗该迷惑，而不是在金色噬币虫群的回合结束时解脱。

60 feet. Any creature within the aura that both sees the golden coinivore swarm and values gold must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:23] save to resist becoming captivated.

Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}, and it must spend each of its actions to move closer to the golden coinivore swarm as expediently as possible, while avoiding obvious dangers. If a fascinated creature is adjacent to the golden coinivore swarm, it stays still and doesn't act. If attacked by the golden coinivore swarm, the creature is freed from the fascination at the end of the golden coinivore swarm's turn. Otherwise, the fascination lasts 1 minute, and hostile actions against the fascinated creature and its allies don't end the fascination early.

Critical Failure As failure, but if attacked by the golden coinivore swarm, the creature can attempt a new save against the fascination at the start of its next turn, rather than being freed at the end of the golden coinivore swarm's turn.

Money Hungry.name: 渴望钱财 Money Hungry
Money Hungry.description:
噬币虫群蜂拥而上，以无尽的饥饿吞噬其空间内的生物。虫群空间内的每个敌人承受 @Damage[4d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] 豁免。豁免失败者还会承受 [[/r 1d6[persistent,piercing]]] 伤害，并暴露于噬币者毒液。

The coinivores swarm over and devour creatures in their space with an endless hunger. Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[4d6[piercing]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] save. Those who fail their saving throw also take [[/r 1d6[persistent,piercing]]] damage and are exposed to coinivore venom.

Coinivore Venom.name: 嗜币毒液 Coinivore Venom
Coinivore Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，且所有速度承受 –5 尺状态减值（1 轮）

阶段 2 [[/r 1d8[poison]]] 伤害，且所有速度承受 –10 尺状态减值（1 轮）

阶段 3 [[/r 2d6[poison]]] 伤害，且 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{定身}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and a –5-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 1d8[poison]]] damage and a –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)

Stage 3 [[/r 2d6[poison]]] damage and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} (1 round)

Golden Coinivore Swarm.publicNotes:
这个致命的守卫由成千上万张饥饿的口器组成，伪装成大量的金色钱币财富。

金色钱币噬生虫群能休眠数月之久，等待猎物误闯其中。它们蛊惑人心的外表、迟缓的毒素，以及无尽撕咬的利齿，会让它们抓住的任何血肉点心迅速毙命。这份饥饿也使金色钱币噬生虫群难以与其他生物共处，因为它们总会转而攻击自己的伙伴。虫群只会无视其他钱币噬生者以及没有可食用血肉的存在，例如大多数构装体、泥怪和灵体。所幸，金色钱币噬生虫群的领地意识极强，通常不会自愿离开它们称作家园的巢穴太远。

不过，任何在与金色钱币噬生虫群的遭遇中幸存下来的人，之后可能会发现自己口袋和钱袋里多出了几枚钱币；因为每个虫群中都有极少数初生的钱币噬生女王追求的不是鲜血，而是为新一窝后代寻找一个家。就这样，钱币噬生者一直在缓慢地扩散到最意想不到的地方。

不过需要注意的是，单个钱币噬生工虫一旦与虫群分离，就会变得相当温顺；有些人甚至把它们当作非传统的宠物，乃至魔宠来饲养。

跟我的小伙伴们打个招呼

一些盗贼公会会饲养金色钱币噬生虫群，用于防御与进攻。他们把这些生物放进金库的伪造入口中，伏击那些以为能轻松得手的竞争对手。他们也可能用虫群来偿还债务，把致命杀机释放给那些愚蠢到接受一袋袋黄金的敌人。传奇中记载着一位野心勃勃的盗贼曾把一群虫群赠给一条巨龙。虫群没能杀死巨龙，却把龙的宝藏彻底侵染，以至于巨龙厌恶地弃置宝藏不顾，让盗贼轻松得手。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 64/140/250 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（重型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、潜行、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），心灵，狂野

This deadly guardian is composed of thousands of hungry maws masquerading as a tremendous wealth of golden coins.

A golden coinivore swarm can lie dormant for months on end, waiting for prey to stumble upon them. Their beguiling appearance, slowing poison, and endless tearing teeth then make short work of any fleshy morsel they can catch. This hunger makes a golden coinivore swarm difficult to keep alongside other creatures, as they invariably turn upon their companions. The swarm only ignores other coinivores and beings without edible flesh, such as most constructs, oozes, and spirits. Thankfully, golden coinivore swarms are extremely territorial and usually don't willingly venture far from whatever lair they have come to call home.

Anyone who survives an encounter with a golden coinivore swarm, however, might later discover a few extra coins in their pockets and purse, as a very small number of nascent coinivore queens in each swarm seek not blood but a home for a new brood. In this way, coinivores have been slowly spreading to the most unexpected of places.

It should be noted, though, that an individual coinivore drone, once separated from its swarm, becomes rather docile, and they have been kept by some as unconventional pets or even familiars.

Say Hello To My Little Friends

Some thieves guilds keep golden coinivore swarms for both defensive and offensive purposes. They place the creatures inside false entrances to their vaults, where they ambush rivals who think they are easy pickings. They may also use them to pay debts, unleashing murder on foes foolish enough to accept the bags of gold. Legend speaks of one ambitious thief who gifted a swarm to a dragon. It did not kill the dragon but infested the hoard so thoroughly that the dragon abandoned it in disgust, leaving easy pickings for the thief.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (heavy), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), mental, wild

Goblin Circus Troupe.name: 地精马戏团剧团 Goblin Circus Troupe
Goblin Circus Troupe.tokenName: 地精马戏团剧团 Goblin Circus Troupe

Cavorting Tide.name: 狂舞潮汐 Cavorting Tide
Cavorting Tide.description:
地精马戏团队伍的组织性不如大多数部队。它可以移动进入其他生物的空间，而其他生物也可以移动进入它的空间。它的空间对其他生物而言是困难地形。

The goblin circus troupe is less organized than most troops. It can move into other creatures' spaces, and other creatures can move into its spaces. Its spaces are difficult terrain to other creatures.

Cacophonous Aura.name: 喧嚣灵光 Cacophonous Aura
Cacophonous Aura.description:
30英尺。每当灵光内的一个活生物在其回合开始时，该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免。

大成功 该生物在1小时内免疫此能力。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} 直到其下一回合结束。

大失败 该生物成为stupefied 2，持续1分钟。

30 feet. Whenever a living creature within the aura starts its turn, the creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:21] save.

Critical Success The creature is immune to this ability for 1 hour.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} until the end of its next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is stupefied 2 for 1 minute.

Encore!.name: 再来一次！ Encore!
Encore!.description:
需求 没有敌人位于地精马戏团团员10尺范围内。

效果 地精马戏团团员上演他们此生最精彩的演出。120尺内能看见并听见地精马戏团团员的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:24] 豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标因地精马戏团团员而陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} 状态，持续1分钟。

大成功或大失败 目标被这群嬉闹的团员迷住，并陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} 状态，持续1分钟。

Requirements No enemy is within 10 feet of the goblin circus troupe.

Effect The goblin circus troupe puts on the show of their lives. Creatures within 120 feet that can see and hear the goblin circus troupe must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:24] save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated} by the goblin circus troupe for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is fascinated by the cavorting troupe and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute.

Form Up.name: 形态 上升 Form Up

Pelt Them!.name: 用毛皮砸他们！ Pelt Them!
Pelt Them!.description:
地精马戏团团员用一阵石块、炸弹和各种随机道具猛砸他们的目标。这阵齐射是一个射程为30尺的 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]，造成 @Damage[2d8[bludgeoning],2d4[fire]]{2d8钝击伤害与2d4火焰} 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true] 豁免）。当该地精马戏团团员减少至8格或更少时，此区域缩小为一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:5]。

The goblin circus troupe pelt their target with a volley of stones, bombs, and random props. This volley is a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] with a range of 30 feet that deals @Damage[2d8[bludgeoning],2d4[fire]]{2d8 bludgeoning damage and 2d4 fire} damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true] save). When the goblin circus troupe is reduced to 8 or fewer squares, this area decreases to a @Template[type:burst|distance:5].

Smash Them!.name: 粉碎他们！ Smash Them!
Smash Them!.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 地精马戏团班组对其所在方格内以及5尺内的每个敌人发动一次协调攻击（@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true] 豁免）。伤害取决于动作数量。

1 @Damage[1d8[bludgeoning],1d4[fire]]{1d8 钝击伤害和 1d4 火焰} 伤害

2 [[/r (1d8+7)[bludgeoning],1d4[fire]]]{1d8+7 钝击伤害和 1d4 火焰} 伤害

3 [[/r (1d8+11)[bludgeoning],1d4[fire]]]{1d8+11 钝击伤害和 1d4 火焰} 伤害

Frequency once per round

Effect The goblin circus troupe engages in a coordinated attack against each enemy in their squares and within 5 feet (@Check[type:reflex|dc:21|basic:true] save). The damage depends on the number of actions.

1 @Damage[1d8[bludgeoning],1d4[fire]]{1d8 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 fire} damage

2 [[/r (1d8+7)[bludgeoning],1d4[fire]]]{1d8+7 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 fire} damage

3 [[/r (1d8+11)[bludgeoning],1d4[fire]]]{1d8+11 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 fire} damage

Troop Movement.name: 部队移动 Troop Movement
Troop Movement.description:
每当地精马戏团剧团进行跨步时，剧团会先以自由动作（）集合，将队形压缩到一个20英尺×20英尺的区域（减去任何缺失的方格），然后再移动。这与超巨型生物的移动方式完全相同；例如，如果剧团的任何一个方格进入困难地形，则额外的移动消耗适用于整个剧团。

Whenever the goblin circus troupe Strides, the troupe first Forms Up as a free action to condense into a 20-foot-by-20-foot area (minus any missing squares), then moves. This works just like a Gargantuan creature moving; for instance, if any square of the troupe enters difficult terrain, the extra movement cost applies to the whole troupe.

Goblin Circus Troupe.publicNotes:
由地精杂技演员、炸弹杂耍者、喷火者、训犬师、小丑和乐师组成的地精马戏团，由一位马戏团团长带领。若任其自作主张，这支 troupe 会四处跳跃翻筋斗，敲打乐器，制造出骇人的噪音。任何鼓掌不够响亮的人——而 troupe 在喧闹声中也听不太清——都会被地精用手边任何东西砸个正着，通常包括炸弹和各种随机的马戏道具。

在数量带来的勇气支撑下，地精马戏 troupe 喜欢在拥挤的人类城市里表演，因为城卫队很难将其控制住。

文化冲击

对那些即将见识地精马戏 troupe 的人来说，最重要的一条引导是：千万不要用烂蔬菜砸 troupe。地精文化反而把这种不满的表达视为赞许的标志。兴奋的 troupe 成员可能会因观众参与而欣喜若狂，以至于把“冒犯者”拉进节目里。这些绑架行为让“离家出走去加入马戏团”这一概念有了全新的展开。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 30/65/125 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技，运动，自然，表演）

符合条件的灌注属性 体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），精神，力量，野性

Goblin acrobats, bomb jugglers, fire eaters, dog tamers, clowns, and musicians form a goblin circus troupe led by a ringmaster. When left to their own devices, the troupe leaps and cartwheels around, banging their instruments and making an awful noise. Anyone who doesn't applaud loudly enough—and the troupe can't hear much over their din—gets pelted with whatever the goblins have on hand, which usually includes bombs and random circus props.

With their courage bolstered by their numbers, goblin circus troupes love to perform in densely populated human cities where the city watch has difficulty keeping them under control.

Culture Shock

The number one piece of guidance for those about to experience a goblin circus troupe is: do NOT pelt the troupe with rotten vegetables. Goblin culture considers this expression of displeasure to be a sign of approval instead. Excited troupe members may be so thrilled by the audience participation that they bring offenders into the act. These kidnappings have put a new spin on the concept of running away to join the circus.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 30/65/125 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Nature, Performance)

Eligible Imbued Properties constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), mental, strength, wild
Goblin Circus Troupe.prototypeToken: 地精马戏团剧团 Goblin Circus Troupe

Gladelich.name: 林境巫妖 Gladelich

Soul Grove.name: 灵魂林地 Soul Grove
Soul Grove.description:
每个林妖巫妖都有一个灵魂林地，使其能够复苏。这个区域，即以林妖巫妖化仪式发生之处为中心的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] 范围，被一层永远笼罩林地的恐惧滤幕所玷污。该区域内的光会变为昏暗光照。当林妖巫妖被摧毁时，其灵魂会通过其复苏立刻转移到其灵魂林地。只有找到并摧毁其灵魂林地，才能永久摧毁林妖巫妖。

Each gladelich has a soul grove, which allows them to rejuvenate. This area, a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] around the spot where the gladelichdom ritual took place, is tainted with a dread filter that perpetually sheathes the grove. Light in the area becomes dim light instead. When a gladelich is destroyed, its soul immediately transfers to its soul grove via its rejuvenation. A gladelich can be permanently destroyed only if its soul grove is found and destroyed.

Animal Staff (Greater).name: 动物法杖（强效） Animal Staff (Greater)
Animal Staff (Greater).description:
这根法杖顶端雕刻着动物与怪物的头颅。持用该法杖时，你在进行自然检定以辨识动物时获得+2环境加值。

启动 施放法术

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tXa5vOu5giBNCjdR]{Know Direction}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EE7Q5BHIrfWNCPtT]{Magic Fang} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yhz9fF69uwRhnHix]{Animal Messenger} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}
  • 3环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal 形态} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}

制作需求 提供所有所列法术之所有所列环级各1次施放。

This staff is topped with carved animal and monster heads. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Nature checks to identify animals.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tXa5vOu5giBNCjdR]{Know Direction}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EE7Q5BHIrfWNCPtT]{Magic Fang} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}
  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yhz9fF69uwRhnHix]{Animal Messenger} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}
  • 3rd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Positive.name: 对抗正能量的所有豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Positive

Siphon Life.name: 虹吸生命 Siphon Life
Siphon Life.description:
触发 冰刃巫妖以其枯萎树枝打击造成伤害

效果 冰刃巫妖恢复等同于所造成伤害一半的生命值。

Trigger The gladelich deals damage with its withering branch Strike

Effect The gladelich regains Hit Points equal to half the damage dealt.

Dread Grove.name: 恐惧树林 Dread Grove
Dread Grove.description:
进入林阔巫妖灵魂林地的生物（林阔巫妖及其盟友除外）会变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 1}。如果某个生物在灵魂林地内在过去24小时内对任何植物造成过火焰伤害，则其改为变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 2}。

Creatures entering a gladelich's soul grove other than the gladelich and its allies become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 1}. If a creature in the soul grove has dealt fire damage to any plants in the past 24 hours, they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 2} instead.

Steady Spellcasting.name: 稳定施法 Steady Spellcasting
Steady Spellcasting.description:
如果某个反应动作（）会打断刃巫妖的施法动作，刃巫妖尝试一次@Check[type:flat|dc:15]。成功时，该动作不会被打断。

If a reaction would disrupt the gladelich's spellcasting action, the gladelich attempts a @Check[type:flat|dc:15]. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

Woodland Stride.name: 林地行者 Woodland Stride
Woodland Stride.description:
林地尸魔无视来自非魔法植被的困难地形与更高等困难地形。

The gladelich ignores difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from non- magical foliage.

Primal Prepared Spells.name: 原初预备法术 Primal Prepared Spells

Corrosive Body.name: 腐蚀之躯 Corrosive Body
Corrosive Body.description:
你呼出腐蚀性气体，酸性分泌物覆盖你的皮肤，你变形为一种由活酸构成的存在。你获得酸免疫。任何触碰你或用徒手近战攻击或非触及近战武器伤害你的生物都会受到[[/r 3d6[acid]]]伤害，并且你的徒手攻击额外造成1d4点酸伤害。每轮第一次你以这种方式对一个生物造成酸伤害时，你获得[[/r 3d6 #Temporary Hit Points]]{3d6临时生命值}，因为你的身体消化被侵蚀的物质并将其变形为保护性的酸。当法术结束时，任何剩余的临时生命值也会一并消失。你的酸法术额外造成1个伤害骰的酸伤害（使用与该法术相同的伤害骰）。你可以将acid splash作为先天法术施放；其溅射伤害会影响15尺内的所有生物，而非通常的5尺。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.LT5AV9vSN3T9x3J9]{法术效果：腐蚀之躯}

升阶（9环） 触碰你的生物受到[[/r 4d6[acid]]]伤害而非3d6，你的徒手攻击额外造成2d4点酸伤害，并且你获得[[/r 5d6 #Temporary Hit Points]]{5d6临时生命值}。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.xKJVqN1ETnNH3tFg]{法术效果：腐蚀之躯（升阶 9环）}

You exhale corrosive gas, and acidic secretions coat your skin as you transform into a being of living acid. You gain acid immunity. Any creature that touches you or damages you with an unarmed melee attack or non-reach melee weapon takes [[/r 3d6[acid]]] damage, and your unarmed attacks deal 1d4 additional acid damage. The first time each round that you deal acid damage to a creature in this way, you gain [[/r 3d6 #Temporary Hit Points]]{3d6 temporary Hit Points} as your body digests the eroded material and transforms it into a protective acid. When the spell ends, any remaining temporary HP expires as well. Your acid spells deal one additional die of acid damage (of the same damage die the spell uses). You can cast acid splash as an innate spell; the splash damage affects all creatures within 15 feet instead of the normal 5 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.LT5AV9vSN3T9x3J9]{Spell Effect: Corrosive Body}

Heightened (9th) Creatures touching you take [[/r 4d6[acid]]] damage instead of 3d6, your unarmed attacks deal 2d4 additional acid damage, and you gain [[/r 5d6 #Temporary Hit Points]]{5d6 temporary Hit Points}. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.xKJVqN1ETnNH3tFg]{Spell Effect: Corrosive Body (Heightened 9th)}

Finger of Death.name: 死亡之指 Finger of Death
Finger of Death.description:
你将手指指向目标，并说出一个屠戮之词。你对目标造成70点负能量伤害。如果死亡之指的伤害将目标的生命值降至0，目标会立刻死亡。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高10点。

You point your finger toward the target and speak a word of slaying. You deal 70 negative damage to the target. If the damage from finger of death reduces the target to 0 Hit Points, the target dies instantly.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 10.

Necrotize.name: 死灵化 Necrotize
Necrotize.description:
你使一名生物身体的一部分坏死，伤害它并使其衰弱；随着其身体腐烂，模拟自然的腐败过程。目标受到12d6负能量伤害以及下列衰弱之一；掷骰[[/r 1d4]]随机决定是哪一种。其效果取决于其强韧豁免。

  1. 骨骼目标的骨骼坏死并变得海绵状、脆弱，使其获得3点对钝击伤害的弱点。
  2. 关节目标的关节坏死，使其移动笨拙不协调。它变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。
  3. 腿部目标的腿部坏死，以及任何与移动形态相关的其他肢体，使该生物更难移动。目标的各项速度承受-10英尺状态减值。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ndj0TpLxyzbyzcm4]{法术效果：坏死（腿部）}
  4. 肌肉目标的肌肉坏死并腐烂。目标变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

大成功目标不受影响。

成功目标受到一半伤害，且衰弱持续至你下个回合结束。

失败目标受到全额伤害，且衰弱持续1分钟。

大失败目标受到双倍伤害，且除你随机掷出的衰弱之外，你还可以选择第二项衰弱施加。两项衰弱均持续1分钟。

升阶（+1）伤害增加2d6。

You necrotize part of a creature's body, harming it and debilitating it as its body putrefies, mimicking the natural process of decay. The target takes 12d6 negative damage and one of the following debilitations; roll [[/r 1d4]] to randomly determine which. The effects depend on its Fortitude save.

  1. Bones The target's bones necrotize and become spongy and weak, giving it weakness 3 to bludgeoning damage.
  2. Joints The target's joints necrotize, making its movements ungainly and clumsy. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.
  3. Legs The target's legs necrotize, as well as any other limbs associated with forms of movement, making it harder for the creature to move. The target takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ndj0TpLxyzbyzcm4]{Spell Effect: Necrotize (Legs)}
  4. Muscles The target's muscles necrotize, rotting away. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and the debilitation lasts until the end of your next turn.

Failure The target takes full damage and the debilitation lasts for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and you can pick a second debilitation to apply, in addition to the one you rolled randomly. Both debilitations last for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你瓦解一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标尝试一次反制检定。若你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Nature's Reprisal.name: 自然的报复 Nature's Reprisal
Nature's Reprisal.description:
当你呼唤自然以阻滞你的敌人时，区域内的植物开始扭动并抽打，攻击你的敌人。对你的敌人而言，该区域变为困难地形；而那些由于植物而天然为困难地形的区域则变为更大困难地形，并同时成为有害地形，每当敌人进入一个受影响的方格时，便对其造成6点毒素伤害。

升阶（+1） 有害地形的毒素伤害提高1点。

The plant life within the area begins to writhe and lash out against your enemies as you call upon nature to impede your foes. To your enemies, the area becomes difficult terrain, and areas that were naturally difficult terrain due to plants become greater difficult terrain as well as hazardous terrain, dealing 6 poison damage to an enemy each time it enters an affected square.

Heightened (+1) The poison damage of the hazardous terrain increases by 1.

Slow.name: 缓慢 Slow
Slow.description:
你使目标周围的时代流动膨胀，从而减缓其动作。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 状态，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 状态，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} 状态，持续1分钟。

强化（6环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

You dilate the flow of time around the target, slowing its actions.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 minute.

Heightened (6th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

True Seeing.name: 真实视域 True Seeing
True Seeing.description:
你如其真实般看见60尺内的事物。GM会针对区域内的任何幻术或变化系效果暗掷一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于确定你是否能看穿它（例如，如果该检定对抗一个变形法术成功，你可以看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Cloudkill.name: 死云术 Cloudkill
Cloudkill.description:
你召唤出一团有毒的雾霭。这如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist}般生效，但区域每轮会向远离你的方向移动10英尺。每个开始其回合时位于该法术区域内的可呼吸生物承受6d8毒素伤害。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You conjure a poisonous fog. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist}, except the area moves 10 feet away from you each round. You deal 6d8 poison damage to each breathing creature that starts its turn in the spell's area. You can Dismiss the spell.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Tree Stride.name: 树跃步 Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description:
你踏入一棵树干大到足以让你进入其中的活树，并立刻传送到射程内5英里内任何同一树种、且同样拥有足够大树干的树中。一旦你进入第一棵树，你会立刻知晓射程内同一树种其他足够大的树的大致位置，并且如果你愿意，你可以从原本那棵树离开。你无法携带异次元空间；如果你试图这样做，该法术失败。

升阶（6环） 你离开的树最远可以在50英里之外。

升阶（8环） 你离开的树最远可以在500英里之外。

升阶（9环） 你离开的树可以在同一颗行星上的任何地方。

You step into a living tree with a trunk big enough for you to fit inside it and instantly teleport to any tree of the same species within 5 miles that also has a sufficiently large trunk. Once you enter the first tree, you instantly know the rough locations of other sufficiently large trees of the same species within range and can exit from the original tree, if you prefer. You can't carry extradimensional spaces with you; if you attempt to do so, the spell fails.

Heightened (6th) The tree you exit can be up to 50 miles away.

Heightened (8th) The tree you exit can be up to 500 miles away.

Heightened (9th) The tree you exit can be anywhere on the same planet.

Wall of Stone.name: 石墙 Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description:
你塑造一面坚固的石墙。你创造一面厚1英寸、最长120英尺、高20英尺的石墙。你可以塑造墙的路径，将墙的每5英尺放置在方格之间的边界上。石墙不必竖直站立，因此你可以用它形成桥梁或一组楼梯等。你必须在一片连续且空旷的空间中召唤这面墙，使其边缘不会穿过任何生物或物体，否则该法术失效。

石墙每个10英尺×10英尺的区段具有AC 10、硬度14以及50生命值，并且免疫大成功或大失败命中与精准伤害。被摧毁的石墙区段可以被穿过，但由其产生的瓦砾为困难地形。

升阶（+2） 石墙每个区段的生命值增加15。

You shape a wall of solid stone. You create a 1-inch-thick wall of stone up to 120 feet long, and 20 feet high. You can shape the wall's path, placing each 5 feet of the wall on the border between squares. The wall doesn't need to stand vertically, so you can use it to form a bridge or set of stairs, for example. You must conjure the wall in an unbroken open space so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost.

Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall has AC 10, Hardness 14, and 50 Hit Points, and it's immune to critical hits and precision damage. A destroyed section of the wall can be moved through, but the rubble created from it is difficult terrain.

Heightened (+2) The Hit Points of each section of the wall increase by 15.

Air Walk.name: 空气行走 Air Walk
Air Walk.description:
目标可以在空气上行走，如同在坚实的地面上一般。它可以以这种方式以最多 45 度角上升和下降。

The target can walk on air as if it were solid ground. It can ascend and descend in this way at a maximum of a 45-degree angle.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果影响下，目标无视会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 摆脱使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓住}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}状态的效果时，其自动成功，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于行动自如法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Pass Without Trace.name: 无踪步行 Pass Without Trace
Pass Without Trace.description:
你掩盖自己留下的踪迹，使他人更难找到你。用于追踪你的检定的DC获得+4状态加值，或等同于你的法术DC，以使DC更高者为准。你同一时间只能从一个pass without trace法术中获益。

升阶（2环） 持续时间增加至8小时。

升阶（4环） 持续时间增加至8小时。该法术的射程为20英尺，区域为20英尺发散，影响该区域内由你选择的至多10个生物。

You obscure the tracks you leave behind and make it harder for others to find you. The DC of checks to Track you gains a +4 status bonus or is equal to your spell DC, whichever results in a higher DC. You can benefit from only one pass without trace spell at a time.

Heightened (2nd) The duration increases to 8 hours.

Heightened (4th) The duration increases to 8 hours. The spell has a range of 20 feet and an area of a 20-foot-emanation, affecting up to 10 creatures of your choice within that area.

Petal Storm.name: 花瓣风暴 Petal Storm
Petal Storm.description:
你召唤出一团锋利如刃的花瓣云，在风中剧烈翻搅。进入风暴或在风暴中开始其回合的生物，会被花瓣锋利的边缘切割。它进行一次基础反射豁免，失败则受到2d10挥砍伤害。生物每轮只能因花瓣受到一次伤害。在持续时间结束时，风暴平息，花瓣无害地飘落到地面。

升阶（+2） 伤害提高[[/r 1d10]]{1d10}。

You bring forth a cloud of razor-sharp flower petals that thrash violently in the wind. A creature that enters the storm or starts its turn in the storm is sliced by the razor-sharp edges of the petals. It takes 2d10 slashing damage with a basic Reflex save. A creature can take damage from the petals only once per round. At the end of the duration, the storm calms and the petals fall harmlessly to the ground.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by [[/r 1d10]]{1d10}.

Animal Vision.name: 动物视野 Animal Vision
Animal Vision.description:
你接入目标的感官，使你在法术的持续时间内能够看见、听见，并以其他方式感知它所感知的一切。若目标希望阻止你这么做，它可以尝试一次意志豁免；成功则使该法术失效，但大多数动物不会费心这么做。当你接入目标的感官时，你无法使用自己身体的感官，但你可以使用一个带有专注（特征）的单动作，在自己身体的感官与目标的感官之间来回切换。

You tap into the target's senses, allowing you to see, hear, and otherwise sense whatever it senses for the spell's duration. If the target wishes to prevent you from doing so, it can attempt a Will save, negating the spell on a success, but most animals don't bother to do so. While tapping into the target's senses, you can't use your own body's senses, but you can change back and forth from your body's senses to the target's senses using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的能力。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将额外的动作用于打击和疾行动作。

强化（7环） 你可以以最多6个生物为目标。

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

Wall of Thorns.name: 荆棘之墙 Wall of Thorns
Wall of Thorns.description:
在一分钟的过程中，你使一堵浓密的带刺荆棘墙从地面生长出来。你创造一堵5英尺厚的荆棘与棘刺之墙，以直线延伸，长度至多60英尺，高度10英尺。你必须在一处连续不中断的开放空间内创造这堵墙，使其边缘不会穿过任何生物或物体，否则该法术失效。墙体垂直矗立。若你愿意，墙可以更短或更矮。墙两侧的所有事物都能获得来自对侧生物的掩蔽，并且墙的空间属于困难地形。每当一个生物使用一个移动动作进入至少一个墙的空间时，该生物受到3d4穿刺伤害。

墙的每个10英尺×10英尺区段具有AC 10、硬度10，以及20生命值。它免疫大成功或大失败造成的打击与精准伤害。被摧毁的区段可以被自由穿行。

升阶（+1） 墙的每个区段的生命值增加5点，穿刺伤害增加1d4。

Over the course of a minute, you cause a thick wall of thorny brambles to grow from the ground. You create a 5-foot-thick wall of brambles and thorns in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high. You must create the wall in an unbroken open space so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost. The wall stands vertically. If you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall has cover from creatures on the opposite side, and the wall's spaces are difficult terrain. For every move action a creature uses to enter at least one of the wall's spaces, that creature takes 3d4 piercing damage.

Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall has AC 10, Hardness 10, and 20 Hit Points. It's immune to critical hits and precision damage. A destroyed section can be moved through freely.

Heightened (+1) The Hit Points of each section of the wall increase by 5, and the piercing damage increases by 1d4.

Entangle.name: 纠缠 Entangle
Entangle.description:
区域 一个20英尺爆发内所有包含植物或真菌的方格

植物与真菌会缠住生物。该区域为困难地形。每一轮当一个生物在该区域内开始其回合时，它必须尝试一次反射豁免。失败时，它的速度在离开该区域前受到-10英尺的环境减值；大失败时，它还会在1轮内受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{束缚}。生物可以以entangle的DC尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}以移除这些效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{法术效果：纠缠术}

Area all squares in a 20-foot burst that contain plants or fungi

Plants and fungi entangle creatures. The area is difficult terrain. Each round that a creature starts its turn in the area, it must attempt a Reflex save. On a failure, it takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds until it leaves the area, and on a critical failure, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. Creatures can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} at entangle's DC to remove these effects.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{Spell Effect: Entangle}

Longstrider.name: 大步奔行 Longstrider
Longstrider.description:
你的步幅延伸到超出常理所能做到的程度。你获得对你的速度的+10英尺状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PQHP7Oph3BQX1GhF]{法术效果：长足行走}

升阶（2环） 持续时间增加至8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.7vIUF5zbvHzVcJA0]{法术效果：长足行走（8小时）}

You lengthen your stride beyond what should be possible. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PQHP7Oph3BQX1GhF]{Spell Effect: Longstrider}

Heightened (2nd) The duration increases to 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.7vIUF5zbvHzVcJA0]{Spell Effect: Longstrider (8 hours)}

Shape Wood.name: 塑木术 Shape Wood
Shape Wood.description:
你将木材塑造成你选择的一种粗略形状。这种塑形能力过于粗糙，无法制作带有复杂部件、精细细节、可动结构或类似之物。你不能用此法术来提升你正在塑造的木制物体的价值。

You shape the wood into a rough shape of your choice. The shaping power is too crude to produce with intricate parts, fine details, moving pieces, or the like. You cannot use this spell to enhance the value of the wooden object you are shaping.

Tree Shape.name: 树形变身 Tree Shape
Tree Shape.description:
你变形为一棵大型树。察觉检定不会揭示你的真实本质，但以你的法术DC为对抗DC成功进行一次自然或求生检定，会揭示你看起来像是一棵对该区域而言异常新出现的树。处于树的形态时，你可以观察周围的一切，但你无法采取除结束该法术以外的任何动作；你可以在你的回合中用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来结束该法术。作为一棵树，你的AC为20，且只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值与环境减值会影响你。你在反射豁免掷骰中掷出的任何成功与大成功都视为失败。

You transform into a Large tree. Perception checks don't reveal your true nature, but a successful Nature or Survival check against your spell DC reveals that you appear to be a tree that is strangely new to the area. While in tree form, you can observe everything around you, but you can't act other than to end the spell, and your turn, by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait. As a tree, your AC is 20, and only status bonuses, status penalties, circumstance bonuses, and circumstance penalties affect you. Any successes and critical successes you roll on Reflex saves are failures.

Fear.name: 恐惧 Fear
Fear.description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以五个生物为目标。
