You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Fleet Step.name: 疾步如飞 Fleet Step
Fleet Step.description:
你获得 速度+30尺的状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{法术效果：轻捷步伐}

You gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{Spell Effect: Fleet Step}

Gust of Wind.name: 风之疾风 Gust of Wind
Gust of Wind.description:
一阵猛烈的风从你的掌心呼啸而出，从你施放该法术时所在的位置吹向线段的另一端。风会熄灭微小的非魔法火焰，驱散烟雾与薄雾，吹动负载为光或更轻的物体，并推动更大的物体。区域内大型或更小的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。之后进入这股阵风的大型或更小的生物，在进入时也必须尝试该豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物无法逆风移动。

失败 该生物被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。如果它正在飞行，则改为承受大失败的效果。

大失败 该生物被沿风向推开30英尺，被击倒为Prone，并受到2d6钝击伤害。

A violent wind issues forth from your palm, blowing from the point where you are when you cast the spell to the line's opposite end. The wind extinguishes small non-magical fires, disperses fog and mist, blows objects of light Bulk or less around, and pushes larger objects. Large or smaller creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save. Large or smaller creatures that later move into the gust must attempt the save on entering.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature can't move against the wind.

Failure The creature is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If it was flying, it suffers the effects of critical failure instead.

Critical Failure The creature is pushed 30 feet in the wind's direction, knocked Prone, and takes 2d6 bludgeoning damage.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以感知魔法的存在。除魔法的存在或不存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。

你只有在幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术等级时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺瞒性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你会得知该法术在射程内所侦测到的、等级最高的效果所属的魔法学派。若有多个效果同样强大，则由GM决定你得知哪一个。

升阶（4环） 如3环，但你还会定位等级最高的魔法之来源。与模糊感官相同，你不会得知精确位置，但你可以将来源缩小到一个5英尺立方体之内（若来源大于此范围，则缩小到最接近的范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the level of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Puff of Poison.name: 毒素烟团 Puff of Poison
Puff of Poison.description:
你向敌人的脸上呼出一团闪烁的毒素吐息云雾。根据其强韧豁免，目标受到等同于你施法调整值的毒素伤害以及2点持续毒素伤害。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半的初始伤害与持续伤害。

失败 目标受到全部的初始伤害与持续伤害。

大失败 目标受到双倍的初始伤害与持续伤害。

升阶（+2） 初始毒素伤害增加1d8，持续毒素伤害增加1。

You exhale a shimmering cloud of toxic breath at an enemy's face. The target takes poison damage equal to your spellcasting modifier and 2 persistent poison damage, depending on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target takes half initial and persistent damage.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage.

Critical Failure The target takes double initial and persistent damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial poison damage increases by 1d8 and the persistent poison damage increases by 1.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心扉以感知魔法灵光。施法完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法；若是，你还会得知其魔法学派。

若该物体是幻象，你只有在该效果的等级低于你的读取灵光法术的等级时，才能侦测出这一点。

增幅（3环）你最多可以以10个物体为目标。

增幅（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the level of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Tanglefoot.name: 缠足 Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一条覆盖着黏稠树汁的藤蔓凭空出现，从你手中甩出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击。

大成功或大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）} 状态，并在1轮内其速度受到-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试以对抗你的法术DC来逃脱，以移除该减值与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）} 状态。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度受到-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试以对抗你的法术DC来逃脱，以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠足术}

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tanglefoot}

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Speak with Animals (Constant).name: 动物交谈（恒定） Speak with Animals (Constant)
Speak with Animals (Constant).description:
你可以向动物提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对动物使用交涉（技能）。该法术不会让它们比平常更友善。狡猾的动物很可能言简意赅、闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的动物则常常会发表愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals. The spell doesn't make them more friendly than normal. Cunning animals are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Speak with Plants (Constant).name: 植物交谈（恒定） Speak with Plants (Constant)
Speak with Plants (Constant).description:
你可以向植物和真菌提问并获得回答，但该法术不会让它们比平常更友善或更聪明。大多数普通植物和真菌对周围世界有独特的看法，因此它们不会辨认出生物的细节，也不会知道其近旁以外的世界。狡猾的植物或真菌怪物很可能言简意赅、闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的则常常发表些愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal. Most normal plants and fungi have a distinctive view of the world around them, so they don't recognize details about creatures or know anything about the world beyond their immediate vicinity. Cunning plant or fungus monsters are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Gladelich.publicNotes:
当施法者试图智胜死亡时，有许多道路可循。其中一种邪恶的方法是巫妖化；而通往巫妖化的道路不止一条，因为每一种巫妖仪式都是独一无二的。尽管许多巫妖是由奥术魔法蜕变而来，但还有一些秘密只向那些拥有原始倾向者开放——林地巫妖。

林地巫妖是臭名昭著的巫妖之变体；然而，他们不依靠命匣，其不朽之源在于其灵魂林地——一片树木的集合体，正是在那里进行将其变形为林地巫妖的仪式。一旦林地巫妖与灵魂林地一同诞生，这片土地便会被负能量玷污，新树也无法以正常方式在此生长。取而代之的是，灵魂林地中的新树苗只会从在林地中死亡的凡人灵魂中萌发，通常这些凡人是被林地巫妖带到那里。每当林地巫妖从暂时的死亡中复苏时，他们的新身体都会由其灵魂林地中的一棵树转化而成。

潜在的林地巫妖可以通过三种主要方式追求其不死之途。第一种是向土地的生命力——有时被称为自然灵体——请愿，以交易换取他们所需的力量；第二种是以武力将这股力量据为己有；最后一种则是被森林选中，将一份责任的披风加诸于这位邪恶的施法者身上。无论采用何种方式，一旦仪式完成，灵魂林地便归他们所有，需要他们守护直至永恒。

邪恶树精

林地巫妖的腐化会蔓延到灵魂林地之外。附近的树精或许能在一段时间内抵抗其邪恶，但最终仍会屈服。它们会成为林地巫妖抵御那些搜寻灵魂林地之人的第一道防线。冒险者可能以为自己仍身处安全地带，却会被看似洁净无瑕的森林伏击。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 375/840/1,560 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（奥秘、制作、威吓、医术、自然、潜行、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀，空气，灾厄，土，能量抗性（负能量），智力，心灵，负能量，毒素，法术（原始；动物视野，死云术，腐蚀之躯，侦测魔法，解除魔法，纠缠术，死亡一指，急速术，长步术，自然的报复，坏死化，毒息，阅读灵光，塑木术，迟缓术，与动物交谈，与植物交谈，缠足，树形术，树跃术，真知术，石墙术，荆棘墙术），坚固，投掷，野性

When spellcasters seek to outsmart death, there are a number of paths to follow. One vile method is lichdom, of which there are many paths since every lich ritual is unique. While many liches are metamorphosed from arcane magic, there are other secrets available only to those with a primal inclination—the gladelich.

A gladelich is a variant of the infamous lich; however, rather than a phylactery, their source of immortality is their soul grove—a collection of trees where the ritual to transform them into a gladelich was performed. Once a soul grove arises along with the gladelich, the land becomes tainted with negative energy, and new trees can't grow there via normal means. Instead, new saplings in the soul grove sprout only from the souls of mortals who die in the grove, typically after being brought there by the gladelich. Each time a gladelich rejuvenates from a temporary demise, their new body is transmuted from a tree in their soul grove.

Potential gladeliches can pursue their undeath in three main ways. The first is to petition the vitae of the land, sometimes known as nature spirits, to grant them the necessary power in a bargain; the second is to seize the power for themselves by force; and the last is to simply be chosen by the woods, placing a mantle of responsibility on the vile spellcaster. Regardless of method, once the ritual is complete, the soul grove is theirs to ward for eternity.

Bad Dryad

The gladelich's corruption extends beyond its soul grove. Nearby dryads may resist its evil for a time but ultimately succumb. They become the gladelich's first line of defense against those searching for the soul grove. Adventurers may think they are still in safe territory, only for the seemingly pristine forest to ambush them.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 375/840/1,560 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), shield, perception item, skill items (Arcana, Crafting, Intimidation, Medicine, Nature, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, air, bane, earth, energy resistant (negative), intelligence, mental, negative, poison, spells (Primal; animal vision, cloudkill, corrosive body, detect magic, dispel magic, entangle, finger of death, haste, longstrider, nature's reprisal, necrotize, puff of poison, read aura, shape wood, slow, speak with animals, speak with plants, tanglefoot, tree shape, tree stride, true seeing, wall of stone, wall of thorns), sturdy, throwing, wild
Gladelich.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. positive

Gastrophage.name: 噬胃者 Gastrophage

Regeneration 25 (Deactivated by Cold).name: 再生 25（被寒冷压制） Regeneration 25 (Deactivated by Cold)

Acid Defense.name: 酸抗护 Acid Defense
Acid Defense.description:
当食腹怪处于持续酸蚀伤害的效果影响下时，每当一名相邻生物对食腹怪造成挥砍或穿刺伤害时，攻击者会被食腹怪的酸性胆汁喷溅，造成 @Damage[2d4[acid]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免）。

While the gastrophage is under the effects of persistent acid damage, each time an adjacent creature deals slashing or piercing damage to the gastrophage, the attacker is sprayed with the gastrophage's acidic bile, which deals @Damage[2d4[acid]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] save).

Corrosive Strikes.name: 腐蚀性打击 Corrosive Strikes
Corrosive Strikes.description:
当食酸者处于持续性酸蚀伤害的影响下时，它的颚部和尾巴打击会额外造成1d6点酸蚀伤害。

While the gastrophage is under the affects of persistent acid damage, its jaws and tail Strikes deal an additional 1d6 acid damage.

Gastric Explosion.name: 胃部爆炸 Gastric Explosion
Gastric Explosion.description:
腐蚀性胆汁从噬胃者皮肤的毛孔中喷涌而出。这会在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内造成@Damage[8d6[acid]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:28]豁免）。噬胃者在使用该能力时自动承受[[/r 2d6[persistent,acid]]]伤害，但除此之外不受其自身的散发影响。它在[[/br 1d4 #Gastric Explosion Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用胃囊爆炸。

大成功 该生物不受伤害。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害并承受[[/r 2d6[persistent,acid]]]伤害。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害并承受[[/r 2d6[persistent,acid]]]伤害。

Corrosive bile sprays forth from the pores in the gastrophage's skin. This deals @Damage[8d6[acid]] damage in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:28] save). The gastrophage automatically takes [[/r 2d6[persistent,acid]]] damage upon using this ability but is otherwise unaffected by its own emanation. It can't use Gastric Explosion again for [[/br 1d4 #Gastric Explosion Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature takes no damage.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and [[/r 2d6[persistent,acid]]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and [[/r 2d6[persistent,acid]]] damage.

Gastrophage.publicNotes:
在这片大地上，巨魔（特征）始终是小镇与村庄的祸患。除了火焰以及偶尔出现的一瓶强酸之外，巨魔（特征）几乎无所畏惧……不过，若是遇到噬胃兽就另当别论了。噬胃兽是巨魔（特征）的天敌；然而它们绝非受欢迎的景象，因为噬胃兽很乐意用家畜与镇民来补充它们的食性。噬胃兽的胃胆汁具有极强的腐蚀性，这些野兽的皮肤上分布着许多孔洞，能从中喷射这种恶臭的物质。当噬胃兽在遭遇巨魔（特征）时，它会冲向猎物，朝不幸的巨魔（特征）喷吐腐蚀性胆汁。随后，随着胆汁开始对受害者进行预消化，这头野兽便会用利齿咬住巨魔（特征）。

这种胆汁的腐蚀性强到连巨魔（特征）传奇般的再生都无法修复，巨魔（特征）很快便会被一肢一肢地撕碎。与巨魔（特征）相似，噬胃兽也拥有强大的再生能力，几乎能治疗任何伤口。然而与巨魔（特征）不同的是，它们能够治疗由火焰与腐蚀性强酸造成的严重创伤。只有冰冻的温度才能将噬胃兽的新陈代谢减缓到足以阻止其再生的程度。

当猎物充足且近在咫尺时，噬胃兽已知会同时从全身所有孔洞喷射胆汁，将其周遭的一切——包括它们自己——都覆盖在腐蚀性胆汁之中。那画面极其骇人：野兽在攻击猎物的同时，会在不受阻碍的情况下不断溶解并重组。这些酸性野兽并不具备对自身胆汁的先天抗力，而是依赖其迅速的再生来反制自身的胃酸。被胆汁覆体的噬胃兽更加危险，因为攻击这头野兽的人可能会让自己暴露在胆汁之下。

由于再生血肉所需的高代谢，噬胃兽具有贪婪的食欲。然而，它们偏好容易得手的猎物，在追逐难以捉摸的目标时也很快就会放弃。

大地正在治疗？

有人相信，噬胃兽是自然对巨魔（特征）的回应——若放任不管，巨魔（特征）族群会蹂躏大地。考虑到噬胃兽的肆虐可能比它们据称要解决的问题更具破坏性，这种观点颇为奇特。这一信念背后仍有一丝真实之处：噬胃兽会成群结队地从大地中涌出。此行为其实源于它们对寒冷的弱点。在冬季，噬胃兽会撤入地下。找到深邃洞窟网络的个体会保持活跃，而躲在浅层地穴中的个体则会进入冬眠，并压制其酸液生成。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 强酸、克星、体质、延伸、能量抗力（正能量）、力量、投掷、狂野

Throughout the land, trolls are a menace to small towns and villages. Aside from fire and the occasional flask of acid, trolls have little to fear... aside from a gastrophage, that is. Gastrophages are the natural predators of trolls; however, they are by no means a welcome sight, as gastrophages are happy to supplement their diet with livestock and townsfolk. The stomach bile of a gastrophage is highly corrosive, and these beasts have many pores along their skin from which they can spray this foul substance. When a gastrophage encounters a troll, it rushes towards its prey and sprays corrosive bile at the unfortunate troll. The beast then sinks its teeth into the troll as the bile begins to predigest the victim.

The bile is far too corrosive for even a troll's legendary regeneration to repair, and the troll is soon torn apart limb from limb. Like trolls, gastrophages have powerful regenerative abilities and are able to heal nearly any wound. However, unlike a troll, they can heal severe wounds caused by flame and corrosive acid. Only freezing temperatures are capable of slowing a gastrophage's metabolism enough to halt its regeneration.

When prey is plentiful and close at hand, gastrophages are known to spray bile from all of their pores at once, covering all within their vicinity in corrosive bile, including themselves. This makes for a horrific sight as the beast dissolves and reforms unhindered as it assails its prey. These acidic beasts have no innate resistance to their own bile and instead rely on their rapid regeneration to counteract their own stomach acid. A gastrophage coated in bile is even more dangerous, as those attacking the beast risk exposing themselves to the bile.

Gastrophages have voracious appetites due to the high metabolism required by their regenerative flesh. However, they prefer easy prey and are quick to give up when chasing elusive targets.

The Land Is Healing?

Some believe that gastrophages are nature's response to trolls, whose populations ravage the land if left unchecked. It's an odd perspective to take given that gastrophage rampages can be more destructive than the problem they purportedly solve. The kernel of truth behind the belief comes from the phenomenon of gastrophages emerging out of the earth en masse. This behavior is due to their weakness to cold, however. During winters, gastrophages retreat underground. Those who find deep cavern networks remain active, while those in shallow burrows instead hibernate, suppressing their acid generation.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), strength, throwing, wild

Gasper.name: 加斯珀 Gasper

Elemental Plane of Air Lore.name: 空气元素位面学识 Elemental Plane of Air Lore

Breathsense.name: 吐息感知 Breathsense
Breathsense.description:
窒息者唯一的精确感官是其吐息感官，能感知会呼吸的生物。在所列射程内，会呼吸的生物若屏住呼吸并堵住其气道，则在其屏住呼吸期间对窒息者而言为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible}。要以这种方式堵住其气道，生物必须空出一只手以完全捏住鼻子并掩蔽其嘴巴。

A gasper's only precise sense is its breathsense, which perceives breathing creatures. A breathing creature within the listed range who holds its breath and plugs its airways is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} to the gasper for as long as it hold its breath. To plug its airways in this way, a creature must have one hand free to fully plug its nose and cover its mouth.

Gasper's Plight.name: 加斯珀的困境 Gasper's Plight
Gasper's Plight.description:
当一名位于喘息感知射程内的活生物看见窒息者时，窒息者头部的皮肤会收缩闭合，使得没有任何活生物能在1分钟内看见它。窒息者立即开始窒息，迫使它为了生存而杀死任何活目击者或逃离。窒息者在坠落至@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷}之前总共能坚持12轮。窒息者使用其动作或能力不会消耗任何空气轮。

When a living creature within the breathsense range sees the gasper, the skin on the gasper's head crimps shut until no living creature can see it for 1 minute. The gasper immediately begins suffocating, compelling it to kill any living witnesses or escape in order to survive. A gasper can last for a total of 12 rounds before falling @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious}. Gaspers don't lose any air rounds using their actions or abilities.

Sip of Air.name: 空气轻啜 Sip of Air
Sip of Air.description:
触发 喘息者受到穿刺或挥砍伤害

效果 喘息者从迅速封合的伤口孔洞中吸入空气。它恢复2轮的空气，但在其下一回合开始前，它失去对吸入效果的免疫。

Trigger The gasper takes piercing or slashing damage

Effect The gasper inhales air from the quickly sealing wound holes. It regains 2 rounds of air, but it loses its immunity to inhaled effects until the start of it's next turn.

Desperate Assault.name: 绝望突袭 Desperate Assault
Desperate Assault.description:
噎气怪跳跃至多等同于其速度，并在其移动结束时对触及范围内至多两个生物进行打击。它在完成这两次打击之前，不会因这些打击而增加其多重攻击减值。

The gasper Leaps up to its Speed and makes Strikes against up to two creatures in reach at the end of its movement. It doesn't increase its multiple attack penalty from these Strikes until after it makes both of them.

Gasper.publicNotes:
噎喘者是怪诞的、畸变的元素生物，被封在一座橡胶般皮肤的牢笼里；每当其他活生物好好看它们一眼时，它们就会被活活噎死。噎喘者通常呈现为一具瘦长的生物，具有人形形态，全身覆着发黄的橡胶状皮肤，仿佛自有生命一般。这层病态的皮肤被绷紧在它高大而畸形的躯体上。活生物从来没有机会近距离看见噎喘者的脸，因为它的脸在第一眼被看见时就会封闭起来，只能发出含混的哭喊与呜咽。噎喘者开始窒息时，躯干会膨胀并剧烈搏动到不自然的程度，它会不顾一切地猛扑，朝旁观者冲去。毕竟，只要杀了他们，它就能再次呼吸。若旁观者显然过于强大，噎喘者则会试图逃离到吐息感知射程之外。噎喘者在吐息将尽之际，会用自己的棘刺刮伤自己以延长意识。

噎喘者几乎可在任何气候中找到，常栖身于偏僻之地与地下圣所，因为它们会躲避活者凝视带来的致命效果。然而，噎喘者终究会不可避免地现身地表，呆滞蹒跚片刻后再返回安全处，头颅上仰，朝向它们看不见的天空。

由于它们自我施加的隔离，噎喘者在外界几乎无人知晓；这对许多与其狭路相逢者而言是不幸的，因为它们主要出于自保而攻击。

噎喘者通常被迫过着孤独的生活，但这并不意味着它们不会感到寂寞。它们常与无目生物、聪慧的不死生物以及构装体结伴。噎喘者的伙伴有时是良性的，但不死生物与其他邪恶的伙伴可能主要是为了利用噎喘者的吐息感知，把它当作一种粗糙的活体猎物探测器而逗留在旁。

一些试图解释噎喘者独特生理结构的晦涩记述声称，噎喘者的皮肤是某种独立的畸变实体，因某种诅咒或惩罚而被加诸于空气元素之上。支持这一可能性的证据之一是：当噎喘者死亡时，它的皮肤会无力地塌陷下来，只留下一个空空的外壳。

合适的结局

在知晓其存在的人群中，噎喘者的皮肤需求极高。若极其小心地处理，它们能获得第二次生命，成为紧身衣，供运动员、潜水员与需要近乎不可穿透（除劈砍外）的衣物所提供之防护与效率的工业工人使用。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 90/200/360 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（轻型）、盾牌、察觉物品、技能物品（运动、学识［空气元素位面］、隐匿）

可用灌注属性 空气、克星、魅力、体质、敏捷、延伸、能量抗性（正能量）、力量、坚固、狂野

Gaspers are bizarre, aberrant elementals, sealed inside a prison of rubbery skin, that choke to death whenever other living creatures get a good look at them. A gasper typically appears as a lanky creature with humanoid forms covered in yellowed rubbery skin that appears to have a life of its own. This sickly skin is stretched over its tall, malformed frame. Living creatures never get a chance to see a gasper's face up close, as it seals shut at first sight with muffled cries and whimpers. A gasper's torso bulges and throbs violently to unnatural proportions as it starts asphyxiating, and it lunges, rushing towards onlookers in reckless abandon. After all, if it kills them, it can breathe again. If the onlookers are obviously too powerful, the gasper attempts to flee beyond breathsense range instead. Gaspers at the end of their breath gouge themselves with their own spines to extend their consciousness.

Gaspers can be found in nearly any climate in reclusive places and underground sanctuaries, as they avoid the lethal effects the gaze of the living has upon them. Yet gaspers inevitably emerge to lumber listlessly on the surface for a moment before returning to safety, their heads craned towards a sky they can't see.

Due to their self-imposed isolation, gaspers are virtually unknown in the outside world, which is unfortunate for many crossing their path since they mainly attack for self-preservation.

Gaspers are usually forced to live solitary lives, but that doesn't mean they don't get lonely. They often find companionship with sightless creatures, intelligent undead, and constructs. Gaspers' companions are sometimes benign, but undead and other evil companions might hang around the gasper mainly to use its breathsense as a rudimentary detector for living victims.

Inscrutable accounts that attempt to explain a gasper's unique physiology claim that a gasper's skin is a separate aberrant entity added to an air elemental due to some kind of curse or punishment. One piece of evidence that supports this possibility is that when a gasper dies, its skin slumps lifelessly, leaving nothing more than an empty husk.

A Suitable Ending

Gasper skins are in high demand among those who know of their existence. If handled very carefully, they can get a second life as skintight suits for athletes, divers, and industrial workers who need the protection and efficiency offered by clothing that is nigh impenetrable except by slashing.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics, Lore [Elemental Plane of Air], Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties air, bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), strength, sturdy, wild

Fury Sphere.name: 狂怒领域 Fury Sphere
Fury Sphere.tokenName: 狂怒法术领域 Fury Sphere

Roll Over.name: 掷骰翻转 Roll Over
Roll Over.description:
当狂怒球体沿着显著的斜坡向下移动时，其速度获得+10尺环境加值。在沿斜坡向下移动后，直到该回合结束，狂怒球体的身体打击与践踏能力造成2d8额外伤害，且其成功的身体打击会使生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

A fury sphere gains +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed when moving down a significant incline. After moving down an incline, a fury sphere deals 2d8 additional damage with its body Strikes, and Trample ability until the end of the turn and its successful body Strikes knock creatures @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Slamball.name: 扣杀球 Slamball
Slamball.description:
一颗狂怒球体可以将自身推进到空气中并砸落下来，制造冲击波，并在飞掠时重创敌人。愤怒钢铁球体飞行至其陆地速度，然后落在下方地面上。其路径中位于空气中的所有生物，以及落地点15英尺内的生物，进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true]豁免，承受@Damage[8d8[bludgeoning]]伤害。失败时，它们还会被击倒@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}，而在大失败时，它们还会@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}。狂怒球体在[[/br 1d4 #Slamball Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用Slamball。

A fury sphere can propel itself into the air and crash down, creating a shockwave and battering enemies as it flies by. The Angry Steel Sphere Flies up to its land Speed and then lands on the ground below. All creatures in the air in its path, plus those within 15 feet of the landing spot take @Damage[8d8[bludgeoning]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true] save. On a failure they are also knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}, and on a critical failure, they are also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}. The fury sphere can't use Slamball again for [[/br 1d4 #Slamball Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

Trample.name: 践踏 Trample
Trample.description:
中型或更小，躯体，@Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Medium or smaller, body, @Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Fury Sphere.publicNotes:
狂怒之球是巨大的异界金属球体，最初由强大的善与法之不朽存在在宇宙历史早期创造。每一枚这种原初球体都被注入一位受祝福者的灵体，并被安置到位以协助控制一部分天界机械。一段时间里，这样做很好，天界球体也很快乐……至少直到某一天，有什么事情严重出了差错。那些将宇宙整理得井然有序的不朽者打造了一台新的、据称更优越的机器。但凡旧而用过之物便不再完美与有序，因此不朽的天界存在把旧的部件抛弃，准备将其熔炼重铸。

然而，天界球体并非仅仅是某种普通金属，会乖乖接受被冶炼并改造成新事物。它们感受到了创造者的背叛，于是通过以怒火与憎恨灌注自身——这代表着与其旧日本质截然相反的对极——它们成功逃脱毁灭，并径直撞穿诸天本身。无数狂怒之球涌入诸位面，满怀对神祇与凡人的复仇憎恨——它们曾为其辛劳效命。如今它们以混沌与一切和平之物的毁灭为乐，以此怨恨其创造者并反击那个亏待它们、将其遗弃的世界。它们宁愿看着宇宙燃烧，也不愿让自己变得过时、悄然消失。

每个狂怒之球都有一张独特的雌雄同体、由怒火驱动的面孔，显现在球体表面；无论球体滚动得多快，那张脸总是保持朝上。狂怒之球由多种色泽的闪烁金属构成：有的呈黄铜色，有的呈银色，有的则是黑色的枪铁色，但其内部无一例外都是实心钢。狂怒之球是直径8英尺的巨大球体，重量超过60吨。

偶尔，某个狂怒之球会想出一个计划，去寻找一座高山、一处迷宫、一座地城，或其他具有狭窄边缘与通道的区域。一些邪恶存在已学会与狂怒之球谈判并协同作业，承诺以难以计量的毁灭与混沌来交换这种协作。

困住一枚球体

被杀死时，狂怒之球的灵体可以在接下来的10分钟内被收容进一个负载2或更低的小型容器中，这需要一次@Check[type:arcana|dc:25]、@Check[type:religion|dc:25]或@Check[type:occultism|dc:25]检定。被困于新容器中的球体可用作@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.sLzPzk7DJnfuORJ0]{Animate Object}仪式的材料之一，创造出一个会勉强服从命令的物体。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（中型、重型），盾牌，技能物品（运动、威吓、学识[天堂、法律]）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，魅力，体质，黑暗，能量抗性（正能量、负能量），力量，坚固，狂野

Fury spheres are immense otherworldly metal spheres that were originally created by powerful immortal beings of good and law, early in the history of the universe. Each of these primordial spheres was infused with the spirit of a blessed being and put into place to help control a piece of celestial machinery. For a time, this was good, and the celestial spheres were happy... at least, until the day something went horribly wrong. The immortals who set the universe in order crafted a new and supposedly superior machine. But what is old and used is no longer perfect and ordered, so the immortal celestials cast the old pieces away to be melted down.

But the celestial spheres weren't merely some common metal to simply accept being smelted and reworked into something new. They felt their creators' betrayal, and so by infusing themselves with wrath and hatred, representing the diametric opposite of their old essence, they managed to escape their destruction and crash through the Heavens themselves. Multitudes of fury spheres poured into the planes, full of vengeful hatred for the gods and mortals whom they once toiled to serve. They now delight in chaos and the destruction of all things peaceful in order to spite their creators and strike back at the world that wronged them and left them behind. They'd rather watch the universe burn than allow themselves to become obsolete and quietly disappear.

Each fury sphere has a unique androgynous and rage- fueled face that appears on the surface of the sphere and always remains upright, no matter how fast the sphere is rolling. Fury spheres are made of shimmering metals of various hues. Some are the color of brass, some are silver, and some are black gunmetal, but on the inside, all are made of solid steel. Fury spheres are enormous spheres, 8 feet in diameter, that weigh over 60 tons.

Occasionally, a fury sphere comes up with a plan to seek out a high mountain, a labyrinth, a dungeon, or another area with narrow ledges and passages. Some evil beings have learned to negotiate and work together with fury spheres, promising untold destruction and chaos in exchange for the collaboration.

Trapping A Sphere

When slain, the spirit of a fury sphere can be contained in a smaller vessel of Bulk 2 or less in the next 10 minutes with a @Check[type:arcana|dc:25], @Check[type:religion|dc:25], or @Check[type:occultism|dc:25] check. The sphere trapped in the new vessel can be used as one of the ingredients for an @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.sLzPzk7DJnfuORJ0]{Animate Object} ritual, creating an object that will begrudgingly follow commands.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (medium, heavy), shield, skill items (Athletics, Intimidation, Lore [Heaven, Legal])

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, darkness, energy resistant (positive, negative), strength, sturdy, wild

Furnace Newt.name: 熔炉蝾螈 Furnace Newt

Fire Amplification.name: 火焰增幅 Fire Amplification
Fire Amplification.description:
30尺。熔炉蝾螈会自然散发出一种灵光，在其半径内强化火焰。位于熔炉蝾螈30尺内的生物在造成火焰伤害时，其伤害掷骰获得+1状态加值。该状态加值会随着熔炉蝾螈因All-Consuming Fire而体型增大而提升：若蝾螈为中型则为+2，若为大型则为+3，若为超大型则为+4。

30 feet. The furnace newt naturally exudes an aura that empowers fire within its radius. Creatures within 30 feet of a furnace newt gain a +1 status bonus to damage rolls whenever they deal fire damage. This status bonus increases depending on the furnace newt's increasing size from All-Consuming Fire, to +2 if the newt is Medium, +3 if the newt is Large, and +4 if the newt is Huge.

All-Consuming Fire.name: 吞噬一切的烈焰 All-Consuming Fire
All-Consuming Fire.description:
每当一只非炉灶蝾螈的生物在距离炉灶蝾螈30尺内使用带有火焰（特征）的法术或能力时，炉灶蝾螈会以火焰的热能为食，使其体型增长至下一个体型类别（从小型到中型，从中型到大型，或从大型到超大型）。此能力可以多次生效，但每轮至多一次。若蝾螈在此能力启动时已为超大型，则它必须进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23] 豁免，否则会爆炸，杀死自身，并对所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] 内的生物造成 @Damage[4d4[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:19|basic:true] 豁免）。若豁免成功，则蝾螈不会吸收热量并保持为超大型。每当一只生物在距离炉灶蝾螈30尺内使用寒冷法术或能力时，它会改为缩小一个体型类别，最小至小型。若蝾螈已为小型，则它改为处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} 状态，直到其下一回合结束。如同增长一样，此效果可以多次生效，但每轮仅一次。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.chp4VO7T89ju2mU8]{效果：吞噬一切的火焰}

Whenever a creature other than a furnace newt uses a spell or ability with the fire trait within 30 feet of the furnace newt, the furnace newt feeds on the thermal energy of the fire, growing in size to the next size category (from Small to Medium, from Medium to Large, or from Large to Huge). This ability can take effect multiple times, though at most once per round. If the newt is already Huge when this ability is activated, it must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:23] save or explode, killing it and dealing @Damage[4d4[fire]] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:19|basic:true] save). On a successful save, the newt doesn't absorb the heat and remains Huge. Whenever a creature uses a cold spell or ability within 30 feet of the furnace newt, it instead shrinks one size category, to a minimum of Small. If the newt was already Small, it is instead @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn. Like the growth, this can take effect multiple times, but only once per round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.chp4VO7T89ju2mU8]{Effect: All-Consuming Fire}

Raging Flames.name: 狂怒烈焰 Raging Flames
Raging Flames.description:
火焰越大，熔炉蝾螈的攻击就越强力。熔炉蝾螈在小型时，其打击额外造成1d4点火焰伤害，但当其因“吞噬万物之火”而体型增大时，该伤害会增加。若其为中型，则其打击改为额外造成2d4点伤害；若其为大型，则为3d4点伤害；若其为超大型，则为4d4点伤害。

The bigger the flames, the more powerful a furnace newt's attacks. A furnace newt's Strikes deal an additional 1d4 fire damage when it's Small, but this damage increases when its size increases from All-Consuming Fire. Its Strikes instead add 2d4 damage if it's Medium, 3d4 damage if it's Large, and 4d4 damage if it's Huge.

Vent Heat.name: 通风热量 Vent Heat
Vent Heat.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 由于吞噬一切的火焰，熔炉蝾螈的体型为中型或更大

效果 蝾螈散发出多余的热量。它的体型缩小一级，且从其身体散发出的热量对 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[2d4[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:19|basic:true] 豁免）。

Frequency once per round

Requirements The furnace newt is Medium or larger due to all-consuming fire

Effect The newt sheds excess heat. It shrinks one size, and the heat coming from its body deals @Damage[2d4[fire]] damage to all creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:19|basic:true] save).

Furnace Newt.publicNotes:
好奇而爱玩，猫大小的炉火蝾螈尽管如此仍相当危险。若有生物闯入它们的领地，炉火蝾興会凶猛作战以保卫家园，但炉火蝾螈真正的力量在于其独特的生理构造。炉火蝾螈生活在炎热的火山地区，并能良好适应高温。随着炉火蝾螈暴露在越来越多的热量中，它会汲取一部分热能来强化自身，体型随之变大，并进一步向周围辐射热与火焰。这使炉火蝾螈成为会利用火焰的生物之领域中颇受欢迎的补充，因为在持久战中，蝾螈能为它们一方增加可观的火力。

大多数炉火蝾螈都有足够强的自保本能，会排出热量以将体型维持在小型（体型），但有时，在战斗的炽热关头，炉火蝾螈没有时间或意愿去释放多余能量。关于一群年轻巫师结社抓来一只炉火蝾螈来守卫他们的高塔，却又因在其附近使用了过多火系法术而意外将其引爆的警世故事，多得不胜枚举。

尽管它们带来的危险不容小觑，炉火蝾螈也同样作为伙伴而备受欢迎，尤其是在铁匠之间——他们能够为其提供稳定的许可，让它们定期待在舒适的高温环境中。

辛辣添料

近来，炉火蝾螈席卷了烹饪界：有进取心的厨师发现，让一只活体住在熏炉里，会为其产出增添一种独特的辛烈气息。有些餐厅更进一步，将手指食物直接放在炉火蝾螈背上供客人取用。只要能分到食物并沐浴在众人关注之中，蝾螈对这种安排相当满意。美食家形容由此产生的风味“带着泥土气息、质朴而焦香”，而不那么讲究的食客则抱怨熏肉味道“平平无奇”，还“像一头牛淹死在辣椒沼泽里”。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺），技能物品（杂技、运动、潜行）

可用灌注属性 破敌，魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（火焰、正能量），火焰，投掷，野性

Curious and playful, cat-sized furnace newts are nevertheless quite dangerous. Should a creature intrude upon their territory, furnace newts fight fiercely to defend their homes, but furnace newts' true power lies in their unique physiology. Furnace newts live in hot, volcanic regions and are well adapted to high temperatures. As a furnace newt is exposed to more and more heat, it siphons some of the thermal energy to empower itself, growing larger and, in turn, radiating heat and fire around itself. This makes furnace newts popular additions to the domains of creatures that make use of fire, as the newt can add significant firepower to their side in a prolonged fight.

Most furnace newts have a strong enough preservation instinct to vent heat until they maintain a small size, but sometimes, in the heat of battle, a furnace newt won't have the time or inclination to shed excess energy. Many cautionary tales exist of cabals of young wizards capturing a furnace newt to defend their tower but then accidentally detonating it by using too many fire spells in its vicinity.

Despite the danger they present, however, furnace newts also enjoy popularity as companions, especially among blacksmiths who can provide regular access to a comfortably hot environment.

A Spicy Addition

Recently, the furnace newt has taken the culinary world by storm as enterprising chefs discovered that having one live in their smoker adds a distinct pungency to its output. Some restaurants take the concept a step further and serve finger food directly atop of furnace newts. The newts are quite content with this arrangement, so long as they get a share of the food while basking in the attention. Connoisseurs describe the resulting flavor as earthy, rustic, and toasty, while less- distinguished diners complain the smoked meats taste "bog standard" and "like a cow drowned in a swamp of peppers."

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (fire, positive), fire, throwing, wild

Frenzied Trashfire.name: 狂乱的垃圾火灾 Frenzied Trashfire
Frenzied Trashfire.tokenName: 狂乱的垃圾火灾 Frenzied Trashfire

Wall of Burning Refuse.name: 燃烧废弃物之墙 Wall of Burning Refuse
Wall of Burning Refuse.description:
狂乱垃圾火焰疾走或跨步至多三次，可任意组合。在其移动期间，它可以以其经过的至多 8 个相邻方格为 目标，沿途在身后留下由 10 英尺高的燃烧垃圾堆构成的墙。除 体型 和形状外，这道墙具有@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire} 法术的 效果。狂乱垃圾火焰可以看穿该 效果造成的隐蔽。狂乱垃圾火焰在至少花费 1 分钟将更多垃圾吸收到其身体中之前，无法再次使用此 能力。

The frenzied trashfire Strides or Steps up to three times, in any combination. During its movement, it can target up to 8 contiguous squares through which it passes, leaving a wall built out of 10 foot tall piles of burning trash in its wake. Other than the size and shape, this wall has the effects of a @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire} spell. The frenzied trashfire can see through the concealment caused by this effect. A frenzied trashfire can't use this ability again until it spends at least 1 minute absorbing more trash into its body.

Consume Debris.name: 吞噬残骸 Consume Debris
Consume Debris.description:
狂乱垃圾火自然会将垃圾、废料和其他碎屑吸入体内，为其火焰提供燃料。在其回合开始时，若狂乱垃圾火正站在一大堆显著的垃圾上，它会将部分垃圾堆吸收进体内，并恢复 @Damage[2d6[healing]] 生命值。

The frenzied trashfire naturally draws trash, refuse, and other debris into its body to fuel its flames. At the beginning of its turn, if the frenzied trashfire is standing on a significant pile of trash, it absorbs some of the trash pile into itself and recovers @Damage[2d6[healing]] Hit Points.

Vulnerable to Momentum.name: 易受动量影响 Vulnerable to Momentum
Vulnerable to Momentum.description:
由于狂乱垃圾火的身体主要由垃圾构成，那些能积蓄大量动量并将碎屑四散的武器对它极为有效。具有 backswing、forceful 或 sweep 特性的武器造成的大成功或大失败命中会使狂乱垃圾火变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}，持续 1 轮。

Because the frenzied trashfire has a body composed largely of trash, weapons that build up a great deal of momentum and scatter that debris are very effective against it. Critical hits from weapons with the backswing, forceful, or sweep traits cause the frenzied trashfire to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} for 1 round.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Stinking Cloud.name: 臭云术 Stinking Cloud
Stinking Cloud.description:
你在区域内制造出一团恶臭的雾云。该雾云的运作方式如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist}，但它会使在雾云内结束其回合的生物陷入恶心。 （@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽（状态）}不是毒素效果。）

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}，并在雾云中时陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

大失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，直到它离开雾云。

You create a cloud of putrid mist in the area. The cloud functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist} except it sickens creatures that end their turns within the cloud. (The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition is not a poison effect.)

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} while in the cloud.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until it leaves the cloud.

Trash Walker.name: 垃圾行者 Trash Walker
Trash Walker.description:
狂乱垃圾火无视由垃圾、废弃物或碎屑造成的困难地形和更严重的困难地形。

The frenzied trashfire ignores difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain created by trash, refuse, or debris.

Frenzied Trashfire.publicNotes:
狂乱垃圾火是一种元素生物，由一大团翻滚的垃圾与残骸构成，周身被危险的火焰环绕。这些生物能在垃圾场或其他污染常见的区域毫无预警地出现。尽管狂乱垃圾火具有感知能力，但所有已知对其的描述都称它们被无休止的狂怒所驱使。这种怒火往往指向文明的标志（或其过度之处），但很难判断该生物的暴力行为究竟是蓄意为之还是偶然发生。

学者推测，狂乱垃圾火可能源于德鲁伊为打击文明及其所带来的司空见惯的污染而进行的失败魔法实验。这也让许多人开始思考，是否还存在其他类型的、受污染侵染的元素生物。

由于它们对钝击攻击十分脆弱，狂乱垃圾火更偏好从远处发动攻击，常常躲在它们制造出的燃烧垃圾墙之后。

让它辉光

一些城市发现狂乱垃圾火相当有用。它们能缩小垃圾场的体型，同时阻止其他不受欢迎的生物在其中安家。要与垃圾火建立关系，需要用魔法使其平静，并由译员与其交涉。每个垃圾火的个性各不相同，因此有些只想让城市燃烧殆尽，而另一些则更抱持“各自安好”的态度，完全满足于为他人平和地吞食垃圾。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 64/140/250 gp

可用的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、运动、学识[污秽]）

可用的灌注属性 祸根，混沌，敏捷，能量抗性（火焰，正能量），火焰，法术（原初：臭云术），狂野

A frenzied trashfire is an elemental creature formed of a large, roiling mass of trash and debris, surrounded by a dangerous fire. These creatures can spring up without warning in trash yards or other areas where pollution is common. While a frenzied trashfire is sentient, all known descriptions of these creatures describe them as being driven by a relentless rage. While that rage is often directed at the markers (or excesses) of civilization, it's hard to know if the creature's violent actions are deliberate or happenstance.

Scholars speculate that frenzied trashfires might be the result of failed magical experiments by druids aimed at striking a blow against civilization and the all- too-common pollution that it brings in its wake. This leads many to wonder if other types of pollution-tainted elementals might exist.

Due to their fragility to blunt attacks, frenzied trashfires prefer to attack from a distance, often hiding behind walls of flaming trash that they have created.

Let It Glow

Some cities have found frenzied trashfires to be quite useful. They reduce the size of trash yards while preventing other unsavory creatures from taking up residence in them. Establishing a relationship with a trashfire requires magic to calm it and a translator to negotiate with it. Each trashfire has a different personality, so while some only want the city to burn, others have more of a live and let live attitude and are perfectly content consuming trash peacefully for others.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Lore [Filth])

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, dexterity, energy resistant (fire, positive), fire, spells (Primal: stinking cloud), wild
Frenzied Trashfire.prototypeToken: 狂乱的垃圾火 Frenzied Trashfire

Fosterkin.name: 寄养亲族 Fosterkin

Comforting Aura.name: 抚慰灵光 Comforting Aura
Comforting Aura.description:
30尺。寄育裔的灵光中的盟友会感到安抚的舒适。在他们回合开始时，他们的惊惧（状态）值降低1（此外，他们在其回合结束时仍会照常降低）。另外，如果他们因恐惧效果而获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} 状态，他们可以选择不进行任何动作并留在原地，而不是逃跑，由他们自行选择偏好的方式。

30 feet. Allies in the fosterkin's aura feel soothing comfort. At the beginning of their turns, they reduce their frightened condition by 1 (in addition to reducing it normally at the end of their turns). Additionally, if they have the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} condition from a fear effect, they can choose to take no actions and stay in place, rather than running away, whichever they prefer.

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异术先天法术 Occult Innate Spells

Modify Memory.name: 修改记忆 Modify Memory
Modify Memory.description:
你改变目标的记忆，可以抹除一段记忆、增强某段记忆的清晰度、篡改某段记忆，或添加一段虚假记忆。目标可以尝试进行意志豁免以抵抗该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响，并意识到你试图改变它的记忆。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而不是修改记忆，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 在该法术持续时间的最初5分钟内，你可以维持法术以每轮一次修改一段记忆。当你这么做时，你构想最多6秒的记忆片段进行修改，最多可达到连续5分钟的记忆。

你所篡改的任何记忆都会在法术生效期间保持改变状态。若目标在5分钟结束前移出射程，你便无法再改变任何进一步的记忆。

升阶（6环） 你可以将该法术施放在一个自愿的目标上，以压制其关于某个特定主题的全部记忆（用不超过50个词进行描述）。该效果为永久，并会用一片模糊不清的迷雾来填补这些缺失。

You alter the target's memories, either erasing a memory, enhancing a memory's clarity, altering a memory, or adding a false memory. The target can attempt a Will save to resist the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and realizes you tried to alter its memory.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of modify memory, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure During the first 5 minutes of the spell's duration, you can Sustain the Spell to modify a memory once each round. When you do, you imagine up to 6 seconds of memory to modify, to a maximum of 5 continuous minutes of memory.

Any memories you've altered remain changed as long as the spell is active. If the target moves out of range before the 5 minutes is up, you can't alter any further memories.

Heightened (6th) You can cast the spell on a willing target to suppress all memory of a particular topic, detailed in 50 words or fewer. The effect is permanent, and it patches these omissions with an indistinct haze.

Sleep.name: 睡眠 Sleep
Sleep.description:
区域内的每个生物都会变得昏昏欲睡，并可能入睡。因该法术而陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}的生物不会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}，也不会松开其所持之物。该法术不会阻止生物因一次成功的察觉检定而醒来，这限制了它在战斗中的效用。

大成功或大失败：成功 生物不受影响。

成功 生物在1轮内对察觉检定承受-1状态减值。

失败 生物陷入昏迷。若其在1分钟后仍处于昏迷，则会自动醒来。

大成功或大失败：失败 生物陷入昏迷。若其在1小时后仍处于昏迷，则会自动醒来。

升阶（4环） 生物在失败时昏迷1轮，或在大成功或大失败：失败时昏迷1分钟。它们会倒地并松开其所持之物，且它们不能尝试察觉检定以醒来。当持续时间结束时，该生物将正常睡眠，而非自动醒来。

Each creature in the area becomes drowsy and might fall asleep. A creature that falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} from this spell doesn't fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} or release what it's holding. This spell doesn't prevent creatures from waking up due to a successful Perception check, limiting its utility in combat.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a -1 status penalty to Perception checks for 1 round.

Failure The creature falls Unconscious. If it's still Unconscious after 1 minute, it wakes up automatically.

Critical Failure The creature falls Unconscious. If it's still Unconscious after 1 hour, it wakes up automatically.

Heightened (4th) The creatures fall Unconscious for 1 round on a failure or 1 minute on a critical failure. They fall Prone and release what they're holding, and they can't attempt Perception checks to wake up. When the duration ends, the creature is sleeping normally instead of automatically waking up.

Soothe.name: 安抚 Soothe
Soothe.description:
你抚慰目标的心智，强化其精神防御并治疗其伤势。当你施放法术时，目标恢复1d10+4生命值，并在持续时间内对抗精神效果的豁免获得+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{法术效果：抚慰}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加1d10+4。

You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds. The target regains 1d10+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell and gains a +2 status bonus to saves against mental effects for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{Spell Effect: Soothe}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d10+4.

Sanctuary.name: 庇护所 Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description:
你以防护能量守护一个生物，从而阻遏敌人的攻击。试图攻击目标的生物每次都必须进行一次意志豁免。若目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。

大成功或大失败 庇护术结束。

成功 该生物可以尝试进行其攻击，以及本回合中针对目标的任何其他攻击。

失败 该生物无法攻击目标并浪费该动作。它本回合不能再尝试针对目标的进一步攻击。

大成功或大失败 该生物浪费该动作，并且在庇护术剩余持续时间内不能尝试攻击目标。

You ward a creature with protective energy that deters enemy attacks. Creatures attempting to attack the target must attempt a Will save each time. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends.

Critical Success Sanctuary ends.

Success The creature can attempt its attack and any other attacks against the target this turn.

Failure The creature can't attack the target and wastes the action. It can't attempt further attacks against the target this turn.

Critical Failure The creature wastes the action and can't attempt to attack the target for the rest of sanctuary's duration.

Cushioning Blows.name: 缓冲打击 Cushioning Blows
Cushioning Blows.description:
养育眷族可以在不承受减值的情况下进行非致命徒手打击。

The fosterkin can make nonlethal fist Strikes without penalty.

Sleepy Embrace.name: 昏睡拥抱 Sleepy Embrace
Sleepy Embrace.description:
需求 该寄养亲族用拳头抓持一名生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}。

效果 该寄养亲族摇晃目标使其入睡，目标进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:32] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1}，持续 1 分钟。

失败 目标陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷}，持续 [[/br 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 轮}，并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2}，持续 1 分钟。在昏迷状态的持续时间内，其不能尝试进行察觉检定以醒来。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标陷入昏迷并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 4}，二者均持续 1 分钟。在昏迷状态的持续时间内，其不能尝试进行察觉检定以醒来。

Requirements The fosterkin has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} with its fist.

Effect The fosterkin rocks the target to sleep, with a @Check[type:will|dc:32] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute.

Failure The target falls @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious} for [[/br 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute. For the duration of the unconscious condition, they can't attempt Perception checks to wake up.

Critical Failure The target falls unconscious and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 4}, both for 1 minute. For the duration of the unconscious condition, they can't attempt Perception checks to wake up.

Fosterkin.publicNotes:
寄养亲族是仁善的异怪，它们热爱并照料那些没有父母的幼年生物。根据流行民间传说，寄养亲族诞生于这样一个故事：某个孤儿对着星辰许下了想要慈爱父母的强烈愿望，而这个愿望被星空之外某些陌生而仁善的实体所实现。孩子的毛皮外套——或许是他们的地毯——获得了生命并化作最初的寄养亲族；那是一种充满对孩子亲职之爱的生物，天生就知道如何提供足够的照料与保护。孩子的愿望在它心中翻涌，成长并变化为一个想与世上所有孩子分享这种奇异亲职之爱的愿望。于是，附近数百张地毯或外套也随之变化，化作一群寄养亲族，各自去寻找要寄养的孩子。

这一起源故事的真实性难以断定，但可以确定的是，寄养亲族无法繁衍后代。即便如此，寄养亲族仍有一种原始冲动去保护并抚育孩子。这些友善的生物藏身于各类文明之中，寻找需要父母的孩子。它们天性上对成年类人生物有些胆怯，于是会把自己伪装成毛皮外套与地毯，悄然穿行于城市与城镇——这种诡计对这些毛茸茸的生物而言可谓得心应手。

寄养亲族无法忍受看到孩子受苦；在它们看来，世上最糟的事莫过于可怕的父母不爱也不照料自己的孩子。因此，它们会寻觅虐待的家庭，等待合适时机把孩子从糟糕的父母身边偷走。当有利时刻到来，寄养亲族会向受虐的孩子显露自身，并凭本能知道如何安抚对方。若孩子同意，寄养亲族便会悄悄带着新收养的被监护人离开。

若遭到对质，寄养亲族更倾向用非暴力手段摆脱对手；但若有必要，它也会为保护自己的被监护人献出生命。一旦敌人被置于无法行动的状态，寄养亲族会尝试篡改敌人的记忆，使其忘却与寄养亲族的遭遇。

在孩子同意的情况下，寄养亲族也能用同样的力量抹除其所收养子女的童年创伤。寄养亲族抚育孩子就像抚育亲生子女一般，而能与寄养亲族父母所给予的爱与支援相匹敌的事物寥寥无几。

传闻存在一种仪式，能引起群星的注意并创造新的寄养亲族。然而，即便真有此仪式，也早已被隐藏起来。

两个世界

寄养亲族往往在拥挤的城市里感到不适，因此更偏好在乡野设定中抚育孩子。有些寄养亲族过着游牧生活方式，训练其被监护人成为冒险者与野外求生者。另一些则建造树屋村落或地下地穴网络，以模拟其孩子原本出身的社会。这些社群可能由数十个寄养亲族与孩子组成；其中曾被寄养亲族抚育、现已长大的孩子，会担当它们与工业社会之人之间的中介。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 250/560/1,030 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、欺瞒、学识[育儿]、通神、隐匿）

可用灌注属性 bane, chaotic, 魅力, energy resistant (positive), good, mental, 法术（通神：modify memory, sanctuary, sleep, soothe）, 力量, wild

Fosterkin are benevolent aberrations who love and care for young creatures without parents. According to popular folklore, fosterkin were created when an orphan made a powerful wish upon a star to have loving parents, and that wish was granted by strange benevolent entities beyond the stars. The child's fur coat, or perhaps their rug, came to life and transformed into the first fosterkin, a creature filled with parental love for the child who innately knew how to provide adequate care and protection. The child's wish surged in their heart, growing and changing into a wish to share this strange form of parental love with all the world's children. Thus, hundreds of rugs or coats nearby transformed into a flock of fosterkin, who would each seek out children of their own to foster.

The validity of this origin story is debatable, but it's certainly true that fosterkin are unable to procreate. Despite this, fosterkin have a primal urge to protect and raise children. These friendly creatures hide throughout various civilizations, searching for children in need of parents. Skittish by nature around adult humanoids, fosterkin move discreetly through cities and towns by disguising themselves as fur coats and rugs, a ruse that comes naturally to these furry creatures.

Fosterkin can't bear to see children suffer, and they feel the worst thing in the world is when terrible parents don't love or care for their children. Thus, they seek out abusive households and wait for opportune moments to steal children away from their terrible parents. When a favorable moment occurs, the fosterkin makes its presence known to the abused child, innately knowing how to soothe the youth. If the child agrees, the fosterkin then sneaks away with its newly adopted ward.

If confronted, a fosterkin prefers to use nonviolent means to escape its adversary, however it will give its life if necessary to protect its ward. Once a foe is rendered incapacitated, the fosterkin attempts to modify the foe's memory so that it forgets the encounter with the fosterkin.

With the child's consent, the fosterkin can use this same power to erase childhood trauma from its adopted offspring. Fosterkin raise children as if they were their own, and few things can match the love and support a fosterkin parent provides.

Rumor has it that a ritual exists to draw the stars' attention and create new fosterkin. However, if such a ritual exists, it has long been hidden.

A World Apart

Fosterkin are often uncomfortable in crowded cities and instead prefer raising their children in a rural setting. Some lead nomadic lifestyles, training their wards to be adventurers and survivalists. Others build treehouse villages or networks of underground burrows to emulate the societies their children came from. Dozens of fosterkin and children may make up these communities, with grown children that the fosterkin previously raised acting as intermediaries between them and those in an industrial society.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 250/560/1,030 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Deception, Lore [Parenting], Occultism, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, energy resistant (positive), good, mental, spells (Occult: modify memory, sanctuary, sleep, soothe), strength, wild

Fethrotte.name: 费斯洛特 Fethrotte

Matching Miasma.name: 匹配瘴气 Matching Miasma
Matching Miasma.description:
触发 腐烂兽受到酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、毒素或音波伤害

效果 腐烂兽进行的下一次颚部打击会造成1d6点同类能量类型的额外伤害。该颚部打击获得对应的能量特征。

Trigger The fethrotte takes acid, cold, electricity, fire, poison, or sonic damage

Effect The next jaws Strike the fethrotte makes deals 1d6 additional damage of the same energy type. The jaws Strike gains the corresponding energy trait.

Volatile Contents.name: 易爆内容 Volatile Contents
Volatile Contents.description:
当费斯洛特被杀死时，它会冒泡、起沫，并以愈发强烈的程度起伏蠕动。若有人触碰或移动它，它会在一阵恶臭的喷溅中爆炸，造成[[/r 1d6[acid],1d6[cold],1d6[electricity],1d6[fire],1d6[poison],1d6[sonic]]]，范围为一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]（@Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] 豁免）。若无人与其互动，则尸体会在[[/br 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4分钟}后于一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]范围内爆炸。

When the fethrotte is killed, it bubbles and froths and undulates with growing intensity. If it is touched or moved, it detonates in a foul spew, dealing [[/r 1d6[acid],1d6[cold],1d6[electricity],1d6[fire],1d6[poison],1d6[sonic]]] in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] save). If no one interacts with it, the body detonates [[/br 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 minutes} later in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20].

Heedless Mutation.name: 鲁莽突变 Heedless Mutation
Heedless Mutation.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 自上次使用鲁莽突变以来，费斯罗特已受到过伤害

效果 随着其口腔与牙齿怪诞地扭曲并膨胀，费斯罗特的颚部打击的伤害掷骰获得+1状态加值，但会变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙（状态） 1}。该效果可随多次使用而累积，最高可达伤害掷骰+4状态加值与@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙（状态） 4}。在首次使用此能力两分钟后，或若费斯罗特失去意识，鲁莽突变造成的所有变化都会复原，并使其获得流失（状态），其数值等于先前状态加值与笨拙（状态）的两倍。若这会导致流失（状态）高于4（由于状态加值与笨拙（状态）为3或4），则反噬为致命，费斯罗特会立即死亡，因为它的头部猛地弹回正常体型。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.dRhl51og0btCjYVV]{效果: 鲁莽突变}

Frequency Once per round

Requirements The fethrotte has taken damage since the last time it used Heedless Mutation

Effect With a grotesque twisting and expansion of its mouth and teeth, the fethrotte gains a +1 status bonus to its damage rolls with its jaws Strikes, but becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1}. This effect is cumulative with multiple uses to a maximum of a +4 status bonus to damage rolls and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 4}. Two minutes after first using this ability or if the fethrotte loses consciousness, all changes from Heedless Mutation revert and it gains the drained condition equal to twice the previous status bonus and clumsy condition. If this would result in a drained condition higher than 4 (due to the status bonus and clumsy condition being 3 or 4), the backlash is fatal, and the fethrotte dies immediately as its head snaps back to its normal size.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.dRhl51og0btCjYVV]{Effect: Heedless Mutation}

Fethrotte.publicNotes:
费斯洛特是一种显著缺乏智慧、乖戾、独居的生物，通常因其唯一用途而过着短暂而痛苦的一生——一种被创造出来、用于吞噬炼金实验室中危险化学品的处理系统。它用那双不成比例地细小且过度劳累的脚缓慢移动，把膨胀、肥硕的肚腹拖在身后。从行为上看，费斯洛特极具攻击性的领地意识。普通食物已无法再维系它的生存，因此它完全依赖其炼金术师创造者以及产生其食物的实验室。若试图把费斯洛特从家中带走，它会执拗而无情地战斗。它看上去也许像一只普通的巨人鼠，但在其嶙峋牙齿间会喷涌出元素性的畸怪之物，而诱变性的突变使它能够改变自身躯体，以更好地撕裂入侵者。

尽管在当今的炼金实验室里，费斯洛特并不算罕见，但这种生物的具体起源已湮没于时代之中；不过，自那之后，创造它的骇人流程已传播开来。该过程包括给一只寻常的巨人鼠喂食由诱变剂与其他炼金残液混合而成的腐蚀性混合物，以制造出一名完美适合清理活跃实验室中危险液体与径流的仆役。建议冒险者留意某位炼金研究者的最后记录之后、由其助手补写的附注：“不要接触费斯洛特的尸体，否则你的助手就会彻底失业。”

警示之尾巴

一些炼金术师为了加快清理进度而试图同时饲养不止一只费斯洛特，很快就会明白：费斯洛特会吃掉任何它们认为是食物的东西，包括彼此。炼金术师在实验室里最不需要的就是更多爆炸，因此，由被同类相食的老鼠引发的连锁反应式爆炸并不是什么令人愉快的设想。他们也学会了监控那些活得比通常更久的费斯洛特。它们会随着成长而加速突变，并可能发展出不受欢迎的特性，例如以锥形喷吐元素伤害、失控地改变体型、长出翅膀，或产下自身的复制体。也许，花时间清理自己造成的烂摊子其实也没那么糟。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（光，中型），技能物品（Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth）

符合条件的灌注属性 acid, bane, cold, 体质, electricity, energy resistant (positive), fire, 毒素, sonic, 力量, wild

A fethrotte is a markedly unintelligent, cantankerous, solitary creature that typically leads a short, painful life due to their singular purpose—a disposal system created to devour dangerous chemicals in alchemical laboratories. It moves slowly on its disproportionately small, overworked feet as it drags its distended, corpulent belly behind it. Behaviorally, fethrottes are aggressively territorial. Normal food will no longer sustain them, and so they are utterly reliant on its alchemist creator and the lab where its food is generated. Try to remove a fethrotte from its home, and it will fight obsessively and mercilessly. It may appear to be a common giant rat, but elemental grotesqueries come belching from between its gnarled teeth, and mutagenic mutations enable it to alter its very body to better rend an intruder.

While a fethrotte is not a particularly uncommon sight in an alchemical lab today, the specific origins of the creature are lost to time, though the haunting procedure to create one has spread since then. The process involves feeding a mundane giant rat a caustic mixture of mutagens and other alchemical drippings to create a servant perfectly suited to cleaning up the dangerous fluids and runoff of an active laboratory. Adventurers are advised to pay heed to an addendum penned after an alchemical researcher's final entry by their assistant: "Do not touch the corpse of a fethrotte, or your assistant will be entirely out of a job."

Cautionary Tails

Alchemists tempted to speed up the cleanup process by keeping more than one fethrotte quickly learn that fethrottes eat anything they consider food, including each other. The last thing an alchemist needs in a lab is more explosions, so a chain reaction of detonating cannibalized rats is not an appealing concept. They've also learned to monitor fethrottes that survive longer than usual. Their rate of mutation increases as they grow, and they may develop undesirable traits such as spewing elemental damage in a cone, changing sizes uncontrollably, growing wings, or birthing copies of themselves. Perhaps taking the time to clean up one's own messes isn't so bad after all.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, cold, constitution, electricity, energy resistant (positive), fire, poison, sonic, strength, wild

Arrongtata Commander.name: 阿隆格塔塔指挥官 Arrongtata Commander
Arrongtata Commander.tokenName: 阿龙塔塔指挥官 Arrongtata Commander

Telepathy 50 feet.name: 心灵感应 50 尺 Telepathy 50 feet

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持用一面盾牌

你调整盾牌位置来保护自己。当你已举起盾牌时，你获得其列出的对 AC 的环境加值。你的盾牌保持举起状态，直到你下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2YgXoHvJfrDHucMr]

Requirements You are wielding a shield

You position your shield to protect yourself. When you have Raised a Shield, you gain its listed circumstance bonus to AC. Your shield remains raised until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.2YgXoHvJfrDHucMr]

Detached Face.name: 分离面孔 Detached Face
Detached Face.description:
阿隆格塔塔指挥官的脸与身体分离，二者之间存在心灵感应连接。这张脸有两只不眨眼的眼睛，提供视野、听觉、嗅觉，以及施展 Stunning Glare 的能力。所有其他功能与能力都由阿隆格塔塔指挥官的身体执行。当阿隆格塔塔指挥官的身体持有其脸时，它能正常感知。即使阿隆格塔塔指挥官的脸远离身体，它仍能看见、听见并闻到气味，但它只能看见从其当前位置可见的事物，这可能导致它无法看见、听见或闻到其周围正在发生的事（使用类似于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} 与 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{Deafened} 状态的效果来处理此情况）。即使它的头能从远处看见自己的身体，远距离视角带来的混乱仍会使阿隆格塔塔指挥官在未握持其头颅时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}。

The arrongtata commander's face is detached from its body, and there is a telepathic connection between the two. The face has two unblinking eyes that provide vision, hearing, scent, and the ability to perform a Stunning Glare. All other functions and abilities are performed by the arrongtata commander's body. When the arrongtata commander's body has its face in its possession, it perceives normally. The arrongtata commander's face can still see, hear, and smell even if it's away from its body, but it can only see whatever is visible from its current position, possibly making it unable to see, hear, or smell what's going on around it (using effects similar to the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{Deafened} conditions to handle this). Even if its head can see its body from afar, the confusion from the distant viewpoint causes the arrongtata commander to be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} while it isn't holding its head.

Shield Face.name: 盾面 Shield Face
Shield Face.description:
阿隆格塔塔指挥官的面孔极其坚固，并同时充当盾与武器，不过仅对该阿隆格塔塔指挥官有效。当阿隆格塔塔指挥官至少用一只手握持其阿隆格塔塔面孔时，它可以用该面孔进行举起盾牌、盾牌格挡或打击（硬度 8，HP 48，BT 24）。由于与其头部的神秘连接，当阿隆格塔塔指挥官用其头部举起盾牌时，它获得 +4 环境加值至 AC；且若其面孔破损，它仍保持部分功能。在破损状态下，它不能再用于打击，但仍可作为盾牌使用，在举起时提供 +2 环境加值至 AC。若阿隆格塔塔指挥官的面孔被完全摧毁，该阿隆格塔塔陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{目盲} 与 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{耳聋}，并且无法使用“眩晕凝视”。

The face of an arrongtata commander is incredibly sturdy, and acts as both a shield and weapon, though only for that arrongtata commander. When the arrongtata commander holds its arrongtata face in at least one hand, it can use the face to Raise a Shield, Shield Block, or Strike (Hardness 8, HP 48, BT 24). Because of their mystical connection to their head, when an arrongtata commander Raises a Shield with their head, they gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC, and if their face breaks, it remains partially functional. While broken, it can no longer be used to Strike but can still act as a shield with a circumstance bonus of +2 AC when raised. If an arrongtata commander's face is fully destroyed, the arrongtata becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{Deafened} and can't use Stunning Glare.

Summon Face.name: 召唤面容 Summon Face
Summon Face.description:
需求 阿龙格塔塔指挥官有一只空手

效果 阿龙格塔塔指挥官立刻将它的脸从任何地方传送到它的手中。

Requirements The arrongtata commander has a free hand

Effect The arrongtata commander immediately teleports its face from anywhere into its hand.

Arrongtata Face.name: 阿隆塔塔之面 Arrongtata Face
Arrongtata Face.description:
硬度 8, HP 48, BT 24

注：此盾牌的破损阈值在系统中被设为 0，以使其能够在低于正常破损阈值时仍可被举起。

Hardness 8, HP 48, BT 24

Note: The broken threshold for this shield is set to 0 in the system to enable it to be raised below the normal broken threshold.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Speak with Plants (Constant).name: 与植物交谈（恒定） Speak with Plants (Constant)
Speak with Plants (Constant).description:
你可以向植物和真菌提问并获得它们的回答，但该法术不会让它们比平常更友好或更聪明。大多数普通植物和真菌对周围世界有其独特的看法，因此它们不会辨认关于生物的细节，也不了解其直接附近之外的世界。狡猾的植物或真菌怪物很可能言辞简短且闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的则常会发表一些愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal. Most normal plants and fungi have a distinctive view of the world around them, so they don't recognize details about creatures or know anything about the world beyond their immediate vicinity. Cunning plant or fungus monsters are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Stunning Glare.name: 震慑怒视 Stunning Glare
Stunning Glare.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 阿隆戈塔塔指挥官的双眼闪光，以震慑30英尺内一个目标的灵体。目标尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并在1分钟内暂时免疫“震慑凝视”。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。

大失败 目标陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}。

Frequency once per round

Effect The arrongtata commander's eyes flash to stun the spirit of a target within 30 feet. The target attempts a @Check[type:will|dc:21] saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and becomes temporarily immune to Stunning Glare for 1 minute.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}.

Command Troops.name: 指挥部队 Command Troops
Command Troops.description:
阿戎格塔塔指挥官以心灵感应指挥其50尺内的部队调整站位。任何同时为精类与灵体的较低等级盟友都可以使用反应动作（）进行一步移动。

The arrongtata commander telepathically commands its troops within 50 feet to adjust their positioning. Any lower level ally that's both a fey and a spirit can use a reaction to Step.

Arrongtata Commander.publicNotes:
阿隆格塔塔指挥官是游荡的灵体，拥有用作盾牌的人造面孔。它们指挥由较小同类组成的方阵，以击败那些可能伤害自然的家伙。阿隆格塔塔指挥官具有军国主义倾向，不断磨练其战争技能。

阿隆格塔塔曾是神灵（kami），它们抛弃了自身的守护职责，去追猎圣地中的闯入者。放弃作为神灵的职责让它们得以自由游荡，但尽管它们受到的惩罚远不如恶鬼（oni）那般严厉，这一选择仍令它们失去了视野以及大部分魔法力量。为弥补这一缺陷，阿隆格塔塔将自身躯体绑定在一张盾面上——那是它们用天然材料打造的面具。阿隆格塔塔会敌视任何它们认为将伤害自然的生物；不过，它们却与非邪恶的恶鬼相处得出奇融洽，因为双方都能对彼此的过往、选择，以及所遭受的过度严苛惩罚感同身受。若其盾面被摧毁，它们能在一周内制作新的盾面；而这盾面也足够坚固，能被那些成功击败它们的人当作盾牌材料使用。

解读面孔

阿隆格塔塔用来制作盾面的材料往往具有个人意义。多数会选择与自己作为神灵时所守护之物相匹配的材料，也有人会挑选在新角色中希望保护的东西。前线战士的面孔常由坚韧的木材或金属制成，以获得更好的防护。谋略家则使用岩石面孔，以引导大地的感知；而草或毛皮面孔能帮助斥候融入其环境。但最可怖的阿隆格塔塔，是那些拥有骨质面孔者——它们是复仇之灵，已无所可失，因为它们曾试图守护的一切都已死去。

砍下他们的头？

常识认为，杀死一支军团的指挥官会使部队陷入混乱，使阿隆格塔塔指挥官成为诱人的目标。然而，阿隆格塔塔之间的心灵感应联结让这一策略变得复杂。如同阿隆格塔塔虫群所展示的那样，阿隆格塔塔完全能够彼此协调——打倒指挥官，另一个就会顶替其位置。正确的做法是让指挥官活着，并打击其心智。或许可以通过心灵控制来操纵一名阿隆格塔塔指挥官，使其向部队下达错误命令。然而，有时这种尝试会适得其反：阿隆格塔塔指挥官会假装被控制，从而反过来占上风。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），盾牌，察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、学识[战争]、自然）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），法术（原初：植物交谈），力量，野性

Arrongtata commanders are roving spirits with artificial faces they use as shields. They command phalanxes of their smaller kind to vanquish those that might harm nature. Arrongtata commanders are militaristic, constantly honing their skills in warfare.

Arrongtata were once kami who forsook their wards to seek out trespassers on sacred grounds. Abandoning their duty as kami allowed them to roam freely, but while they weren't punished nearly as harshly as oni, their choice still cost them their vision and most of their magical powers. To overcome this, arrongtata bound their bodies to a shield face that they crafted from natural materials. Arrongtata are hostile to any creature they believe will harm nature, though they get along surprisingly well with non-evil oni, as the two can empathize with each other's pasts, their choices, and the overly harsh punishments they've received. If their shield face is destroyed, they can craft a new one in a week, and it is sturdy enough to be used as shield material by those who manage to defeat them.

Reading Faces

The material an arrongtata uses to craft a shield face carries personal significance. Most choose a material matching what they defended as kami, though others select something they wish to protect in their new roles. Front-line fighters often have faces made of hardy wood or metal for better protection. Strategists have rock faces that channel the wisdom of the earth, while grass or fur faces help scouts blend into their environments. But the most fearsome arrongtata are those with bone faces—they are spirits of vengeance with nothing left to lose, for all they sought to defend has died.

Off With Their Heads?

Common sense suggests that killing a military unit's commander would throw the troops into disarray, making the arrongtata commander a tempting target. However, the telepathic connection between arrongtata adds a complication to that strategy. As demonstrated by the arrongtata swarm, arrongtata are more than capable of coordinating amongst themselves— strike down the commander and another takes its place. The correct play is to leave the commander alive and strike at its mind. It might be possible to mind control an arrongtata commander in order to have it send faulty orders to its troops. However, sometimes such an attempt can go wrong and lead to the arrongtata commander turning the tables by pretending to be controlled.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Lore [Warfare], Nature)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), spells (Primal: speak with plants), strength, wild
Arrongtata Commander.ac: 24 with shield raised, 22 with broken shield raised
Arrongtata Commander.prototypeToken: 阿龙塔塔指挥官 Arrongtata Commander

Feth Velaunt.name: 费斯·维劳恩特 Feth Velaunt
Feth Velaunt.tokenName: 费思·维劳恩特 Feth Velaunt

+2 To All Saves Against Curses.name: 对抗诅咒的所有豁免+2 +2 To All Saves Against Curses

Accursed Absence.name: 诅咒缺席 Accursed Absence
Accursed Absence.description:
费斯·维洛恩特既是一个生物，也是一种诅咒，而它在自身两种性相之间来回消隐的方式，使其更难受到伤害。每当一次打击将命中费斯·维洛恩特时，攻击的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:flat|dc:9]。若为失败，该打击会相位穿过费斯·维洛恩特并未命中。之后，无论该纯骰检定的结果如何，DC都会降低2。该降低是累积的，并且一旦纯骰检定DC降至1，生物在以打击命中费斯·维洛恩特时不再需要尝试该检定。在费斯·维洛恩特的回合开始时，纯骰检定DC重置为9。

The feth velaunt is as much a curse as it is a creature, and the way it fades back and forth between the two aspects of itself makes it significantly harder to harm it. Whenever a Strike would hit the feth velaunt, the attacking creature must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:9]. On a failure, the Strike phases through the feth velaunt and misses. Afterwards, regardless of the result of the flat check, the DC decreases by 2. This reduction is cumulative, and once the flat check DC reaches 1, creatures no longer need to attempt it when they hit the feth velaunt with a Strike. At the beginning of the feth velaunt's turn, the flat check DC resets to 9.

Tether.name: 系绳 Tether
Tether.description:
如果费斯·维劳恩特用其系缚鞭击命中一个生物，该生物会被费斯·维劳恩特施加@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{受擒}状态（@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{逃脱} DC 30）。与通常的受擒状态不同，被费斯·维劳恩特受擒的生物不会@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{动弹不得}，但其无法移动到系缚的触及范围之外。生物可以通过攻击系缚来切断它；系缚的AC为20，并且需要造成至少@Damage[15[slashing]]伤害。如果费斯·维劳恩特试图以会超出任何系缚触及范围的方式移动，连接在这些系缚上的生物可以作为反应动作（）尝试一次逃脱动作。如果它们逃脱失败，或未尝试逃脱，这些生物会被以等同于系缚触及的距离拖拽着与费斯·维劳恩特一同移动。这属于强迫移动。每轮在费斯·维劳恩特的回合开始时，所有当前系缚的触及减少15英尺；如果触及变得小于生物与费斯·维劳恩特之间的距离，则会将所有被系缚的生物拖向它。如果某条系缚的触及以这种方式降至0，则被系缚的生物获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{束缚}状态。以这种方式被束缚的生物在费斯·维劳恩特移动时会与其一同被移动。每当费斯·维劳恩特受到伤害时，所有当前被系缚的生物都会受到@Damage[1d4[mental]]伤害；该造成伤害的效果具有非致命（特征）。

If the feth velaunt hits a creature with its tether lash, that creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} by the feth velaunt (@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} DC 30). Unlike normal for the grabbed condition, a creature grabbed by a feth velaunt isn't @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}, though it can't move outside of the tether's reach. A creature can sever the tether by attacking the tether, which has an AC of 20, and dealing at least @Damage[15[slashing]] damage. If the feth velaunt attempts to move in a way that would exceed the reach of any tether, creatures attached to those tethers can attempt an Escape action as a reaction. If they fail to Escape, or don't attempt to Escape, such creatures are dragged along with the feth velaunt at a distance equal to the tether's reach. This is forced movement. The reach of all current tethers decreases by 15 feet at the start of the feth velaunt's turn each round, dragging all tethered creatures towards it if the reach becomes less than the distance between the creature and feth velaunt. If a tether's reach reaches 0 in this way, the tethered creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained}. Creatures who are restrained in this way are moved along with the feth velaunt when it moves. Each time the feth velaunt takes damage, all creatures currently tethered take @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage; this damaging effect has the nonlethal trait.

Harvest.name: 收获 Harvest
Harvest.description:
费斯·维劳恩特释放一阵系缚鞭挞弹幕，覆盖一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]。弹幕区域内的所有生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:28] 豁免。在失败时，它们被系缚并受到 @Damage[4d8[bludgeoning]] 伤害；在大失败时，它们受到双倍伤害并受到系缚影响。费斯·维劳恩特在接下来的 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次收割。

The feth velaunt unleashes a barrage of tether lashes in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. All creatures in the area of the barrage must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:28] saving throw. On a failure, they're tethered and take @Damage[4d8[bludgeoning]] damage, and on a critical failure, they take double damage and are affected by tether. The feth velaunt can't Harvest again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Mind Crush.name: 心灵碾压 Mind Crush
Mind Crush.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 费斯·维劳特发出一道灵能能量波，碾碎那些被其缆索所连接的受害者的心智。每个被费斯·维劳特的缆索所连接的生物承受 @Damage[6d6[mental]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免。被缆索 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} 的生物，将其豁免结果视为比其掷出结果差一级成功度。

Frequency once per round

Effect The feth velaunt sends a wave of psychic energy to crush the minds of the victims attached to its tethers. Each creature tethered by the feth velaunt takes @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage with a @Check[type:will|dc:25|basic:true] save. Creatures @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} by the tether treat the result of their saving throw as one degree of success worse than they rolled.

Feth Velaunt.publicNotes:
费斯·维拉昂特既是生物也是诅咒，它看起来像一条透明的鳗鱼状生物，长着蛇一般的头颅和坚硬、夸张巨大的鳍。它会不断生长并吸收尸体，直到仅凭自身就能威胁整个小型聚落。

当诅咒侵扰当地亡者时，费斯·维拉昂特便会成形：亡者会失去所有颜色与不透明度，随后从坟墓中爬出，摇摇晃晃地走向海洋。更糟的是，在海浪之下，亡者的尸体会彼此融合，形成一个只有单一欲望的生物：继续生长。

费斯·维拉昂特的终局

最终，市民会发现这支由无意识的透明躯体组成的可怖行列，或者尸体数量不足以支撑其生长。那时它就会浮出水面。它细长如鳗，透明如精致的玻璃，靠鳍将自己拖上陆地。它的腹部是一团盘绕抽打的瘴气触须。它会系缚数十个生物，并将它们塞到腹下。随后，它又滑回水下，让所收集的受害者在无梦中溺亡。虽然这些数据非常适用于新近现世的费斯·维拉昂特，但只要有足够的时代与尸体，它就可能成长为足以摧毁城市的巨型生物。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（光）、察觉物品、技能物品（运动、威吓、神秘学、隐秘）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害、体质、能量抗性（寒冷、正能量）、邪恶、精神、力量、野性

A feth velaunt is both a creature and a curse, appearing as a transparent eel-like creature with an ophidian head and hard, oversized fins. It grows and absorbs bodies until it can threaten an entire small settlement on its own.

A feth velaunt forms when a curse afflicts the local dead, causing them to lose all their color and opacity before crawling out of their grave to wander into the ocean. Worse, under the waves, the bodies of the dead merge together, forming a creature of singular desire: to continue growing.

Feth Velaunt Finales

Eventually, the citizenry discovers the grisly parade of mindless, transparent bodies, or there aren't enough corpses to sustain growth. That's when it surfaces. Long and eel-like, transparent as fine glass, the creature drags itself onto land with its fins. Its belly is a miasma of coiling, whipping tendrils. It tethers dozens of creatures and tucks them up under its belly. Then, it slips back underwater so that its gathered victims dreamlessly drown. While these statistics are perfect for a newly arisen feth velaunt, with enough time and bodies, it could become a gargantuan creature capable of destroying cities.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Intimidation, Occultism, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (cold, positive), evil, mental, strength, wild
Feth Velaunt.prototypeToken: 费斯·维劳恩特 Feth Velaunt

Fetchfisher Brood Swarm.name: 捞鱼蛛育群虫群 Fetchfisher Brood Swarm
Fetchfisher Brood Swarm.tokenName: 捡鱼者育群虫群 Fetchfisher Brood Swarm

Shifting Mass.name: 变移质量 Shifting Mass
Shifting Mass.description:
尽管体型庞大，夺影渔者仍能在位面之间转移自己的身体，使其能够穿过狭窄空间，并躲在足以为中型生物提供掩蔽的小型障碍物后方以获得掩蔽。在挤压通过时，它们可以以其全额速度移动。当使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Take Cover]{Take Cover} 动作时，它们可以躲在大型或更大的物体后方以获得掩蔽，必要时将其空间从15×15英尺缩小到最小5×5英尺。

Despite their size, the fetchfisher can shift their body between planes to allow it to fit through tight spaces and take cover behind small obstacles that would be enough to provide cover for a Medium creature. While Squeezing, they can move at their full Speed. When using the @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Take Cover]{Take Cover} action, they can take cover behind Large or larger objects, reducing their space down from 15 by 15 feet to as small as 5 by 5 feet as necessary.

Greater Darkvision.name: 强化黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

Swarming Bites.name: 蜂拥噬咬 Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description:
虫群空间内的每个敌人承受 @Damage[3d6[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] 豁免。虫群通过用费奇渔者油覆盖它们，尝试反制区域内所有光效果（反制等级3，反制调整值 [[/br 1d20+12 #Counteract]]{+12}）。如果光效果位于区域内的一个生物身上，或位于一个由生物穿戴或持用的物体上，则一次成功的反射豁免允许该生物避开油。可以花费一个交互动作将油擦掉以移除油。这会恢复任何被虫群反制的光效果。

Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] save. The swarm attempts to counteract all light effects in the area (counteract level 3, counteract modifier [[/br 1d20+12 #Counteract]]{+12}) by slathering them in fetchfisher oil. If the light effect is on a creature in the area, or an object worn or held by a creature, a successful Reflex save allows the creature to avoid the oil. The oil can be removed by spending an Interact action to wipe it off. This restores any light effects counteracted by the swarm.

Fetchfisher Brood Swarm.publicNotes:
尽管它们狡猾而凶暴，但很少有取渔者能活到成熟。来自其他边界掠食者的竞争、以及暗影巨人对毛皮的捕猎等压力，迫使取渔者以群落方式共同抚育幼崽，形成庞大而凶残的育幼群。尽管取渔者的爪子要到幼崽接近青春期才开始变长并形成钩状，但它们用于撕裂血肉的獠牙很早就发育完成。

取渔者幼崽的体型大约与常见的狗相当。它们脖颈修长，披着油亮的黑色皮毛，行走时像蝾螈一样蜿蜒滑行。当一群幼崽匍匐藏身于阴影中时，几乎无法被察觉，唯有它们眼中的反光会在火把的光中闪烁出绿色。幼崽分泌的暗影黏液与成体同样强力，但个体似乎要到成年后才会发展出足以轻易在位面缝隙间穿梭的娴熟技巧。尽管如此，幼崽皮毛上的油脂仍会干扰光源并阻碍移动，因为这种物质会渗入位面之间的边界。

取渔者偏好在一个巨大、温暖且稳定的光源所投下的阴影中筑巢。你可能会在巨型熔炉的阴影里、信标火焰的基座下方，甚至在某个与德兹里亚克织光相邻的位面维度中发现一群幼崽。

若在黑暗中不受打扰，取渔者育幼群不太可能形成虫群。然而，那些倒霉的冒险者若不慎把光照进取渔者巢穴，很快就会发现自己被数十道油腻的阴影压倒在地，遭到撕咬、撕碎，并被拖到位面之间的半途。即便不幸的闯入者设法挣脱，也最好立刻远离。取渔者很少会让育幼群无人看管，附近通常会有“保姆”守候。

取渔者是一类来自暗影位面的哺乳类野兽家族，它们在物质位面与暗影位面的边界地带狩猎。暴露在暗影能量之下会使它们变得更大、更强。

取渔者的教育

取渔者即使在年幼时也能在育幼群中自卫并狩猎。然而在这一阶段，它们的心智尚未完全发育，行为更像动物而非成体。因此，负责任的成体取渔者会看护育幼群虫群。成体取渔者会用严厉但公正、注重实作的亲身课程，教授诸如狩猎、语言、附近威胁与地理等重要内容。

取渔者的合作者

在更为罕见的情况下，当取渔者在物质位面狩猎时，它们曾被发现会与拟形怪合作，发动精心设计的伏击计划。在这些计划中，拟形怪充当诱饵，将受害者黏在原地，使取渔者得以围攻落单目标，或是抓住并拖走后排的盟友，从而让拟形怪的工作更轻松。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 18/45/80 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、运动、隐匿）

可用灌注属性 破敌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），加固，力量，狂野

Though they are wily and ferocious, few fetchfishers survive into maturity. Pressures, such as competition from other liminal predators and pelt harvesting by shadow giants, have driven fetchfishers to raise their young communally in large, vicious broods. Although fetchfishers' claws only begin to lengthen and hook as the kittens approach adolescence, their flesh-ripping fangs develop quite early.

A fetchfisher kitten is around the size of a common dog. They are long-necked, with an oily black coat and a slithering gait like a salamander. When a brood is hiding prone in the shadows, kittens are nearly undetectable except for the reflections in their eyes, which flash green in torchlight. A kitten's shadowy secretions are just as potent as those of an adult, but individuals don't seem to develop the finesse to slip between the cracks in the planes as easily until adulthood. Nevertheless, grease from a kitten's coat interferes with light sources and impedes movement as the substance permeates the boundaries between planes.

Fetchfishers prefer to nest in the shadow of a large, warm, consistent light source. A brood might be found within the shadow of a great forge, beneath the base of a beacon fire, or even adjacent in a planar dimension to a d'ziriak light weaving.

If left undisturbed in the dark, a fetchfisher brood is unlikely to swarm. However, hapless adventurers who carelessly shine light into a fetchfisher den soon find themselves dogpiled by dozens of oily shadows, bitten, shredded, and dragged halfway between the planes. Should the unlucky interloper manage to free themselves, they had best make themselves scarce. Fetchfishers rarely leave a brood without a babysitter nearby.

Fetchfishers are a family of mammalian beasts from the Shadow Plane that hunt on the borders between the Material Plane and the Shadow Plane. Exposure to shadowy energies can cause them to grow larger and more powerful.

Fetchfisher Education

Fetchfishers are able to defend themselves and hunt in a brood even at a young age.
