However, at this point, their mind hasn't yet fully developed, and they act more like animals than their adult counterparts. Thus, responsible adult fetchfishers watch over a brood swarm. Adult fetchfishers use harsh but fair practical hands-on lessons to teach important topics like hunting, language, nearby threats, and geography.

Fetchfisher Collaborators

On the rarer occasions that fetchfishers hunt on the Material Plane, they have been known to cooperate with mimics to launch elaborate ambush schemes. In these schemes, the mimic acts as bait, adhering the victim in place to allow the fetchfisher to either gang up on a solitary victim or to snatch and drag away a back-line ally to make the mimic's job easier.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), fortification, strength, wild
Fetchfisher Brood Swarm.prototypeToken: 拾渔蛛育群虫群 Fetchfisher Brood Swarm

Chiralus.name: 奇拉鲁斯 Chiralus

Depthless.name: 无底的 Depthless
Depthless.description:
凭借其二维特性，手性螈可以穿过任何缝隙，无论多么狭窄（只要它不是足够完美的密封以阻止空气的流动），并且可以自由穿过其他生物的方格。

By using its two-dimensionality, a chiralus can pass through any gap, however thin (so long as it would not be a perfect enough seal to stop the flow of air), and can freely pass through other creatures' squares.

Reversed Speech.name: 反言术 Reversed Speech
Reversed Speech.description:
奇拉鲁斯会倒着说话和书写，这使得理解它在说什么变得极其困难，需要一次成功的 @Check[type:society|dc:20] 检定（用于书面文本时相当于 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{破译文字}）

A chiralus speaks and writes backwards, which makes it exceedingly difficult to understand what it's saying, requiring a successful @Check[type:society|dc:20] check (to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{Decipher Writing} when used on written text)

Broken Mirror Curse.name: 破碎之镜诅咒 Broken Mirror Curse
Broken Mirror Curse.description:
当一名生物将奇拉鲁斯的生命值降至0时，该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:28] 意志豁免。若失败，该生物将遭受厄运影响，并且在接下来24小时内进行的下七次非琐碎检定中，必须掷骰两次并取较差结果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.r0THIRrqescxaPnh]{效果：破碎镜子诅咒}

When a creature reduces the chiralus to 0 Hit Points, the creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:28] save. On a failure, the creature is afflicted with bad luck, and must roll twice and take the worse result on the next seven non-trivial checks it makes within the next 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.r0THIRrqescxaPnh]{Effect: Broken Mirror Curse}

Two Dimensional Reorientation.name: 二维重定向 Two Dimensional Reorientation
Two Dimensional Reorientation.description:
触发 奇拉鲁斯为先攻掷骰，或其回合结束

需求 奇拉鲁斯未处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

效果 奇拉鲁斯选择其方格的一侧。直到它下一次使用此能力或倒地俯卧为止，只要一个敌对效果的来源起始于所选侧或其方格的相对侧（使用与决定掩蔽相同的方法），该效果的来源必须尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:15]；若失败，该效果不会影响奇拉鲁斯。

Trigger The chiralus rolls for initiative, or its turn ends

Requirements The chiralus is not @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Effect The chiralus chooses one side of its square. Until the next time it uses this ability or falls prone, whenever a hostile effect's source originates from the chosen side or the opposite side of its square (using the same method as determining cover), the effect's source must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:15]; on a failure, the effect doesn't affect the chiralus.

Infinitesimal Slice.name: 无穷小切割 Infinitesimal Slice
Infinitesimal Slice.description:
奇拉鲁斯飞过另一个生物的空间，切割该生物的肉体与灵魂。该生物受到 @Damage[4d6[slashing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:27] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害。奇拉鲁斯进行一次反制检定（反制调整值 [[/r 1d20+20 #Counteract]]{+20}，反制等级 5），以对抗每一个将该生物与其盟友直接联系起来的魔法效果，例如护盾他人法术，以及由GM酌情决定的其他效果。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}，并且若该生物正在进行星界投射（例如通过星界投射仪式），其银索会受损，或若其已受损则被切断。

The chiralus Flies through another creature's space and slices the creature both bodily and spiritually. The creature takes @Damage[4d6[slashing]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:27] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage. The chiralus makes a counteract check (counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+20 #Counteract]]{+20}, counteract level 5) against each magical effect directly linking the creature to its allies, such as the shield other spell, and other effects at the GM's discretion.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}, and if the creature is astrally projecting (such as via the astral projection ritual), their silver cord is damaged, or severed if it was already damaged.

Weakness 10 to Physical When Prone.name: 倒地时对物理具有弱点 10 Weakness 10 to Physical When Prone

Chiralus.publicNotes:
世界各地民间传说中常见的一句老话描绘某些邪恶生物（例如吸血鬼（特征））是如此可怖，或许又如此异类，以至于它们即便在通常情况下仍可被看见，也完全无法投下倒影。这些故事往往确有其事，却留下一个挥之不去的问题：“为什么？”但也许问题应该换成：“在哪里？”任何魔法学者或老练的冒险者都会作证：镜子以及其中所见的倒影，往往蕴藏着怪异而反复无常的力量。对那些似乎违抗倒影之理的存在而言，它们的面容或许并非被映回自身，而是被抛离出去，漂流于星界位面之中。这些扭曲的影像——纯粹恶意的微小碎片——最终会凝聚成奇拉鲁斯。

就像镜面上的倒影一样，奇拉鲁斯是二维的，看起来不可能地扁平，几乎与一面普通镜子难以区分，唯一区别在于：活生物在其中看不到自己的倒影，反而会看到那些本不该有倒影的生物的倒影，例如吸血鬼（特征）。从侧面观察时，奇拉鲁斯几乎难以察觉——它们常常利用这一特性获取致命优势，因为驱使它们的几乎只剩下某种原初的欲望：切割、斩断、杀戮。

镜裔是一类生物家族，与星界位面以及镜中扭曲次元之外那无尽的替代现实都有关联。就像@Compendium[pf2e.hazards.4jJxLlimyQaIVXlt]{Darkside Mirror}彼侧出现的邪恶复制体一样，大多数镜裔象征着多元宇宙的无限可能——那些并未发生、却可能发生之事。这一类镜裔包括塔哈加塔与碎化者，两种由“潜能”经由悖论式扭曲而化为有形形体的实体。在较小程度上，奇拉鲁斯亦是如此：那些永不可能存在之倒影的化身，体现如吸血鬼（特征）这类通常没有倒影的生物之倒影。最后，奥德拉祖则是极为罕见的镜裔，因为它们由魔鬼与星界位面之间的共生杂合体形成，并掺杂来自替代镜面次元的异界能量。

所有镜裔的共同点之一，是它们与镜子的物理连接：奥德拉祖以倒影为食；奇拉鲁斯呈现为二维倒影；塔哈加塔采取由无数镜面构筑的形态；碎化者则由无数参差尖锐的镜片碎片组成。这并不意味着它们必然更可能出现在镜子更常见的区域，因为每一种生物都会将这种镜面般的物质性随身带到任何地方。

尽管是同一生物家族，镜裔彼此却很少互动。即便碎化者有时能从被摧毁的塔哈加塔中生成，它们也很少与塔哈加塔交谈；而塔哈加塔则认为碎化者本质中那种破碎的潜能令人厌恶且刺耳，正如当塔哈加塔与某个原初生物并置后，它从该原初生物身上感受到的那种“不对劲”的感觉一般。

失系

前往星界位面的旅者必须格外提防奇拉鲁斯，因为这种生物无限锋锐的形态甚至能切断星界系带，令旅程以悲剧收场。

穿越镜中世界

除了会将被映照者的替代版本送出的darkside mirrors之外，亦有可能（尽管罕见）通过一面普通镜子连接到其外的诸界，并遭遇镜裔。这种现象在充盈星界能量之处更为常见，或发生在凡世与镜外世界之间的帷幕曾被撕裂过的地点——在这一过程中，那层帷幕会变得愈发稀薄。穿镜而入者会发现，这些镜界依其自身诡异的规则运转；而他们虽最终可能从另一面镜子再度现身，却往往已然改变。

其他镜裔

此处呈现的镜裔仅是冰山一角，因为无尽镜面宇宙中的可能性与多元宇宙本身一样无穷无尽。关于其他镜裔的一些传闻包括：

  • 暗面行者，源自暗面镜的生物，已成为此世界的永久居民——或是试图从其现实带来更多“居民”，或是在此建立自己的采邑。
  • 晶裂魔，由破碎占卜水晶球的反光碎片所形成的恶意实体，它们利用镜子窥探许多其他生物，并将情报用于自身卑劣目的。
  • 镜中哑剧者，藏身于镜中、替换生物自然倒影的生物，以吞噬该生物的心灵为食；它们会在镜前模仿该生物的动作，试图不被察觉。
  • 折光者，在追猎猎物时会在战场各处布置多面镜子的生物，发射在镜面间反弹、以出人意料角度折射的光束，照射并灼害其受害者。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（光），察觉 物品，技能 物品（隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 灾祸，混沌，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），精神，投掷，狂野，有翼

A common refrain in folklore throughout the world paints some evil creatures (such as vampires) as so horrible, or perhaps so alien, that they are utterly unable to cast a reflection, despite being normally visible. These tales often turn out to be true, but leave a lingering question of, "Why?" But perhaps the question should instead be, "Where?" As any magical scholar or seasoned adventurer will attest, mirrors and the reflections seen in them often hold strange and mercurial power. For those who seemingly defy such reflection, their visage may not be cast back at them but instead cast away, drifting through the Astral Plane. These distorted figures—tiny fragments of pure malevolence—eventually coalesce into a chiralus.

Just like a reflection on a mirror's surface, chiralus are two-dimensional, appearing impossibly flat and almost indistinguishable from a mundane mirror, aside from the fact that living creatures don't see their reflections within, instead seeing the reflections of creatures who otherwise don't have them, like vampires. Observed side-on, a chiralus is almost imperceptible—a property they often use to their deadly advantage, as they are driven by little else besides a primordial desire to cut, sever, and kill.

Mirrorborn are a family of creatures with connections to both the Astral Plane and the infinite alternate realities beyond the twisted dimensions found within mirrors. Much like the evil duplicates found on the other side of a @Compendium[pf2e.hazards.4jJxLlimyQaIVXlt]{Darkside Mirror}, most mirrorborn represent the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, of things that aren't but could have been. This category of mirrorborn includes tahagatas and fragmentors, two entities formed from the paradoxical distortion of potential into a corporeal form. To a lesser extent, the same is true of chiraluses, the incarnations of the reflections that could never be, embodying reflections of creatures like vampires that ordinarily have no reflections. Finally, odrazu are highly unusual mirrorborn, as they form from a symbiotic hybrid between a devil and the Astral Plane, peppered with otherworldly energies from alternate mirror dimensions.

One commonality among all mirrorborn is their physical connection to mirrors: odrazu feed on reflections, chiraluses appear as two-dimensional reflections, tahagatas take a form built of myriad mirrored surfaces, and fragmentors are composed of countless jagged mirror shards. This doesn't mean that they are necessarily more likely to be found in areas where mirrors are more common, as each of the creatures brings their mirrored physicality along with them.

Despite being a family of creatures, mirrorborn rarely interact with each other. Even fragmentors, which can sometimes form out of a destroyed tahagata, rarely converse with tahagatas, and tahagatas for their part find the fragmented potential inherent to a fragmentor's essence distasteful and jarring, much like the sensation of wrongness they feel from an original creature after the tahagata juxtaposes with it.

Untethered

Travelers to the Astral Plane must be especially wary of chiralus, since the creatures' infinitely sharp form can sever even an astral tether, tragically ending their journey.

Through The Looking Glass

In addition to darkside mirrors, which send forth alternative versions of those reflected within, it's possible, though rare, to connect to realms beyond an ordinary mirror and encounter mirrorborn. The phenomenon is far more likely in places brimming with astral energies or in locations where the veil between the mortal world and the world beyond the mirror has been torn before, becoming thinner and thinner in the process. Those who enter through a mirror find that these mirror realms operate on their own bizarre rules, and while they eventually might re-emerge from another mirror, they often do so changed.

Other Mirrorborn

The mirrorborn presented here are just the tip of the iceberg, as the possibilities in the infinite mirror universes are just as endless as the multiverse itself. Some rumors of other mirrorborn include:

  • Darksiders, creatures originating from a darkside mirror who have become permanent residents of this world, either seeking to bring more residents from their reality or to establish their own fiefdom in this one.
  • Kryshards, malevolent entities that form from the reflective shards of shattered crystal balls and use mirrors to spy on many other creatures and use the information for their own foul purposes.
  • Mirror Mimes, creatures who hide within mirrors and replace a creature's natural reflection in order to devour that creature's psyche, attempting to stay unnoticed by mimicking the creature's actions in front of mirrors.
  • Reflectors, creatures that position many mirrors across the battlefield when stalking their prey, shooting beams of light that bounce off the mirrors at unexpected angles and irradiate their victims.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), mental, throwing, wild, winged

Feddry.name: 费德里 Feddry

Explorer's Clothing.name: 探险者服装 Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
探险者服装足够结实，尽管它不是一套护甲，但也可以加固以保护你。它有许多形态，不过最常见的种类看起来像神职人员的法衣、武僧的衣装或法师的长袍，因为这三种职业的成员都可能会避免穿戴护甲。

Explorer's clothing is sturdy enough that it can be reinforced to protect you, even though it isn't a suit of armor. It comes in many forms, though the most common sorts look like clerical vestments, monk's garments, or wizard's robes, as members of all three classes are likely to avoid wearing armor.

Repair Kit.name: 修理工具包 Repair Kit
Repair Kit.description:
修理工具包让你在旅行时进行简单修理。它包含便携式铁砧、钳子、木工工具、磨刀石，以及用于保养皮革和木材的油。你可以使用修理工具包用手艺（技能）来修理物品。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill.

Roll.name: 掷骰 Roll
Roll.description:
需求 feddry处于撤入岩石状态

效果 feddry缓慢地在地面上滚动，移动5英尺。

Requirements The feddry is Withdrawn into Rock

Effect The feddry rolls slowly across the ground, moving 5 feet.

Withdraw into Rock.name: 遁入岩石中 Withdraw into Rock
Withdraw into Rock.description:
费德里可以撤回到它的岩石中，丢下无法塞进其岩石躯干的装备。当躲在岩石里时，费德里获得强化掩蔽的好处，不过其他生物可以攻击并摧毁岩石以移除强化掩蔽。岩石是一个超小型物体，大小如背包，硬度 7，HP 28，BT 14，1 负载。费德里躲在岩石里时可以说话和聆听，但无法看见外面，也无法进行大多数需要使用其身体的动作，尤其是手或腿。这包括使用它的打击。它在“撤回至岩石”期间唯一能进行的移动动作是掷骰。它可以再次使用“撤回至岩石”来离开岩石的掩蔽并恢复其通常外貌。其他生物可能会将岩石形态的费德里误认为是一块岩石，只要它保持静止，除非它们在一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:20] 或自然检定中成功。

@Compendium[pf2e.other-effects.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{效果：掩蔽}

A feddry can retreat into its rock, dropping equipment that can't fit into its rock torso. While hiding inside its rock, the feddry gains the benefits of greater cover, though other creatures can attack and destroy the rock to remove the greater cover. The rock is a Tiny object the size of a backpack with Hardness 7, HP 28, BT 14, and 1 Bulk. A feddry can speak and listen while hiding in its rock, but it can't see outside and can't take most actions that require the use of its body, particularly its hands or legs. This includes the use of its Strikes. The only move action it can take while Withdrawn into its Rock is to Roll. It can use Withdraw into Rock again to leave the rock's cover and return to its usual appearance. Other creatures might mistake a feddry in rock form for a rock as long as it remains still unless they succeed at a @Check[type:perception|dc:20] or Nature check.

@Compendium[pf2e.other-effects.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{Effect: Cover}

Static Touch.name: 静电接触 Static Touch
Static Touch.description:
费德里发出的振动会产生强烈的静电荷。每轮第一次，当一个相邻的生物以近战攻击命中费德里，或一个生物触碰费德里或以徒手攻击命中费德里时，这股静电会放电，对触碰它的生物造成 @Damage[1[electricity]] 伤害。费德里可以以单动作压制或恢复这股静电，该动作具有专注（特征）。

The vibrations a feddry makes generate a strong static charge. The first time each round that an adjacent creature hits the feddry with a melee attack, or a creature touches the feddry or hits the feddry with an unarmed attack, this static discharges, causing @Damage[1[electricity]] damage to the creature touched. A feddry can suppress or resume this static as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Feddry.publicNotes:
费德里是两栖类人，他们通过穿戴岩石来保护自己。费德里通常看起来像是数条羽状触须从一块多孔岩石中伸出，扭曲成一张夸张的人形面孔，带有羽状鳃、鼓起的眼睛，以及近乎准确的类人体态。处于这种形态的费德里会兴奋得嗡嗡作响。

费德里最为人所知的是他们对宇宙的朴素看法。在他们看来，一切要么是费德里，要么是岩石。任何能够进行移动或动作的东西——包括空气与水的流动——都是费德里，而其他一切都是岩石。岩石的意义在于保护费德里。许多费德里会就“何为费德里”以及“岩石的用途”进行漫长而冗杂的辩论，使他们成为古怪且令人困惑的谈话对象。许多费德里聚落可以在珊瑚礁附近找到；尽管费德里也能向更内陆处移动，他们仍更偏好富含浮游生物的水域作为食物来源。

离开岩石家园的费德里拥有可塑的身体，由一层层缠绕的细长柔韧触须构成。即便如此，大多数费德里也无法被说服去采取除“小型类人（两臂、两腿、一个头），并以家园岩石充当躯干”之外的任何形态。处于休息状态或受到惊吓时，费德里常会退回到自己的专属岩石里。

费德里的岩石为其大部分要害提供防护护甲；其内部是一团更多的触须、管状结构与隆起物。费德里没有性别概念，研究也仅能确定：在附着到一块合适的岩石之前，它们会经历类似浮游生物的生命阶段。

换个名字也还是岩石

尽管许多人认为费德里很朴素，他们的社会却比外人看来更复杂。曾有一起著名事件：某个费德里的宠物岩石坚称自己是费德里。该主张几乎导致费德里社会分裂，直到其中一位指出：既然所有费德里终有一天都会变成岩石，那么岩石也没有理由不能变成费德里。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 2.25/5/9 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），技能物品（制作、欺瞒、交涉、学识［岩石］、社会、隐秘）

符合条件的灌注属性 魅力，体质，敏捷，电击，能量抗性（正能量），力量，投掷，野性

Feddry are amphibious humanoids who protect themselves by wearing rocks. Feddry typically appear as several feathery tendrils emerging from a porous rock, contorting into an exaggerated human-like face with feathery gills, bulging eyes, and a nearly accurate humanoid body. A feddry in this form is positively abuzz with excitement.

Feddry are best known for their simplistic views of the universe. To them, everything is either a feddry or a rock. Anything capable of movement or action, including air and water currents, is a feddry, while anything else is a rock. Rocks are meant to protect feddry. Many feddry engage in long, drawn-out debates over the nature of feddry and the use of rocks, making them quaint and befuddling conversationalists. Many feddry colonies can be found near coral reefs; though feddry can move farther inland, they prefer plankton-filled water for food.

Feddry outside of their rock homes have malleable bodies, which are made of long, flexible tendrils wrapped in layers. Even so, most feddry can't be convinced to take on any form other than a small humanoid with two arms, two legs, and a head, with their home rock serving as the torso. When at rest or scared, a feddry often retreats into its personal rock.

A feddry's rock serves as protective armor for most of its vitals; inside is a tangle of further tendrils, tubes, and bulges. Feddry have no concept of gender, and study has only determined that they have a plankton-like life stage before attaching to a proper rock.

A Rock By Any Other Name

Although feddry are considered simplistic by many, their society is more complex than it seems to outsiders. One well-known incident occurred when a feddry's pet rock insisted that it was a feddry. The claim nearly led to a schism in feddry society until one of them pointed out that since all feddry would one day become rocks, there was no reason a rock could not become a feddry.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 2.25/5/9 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), skill items (Crafting, Deception, Diplomacy, Lore [Rock], Society, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties charisma, constitution, dexterity, electricity, energy resistant (positive), strength, throwing, wild

Xotlxotl.name: 索特尔索特尔 Xotlxotl

Perfect Healing.name: 完美治疗 Perfect Healing
Perfect Healing.description:
索特尔索特尔能在[[/br 1d4 #days]]{1d4天}内重新生长失去的四肢或器官，而且他们的伤口从不留下疤痕。

Xotlxotl's regrow lost limbs or organs in [[/br 1d4 #days]]{1d4 days}, and their wounds never leave scars.

Vanish.name: 消失 Vanish
Vanish.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 xotlxotl 被一次打击选为目标，且能看见攻击者

效果 xotlxotl 变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{隐形} 直到其下个回合结束，并移动 10 尺（步行）。隐形发生在结算该次打击之前，但移动发生在之后。若 xotlxotl 采取敌对动作，则隐形会提前结束。

Frequency Once per day

Trigger The xotlxotl is targeted with a Strike and can see the attacker

Effect The xotlxotl becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} until the end of it's next turn and Steps 10 feet. The invisibility occurs before resolving the Strike, but the movement happens afterward. The invisibility ends early if the xotlxotl takes a hostile action.

Sudden Mutation.name: 突发变异 Sudden Mutation
Sudden Mutation.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 xotlxotl 获得对强韧豁免的 +1 物品加值和 5 临时生命值，但在 1 分钟内对意志豁免、察觉检定与先攻掷骰承受 –2 减值。

Frequency Once per day

Effect The xotlxotl gains a +1 item bonus to Fortitude saves and 5 temporary Hit Points, but suffers a –2 penalty to Will saves, perception checks, and initiative rolls for 1 minute.

Xotlxotl.publicNotes:
索特尔索特是蝾螈、蟾蜍、鲶鱼与近似类人形态的混种，由更强大的异怪在久远以前创造。他们试图通过扭曲自身周围的现实、强迫自身血肉发生突变，并在敌人逼近时消失无踪，来效仿他们的造物主。

个体外观差异极大，但索特尔索特都共享一些相似的特征。他们完全直立时身高约五尺，但因佝偻的姿势看起来更接近四尺。头皮周围外露的鳃柄与脸上的触须在不同个体间数量与大小差异很大。他们光滑的皮肤色彩鲜艳夺目，通常以黑、白或粉为主色，并带有对比强烈的斑点或条纹。最让某些人觉得可爱、却令另一些人反感的，是那双巨大、从不眨动的黑眼睛，以及一张看上去总在微笑的嘴。

幸运的是，索特尔索特似乎对与他人发生冲突兴趣不大。旅行者报告说，他们会以冷淡而克制的态度相待，但并不怀有敌意。然而，他们确实会以一种随意的残酷对待同类，至少不了解其习性的人会如此认为。

对索特尔索特而言，霸凌与虐待是常态。他们明白生命中只有最强壮、最适者才能存活，于是他们会推动自己最在乎的人变得尽可能坚韧、尽可能优秀。索特尔索特甚至会将自己的卵群暴露在毒素与炼金废料之中，以在孵化前剔除最弱的个体。他们更倾向于让陌生人保持弱小，因此通常会在可能时避免冲突，除非他们打算将敌人彻底解决。这使得与索特尔索特发展友谊与外交关系充其量是一把双刃剑，因为亲近或亲密程度的增加会带来更严重的霸凌。

尽管突变在索特尔索特中很常见，但其中大多数差异只是外观层面的，不过有三种特别值得一提。此处呈现的索特尔索特具有一种基于次级主宰变异剂的突发突变，但其他个体也可能拥有基于其他次级变异剂的突变。有些会选择接受一种不可逆的炼金手术，使其发展为更强壮、更巨大的形态，但在此过程中会失去其水栖（特征）本领。还有一小部分活到高龄的索特尔索特会经历一种奇异的转化。他们不会随着年岁增长而屈服于衰弱，反而开始生长并扭曲为更陌生、更强大的形态，更接近他们的上古神祇祖先。

索特尔索特角色

将外部世界视为探索自身突变之途径而产生兴趣的索特尔索特，能成为强大的盟友，尽管他们可能会以训练与自我提升的名义，让他们的伙伴经历残酷无情的考验。关于扮演索特尔索特PC的规则，请查阅《Battlezoo世界：靛蓝群岛》！

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 3.5/7/13 gp

合格的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动，自然，秘学，潜行，生存）

合格的灌注属性 酸蚀，灾厄，魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（酸蚀，毒素，正能量），投掷，野性

Xotlxotl are hybrids of salamanders, toads, catfish, and roughly humanoid forms, created by more powerful aberrations long ago. They seek to emulate their creators by warping reality around themselves, forcing mutations upon their own flesh, and disappearing as foes approach.

Variations in individual appearance are great, but xotlxotl all share some similar features. Standing fully upright, they reach around five feet tall, but their hunched posture makes them closer to four feet instead. External gill stalks around their scalps and barbels on their faces vary greatly in number and size between individuals. Their smooth skin is vibrant and riotous, typically with a main coloration of black, white, or pink but with starkly contrasting spots or stripes. It's the combination of large, unblinking black eyes and a mouth that always seems to be smiling that is most endearing to some and off-putting to others.

Fortunately, xotlxotl seem to have little interest in conflict with others. Travelers have reported being met with a cold and reserved attitude, but not hostility. They do, however, engage in a form of casual cruelty toward their own kind, or at least that's how those who don't know their ways would perceive it.

To xotlxotl, bullying and abuse are normal. They know that in life only the strongest and fittest survive, and they push the ones they care about most to be the toughest and best they can be. Xotlxotl even expose their own clutches of eggs to poisons and alchemical wastes to weed out the weakest specimens before hatching. They prefer to keep strangers weak, and so they typically avoid conflict when possible unless they plan to finish their foes off. This makes developing friendships and diplomatic relations with xotlxotl a double-edged sword at best, since increasing closeness or intimacy leads to increased bullying.

Though mutation is common among xotlxotl, most of these differences are cosmetic, but three bear special mention. The xotlxotl presented here has a sudden mutation based on a lesser juggernaut mutagen, but others might have mutations based on other lesser mutagens instead. Some choose to undergo an irreversible alchemical procedure that forces them to develop into a stronger, larger form but loses their aquatic prowess in the process. A small percentage of xotlxotl who live to old age experience a strange transformation. Rather than succumbing to frailty with age, they begin to grow and twist into stranger and more powerful forms, more akin to their elder god progenitors.

Xotlxotl Characters

Xotlxotl who become interested in the outside world as a vector to explore their mutations can be strong allies, though they might put their companions through merciless challenges as a form of training and self-improvement. For rules of playing a xotlxotl PC, check out World of Battlezoo: Indigo Isles!

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Nature, Occultism, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (acid, poison, positive), throwing, wild

False Tarrasque.name: 虚假塔拉斯克 False Tarrasque

Legendary Monster Lore.name: 传奇怪物学识 Legendary Monster Lore

Flee.name: 逃跑 Flee
Flee.description:
触发 当虚假塔拉斯克的泰坦变形处于激活状态时，有生物对虚假塔拉斯克做出敌对动作。

效果 在触发的动作结算前，虚假塔拉斯克变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} 直到其下个回合结束。这可能会迫使该生物进行一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:11] 以 目标 虚假塔拉斯克。在触发的动作之后，虚假塔拉斯克的泰坦变形结束。

Trigger A creature makes a hostile action against the false tarrasque while its Titanic Transformation is active.

Effect Before the triggering action is resolved, the false tarrasque becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} until the end of its next turn. This might force the creature to make a @Check[type:flat|dc:11] to target the false tarrasque. After the triggering action, the false tarrasque's Titanic Transformation ends.

Illusory Attack.name: 幻象攻击 Illusory Attack
Illusory Attack.description:
伪塔拉斯克制造一次巨大的幻觉攻击，其外观可呈现为任何伤害类型。在其正常形态下，幻觉攻击影响一个@Template[type:cone|distance:10]，但当泰坦变形激活时，幻觉攻击可以影响一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]、一个@Template[type:line|distance:60]，或一个射程为90英尺的@Template[type:burst|distance:10]。无论其影响的区域或其拟态的伤害类型为何，幻觉攻击造成@Damage[1d8[mental]]伤害（@Check[type:will|dc:14|basic:true]豁免）。一名大成功的生物，或一名具有应适用于表观伤害类型的抗力、免疫或弱点的生物，会识别出幻觉攻击实际上是幻觉。该生物获得对抗幻觉攻击的豁免掷骰+2环境加值。

The false tarrasque creates a colossal illusory attack, which can appear as any damage type. In its normal form, Illusory Attack affects a @Template[type:cone|distance:10], but while Titanic Transformation is active, Illusory Attack can affect a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], a @Template[type:line|distance:60], or a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] with a range of 90 feet. Regardless of the area affected or the damage type it mimics, Illusory Attack deals @Damage[1d8[mental]] damage (@Check[type:will|dc:14|basic:true] save). A creature that critically succeeds, or a creature with a resistance, immunity, or vulnerability that should apply to the apparent damage type, recognizes that the Illusory Attack is actually an illusion. Such a creature gains a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against Illusory Attack.

Titanic Transformation.name: 泰坦变形 Titanic Transformation
Titanic Transformation.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 假塔拉斯克化作其所选择的某种怪物般外貌，其体型变为超巨型。变形期间，它的所有攻击获得10英尺触及，但其其他数据不变。此变形持续1天。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.45SDAnjScoPxMwGi]{Effect: Titanic Transformation}

Frequency Once per day

Effect The false tarrasque assumes a monstrous appearance of its choice and its size becomes Gargantuan. All of its attacks gain a 10 foot reach while transformed but its statistics are otherwise unchanged. The transformation lasts for 1 day.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.45SDAnjScoPxMwGi]{Effect: Titanic Transformation}

False Tarrasque.publicNotes:
与其名字相反，伪塔拉斯克并不一定会呈现为塔拉斯克的样子。塔拉斯克不过是它们最臭名昭著的伪装，因为伪塔拉斯克可以随心所欲地采取任何泰坦般的形态。伪塔拉斯克的智力或许更偏原始而非学者式，但它们对世界上最可怖的怪物却了解得出奇之多，并以此来塑造自己的伪装，花费时间学习在特定区域里最适合采取的形态。更年轻、经验更少的伪塔拉斯克通常会变成它们见过的普通动物的骇人巨型版本，例如蜘蛛、蛇或狼；而更年长者则偏好要么是普遍令人畏惧的生物（如远古巨龙或泰坦魔像），要么是当地特定民俗中所恐惧的生物。

最初的伪塔拉斯克原本采取的是喋喋怪的外形。它们的力量由一位妖精领主赐予；她用它们来捉弄她的竞争对手：把它们偷偷带进对方的舞会与典礼中，让它们显露泰坦形态来惊吓在场所有人。她曾六次成功完成这项恶作剧；而在第七次时，她安排传送来了一只真正的喋喋怪。当她的对手原以为又只是一次无害的幻影时，真正野兽的利爪对其庄园造成的彻底毁灭，以及对在场所有人的大规模屠戮，被幸存者视为既是精妙的政治手段，也是令人捧腹的恶作剧。

嘿，那可不是塔拉斯克

伪塔拉斯克的伪装有许多破绽，其中最明显的一点是：尽管它体型巨大，虚假的影像却常常显得过小。目光敏锐者也可能注意到，火元素的火焰并不会点燃任何东西，或塔拉斯克投掷的棘刺在命中后便会消失。伪塔拉斯克无法说话这一点，也会暴露它对巨龙等更精密生物的任何伪装。不过即便如此，大多数人在惊恐逃命时都没有时间去注意这些细微之处。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 3.5/7/13 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（光、中型）、技能 物品（欺瞒、威吓、学识［传奇怪物］、表演）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、魅力、敏捷、elongating、energy resistant（positive）、mental、wild

Despite their name, false tarrasques do not necessarily take the form of tarrasques. The tarrasque is merely their most infamous disguise, since a false tarrasque can take any titanic form they wish. False tarrasques' intelligence may be more primal than scholarly, but they know a surprising amount of information about the most fearsome monsters of the world and use this to shape their disguises, taking the time to learn the best form to take in a given area. Younger and less experienced false tarrasques typically become monstrously large versions of ordinary animals they've seen, such as spiders, snakes, or wolves, while older ones favor either universally feared creatures like ancient dragons or titanic golems or creatures feared in the specific folklore of the region.

The first false tarrasques originally took the shape of jabberwocks. They were granted their powers by a fey lord, who used them to prank her rival by sneaking them into his balls and ceremonies to have them assume their titanic form and terrify all present. She successfully pulled off this prank on six occasions, and on the seventh, she arranged for an actual jabberwock to be teleported in. The utter destruction of her rival's estate and the widescale butchery of all present at the claws of a true beast when her rival expected yet another harmless figment was viewed as both a brilliant political move and a hilarious prank by the survivors.

Hey, That's Not A Tarrasque

A false tarrasque has numerous tells in its disguise, the most obvious being that despite its size, the false image is often too small. Keen eyes may also note that the fire elemental's flames set nothing alight or the tarrasque's hurled spines vanish after impact. A false tarrasque's inability to speak also betrays any disguise of more sophisticated creatures like dragons. But even so, most people don't have time to notice these small details while they're running away in terror.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Deception, Intimidation, Lore [Legendary Monster], Performance)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), mental, wild

Eye Stalker.name: 眼之潜行者 Eye Stalker

Extract Eyes.name: 挖出眼睛 Extract Eyes
Extract Eyes.description:
眼茎潜行者尝试一次运动检定，对抗该生物的强韧DC。成功时，它从眼眶中拔出该生物的一只眼睛（其视神经仍以魔法维持功能），并造成[[/r (2d4+8)[piercing]]]伤害。大成功或大失败时，它拔出双眼并造成双倍伤害。失去所有眼睛的生物处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{目盲}，直到它取回一只或更多眼睛为止。生物可以取回被盗的眼睛，并以一个交互动作将其放回空眼眶。只要在眼睛仍然有效时这么做（通常是在被盗后1周内），这会立刻将其眼睛重新接回并恢复其视野。传说中，有些生物被迫用另一名被眼茎潜行者劫掠的生物的眼睛来替换自己缺失的眼睛，从而暂时或永久获得不寻常的感官。是否可行由GM酌情决定。

The eye stalker attempts an Athletics check against the creature's Fortitude DC. On a success, it deals [[/r (2d4+8)[piercing]]] damage as it extracts one of the creature's eyes, with the optic nerves still magically functional, from its socket. On a critical success, it extracts both eyes and deals double damage. A creature with all its eyes stolen is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} until it recovers one or more of eyes. A creature can retrieve the stolen eyes and return them to its empty socket with an Interact action. As long as they do so while the eyes last (typically within 1 week of being stolen), this instantly reattaches their eyes and restores their vision. Stories tell of creatures forced to replace their missing eyes with those from another creature robbed by an eye stalker, granting them unusual senses temporarily or permanently. This might be possible at the GM's discretion.

Steal Sight.name: 窃取视野 Steal Sight
Steal Sight.description:
需求 眼柄潜行者使用“抽取眼球”至少偷取了两只眼睛

效果 眼柄潜行者将偷来的眼睛放入其空洞的眼眶中。它获得精确视野，以及它所偷取眼睛的那名生物的其他视觉感官（包括黑暗视觉），并获得15点临时HP。偷来的眼睛通常会维持约1周，但如果某个效果将会给予眼柄潜行者@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{目盲（状态）}状态，那么该效果会改为把它偷来的眼睛弹出，移除其所有剩余的临时HP（若有），因为这些眼睛会从眼柄潜行者的眼眶中掉落。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.XCm5N5Uwn0qD0SMX]{效果：偷取视力}

Requirements The eye stalker has stolen at least two eyes using Extract Eyes

Effect The eye stalker puts the stolen eyes in its empty sockets. It gains precise vision, as well as other visual senses from the creature whose eyes it stole (including darkvision), and it gains 15 temporary HP. The stolen eyes typically last for roughly 1 week, but if an effect would give the eye stalker the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} condition, that effect pops out their stolen eyes instead, removing any remaining temporary HP, if any as they fall from the eye stalker's sockets.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.XCm5N5Uwn0qD0SMX]{Effect: Steal Sight}

Pack Hunters.name: 群猎者 Pack Hunters
Pack Hunters.description:
一名眼柄者的打击对至少两名盟友触及范围内的生物造成额外 1d6 伤害。

An eye stalker's Strikes deal an extra 1d6 damage to creatures within reach of at least two allies.

Eye Stalker.publicNotes:
在海岸薄雾中徘徊的可憎异怪，“眼柄怪”是游荡酒鬼与海边营地的天敌。眼柄怪身形高大而细长，皮肤呈带绿的蜡黄色，面容憔悴，纠结的黑色长发一直垂到脚边；它们有着巨大的、如爪般的手，行走时拖在身后，面孔空洞无眼。对一些人来说，它们可能会被误认为是更高大的类人生物；但对那些能穿过油腻发绺、看见其下方空洞张开的眼眶的人而言，它们是迫在眉睫的死亡先兆。

眼柄怪通常无法视物，因为它们的头骨里只有空空的眼眶。这使它们依赖声音来寻找并狩猎猎物。它们没有外耳；相反，所有与听觉相关的器官都在体内，头部两侧只有一小簇孔洞。即便如此，眼柄怪在聆听猎物方面的能力仍极其出众。

正如其名所示，眼柄怪主要通过偷取并使用受害者的眼睛来获得短暂的视力：它们会剜出受害者的双眼，将其植入自己空洞的眼眶之中。那些成功证明自己、夺得受害者眼睛的眼柄怪，常被选为附近其他眼柄怪的首领，因为它们的成功表明其有能力压制猎物。眼柄怪通常会一直使用一对偷来的眼睛，直到它们腐烂到无法发挥作用；随后，它会取出烂眼，开始寻找新的眼睛。

眼柄怪巢穴

据说眼柄怪会在海边洞穴或岩石丛中“筑巢”：它们将细长的身躯折叠成紧紧蜷缩的球状，彼此挤作一团，呈现出某种明显的冬眠状态。尽管它们会在海岸游荡，但若区域内没有雾或薄雾，眼柄怪便不会外出。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（Athletics、Stealth）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、智力、力量、wild

Horrific aberrations that walk through the coastal mists, eye stalkers are the enemies of wandering drunkards and seaside encampments. Eye stalkers are tall, elongated creatures with greenish sallow skin, an emaciated visage, matted dark hair that falls to their feet, large claw-like hands that drag behind them as they walk, and empty, eyeless faces. To some, they might be mistaken for another taller humanoid, but to those who look beyond their greasy locks into the empty, gaping eye sockets beneath, they are a terrifying harbinger of imminent death.

Eye Stalkers normally can't see, as they have empty eye sockets set within their skulls. This makes them dependent on sound to find and hunt for their prey. They don't have external ears. Instead, all of their organs related to hearing are internal, with only a small cluster of holes on either side of their head. Despite this, eye stalkers are incredibly gifted in their ability to hear their prey.

As their name suggests, eye stalkers primarily steal and use the eyes of their victims to gain temporary sight, gouging out a victim's eyes and implanting them within their own empty sockets. Eye Stalkers who manage to prove themselves by stealing a victim's eyes are often chosen to lead other eye stalkers nearby, as their success indicates that they are capable of overcoming their prey. An eye stalker typically uses up a set of stolen eyes until the point where they are too decomposed to function. They then remove the rotted eyes and begin to search for a new pair.

Eye Stalker Nests

Eye stalkers are known to 'nest' among seaside caves or rock clusters, folding their elongated bodies into tightly packed balls and huddling alongside one another in some kind of apparent hibernation. Though they roam seasides, eye stalkers don't venture out without the presence of fog or mist within the area.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), evil, intelligence, strength, wild

Extra Toe.name: 额外脚趾 Extra Toe

Defense Spray.name: 防御喷射 Defense Spray
Defense Spray.description:
触发 因某个生物的动作，一个额外脚趾变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{受擒}

效果 该额外脚趾喷出一股恶臭气体，旨在削弱触发生物对它的抓握并尝试迅速爬走。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:15] 豁免，以继续抓住该额外脚趾。

成功 擒抱该额外脚趾的生物能够继续抓住它。

失败 该额外脚趾从生物的掌握中跳脱，摆脱受擒状态。

大失败 同失败，且擒抱者变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 1}。

Trigger An extra toe becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} due to a creature's actions

Effect The extra toe emits a spray of foul smelling gas in order to weaken the triggering creature's hold on it and attempt to scuttle away. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:15] save to hang onto the extra toe.

Success The grabbing creature is able to retain their hold on the extra toe.

Failure The extra toe leaps out of the creature's grasp, escaping the grabbed condition.

Critical Failure As failure, and the grabbing creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Attach.name: 附加 Attach
Attach.description:
当一根额外脚趾用颚部命中一名比自身更大的类人生物，且该生物有脚时，这根额外脚趾会像一根额外的天然脚趾一样附着在该生物身上，并释放麻醉剂，使该生物不会察觉到啃咬或附着。这类似于@Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{擒抱}该生物，但额外脚趾会随着该生物移动，而不是将其固定在原地。额外脚趾在附着期间处于措手不及。若额外脚趾在附着于某生物时被杀死或被推开，则该生物会受到1点持续流血伤害。逃脱附着或以其他方式移除额外脚趾不会造成流血伤害。

When a extra toe hits a humanoid creature larger than itself with its jaws, and that creature has a foot, the extra toe attaches itself to that creature like an additional natural toe, releasing an anesthetic such that the creature doesn't notice the bite or attachment. This is similar to @Compendium[pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{Grabbing} the creature, but the extra toe moves with that creature rather than holding it in place. The extra toe is flat- footed while attached. If the extra toe is killed or pushed away while attached to a creature, that creature takes 1 persistent bleed damage. Escaping the attach or removing the extra toe in other ways doesn't cause bleed damage.

Extra Toe Eggs.name: 额外脚趾卵 Extra Toe Eggs
Extra Toe Eggs.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

潜伏期 2 weeks

阶段 1 多余脚趾的幼虫挣脱而出，造成 [[/r 1d4 #damage]]{1d4 伤害}，但麻醉会使受折磨的生物无法感觉到疼痛。

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

Onset 2 weeks

Stage 1 The extra toe larvae break free, causing [[/r 1d4 #damage]]{1d4 damage}, though the anesthesia prevents the afflicted creature from feeling the pain.

Spawn.name: 衍体 Spawn
Spawn.description:
需求 额外脚趾附着在一个生物上

效果 额外脚趾在其宿主的脚内产下无数卵，使所附着的生物暴露于额外脚趾卵之中，因为其幼虫试图在脚内生长。

Requirements The extra toe is attached to a creature

Effect The extra toe lays countless eggs within its host's foot, exposing the attached creature to extra toe eggs, as its larvae seek to grow within the foot.

Extra Toe.publicNotes:
额外脚趾是一种小型、肉质的、外形类似毛虫的生物；这种小昆虫已经适应成看起来像类人生物的脚趾。当地类人生物走得太靠近额外脚趾的巢穴时，该生物会尝试用小钳子抓住对方的脚，并注入一种使皮肉麻木的毒素。一旦成功，它便将头深深钻入类人生物的脚中，开始吸食新宿主的血液。

乍一看，宿主很容易把额外脚趾误认为是自己的一根脚趾；额外脚趾会一直保持这个位置，直到宿主终于注意到并移除寄生虫，或直到它能够产卵为止。

如果额外脚趾能够产卵，卵会在两周后孵化；幼虫会扭动着从宿主的脚里钻出来，并开始寻找自己的宿主以重复这一过程。

从宿主脚中破体而出的过程会在脚上留下一个小伤口；但就像完全成熟的额外脚趾一样，幼虫会向脚注入毒液以麻木该区域，宿主可能直到数小时后才会注意到伤口。伤口很小且没有并发症，会在一两天内自然治疗。

如果宿主发现了额外脚趾并试图把它揪下来，额外脚趾能够喷射一种气味，灼烧受害者的眼睛、口腔与鼻子。喷雾会使受害者因疼痛而剧烈抽动，希望借此让其松开对额外脚趾的抓握，并给寄生虫逃脱的机会。若受到攻击，额外脚趾会迅速冲向最近的灌木丛并试图躲藏到看不见的地方。

医生讨厌的这一招

有些类人生物会自愿寄生一只或多只额外脚趾，把这种寄生虫令人作呕的生命周期当作换取其益处的可接受代价。其反对者没有提到的一点是：当宿主真脚趾上的趾甲长得太长时，额外脚趾能够用感官察觉到。它会在宿主睡觉时脱离，并用牙齿把趾甲修短，从而避免任何可能引起注意、让人发现它存在的保养行为。另一个优势则适用于那些天生缺少一根脚趾或因意外而失去脚趾的人。完整的一套脚趾对平衡与敏捷很重要，而额外脚趾是一种便宜又容易的替代品！

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 1.5/3.5/6.5 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型、中型），技能物品（潜行、生存）

可用灌注属性 祸根，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），野性

A small, fleshy, caterpillar-like creature, the extra toe is a small insect that has adapted to look like a humanoid toe. When a humanoid walks too close to the nest of an extra toe, the creature attempts to grab their foot with small pincers, injecting a toxin that numbs the flesh. Upon success, the creature then buries its head deep into the humanoid's foot and begins to feed on the blood of its new host.

At a quick glance, the host can easily mistake the extra toe for one of the host's own toes, and the extra toe remains in this position until the host finally notices and removes the parasite, or until it is able to lay its eggs.

If an extra toe is able to lay eggs, they hatch after two weeks, and the larvae squirm their way out of the host's foot and begin their quest to find their own hosts to repeat the process.

The process of bursting forth from the host's foot leaves a small wound on the foot, but just like the fully grown extra toe, the larvae inject the foot with venom to numb the area, and the host might not notice the wound until several hours later. The wound is small and without complications, healing up naturally after a day or two.

In case the host discovers the extra toe and attempts to pluck it off, the extra toe is capable of spraying a scent that burns the eyes, mouth, and nose of the victim. The spray causes the victim to jerk violently from the pain, hopefully losing their grip on the extra toe and giving the parasite the opportunity to escape. If attacked, an extra toe makes haste for the nearest undergrowth and tries to hide out of sight.

Doctors Hate This One Trick

Some humanoids voluntarily host one or more extra toes, accepting the parasite's disgusting lifecycle as an acceptable trade-off for its benefits. One detail its detractors fail to mention is that the extra toe senses when toenails on its host's real toes grow too long. It detaches while the host is sleeping and trims the nails back with its teeth, forestalling any maintenance that could draw attention to its presence. Another advantage is for those who may be missing a toe at birth or due to an accident. A complete set of toes is important for balance and agility, and an extra toe is a cheap and easy replacement!

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 1.5/3.5/6.5 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), wild

Zweiblade Guardian.name: 双刃守卫 Zweiblade Guardian

Twin Body.name: 双生之躯 Twin Body
Twin Body.description:
当双刃守护者的构装护甲被破坏时，它的身体从中间裂开，每一半都保留一对腿但只有一只手臂。处于此形态时，守护者占据两个不同的空间；每一半都是一个中型生物。两半共享一组生命值与每回合的动作池，也共享它们的多重攻击减值。双刃守护者在分裂时处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened 1}，并且可以使用额外的动作来疾行、踏步或打击。若两半都必须针对同一效果进行豁免，它掷骰两次豁免并使用更差的结果。若两半都因同一效果受到伤害，它们只承受一次伤害；如果伤害数值不相同，则取较高者。分裂守护者的两半无法长时间相距过远。若两半分离超过60尺并持续超过1分钟，其中一半（随机决定）会永久失去其驱动火花，而剩下的一半仍保持活跃。

When a zweiblade guardian's construct armor is broken, its body splits down the middle, with each half left with a pair of legs but only one arm. In this form, the guardian has two different spaces; each half is a Medium creature. The two halves share a pool of Hit Points and actions per turn, as well as their multiple attack penalty. The zweiblade guardian is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened 1} when split, and can use the extra action to Stride, Step, or Strike. If both halves have to save against the same effect, it rolls the save twice and uses the worse result. If both halves take damage from the same effect, they take damage only once, taking the greater amount if the damage isn't the same. The two halves of a split guardian can't stay far apart for long. If the two halves remain separated by over 60 feet for more than 1 minute, one half (randomly determined) permanently loses its animating spark, and the remaining half remains active.

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Construct Armor (Hardness 10).name: 构装护甲（硬度 10） Construct Armor (Hardness 10)
Construct Armor (Hardness 10).description:
与普通物体一样，双刃守卫拥有硬度。该硬度使守卫所受的任何伤害减少等同于该硬度的数值。一旦双刃守卫的生命值降至其一半以下，或在被大成功的攻击造成伤害时立即，其构装护甲便会破裂，移除硬度并将其护甲等级降低至26。

Like normal objects, a zweiblade guardian has Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage the guardian takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once a zweiblade guardian is reduced to fewer than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks, removing the Hardness and reducing its Armor Class to 26.

Double Slice.name: 双重斩击 Double Slice
Double Slice.description:
需求 双刃守卫者的构装护甲未破损

效果 双刃守卫者以双刃猛击其敌人。它进行两次打击，每把石刃各一次，每次都使用其当前的多重攻击减值。两次打击必须拥有相同的目标。若两次攻击均命中，合并其伤害，然后再加入两把武器各自适用的其他效果。精准伤害只加一次，由你选择加在哪一次攻击上。合并两次打击的伤害，并且只结算一次抗力与弱点。此举在计算其多重攻击减值时视为两次攻击。

Requirements The zweiblade guardian's construct armor isn't broken

Effect The zweiblade guardian lashes out at its foe with both blades. It makes two Strikes, one with each of its stone blades, each using its current multiple attack penalty. Both Strikes must have the same target. If both attacks hit, combine their damage, and then add any other applicable effects from both weapons. Add any precision damage only once, to the attack of your choice. Combine the damage from both Strikes and apply resistances and weaknesses only once. This counts as two attacks when calculating its multiple attack penalty.

Zweiblade Guardian.publicNotes:
为防御一个或多个入侵者而制造的双刃守卫者，是强大、威严的构装体，必要时能够分裂为两个。它们致命的旋转刀刃足以斩倒孤身的敌人，而其坚韧的外壳使它们免受大多数严重伤害。

面对这些构装体时真正让人感到恐惧的，是当它们受到足够的伤害，或一次幸运的命中击碎了它们的防护外骨骼时。在外层不再将内部束缚在一起后，双刃守卫者便能以全速移动，其构造的真相也随之揭示：一簇赋能火花操控着两具独立的身体。

守卫者会充分利用这份新获得的二元性，立刻转入夹击战术，或将注意力分配到多个优先目标上。尽管每一半都只有一条手臂，但这些手臂的力量已足以让分裂后的守卫者成为危险的敌人。然而，分裂后所需的昂贵修复使双刃守卫者相对不受欢迎，主要只为富有的怪人所保留。

每个故事都有两面

双刃守卫者的发明者宣称以狐人作为灵感，引用其一体双形态。由于缺乏其他著名造物，关于这位发明者所知甚少，因此有人推测他们是个江湖骗子，借此掩盖粗制滥造的结构缺陷——这种缺陷会导致他们的常规构装体经常一分为二。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 90/200/360 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（重型）、盾牌、技能物品（特技动作、运动、威吓）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（负能量、正能量）、尖刺、坚固、投掷、野性

Created to defend against one or many intruders, zweiblade guardians are powerful, imposing constructs that can split apart into two when necessary. Their deadly whirling blades are capable of cutting down solitary foes, and their resilient outer shell inures them from most serious harm.

The true terror one feels when facing these constructs comes when they take enough damage, or when a lucky hit shatters their protective exoskeletons. Without the outer layer binding the interior together, the zweiblade guardian is free to move at full speed, and the truth of its construction is revealed: one animating spark controls two separate bodies.

The guardians take full advantage of their newfound duality, immediately transitioning to flanking tactics or dividing their attention between priority targets. Though each half only has one arm, those arms are more than powerful enough to make a split guardian a dangerous foe. However, the expensive repairs necessary after a split make zweiblade guardians a relatively unpopular choice, reserved primarily for rich eccentrics.

Two Sides To Every Story

The zweiblade guardian's inventor claimed the kitsune as inspiration, citing their two forms within one body. Little else is known about the inventor due to a lack of other notable creations, leading to speculation that they were a charlatan covering for shoddy construction that caused their regular constructs to split in two.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (heavy), shield, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative, positive), spiked, sturdy, throwing, wild

Euphoria Ooze.name: 欣快软泥怪 Euphoria Ooze

Motion Sense 60 feet.name: 运动感官 60英尺 Motion Sense 60 feet
Motion Sense 60 feet.description:
欣快软泥怪可以通过振动以及空气或水的移动来感知附近的生物。

An euphoria ooze can sense nearby creatures through vibration and air or water movement.

Euphoric Vapors.name: 欣快蒸汽 Euphoric Vapors
Euphoric Vapors.description:
15英尺。进入该灵光或在其中开始其回合的生物必须在一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21] 豁免中成功，否则将变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 1} 和 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{愚钝 1}，持续1分钟。成功时，该生物获得持续1分钟的暂时免疫。

15 feet. A creature that enters the aura or begins its turn there must succeed a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute. On a success, the creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Sizzling Slime.name: 滋滋作响的黏液怪 Sizzling Slime
Sizzling Slime.description:
每当欣快软泥受到火焰伤害时，它的欣快蒸汽灵光半径增加到30尺。它失去对钝击伤害的免疫。灵光内的所有事物，包括欣快软泥，都因烟雾而处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed}，且烟雾外的所有生物对烟雾内的生物而言处于隐蔽。这些效果均持续1分钟。

Whenever the euphoria ooze takes fire damage, the radius of its euphoric vapors aura increases to 30 feet. It loses its immunity to bludgeoning damage. Everything within the aura, including the euphoria ooze, is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} by smoke, and all creatures outside the smoke are concealed to creatures within it. These effects all last for 1 minute.

Elastic Bounce.name: 弹性反弹 Elastic Bounce
Elastic Bounce.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 欣快泥怪的上一个动作是成功的假足打击或成功的@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{推撞}，或欣快泥怪在距离墙壁5尺以内

效果 软泥从墙壁或它击中或推开的生物身上弹开。它疾走两次。若它在移动结束时处于至少一名敌人的近战触及范围内，它可以对该敌人进行一次近战打击。

Frequency Once per round

Requirements The euphoria ooze's last action was a successful pseudopod Strike or a successful @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove}, or the euphoria ooze is within 5 feet of a wall

Effect The ooze bounces off either a wall or the creature it hit or pushed. It Strides twice. If it ends its movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, it can make a melee Strike against that enemy.

Euphoria Ooze.publicNotes:
附魔师成功实验的产物，欣快软泥会释放一种令人上瘾的气体，为吸入者带来无与伦比的快乐。该实验被证明利润丰厚，很快便生产出更多同类，并被圈养以提取这种药物。有些软泥不可避免地逃脱，凭借其非同寻常的弹性与压倒性的灵光，从囚笼中溜走。

尽管没有心智，欣快软泥对魔法却有着特殊的亲和力。这会使它们在魔法环境周围安家，并在可能时寻找施法者。反过来，精明的冒险者常常踏上欠考虑的旅程去捕捉并收割这些生物，低估了其烟雾的威力。这类行动往往以冒险者在战斗中因蒸气而坠落，或屈服于其成瘾性而告终。

欣快软泥看起来、摸起来都比多数同类更为坚实且富有橡胶感。事实上，它们身体分泌的少量油脂在最微弱的火花下都会滋滋作响并蒸发成黑色烟雾，在短暂时间内保护它，同时也抑制其弹性能力。

这可是个好帮手

附魔师后来发现的一个意外用途，是欣快软泥保存食物的能力。由于它被创造出来以便于低维护，软泥无需进食也能生存。相反，它利用空气、水与光来合成其生物需求。这意味着它缺乏其他软泥用来消化物质的酸。取而代之的是，它的身体提供气密储存空间，并分泌起到防腐剂作用的油脂。把旅行口粮或剩菜塞进它体内，它们将能安全可食地保存数年！

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 12/27/50 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（运动）

可用灌注属性 破敌，能量抗性（正能量），加固，正能量，狂野

The result of an enchanter's successful experiment, euphoria ooze emits an addictive gas that brings unparalleled happiness to those who inhale it. The experiment proved lucrative, and soon more of its kind were produced and farmed for the drug. Some inevitably escaped, using their unusual elasticity and overpowering aura to slip through their confines.

Though mindless, euphoria oozes possess a particular affinity for magic. This causes them to settle around magical environments and seek out spellcasters when they can. In turn, enterprising adventurers often embark on ill-advised journeys to catch and harvest these creatures, underestimating the potency of their fumes. These ventures frequently end with the adventurers falling in battle to the vapors or succumbing to their addiction.

Euphoria oozes appear and feel more solid and rubbery than most others of their kind. In fact, the minimal oil their body excretes sizzles and evaporates into dark smoke at the slightest spark, protecting it while dampening its elastic abilities for a brief time.

It's A Keeper

An unanticipated function that enchanters later discovered is the euphoria ooze's ability to preserve food. Since it was created to be low-maintenance, the ooze does not need to eat to survive. Instead, it synthesizes its biological requirements using air, water, and light. That means it lacks the acid other oozes use to digest matter. Instead, its body provides airtight storage and oils that act as preservatives. Stick travel rations or leftovers inside its body, and they will remain safe to eat for years!

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 12/27/50 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, energy resistant (positive), fortification, positive, wild

Erygloid.name: 埃里格洛伊德 Erygloid

Magic Sense.name: 魔法感官 Magic Sense
Magic Sense.description:
一只艾瑞格洛伊德会持续感知附近的魔法物体，其效果如同4级的侦测魔法，并能感知携带此类物体者的动作。

An erygloid continuously senses nearby magical objects, with the effects of 4th-level detect magic, and the motions of those carrying such objects.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的所有豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Magic Acid.name: 魔法 酸 Magic Acid
Magic Acid.description:
艾瑞格罗伊德的身体覆盖着一种魔法酸液，会腐蚀活生物，但在消化魔法方面更为高效。在一次成功的多齿触须打击时，或当一个生物在对抗【缠勒】的豁免中失败时，艾瑞格罗伊德会额外造成1d6酸性伤害，并尝试以反制调整值[[/r 1d20+10 #Counteract]]{+10}与反制等级2，反制一个影响目标的法术，或目标的一件魔法物品。成功时，艾瑞格罗伊德会终止该法术，或使该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的凡俗物品；这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若所选物品为神器或类似物品，则该反制检定自动失败。奇怪的是，艾瑞格罗伊德的魔法酸液不会影响几种常见的凡俗材料，尤其包括牙齿、玻璃、石头与金属，这会导致这些材料的碎片在艾瑞格罗伊德体内累积。

An erygloid's body is covered in a magical acid that eats away at living creatures but is more efficient at digesting magic. On a successful toothy tendril Strike or when a creature fails its save against Constrict, the erygloid deals 1d6 additional acid damage and attempts to counteract one spell affecting the target, or one of the target's magic items, with a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+10 #Counteract]]{+10} and a counteract level of 2. On a success, the erygloid ends the spell or causes the item to become a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes; this doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the chosen item is an artifact or similar item, the counteract check automatically fails. Strangely, an erygloid's magic acid doesn't affect several common mundane materials, specifically including teeth, glass, stone, and metal, which causes shards of these materials to accumulate inside an erygloid's body.

Constrict.name: 绞缠 Constrict
Constrict.description:
[[/r (1d6+3)[bludgeoning]]] 加上 魔法 酸，@Check[type:fortitude|dc:|basic:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

[[/r (1d6+3)[bludgeoning]]] plus Magic Acid, @Check[type:fortitude|dc:|basic:true]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

Erygloid.publicNotes:
艾瑞格洛伊德是一种令人难以置信且可怕的后果，源自原初、奥术与异界魔法的交织：它们呈现为翻滚的黏污团块与牙齿状的碎片，且常常会掺入真正的牙齿。艾瑞格洛伊德会吞噬魔法，并对某些特定的魔法与材料有偏好、对另一些则厌恶。由于这些亲和性，艾瑞格洛伊德偶尔会被发现堵塞机关，并在魔法工坊与地城中制造混沌，吸吮当地的地脉线或魔法源泉。

尽管无人能确定，关于艾瑞格洛伊德的起源仍有数种理论。有些学者声称，当妖精因魔法匮乏而死亡时，会留下带着其牙齿的液态池，而这些残余能量的水洼会寻找并吸收魔法。另一些学者则坚称艾瑞格洛伊德起源于奥术或炼金术，尽管大多数法师都会觉得艾瑞格洛伊德是个麻烦。还有学者认为，艾瑞格洛伊德是强大的妖精领主为消除魔法事故而创造的。在某些社群中，甚至流行更离奇的理论，例如基于行星际会合与妖精魔法结合的外星起源。不论真相如何，艾瑞格洛伊德既不知道也不在乎自身起源的真相，因为那对它们的生活毫无影响。

艾瑞格洛伊德通常并非会去狩猎活生物的捕食者，因为它们从魔法而非血肉中汲取养分。然而，艾瑞格洛伊德倾向于囤积可供吞噬的魔法源，例如魔法物品；当冒险者扰动这些物品时，这团软泥便会不可避免地从藏身处现身，暴力地保护它的餐食。

施法者通常厌恶艾瑞格洛伊德，因为这些妖精软泥往往会吞噬施法者珍视的魔法能量；但一些古怪的法师却欣赏被捕获的艾瑞格洛伊德，把它当作过滤不想要的魔法效果、或为用来惹恼宿敌的陷阱供能的手段。憎恨魔法或有理由担心遭到施法者袭击的人，有时会雇用艾瑞格洛伊德充当保镖，用寄望城它们能吃到美味的魔法点心来引诱它们。

带着目的渗流

当艾瑞格洛伊德在足够数量时聚集，例如在地脉线附近或奥术机构的墙壁之中，它们就会成为一个艾瑞格洛伊德群落。群落使它们能够合并感官，将它们的魔法感官射程扩展到数百尺甚至数里，具体取决于群落所覆盖的区域。一旦个体从群落中分离，它就会失去这种增强的感官，但这种能力让艾瑞格洛伊德能够找到新的地点去探索。艾瑞格洛伊德也会受益于彼此的经历，从而提升它们的智力。有些群落甚至学会说简单的词语。这类把戏能说服生物将魔法物品赠与墙内的声音，以安抚它们。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 酸蚀、克星、体质、能量抗性（酸蚀、正能量）、加固、镜像、力量、狂野

Erygloids are a mind-boggling and dire consequence of the combination of primal, arcane, and occult magic, forming blobs of rolling gunk and teeth-like shards that often incorporate real teeth. Erygloids consume magic, and they have tastes for specific magic and materials and aversions to others. Because of these affinities, erygloids can occasionally be found plugging up mechanisms and causing chaos in magical workshops and dungeons, sucking on local ley lines or sources of magic.

While no one knows for certain, there are several theories about the origins of erygloids. Some scholars claim that when fey die due to a deficiency of magic, they leave behind a liquid pool with their teeth, and those pools of residual energy seek out magic to absorb. Other scholars argue adamantly for an arcane or alchemical origin for erygloids, despite the fact that most mages would find an erygloid a nuisance. Still other scholars believe erygloids were created by powerful fey lords to eliminate magical accidents. In some communities, even more outlandish theories prevail, such as an extraplanetary origin based on a combination of interplanetary conjunction and faerie magic. Whatever the case, erygloids don't know or care about the truth of their own origin, as it has no effect on their lives.

Erygloids aren't usually predators who hunt down living creatures, since they derive nourishment from magic, not flesh. However, erygloids tend to hoard sources of magic to devour, such as magic items, and when adventurers disturb the items, the ooze inevitably emerges from hiding to violently protect its meal.

While spellcasters generally loathe erygloids due to the fey oozes' tendency to consume the magical energy spellcasters cherish, some eccentric mages appreciate a captured erygloid as a means to filter out undesired magical effects or to power traps meant to annoy rivals. Those who hate magic or have reason to worry about an assault by spellcasters sometimes employ erygloids as bodyguards, luring them with the promise of tasty magic treats.

Oozing With Purpose

When erygloids gather in sufficient numbers, such as near ley lines or in the walls of arcane institutions, they become an erygloid colony. A colony allows them to combine their senses, expanding the range of their magic sense to hundreds of feet or even miles, depending on the area the colony covers. Once an individual separates from the colony, it loses its heightened senses, but this ability enables erygloids to find new places to explore. Erygloids also benefit from each other's experiences, improving their intelligence. Some colonies even learn to speak basic words. Such tricks can convince creatures to gift magic items to the voices in the walls in order to placate them.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, energy resistant (acid, positive), fortification, mirrored, strength, wild
Erygloid.allSaves: +2 status bonus to all vs. magic

Emperor Shark Penguin.name: 鲨鱼企鹅皇帝 Emperor Shark Penguin
Emperor Shark Penguin.tokenName: 鲨鱼企鹅皇帝 Emperor Shark Penguin

Deadly Duo.name: 致命二人组 Deadly Duo
Deadly Duo.description:
触发 另一只帝王鲨企鹅对位于这只帝王鲨企鹅触及内的敌人以颚部打击成功

效果 这只帝王鲨企鹅对同一名敌人进行一次颚部打击。每次触发的颚部打击只能有一只帝王鲨企鹅使用“致命二重奏”，且以“致命二重奏”作出的颚部打击不能触发任何其他帝王鲨企鹅的“致命二重奏”反应动作（）。

Trigger Another emperor shark penguin succeeds on a jaws Strike against an enemy within this emperor shark penguin's reach

Effect The emperor shark penguin makes a jaws Strike against the same enemy. Only one emperor shark penguin can use Deadly Duo from a single triggering jaws Strike, and the jaws Strike made with Deadly Duo can't trigger any additional emperor shark penguins' Deadly Duo reactions.

Haul Out.name: 拖上岸 Haul Out
Haul Out.description:
需求 帝王鲨企鹅在水中，且距离一处坚实的冰面30尺以内

效果 以骇人的优雅与速度从海中转入陆地，帝王鲨企鹅游泳至水边，攀爬到冰面上，并疾走至多两次。在这些疾走期间，帝王鲨企鹅处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{倒地}。在其移动结束时，帝王鲨企鹅可以起身。

Requirements The emperor shark penguin is in water within 30 feet of a solid icy surface

Effect Transitioning from sea to land with terrifying grace and speed, the emperor shark penguin Swims to the water's edge, Climbs onto the ice, and Strides up to twice. During these Strides, the emperor shark penguin is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}. At the conclusion of its movement, the emperor shark penguin can Stand.

Emperor Shark Penguin.publicNotes:
尽管这个名字来自那些在看到它们一排排锋利的三角形剃刀般牙齿时会瑟瑟发抖的猎人，帝王鲨齿企鹅并非源自任何真正的鲨鱼血统，而是与海魔鬼交叉突变的异怪企鹅。它们最初由冰巫婆创造，用以保卫其冰封领地免受入侵；这些扭曲的异怪，是一次将企鹅——一种为了在严酷的冰雪环境中生存而形成深厚社会纽带的不会飞的鸟类——与海魔鬼——一种嗜血、长着鲨鱼牙齿的两栖类类人——进行杂交实验后演化而来的结果。

随着更残酷、更野蛮的突变在后续世代愈发明显，如今的帝王鲨齿企鹅已成了脾气暴躁的无情劫掠者，喙缘排列着一排排牙齿。它们长到与成年矮人相仿的身高与体格，并组成纪律严明的繁殖地，封锁商队通道沿线狭窄的浮冰。当商人和其他走商派出猎人来清除这些封锁时，企鹅们乐于协同作战，以鲜血为代价收取“过路费”。人们也曾观察到它们把自己拖出水面，结成虫群般的群体去围攻冰封海岸线的顶级掠食者，如北极熊，甚至霜虫。

帝王鲨齿企鹅用强有力的游泳鳍将自己弹射出水，趴在肚子上在冰面滑行，猛地站起身，在猎物甚至还没意识到这次突袭之前，就释放出一连串凶狠的撕咬。尽管它们能够协同攻击以击倒强大的敌人——无论是否为类人生物——帝王鲨齿企鹅只会为了残酷的取乐而攻击更大的生物，并把猎物遗弃给其他食腐者；它们主要依靠食用饵鱼来维生。

虽然人们认为当今占主导地位的帝王鲨齿企鹅形态不具备言语能力，但一些冒险者满身是血地从冰钓小屋返回后，讲述了在成群劫掠的企鹅之间回荡着虐待狂般、听起来颇具智慧的笑声的传闻；而世界某个偏远角落的一处繁殖地正处于将语言纳入其工具包的边缘，这也并非不可想象。

无臂的军备竞赛

海魔鬼并不乐见冰巫婆拿它们做实验，于是报复性地创造了它们自己的带齿猎手品种来根除帝王鲨齿企鹅。由此，豹鲨海豹诞生。随后冰巫婆又将鲨鱼与海魔鬼进行杂交，赋予它们呼吸空气的能力，于是魔鬼鲨鱼问世。接着海魔鬼再次报复，创造了巨人鲨乌贼。所幸在杀人鲨鲸出现之前，如此多掠食者的引入便导致生态系统崩溃，所有这些新异怪都饿死了，世界最终又只剩下帝王鲨齿企鹅。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、威吓、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，能量抗性（寒冷、正能量），邪恶，力量，狂野

Despite the name bestowed upon them by hunters who quake at the sight of the rows of razor-sharp triangular teeth, emperor shark penguins are not descended from any actual shark but are instead aberrant penguins cross-mutated with sea devils. First created by ice witches to defend their frozen domain against intruders, these warped aberrations are the evolved result of a single experiment to cross a penguin, a flightless bird that forms deep social bonds to survive its harsh icy environment, with a sea devil, a bloodthirsty, shark-toothed amphibious humanoid.

With their crueler and more barbarous mutations becoming more and more pronounced in subsequent generations, emperor shark penguins today are ruthless marauders with short tempers and beaks lined with rows of teeth. Growing to a similar height and heft as an adult dwarf, the penguins form regimented rookeries that blockade narrow ice floes along caravan corridors. When merchants and other caravanners send hunters to eradicate these blockades, the penguins take pleasure in working together to extract their toll in blood. They have also been observed hauling themselves out of the water to swarm such apex predators of frozen coastlines as polar bears and even frost worms.

Using their powerful swim flippers to launch themselves out of the water, emperor shark penguins slide across the ice on their bellies, pop to their feet, and unleash a flurry of grievous bites before their prey can even recognize the blitz. Despite their ability to attack in concert to bring down powerful foes, humanoid or otherwise, emperor shark penguins attack larger creatures only for brutal sport and abandon their kills to other scavengers; they instead subsist on a diet of bait fish.

While the current dominant form of emperor shark penguin is thought to be incapable of speech, adventurers returning bloodied to ice fishing lodges have reported tales of sadistic, intelligent-sounding laughter shared among bands of marauding penguins, and it's not inconceivable that a rookery in some remote corner of the world is on the verge of adding language to its toolkit.

An Armless Arms Race

Sea devils, who did not take kindly to ice witches experimenting on them, retaliated by creating their own breed of toothy hunters to eradicate emperor shark penguins. Thus the leopard shark seal came into existence. The ice witches then crossed sharks with sea devils, giving them the ability to breathe air, thus birthing the devil shark. And then the sea devils retaliated again and created the giant shark squid. Thankfully, the introduction of so many predators caused an ecosystem collapse before killer shark whales came about, and all the new aberrations starved to death, leaving the world with just the emperor shark penguins once more.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (cold, positive), evil, strength, wild

Ebirath's Wrath.name: 埃比拉斯之怒 Ebirath's Wrath
Ebirath's Wrath.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 艾比拉斯的生命值降至一半或更低。

效果 艾比拉斯陷入狂乱暴怒，立刻对距离最近的三个生物进行狂怒突击，不论这些生物是否为艾比拉斯的盟友。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger Ebirath's Hit Points are reduced to half or lower.

Effect Ebirath goes into a frenzied rage, immediately Furiously Assaulting the three closest creatures, regardless of whether or not the creatures are Ebirath's allies.

Furious Assault.name: 狂怒突袭 Furious Assault
Furious Assault.description:
Ebirath进行一次大型爪子打击，然后用它的小爪子或尾巴进行两次打击。如果Ebirath将所有攻击都针对不同的生物，则直到所有打击完成后才会适用多重攻击减值。否则，它正常适用多重攻击减值。

Ebirath makes a big claw Strike and then two Strikes with either its little claw or its tail. If Ebirath makes all the attacks against different creatures, it doesn't apply the multiple attack penalty until after all the Strikes are complete. Otherwise, it applies the multiple attack penalty normally.

Sonic Claw Snap.name: 音波利爪猛击 Sonic Claw Snap
Sonic Claw Snap.description:
需求 Ebirath没有使用其巨爪的Improved Grab抓住一个生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

效果 Ebirath猛然合拢其巨爪，在40尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]区域中制造出强力声波爆炸，造成@Damage[5d10[sonic]]伤害。射程内的所有生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:40]豁免检定，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，且陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，在1轮内陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{Deafened}，且陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 3}。

Requirements Ebirath doesn't have a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} using its big claw's Improved Grab

Effect Snapping its big claw, Ebirath produces a blast of powerful sound waves in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 40 feet, dealing @Damage[5d10[sonic]] damage. All creatures within range must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:40] saving throw, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{Deafened} for 1 round, and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 3}.

Ebirath.publicNotes:
埃比拉斯是一只巨大的龙虾，有些人认为它是某位龙虾神祇的化身。有趣的是，龙虾不会因年老而死。通常，它们死于被捕食，或因体型长得太大而无法自行蜕壳。几百年前，一位格外痴迷的德鲁伊发现了这一事实，并受到启发，通过不断帮助同一只龙虾蜕壳，创造了远古龙虾神祇埃比拉斯的化身。传说称，埃比拉斯是一位背叛者神祇，因试图淹没世界而被放逐；如此一来，水栖（特征）血统，尤其是那些具有龙虾特质的族裔，便能统治世界。

如今，这位德鲁伊的努力已获得耳语般的恶名。一个新的远古宗教教派在埃比拉斯的新化身周围萌发，并逐渐吸纳了其他德鲁伊、术士与女巫；他们的力量似乎都源自这只伟大的甲壳类生物。

埃比拉斯已发展出以心灵感应进行交流的能力，可能是受到原初龙虾神祇的某种神圣影响。埃比拉斯更偏好把自己的时间花在咸水中，因此该教派的藏身处是一条改造过的引水道，将海水引流至他们的守护者身边。

跨越年代的宿敌

埃比拉斯并非唯一一位不因年迈而衰亡、并聚集崇拜者的生物。在海浪之下的深海海沟中，一只远古蛤蜊集结了一支洛卡萨军队。在另一片大陆的水面之上，一只存活了数百年的龟察觉到埃比拉斯的神化，并命令其密社为可能的对抗做好准备。当年轻的神祇出现时，冲突并非不可避免——也许他们会联合起来，组成一个由巨人海洋生物构成的新万神殿。世界屏息以待，看着他们一点点逼近对峙。以他们当前的旅行速度，世界将等待很久，但这对这些不朽者而言并不重要。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 3,000/7,000/13,000 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍）、护甲（重型）、盾牌、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、运动、交涉、威吓、自然、隐匿）

可用灌注属性 破敌、体质、延展、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、音波、力量、坚固、野性

Ebirath is an enormous lobster, believed by some to be the incarnation of a lobster deity. Interestingly, lobsters do not die of old age. Usually, they die from being eaten or from growing too large to molt on their own. A particularly obsessed druid discovered this fact a few hundred years ago and was inspired to create an avatar of the ancient lobster deity, Ebirath, by continually helping a single lobster molt. Legends say that Ebirath was a betrayer god banished for attempting to flood the world so that aquatic ancestries, especially those with lobster qualities, could rule the world.

Presently, the druid's efforts have gained a whispered notoriety. A new sect of the ancient religion has sprouted around the new incarnation of Ebirath, and this sect has come to include other druids, sorcerers, and witches whose powers seemingly arise from this great crustacean.

Ebirath has developed the ability to telepathically communicate, possibly due to some divine influence from the original lobster deity. Ebirath prefers to spend its time in saltwater, and as such, the sect's hideaway is a repurposed aqueduct funneling ocean water to their patron.

A Rivalry For The Ages

Ebirath is not the only unaging creature amassing worshipers. An ancient clam in a trench deep beneath the ocean waves has gathered an army of locathahs. Above water on another continent, a centuries-old tortoise senses Ebirath's apotheosis and commands its cabal to prepare for a possible confrontation. Conflict is not inevitable when young gods emerge—perhaps they band together to form a new pantheon of giant sea creatures instead. The world waits with bated breath as they inch toward confrontation. At their current rate of travel, the world will be waiting a long time, but that matters not to these immortals.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3,000/7,000/13,000 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Nature, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), evil, sonic, strength, sturdy, wild

Demon Shepherd.name: 恶魔牧羊人 Demon Shepherd

Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Flock Vulnerability.name: 群体弱点 Flock Vulnerability
Flock Vulnerability.description:
恶魔牧者的羊群是其固有的一部分。每当一个低于恶魔牧者等级的恶魔牧者的恶魔盟友被杀死或降低至0生命值时，恶魔牧者会承受@Damage[3d6[mental]]伤害。

A demon shepherd's flock is an intrinsic part of it. Every time a demon ally of the demon shepherd lower level than the demon shepherd is killed or reduced to 0 Hit Points, the demon shepherd suffers @Damage[3d6[mental]] damage.

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣天生法术 Divine Innate Spells

Impending Doom.name: 迫近的末日 Impending Doom
Impending Doom.description:
你从无数种可能的未来中筛选，抓住其中一个可能的瞬间：目标以极其惨烈且致命的方式迎来结局，然后向其展示自己即将死亡的视野。随着厄运逼近，这股强烈的心灵视野对目标而言变得越来越恐怖，并需要3轮才能走到结局。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免以决定效果。在法术持续时间结束时，若目标受到影响，目标将目睹自己的死亡并受到6d6精神伤害。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内不受影响。到第二轮时，它变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。最后，到第三轮时，它变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。在第三轮结束时，它受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物立刻处于off-guard状态。到第二轮时，它变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。最后，到第三轮时，它还会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。在第三轮结束时，该生物受到全额伤害。

大成功或大失败 该生物立刻处于off-guard状态并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。到第二轮时，它变为stunned 1。最后，到第三轮时，它还会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}。在第三轮结束时，该生物受到双倍伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

You sift through myriad potential futures, seize upon one potential moment in which the target meets a particularly gruesome and fatal end, and then show it a vision of its impending demise. The intense mental vision grows more and more terrifying to the target as the doom grows closer, and it takes 3 rounds to reach its conclusion. The target must attempt a Will saving throw to determine the effects. At the end of the spell's duration, if the target was affected, the target witnesses its death and takes 6d6 mental damage.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is unaffected for 1 round. On the second round, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}. Finally, on the third round, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}. At the end of the third round, it takes half damage.

Failure The creature is immediately off-guard. On the second round, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}. Finally, on the third round, it also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. At the end of the third round, the creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature is immediately off-guard and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}. On the second round, it becomes stunned 1. Finally, on the third round, it also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. At the end of the third round, the creature takes double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Rip the Spirit.name: 撕裂灵体 Rip the Spirit
Rip the Spirit.description:
你以超自然之力将一名活生物的灵体从其身体中撕扯出来，使目标注定承受痛苦与死亡。目标根据其基础强韧豁免承受5d6负能量伤害，且若其豁免失败，则会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1} 状态。该法术效果取决于你在施放法术时花费了多少动作。

1 (躯体) 该法术以射程内的一个活生物为目标。

2 (躯体, 语言) 该法术以射程内的一个活生物为目标，且伤害改为 [[/r 10d6[void]]] 伤害，而非5d6。

3 (材料, 躯体, 语言) 该法术以30英尺扩散范围内的所有活生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 伤害量增加1d6，或对于2动作版本则增加 [[/r 2d6]]。

You supernaturally rip the spirit from a living creature's body, dooming the target to pain and death. The target takes 5d6 negative damage, depending on its basic Fortitude save, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} if it fails its save. The spell's effect is based on how many actions you spend when Casting the Spell.

1 (somatic) The spell targets one living creature in range.

2 (somatic, verbal) The spell targets one living creature in range and the damage is [[/r 10d6[void]]] damage instead of 5d6.

3 (material, somatic, verbal) The spell targets all living creatures in a 30-foot emanation.

Heightened (+1) The amount of damage increases by 1d6, or by [[/r 2d6]] for the 2-action version.

Command (At Will).name: 命令（意志） Command (At Will)
Command (At Will).description:
你大声喊出一道难以忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你、逃跑（如同其具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}状态）、放开它正抓着的东西、解除@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}、或原地不动。在它服从你的命令之前，它不能延缓或进行任何反应动作（）。其效果取决于目标的意志豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用一个单动作来按你的命令行事。

大成功或大失败 目标必须在其下个回合使用其全部动作来服从你的命令。

升阶（第5环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

You shout a command that's hard to ignore. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't Delay or take any reactions until it has obeyed your command. The effects depend on the target's Will save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to do as you command.

Critical Failure The target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Abyssal Pact.name: 深渊契约 Abyssal Pact
Abyssal Pact.description:
你向另一个恶魔求助，其等级不超过深渊契约法术等级的两倍；或求助两个恶魔，它们的等级各自至少比该法术等级两倍低2；或求助三个恶魔，它们的等级各自至少比该法术等级两倍低3。

大成功 你召唤出该恶魔或这些恶魔。它们急于执行任务，因此不会要求回报。

成功 你召唤出该恶魔或这些恶魔。它们并不急于执行任务，因此会要求你以一个人情作为回报。

失败 你未能召唤出任何恶魔。

大失败 该恶魔或这些恶魔因你打扰它们而愤怒。它们出现在你面前，但会立刻攻击你。

You call in a favor from another demon whose level is no more than double Abyssal pact's spell level, two demons whose levels are each at least 2 less than double the spell level, or three demons whose levels are each at least 3 less than double the spell level.

Critical Success You conjure the demon or demons. They are eager to pursue the task, so they don't ask for a favor.

Success You conjure the demon or demons. They are not eager to pursue the task, so they require a favor in return.

Failure You don't conjure any demons.

Critical Failure The demon or demons are angry that you disturbed them. They appear before you, but they immediately attack you.

Call of the Shepherd.name: 牧羊人的召唤 Call of the Shepherd
Call of the Shepherd.description:
恶魔牧者呼唤其羊群更凶猛地战斗。在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]内，所有等级低于恶魔牧者的恶魔盟友变得更加狂暴，获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened} 1轮。他们只能将这额外的动作用于疾走或打击。

The demon shepherd call its flock to fight more fiercely. All demon allies lower level than the demon shepherd in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] become more ferocious, becoming @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened} for 1 round. They can use the additional action only to Stride or Strike.

Call to the Feast.name: 盛宴召唤 Call to the Feast
Call to the Feast.description:
伴随着令人毛骨悚然的尖叫，恶魔牧者召唤来享用受惊生物的恐惧。每个在@Template[type:emanation|distance:100]内的受惊生物承受@Damage[7d6[mental]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:will|dc:29|basic:true]意志豁免。若失败，它们变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}，若大失败，它们变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3}。

With a blood-curling scream, the demon shepherd calls to feast upon the fear of terrified creatures. Every frightened creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:100] takes @Damage[7d6[mental]] damage with a @Check[type:will|dc:29|basic:true] save. On a failure, they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}, and on a critical failure they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3}.

Reap the Crop.name: 收割庄稼 Reap the Crop
Reap the Crop.description:
恶魔牧者挥动镰刀横扫，制造出一波负能量，影响所有不属于其羊群的生物。所有在@Template[type:cone|distance:30]中的生物受到@Damage[7d6[void]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:will|dc:29|basic:true]豁免。豁免失败的生物还会变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}，大失败则变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3}。恶魔牧者在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内无法再次收割庄稼。

The demon shepherd makes a sweeping move with its scythe, creating a wave of negative energy that affects all creatures that aren't part of its flock. All creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] take @Damage[7d6[void]] damage with a @Check[type:will|dc:29|basic:true] save. Creatures that fail the saving throw also become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 3} on a critical failure. The demon shepherd can't Reap the Crop again for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Daze.name: 恍惚 Daze
Daze.description:
你使目标的心智混乱，并用一次精神冲击使其恍惚。该冲击造成等同于你的施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加 1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Demon Shepherd.publicNotes:
当一次针对某位恶魔领主的叛乱失败时，其首领可能面临数种命运。其中最常见的三种是：终生侍奉自己曾试图推翻的对象、在湮灭般的彻底毁灭中归于虚无，或在恶魔领主最嗜虐的追随者手中度过充满折磨的一生。但有时，需要的是更具创意、也更羞辱的惩罚。于是，这名恶魔叛乱者强大而暴烈的灵魂被困在物质位面最弱小、最温顺的生物之一——一只绵羊——体内。然而，当被困恶魔灵魂中的仇恨与毁灭欲望足够强烈时，随着时间推移，恶魔会彻底夺取绵羊的身体。即便如此，恶魔与其宿主生物之间形成的紧密羁绊，也只会成为其惩罚的最后一环。重获自由的恶魔化为“恶魔牧羊者”，这是一种融合了其曾经掌握的至高力量、绵羊所感受到的恐惧，以及群居求生本能的存在。

在这种身心皆被扭曲的变形之中，恶魔牧羊者会获得一种诡异的执念：引导并保护其他被变成绵羊的恶魔，尤其是那些曾与恶魔牧羊者一同参与其所领导叛乱的同伴。因此，恶魔牧羊者将其对毁灭的渴求转而用于用物质位面生物的尸体来喂养自己的羊群。

咩——糟糕的发型日

不管是不是恶魔，绵羊的羊毛都会长，而且会一直长下去。手稳技高的剪毛匠可能会在违背自身意愿的情况下，被恶魔牧羊者“收养”。作为他们契约式役使的交换，他们会得到庇护，以及那些曾在其一生中伤害过他们之人的头颅作为馈赠。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 125/275/500 gp

可选精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、运动、欺瞒、威吓、奥秘学、宗教）

可选灌注属性 破敌、混乱、魅力、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、邪恶、智力、精神、负能量、法术（神术：command, daze, impending doom, rip the spirit ）、力量、野性

When an insurrection against a demon lord fails, its leader could face several destinies. The three most common of these are a life of servitude to one they tried to overthrow, the complete and utter destruction of oblivion, or a lifetime of torture at the hands of the most sadistic followers of the demon lord. But sometimes, a more creative and humiliating punishment is in order. And so, the demon insurgent's powerful and violent soul is trapped inside one of the weakest and most peaceful creatures in the Material Plane, a sheep. However, when the hatred and desire for destruction of the trapped demon's soul are strong enough, over time the demon completely takes over the sheep. Even in this case, the close bond developed between the demon and its host creature simply becomes the last part of their punishment. The freed demon becomes a demon shepherd, a fusion of the almighty power they once held, the fear the sheep feels, and the instinct to live in a flock.

In this twisted transformation of both body and mind, the demon shepherd acquires a strange obsession to guide and protect other demons transformed into sheep, especially those that were part of the same insurrection the demon shepherd once led. Consequently, the demon shepherd channels their thirst for destruction toward feeding their flock with the corpses of creatures from the Material Plane.

Baaaad Hair Day

Demon or not, a sheep's wool is going to grow and continue to grow. Talented shearers with steady hands may find themselves adopted by a demon shepherd against their will. In exchange for their indentured servitude, they are gifted protection and the heads of those who have wronged them in life.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Intimidation, Occultism, Religion)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), evil, intelligence, mental, negative, spells (Divine: command, daze, impending doom, rip the spirit ), strength, wild

Curse Eater.name: 诅咒吞噬者 Curse Eater

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 气味（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Curse Scent (Imprecise) 120 feet.name: 诅咒气味（不精确）120英尺 Curse Scent (Imprecise) 120 feet
Curse Scent (Imprecise) 120 feet.description:
诅咒吞噬者能在所列射程内以模糊感官感知诅咒效果。此能力适用于受诅咒的物品与生物，以及带有诅咒（特征）且属于活诅咒的生物，例如费斯·维劳特。

A curse eater can sense curse effects as an imprecise sense within the listed range. This applies to cursed items and creatures, as well as creatures with the curse trait that are living curses, such as a feth velaunt.
