Attack of Opportunity.name: 借机攻击 Attack of Opportunity

Opportunistic.name: 机会主义的 Opportunistic
Opportunistic.description:
诅咒吞噬者每轮获得一个额外的反应动作（），它只能用该反应动作（）以其颚部打击进行借机攻击或用于吞噬诅咒。即使一名生物在其触及内离开多个方格，它也不能在同一个触发动作上使用超过1个反应动作（）。如果它的一个头被斩首，它会失去这个额外的反应动作（）。

A curse eater gains an additional reaction each round which it can only use to make Attacks of Opportunity with its jaws Strike or to Eat a Curse. It can't use more than 1 reaction on the same triggering action, even if a creature leaves several squares within its reach. If one of its heads is decapitated, it loses this additional reaction.

Eat Curse.name: 吞噬诅咒 Eat Curse
Eat Curse.description:
触发 诅咒吞食者对带有诅咒效果的生物或物体进行一次成功的颚部打击

效果 诅咒吞食者饱食触发生物或物体的诅咒，对其造成等同于诅咒等级的额外伤害（若为法术效果，则为诅咒等级的两倍），并尝试反制该效果。若该效果被反制或无法被反制（例如神谕者的诅咒），诅咒吞食者获得等同于额外伤害的生命值。任何非神器的受诅咒物品，其诅咒若被反制，都会崩解为尘埃。诅咒吞食者以 [[/r 1d20+28 #Counteract]]{+28} 作为反制调整值，并在此反应动作（）中具有第6等级的反制等级。它从此反应动作（）获得的任何超过其生命值上限的生命值，都会变为临时生命值，持续至其下个回合开始。

Trigger The curse eater makes a successful jaws Strike against a creature or object with a curse effect

Effect The curse eater feasts on the triggering creature or object's curse, dealing additional damage to them equal to the curse's level (or twice the curse's level for a spell effect) and attempting to counteract the effect. If the effect is counteracted or is impossible to counteract (such as an oracle's curse), the curse eater gains Hit Points equal to the additional damage. Any non-artifact cursed item whose curse is counteracted crumbles into dust. The curse eater has a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+28 #Counteract]]{+28} and a counteract level of 6th for this reaction. Any Hit Points it gains from this reaction in excess of its maximum become temporary Hit Points that last until the beginning of its next turn.

Feverish Assault.name: 狂热突袭 Feverish Assault
Feverish Assault.description:
诅咒吞噬者以任意顺序进行两次颚部打击与两次爪部打击，每次均以触及范围内的不同生物为目标。这些攻击计入诅咒吞噬者的多重攻击减值，但多重攻击减值要在诅咒吞噬者完成所有攻击后才会增加。

The curse eater makes two jaws Strikes and two claws Strikes in any order, each against a different creature within reach. These attacks count toward the curse eater's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after the curse eater makes all its attacks.

Curse Eater.publicNotes:
诅咒吞食者是天生的狼人类、神谕者以及受诅咒之物的捕食者，它们几乎完全以诅咒为食。这些双头生物看起来像细长、扭曲的狼人鬣狗，每个头都在啪地咬合并发出低吼。尽管某些受诅咒的生物可能会寻找诅咒吞食者作为潜在的治疗方式，但也有可能诅咒吞食者即使在吞下诅咒之后，仍会撕咬并吞食受诅咒的生物。

尽管它们天性暴烈，诅咒吞食者往往会放过那些不带诅咒、且不挡它们路的生物；而被邪恶狼人类或其他受诅咒怪物围困的社区，常常会将诅咒吞食者的出现视为一种祝福。另一方面，狼人类深深恐惧并憎恨诅咒吞食者，而那些自愿接纳或依赖狼人类或诅咒的社区成员也同样如此。迷信的社区，尤其是务实的豺狼人社区，有时会与诅咒吞食者合作：他们在豺狼人的下一个受害者身上种下诅咒，从而以这些最爱餐点作为交换，换取它在战斗中的协助。

无人知晓诅咒吞食者何时或如何繁殖；流传着许多民间传说与故事，讲述那些痴迷于治愈无法治愈之诅咒的防护系施法者，因傲慢而被变成这些怪物——要么是某种神罚，要么是魔法实验失败的结果。然而，即使这确为它们的真实起源，目前也没有任何可证实的此类事件实例。

为惩罚而饕餮

诅咒吞食者常常在饱餐与饥荒之间徘徊，因此当它们找到大量诅咒时便会陷入进食狂潮，而其生理结构会将多余部分储存起来以便日后消化。与一只臃肿的诅咒吞食者遭遇的冒险者最好敬而远之，因为如果诅咒吞食者死去，那些未消化的诅咒总得有个去处……

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 250/560/1,030 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（运动、学识[诅咒]、隐秘、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、体质、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、法术（原始：支配、行动自如、月之狂乱、移除诅咒、真知术）、尖刺、力量、坚固、野性

Curse eaters are natural predators of werecreatures, oracles, and the accursed, who feed almost entirely off of curses. These two-headed creatures appear like long, twisted werehyenas, each head snapping and snarling. Though some cursed creatures might seek out a curse eater as a possible cure, it's also possible that a curse eater might maul and devour an accursed creature even after it consumes the curse.

Despite their violent nature, curse eaters tend to leave uncursed creatures who stay out of their way alone, and communities besieged by evil werecreatures or other cursed monsters often see the appearance of a curse eater as a blessing. On the other hand, werecreatures deeply fear and hate curse eaters, and so do members of communities that willingly host or rely upon werecreatures or curses. Superstitious communities, particularly those of pragmatic gnolls, sometimes team up with a curse eater, planting curses on the gnolls' next victims and thus offering the curse eater their favorite meals in exchange for assistance in the battle.

It is unknown when or how curse eaters reproduce; there exist many folktales and stories of abjurers obsessed with curing an incurable curse and then being turned into these monsters due to their hubris, either as some sort of divine punishment or as the result of magical experimentation gone wrong, but if this is their true origin, no verifiable example of such an incident actually occurring is currently known.

Glutton For Punishment

Curse eaters often face feast or famine, so they enter a feeding frenzy when they find a bounty of curses, and their physiology stores the excess for later digestion. Adventurers who encounter a bloated curse eater would do well to steer clear, for the undigested curses need somewhere to go if the curse eater dies…

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 250/560/1,030 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Lore [Curse], Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), spells (Primal: dominate, freedom of movement, moon frenzy, remove curse, true seeing), spiked, strength, sturdy, wild

Cunomaglos.name: 库诺马格洛斯 Cunomaglos

Scent (Imprecise) 40 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）40英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 40 feet

Blood Always Tells.name: 鲜血总会揭示真相 Blood Always Tells
Blood Always Tells.description:
库诺玛格洛斯可以吞食某个生物的血肉，建立一种揭露目标秘密的神秘连接。库诺玛格洛斯可以进行一次自然检定，对抗目标的意志DC。成功时，库诺玛格洛斯立刻获得与一次传奇学识仪式所提供的相同信息。大成功或大失败：大失败时，库诺玛格洛斯获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{困惑}状态，持续1分钟。若库诺玛格洛斯无法吞食血或肉，则不能使用此能力，这意味着没有血或肉的生物免疫。

A cunomaglos can consume the flesh or blood of a creature, establishing a mystical connection that bares the target's secrets. The cunomaglos can make a Nature check against the target's Will DC. On a success, the cunomaglos immediately learns the same information provided by a legend lore ritual. On a critical failure, the cunomaglos is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} for 1 minute. A cunomaglos can't use this ability if it can't consume blood or flesh, meaning that creatures without blood or flesh are immune.

Wolf Empathy.name: 狼之共情 Wolf Empathy
Wolf Empathy.description:
库诺马格洛斯可以与狼和其他类似的狼科生物交流。

The cunomaglos can communicate with wolfs and other similar lupine creatures.

Regeneration 15 (Deactivated by Cold Iro.name: 再生 15（被寒铁停用） Regeneration 15 (Deactivated by Cold Iron)

Change Shape.name: 变形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
库诺马格洛斯变形为一只狼，具有以下数据。

  • 狼
    • 体型 Large
    • 速度 50 feet
    • 近战 颚 +32，伤害 3d12+15 穿刺外加 Improved Knockdown

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The cunomaglos changes into a wolf with the following statistics.

  • Wolf
    • size Large
    • Speed 50 feet
    • Melee jaws +32, Damage 3d12+15 piercing plus Improved Knockdown

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Curse of the Werewolf.name: 狼人诅咒 Curse of the Werewolf
Curse of the Werewolf.description:
此能力只影响野兽与类人生物。

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] 豁免。

每逢满月，受诅咒的生物必须在另一次强韧豁免中成功，否则将变成狼人直到黎明。该生物受GM控制，会寻找狼族伙伴并狩猎半夜，随后坠落 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷}。

This ability affects only beasts and humanoids.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] save.

Each full moon, the cursed creature must succeed at another Fortitude save or turn into a werewolf until dawn. The creature is under the GM's control, seeking out lupine companions and hunting for half the night before falling @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious}.

Hunter's Howl.name: 猎手嚎叫 Hunter's Howl
Hunter's Howl.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 库诺马格洛斯那令人血液凝固的嚎叫向所有听见者预告死亡。库诺马格洛斯尝试对60英尺锥形范围内所有能听见嚎叫的生物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize}，且不会因不共通语言而承受任何减值。随后，这些生物获得1天的暂时免疫。

Frequency once per round

Effect The cunomaglos' blood-chilling howl promises death to all who hear it. The cunomaglos attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize} all creatures in a 60 foot cone who can hear the howl, without taking any penalties for not sharing a language. The creatures are then temporarily immune for 1 day.

Ruler of Wolves.name: 群狼统治者 Ruler of Wolves
Ruler of Wolves.description:
20英尺。灵光内的犬科与狼科生物（包括受狼人诅咒影响的生物）在对抗犬魔格洛斯的心灵法术、威吓与交涉时，其意志豁免与DC承受–2环境减值。

20 feet. Canine and lupine beings (including creatures affected by Curse of the Werewolf) within the aura take a –2 circumstance penalty to their Will saves and DCs against the cunomaglos's mental spells, Intimidation, and Diplomacy.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初先天法术 Primal Innate Spells

Dominate.name: 支配 Dominate
Dominate.description:
你夺取对目标的指挥权，强迫其服从你的命令。如果你下达明显自我毁灭的命令，目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令。效果取决于其意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在抵抗你的命令时变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 你控制目标。它获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} 状态，但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次意志豁免。成功时，该法术结束。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但目标只有在你给出新的、违背其天性的命令（例如杀死其盟友）时，才会进行新的豁免。

升阶（10环） 持续时间为无限。

You take command of the target, forcing it to obey your orders. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if you give it a new order that is against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

True Seeing.name: 真知术 True Seeing
True Seeing.description:
你看见60英尺内的事物如其真实面貌。GM针对区域内的任何幻术或变化系效果进行一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于确定你是否能看穿它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Moon Frenzy.name: 月之狂乱 Moon Frenzy
Moon Frenzy.description:
凶暴的性相压倒了目标，使其变得坚韧而野蛮。目标获得5点临时生命值，其速度获得+10英尺状态加值，并获得弱点5：银。他们还会长出凶狠的獠牙与利爪，这些都是徒手攻击。獠牙造成2d8穿刺伤害；利爪造成2d6挥砍伤害并具有灵巧与娴熟特征。目标使用其最高的武器或徒手攻击熟练度来进行这些攻击；若其具有武器专精或高等武器专精，也将这部分伤害加入其中。使用这些徒手攻击之一造成大成功或大失败命中时，被击中的生物受到@Damage[1d4[bleed]]。

目标不能使用专注动作，除非这些动作也具有狂暴（特征），但搜索除外。生物可以用单动作（具有狂暴（特征））尝试进行一次意志豁免以对抗你的法术DC，从而尝试结束自身所受的该法术效果；成功则其结束自身所受的该法术效果。

若目标处于满月的光之中，且其体型为中型或更小，则其体型额外增大一级。这会使中型或超小型生物的触及增加5英尺。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.zRKw95WMezr6TgiT]{法术效果：月之狂乱}

升阶（6环） 临时生命值提高至10，银弱点提高至10，且攻击造成的伤害骰增加至3颗。

升阶（10环） 临时生命值提高至20，银弱点提高至20，且攻击造成的伤害骰增加至4颗。

A feral aspect overcomes the targets, making them tough and savage. Targets gain 5 temporary Hit Points, a +10-foot status bonus to their Speeds, and weakness 5 to silver. They also grow vicious fangs and claws, which are unarmed attacks. The fangs deal 2d8 piercing damage; the claws deal 2d6 slashing damage and have the agile and finesse traits. The targets use their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks, and if they have weapon specialization or greater weapon specialization, they add this damage as well. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck takes @Damage[1d4[bleed]].

The targets can't use concentrate actions unless those actions also have the rage trait, with the exception of Seek. A creature can attempt to end the spell's effect on itself by using a single action, which has the rage trait, to attempt a Will save against your spell DC; on a success, it ends the spell's effect on itself.

If a target is in the light of a full moon, it also grows by one size if it were Medium or smaller. This increases the reach of a Medium or Tiny creature by 5 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.zRKw95WMezr6TgiT]{Spell Effect: Moon Frenzy}

Heightened (6th) The temporary Hit Points increase to 10, the silver weakness to 10, and the damage dealt by the attacks to three dice.

Heightened (10th) The temporary Hit Points increase to 20, the silver weakness to 20, and the damage dealt by the attacks to four dice.

Freedom of Movement (At Will).name: 行动自如（随意） Freedom of Movement (At Will)
Freedom of Movement (At Will).description:
你会排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在该法术效果持续期间，目标无视那些会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}一个使其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且等级高于行动自如法术，否则其自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Remove Curse (At Will, Curse of the Were.name: 移除诅咒（意志，仅狼人诅咒） Remove Curse (At Will, Curse of the Werewolf Only)
Remove Curse (At Will, Curse of the Were.description:
你的接触为受诅咒的生物带来一丝喘息。你尝试反制一个影响目标的诅咒。如果该诅咒来自一件受诅咒的物品或其他外部来源，成功表示目标生物可以摆脱该受诅咒的物品，但不会将诅咒从该物品上移除。

Your touch grants a reprieve to a cursed creature. You attempt to counteract one curse afflicting the target. If the curse comes from a cursed item or other external source, a success indicates that the target creature can rid itself of the cursed item, but it doesn't remove the curse from the item.

Cunomaglos.publicNotes:
一些学者声称，狼人诅咒起源于妖精界，并指出库诺马格洛斯（cunomaglos）是最初也是最伟大的狼人。的确，这些凶猛的妖精领主与各种狼群为伍，传播他们的苦难，并在阴影重重的妖精森林中率领强大的狼群穿行。有些勇敢或绝望的贤者会去寻找库诺马格洛斯，希望找回那些本已被遗忘的学识，但狼之领主从不轻易交出他们的秘密。

与大多数狼人不同，库诺马格洛伊（cunomagloi）并不为破坏而沉醉于嗜血的毁灭。相反，这些狂野的妖精为了狩猎的欢愉，以及追逐配得上的猎物那传奇般的追猎而活。他们吞食猎物的肉体，甚至品尝其心智，从中学习对方的历史与事迹，并将这些故事作为战利品分享。收集到的史诗越是惊心动魄，库诺马格洛斯的状态就越高，这也驱使库诺马格洛伊追逐著名英雄与怪物，以夺取讲述败者故事的荣耀。

通过嗅闻测试

那些想从库诺马格洛伊那里撬出秘密的人，常会先打听诱人猎物的所在与弱点，好用来交换。然而此计大错特错，因为库诺马格洛斯会将能弄到这类令人垂涎情报的人也视为配得上的猎物。更好的策略是将自己伪装成库诺马格洛斯，并以他们的一员参与他们的讲述故事。尽管如此，愿意如此彻底投入这场骗局的人寥寥无几，因为库诺马格洛斯敏锐的嗅觉感官意味着：若想有机会骗过他们，就必须先成为狼人。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 810/1,850/3,400 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍），察觉物品，技能物品（奥术、运动、交涉、威吓、自然、秘学、求生）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星，混乱，魅力，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），力量，野性

Some scholars claim that the curse of the werewolf originated in the fey realm, pointing to the cunomaglos as the first and greatest of werewolves. Indeed, these fierce faerie lords consociate with wolves of all sorts, spreading their affliction and leading mighty packs through shadowy fey forests. Some brave or desperate sages seek out a cunomaglos in the hopes of recovering otherwise forgotten lore, but the wolf lords never yield their secrets easily.

Unlike most werewolves, cunomagloi don't revel in bloody-minded destruction for its own sake. Rather, these wild fey live for the joy of the hunt and the legendary chase of worthy prey. They consume their prey's body and even taste their minds, learning their history and deeds and sharing their tales as trophies. The more thrilling the sagas collected, the greater the cunomaglos's status, leading cunomagloi to pursue renowned heroes and monsters to claim the honor of telling the stories of the vanquished.

Passing The Sniff Test

Those wishing to pry secrets from cunomagloi often obtain tips on the whereabouts and weaknesses of tempting prey to trade. This tactic is a mistake, as a cunomaglos considers those who can obtain such coveted information as worthy prey themselves. A better strategy is to disguise oneself as a cunomaglos and participate in their storytelling as one of them. Few are willing to dedicate themselves so wholly to such a ruse, though, as the cunomaglos' keen sense of smell means one must become a werewolf to have a chance of tricking them.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 810/1,850/3,400 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), perception item, skill items (Arcana, Athletics, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Nature, Occultism, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), strength, wild

Crystalline Owl.name: 晶化猫头鹰 Crystalline Owl

Reflection.name: 反射 Reflection
Reflection.description:
触发 水晶猫头鹰将要受到火焰伤害

效果 水晶猫头鹰使用翅膀或身体部位来反射部分攻击。水晶猫头鹰将其将要受到的火焰伤害减少 @Damage[1d12[fire]]{1d12}，在应用抗力之后。对水晶猫头鹰造成该火焰伤害的生物（若有）受到等同于水晶猫头鹰所减少数值的火焰伤害（取 d12 的结果或抗力后的剩余伤害两者中较小者），并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:18|basic:true] 豁免。

Trigger The crystalline owl would take fire damage

Effect The crystalline owl uses a wing or body part to reflect part of the attack. The crystalline owl reduces the fire damage it would take by @Damage[1d12[fire]]{1d12}, after applying resistance. The creature that dealt the fire damage to the crystalline owl, if any, takes the amount of fire damage the crystalline owl reduced (either the result of the d12 or the remaining damage after resistance, whichever was less), with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:18|basic:true] save.

Flyby Attack.name: 掠袭攻击 Flyby Attack
Flyby Attack.description:
水晶猫头鹰飞行并在途中任意一点进行一次爪击打击。

The crystalline owl Flies and makes a talon Strike at any point along the way.

Prismatic Dazzle.name: 虹彩炫目 Prismatic Dazzle
Prismatic Dazzle.description:
需求 水晶猫头鹰必须处于明亮光照的区域内

效果 水晶猫头鹰利用其身体或翅膀的反射表面，将光线导入30英尺内所有生物的眼中。这些生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} 状态，持续1轮。

失败 该生物目眩，持续3轮。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} 状态，持续1轮，且目眩持续1分钟。

Requirements The crystalline owl must be in an area of bright light

Effect The crystalline owl uses the reflective surfaces of its body or wing to direct the light into the eyes of all creatures within 30 feet. The creatures must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is dazzled for 3 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} for 1 round and dazzled for 1 minute.

Crystalline Owl.publicNotes:
难以看清，更难以捕捉，这些半透明的鸟形生物并非水晶，而是妖精。晶体猫头鹰是微小的存在，天性害羞却又好奇。尽管通常并不具攻击性，晶体猫头鹰却常会选择某个生物、物体或地点加以守护，并为保卫其所守护之物而战。它们也会在受到威胁时发起攻击，不过更偏好躲藏或逃离。它们看似不相称的长腿使其在用爪进行攻击时能向外伸出，但在落地时对其机动性几乎没有援助。

晶体猫头鹰是空气中的杂技家，有时也被称为空中武僧。除去它们流畅的优雅姿态外，它们还具备水晶的一些物理特征，并拥有操纵自身周围环境中光的能力。这不仅能援助它们进行潜行，也能让它们炫目敌人，从而更有效地攻击或逃脱。

大多数晶体猫头鹰通过自然形成的跨位面桥梁来到物质位面。抵达物质位面后，这些妖精界的原生者会探索并适应其新的周围环境。它们通常会狩猎返回家园的路径，或寻找与妖精有所联系的友善生物。若它们找到了这样的朋友，便可能选择产生依恋，并最终建立起共感纽带。一旦建立纽带，晶体猫头鹰会极其忠诚。晶体猫头鹰一旦交配，便终生相伴；与另一生物建立纽带者很少再同时形成交配纽带。守护巢穴会让晶体猫头鹰表现出比平日更具攻击性的行为，而当巢穴受到威胁时，它们会变得相当具有领地意识。

尽管晶体猫头鹰天生寿命长，但它们往往会因准备不足而败于捕食者或其他灾害，尤其是生活在物质位面的个体。虽然罕见，但那些存活足够久的个体会显现出更强的操纵光与火的能力。它们也会发展出利用自身半透明性来更有效躲藏的能力。

不是夜猫子

晶体猫头鹰是极佳的伙伴。由于它们以明亮光照作为防御手段，它们不像其他猫头鹰那样夜行。不过，抱抱它们也许不是个明智之举。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、隐匿、生存）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星、魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（火焰、正能量）、火焰、镜面、野性、翼生

Difficult to see and even more difficult to catch, these translucent bird-like creatures are not crystal but fey. Crystalline owls are tiny beings, shy yet curious by nature. While usually not aggressive, crystalline owls often choose creatures, objects, or places to protect, and they fight to defend whatever they're guarding. They also attack if threatened, though they prefer to hide or flee. Their deceptively long legs allow them to reach out when they make an attack with their talons, but they do little to aid their mobility when grounded.

Crystalline owls are acrobats of the air, sometimes referred to as aerial monks. Along with their fluid grace, they embody some physical characteristics of crystals and possess the ability to manipulate light around them. This not only aids their stealth but also allows them to dazzle their enemies in order to more effectively attack or escape.

Most crystalline owls arrive in the Material Plan through naturally occurring interplanar bridges. Once on the Material Plane, these natives of the fey realm explore and adapt to their new surroundings. They usually hunt for a return path home or seek kindly beings with a connection to the fey. If they find such a friend, they might choose to form an attachment and eventually establish an empathic bond. Once bonded, a crystalline owl is fiercely loyal. When they mate, crystalline owls mate for life. Those who bond with another creature rarely form a mating bond as well. Guarding their nest is cause for more aggressive behavior than a crystalline owl otherwise exhibits, and they become quite territorial when their nest is on the line.

Although crystalline owls have a naturally long lifespan, too often they succumb to predators or other disasters for which they are ill-prepared, especially those living on the Material Plane. While rare, those who survive long enough manifest stronger abilities to manipulate light and fire. They also develop the ability to use their translucence to hide even more effectively.

No Night Owl

Crystalline owls make excellent companions. Due to their use of bright light as a defense, they are not nocturnal like other owls. Hugging them, however, may not be a bright idea.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (fire, positive), fire, mirrored, wild, winged

Cryptfowl Swarm.name: 墓穴鸟虫群 Cryptfowl Swarm

No Escape.name: 无处可逃 No Escape
No Escape.description:
触发 一个生物离开墓禽虫群的空间

效果 墓禽虫群试图追逐触发生物。墓禽虫群以疾走移动至多等同于其速度，在生物的移动过程中跟随该生物并使其始终处于墓禽虫群的空间内，直到该生物停止移动或墓禽虫群已移动其全额速度为止，以先发生者为准。

Trigger A creature leaves the cryptfowl swarm's space

Effect The cryptfowl swarm tries to chase after the triggering creature. The cryptfowl swarm Strides up to its Speed, following the creature and keeping it within the cryptfowl swarm's space throughout its movement until it stops moving or until the cryptfowl swarm has moved its full Speed, whichever comes first.

Digestive Spittle.name: 消化唾液 Digestive Spittle
Digestive Spittle.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[acid]] 伤害 (1轮)

阶段 2 [[/r 2d4[acid]]] 伤害 (1轮)

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[acid]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 2d4[acid]]] damage (1 round)

Fowl Play.name: 禽兽把戏 Fowl Play
Fowl Play.description:
需求 一名生物位于墓穴禽虫群的空间内，且该生物具有 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{倒地（状态）} 状态

效果 触发生物落入无情的喙、爪与羽毛风暴之中。该生物受到 [[/r 1d6[piercing],1d6[slashing],1d6[acid]]]{1d6 穿刺伤害、1d6 挥砍伤害，以及 1d6 酸蚀} 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] 豁免）。

Requirements A creature is within the cryptfowl swarm's space and that creature has the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} condition

Effect The triggering creature falls prey to a relentless storm of beaks, claws, and feathers. The creature takes [[/r 1d6[piercing],1d6[slashing],1d6[acid]]]{1d6 piercing damage, 1d6 slashing damage, and 1d6 acid} damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] save).

Swarming Pecks.name: 蜂拥啄击 Swarming Pecks
Swarming Pecks.description:
虫群空间内的每个生物受到[[/r (2d6+2)[piercing]]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] 豁免）。未通过其反射豁免的生物会暴露于消化性唾液。重度失败其反射豁免的生物还会被击倒为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

Each creature in the swarm's space takes [[/r (2d6+2)[piercing]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] save). Creatures that fail their Reflex save are exposed to Digestive Spittle. Creatures who critically fail their Reflex save are also knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Cryptfowl Swarm.publicNotes:
墓穴禽是苍白而凶残的鸡类，食用蛆虫以及其他以尸体为食的昆虫。尽管在它们惯常的虫群中遭遇时，它们是致命的怪物，但生活在其狩猎地附近的镇民并不会像陌生人可能预期的那样对它们充满恶意。这是因为它们往往栖息在坟墓与尸体常见之处，主要以滋生在这些地方的、令人厌恶的害虫为食。由于用一份蛆虫餐的供品就能轻易分散注意并安抚它们，墓地看守者不难争取到所需的时间来挖掘新坟并安葬新近亡者，而不至于惹怒虫群。

墓穴禽对付食尸鬼（特征）、丧尸（特征）以及其他试图吃掉它们的弱小不死生物时，意外地是很好的对手，因为它们的身体已经适应了甩脱这些生物常见的疾病。墓穴禽依赖它们的唾液来保护自己免受吞入性疾病的侵害，但这并不意味着它们的喙是卫生的。任何鲁莽的活访客若惊扰了它们的栖息处，都有可能感染酸性唾液。

不幸的是，对活而言，墓穴禽有时会成为危险疾病的携带者；在这种情况下，聚居地就需要寻找冒险者在感染扩散之前消灭这些生物。

尝起来像鸡

真正大胆的人，或鲁莽之徒（或两者皆是），会特意去寻找墓穴禽，因为据说由于它们不同寻常的食性，它们的肉具有真正独特的味道与口感。然而，如果处理不当，已有报告称在食用其肉后会出现奇怪而异常的副作用。有些副作用较轻，例如暂时失明或嗅觉丧失，但也有一些不走运的食客会患上可怕的疾病，甚至丧命。即便如此，食用一只墓穴禽仍被视为罕见的美味，总会有人愿意为了全新而独特的体验而真正冒着生命危险。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 18/45/80 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型）、察觉物品、技能物品（杂技、运动、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 强酸、克星、体质、能量抗性（正能量）、野性、有翼

Cryptfowl are pale, vicious chickens that feed on maggots and other insects that feed on corpses. Despite being deadly monsters when encountered in their usual swarms, townsfolk who live near their hunting grounds don't treat them with as much vitriol as a stranger might expect. This is because they tend to roost where graves and corpses are common, feeding mostly on the unwanted pests that infest such places. Since they can be distracted and placated easily with an offering of a meal of maggots, it's not difficult for crypt keepers to find the time they need to dig fresh graves and inter the newly deceased without stirring the swarm's ire.

Cryptfowl make for surprisingly good opponents against ghouls, zombies, and other weak undead who try to eat them, due to their bodies having adapted to shake off diseases common to these creatures. Cryptfowl rely on their spittle to keep them safe from ingested diseases, but that doesn't mean their beaks are sanitary. Any reckless living visitors who disturb their roost risk being afflicted with acidic saliva.

Unfortunately for the living, crypt fowl can sometimes become carriers of dangerous diseases, and in those cases, settlements need to find adventurers to exterminate the creatures before the infection spreads.

Tastes Like Chicken

The truly daring, or foolhardy (or both), go out of their way to find cryptfowl as it is said that because of their unusual diet, their meat has a truly unique taste and texture. However, if not properly prepared, there have been reports of strange and unusual side effects after consuming their meat. Some side effects are mild, such as temporary blindness or loss of smell, but some unlucky diners have become horribly diseased, or even perished. Still, consuming a cryptfowl is considered a rare delicacy, and there are always those who are willing to literally risk their lives for a new and unique experience.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), wild, winged
Cryptfowl Swarm.speed: must end its Fly action on solid ground or fall

Contortion Swarm.name: 扭曲虫群 Contortion Swarm

Carapace Pummels.name: 甲壳猛击 Carapace Pummels
Carapace Pummels.description:
需求 扭体虫群正栖居于一簇物体之中

效果 虫群用它们用作甲壳的大量杂物痛击其空间内的每个敌人，造成 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，目标需进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] 豁免。

Requirements The contortion swarm is Inhabiting a cluster of objects

Effect The swarm pummels each enemy in its space with the multitude of junk they use as carapaces, dealing @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:20|basic:true] save.

Inhabit.name: 居住 Inhabit
Inhabit.description:
需求 扭体虫群当前未在物体内栖居

效果 扭体虫群中的每一只幼年扭体爬行者都会爬入相邻的一件无人看管的微型物体中，且该物体的硬度为5或更低，例如金属罐、小袋子或类似容器。这些容器会变为异次元空间，其内部足以容纳幼体爬行者进入，不受该物体外部容积影响。栖居于物体内时，扭体虫群的AC获得+2环境加值，并失去其对区域与溅射伤害的弱点。就虫群整体而言，被栖居的物体其硬度提高至5，而其生命值与破坏阈值分别通过扭体虫群的异次元魔法提高至20与10；在受到足以将其破坏的伤害后，或若扭体虫群受到5点或更多的区域伤害或溅射伤害，它们的居所会被摧毁，直到虫群栖居新的居所为止。不栖居于物体内时，扭体虫群无法使用其 Carapace Pummels 或 Retract 能力。

Requirements The contortion swarm isn't currently Inhabiting objects

Effect Each individual juvenile contortion creeper in the contortion swarm crawls inside an adjacent unattended Tiny object with Hardness 5 or less, such as a metal can, a small bag, or similar container. The containers become extradimensional spaces with an interior large enough for the juvenile creepers to fit inside, regardless of the object's exterior volume. While Inhabiting an object, the contortion swarm gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and loses its weaknesses to area and splash damage. The inhabited objects for the swarm as a whole have their Hardness increase to 5, and their Hit Points and Break Threshold respectively increase to 20 and 10 via the contortion swarm's extradimensional magic; after taking enough damage to break, or if the contortion swarm takes 5 or more area damage or splash damage, their dwellings are destroyed until the swarm Inhabits new ones. When not Inhabiting objects, the contortion swarm can't use its Carapace Pummels or Retract abilities.

Pilfering Hands.name: 妙手行窃 Pilfering Hands
Pilfering Hands.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 扭曲虫群伸出他们的多只手，轻松地偷取多个物体。扭曲虫群尝试进行盗窃检定，以对占据其空间的至多两个生物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{偷窃}。与通常的偷窃不同，即使这两个生物正在战斗中或以其他方式保持警戒，他们也可以尝试从这两个生物处进行偷窃。

Frequency once per round

Effect The contortion swarm extends their many hands to pilfer multiple objects with ease. The contortion swarm attempts Thievery checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{Steal} from up to two creatures occupying their space. Unlike normal for Stealing, they can attempt to Steal from these two creatures even if those creatures are in combat or are otherwise on their guard.

Retract.name: 收回 Retract
Retract.description:
需求 扭曲虫群栖居于一个物体内

效果 扭曲虫群的组成成员完全缩回它们临时拼凑的甲壳中。它们对AC的环境加值提高至+4，且它们无法采取动作，除非再次使用此动作以从它们的甲壳中出来。

Requirements The contortion swarm Inhabits an object

Effect The contortion swarm's constituent members fully withdraw into their improvised carapaces. Their circumstance bonus to AC increases to +4, and they can't take actions except to use this action again to come out of their carapaces.

Contortion Swarm.publicNotes:
扭体虫群由一小群幼年扭体潜行者组成。这些潜行者栖息在垃圾与废弃杂物堆积成的堆与簇中。一旦幼年扭体潜行者的体型大到其甲壳容纳不下，它们便会离开群落，开始独自闯荡。

扭体者是一类畸变生物家族，具有一种独特的行为：像寄居蟹一样，它们会寻找并栖居于被丢弃的物体中，将其作为居所，以保护其脆弱的身体免受伤害。然而，与寄居蟹不同的是，扭体者更倾向于栖居在类人聚居地中发现的废物，而不是海滩上的贝壳。像寄居蟹一样，扭体者会持续生长，并不断更换为越来越大的居所。最小的可能住在一只鞋里，而最大的则大到足以栖居在小型建筑中。

扭体群落

当一只成熟的扭体潜行者或扭体王冠发现了足够数量的废物时，这座新的宝藏宝库带来的狂喜会使其手臂根部周围的息肉膨胀。最终，这些息肉会爆裂，释放出一小群幼体扭体者。群落成员会栖居于较小的废物碎片中，直到它们长到足以形成扭体虫群为止。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（光），技能物品（杂技，盗窃）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），野性

A contortion swarm consists of a small colony of young contortion creepers. These creepers inhabit piles and clusters of litter and discarded junk. Once a young contortion creeper becomes too large for their carapace, they leave the colony to strike out on their own.

Contortions are a family of aberrations that share a distinctive behavior: like hermit crabs, they find and inhabit discarded objects, which they use as dwellings to protect their vulnerable bodies from harm. However, unlike hermit crabs, contortions tend to inhabit junk found in humanoid settlements rather than shells on the beach. Like hermit crabs, contortions continue to grow and trade up to larger and larger dwellings. While the smallest might live in a shoe, the largest are big enough to inhabit small buildings.

Contortion Colonies

When a mature contortion creeper or contortion crown comes across a large enough quantity of junk, the glee from this new treasure trove causes polyps to swell up around the base of their arms. Eventually, these polyps explode, releasing a small colony of infant contortions. The members of the colony inhabit the smaller pieces of junk until they grow enough to form a contortion swarm.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), skill items (Acrobatics, Thievery)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), wild

Cloaked Cadaver.name: 披覆斗篷的尸骸 Cloaked Cadaver

Lifesense 60 feet.name: 生命感知 60 尺 Lifesense 60 feet
Lifesense 60 feet.description:
斗篷尸骸能够在60尺内以感官察觉活与不死生物的生命精华。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Lifesense]

A cloaked cadaver can sense the vital essence of living and undead creatures within 60 feet.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Lifesense]

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: 阳光无力 Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description:
一具被斗篷遮蔽的尸体在阳光下会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 2} 和 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{迟缓 2}，只要它仍然处于阳光下就会一直如此。

A cloaked cadaver caught in sunlight is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 2} for as long as it remains in the sunlight.

Touch of Paralysis.name: 麻痹接触 Touch of Paralysis

Cloaked Embrace.name: 披风般的拥抱 Cloaked Embrace
Cloaked Embrace.description:
需求 一名相邻的活生物处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{Paralyzed}

效果 披斗尸体抽取该生物的生命精华；该生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:29]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}，并在1小时内获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}。

失败 该生物受到@Damage[12d6[void]]伤害，获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 2}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 2}，并在1小时内获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}。

大失败 同失败，但该生物受到[[/r 24d6[void]]]伤害。

Requirements An adjacent living creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{Paralyzed}

Effect The cloaked cadaver drains the vital essences of the creature, which must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 hour.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[12d6[void]] damage, is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 2}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Doomed]{Doomed 2}, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 hour.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes [[/r 24d6[void]]] damage.

Soul's Anguish.name: 灵魂的痛苦 Soul's Anguish
Soul's Anguish.description:
触发 一名活生物在离披斗篷的尸体20尺内死亡

效果 披斗篷的尸体吸收该生物的灵魂，并在开始以其为食时恢复等同于该生物等级数量的生命值。灵魂以这种方式被吸收的生物无法被复活，除非披斗篷的尸体在7天内被杀死。若披斗篷的尸体在7天内未被杀死，该生物的灵魂会被完全吞噬，且只能通过强大的效果（如@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.YfJTXyVGzLhM6V8U]{Miracle}或@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish}）才能使其恢复生命。

Trigger A living creature dies within 20 feet of the cloaked cadaver

Effect The cloaked cadaver absorbs the creature's soul and regains a number of Hit Points equal to the creature's level as it begins to feed off of it. A creature whose soul has been absorbed in this way can't be resurrected unless the cloaked cadaver is killed within 7 days. If the cloaked cadaver isn't killed within 7 days the creature's soul is completely consumed and can only be restored to life by a powerful effect such as @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.YfJTXyVGzLhM6V8U]{Miracle} or @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish}.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被隐匿尸骸的攻击命中的活生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] 豁免，否则会陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且在每次豁免失败后，该DC累积降低1。

Any living creature hit by a cloaked cadaver's attack must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:26] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 after each failed save.

Cloaked Cadaver.publicNotes:
实验的产物如今已湮没于年代之中，斗篷尸体既危险又罕见。它们因披着斗篷的外貌而得名，最为人所知的是其可怕的能力：麻痹受害者并吞噬其灵魂。

很少有人能在与这些邪恶存在的遭遇中生还，尽管本就鲜有人会遇见它们。幸存者的故事与报告显示，它们偏好潮湿昏暗之处，并对阳光十分脆弱；这一点成为许多不幸撞见它们的人得以生还的主要因素。斗篷尸体通常潜伏在古老遗址与废墟附近，最常单独行动或成对出没。有些传闻提到，当斗篷尸体吞噬了无数灵魂后，可能会形成更强大的变体。发动攻击时，斗篷尸体会先尝试通过麻痹受害者来解除任何威胁，随后再以拥抱来汲取对方。

许多学者推测，现存的少数斗篷尸体可能已是其族群的末裔，皆源自很久以前同一批最初的产物。该理论引起了学者、死灵法师与探险者的共同兴趣，他们都试图理解斗篷尸体隐秘的起源，并追溯至其古代造物主。

多彩斗篷

学者注意到，幸存者对斗篷尸体遭遇中所见斗篷的描述存在显著差异。有的记载称其破烂而肮脏，另一些则提及华丽的刺绣与鲜艳的色彩，仿佛王室葬礼的裹尸布。斗篷的状态可能反映了斗篷尸体所吞噬灵魂的数量与力量。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 护甲（光），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技、威吓、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，负能量，野性，有翼

The product of experimentation now lost to the ages, cloaked cadavers are as dangerous as they are rare. Named after their cloaked appearance, they are best known for their terrifying ability to paralyze their victims and consume their souls.

Few survive encounters with these malevolent beings, though not many encounter them to begin with. Survivor stories and reports indicate a preference for damp, dark places and a vulnerability to sunlight, a leading factor in the survival of many unfortunate enough to stumble upon one. Cloaked cadavers are generally found lurking around ancient sites and ruins, most often alone or in pairs. Some stories mention more powerful variants that might form after a cloaked cadaver consumes countless souls. When attacking, cloaked cadavers first attempt to neutralize any threats by paralyzing their victims before going in to drain them with an embrace.

Many scholars speculate that the few remaining cloaked cadavers are among the last of their kind, sourced from a single original batch long ago. This theory has piqued the interest of scholars, necromancers, and explorers alike, who seek to understand cloaked cadavers' hidden origins and trace them back to their ancient creators.

Cloak Of Many Colors

Scholars have noted significant discrepancies in how survivors of cloaked cadaver encounters describe their cloaks. Some accounts call them tattered and grimy, while others speak of ornate embroidery and vivid colors that resemble royal funeral shrouds. The condition of the cloak may reflect the power and number of souls a cloaked cadaver has consumed.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, negative, wild, winged

Citric Evaporite.name: 柠檬酸蒸发岩 Citric Evaporite
Citric Evaporite.tokenName: 柠檬酸蒸发岩 Citric Evaporite

Absorb Energy.name: 吸收能量 Absorb Energy
Absorb Energy.description:
当柠檬蒸发岩以其水晶形态与火焰或电击能量任一能量类型接触时，它会吸收该能量，将其身体转化为熔融形态，持续3轮。处于熔融形态时，它获得快速治疗5。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.NfeERxWUjNErThhZ]{效果：熔融形态}

The citric evaporite absorbs fire and electrical energy when it comes in contact with either energy type in its crystal form, transforming its body into a molten form for 3 rounds. It gains fast healing 5 while in the molten form.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.NfeERxWUjNErThhZ]{Effect: Molten Form}

Cooldown.name: 冷却时间 Cooldown
Cooldown.description:
该柠檬蒸发岩在其熔融形态下连续3轮未接触火焰、熔岩或电能，且未能对温血生物成功进行一次近战打击后会冷却。当这种情况发生时，它会变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1} 并恢复为其晶体形态。

The citric evaporite cools down after being in its molten form for 3 rounds without contacting fire, lava, or electrical energy or succeeding on a melee Strike against a warm- blooded creature. When that happens, it becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 1} and reverts to its crystal form.

Motion Sense 60 feet.name: 运动感官 60 尺 Motion Sense 60 feet
Motion Sense 60 feet.description:
柠檬蒸发岩可以通过振动以及空气或水的移动感知附近的生物。

Citric evaporite can sense nearby creatures through vibration and air or water movement.

Steam Explosion.name: 蒸汽爆炸 Steam Explosion
Steam Explosion.description:
当柠檬蒸发岩处于其熔融形态并被至少5加仑的水击中时，击中超热熔融柠檬酸盐的水会立刻蒸发成一团蒸汽云，笼罩该区域。这会在 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内遮蔽该区域，持续 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}，并具有遮蔽迷雾的效果，同时柠檬蒸发岩凝结为其晶体形态。除了柠檬蒸发岩外，所有位于该放射内的生物受到 @Damage[12d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] 豁免）。

When the citric evaporite is in its molten form and is hit by at least 5 gallons of water, the water hitting the superheated molten citrate immediately evaporates into a cloud of steam enveloping the area. This obscures the area in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}, with the effects of obscuring mist, and the citric evaporite condenses into its crystal form. All creatures except the citric evaporite within the emanation takes @Damage[12d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] save).

Body Splash.name: 身体溅射 Body Splash
Body Splash.description:
需求 该柠檬蒸发盐处于熔融形态

效果 该柠檬蒸发盐聚拢其物质并在15尺扩散区域内喷射而出。区域内的每个人受到 @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning],8d6[fire]]{8d6 钝击伤害和 8d6 火焰} 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] 豁免）。在一次 Body Splash 之后，该柠檬蒸发盐会溅满地面，并且在执行任何其他动作之前必须使用 Reform。直到它下一次进入熔融形态之前，它不能再次使用 Body Splash。

Requirements The citric evaporite is in molten form

Effect The citric evaporate gathers up its material and spews it in a 15 foot emanation. Everyone in the area takes @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning],8d6[fire]]{8d6 bludgeoning damage and 8d6 fire} damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] save). After a Body Splash, the citric evaporite splashes all over the ground and must use Reform before performing any other actions. It can't use Body Splash again until the next time it enters molten form.

Lava Glide.name: 熔岩滑行 Lava Glide
Lava Glide.description:
柠檬蒸发岩可以以其熔融形态的速度穿过熔岩，但在离开熔岩后无法保持其形态。当离开一片熔岩区域时，它必须在执行任何其他动作之前使用重塑。

The citric evaporite can move through lava up to its molten form Speed, but it can't retain its form after leaving the lava. When leaving an area of lava, it must use Reform before performing any other actions.

Reform.name: 重整 Reform
Reform.description:
柠檬酸蒸发岩将其身体重塑为一个连贯的结构，并能够再次行动。在使用身体飞溅或离开一片熔岩区域后，柠檬酸蒸发岩会融化到必须先重塑自身才能行动的程度。

The citric evaporite reforms its body into a cohesive structure and is able to act again. After using Body Splash or leaving an area of lava, the citric evaporite melts to the point that it must Reform itself before acting.

Citric Evaporite.publicNotes:
柠檬蒸发盐，也被称为水晶泥怪或熔岩泥怪，可以在两个地点发现：地下深处、某些火山熔流附近，或富含盐分的季节性湖泊周边。发现于湖边的个体通常更为迟缓，并且很容易被大量水流冲散。发现于地下的个体则能轻易滑入熔岩之中，在以惊人的速度喷涌而出、扑向毫无戒备的猎物之前几乎隐形。

柠檬蒸发盐有两种形态：其盐柠檬酸盐的结晶形态，移动缓慢、相当温顺，并会缓慢吞噬附近的柠檬酸盐沉积；以及其熔融形态，迅捷、难以预测，且倾向于进行具有攻击性的破坏。熔融形态会寻找附近的热源，包括温血生物，以维持其蓄热能力。

当柠檬蒸发盐发动攻击时，乍看之下，受害者会看到一团成形良好但略显浑浊的晶体结构。晶体的小碎片可以被研磨成粉，形成一种粉末状盐，或许很适合烘焙使用。但那些胆敢靠近到那种距离的人很快就会醒悟——晶体会伸出并缠绕住他们。

从柠檬蒸发盐身上采集到的少量柠檬酸盐样本，在储存魔法能量与热能方面极其有用，不过在水源附近必须格外小心。

别太“咸”

柠檬蒸发盐的攻击性质会在受害者身上留下覆盖全身的一层盐。这些残留物不足以构成一个独立的生物，但它可能会让尸体以诡异的方式继续活动，直到冷却为止。发现这些尸体是采集柠檬酸盐最安全的方法，这也是为什么从事那项利润丰厚的行当的人总是无可挑剔地礼貌，并主动提出让别人先走在他们前面。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 175/390/720 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），察觉物品，技能物品（运动，潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸害，体质，能量抗性（电击、火焰），火焰，加固，力量，狂野

Citric evaporites, also known as crystal oozes or lava oozes, can be found in two locations: deep underground, near certain volcanic flows, or near salt-rich seasonal lakes. Those found near the lakes are typically more sluggish and can easily be dispersed by aqueous deluges. Those found underground can easily slip into lava, becoming nearly invisible before erupting out at terrifying speeds towards unsuspecting prey.

Citric evaporites exist in two forms: their salt citrate crystalline form, which is slow-moving, reasonably docile, and slowly consumes nearby citrate formations; and their molten form, which is fast, unpredictable, and prone to aggressive destruction. The molten form seeks out nearby heat sources, including warm- blooded creatures, to maintain its heat capacity.

When a citric evaporite attacks, on first inspection, victims see a well-formed but slightly cloudy crystal formation. Small bits of the crystal can be ground, creating a powdery salt that might work well for baking. But those who venture that close are quickly disillusioned as the crystal reaches out to wrap around them.

Small samples of the citric salt harvested from a citric evaporite are extremely useful in storing magical and thermal energy, though extreme care must be taken near water sources.

Don't Be Salty

The nature of the citric evaporite's attacks leaves a layer of salt covering its victims. This residue is insufficient to constitute its own creature, though it can cause the corpse to continue moving in eerie ways until it cools down. Finding these bodies is the safest way of harvesting citric salt, which is why those in that lucrative trade are always unfailingly polite and offer to let others go ahead of them.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 175/390/720 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (electricity, fire), fire, fortification, strength, wild
Citric Evaporite.prototypeToken: 柠檬酸蒸发岩 Citric Evaporite

Chronoceros.name: 时空犀牛 Chronoceros

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

All-Seeing Eyes.name: 全视之眼 All-Seeing Eyes
All-Seeing Eyes.description:
需求 时角犀本回合尚未行动

效果 时角犀睁开其额外的眼睛，或者如果它们已经睁开则将其闭上。睁开其额外的眼睛会赋予时角犀使用其特殊能力的能力。然而，精神上的紧张使时角犀在其每个回合结束时承受 @Damage[1[mental]] 伤害。如果时角犀无法行动，它那全视之眼会自行闭合。

Requirements The chronoceros hasn't acted yet this turn

Effect The Chronoceros opens its additional eyes, or closes them if they were already open. Having its additional eyes open grants the chronoceros the ability to use its special abilities. However, the mental strain causes the chronoceros to suffer @Damage[1[mental]] damage at the end of each of its turns. If the chronoceros can't act, its all-seeing eyes close on their own.

Avoid Fate.name: 避开命运 Avoid Fate
Avoid Fate.description:
需求 时角犀的全视之眼处于开启状态

触发 时角犀被其能看见的一名生物以大成功或大失败命中

效果 时角犀预见即将到来的危险。攻击的生物对触发的攻击掷骰重骰。若第二次攻击掷骰仍为大成功或大失败命中，则触发的攻击仍为大成功或大失败命中。在所有其他情况下，触发的攻击改为普通命中。无论结果如何，时角犀受到 @Damage[1d4[mental]] 伤害。

Requirements The chronoceros has its All-Seeing Eyes open

Trigger The chronoceros is critically hit by a creature it can see

Effect The chronoceros foretells the incoming danger. The attacking creature rerolls the triggering attack roll. If the second attack roll is also a critical hit, then the triggering attack remains a critical hit. In all other cases, the triggering attack becomes a normal hit instead. Regardless of the result, the chronoceros takes @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage.

Chronoceros Charge.name: 时骸犀冲锋 Chronoceros Charge
Chronoceros Charge.description:
需求 时空犀牛的全视之眼处于开启状态

效果 时空犀牛进行两次疾走，然后进行一次犀角打击。只要时空犀牛至少移动了20尺，该打击的伤害就增加1d10。时空犀牛的移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作（如借机攻击）。然后时空犀牛受到 @Damage[1d6[mental]] 伤害。

Requirements The chronoceros has its All-Seeing Eyes open

Effect The chronoceros Strides twice, then makes a horn Strike. As long as the Chronoceros moved at least 20 feet, the Strike's damage increases by 1d10. The chronoceros's movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement (such as Attack of Opportunity). The chronoceros then takes @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage.

Glimpse of the Future.name: 未来一瞥 Glimpse of the Future
Glimpse of the Future.description:
需求 时序犀兽的全视之眼处于睁开状态

效果 时序犀兽将目光聚焦于其在30英尺内能看见的一个生物。该生物对时序犀兽而言处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} 状态，直到时序犀兽对不同的目标使用此能力、闭上眼睛，或失去对所选生物的视觉线。当时序犀兽使用未来一瞥后，以及当此能力处于激活状态时在每个回合开始时，时序犀兽受到 @Damage[1[mental]] 伤害。

Requirements The chronoceros has its All-Seeing Eyes open

Effect The chronoceros focuses its gaze on a creature it can see within 30 feet. That creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} to the chronoceros until the chronoceros uses this ability against a different target, closes its eyes, or loses line of sight to the chosen creature. After using Glimpse of the Future and at the start of each turn if the ability is active, the chronoceros takes @Damage[1[mental]] damage.

Chronoceros.publicNotes:
乍一看，时角犀看起来就像一头普通的犀牛，只是它有五只眼睛——头部两侧一对、鬃毛下方一对，以及额头中央一只。当该生物处于休息状态时，它只会睁开头部两侧的那一对，这使得其他眼睛很难被注意到。然而，一旦受到惊扰，该生物便会通过睁开额外的眼睛并释放其力量来显露其真正本性，尽管这会造成精神上的负担。

其额头上的额外眼睛能够看见不久的未来，使该生物能在来袭攻击发生之前就加以闪避。另一对额外眼睛则能看见每一刻不断展开的不同可能性，从而让时角犀能够选择攻击其目标的最佳方式并最大化伤害。

时角犀通常是一种安静而和平的食草生物，因此它更可能逃跑而不是战斗。然而，在交配季节或当时角犀的幼崽受到威胁时，它们会变得愈发具有攻击性。

时角犀与普通犀牛共享相同的栖息地，事实上，人们甚至能观察到它们混杂在一起。尚不清楚它们那些无智慧的近亲是否意识到彼此之间的差异，还是仅仅将时角犀视作同类。有时，感知到危险的时角犀会故意煽动犀牛群的奔逃，以确保自身逃脱。

使用额外眼睛所带来的精神消耗迫使时角犀在选择何时使用其能力时极为谨慎；它们往往转而利用其令人印象深刻的体型在冲突开始前吓退潜在的捕食者。只有当冲突不可避免时，它们才会不惜代价释放全部潜能。

及时干预

时角犀的起源一直是争论不休的话题。尽管有人声称它们是与自身起源位面失去联系的畸变体，但大多数人认为它们原本是普通犀牛，被某位时间或预言之神改变。一则传奇称，猎人曾将犀牛逼至濒临灭绝，而那位神赐福其中一些，以保卫其余同类。另一则则更为阴暗：据称最初的时角犀不慎踩到那位神的圣兽，因此招致了痛苦的预见诅咒，使其能够预知并避免重蹈覆辙。

推荐怪物部件

怪物部件 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型，中型），察觉物品，技能物品（杂技，运动，求生）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，体质，能量抗性（正能量），力量，坚固，野性

At first glance, a chronoceros resembles a regular rhinoceros, except that it has five eyes —one pair on the side of its head, one pair under its mane of hair, and one in the middle of its forehead. While the creature is at rest, it only has the ones on the sides of its head open, which makes the others difficult to notice. If disturbed, however, the creature reveals its true nature by opening its additional eyes and unleashing their powers, despite the mental strain this causes.

The extra eye in its forehead is able to see the near future, allowing the creature to avoid incoming attacks before they're made. The other extra pair sees the different possibilities unraveling moment by moment, so that the chronoceros can choose the best way to attack its target and maximize damage.

A chronoceros is usually a quiet and peaceful herbivore creature, and thus it is more likely to run away rather than fight. However, during mating season or when a chronoceros' calves are threatened, they become increasingly aggressive.

Chronoceroses share the same habitat as ordinary rhinoceroses, and in fact, they can even be observed mingling together. It's unclear if their nonsapient cousins are aware of the difference between them or whether they simply treat chronoceroses as their own. Sometimes a chronoceros sensing danger intentionally incites a rhinoceros stampede to ensure its own escape.

The mental exertion that comes from using their extra eyes forces chronoceroses to be extremely careful as to when they choose to use their abilities, often opting instead to use their impressive size to scare off potential predators before a conflict begins. Only when conflict is inevitable will they resort to unleashing their full potential, despite the costs.

Timely Intervention

The origin of chronoceroses is a subject of much debate. While some claim they are aberrations who lost their connection to their plane of origin, most think they were ordinary rhinoceroses changed by a god of time or prophecy. One legend states that hunters once drove rhinoceroses to the brink of extinction, and the god blessed some of them to defend the others. Another takes a dimmer view, claiming the original chronoceros accidentally stepped on a sacred animal of the god, bringing upon it the curse of painful foresight so that it could predict and avoid repeating the mistake.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, energy resistant (positive), strength, sturdy, wild

Chosaintor.name: 乔桑托尔 Chosaintor

Bond Companion.name: 羁绊伙伴 Bond Companion
Bond Companion.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 chosaintor与其在60尺内可看见的一名脆弱孩童建立防护性的羁绊；若chosaintor试图使用此能力而目标并非有效的脆弱孩童（由GM酌情决定），chosaintor当日仍可再次使用该能力，忽略通常的频率限制。只要羁绊存在，chosaintor便可与其缔结羁绊的同伴进行心灵感应交流，射程为300尺。chosaintor同一时间只能拥有一名缔结羁绊的同伴，因此再次使用Bond Companion会终止先前的羁绊。当chosaintor的同伴成为成年人时，羁绊也会被打破（此年代因文化与个体成熟度而异，并由GM决定）。最后，若chosaintor或缔结羁绊的同伴死亡，羁绊也会终止。

Frequency once per day

Effect The chosaintor forms a protective bond with a vulnerable child it can see within 60 feet; if the chosaintor attempts to use this ability and the target isn't a valid vulnerable child (GM's discretion), the chosaintor can use the ability again on the same day, ignoring the usual frequency limitations. While the bond exists, the chosaintor can communicate telepathically with their bonded companion with a range of 300 feet. The chosaintor can only have one bonded companion at a time, so using Bond Companion again ends the previous bond. The bond is also broken when the chosaintor's companion becomes an adult (this age varies based on culture and individual maturity, and is determined by the GM). Finally, the bond also ends if the chosaintor or the bonded companion dies.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语甜如蜜糖，你的容貌仿佛沐浴在梦幻的薄雾之中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则法术结束。法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突——这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续把你当作朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备，并且你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的差遣。只要你维持法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 冷却、加热或为1磅非生物材料调味。
  • 举起 缓慢地 将一件无人持用、负载为光或更低的物体缓慢抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法术材料。
  • 整理 为一件负载为光或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮的专注影响一件负载为1的物体；更大的物体则每点负载需要1分钟。

戏法无法造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体造成的任何实际改变（超出上述注明者）仅在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Tame.name: 驯服 Tame
Tame.description:
当你发出安抚的声音并做出手势时，你以友善的方式接近目标，将谨慎与自信结合在一起。除非目标在一次意志豁免中成功，否则在法术的持续时间内，你使目标对你的态度提升一级（不友善变为中立，中立变为友善，友善变为乐于助人）。之后，目标获得持续1天的暂时免疫。

该法术只对已驯化的动物生效；例如，你可以将其用于护卫犬或流浪狗，但不能用于野化的狗或狼。若动物是否已社会化存疑，则由GM决定。

强化（3环） 持续时间变为10分钟。

强化（6环） 持续时间变为1小时。

As you make comforting sounds and gestures, you approach the target in a friendly manner combining caution and confidence. You improve the target's attitude to you by one step (unfriendly to neutral, neutral to friendly, friendly to helpful) for the duration of the spell unless it succeeds at a Will save. Afterward, the target is temporarily immune for 1 day.

This spell works on only domesticated animals; for example, you could use it on guard dogs or stray dogs, but not feral dogs or wolves. If the socialization of the animal is in question, the decision is up to the GM.

Heightened (3rd) The duration becomes 10 minutes.

Heightened (6th) The duration becomes 1 hour.

Nightmarish Protector.name: 梦魇守护者 Nightmarish Protector
Nightmarish Protector.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 chosaintor 已与一名同伴建立羁绊，且该同伴正受到直接威胁

效果 chosaintor 为了更好地保护其同伴而成长为更可怕的形态。chosaintor 从超小型变为小型，获得5尺触及、10点临时生命值，以及对其攻击与伤害掷骰获得+2状态加值。这些效果持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.7DRvxSb6GCzqJRlR]{效果：梦魇守护者}

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements The chosaintor has Bonded a Companion, and the companion is actively threatened

Effect The chosaintor grows into a more fearsome form in order to better protect their companion. The chosaintor grows from Tiny to Small, gains a 5 foot reach, 10 temporary Hit Points, and a +2 status bonus to their attack and damage rolls. The effects last for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.Item.7DRvxSb6GCzqJRlR]{Effect: Nightmarish Protector}

Chosaintor.publicNotes:
乔圣托会出现在脆弱或生活在不安全处境中的孩子身边。这些生物会利用自己那双圆睁大眼、天真无害的外表来援助它们与孩子交朋友，只有在必要时才会诉诸它们的魅惑法术。一旦它们与某个孩子建立羁绊，便能运用自身能力以心灵感应与孩子说话，将彼此之间的联系加深为友谊。对于除羁绊孩子之外的其他人而言，乔圣托看起来就像一只永远不会长大的圆眼小猫，只会用喵呜声说话。

乔圣托会把“床底下有怪物”的儿童故事当作掩蔽来保护自己的身份。毕竟，所有故事都根植于事实。乔圣托与传说中它们的形象恰恰相反，这一点让它们觉得非常有趣。

夜里，当孩子入睡时，乔圣托会蜷缩在与之建立羁绊的孩子床脚下，整夜守望着沉睡的孩子。如果它们看到有人威胁自己的同伴，它们的外表就会变得更加凶猛。它们的身高会增至原来的两倍，通常会试图吓退潜在的攻击者。若攻击者仍不退去，乔圣托便会发起攻击，残暴地露出獠牙与利爪，撕裂威胁。当乔圣托完成清理后，它们不会留下任何证据，让孩子在早晨发现威胁的痕迹或它们自己的守护动作。

吉庆传承

乔圣托与孩子之间的魔法羁绊可能会在成年时断裂，但情感羁绊仍会留存。乔圣托更喜欢在曾经的被守护者附近建立新的羁绊，并且若需要援助，它们可能会召唤那些识破其真实本性的人。一些饱受战火折磨的社群甚至会崇拜这些妖精，把它们当作守护者；但大多数人只是将这份善意传递下去，通过照料其他孩子或动物来回报。对那些与乔圣托一同长大的人来说，猫是很受欢迎的宠物，不过当他们第一次得知真正的猫会吐毛球时，往往会被吓一跳。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（光、 中型）、技能物品（特技、运动、欺瞒、交涉、威吓、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 祸根、混沌、魅力、敏捷、能量抗性（正能量）、精神、法术（原初：魅惑、魔法伎俩、驯服）、狂野

Chosaintors appear to children who are vulnerable or living in unsafe situations. The creatures use their wide-eyed, innocent appearance to aid them in befriending the child, resorting to their charm spells only if needed. Once they bond with a child, they are able to use their abilities to telepathically speak with the child, deepening the bond between them into one of friendship. To those other than the bonded child, the chosaintor appears as a wide-eyed kitten who never grows, speaking only in mews and meows.

Chosaintors use the children's stories of monsters under the bed as cover to protect their identities. All stories are rooted in fact, after all. That the chosaintors are exactly opposite of the tales told of them amuses them greatly.

At night, a chosaintor curls up under the foot of their bonded child's bed as the child sleeps, keeping a watchful eye on the sleeping child throughout the night. If they see someone threatening their companion, their appearance changes to something far fiercer. Doubling in height, they typically attempt to scare off the would-be attacker. If the attacker persists, the chosaintor then launches an attack, brutally baring their teeth and claws as they tear into the threat. When a chosaintor has finished the job, they leave no evidence of the threat or their own protective actions for the child to find in the morning.

Felicitous Legacies

The magical bond between chosaintor and child may break upon adulthood, but the emotional bond remains. Chosaintors prefer creating new bonds close to their former wards and may call upon those who figured out their true nature if they need aid. Some embattled communities even worship the fey as their protectors, but most simply pay forward the kindness by caring for other children or animals. Cats are popular pets for those who grow up with chosaintors, though they are in for a fright the first time they learn that real ones vomit hairballs.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), mental, spells (Primal: charm, prestidigitation, tame), wild

Celestial Geometry.name: 天界几何学 Celestial Geometry

Lifesense (Imprecise) 50 feet.name: 生命感知（不精确）50尺 Lifesense (Imprecise) 50 feet

Sphere Shift.name: 界域转移 Sphere Shift
Sphere Shift.description:
触发 天体几何体结束其回合

效果 天体几何体使自身与一颗行星的轨道对齐，从元素调谐中选择一个选项，且必须与其当前选择不同。天体几何体根据其选择获得元素调谐效果，并可根据其选择使用几何唤能。

Trigger The celestial geometry ends its turn

Effect The celestial geometry aligns itself with the orbit of a planet, choosing an option from elemental attunement, which must be different from its current choice. The celestial geometry gains the elemental attunement effect based on its choice, and can use the Geometric Evocation based on its choice.

Elemental Attunement.name: 元素调谐 Elemental Attunement
Elemental Attunement.description:
天界几何体在每次遭遇开始时与五种柏拉图立体之一协调，通常为炽焰四面体，并且它可以在每轮通过球体移位改变其协调。根据其协调，它获得下述防御能力，并且它可以使用对应的几何唤现。

天界几何体根据其元素协调获得以下协调效果。

  • 炽焰四面体 该几何体获得火焰与穿刺伤害15点抗力。
  • 大地六面体 该几何体获得所有物理伤害10点抗力。
  • 轰雷八面体 该几何体获得电击与挥砍伤害15点抗力。
  • 寒冰二十面体 该几何体获得寒冷与钝击伤害15点抗力。
  • 以太十二面体 该几何体暴露并重新配置其核心，获得12点临时HP，并将其@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态）}状态降至0，但在其使用球体移位改变其协调之前会变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。

     

A celestial geometry begins each encounter attuned to one of five platonic solids, typically blazing tetrahedron, and it can change its attunement each round with Sphere Shift. Depending on its attunement, it gains the defensive abilities stated below, and it can use the corresponding Geometric Evocation.

The celestial geometry gains the following attunement effects depending on its elemental attunement.

  • Blazing Tetrahedron The geometry gains resistance 15 to fire and piercing damage.
  • Earthen Hexahedron The geometry gains resistance 10 to all physical damage.
  • Thunderous Octahedron The geometry gains resistance 15 to electricity and slashing damage.
  • Icy Icosahedron The geometry gains resistance 15 to cold and bludgeoning damage.
  • Etheric Dodecahedron The geometry exposes and reconfigures its core, gaining 12 temporary HP and reducing its @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition to 0 but becoming @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until it uses Sphere Shift to change its attunement.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Dimension Door.name: 次元之门 Dimension Door
Dimension Door.description:
打开一扇绕过正常空间的门，你立刻将自己以及你穿戴和持握的所有物品从你当前的空间传送到你能看见的、射程内一个空旷的空间。若这会将另一个生物一同带来——即使你正把它装在异次元容器中携带——该法术将失效。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至1英里。你不需要能看见你的目的地，只要你过去到过那里，并且知道它相对于你的方位与距离即可。你暂时免疫1小时。

Opening a door that bypasses normal space, you instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to a clear space within range you can see. If this would bring another creature with you-even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container-the spell is lost.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 1 mile. You don't need to be able to see your destination, as long as you have been there in the past and know its relative location and distance from you. You are temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Teleport.name: 传送 Teleport
Teleport.description:
你和目标会立刻被传送到射程内的任意地点，只要你能够精确辨识该地点的位置（相对于你出发点的位置）以及其外观（或其他辨识特性）。对地点外观的错误认知通常会导致该法术失败，但也可能改为传送到不想去的地点，或发生其他由GM决定的异常意外。传送在长距离上并不精确。目标会出现在距离预定目的地一段距离处，该距离约等于总旅行距离的1%，方向由GM决定。对于短途旅行，这种不精确无关紧要，但对于长距离而言，偏差可能高达1英里。

升阶（第7等级） 你和其他目标可以旅行到1,000英里内的任意地点。

升阶（第8等级） 你和其他目标可以旅行到同一颗行星上的任意地点。若你旅行超过1,000英里，你只会偏离目标10英里到达。

升阶（第9等级） 你和其他目标可以旅行到同一恒星系内另一颗行星上的任意地点。只要你对该地点的位置与外观有准确认知，你会在新行星上偏离目标100英里到达。

升阶（第10等级） 如第9等级版本，但你和其他目标可以旅行到同一星系内的任意行星。

You and the targets are instantly transported to any location within range, as long as you can identify the location precisely both by its position relative to your starting position and by its appearance (or other identifying features). Incorrect knowledge of the location's appearance usually causes the spell to fail, but it could instead lead to teleporting to an unwanted location or some other unusual mishap determined by the GM. Teleport is not precise over great distances. The targets appear at a distance from the intended destination equal to roughly 1 percent of the total distance traveled, in a direction determined by the GM. For short journeys, this lack of precision is irrelevant, but for long distances this could be up to 1 mile.

Heightened (7th) You and the other targets can travel to any location within 1,000 miles.

Heightened (8th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on the same planet. If you travel more than 1,000 miles, you arrive only 10 miles off target.

Heightened (9th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on another planet within the same solar system. Assuming you have accurate knowledge of the location's position and appearance, you arrive on the new planet 100 miles off target.

Heightened (10th) As the 9th-level version, but you and the other targets can travel to any planet within the same galaxy.

Directive Necessity.name: 指令：必要性 Directive Necessity
Directive Necessity.description:
使用几何塑能时，天界几何体必须以射程内的最多生物为目标，即使在必要时也要将其盟友或其自身作为目标，并且其放射也会影响其自身。当其以自身为目标或其放射影响到自身时，天界几何体会额外受到@Damage[2d6[force]]伤害，使其呆滞（状态）值增加1（最大至@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4}），并且必须在其回合结束时使用球体转移反应动作（）。

When using Geometric Evocation, a celestial geometry must target the maximum number of creatures in range, even targeting its allies or itself when necessary, and its emanations affect itself. When targeting itself or affecting itself with its emanation, a celestial geometry takes an additional @Damage[2d6[force]] damage, increases its stupefied condition by 1 (to a maximum of @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4}), and must take the Sphere Shift reaction at the end of its turn.

Geometric Evocation.name: 几何塑能 Geometric Evocation
Geometric Evocation.description:
天界几何体会根据其元素调谐来施放一种法术。与通常规则一致，呆滞（状态）可能会扰乱该法术。如果需要进行法术攻击掷骰，则几何唤法具有攻击（特征）。在几何唤法期间进行的所有法术攻击都会计入天界几何体的多重攻击减值，但只在完成所有攻击之后才计入。法术攻击大成功会造成双倍伤害，而失败的法术攻击会失手且不造成伤害。

炽焰四面体（火焰）几何体对20尺内的3个生物进行法术攻击掷骰，这些生物不能全部处于同一条直线上（它们的位置必须形成一个三角形）。命中时，该生物受到[[/r (8d4+16)[fire]]]伤害。重击时，它还会受到[[/r 4d4[persistent,fire]]]伤害。

大地六面体（土）处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]内的生物以天界几何体的法术DC进行一次基础反射豁免，受到[[/r (6d6+6)[bludgeoning]]]伤害（通常为@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true|traits:earth]）。失败时，目标被击倒为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}，大失败时它还会被@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}持续1轮。空中生物将其豁免结果视为比其掷骰结果高一个成功等级。

以太十二面体（寒冷、火焰、土）处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]内的生物以天界几何体的法术DC进行一次基础强韧豁免，受到[[/r 12[fire],12[cold],12[bludgeoning]]]{12点火焰伤害、12点寒冷伤害，以及12点钝击伤害}（通常为@Check[type:fortitude|dc:37|basic:true|traits:cold,fire,earth]）。

寒冰二十面体（寒冷）几何体对100尺内的4个生物进行一次法术攻击掷骰。命中时，生物受到[[/r (2d10+10)[cold],(1d10+10)[piercing]]]{2d10 + 10寒冷伤害与1d10 + 10穿刺伤害}；具有标准掩蔽或更高掩蔽的生物不会受到穿刺伤害。

雷鸣八面体（电击、音波）几何体对40尺内4个未倒地的生物进行一次法术攻击掷骰。命中时，生物受到[[/r (2d8+8)[electricity],(2d8+8)[sonic]]]{2d8 + 8电击伤害与2d8 + 8音波伤害}。重击时，它们将@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{Deafened}持续1分钟。

The celestial geometry Casts a Spell depending on its elemental attunement. As normal, the stupefied condition can disrupt the spell. If a spell attack roll is required, Geometric Evocation has the attack trait. All spell attacks made during Geometric Evocation contribute to the celestial geometry's multiple attack penalty, but only after making all of the attacks. Critical success on a spell attack deals double damage, and a failed spell attack misses and deals no damage.

Blazing Tetrahedron (fire) The geometry makes spell attack rolls against three creatures within 20 feet, which can't all be in a straight line (their positions must form a triangle instead). On a hit, the creature takes [[/r (8d4+16)[fire]]] damage. On a critical hit, it also takes [[/r 4d4[persistent,fire]]] damage.

Earthen Hexahedron (earth) Creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] take [[/r (6d6+6)[bludgeoning]]] damage with a basic Reflex save against the celestial geometry's spell DC (Typically @Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true|traits:earth]). On a failure, the target is knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}, and on a critical failure it is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} for 1 round. Airborne creatures treat the result of their save as one degree of success better than the result they rolled.

Etheric Dodecahedron (cold, fire, earth) Creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] take [[/r 12[fire],12[cold],12[bludgeoning]]]{12 fire damage, 12 cold damage, and 12 bludgeoning damage} with a a basic Fortitude save against the celestial geometry's spell DC (Typically @Check[type:fortitude|dc:37|basic:true|traits:cold,fire,earth]).

Icy Icosahedron (cold) The geometry makes a spell attack roll against four creatures within 100 feet. On a hit, creatures take [[/r (2d10+10)[cold],(1d10+10)[piercing]]]{2d10 + 10 cold and 1d10 + 10 piercing} damage; creatures with standard cover or greater cover don't take the piercing damage.

Thunderous Octahedron (electricity, sonic) The geometry makes a spell attack roll against four creatures that aren't prone within 40 feet. On a hit, creatures take [[/r (2d8+8)[electricity],(2d8+8)[sonic]]]{2d8 + 8 electricity damage and 2d8 + 8 sonic damage}. On a critical hit, they are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Deafened]{Deafened} for 1 minute.

Celestial Geometry.publicNotes:
天界几何体是古老的机器，其构造超越了物理次元与人类理解。尽管人们对其起源所知甚少，但其目的很明确：它们存在是为了让某人或某物研究苍穹，并揭示与各个位面之间隐藏的联系。据传，天界几何体最终甚至能够洞悉关于存在与命运本质的神圣秘密。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 560/1,250/2,300 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（轻型、中型、重型）、盾牌、察觉物品、技能物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 灾祸、寒冷、体质、土、闪电、能量抗性（寒冷、闪电、火焰、正能量、负能量）、火焰、音波、法术（奥术：次元门、传送）、力量、坚固、野性、有翼

Celestial geometries are ancient machines whose construction transcends both physical dimensions and human understanding. Though very little is known of their origin, their purpose is clear: they exist to allow someone or something to study the heavens and reveal hidden connections to various planes. It is rumored that celestial geometries could ultimately even divine secrets about the nature of existence and fate.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 560/1,250/2,300 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light, medium, heavy), shield, perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, cold, constitution, earth, electricity, energy resistant (cold, electricity, fire, positive, negative), fire, sonic, spells (Arcane: dimension door, teleport), strength, sturdy, wild, winged

Cathartic Worm.name: 宣泄蠕虫 Cathartic Worm

Cathartic Void.name: 宣泄虚空 Cathartic Void
Cathartic Void.description:
40英尺。一只宣泄蠕虫的宣泄虚空灵光表现为一种情感上的空虚，使其中所有人麻木。每当一名生物在宣泄蠕虫的宣泄虚空灵光内结束其回合时，该生物必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:25] 豁免中成功，否则在其留在灵光内期间变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}。若该生物在其豁免中成功，则其对该宣泄蠕虫的宣泄虚空获得24小时的暂时免疫。

40 feet. A cathartic worm's cathartic void aura manifests as an emotional emptiness that numbs all those inside. Whenever a creature ends its turn within the cathartic worm's cathartic void aura, that creature must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} as long as the creature remains in the aura. If the creature succeeds at its saving throw, it becomes temporarily immune to that cathartic worm's cathartic void for 24 hours.

Cathartic Gaze.name: 宣泄凝视 Cathartic Gaze
Cathartic Gaze.description:
触发 一个位于宣泄之虫30英尺内、能够看见宣泄之虫且宣泄之虫也能看见的生物以打击、法术或能力将宣泄之虫作为目标

效果 宣泄之虫与触发生物四目相对。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:25] 豁免，否则会被强烈情绪的爆发所淹没。

成功 目标不受影响，并在接下来的24小时内暂时免疫。

失败 该凝视的效果取决于下方一次 [[/r 1d6]]{d6} 的结果。除d6掷出3的恐惧结果外，效果持续1轮。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但除d6掷出3的恐惧结果外，效果持续1分钟。

d6 效果

1 愤怒：目标的怒火使其变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 1}。

2 敬畏：目标对宣泄之虫的敬畏使其变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{迟钝 1}。

3 恐惧：目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{恐惧 1}。在大成功或大失败时，目标还会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{逃窜}，持续1轮。

4 憎恨：目标对宣泄之虫的憎恨使其在对抗宣泄之虫时变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{措手不及}。

5 爱恋：目标爱上宣泄之虫，但这种怪异情绪使其变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{困惑}。

6 悔恨：目标啜泣并因悔恨而获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{定身}。

Trigger A creature within 30 feet of the cathartic worm that can see the cathartic worm and that the cathartic worm can see targets the cathartic worm with a Strike, spell, or ability

Effect The cathartic worm locks eyes with the triggering creature. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save or become overwhelmed with a fit of powerful emotion.

Success The target isn't affected and is temporarily immune for the next 24 hours.

Failure The gaze has an effect depending on the result of a [[/r 1d6]]{d6} below. The effect lasts for 1 round, except for the fear result on a d6 roll of 3.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect lasts for 1 minute, except for the fear result on a d6 roll of 3.

d6 Effect

1 Anger: The target's rage causes it to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1}.

2 Awe: The target's awe toward the cathartic worm causes it to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}.

3 Fear: The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}. On a critical failure, the target is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

4 Hatred: The target's hatred toward the cathartic worm causes it to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} to the cathartic worm.

5 Love: The target falls in love with the cathartic worm, but this bizarre emotion causes it to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused}.

6 Remorse: The target sobs and becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} with remorse.

Cathartic Worm.publicNotes:
宣泄蠕虫是妖精界的龙类，作为情感吸血鬼（特征）行动，以周围人的情绪为食。

宣泄蠕虫不会一见到大多数生物就发动攻击。相反，它们会从空气中远远地跟随猎物，确保其目标体验到强烈的情绪，以便宣泄蠕虫进食。它们不在乎受害者感受到的是哪一种情绪或哪几种情绪的混合，只要情绪足够强烈即可。宣泄蠕虫啃食受害者的情绪时，会在远处进行，利用它们的灵光安抚受害者，使进食过程对宣泄蠕虫而言更简单、更安全。受害者很少甚至能理解发生了什么，往往在一次进食发生后感到平静且情绪稳定。宣泄蠕虫很少杀死受害者，因为它们没有这样做的必要，不过民间传说描述最暴烈的进食会让受害者心智破碎。

派对搅局者

由于高涨情绪的集中，庆典对宣泄蠕虫而言尤其是诱人的目标。妖精界的大型集会可能会吸引多条此类龙徘徊于外围，因此必须采取预防措施以防它们扰乱活动。最有效的技巧是在派对之外与宣泄蠕虫会面，并施放能在志愿者身上引发强烈情绪的法术来分散蠕虫注意。宣泄蠕虫不会太费力去绕过这些防御，因为它们知道这些分心之物只是开胃小菜。迟早，组织者会自愿让它们进来享用主菜，因为没有什么比把所有欢乐真的从房间里吸走更能宣告派对结束。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 90/200/360 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺），护甲（轻型、中型、重型），察觉物品，技能物品（特技动作、奥秘、运动、学识[情绪]、自然、秘术、潜行）

可用灌注属性 灾厄、混沌、体质、敏捷、延展、能量抗性（正能量）、精神、力量、狂野、翼生

Cathartic worms are dragons of the fey realm that act as emotional vampires, feeding on the emotions of those around them.

Cathartic worms don't attack most creatures on sight. Instead, they follow their prey from the air at a distance, ensuring that their target experiences strong emotions so the cathartic worm can feed. They don't care what emotion or collection of emotions their victim feels, as long as the emotions are strong. When a cathartic worm feeds on a victim's emotions, they do so from a distance, using their aura to pacify their victim and make the process of feeding simpler and safer for the cathartic worm. Victims rarely even understand what happened, often feeling calm and even-keeled after a feeding has occurred. Cathartic worms rarely kill their victims, since they have no need to do so, though folk tales describe the most violent of feedings as leaving victims with their minds shattered.

Party Crashers

Celebrations are especially tempting targets for cathartic worms due to the concentration of elevated emotions. Large gatherings in the fey realm may attract multiple such dragons to their periphery, where precautions must be taken to prevent them from disrupting the event. The most effective technique is to meet the cathartic worms away from the party and cast spells that elicit strong emotions in volunteers to distract the worms. The cathartic worms don't try too hard to circumvent these defenses, for they know that such distractions are simply appetizers. Sooner or later, the organizers will voluntarily let them in for the main course because nothing says the party's over like all the joy being literally sucked out of the room.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 90/200/360 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light, medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Arcana, Athletics, Lore [Emotion], Nature, Occultism, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), mental, strength, wild, winged

Caster Detritus.name: 施法者残屑 Caster Detritus

Burnt Hair.name: 焦发 Burnt Hair
Burnt Hair.description:
每当施法者残渣受到火焰伤害时，施法者残渣以 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 为范围内除施法者残渣以外的所有生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] 豁免。失败时，他们会变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}。

Whenever a caster detritus takes fire damage, all creatures other than caster detritus in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] of the caster detritus must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save. On a failure, they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Gaseous Form.name: 气态形态 Gaseous Form
Gaseous Form.description:
目标变形为气态。在此状态下，目标为无定形。它失去任何对AC的物品加值，以及来自护甲的所有其他效果和加值，并使用其无甲防御的熟练度调整值。它获得8点对物理伤害的抗力，并免疫精确伤害。它不能施放法术、启动物品，或使用具有攻击或操作（特征）的动作。它获得10英尺的飞行速度，并可以穿过微小的裂缝。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：气化形态}

The target transforms into a vaporous state. In this state, the target is amorphous. It loses any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and it uses its proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. It gains resistance 8 to physical damage and is immune to precision damage. It can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. It gains a fly Speed of 10 feet and can slip through tiny cracks. The target can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{Spell Effect: Gaseous Form}

Stinking Cloud.name: 臭云术 Stinking Cloud
Stinking Cloud.description:
你在区域内制造一团腐臭的雾云。该雾云如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist}一般运作，但会使在雾云内结束其回合的生物陷入反胃。（@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}隐蔽（状态）不是毒素效果。）

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}。

失败 该生物为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}，并在雾云中时为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。

大成功或大失败 该生物为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}，并为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}直到其离开雾云。

You create a cloud of putrid mist in the area. The cloud functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{Obscuring Mist} except it sickens creatures that end their turns within the cloud. (The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition is not a poison effect.)

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} while in the cloud.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until it leaves the cloud.

Glitterdust.name: 闪光尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
