区域内的生物会被闪烁的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。若某个生物的隐形被此法术抵消，则它处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}而非@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。无论该生物先前已处于Invisible状态，还是在此法术的隐形抵消效果结束前获得新的隐形效果，此规则均适用。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消2轮。

失败 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}1分钟，且其隐形被抵消1分钟。

大成功或大失败 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}1轮并Dazzled10分钟。其隐形被抵消10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你召唤出油脂，其效果取决于你选择区域或目标。

  • 区域 [4个相邻的5尺方格] 区域内所有坚实地面都被油脂覆盖。每个站在油滑表面上的生物必须成功通过一次反射豁免或一次特技检定（对抗你的法术DC），否则便会倒下并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用一个动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或一次特技检定以保持平衡。进行步行（Step）或匍匐（Crawl）的生物不必尝试检定或豁免。
  • 目标 [1个负载为1或更低的物体] 如果你将该法术施放在一个无人看管的物体上，任何试图拾起该物体的人都必须成功通过一次特技检定或反射豁免（对抗你的法术DC）才能做到。如果你以一个有人持用的物体为目标，则持有该物体的生物必须尝试一次特技检定或反射豁免。若失败，持有者或挥用者在所有涉及使用该物品的检定中承受-2环境减值；若大失败，持有者或挥用者会放开该物品。该物体会落在GM选择的一个相邻方格中。如果你将该法术施放在一个穿戴的物体上，则穿戴者在对抗试图擒抱他们的尝试时，其强韧豁免获得+2环境加值。

You conjure grease, with effects based on choosing area or target.

  • Area [4 contiguous 5-foot squares] All solid ground in the area is covered with grease. Each creature standing on the greasy surface must succeed at a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check against your spell DC or fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Creatures using an action to move onto the greasy surface during the spell's duration must attempt either a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check to Balance. A creature that Steps or Crawls doesn't have to attempt a check or save.
  • Target [1 object of Bulk 1 or less] If you cast the spell on an unattended object, anyone trying to pick up the object must succeed at an Acrobatics check or Reflex save against your spell DC to do so. If you target an attended object, the creature that has the object must attempt an Acrobatics check or Reflex save. On a failure, the holder or wielder takes a -2 circumstance penalty to all checks that involve using the object; on a critical failure, the holder or wielder releases the item. The object lands in an adjacent square of the GM's choice. If you cast this spell on a worn object, the wearer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves against attempts to grapple them.

Tanglefoot.name: 缠足﻿ Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一根覆盖着黏稠树液的藤蔓从无中出现，从你的手中甩出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击。

大成功或大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态，并在1轮内其速度受到-10英尺的环境减值。它可以针对你的法术DC尝试【逃脱】以移除该减值与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度受到-10英尺的环境减值。它可以针对你的法术DC尝试【逃脱】以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠足术}

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tanglefoot}

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Blast Sheddings.name: 爆裂脱落物 Blast Sheddings
Blast Sheddings.description:
施法者残渣在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:20] 内喷射一团头发、指甲碎屑与皮屑，对区域内每个生物造成 @Damage[4d6[slashing]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true] 豁免）。任何生物若其豁免失败，则会变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{目眩}；若为大成功或大失败中的大失败，则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{失明}。生物必须花费 1 个交互 动作才能移除这些状态。施法者残渣在花费整整 1 轮待在受影响的 20 尺锥形区域内以吸收一些先前的脱落物之前，不能再次使用“脱落物爆裂”。

The caster detritus fires a blast of hair, nail clippings, and dander in a @Template[type:cone|distance:20] that deals @Damage[4d6[slashing]] damage to each creature within the area (@Check[type:reflex|dc:24|basic:true] save). Any creature that fails their save becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} on a critical failure. Creatures must spend 1 Interact action to remove these conditions. A caster detritus cannot Blast Sheddings again until it spends a full round in the affected 20-foot cone to absorb some of the previous sheddings.

Tangle Hair.name: 缠结毛发 Tangle Hair
Tangle Hair.description:
施法者的碎屑进行一次发丝鞭打击。若该打击命中，目标还会承受一次成功的@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uZK2BYzPnxUBnDjr]{Tanglefoot}的效果；若该打击为大成功，则承受一次大成功的tanglefoot 的效果。

The caster detritus makes a hair whip Strike. If the Strike hits, the target also suffers the effects of a successful @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uZK2BYzPnxUBnDjr]{Tanglefoot}, or a critically successful tanglefoot if the Strike was a critical hit.

Caster Detritus.publicNotes:
奥术艺术的修行者常被告诫不要忽视更为世俗的卫生与清洁工作。随着他们力量增长、魔法能量开始渗透全身，残余的魔法也会滞留在大多数类人生物会定期脱落的头发、皮屑、指甲与趾甲之中。当一名法师过于沉迷研究而懒得进行这些基本维护时，这些脱落物有时会凝结在一起，形成一种被称为“施法者残屑”的实体。

施法者残屑由纠结成团的脱落物构成，呈现出模糊的类人形态，它与其来源的女巫或术士之间有着复杂的关系。一方面，施法者残屑的存在与力量完全仰赖于剥离它的法师，并且常常会不惜代价保护对方——有时法师甚至从未察觉施法者残屑的存在。另一方面，施法者残屑往往对那位粗心将其从身体上丢弃的法师怀有根深蒂固的怨恨。它勉强给予的保护，与其说出于感激，不如说是为了保住构成其形态的有机残渣来源。暗地里，许多施法者残屑谋划着增长力量，最终取代其源头法师。有时，施法者残屑会与一群寻求杀死女巫或术士的冒险者结盟，以提供协助来换取饶其源头法师一命。归根结底，施法者残屑渴望将法师的整个身体并入自身，作为一种体内寄主的寄生体运作。

手足之争

特别不讲卫生的法师可能会孵化出多个施法者残屑，这或许就是有关它们被劈开后会复制的故事的由来。这些“手足”彼此视为竞争者，战斗直到只剩一个——一场生死搏杀，却完全不会被它们缺席的“父母”注意到。偶尔，两个残屑会彼此纠缠在一起，不得不学会协同合作以求生存。这样的好争吵的组合被称为“德汀”。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 64/140/250 gp

可用精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍），护甲（轻型、中型），盾牌，技能物品（奥秘、运动、欺瞒）

可用灌注属性 祸害，混沌，魅力，体质，敏捷，延展，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，智力，毒素，法术（奥术：气态形态，金粉术，油腻术，臭云术，绊足包），力量，投掷，野性

Practitioners of the arcane arts are often warned not to neglect the more mundane tasks of hygiene and cleanliness. As they grow in power and magical energies begin to permeate through their bodies, so too does residual magic linger in the hair, skin cells, fingernails, and toenails that most humanoids shed on a regular basis. When a mage becomes too engrossed in their studies to bother with such basic maintenance, these sheddings can sometimes congeal together to form an entity known as caster detritus.

Consisting of a tangled mess of shedding in a vaguely humanoid shape, a caster detritus has a complicated relationship with the witch or wizard from which it originated. On the one hand, a caster detritus owes its entire existence and power to the mage that shed it, and will often go to great lengths to protect them, sometimes without the mage ever knowing the caster detritus exists. On the other hand, caster detritus often harbors a deep-seated resentment for the mage that carelessly discarded them from their body. The protection a caster detritus begrudgingly gives is more to preserve their source of organic debris that makes up their form than it is out of any sort of gratitude. Secretly, many caster detritus plot to grow in power enough to eventually overtake their source mage. On occasion, a caster detritus might align itself with a group of adventurers seeking to slay the witch or wizard, providing assistance in exchange for sparing the source mage's life. Ultimately, the caster detritus seeks to incorporate the mage's entire body into its own, functioning as a parasite with an internal host.

Sibling Rivalries

A particularly unhygienic mage may spawn multiple caster detritus, which is perhaps the origin of stories about them duplicating when cleaved apart. These siblings see each other as competition and battle until one remains—a life-and- death struggle that goes completely unnoticed by their absent parent. Occasionally, two detritus become entangled with each other and must learn to work together to survive. Such an argumentative pairing is called a dettin.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 64/140/250 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), shield, skill items (Arcana, Athletics, Deception)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), evil, intelligence, poison, spells (Arcane: gaseous form, glitterdust, grease, stinking cloud, tanglefoot), strength, throwing, wild

Carnivorous Chapeau.name: 食肉礼帽 Carnivorous Chapeau

Snug Fit.name: 贴身剪裁 Snug Fit
Snug Fit.description:
如果某个生物未能意识到食肉礼帽的真实本性，或者意识到食肉礼帽的本性却异常愚蠢，并且该生物自愿选择将食肉礼帽戴在自己头上，那么食肉礼帽会自动附着于该生物身上。如果将食肉礼帽放在一个已经处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{昏迷} 状态的生物头上，食肉礼帽同样会自动附着于该生物身上。

If a creature fails to realize a carnivorous chapeau's true nature, or realizes the carnivorous chapeau's nature and is simply exceptionally foolish, and the creature willingly chooses to put the carnivorous chapeau on their head, the carnivorous chapeau Attaches itself to that creature automatically. If the carnivorous chapeau is placed on the head of a creature that is already @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Unconscious]{Unconscious}, the carnivorous chapeau likewise Attaches to that creature automatically.

Attach.name: 附加 Attach
Attach.description:
需求 食肉礼帽的上一个动作是对一名比其自身更大的目标进行一次成功的打击

效果 食肉礼帽将自己附着在其受害者的头部。这类似于擒抱该生物，但食肉礼帽会随着该生物移动，而不是将其固定在原地。食肉礼帽在附着期间处于措手不及。

Requirements The carnivorous chapeau's last action was a successful Strike against a target larger than itself

Effect The carnivorous chapeau attaches itself to its victim's head. This is similar to grabbing the creature, but the carnivorous chapeau moves with that creature rather than holding it in place. The carnivorous chapeau is flat- footed while attached.

Constrict.name: 缠绕 Constrict
Constrict.description:
需求 食肉礼帽附着在一个生物身上

效果 食肉礼帽收缩其形态包裹住其所附着生物的头部，对该生物造成 @Damage[1d4[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15|basic:true] 豁免。

 

Requirements The carnivorous chapeau is attached to a creature

Effect The carnivorous chapeau contracts its form around the head of the creature to which it's attached, dealing @Damage[1d4[bludgeoning]] damage to that creature with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:15|basic:true] save.

Carnivorous Chapeau.publicNotes:
由一群声名狼藉的法师与实验炼金术士带领、历经数十年长期研究的成果，食肉礼帽对其不光彩的创造者而言有多种用途。它们常被用作出其不意的刺杀媒介或工具，也可充当酷刑装置，甚至成为陷阱，专门对付那些贪婪且粗心、无法抗拒一顶极其时髦头饰诱惑的入侵者。

食肉礼帽的构造与形态并不局限于那种完全由布料制成的刻板帽子。事实上，只要其创造者选择以那种方式制作，食肉礼帽就能伪装成任何一种头部装备。食肉礼帽的可能性无穷无尽，形态多样且迥异，例如皮帽、铁头盔，甚至金冠。食肉礼帽能够遵循诸如“当你能用感官察觉到的生物只有一个时就攻击”或“当你听到这个词时就攻击”之类的简单命令；但更复杂的指令可能会过于繁琐，令食肉礼帽难以理解，从而导致表现不佳，甚至出现严重不受欢迎的行为。很少有刺客会欣赏自己的造物杀错目标。

尽管在合适情境下可能致命，但由于受害者一旦逃脱，它们追击的能力有限，食肉礼帽在阴影组织与失意贵族之间的使用曾有所式微。虽然流言坚称食肉礼帽不过是某种更危险构装体的原型，但其最常见且最传统的用途，是将其固定在受审讯的生物身上，作为一种简单的手段来造成疼痛与伤害。

抓紧你的帽子

近期将食肉礼帽重新包装为“再大的风也吹不走的帽子”的尝试，在与铁制骷髅帽结合时取得了惊人的成功。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 1.5/3.5/6.5 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（运动、欺瞒、潜行）

符合条件的灌注属性 克星，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量、负能量），力量，野性

The result of decades of long research headed by a group of disreputable wizards and experimental alchemists, carnivorous chapeaus serve many purposes for their unsavory creators. While they are often employed as an unexpected vector or tool for assassination, they also function as torture devices or even traps for greedy and unwary intruders who can't resist the allure of an extremely fashionable piece of headwear.

The construction and form of carnivorous chapeaus are not limited to a stereotypical hat made entirely of cloth material. In truth, a carnivorous chapeau is capable of appearing like any kind of headgear, assuming its creator chooses to construct it in that manner. The possibilities for carnivorous chapeaus are endless, including forms as varied and disparate as a leather cap, an iron helmet, or even a golden crown. Carnivorous chapeaus are able to follow simple commands such as "attack when there is only a single creature you can sense" or "attack when you hear this word," though more complex instructions can wind up being too complicated for a carnivorous chapeau to understand, leading to imperfect performance or even drastically unwanted behavior. Few assassins appreciate it when their creation kills the wrong target.

Although potentially lethal in the right situation, the use of carnivorous chapeaus faded somewhat among shadowy organizations and disgruntled nobility due to its limited ability to pursue once a victim escapes. Although rumors insist that carnivorous chapeaus are merely prototypes for a more dangerous construct, their most common and traditional use is to affix them to an interrogated creature as a simple means of causing pain and injury.

Hang On To Your Hat

Recent attempts to rebrand carnivorous chapeaus as "hats no gust of wind can take" have experienced surprising success when combined with iron skull caps.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 1.5/3.5/6.5 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Deception, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive, negative), strength, wild

Cadavalier.name: 卡达瓦利埃尔 Cadavalier

Slow.name: 迟缓 Slow
Slow.description:
尸骑士永久处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} 状态，且不能使用反应动作（）。

A cadavalier is permanently @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Slowed 1.name: 迟缓 1 Slowed 1
Slowed 1.description:
你的动作更少。迟缓总是包含一个数值。当你在自己回合开始时恢复动作时，将你恢复的动作数量减少等同于你的迟缓数值。由于迟缓在你回合开始时生效，如果你在自己的回合中变为迟缓，你不会立即失去动作。

You have fewer actions. Slowed always includes a value. When you regain your actions at the start of your turn, reduce the number of actions you regain by your slowed value. Because slowed has its effect at the start of your turn, you don't immediately lose actions if you become slowed during your turn.

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木制盾牌一样，钢制盾牌有各种形状和体型。虽然比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们耐用得多。

硬度 HP BT
5 20 10

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

Hardness HP BT
5 20 10

Frightful Presence.name: 恐惧威仪 Frightful Presence
Frightful Presence.description:
30英尺，@Check[type:will|dc:22] 意志 豁免

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

30 feet, @Check[type:will|dc:22] save

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

Break Off.name: 折断 Break Off
Break Off.description:
需求 cadavalier的上一个动作是以长枪臂打击获得大成功或大失败

效果 cadavalier的长枪臂刺穿其受害者并折断，令其流血且步履蹒跚。目标受到[[/r 1d8[persistent,bleed]]]伤害，并且只要长枪仍留在其体内，他们就处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 1}。折断的长枪可以通过一次成功的@Check[type:medicine|dc:20]检定移除，不过若流血已停止，移除长枪可能会重新撕开伤口。除非在医疗检定上获得大成功或大失败，否则任何结果都会使目标受到[[/r 1d8[persistent,bleed]]]伤害。在其取回手臂（从受害者的尸体上或在手臂被移除后）并以一个交互动作将其重新接上之前，cadavalier不能再次使用其长枪臂打击。

Requirements The cadavalier's last action was a critical success on a lance arm Strike

Effect The cadavalier's lance arm impales its victim and breaks off, leaving them bleeding and staggered. The target takes [[/r 1d8[persistent,bleed]]] damage, and they are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} as long as the lance remains within their body. The broken lance can be removed with a successful @Check[type:medicine|dc:20] check, though if the bleeding had stopped, removing the lance can reopen the wound. Any result except a critical success on the Medicine check causes the target to take [[/r 1d8[persistent,bleed]]] damage. The cadavalier can't use its lance arm Strike again until it retrieves its arm (from the victim's corpse or after the arm is removed) and reattaches it with an Interact action.

Gnaw.name: 啃咬 Gnaw
Gnaw.description:
需求 cadavalier 用它的颚部以擒抱住一名生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}。

效果 cadavalier 用它的颚部啃咬并咀嚼被擒抱的目标，造成 [[/r (2d6+6)[piercing]]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:22|basic:true] 豁免）。在大成功或大失败：失败时，该生物还会因疼痛而 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}。

Requirements The cadavalier has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} with its jaws.

Effect The cadavalier gnaws and chews on the grabbed target with its jaws, dealing [[/r (2d6+6)[piercing]]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:22|basic:true] save). On a critical failure, the creature is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} from the pain.

Grave Charge.name: 坟冢冲锋 Grave Charge
Grave Charge.description:
尸骸骑士疾走两次，然后进行一次骑枪手臂打击。只要它至少移动了20尺，它的伤害掷骰就获得+4环境加值。

The cadavalier Strides twice and then makes a lance arm Strike. As long as it moved at least 20 feet, it gains a +4 circumstance bonus to its damage roll.

Rearing Thrash.name: 后踢猛击 Rearing Thrash
Rearing Thrash.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 尸骑扬起前躯，将前面的两只蹄子踏向其目标。尸骑进行两次蹄打击，每次都使用尸骑当前的多重攻击减值。两次打击必须以同一个目标为目标。

Frequency once per round

Effect The cadavalier rears up and brings its front two hooves down onto its target. The cadavalier makes two hoof Strikes, each using the cadavalier's current multiple attack penalty. Both Strikes must have the same target.

Cadavalier.publicNotes:
尸骑兵是死灵再生法术不受约束或缺乏戒律地使用所导致的扭曲结果，其中倒下的骑兵与其忠诚的坐骑之间的界线几乎被完全无视。

尸骑兵从血腥的战场上被唤起，它们由那些鲁莽指挥官徒劳下令的骑兵冲锋残余所培育而成——那些被亡兵痛苦所萦绕的地方，苦楚回响不绝；它们对自己正值壮年便被斩落而愤懑怨恨。从这些地方出现的，是曾经骄傲战士骑乘着威严骏马的空洞遗蜕。它们成为昔日自我的卑劣讽刺，被扭曲成一个可怖的复合体，并被残酷地束缚着，在无情的追猎中碾碎其操纵者的敌人。

尽管尸骑兵的速度较其坐骑先前的活形态有所提升，但它们的腐坏与拼凑本质常使其不时在虬结的蹄与扭曲的骨骼上踉跄。若在长距离上，脚步迅捷的冒险者或许能甩开它们。

虽然它们仍保有前生的一些武艺能力，但当尸骑兵以长枪尖端追逼猎物时，对活血肉的饥渴终将压过其躯壳中残存的戒律回声；它们的兽性一面夺取主导，化作撕咬利齿与践踏铁蹄的血腥狂乱。

双重噩梦

虽然通常不会有人带着喜悦去迎接努克拉维的身影，但当你正被尸骑兵追逐时，这些妖精或许就是生与死的差别。努克拉维会因尸骑兵的外貌而受辱，认为尸骑兵是在嘲弄它们自身的形态，并会痴迷于摧毁所遇到的任何尸骑兵。只是别停留太久，否则你就会成为它们的下一个目标。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 45/100/180 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（光）、察觉物品、技能物品（杂技、运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 体质、敏捷、延长、能量抗性（负能量）、邪恶、精神、负能量、力量、野性

Cadavaliers are the twisted result of the unfettered or undisciplined use of necromantic reanimation spells, where the divide between fallen cavalry and their trusty mounts is all but ignored.

Raised from bloody battlefields, cadavaliers are cultivated from the remnants of cavalry charges ordered in vain by foolhardy commanders, haunted places where the anguish of fallen soldiers resonates, bitter and resentful that they were cut down in their prime. What emerges from these places are hollow vestiges of once-proud warriors astride regal steeds. They become vile mockeries of their former selves, twisted into one horrible composite, and cruelly bound to ride down their animator's foes in relentless pursuit.

While a cadavalier improves upon the speed of their horse's previously living form, their decomposition and cobbled-together nature often cause them to stumble from time to time on their gnarled hooves and twisted bones. Over long stretches, swift-footed adventurers might be able to outpace them.

Though they retain some martial ability from their previous lives, when a cadavalier runs down their quarry at lance point, ultimately the hunger for living flesh overrides what echoes of discipline remain within their shell, and their animalistic side takes control in a bloody frenzy of gnashing teeth and stomping hooves.

Doppelnayers

While one would not normally greet the sight of a nuckelavee with joy, the fey may mean the difference between life and death when one is being pursued by a cadavalier. Nuckelavees take offense at their appearance, considering cadavaliers to be mockeries of their own form, and become obsessed with destroying any cadavalier they encounter. Just don't stick around to be their next target.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (negative), evil, mental, negative, strength, wild

Arrongtata Swarm (Turtle).tokenName: 阿龙格塔塔虫群 Arrongtata Swarm

Telepathy 50 feet.name: 心灵感应 50 英尺 Telepathy 50 feet

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Speak with Plants (Constant).name: 与植物交谈（恒定） Speak with Plants (Constant)
Speak with Plants (Constant).description:
你可以向植物和真菌提问并获得它们的回答，但该法术不会让它们比平常更友善或更聪明。大多数普通植物和真菌对周围世界都有独特的看法，因此它们无法辨认有关生物的细节，也不知道其周遭近邻之外的世界。狡猾的植物或真菌怪物很可能言辞简短且闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的则常常会做出愚蠢的评论。

You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal. Most normal plants and fungi have a distinctive view of the world around them, so they don't recognize details about creatures or know anything about the world beyond their immediate vicinity. Cunning plant or fungus monsters are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Tortoise Formation.name: 巨龟阵型 Tortoise Formation
Tortoise Formation.description:
阿隆格塔塔虫群将其盾面有效地向各个方向对齐以保护自身。当阿隆格塔塔虫群进入龟甲阵形时，它获得AC与反射豁免+2环境加值。在龟甲阵形期间，阿隆格塔塔虫群为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}。龟甲阵形的效果持续到该虫群下个回合开始为止。如有必要，阿隆格塔塔虫群可以以自由动作（）退出龟甲阵形。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.vLSAvOOWjIspxS4G]{效果: 龟甲阵形}

The arrongtata swarm aligns its shield faces effectively in every direction to protect itself. When the arrongtata swarm gets into Tortoise Formation, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saves. While in Tortoise Formation, the arrongtata swarm is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}. The Tortoise Formation remains in effect until the start of the swarm's next turn. If necessary, the arrongtata swarm can exit Tortoise Formation as a free action.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-su-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-su-effects.vLSAvOOWjIspxS4G]{Effect: Tortoise Formation}

Dazing Glare.name: 眩晕凝视 Dazing Glare
Dazing Glare.description:
阿隆格塔塔虫群的所有眼睛同时闪烁，朝向其周围的敌人，使30尺内的所有敌人都必须进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:22] 意志豁免。

大成功 该生物在1分钟内免疫“目眩凝视”。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在一轮内处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}。

大失败 该生物在一轮内处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}。

All of the eyes of the arrongtata swarm flash simultaneously at its surrounding enemies, forcing all enemies within 30 feet to attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:22] save.

Critical Success The creature is immune to Dazing Glare for 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for one round.

Critical Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for one round.

Phalanx Attack.name: 方阵攻击 Phalanx Attack
Phalanx Attack.description:
虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[2d10[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] 豁免）。

Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[2d10[piercing]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:22|basic:true] save).

Spear Storm.name: 长矛风暴 Spear Storm
Spear Storm.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 阿隆格塔塔虫群投掷一阵长矛齐射，瞄准其敌人的弱点，覆盖一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]。该区域内的敌人在进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] 豁免后，受到 @Damage[6d6[piercing]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受全额伤害，并受到 @Damage[1[bleed]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，并受到 [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] 伤害。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The arrongtata swarm hurls a barrage of spears targeting its enemies' weak points in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]. Enemies in this area take @Damage[6d6[piercing]] damage, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:22] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and @Damage[1[bleed]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] damage.

Arrongtata Swarm (Turtle).publicNotes:
一支阿隆格塔塔虫群是由大约400名阿隆格塔塔组成、凝聚而忠诚的营队。由于阿隆格塔塔的心灵感应联结与严格的军事训练，该营队如同蜂巢思维般运作。阿隆格塔塔虫群通常由一名阿隆格塔塔指挥官统率。

阿隆格塔塔是微型的双足灵体，生着短粗而尖的尾巴，用来托举它们脱离身体的脸庞，作为盾牌使用。这些脸庞上有两只圆形、不眨眼的眼睛，可按指令发光，并能协同闪耀强光以削弱它们的敌人。脸庞覆盖其方块状身体的全部，而灵体与其盾牌脸庞之间存在心灵感应联结。

阿隆格塔塔敌视任何它们认为可能伤害自然的生物。这些灵体尚武且军国化，不断磨练其战争技能。它们结成营队，而营队中每名阿隆格塔塔之间的羁绊，使它们能毫不费力地对齐并重新排列其盾牌脸庞与长矛，以娴熟地攻击敌人。有时，虫群中的某个阿隆格塔塔甚至会在整场战斗中都从未握持过自己的盾牌脸庞。

阿隆格塔塔曾是神侍（kami），它们抛弃守护之责，转而在圣地中搜寻闯入者。放弃作为神侍的职责让它们得以自由游荡；但尽管它们所受的惩罚远不如恶鬼严酷，这一选择仍使它们失去了视野与大部分魔法力量。为弥补这一点，阿隆格塔塔将自身身体与一张盾牌脸庞绑定，那脸庞由它们以天然材料制作而成。阿隆格塔塔敌视任何它们认为会伤害自然的生物；不过，它们与非邪恶的恶鬼却出奇地相处融洽，因为双方能对彼此的过去、选择，以及所遭受的过度严苛惩罚感同身受。若其盾牌脸庞被毁，它们可在一周内制作新的；而其结实程度也足以让那些设法击败它们的人将其用作盾牌材料。

解读脸庞

阿隆格塔塔用来制作盾牌脸庞的材料具有个人意义。多数会选择与其作为神侍时所守护之物相匹配的材料；也有人挑选在新职责中希望保护的事物。前线战士常使用坚韧的木材或金属制成的脸庞，以获得更好的防护。谋士则拥有岩石脸庞，用以引导大地的感知；而草或毛皮脸庞能帮助斥候融入其环境。但最可怖的阿隆格塔塔是拥有骨质脸庞者——它们是复仇的灵体，已无可失，因为它们曾试图守护的一切都已死去。

建议怪物部件

怪物部件 18/45/80 gp

可选精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型），盾牌，察觉 物品，技能 物品（特技动作、运动、学识[战争]、自然）

可选灌注属性 祸根，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），加固，心灵，法术（原初：与植物交谈），力量，坚固，野性

An arrongtata swarm is a cohesive and loyal battalion of approximately 400 arrongtata. The battalion works like a hive mind due to arrongtata's telepathic connection and rigorous military training. Arrongtata swarms are often commanded by an arrongtata commander.

Arrongtata are tiny, bipedal spirits with stubby, pointed tails that hold their detached faces as shields. These faces contain two round, unblinking eyes that glow on command and can be used in unison to flash brightly to weaken their enemies. The faces cover the entirety of their blocky bodies, and there is a telepathic connection between the spirit and its shield face.

Arrongtata are hostile to any creature they believe are likely to harm nature. These spirits are militaristic, constantly honing their skills in warfare. They form battalions, and the bonds between each arrongtata in the battalion allow them to effortlessly align and rearrange their shield faces and spears to skillfully attack their enemies. Sometimes, an arrongtata in a swarm will go an entire battle without ever holding their own shield face.

Arrongtata were once kami who forsook their wards to seek out trespassers on sacred grounds. Abandoning their duty as kami allowed them to roam freely, but while they weren't punished nearly as harshly as oni, their choice still cost them their vision and most of their magical powers. To overcome this, arrongtata bound their bodies to a shield face that they crafted from natural materials. Arrongtata are hostile to any creature they believe will harm nature, though they get along surprisingly well with non-evil oni, as the two can empathize with each other's pasts, their choices, and the overly harsh punishments they've received. If their shield face is destroyed, they can craft a new one in a week, and it is sturdy enough to be used as shield material by those who manage to defeat them.

Reading Faces

The material an arrongtata uses to craft a shield face carries personal significance. Most choose a material matching what they defended as kami, though others select something they wish to protect in their new roles. Front-line fighters often have faces made of hardy wood or metal for better protection. Strategists have rock faces that channel the wisdom of the earth, while grass or fur faces help scouts blend into their environments. But the most fearsome arrongtata are those with bone faces—they are spirits of vengeance with nothing left to lose, for all they sought to defend has died.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 18/45/80 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), shield, perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Lore [Warfare], Nature)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), fortification, mental, spells (Primal: speak with plants), strength, sturdy, wild
Arrongtata Swarm (Turtle).prototypeToken: 阿隆格塔塔虫群 Arrongtata Swarm

Bulbekken.name: 布尔贝肯 Bulbekken

+2 to Fortitude Saves vs. Disease.name: 对抗疾病的强韧豁免+2 +2 to Fortitude Saves vs. Disease

-2 to All Saves vs. Auditory.name: 对抗听觉效果的所有豁免检定-2 -2 to All Saves vs. Auditory

Belly Burst.name: 腹腔爆裂 Belly Burst
Belly Burst.description:
当布尔贝肯受到至少10点穿刺或挥砍伤害且拥有10点或更多HP时，它会分裂成三个完全相同的小魔怪。先将伤害结算到原本的布尔贝肯身上。随后该布尔贝肯裂开并死亡，生成三个更小的布尔贝肯，每个拥有原本HP的三分之一。每个新布尔贝肯的体型为超小型而非小型。三个个体都出现在原本所在的同一空间内，并各自拥有自己的原始天生法术使用次数，其法术DC为15而非17。超小型布尔贝肯失去“腹部爆裂”能力且无法“整吞”。大约一周后，它们会长到完全体型，将法术DC提升至17，并获得“腹部爆裂”和“整吞”。

When the bulbekken takes at least 10 piercing or slashing damage and has 10 or more HP, it splits into three identical gremlins. First apply the damage to the original bulbekken. Then that bulbekken splits open and dies, spawning three smaller bulbekkens, each with a third of the original's HP. Each of the new bulbekken is Tiny instead of Small. All three appear in the same space as the original and have their own uses of primal innate spells, with a spell DC of 15 instead of 17. Tiny bulbekken lose the Belly Burst ability and can't Swallow Whole. After about a week, they grow to full size, increase their spell DC to 17, and gain Belly Burst and Swallow Whole.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原初天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Vomit Swarm.name: 呕吐虫群 Vomit Swarm
Vomit Swarm.description:
你喷吐出一团魔法虫群。你从自己的想象中唤起并塑造这些生物，使你能够改变这些生物的外观（通常是蜈蚣、蟑螂、黄蜂与蠕虫的混合），但这不会改变法术的效果。害虫虫群爬满区域内的任何人，它们的啃咬与蜇刺造成[[/r 2d8[piercing]]]伤害（基础反射豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。法术结束后，虫群消失。

强化（+1） 将伤害提高[[/r 1d8[piercing]]]。

You belch forth a swarm of magical vermin. You evoke and shape the creatures from your own imagination, allowing you to change the appearance of the creatures (typically a mix of centipedes, roaches, wasps, and worms), but this doesn't change the effect of the spell. The vermin swarm over anyone in the area, their bites and stings dealing [[/r 2d8[piercing]]] damage (basic Reflex save). A creature that fails its saving throw also becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. Once the spell ends, the swarm disappears.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by [[/r 1d8[piercing]]].

Acidic Burst.name: 酸性爆发 Acidic Burst
Acidic Burst.description:
你在自己周围创造一层酸液外壳，随即向外爆裂，对区域内的每个生物造成2d6点酸蚀伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害提高2d6点。

You create a shell of acid around yourself that immediately bursts outward, dealing 2d6 acid damage to each creature in the area.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的指令。只要你维持该法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持该法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 使1磅非生物材料冷却、变暖或增添风味。
  • 提起 缓慢地 将一件无人看管、负载为光或更低的物体缓慢抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一件临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质构成。该物体外观粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法术成分。
  • 整理 为一件负载为光或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮的专注影响一件负载为1的物体；更大的物体则每负载需1分钟。

戏法不能造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（超出上述内容者）仅在你维持该法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Pack Attack.name: 包抄攻击 Pack Attack
Pack Attack.description:
如果任意生物处于至少两个布尔贝肯盟友的触及范围内，布尔贝肯对其造成的伤害额外增加1d4。

A bulbekken deals 1d4 extra damage to any creature that's within reach of at least two of the bulbekken's allies.

Bulbekken.publicNotes:
作为小魔怪家族中体型较大的成员之一，完全长成的布尔贝肯看起来像一只微型蓝色食人魔，遍布明亮的橙色疖子与痘包，还有一个同样颜色、能孕育更多同类的啤酒肚。布尔贝肯皮肤病变并不令人意外，因为这些生物最喜欢的消遣就是在城市垃圾里嬉闹，且把栖居其中的昆虫整只吞下。它们也不排斥泥浴。它们皮肤上的疖子散发着刺鼻的酸味，而它们的肚子会随着时代推移不断变大，因为它们在黏液中孕育后代。到了生命的后期阶段，人们甚至能看见小小的布尔贝肯在里面踢动。

在短暂寿命的末尾，布尔贝肯的疖子与胃部会爆裂，使其死亡，但同时诞生出三只新的个体；它们会作为手足一同留下并结伴旅行，直到长大后也把自己炸裂为止。这三胞胎布尔贝肯在外貌上与其亲代及彼此之间都保持着家族般的相似之处，尽管它们往往性格截然不同。可能其中一只是安静内向者，而另外两只会为世上万事争吵不休；并且它们肯定各自都对早晨的甲虫炖汤该放什么调料有独到偏好。即便如此，虽然它们可能会无休止地争论，布尔贝肯的家庭仍凌驾于一切之上。

当区域足够肮脏时，出生、成长与爆裂的循环最快仅需两周便会重复一次，导致布尔贝肯迅速侵染任何它们认为足够恶心、可以称作家的区域。虽然它们确实会很快清理掉任何昆虫种群，但没有任何城市希望看见一群数量指数增长、携带瘟疫的恶霸占据垃圾处理场并随心所欲地扩张领地。

尽管如此，布尔贝肯并非完全无法交涉。许多冒险者都曾成功说服某个群落迁往一个更恶心的地方居住。若新家有更弱的生物可供欺凌，这会尤其容易，因为这些小魔怪自认为是周遭最大的威胁。有些故事甚至说布尔贝肯很容易被歌声迷住，但也有说法与之相反，断言布尔贝肯憎恨一切音乐。可以确定的是，它们那对如大象般的巨耳对声音的敏感程度，与它们对自己耳朵外观的在意程度不相上下。

瘟疫携带者

布尔贝肯的皮肤是其所遭遇疾病的储存库，会将这些传染源传递给接触它的人。在极少数布尔贝肯群落未曾暴露于其他疾病的情况下，它们会自发发展出自己的疾病：布尔贝创生症（bulbenesis）。若不加以治疗，将导致一只完全长成的布尔贝肯从受害者体内爆裂而出。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 7/18/30 gp

可精炼项目 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、技能物品（运动、威吓）

可灌注属性 酸蚀、克星、魅力、体质、能量抗性（正能量）、法术（原初：酸性爆裂、魔法伎俩、呕吐虫群）、力量、狂野

Among the larger members of the gremlin family when fully grown, a bulbekken resembles a miniature blue ogre, one riddled with bright orange boils and pimples, and a similarly colored pot belly that can spawn more of its kind. A bulbekken's diseased skin is no surprise, since the creatures' favorite pastime involves frolicking in urban refuse and eating the resident insects whole. They don't shy away from mud baths either. The boils on their skin reek of acid, and their bellies only grow larger with time as they gestate their spawn in mucus. Towards the later stages of life, one can even see the tiny bulbekkens kicking.

At the end of their short lifespan, the boils and stomach of the bulbekken explode, killing it, but birthing three new ones which remain and travel together as siblings until they grow up and burst themselves. The triplet bulbekkens maintain a familial resemblance to their parent and each other, though they often have completely differing personalities. One might be the quiet introvert while the other two squabble about everything under the sun, and each would certainly have a unique preference for seasoning their morning beetle stew. Nevertheless, though they might argue incessantly, a bulbekken's family comes second to nothing else.

The cycle of birth, growth, and bursting repeats in as little as two weeks when the area is nasty enough, resulting in bulbekkens quickly infesting any area they deem disgusting enough to call home. While they do quickly take care of any insect population, no city wants an exponentially growing band of plague-bearing bullies overrunning its garbage disposal sites and expanding their territory on a whim.

In spite of this, bulbekkens are not impossible to negotiate with. Many an adventurer has managed to convince a colony to immigrate to an even more disgusting place to live. It's especially easier to do so if the new home has weaker creatures to bully, since these gremlins fancy themselves the biggest threat around. Some stories even tell of bulbekkens being easily charmed by song, but others contradict this with assertions that bulbekkens hate any and all music. What's certain is that their large, elephant-like ears are as sensitive to sound as bulbekkens are about their ears' appearance.

Plague Carriers

Bulbekken skin is a reservoir for diseases it encounters, passing the contagions to those who touch it. In the rare instances where a bulbekken colony hasn't been exposed to other diseases, they spontaneously develop their own: bulbenesis, which, if left untreated, results in a fully grown bulbekken bursting out of the victim.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), skill items (Athletics, Intimidation)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, bane, charisma, constitution, energy resistant (positive), spells (Primal: acidic burst, prestidigitation, vomit swarm), strength, wild
Bulbekken.allSaves: +2 to fortitude vs. diseases, –2 to all vs. auditory

Bowlfish.name: 盂鱼 Bowlfish

Occult Innate Spells.name: 灵异天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Daze.name: 目眩 Daze
Daze.description:
你令目标心智迷乱，用一次精神冲击使其目眩。该冲击造成等同于你施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免大失败，则其还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加 1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之声 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个普通人同时呼喊。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的命令。只要你维持法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从以下四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 使1磅的非生物材料变凉、变暖或调味。
  • 提起 缓慢地 将一个无人看管且负载为轻或更低的物体从地面缓慢提起1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法术成分。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮的专注影响一个负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则需要每负载1分钟。

戏法无法造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（超出上述所述者）只会在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Blood Frenzy.name: 鲜血狂暴 Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description:
需求 碗鱼有一名生物处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} 状态

效果 碗鱼用其锋利如剃刀的牙齿凶残地啃噬受害者，造成 @Damage[1d4[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|basic:true] 豁免。若失败，该生物还会受到 @Damage[1[bleed]]{1 persistent bleed} 伤害。

Requirements The bowlfish has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

Effect The bowlfish viciously feeds on its victim with its razor sharp teeth, dealing @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|basic:true] save. On a failure, the creature also takes @Damage[1[bleed]]{1 persistent bleed} damage.

Fish Dance.name: 鱼之舞 Fish Dance
Fish Dance.description:
钵鱼爆发出一段奇妙而复杂的舞蹈，立刻将周围所有人的注意力吸引到它古怪的滑稽动作上。30尺半径内的每个生物都会成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}，除非他们在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:17] 豁免中成功。对钵鱼的鱼之舞能力的豁免失败的生物，只要钵鱼每回合继续花费一个动作进行鱼之舞以保持舞蹈，就会以这种方式持续着迷，且不会再进行任何进一步的豁免，不过着迷仍可如常被敌对动作打破。被钵鱼的鱼之舞所着迷的生物，必须在他们每个回合的第一个动作花费在接近钵鱼上；若他们在对钵鱼鱼之舞的意志豁免中大失败，则他们必须改为把自己的所有动作都花费在接近钵鱼上。

The bowlfish erupts in a wonderful and complex dance, immediately drawing the attention of all those around it to its bizarre antics. Every creature in a 30 foot radius becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fascinated]{Fascinated}, unless they succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:17] save. A creature that fails its saving throw against a bowlfish's Fish Dance ability stays fascinated this way as long as the bowlfish continues to spend one action to Fish Dance each turn to keep dancing, without receiving any further saving throws, although the fascination can be broken normally by hostile actions. Creatures fascinated by a bowlfish's Fish Dance must spend the first action on each of their turns approaching the bowlfish, and they must instead spend all of their actions approaching the bowlfish if they critically failed their Will save against the bowlfish's Fish Dance.

Bowlfish.publicNotes:
看起来只是一条不起眼却活泼的金鱼，待在一个透明玻璃碗里；但实际上，它是一种阴险狡诈、以那些上当受骗者为食的生物。玻璃碗本身其实是它身体的一部分，摸起来柔软而温暖，不过通常等任何人注意到这一点时都已经太迟了。碗里的“金鱼”其实是这生物的头部，它能猛然向前弹出，用一张异常巨大的嘴咬住猎物，嘴里长满剃刀般锋利的牙齿，颇像食人鱼。

当碗鱼正在消化猎物时，碗鱼那标志性“碗”里的“水”会被血染成浑浊的红色，上一顿餐食的残渣碎片在其中打旋漂荡。几分钟后，消化过程完成，它的身体又会再次变得晶莹通透。然而，在这段时间里，如果潜在目击者撞见一个莫名其妙血腥的鱼缸，碗鱼就特别容易暴露。因此，碗鱼会尽量确保自己能不受打扰地消化食物：它们会挑落单的受害者下手，或选择在偏僻地点变得脆弱的人，或趁几乎不会有人打扰它们进食的时机，让受害者进入碗鱼所在的房间。

有传言说，一些不择手段的巫师创造了第一批碗鱼，并将其当作异域“宠物”出售；它们还会采用不同形状的碗与不同品种的鱼来混淆视听，甚至让那些知道碗鱼存在的人也难以看穿真相。

碗鱼喜欢利用自己无害的外表为己谋利。它们常常选定某个单一的“棋子”，并在其身边始终表现得不过是一条待在碗里的鱼。这会让那名棋子把它当作宠物留在身边，却没意识到自己家里养着一个凶残的杀手。更不讲道德的同伙若了解碗鱼的真实本性，可能会利用它蓄意谋杀他人：将目标邀请到与生物近距离相处的狭小空间中，好从死者身上搜刮财物。碗鱼很少能在野外被发现，因为在野外这种伪装并不怎么有效，因此它们往往会避开乡村设定。

他只是在休息

死去的碗鱼无法维持其形态，看起来就像离水的水母——这让那些想把它的尸体当作新奇鱼缸来用的怪诞收藏家大失所望。不过，也有人找到了办法：砍下碗鱼的头，将其再活化，然后把由此得到的“鱼”当作宠物饲养。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 3.5/7/13 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺），护甲（轻型），技能物品（运动，欺瞒，交涉，威吓，表演，社交）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌，混沌，魅力，敏捷，能量抗性（正能量），智力，精神，法术（奥术：恍惚，幽灵之声，魔法伎俩），原野

What would appear as an unassuming yet lively goldfish in a transparent glass bowl is in fact a devious and cunning creature that feeds on those who fall for its ruse. The glass bowl itself is in fact a part of its body, and it's soft and warm to the touch, but usually it's too late for anyone to notice this fact. The "goldfish" inside is actually the head of the creature, and it can spring forward to bite its prey with a very large mouth filled with razor-sharp teeth, much like a piranha.

When a bowlfish is digesting prey, the "water" inside the bowlfish's namesake bowl turns a murky red with blood as bits and pieces of its last meal swirl around. After a few minutes, the digestion process completes, and its body becomes crystal clear once again. However, during that time, the bowlfish is especially vulnerable to exposure if a potential witness comes across what seems to be an inexplicably gory fish bowl. Thus, bowlfish try to ensure they can digest their food unmolested by picking off victims who are alone, who have become vulnerable in an obscure location, or who have entered the bowlfish's room at a time when few others would be likely to interfere with their meal.

Rumors say that unscrupulous wizards created the first bowlfish to be sold as exotic "pets, " with different shapes of bowl and varieties of fish to obscure the truth even from those who are aware of the existence of bowlfish.

Bowlfish like to use their harmless appearance to their advantage. They often choose a single pawn around whom they always act like nothing more than a fish in a bowl. This leads their pawn to keep them around as a pet, not realizing that they're hosting a vicious killer in their home. Less scrupulous partners who understand a bowlfish's true nature might use it to intentionally murder others, inviting them into close quarters with the creature so they can collect valuables from the dead. Bowlfish can seldom be found in the wild, where this disguise is not very effective, and thus they have the tendency to avoid rural settings.

He's Just Resting

A dead bowlfish does not maintain its form and resembles a jellyfish out of water, much to the dismay of macabre collectors who wish to use its corpse as a novelty fish bowl. Some have found success, however, in decapitating the bowlfish, reanimating its head, and keeping the resulting "fish" as a pet.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 3.5/7/13 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing), armor (light), skill items (Athletics, Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Performance, Society)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, dexterity, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, mental, spells (Occult: daze, ghost sound, prestidigitation), wild

Bog Bomber.name: 沼泽轰炸者 Bog Bomber

Smoke Vision.name: 烟雾视野 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description:
烟雾不会妨碍沼泽轰炸者的视野；它会忽略来自烟雾的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Smoke doesn’t impair a bog bomber’s vision; it ignores @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealement} from smoke.

Frogsplosion.name: 蛙爆 Frogsplosion
Frogsplosion.description:
当一只沼泽轰炸者的生命值降至0时，它会在其中心点以@Template[type:burst|distance:20]爆炸，造成@Damage[8d6[fire]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] 豁免）。如果生物在沼泽轰炸者体内时发生爆炸，则额外受到[[/r 2d6[fire]]]伤害，并在其反射豁免上承受–2环境减值以避免所有爆发伤害。

When a bog bomber is reduced to 0 Hit Points, it explodes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] at its center, dealing @Damage[8d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] save). If creatures are inside the bog bomber when it explodes take an additional [[/r 2d6[fire]]] damage and a –2 circumstance penalty on their Reflex save to avoid all burst damage.

Fireball Breath.name: 火球吐息 Fireball Breath
Fireball Breath.description:
沼泽投弹者吐出一颗火球，射程为180尺，并在@Template[type:burst|distance:20]内爆炸。爆发区域内的生物受到@Damage[9d6[fire]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true]豁免）。如果有被沼泽投弹者吞下的生物且沼泽投弹者使用其火球吐息，则每有一名生物，火球的伤害额外增加1d6火焰伤害；若其吞下三名或更多生物，则最多增加至[[/r 12d6[fire]]]{12d6}。沼泽投弹者在接下来的[[/br 1d4 #Fireball Breath Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用火球吐息。

[[/r 10d6[fire]]]

[[/r 11d6[fire]]]

The bog bomber expels a ball of flame to a range of 180 feet that explodes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20]. Creatures in the burst take @Damage[9d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] save). If there are creatures swallowed by the bog bomber and the bog bomber uses its fireball breath, the damage of the fire ball increases by an additional 1d6 fire damage per creature, to a maximum of [[/r 12d6[fire]]]{12d6} if it swallowed three or more creatures. The bog bomber can't use Fireball Breath again for [[/br 1d4 #Fireball Breath Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

[[/r 10d6[fire]]]

[[/r 11d6[fire]]]

Flame Tongue Grab.name: 烈焰舌抓握 Flame Tongue Grab
Flame Tongue Grab.description:
被沼泽轰炸者的舌头命中的生物会被沼泽轰炸者@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{受擒}，并承受[[/r 2d6[persistent,fire]]]伤害。不过，与受擒状态的通常效果不同，该生物不会@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{无法移动}；相反，它不能移动到离沼泽轰炸者更远的位置。生物可以用一次对AC 25的打击切断舌头，且该打击至少造成20点挥砍伤害。这不会对沼泽轰炸者造成伤害，但会使其在舌头再生前无法使用舌头打击；舌头再生需要一天。

A creature hit by the bog bomber's tongue becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} by the bog bomber and takes [[/r 2d6[persistent,fire]]] damage. Unlike normal for the grabbed condition, though, the creature isn't @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}; instead, it can't move farther away from the bog bomber. A creature can sever the tongue with a Strike against AC 25 that deals at least 20 slashing damage. This deals no damage to the bog bomber, but prevents it from using its tongue Strike until its tongue regrows, which takes a day.

Swallow Whole.name: 囫囵吞下 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
大型，[[/r (2d10+11)[钝击],3d6[火焰]]], 破裂 20

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Large, [[/r (2d10+11)[bludgeoning],3d6[fire]]], Rupture 20

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Swamp Surge.name: 沼泽涌动 Swamp Surge
Swamp Surge.description:
沼泽轰炸者无视由沼泽地形特性造成的困难地形，并且在沼泽中其速度获得+10英尺的环境加值。

A bog bomber ignores difficult terrain caused by swamp terrain features and it gains a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speeds in swamps.

Bog Bomber.publicNotes:
沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙是体型巨大的生物，看起来像长着龙类特性的红色牛蛙。它们是一种杂交物种，是焰蜥龙与巨人蛙的混种。沼蜍人（特征）找到了一种让这些怪物杂交繁殖的方法，而其结果要么是一窝沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙，要么是数十个死去的沼蜍人（特征）。

沼蜍人（特征）使用沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙来防卫并扩张它们的领地。它们用多汁的巨人蜻蜓来引诱这些怪物。然而，有时这些美味的餐点会被忽视，一只沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙便会逃走，寻找更大的猎物。这就是为什么在野外也可能看到野化的沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙。

沼蜍人（特征）不惜如此大费周章来培育沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙的原因在于，它们能成为强大的盟友，尤其是在战斗中。沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙拥有向猎物吐出巨大火球的能力。此外，它们能跳跃并以惊人的距离冲刺，而且它们还能同时吐息火焰与水。

沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙往往会用黏稠、炽热的舌头猛然抽击猎物，将猎物拖向它们张开的巨人大口来进食。一旦进入喉腹之中，沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙便会把猎物以火球的形式吐出，然后吞食爆炸后的残骸。

如果沼蜍人（特征）继续繁育这种畸形怪物，它们或许会开始征服家园沼泽之外的土地，由沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙带头冲锋。

致命吸引

沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙本能地会被其他炽热的生物吸引。沼蜍人（特征）必须小心让它们远离火元素，免得它们为了更闪亮、更炽热的主人而抛弃原本的主子；而靠近沼蜍人（特征）领地的村庄则会维持可点燃的稻草人像，用来分散它们的注意力。红龙是这些纵火狂的终极诱惑，但遗憾的是，巨龙并不会回应它们的爱慕。一条红龙在计划袭击一座城市时，可能会在短时间内容忍沼蜍人（特征）轰炸蛙的存在，随后把它们抓起从天空中投下。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺）、护甲（轻型、中型、重型）、察觉物品、技能物品（特技动作、运动、威吓、隐匿）

符合条件的注入属性 bane、体质、elongating、energy resistant（火焰、正能量）、火焰、力量、wild

Bog bombers are huge creatures that resemble red bullfrogs with draconic features. They are a hybrid species, a cross between a flame drake and a giant frog. Boggards found a way to breed these monsters together, which either results in a nest of bog bombers or dozens of dead boggards.

Boggards use bog bombers to defend and expand their territory. They lure these monsters with juicy giant dragon flies. However, there are times when these delicious meals go unnoticed and a bog bomber escapes, looking for bigger prey. That is why it's possible to see feral bog bombers in the wild.

The reason boggards go to such great lengths to produce bog bombers is that they make formidable allies, especially in battle. Bog bombers have the ability to spit huge balls of fire at their prey. In addition, they can jump and sprint incredible distances, and they have the ability to breathe both fire and water.

Bog bombers tend to consume their prey by lashing out with their sticky, fiery tongues, pulling their prey toward their gaping giant maws. Once within the gullet, the bog bomber spits their prey out in a fireball and then consumes the exploded remains.

If boggards continue to breed such monstrosities, they might start to conquer lands outside their home swamps, with bog bombers leading the charge.

Fatal Attraction

Bog bombers are instinctively attracted to other fiery creatures. Boggards must be careful to keep them away from fire elementals lest they abandon their masters for shinier, fierier ones, and villages near boggard territories maintain straw effigies they can ignite to distract them. Red dragons are the ultimate attraction for these pyromaniacs, but sadly, the dragons do not return their affection. A red dragon may tolerate the presence of bog bombers for a little while if it is planning to attack a city, at which time it picks them up to drop from the sky.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light, medium, heavy), perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation, Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (fire, positive), fire, strength, wild

Boe Erchitu.name: 博厄·埃尔奇图 Boe Erchitu
Boe Erchitu.tokenName: 博埃·埃尔奇图 Boe Erchitu

Cursing Candles.name: 诅咒蜡烛 Cursing Candles
Cursing Candles.description:
点燃的烛火位于博厄·埃尔奇图的角上，使其能够对其目标施加诅咒，并赋予其力量。生物可以用手指尝试熄灭其中一根蜡烛，使用一个带有攻击（特征）的单动作：进行一次徒手攻击掷骰，对抗博厄·埃尔奇图的AC；或进行一次运动检定，对抗博厄·埃尔奇图的反射DC。此外，若博厄·埃尔奇图在对抗带有空气或水（特征）的法术的豁免中失败，则会有一根蜡烛被熄灭；在大失败时，两根都会被熄灭。若博厄·埃尔奇图的角上不再有任何点燃的蜡烛，则其无法使用“咆哮诅咒”，并且会处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 2} 与 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} 状态，直到蜡烛再次被点燃。

The lit candles on the boe erchitu's horns allow it to curse its targets, and grant it strength. A creature can attempt to extinguish one of the candles with their fingers using a single action, which has the attack trait to make an unarmed attack roll against the boe erchitu's AC or an Athletics check against the boe erchitu's Reflex DC. Additionally, if the boe erchitu fails a saving throw against a spell with the air or water trait, one of the candles is extinguished; on a critical fail both are extinguished. If no lit candles remain on the boe erchitu's horns, it can't use Bellowing Curse and is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 2} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} until the candles are lit again.

Steel Horns.name: 钢铁角 Steel Horns
Steel Horns.description:
生物可以用一次造成挥砍伤害的打击以目标指向博厄·厄奇图的角，试图在一次打击中将它们两根都砍断。角的AC与博厄·厄奇图相同，并且具有硬度9与36生命值：若未在单次打击中将其生命值降至0，它们会立刻恢复至满生命值。完成这一传奇壮举会立即使博厄·厄奇图恢复为其类人生物形态，并使其从诅咒中解脱。

A creature can target the boe erchitu's horns with a Strike that deals slashing damage to try and cut them both in one Strike. The horns have the same AC as the boe erchitu, and they have Hardness 9 and 36 Hit Points: if not reduced to 0 Hit Points with a single Strike, they are immediately restored to full Hit Points. Performing such a legendary task immediately reverts the boe erchitu to its humanoid form, and frees them from the curse.

Bellowing Curse.name: 咆哮诅咒 Bellowing Curse
Bellowing Curse.description:
波埃埃尔奇图向一个活生物咆哮，通过将其部分转化为波埃埃尔奇图来削弱并使其迷乱。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:25] 豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物会短暂地受到诅咒，其特性略微变为波埃埃尔奇图的样貌，包括长出细小的角。其获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 1}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{衰弱 1} 与 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 轮。

失败 同成功，但持续时间为 1 小时。

大成功或大失败 失败 同成功，但持续时间为 1 个月。

The boe erchitu bellows towards a living creature, weakening and disorienting it with a partial transformation into a boe erchitu. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is briefly cursed, and its features shift slightly into a boe erchitu, including the growth of tiny horns. They are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1}, and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure As success, but the duration is 1 hour.

Critical Failure As success, but the duration is 1 month.

Charging Curse.name: 冲锋诅咒 Charging Curse
Charging Curse.description:
伯厄埃尔奇图先进行移动，然后对一个活类人生物进行一次角 打击。命中时，伯厄埃尔奇图对目标施加咆哮 诅咒；重击时，目标对抗咆哮 诅咒的豁免结果比其掷出的成功等级差一级。

The boe erchitu Strides then makes a horn Strike against a living humanoid creature. On a hit, the boe erchitu uses Bellowing Curse on the target, and on a critical hit, the target's result on their saving throw against Bellowing Curse is one degree of success worse than the one they rolled.

Scent (Imprecise) 30 fet,.name: 嗅觉（不精确）30尺， Scent (Imprecise) 30 fet,

Boe Erchitu.publicNotes:
据说，当一个罪孽深重之人沉溺于凡人法律无法惩罚（或只是未受惩罚）的罪行时，神圣的力量便会亲自伸张正义，诅咒其在每个满月之下变为一只 boe erchitu。只有熄灭这头白牛钢铁犄角上的蜡烛才能平息它的狂怒，而只有以一次命中直接斩断犄角本身，才能将凡人罪人从这道诅咒中解放出来。

这位遥远的狼人近亲会在城市街头以兽性的暴怒游荡，只会在其他罪人的房屋前停下，并同样诅咒他们。传奇说，当 boe erchitu 在你家门前三次咆哮时，你注定会在即将到来的来年之内死去。boe erchitu 的变形会持续到黎明，而且这道诅咒无法像兽化生物的诅咒那样通过撕咬传播，尽管 boe erchitu 能用它的冲锋施加一种较温和的版本，而银依旧能极其有效地伤害它。

boe erchitu 脱落的犄角具有药用价值，尤其适用于治疗肝脏疾病。

有时会看到 boe erchitu 与小魔鬼或其他魔鬼为伍，它们将其怒火引向罪人的房屋，并确保它们的蜡烛永远点燃。这是否暗示该诅咒来自地狱？

竞逐狂乱

所有阵营的祭司与邪教徒都会为 boe erchitu 的蜡烛支付高价。有些人推测，将其蜡油滴在某个生物身上会激起比野蛮人更强烈的狂怒。另一些人认为它们会召唤牛头人，或许还能驱逐它们。唯一可以确定的是，这些蜡烛带有令人愉悦的覆盆子香气。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 45/100/180 gp

可用精炼 武器（钝击、穿刺），护甲（轻型、中型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动、威吓）

可用灌注属性 破邪，魅力，体质，能量抗性（正能量），邪恶，守序，负能量，力量，狂野

It is said that when an incredibly sinful person indulges in crimes not punishable (or simply unpunished) by mortal law, the power of the divine takes justice into its own hands and curses them to become a boe erchitu under each full moon. Only extinguishing the candles on the steel horns of this white ox can quell its fury, and only cutting the horns themselves with a single hit can free the mortal sinner from this curse.

This distant cousin of the werewolf wanders the streets of its city in a bestial rage, stopping only before the houses of other sinners to curse them as well. Legend says that when the boe erchitu bellows three times before your home, you are destined to die within the coming year. The boe erchitu transformation lasts until dawn, and the curse can't be spread with bites like the curse of the werecreature, although the boe erchitu is able to inflict a milder version with its charge, and silver still works excellently to wound it.

The rescinded horns of a boe erchitu have medicinal properties, and they are especially useful to cure liver illnesses.

A boe erchitu is sometimes seen in the company of imps or other devils, which direct their fury towards the sinners' houses and make sure that their candles are always lit. Could this be a clue that the curse comes from Hell?

Bidding Frenzy

Priests and cultists of all alignments pay well for the candles of a boe erchitu. Some speculate that dripping their wax on a creature stirs a rage greater than a barbarian's. Others think they summon minotaurs or maybe banish them. All that is known for sure is that the candles have a pleasing raspberry scent.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, piercing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Intimidation)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, charisma, constitution, energy resistant (positive), evil, lawful, negative, strength, wild
Boe Erchitu.prototypeToken: 博埃·埃尔奇图 Boe Erchitu

Bloodsport Remnant.name: 血斗遗余 Bloodsport Remnant

Immune to Falling Damage.name: 免疫坠落伤害 Immune to Falling Damage

Easily Provoked.name: 易被激怒 Easily Provoked
Easily Provoked.description:
残余无法抗拒精彩的挑战，尤其是以戏剧化方式发出的挑战。任何生物都可以花费一个动作（具有专注（特征））来挑战残余并使其将注意力集中在自己身上，残余会欣然接受。直到残余下个回合结束，或直到另一个生物用一个动作夺取残余的注意力为止，残余只会对该生物采取进攻动作。

The remnant is unable to resist a good challenge, especially one delivered dramatically. Any creature can spend an action, which has the concentrate trait, to challenge the remnant to focus on them, which the remnant happily accepts. Until the end of the remnant's next turn, or until another creature takes an action to gain the remnant's attention, the remnant takes offensive actions against only that creature.

Hype Aura.name: 炒作灵光 Hype Aura
Hype Aura.description:
30尺。血斗残影乐于将战斗不断升级直至高潮收尾，它向附近生物注入亢奋，使其造成更多伤害，但也因鲁莽而暴露于攻击之下。当残影在战斗中进行其第一个回合时，灵光内的所有生物——敌人、盟友以及残影自身——在伤害掷骰上获得+1状态加值，并且处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}。伤害掷骰的状态加值在残影作战的每个轮结束时提高+1，至多在第4轮后达到+4。若残影被摧毁或战斗结束，这些益处将重置并消散。

30 feet. A bloodsport remnant relishes escalating battles to a climactic finish and it infuses those nearby with the hype to deal more damage but the brazenness to expose themselves to attacks. When the remnant takes its first turn in combat, all creatures in the aura, enemy, ally, and the remnant alike, gain a +1 status bonus to damage rolls and are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard}. The status bonus to damage rolls increases by +1 for every round the remnant fights, to a maximum of +4 after 4 rounds. If the remnant is destroyed or the fight ends, the benefits reset and fade away.

No-Sell.name: 拒售 No-Sell
No-Sell.description:
触发 一名生物以一次打击对残迹造成大成功或大失败

效果 残迹对这一击不以为意，仿佛毫发无伤。它进行一次表演检定，对抗该生物的察觉DC，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物充满恐惧，意识到即便自己最强力的攻击也毫无作用。它获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}。

成功 同大成功或大失败，但它获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该生物意识到这次大成功或大失败确实有效；它不受影响，并在24小时内暂时免疫 No-Sell。

Trigger A creature critically hits the remnant with a Strike

Effect The remnant plays off the blow as if it was nothing. It attempts a Performance check against the creature's Perception DC, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is filled with dread that even their most powerful attack was ineffective. It becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Success As critical success, but it becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature realizes the critical hit was effective; it's unaffected and is temporarily immune to No-Sell for 24 hours.

Clothesline.name: 晾衣绳 Clothesline
Clothesline.description:
血斗残影至多疾走其速度的两倍，并在过程中穿过一个生物的空间。该生物以一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:28] 豁免承受血斗残影的拳头打击所造成的伤害。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物在残影进入其空间前阻止残影的移动，且该生物不受伤害。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受全额伤害。

大成功或大失败 失败, 该生物承受双倍伤害，并被击倒 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}。

The bloodsport remnant Strides up to twice its speed, moving through one creature's space in the process. That creature takes damage from the bloodsport remnant's fist Strike with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:28] save.

Critical Success The creature stops the remnant's movement before the remnant enters its space, and the creature takes no damage.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure, The creature takes double damage and is knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}.

Mighty Leap.name: 强力跳跃 Mighty Leap
Mighty Leap.description:
血斗残骸以强力跳跃飞上天空，向任意方向进行跳跃，最远可达其速度，甚至可以笔直向上。在此次移动期间的任意时点，它都可以对其触及内的一名生物进行一次打击或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} 动作。若它选择擒抱并成功，则它必须停止其 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Leap]{Leap}，不能继续移开，否则 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} 状态会结束，如同受擒状态的常规规则。

The bloodsport remnant takes to the sky with a powerful jump, Leaping up to its Speed in any direction, even straight up. At any point during this movement it can take a single Strike or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} action against a creature in its reach. If it chooses to Grapple and succeeds, it must halt its @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Leap]{Leap} without moving away or the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} condition ends, as normal for the grabbed condition.

Bloodsport Remnant.publicNotes:
血斗残渣诞生于坑斗士、角斗士与斗殴者破碎的躯体与不屈的灵体之中，是以暴力为生的生物。它们由唯有自身才能听见的人群欢呼所驱动，在世界各地游荡，寻找能在战斗中坚持得足够久、从而上演一场好戏的挑战者。

残渣并不在意自己把多少参与者卷入战斗；它有时甚至会游荡到正在进行的战场中央，向自己目之所及的一切生物发起挑战。它的存在会煽动附近的生物陷入暴力与肾上腺素的狂乱，将它自身与其选定的敌人都推向平日无法达到的更高境地。与血斗残渣的任何战斗都不会持续太久，因为随着每一秒流逝，搏杀都会变得愈发残酷。

尽管残渣并不保留那些将生命献给其不死之躯的存在的任何记忆，但孕育它的血腥、炫目的战斗在它身上烙下了对戏剧性的天然天赋，以及对任何能与其风格匹敌者的与生俱来的敬意。面对这样的敌人，血斗残渣会欣然配合对方的任何摆架子式夸口。

你们不觉得精彩吗？

血斗残渣的华丽与戏剧性使它们获得崇拜者。存续时间最长的残渣会依据其风格与个性赢得绰号与忠实追随者。一个名为“环球赌注交易所”的进取组织雇用追踪者跟随残渣并报告其活动，让人们能够下注赌残渣接下来会做什么、以及它们的表现如何。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型、中型），盾牌，技能物品（特技动作、运动、威吓、表演）

符合条件的灌注属性 魅力，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，心灵，力量，坚固，野性

Born from the broken bodies and indomitable spirits of pit fighters, gladiators, and brawlers, bloodsport remnants are creatures that thrive on violence. Fueled by the cheers of a crowd only they can hear, they wander the world searching for challengers capable of lasting long enough in a fight to put on a good show.

A remnant has no preference regarding how many participants it pulls into a battle, sometimes even wandering into the middle of an active battlefield and challenging all creatures it can see. Its presence riles nearby creatures into a frenzy of violence and adrenaline, pushing both it and its chosen enemies to greater heights than they can normally achieve. No battle with a Bloodsport Remnant lasts very long, as the fights become more and more brutal with every passing second.

Though the remnant retains no memories from the beings whose lives gave it unlife, the bloody, flashy combat that birthed it imprinted a natural flair for the dramatic and an innate respect for any who match its style. Against such foes, a bloodsport remnant joyfully plays along with any posturing boasts.

Are You Not Entertained?

The flair and drama of bloodsport remnants cause them to gain admirers. The longest lasting remnants earn nicknames and devoted followings based on their style and personality. An enterprising organization called the Worldwide Wagers Exchange employs trackers to follow remnants and report on their activities, allowing people to bet on what the remnants will do next and how they will fare.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), shield, skill items (Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation, Performance)

Eligible Imbued Properties charisma, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, mental, strength, sturdy, wild

Keeningreed.name: 哀啸贪欲 Keeningreed

Spirit Sense (Imprecise) 30 Feet.name: 灵体感官（不精确）30英尺 Spirit Sense (Imprecise) 30 Feet
Spirit Sense (Imprecise) 30 Feet.description:
哀鸣芦苇能够感知生物的灵体，包括活生物、大多数非无心智的不死生物，以及在所列射程内的闹鬼。

The keeningreed can sense the spirits of creatures, including living creatures, most non-mindless undead, and haunts within the listed range.

Primal Innate Spells.name: 原始天生法术 Primal Innate Spells

Enervation.name: 衰竭 Enervation
Enervation.description:
伸出一根手指，你发射出一道负能量光束，削弱任何被其触及的生物的生命力。线状范围内的每个活生物都必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 [[/r 2d8[persistent,void]]] 伤害。

失败 该生物受到 [[/r 4d8[persistent,void]]] 伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}。

大失败 该生物受到 [[/r 4d8[persistent,void]]] 伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}。

升阶（+2） 持续负能量伤害在成功时增加 [[/r 1d8[persistent,void]]] 伤害，在失败或大失败时增加 [[/r 2d8[persistent,void]]] 伤害。

Extending a finger, you fire a beam of negative energy that weakens the life force of any creature it touches. Each living creature in the line must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes [[/r 2d8[persistent,void]]] damage.

Failure The creature takes [[/r 4d8[persistent,void]]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes [[/r 4d8[persistent,void]]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}.

Heightened (+2) The persistent negative damage increases by [[/r 1d8[persistent,void]]] damage on a success, or by [[/r 2d8[persistent,void]]] damage on a failure or critical failure.

Sound Burst.name: 音爆 Sound Burst
Sound Burst.description:
刺耳的噪音爆发而出，造成2d10音波伤害。每个生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，在1分钟内处于Deafened，并处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d10。

A cacophonous noise blasts out, dealing 2d10 sonic damage. Each creature must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is Deafened for 1 minute, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Soothe.name: 安抚 Soothe
Soothe.description:
你恩泽目标的心智，增强其精神防御并治疗其伤口。当你施放法术时，目标恢复 1d10+4 生命值，并在持续时间内对抗精神效果的豁免获得 +2 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{法术效果：安抚}

升阶（+1） 治疗量增加 1d10+4。

You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds. The target regains 1d10+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell and gains a +2 status bonus to saves against mental effects for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nkk4O5fyzrC0057i]{Spell Effect: Soothe}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d10+4.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之音 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个由简单声音构成的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时呼喊。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可辨识的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Ghostreed.name: 鬼芦苇 Ghostreed
Ghostreed.description:
哀号芦苇的剃刀芦苇与挽歌打击均获得幽灵（特征）接触武器属性的效果，使其能够有效地对无形生物造成伤害。

A keeningreed's razor reed and threnody Strikes both gain the effects of the ghost touch weapon property, allowing them to damage incorporeal creatures effectively.

Last Respects.name: 最后的敬意 Last Respects
Last Respects.description:
哀鸣芦苇唱起挽歌，尝试使用其表演技能来解除一个祟灵。如果该祟灵通常无法用表演技能解除，则使用允许的技能之一的解除 DC，且该技能所需的熟练度等级为大师或更低（通常为宗教）。

The keeningreed sings a dirge to attempt to Disable a haunt using its Performance skill. If the haunt can't normally be disabled with the Performance skill, use the Disable DC for one of the allowed skills requiring a proficiency rank of master or lower (usually Religion).

Counter Performance.name: 反制表演 Counter Performance
Counter Performance.description:
触发 你或60英尺内的一名盟友掷骰进行豁免，以对抗听觉或视觉效果。

你的表演保护你和你的盟友。针对你已知的一种类型进行一次表演检定：若触发为听觉，则为听觉表演；若触发为视觉，则为视觉表演。你和区域内的盟友可以在你的表演检定结果与该次豁免结果之间取较高者。

Trigger You or an ally within 60 feet rolls a saving throw against an auditory or visual effect.

Your performance protects you and your allies. Roll a Performance check for a type you know: an auditory performance if the trigger was auditory, or a visual one for a visual trigger. You and allies in the area can use the better result between your Performance check and the saving throw.

Dirge of Doom.name: 末日挽歌 Dirge of Doom
Dirge of Doom.description:
区域内的敌人是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。只要他们仍在该区域内，就无法将其 Frightened 值降低到 1 以下。

Foes within the area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}. They can't reduce their Frightened value below 1 while they remain in the area.

Keeningreed.publicNotes:
人们认为哀鸣芦苇与钥草和海藻骏马是表亲，是这一植物生物家族中最神秘的成员。它们徘徊在古老的战场上，为逗留不去的灵体吟唱摇篮曲。但它们究竟为何受驱使这么做，却无人能确切知晓。

与其表亲不同，哀鸣芦苇能够大声说话，并拥有一种低语般的嗓音，听起来像是芦苇在风中沙沙作响。然而，它们很少对与活交谈感兴趣。只有那些最近失去过某个人的人，才往往能引起它们的注意。

农民的迷信认为，这并非真正的同情；他们说哀鸣芦苇需要人类悲恸的激情来繁衍后代。有些人相信，哀鸣芦苇是某个德鲁伊教团的造物，该教团试图治愈他们故土上一场古代战争留下的创伤。据说这些德鲁伊不想引来爱管闲事的祭司在其领地中施展神圣魔法，于是创造了哀鸣芦苇。自那以后，哀鸣芦苇便悄然在阴影笼罩的树林与阴郁的沼泽中扩散。

有些暴怒的灵体只能以直接武力才能令其安息，但哀鸣芦苇往往更偏好温和的方式：与灵体交谈，在其最终离去前抚慰它们。有时，哀鸣芦苇会接手某个灵体未竟之事，或是为了帮助其离去，或是为了纪念其生前。

有一支冒险者队伍因在冒险途中与一株哀鸣芦苇结盟而声名大噪。那株哀鸣芦苇向他们提供了宝藏的线索——只要能让缠绕其上的灵体得到最终的满足，这些宝藏便唾手可得。

然而，这个故事还有另一个更阴沉的版本。历经诸多冒险后，人们发现所谓的“最终满足”，竟是给予了一个那些冒险者多年前所杀死的敌人……

钥草是一类体型微小的植物家族，以会进行古怪而出人意料的活动而闻名，例如撬开锁具、与其他生物一同游泳，甚至创作音乐来安抚亡者的灵体。这个名称既指该家族，也指家族中最著名的成员——被称为“钥草”的那种生物：一种热衷于撬锁与解除装置的植物。

尽管钥草的起源并不完全清楚，许多学者已开始相信流传最广的传奇：其内容称钥草是由德鲁伊创造，用以填补各种其他植物不可能胜任的奇特生态位。也存在其他理论，包括一些学者认为钥草原本是类人生物，因自然神祇的祝福或诅咒而变形为植物。比如，有一个父母会讲给那些偷拿东西被抓到的小孩听的童话：如果他们行为不端、偷窃他人之物，绿人就可能在夜里来到家中，把他们变形成一株钥草，把他们永远带进森林，再也见不到自己的家人。

钥草与莱西之间基于相似与差异，形成了一种不同寻常的关系。两者都是小型的有感知植物生物；如果传闻属实，两者都起源于德鲁伊魔法。但莱西是自然灵体，或称“维泰”，通过一场原初仪式直接在凡俗的植物身躯中化身。尽管它们的始祖可能由德鲁伊创造，钥草却从头到尾都是凡俗植物——像任何其他植物一样活、繁殖、死亡。

哀鸣芦苇合唱团

有时，某个灵体的愿望过于宏大，以至于单株哀鸣芦苇无法独自完成。在这种情况下，由数株哀鸣芦苇组成的集会（称为“合唱团”）可能会协力完成单株哀鸣芦苇做不到的事。附近的聚居地有时会流传故事，讲述在这样的合唱团彻夜忙碌时，人们在夜里听到的诡异交响。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 45/100/180 gp

可用精炼 武器（挥砍），护甲（轻型），察觉物品，技能物品（欺瞒、交涉、威吓、自然、秘法学、表演、宗教、生存、潜行）

可用灌注属性 克敌，混沌，魅力，能量抗性（负能量、正能量），智力，心灵，负能量，正能量，音波，法术（原初：反制表演、末日挽歌、衰竭、幽灵之音、安抚、音爆），投掷，狂野

Believed to be cousins to keyweeds and kelpsteeds, keeningreeds are the most mysterious member of their family of plant creatures. They stalk ancient battlefields, singing lullabies to the spirits that linger. But precisely why they are driven to do so is not known for certain.

Unlike their cousins, keeningreeds are capable of speaking out loud, and they possess a whispering voice that sounds like reeds rustling in the wind. However, they rarely show interest in talking to the living. Only those who have recently lost someone tend to earn their attention.

Peasant superstition holds that this isn't true compassion; they say keeningreeds need the passion of human grief in order to produce offspring. Some believe that keeningreeds were the creation of an order of druids that sought to heal the scars of an ancient war in their homeland. These druids supposedly didn't want to invite meddling priests to wield divine magic in their domain, and so they created keeningreeds. Since then, keeningreeds have spread quietly through shadowy woods and gloomy marshes.

While some raging spirits can only be laid to rest by direct force, often keeningreeds prefer to take a gentler approach, conversing with the spirits and soothing them before final departure. Sometimes keeningreeds take up the unfinished business of a spirit, either in order to help them depart or to honor their memory.

One company of adventurers became famous for allying with a keeningreed on their adventures. The keeningreed provided them with details on treasures that were theirs for the taking if the spirits haunting them could be given final satisfaction.

However, another version of the story has a grimmer ending. After many adventures, it turned out that the final satisfaction was given to an enemy those adventurers had slain many years ago...

Keyweeds are a family of diminutive plants who are known to perform quirky and unexpected activities, such as breaking into locks, swimming alongside other creatures, or even creating music to calm the spirits of the dead. The name refers to both the family as well as the most famous member of the family, the creature known as keyweed, a plant that loves to pick locks and disable devices.

While keyweeds' origin aren't entirely clear, many scholars have come to believe the most widely spread legends, which tell that keyweeds were created by druids to fulfill a variety of unusual niches where no other plants possibly could. Other theories exist, including those of some scholars who believe that keyweeds were originally humanoids who transformed into plants due to the blessing or curse of a deity of nature. For instance, one fairy tale parents tell to little children who are caught filching something is that if they misbehave and steal from others, the Green Man might come to the house at night and transform them into a keyweed, spiriting them away into the woods forever, never to see their families again.

Keyweeds have an unusual relationship with leshies based on their similarities and differences. Both are small sapient plant creatures, and if the stories are true, both originated from druidic magic, but leshies are nature spirits, or vitae, that directly incarnated in a mortal plant body through a primal ritual. While their progenitors might have been created by druids, keyweeds are mortal plants through and through, living, reproducing, and dying just like any other plant does.

Keeningreed Choruses

Sometimes, a spirit's wishes are too great for a single keeningreed to fulfill on its own. In this case, a congregation of several keeningreeds, known as a chorus, might work together to achieve what a single keeningreed couldn't on its own. Nearby settlements sometimes pass down stories of the eerie symphonies they heard during the night while such a chorus was hard at work.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 45/100/180 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (slashing), armor (light), perception item, skill items (Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, Nature, Occultism, Performance, Religion, Stealth, Survival)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, energy resistant (negative, positive), intelligence, mental, negative, positive, sonic, spells (Primal: counter performance, dirge of doom, enervation, ghost sound, soothe, sound burst), throwing, wild

Blink Drake.name: 闪烁龙蜥 Blink Drake

Practiced Transposition.name: 熟练换位 Practiced Transposition
Practiced Transposition.description:
一只闪烁幼龙会从传送魔法中获得更强的效果。它可以用其传送法术传送至通常射程的两倍，且若某个效果会导致幼龙被传送到一个并非由幼龙选择的空间（包括来自其自身@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{闪烁}法术的效果），幼龙可以改为选择射程内任意一个有效空间现身，或选择不进行传送。为了以这种方式颠覆敌人的传送效果，幼龙必须以反制等级6与反制调整值[[/r 1d20+20 #Counteract]]{+20}成功通过一次反制检定。

A blink drake gains greater effects from teleportation magic. It can teleport up to twice the usual range with its teleportation spells, and if an effect would cause the drake to teleport to a space not of the drake's choosing (including from its own @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Blink} spell), the drake can instead choose any valid space within range to appear, or choose not to teleport. In order to subvert a foe's teleportation effect in this way, the drake must succeed at a counteract check with a counteract level of 6 and a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+20 #Counteract]]{+20}.

Attack of Opportunity (Tail Only).name: 借机攻击（仅限尾巴） Attack of Opportunity (Tail Only)

Reactive Blink.name: 反应性闪现 Reactive Blink
Reactive Blink.description:
触发 闪烁龙被一次攻击选为目标

效果 这条龙闪烁着微光并瞬间消失。它将来自 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Blink} 的对除力场外所有伤害的抗力，从 8 提高到 24，以对抗触发的这次攻击。在这次攻击结算后，这条龙随后传送到 10 英尺内的一处开阔空间。

Trigger The blink drake is targeted by an attack

Effect The drake shimmers and blinks away. It increases its resistance to all damage except force from @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.zR67Rt3UMHKC5evy]{Blink} against the triggering attack from 8 to 24. After the attack is resolved, the drake then teleports to an open space within 10 feet.

Warpblood.name: 曲血 Warpblood
Warpblood.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发 这只幼龙受到挥砍、穿刺或持续流血伤害。

效果 失控的传送魔法在从幼龙体内逸散时，试图以不可预测的方式置换事物。所有与幼龙相邻的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] 豁免，以对抗 @Damage[2d6[force]] 伤害。一名在此豁免中大失败的生物会被传送 10 尺，方向随机（类似于维持一个闪现法术的效果）。

Frequency once per round

Trigger The drake takes slashing, piercing, or persistent bleed damage.

Effect Uncontrolled teleportation magic attempts to transpose things in unpredictable ways as it escapes the drake. Every creature adjacent to the drake must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|dc:27|basic:true] save against @Damage[2d6[force]] damage. A creature that critically fails this save is teleported 10 feet in a random direction (similarly to the effects of Sustaining a blink spell).

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Unexpected Transposition.name: 意外换位 Unexpected Transposition
Unexpected Transposition.description:
触发 你成为敌人的一次打击的目标。

当你遭到攻击时，你尝试迅速将自己的位置与另一名生物的位置互换。不愿意与你互换位置的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。自愿的生物自动失败。若你成功与目标互换位置，则该次触发的攻击改为以该生物为目标结算，如同其原本就是该次攻击的目标一般。互换后，你与目标在1分钟内暂时免疫意外换位法术。若目标自愿，你会自动与其互换位置。若其不愿意，则其可以尝试一次意志豁免。若目标在其豁免中成功，则你们二者都不会传送。

Trigger You are targeted with an enemy's Strike.

When attacked, you attempt to quickly swap your own position with that of another creature. A creature that is unwilling to swap places with you must attempt a Will save. Willing creatures automatically fail. If you successfully switch places with the target, the triggering attack is resolved against that creature as if it had been the original target of the attack. After the swap, you and the target are both temporarily immune to unexpected transposition spells for 1 minute. You automatically switch places if the target is willing. If it's unwilling, it can attempt a Will save. Neither of you teleports if the target succeeds at its save.

Blink Charge.name: 闪烁冲锋 Blink Charge
Blink Charge.description:
你穿行于空间的织构之中，以你传送所携带的动量打出一击。你传送至射程内你可看见的某个生物相邻的一处空着的空间，然后用你正持用的武器对该生物进行一次打击。该次打击造成伤害，外加额外 2d8 力场伤害，具体取决于你的打击结果。

大成功或大失败 伤害翻倍，且在该次打击之后，你可以将目标传送到距离其当前位置至多 5 尺远的一处空着的空间。若目标起始在地面上，则新空间必须在地面上；若其在飞行，则新空间必须在空气中；以此类推。

成功 该次打击造成完整伤害。

失败 该次打击不造成伤害，但目标承受 [[/r 1d8[force]]] 伤害。

大成功或大失败 该次打击不造成伤害，且你承受 1d8 力场伤害。

强化（+2） 该法术的射程增加 60 尺，且该法术造成的任何力场伤害增加 [[/r 1d8[force]]]。

You propel yourself through the fabric of space to deal a blow carrying the momentum of your teleportation. You teleport to an empty space adjacent to a creature you can see within range, then make a Strike against the creature with a weapon you're wielding. The Strike deals damage, plus an extra 2d8 force damage, depending on the result of your Strike.

Critical Success Double damage, plus after the Strike, you can teleport the target into an empty space up to 5 feet away from its current position. The new space must be on the ground if it started on the ground, in the air if it was flying, and so on.

Success The Strike deals full damage.

Failure The Strike deals no damage, but the target takes [[/r 1d8[force]]] damage.

Critical Failure The Strike deals no damage, and you take 1d8 force damage.

Heightened (+2) The spell's range increases by 60 feet, and any force damage the spell deals is increased by [[/r 1d8[force]]].
