Fleet Step.name: 迅捷步伐 Fleet Step
Fleet Step.description:
你获得速度+30尺的状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]

You gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或以发声方式制造任何其他声音时，你可以让你的发声看起来像是从60尺内的别处传来，并且在你发声时可以自由改变该表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的音调、音色与其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻术之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音互动。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造一只单独的魔法手，可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并缓慢地移动它，最多达20英尺。由于你在使物体漂浮，你可以将其向任何方向移动。当你维持法术时，你可以额外移动该物体20英尺。若法术结束时该物体仍在空气中，该物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以一个负载不超过1且无人持用的物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一个负载不超过1且无人持用的物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一个负载不超过2且无人持用的物体为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Produce Flame.name: 制造火焰 Produce Flame
Produce Flame.description:
一团小小的火焰球出现在你手掌中，你可以用它进行近战或远程挥击。对你的目标的AC进行一次法术攻击掷骰。此攻击通常为远程攻击，但你也可以对处于你徒手触及范围内的生物进行一次近战攻击。

成功时，你造成1d4火焰伤害加上你的施法能力调整值。大成功时，目标受到双倍伤害并承受1d4持续火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 将伤害提高1d4，并将大成功时的持续伤害提高1d4。

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]]{随等级提升的持续火焰伤害}

A small ball of flame appears in the palm of your hand, and you lash out with it either in melee or at range. Make a spell attack roll against your target's AC. This is normally a ranged attack, but you can also make a melee attack against a creature in your unarmed reach.

On a success, you deal 1d4 fire damage plus your spellcasting ability modifier. On a critical success, the target takes double damage and 1d4 persistent fire damage.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by 1d4 and the persistent damage on a critical hit by 1d4.

[[/r (@item.level)d4[persistent,fire]]]{Leveled Persistent Fire Damage}

Tanglefoot.name: 缠足 Tanglefoot
Tanglefoot.description:
一条覆满黏稠树液的藤蔓凭空出现，从你手中甩出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击检定。

大成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]状态，并在1轮内其速度受到-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试对抗你的法术DC进行挣脱，以移除该减值以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]状态。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度受到-10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试对抗你的法术DC进行挣脱，以移除该减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine covered in sticky sap appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack against the target.

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] condition and takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] condition.

Success The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Somatic Flailing.name: 躯体乱舞 Somatic Flailing
Somatic Flailing.description:
当召唤师使用魔法时，恶魔会猛击附近的一个生物。该聚合女魔施放一个法术，并对其触及范围内一个非该法术目标的生物进行一次爪子打击。若该法术具有攻击掷骰，则两次攻击都计入其多重攻击减值，但在它完成这两次攻击后减值才会增加。该聚合女魔在使用蠕动爬行之前，无法再次使用躯体乱舞。

As the summoner uses magic, the fiend lashes out at a nearby creature. The amalgamess Casts a Spell and makes a claw Strike against a creature within its reach other than the target of the spell. If the spell has an attack roll, both attacks count toward its multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after it's made both of them. The amalgamess can't use Somatic Flailing again until it uses Writhing Crawl.

Writhing Crawl.name: 蠕动爬行 Writhing Crawl
Writhing Crawl.description:
合成兽疾行至多两次，针对由此次移动所触发的反应，其AC与反射豁免获得+2环境加值。合成兽在使用躯体乱舞之前，无法再次使用蠕动爬行。

The amalgamess Strides up to twice, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saves against reactions triggered by this movement. The amalgamess can't use Writhing Crawl again until it uses Somatic Flailing.

Amalgamess.publicNotes:
当一名魔法施术者拥有足够的知识去召唤一只邪魔，却没有足够的经验知道如何正确执行时，amalgamess 便会在一次召唤仪式出错后诞生。由于仪式失败，被召唤的生物被意外地在召唤者体内召来，导致二者以一种不自然的方式融合在一起——类似于传送事故可能导致 amalgamite 形成的方式。

尽管 amalgamess 的肉体融合完全是永久性的，且极难逆转，但这两个实体的心智仍部分分离。amalgamess 作为一个生物运作，但两种心智的碎片各自都有其打算：召唤者的心智拼命想活得足够久，以期某天找到办法撤销降临在自己身上的恐怖；而被召唤的邪魔的心智则试图结束其在物质位面上痛苦的存在，以召唤者的性命为代价返回其家乡位面。

由于其心智破碎，与 amalgamess 讲道理几乎不可能，但提出要对其施放放逐法术就足以引起它的注意——因为那是少数能终结其悲惨状态的方法之一。

厄运放逐

召唤仪式并非唯一会出错的法术——放逐同样可能造成严重破坏。amalgamess 的融合持续得越久，两只生物的精粹就越会彼此交织。然而，若一只 amalgamess 已存在超过一年，并在对抗放逐的意志豁免中大成功，则这两只生物在极少数情况下能恢复至其原本的状态。可若它们在该豁免中大失败，结果反而可能变成一种由肢体部件恐怖混杂而成的存在，被称为“更大 amalgamess”。这种悲惨状态可以通过它们再次变回 amalgamess 并寄望下一次放逐结果更好来稍作修正——或者，在极端罕见的情况下，变得更糟。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 125/275/500 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（奥秘、运动、威吓）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、混沌、魅力、体质、延展、能量抗性（正能量）、火焰、加固、智力、心灵、负能量、法术（奥术：疾步、飞行、液压推击、法师之手、制造火焰、缠足、愚者之触、吸血接触、腹语术）、尖刺、力量、水、狂野

Formed when a practitioner of magic has enough knowledge to summon a fiend but not enough experience to know how to do so correctly, an amalgamess is the result of a summoning ritual gone wrong. Due to the failed ritual, the creature being summoned was accidentally called within the summoner's body, causing both to become unnaturally fused together in a way similar to how an amalgamite can be formed due to a teleportation mishap.

While the physical fusion of an amalgamess is fully permanent and very difficult to reverse, the minds of the two entities remain partially separated. The amalgamess functions as one creature, but the fragments of the two minds each have their own agenda. The mind of the summoner desperately seeks to survive long enough to someday discover a way to undo the horror that befell it, while the mind of the summoned fiend seeks to end its agonizing existence on the Material Plane so that it can return to its home plane at the cost of the summoner's life.

Reasoning with an amalgamess is nigh impossible due to its fractured minds, but an offer to cast the banishment spell on it is enough to draw its attention, as it's one of the few ways to end its tragic condition.

Bad Luck Banishment

Summoning rituals aren't the only spells that can go wrong—banishment can wreak havoc too. The longer the amalgamess's fusion lasts, the more the essences of the two creatures intermingle. However, if an amalgamess has existed for more than a year and critically succeeds its Will save against banishment, the two creatures can rarely be restored to their original states. However, if they critically fail their save, the result can instead be a horrific mix of body parts, known as a greater amalgamess. This tragic condition can be somewhat fixed by them becoming an amalgamess again and hoping the next banishment goes better. Or, in extremely rare cases, much worse.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 125/275/500 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Arcana, Athletics, Intimidation)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, constitution, elongating, energy resistant (positive), fire, fortification, intelligence, mental, negative, spells (Arcane: fleet step, fly, hydraulic push, mage hand, produce flame, tanglefoot, touch of idiocy, vampiric touch, ventriloquism), spiked, strength, water, wild

Akaky.name: 阿卡基 Akaky

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当阿卡奇被摧毁时，它会在[[/br 2d4 #Days]]{2d4天}后于其衣物被偷走的位置重塑并完全痊愈。若有人自愿将其原始衣物至少一部分交还给阿卡奇，它将被永久摧毁。

When an akaky is destroyed, it reforms, fully healed, at the location where its clothing was stolen after [[/br 2d4 #Days]]{2d4 days}. If someone willingly gives at least a piece of its original garment to the akaky, it is permanently destroyed.

Winter Aura.name: 冬季灵光 Winter Aura
Winter Aura.description:
10英尺。靠近阿卡奇时，空气会超自然地变得更冷，使温度降低两个等级。轻度寒冷变为极度寒冷，严重或极度寒冷变为难以置信的寒冷，依此类推。只要这使温度达到严重寒冷或更冷，除阿卡奇之外的生物若在灵光内结束其回合且未穿着冬季衣物，则会受到 @Damage[1d4[cold]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|basic:true] 豁免。

10 feet. The air grows supernaturally colder in close proximity to an akaky, causing the temperature to become two steps colder. Mild cold becomes extreme cold, Severe or extreme cold becomes incredible cold and so on. As long as this brings the temperature to severe cold or colder, creatures other than the akaky who end their turn in the aura who aren't wearing winter clothing take @Damage[1d4[cold]] damage, with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17|basic:true] save.

Ghostly Grab.name: 幽灵抓握 Ghostly Grab
Ghostly Grab.description:
同擒抱，但akaky尽管自身为虚体，仍可擒抱一个有形生物。它只能通过在该生物上显现一件逐渐消隐的幽灵外套残影，然后抓住这件虚体外套来做到这一点。这件灵性衣物会叠加在目标可能穿着的任何冬装之上，使akaky在杀死受害者后有可能将其保暖衣物撕扯下来。akaky擒抱的受害者进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape}的DC为20，而不是akaky的运动DC。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

As Grab, but the akaky can Grab a corporeal creature despite being incorporeal itself. It is only able to do so by manifesting a fading image of a ghostly overcoat onto the creature and then clutching onto the incorporeal coat. This spiritual garment superimposes over any winter clothing a target might have, allowing the akaky to potentially tear the warm clothing off the victim after killing them. The @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} DC for victims of an akaky's Grab is 20, rather than the akaky's Athletics DC.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

Steal Coat.name: 偷走外套 Steal Coat
Steal Coat.description:
需求 阿卡基令一名生物处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{受擒}

效果 阿卡基将那件幽灵般的外套猛地扯下，并以凛冬寒夜的刺骨冰冷充斥目标。目标受到[[/r (1d8+6)[cold]]]伤害，进行一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，但其外套仍牢固不脱。

失败 目标受到全额伤害。若目标穿着冬装，该衣物会与叠加其上的幽灵外套一同从其身体上相位脱离并落在地上，位于目标的空间中。由于阿卡基只能抓住外套，而无法直接抓住该生物，这会使该生物的受擒状态结束，不过这并不会阻止阿卡基稍后再次使用其“幽灵之擒”能力以显现一件新的外套。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但目标还会获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 1}与@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{虚弱 1}，直到其在温暖的环境中度过10分钟。

Requirements The akaky has a creature @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}

Effect The akaky rips the ghostly overcoat off and fills the target with the freezing cold of a fierce winter night. The target takes [[/r (1d8+6)[cold]]] damage, with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] save.

Critical Success Target is unaffected.

Success Target takes half damage but its coat remains secure.

Failure Target takes full damage. If the target was wearing winter clothing, the clothing phases off their body along with the superimposed ghostly overcoat and falls to the ground in the target's space. Because the akaky is only able to grab the coat, not the creature directly, this causes the creature's grabbed condition to end, though it doesn't stop the akaky from using its Ghostly Grab ability again later to manifest a new coat.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} until it spends 10 minutes in a warm environment.

Jealous Hatred.name: 嫉妒的憎恨 Jealous Hatred
Jealous Hatred.description:
阿卡基对所有穿着冬季服装的目标进行攻击掷骰时获得+2环境加值，但它对这类生物的憎恨最终也会成为它的败因。穿着冬季服装的生物在攻击阿卡基时所进行的打击被视为魔法。

An akaky gains +2 circumstance bonus to all its attack rolls against targets wearing winter clothing, but its hatred for such creatures is also ultimately its undoing. Strikes made by creature wearing winter clothing are treated as magical when attacking the akaky.

Akaky.publicNotes:
阿卡基斯是凡人灵魂，他们死于失温或疾病，通常是在冬季遭到伏击并被洗劫一空——更重要的是，他们的保暖衣物被夺走之后。

这些灵体对活怀有难以言喻的憎恨，并嫉妒他们的温暖；在严寒冬夜最深沉的时分，它们徘徊于城市街道，只为将自身苦难的幽魂幻象释放到任何不幸与其擦肩而过之人身上。

寒冷的慰藉

每当冬日寒意逼近，城里人便会流传如何在阿卡基斯遭遇中活下来的传闻。有人说丢下一只穿着冬装的玩偶能分散阿卡基斯的注意力；也有人说烤棉花糖的气味能驱散阿卡基斯，或是火焰能减缓逼近的阿卡基斯。然而没人确切知道原因，因为迄今为止，这些建议没有任何一条真正奏效。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 7/18/30 gp

合格的精炼 察觉 物品，技能 物品（特技动作、威吓、社会）

合格的灌注属性 混乱、寒冷、敏捷、能量抗性（负能量）、邪恶、防护、负能量、狂野、翼生

Akakys are the souls of mortals who died from hypothermia or illness, typically after they were ambushed and robbed of their valuables and, more importantly, their warm clothes during the winter.

These spirits, filled with unspeakable hatred for the living and jealousy for their warmth, stalk city streets in the dead of cold winter nights, only to unleash a spectral phantasm of their own suffering upon anyone unlucky enough to cross their path.

Cold Comfort

City dwellers share rumors about how to survive akaky encounters whenever the chill of winter approaches. Some say dropping a doll wearing winter clothing will distract an akaky, while others say the smell of roasted marshmallows repels akakys or that fire will slow down an approaching akaky. Nobody's exactly sure as to why, to date, none of this advice has actually worked.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 7/18/30 gp

Eligible Refinements perception item, skill items (Acrobatics, Intimidation, Society)

Eligible Imbued Properties chaotic, cold, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, fortification, negative, wild, winged

Greater Fetchfisher.name: 高等拾魂钓者 Greater Fetchfisher
Greater Fetchfisher.tokenName: 高等取钩渔手 Greater Fetchfisher

Shifting Mass.name: 质量转移 Shifting Mass
Shifting Mass.description:
尽管它们体型庞大，取渔者可以在位面之间转移其身体，使其能够穿过狭窄空间，并躲在足以为中型生物提供掩蔽的小型障碍物后方以获得掩蔽。当它们进行挤压时，可以以其全速速度移动。当使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Take Cover]{Take Cover} 动作时，它们可以躲在大型或更大的物体后方获得掩蔽，并在必要时将其空间从15×15英尺缩小到最小5×5英尺。

Despite their size, the fetchfisher can shift their body between planes to allow it to fit through tight spaces and take cover behind small obstacles that would be enough to provide cover for a Medium creature. While Squeezing, they can move at their full Speed. When using the @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Take Cover]{Take Cover} action, they can take cover behind Large or larger objects, reducing their space down from 15 by 15 feet to as small as 5 by 5 feet as necessary.

Greater Darkvision.name: 强效黑暗视觉 Greater Darkvision

Snatching Ambush.name: 掠夺伏击 Snatching Ambush
Snatching Ambush.description:
需求 尚未掷先攻。

触发 一个位尚未观察到抓魂渔者的生物移动至抓魂渔者15英尺内。

效果 抓魂渔者使用“攫抓俯冲”，然后掷先攻。

Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled.

Trigger A creature that hasn't observed the fetchfisher moves within 15 feet of the fetchfisher.

Effect The fetchfisher uses Snatch and Dive and then rolls initiative.

Shadow Step.name: 影步 Shadow Step
Shadow Step.description:
需求 fetchfisher处于昏暗光照或黑暗的区域中，或站在任何大型或更大的物体的阴影里

效果 fetchfisher立刻传送到另一个位于昏暗光照或黑暗的地点，或传送到任何大型或更大的物体的阴影中的空间。无论哪种情况，目的地必须在60尺内。

Requirements The fetchfisher is in an area of dim light or darkness or is standing in the shadow of any Large or larger object

Effect The fetchfisher instantly teleports to another location that's in dim light or darkness or to a space that's in the shadow of any Large or larger object. Either way, the destination must be within 60 feet.

Snatch and Dive.name: 夺取俯冲 Snatch and Dive
Snatch and Dive.description:
强效抓鱼怪伸长手臂，在潜入阴影前将猎物一把夺走。强效抓鱼怪对15尺内的一个生物进行一次爪 打击，尽管该爪通常只有10尺的触及。若强效抓鱼怪命中并使用强化擒抱，它会将该生物移动至最靠近强效抓鱼怪且与其相邻的最近方格。随后强效抓鱼怪可以进行影步。若它选择影步，则@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}的生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:30] 意志 豁免。失败时，目标与强效抓鱼怪一同传送，抵达时处于相同的相对位置并保持被擒抱。成功时，若强效抓鱼怪想要保持该生物被擒抱，它可以选择不传送。

The greater fetchfisher stretches their arm and snatches away their prey before diving into the shadows. The greater fetchfisher makes a claw Strike against a creature within 15 feet, despite the claw normally having a reach of 10 feet. If the greater fetchfisher hits and uses Improved Grab, they move the creature to the nearest square adjacent to the greater fetchfisher. The greater fetchfisher can then Shadow Step. If it chooses to Shadow Step, the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:30] save. On a failure, the target teleports with the greater fetchfisher, arriving in the same relative position and remaining grabbed. On a success, the greater fetchfisher can choose not to teleport if it wants to keep the creature grabbed.

Greater Fetchfisher.publicNotes:
虽然大多数抓影钓兽似乎满足于靠小打小闹的匪盗行径维生，但也有极少数个体怀有更可怕的野心。抓影钓兽可能会对邪恶魔法与负能量产生嗜好，因为它们天生会产生少量原初的阴影魔法。经常摄取这种力量的抓影钓兽，最终会经历一次转变，成为更强大的抓影钓兽。

很少有人了解抓影钓兽的蜕变过程，因为这种情况极为罕见，实属万幸。在某个时刻，当它摄取了足够的魔法能量后，抓影钓兽会进入自己的巢穴并开始冬眠，通常由其数代后代守卫。几个月后，更强大的抓影钓兽会现身，发生了怪物般的畸变。更强大的抓影钓兽肌肉极为发达，每只前爪的食指趾上都有一只更大的、带鱼钩般弯曲的致命爪钩。它们的颌骨向口鼻部前方延伸，形成一种怪诞、充满肉质的鳄类巨口，口中排列着多排牙齿。尽管这头野兽的眼睛并未同样彻底改变，但其位置会在头骨上移，以获得更宽广的视野。那些不幸遭遇更强大的抓影钓兽的人发誓说，它们展现出比同类更高的掠食智慧。

一处长期被更强大的抓影钓兽狩猎过的区域会留下若干明显迹象。环境中的光似乎昏沉朦胧。阴影可能会延伸得比应有的更远，并更彻底地削弱光。林地与沟壑等阴暗之处，可能会散发出酸败的烹油恶臭。这些都是更强大的抓影钓兽频繁旅行所造成的副作用，因为它们留下的黏液残渣会沉积在阴影落下的缝隙角落里。

抓影钓兽是一类来自暗影位面的哺乳类野兽家族，它们在物质位面与暗影位面的边界地带狩猎。暴露于阴影能量之下会使它们变得更巨大、更强大。

抓影钓兽的教养

抓影钓兽即使在年幼时也能在育群中自卫并参与狩猎。然而此时它们的心智尚未完全发育，举止更像动物而非成年同类。因此，负责任的成年抓影钓兽会看护一群育群虫群。成年抓影钓兽会以严厉但公正、强调实作的方式授课，教授狩猎、语言、附近威胁与地理等重要主题。

抓影钓兽的合作者

在更为罕见的情况下，当抓影钓兽在物质位面狩猎时，有人曾见它们与拟形怪合作，发动精心设计的伏击计策。在这些计策中，拟形怪充当诱饵，将受害者黏附固定在原地，使抓影钓兽要么围攻落单目标，要么抓住并拖走后排盟友，从而让拟形怪更容易得手。

更强大的抓影钓兽的对手

许多占据与抓影钓兽相似生态位、且更为残虐的阴谋家——例如鬼怪与熊地精（特征）——往往自认为是黑暗中的顶级掠食者。更强大的抓影钓兽可能会在阴影之间更幽暗的角落里，观察这些半聪明的作祟者数月之久。鬼怪会享受恐吓与引诱受害者的过程，直到他们在陷阱中被包围；而更强大的抓影钓兽则会等待并伺机而动。只有当它的盟友就位、且它的目标恰好已为杀戮聚拢了受害者时，它才会发动打击。随后，如同昏暗中一头利维坦出现在鱼群之前，更强大的抓影钓兽会将掠食者与猎物一并吞噬殆尽。

建议的怪物部位

怪物部位 375/840/1,560 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉 物品、技能 物品（运动、欺骗、学识[幽影裔]、隐匿）

符合条件的灌注属性 bane、体质、敏捷、elongating、energy resistant（positive）、spiked、力量、wild

While the majority of fetchfishers seem content to subsist off of small-scale banditry, there are rare individuals with more terrible aspirations. Fetchfishers can develop a taste for evil magic and negative energy, as they naturally produce a small amount of primal shadow magic. A fetchfisher who regularly consumes such power eventually undergoes a transformation into a greater fetchfisher.

Few understand fetchfisher metamorphosis, as it is a blessedly rare occurrence. At some point, after consuming enough magical energy, the fetchfisher enters their den and hibernates, usually guarded by generations of their own offspring. After a few months, the greater fetchfisher emerges, monstrously transformed. Greater fetchfishers are heavily muscled, with a larger, fish-hooked killing claw on the index digit of each forepaw. Their jawbones extend beyond the snout in a grotesque, fleshy, crocodilian maw, lined with multiple rows of teeth. While the beast's eyes aren't as thoroughly transformed, their positioning shifts higher on the skull for a broader field of view. Those unlucky enough to encounter a greater fetchfisher swear they exhibit a higher predatory intellect than their kin.

An area that has been routinely hunted by a greater fetchfisher has several telltale signs. Ambient light seems bleary. Shadows might extend further than they should and diminish light more completely. Shadowy places, like woods and gullies, might develop the stench of rancid cooking fat. These are side effects of frequent travel by greater fetchfishers, as their slime residue settles into the nooks where shadows fall.

Fetchfishers are a family of mammalian beasts from the Shadow Plane that hunt on the borders between the Material Plane and the Shadow Plane. Exposure to shadowy energies can cause them to grow larger and more powerful.

Fetchfisher Education

Fetchfishers are able to defend themselves and hunt in a brood even at a young age. However, at this point, their mind hasn't yet fully developed, and they act more like animals than their adult counterparts. Thus, responsible adult fetchfishers watch over a brood swarm. Adult fetchfishers use harsh but fair practical hands-on lessons to teach important topics like hunting, language, nearby threats, and geography.

Fetchfisher Collaborators

On the rarer occasions that fetchfishers hunt on the Material Plane, they have been known to cooperate with mimics to launch elaborate ambush schemes. In these schemes, the mimic acts as bait, adhering the victim in place to allow the fetchfisher to either gang up on a solitary victim or to snatch and drag away a back-line ally to make the mimic's job easier.

Greater Fetchfisher Rivals

Many of the more sadistic schemers who occupy a similar niche to fetchfishers, such as bogeymen and bugbears, tend to think of themselves as the apex predators of the dark. A greater fetchfisher might observe these half-clever haunters for months from the darker places between shadows. While a bogeyman savors the process of terrorizing and baiting victims until they are encircled within their trap, a greater fetchfisher waits and bides their time. Only once their allies are in place and their mark has conveniently gathered victims for the kill do they strike. Then, like a leviathan appearing before a shoal in the gloom, the greater fetchfisher gorges itself on predator and prey alike.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 375/840/1,560 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics, Deception, Lore [Fetchling], Stealth)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), spiked, strength, wild
Greater Fetchfisher.prototypeToken: 高等捕魂渔者 Greater Fetchfisher

Adada.name: 阿达达 Adada

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 90 feet.name: 颤动感知（不精确）90英尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 90 feet

Tongue of Nonsense.name: 胡言乱语之舌 Tongue of Nonsense
Tongue of Nonsense.description:
尽管阿达达咿呀乱语毫无意义，所有能听到阿达达的生物都能理解它们的咿呀乱语，因为那些随机的声音会扭曲他们的大脑，使其领会其中的含义。阿达达以同样的方式理解所有口头与手势的语言，将语言转化为足够混沌以便处理的形式。

Even though adadas babble nonsense, all creatures who can hear the adada can understand their babbling as the random sounds twist their brains into comprehending the meaning. Adadas understand all spoken and signed languages in the same way, converting language into something chaotic enough to process.

Aura of Illogicality.name: 非理性灵光 Aura of Illogicality
Aura of Illogicality.description:
60英尺。射程内的生物尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:35] 意志豁免。失败时，世界融化为一团混沌的随机与荒诞泥沼，使该生物陷入 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{呆滞（状态） 2}。该呆滞（状态）所带来的、用于避免失去一个动作的纯骰检定，同样适用于所有使用工具、武器或其他物体的动作，因为装备的功能会间歇性地变得随机且毫无意义。若意志豁免成功，该生物获得1分钟的暂时免疫。

60 feet. Creatures within range attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:35] save. On failure, the world melts into a chaotic morass of randomness and absurdity, causing the creature to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}. The flat check from this stupefied condition to avoid losing an action also applies to all actions using tools, weapons, or other objects, as the equipment's functionality sporadically becomes random and nonsensical. On a successful Will save, the creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Melt Time.name: 融化时代 Melt Time
Melt Time.description:
触发 阿达达陷入迟缓或震慑

效果：阿达达尝试反制其 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓} 与 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑} 状态（以其表演调整值作为其反制调整值，反制等级为9）。无论是否成功，它都会获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{加速} 1分钟，并且可以用额外的动作进行打击、疾行、掘地、飞行或游泳。

Trigger The adada becomes slowed or stunned

Effect: The adada attempts to counteract its @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} and @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} conditions (using its Performance modifier as its counteract modifier with a counteract level of 9). Regardless of whether it succeeds, it becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Quickened]{Quickened} for 1 minute and can use the extra action to Strike, Stride, Burrow, Fly, or Swim.

Structure Vulnerability.name: 结构易损性 Structure Vulnerability
Structure Vulnerability.description:
遵循严格规范（如信条与禁忌）的生物的徒手攻击会触发阿达达对守序伤害的弱点，即使该生物并非守序亦然。

Unarmed attacks from creatures that follow a rigid code, such as tenets and anathemas trigger an adada's weakness to lawful damage, even if the creature isn't lawful.

Anti-Poetry.name: 反诗歌 Anti-Poetry
Anti-Poetry.description:
阿达达的羽饰在命中时吟诵一首声音诗，用尖刻而锋利的讽刺感染其受害者，威胁将其撕裂，造成 @Damage[3d6[slashing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:38|basic:true] 豁免。大成功或大失败时，该生物还会 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}。

An adada's plume recites a sound poem on impact, which infects their victim with scathing and cutting satire that threatens to rip them apart, dealing @Damage[3d6[slashing]] damage with a @Check[type:will|dc:38|basic:true] save. On a critical failure, the creature is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stunned]{Stunned 2}.

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Teleport.name: 传送 Teleport
Teleport.description:
你和各个目标会立即被传送到射程内的任意地点，只要你能同时通过其相对于你起始位置的位置以及其外观（或其他可识别的特性）来精确辨认该地点。对地点外观的错误认知通常会导致该法术失败，但也可能改为传送到不想去的地点，或发生由GM决定的其他异常意外。传送在长距离上并不精确。各个目标出现的位置会与预定目的地相差一段距离，约等于总旅行距离的1%，方向由GM决定。对于短途旅行，这种不精确无关紧要，但对于长距离则可能高达1英里。

升阶（7环）你和其他目标可以旅行到1,000英里内的任意地点。

升阶（8环）你和其他目标可以旅行到同一颗行星上的任意地点。若你旅行超过1,000英里，你只会偏离目标10英里。

升阶（9环）你和其他目标可以旅行到同一恒星系中另一颗行星上的任意地点。假设你对地点的位置与外观有准确的认知，你会在新行星上偏离目标100英里处抵达。

升阶（10环）如9环版本，但你和其他目标可以旅行到同一星系内的任意行星。

You and the targets are instantly transported to any location within range, as long as you can identify the location precisely both by its position relative to your starting position and by its appearance (or other identifying features). Incorrect knowledge of the location's appearance usually causes the spell to fail, but it could instead lead to teleporting to an unwanted location or some other unusual mishap determined by the GM. Teleport is not precise over great distances. The targets appear at a distance from the intended destination equal to roughly 1 percent of the total distance traveled, in a direction determined by the GM. For short journeys, this lack of precision is irrelevant, but for long distances this could be up to 1 mile.

Heightened (7th) You and the other targets can travel to any location within 1,000 miles.

Heightened (8th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on the same planet. If you travel more than 1,000 miles, you arrive only 10 miles off target.

Heightened (9th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on another planet within the same solar system. Assuming you have accurate knowledge of the location's position and appearance, you arrive on the new planet 100 miles off target.

Heightened (10th) As the 9th-level version, but you and the other targets can travel to any planet within the same galaxy.

Freedom of Movement (Constant).name: 行动自如（恒定） Freedom of Movement (Constant)
Freedom of Movement (Constant).description:
你排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。处于此法术效果影响下时，目标无视那些会令其速度承受环境减值的效果。当其尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的效果时，其自动成功，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于行动自由法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Mind Blank (Constant).name: 心灵屏障（恒常） Mind Blank (Constant)
Mind Blank (Constant).description:
强大的结界将生物隐藏于探知魔法之外。目标获得+4状态加值，用于对抗精神效果的豁免。心灵空白会尝试反制任何侦测、启示与探知效果，视同其法术等级比实际等级高1级。在成功时，该探知效果仍会正常运作，但除了无法侦测到关于目标及其随身物品的任何信息之外。例如，侦测魔法仍会侦测到区域内的其他魔法，但不会侦测到目标身上的任何魔法。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DBaMtFHRPEg1JeLs]{法术效果: 心灵空白}

Powerful wards hide a creature from divination magic. The target gains a +4 status bonus to saves against mental effects. Mind blank attempts to counteract any detection, revelation, and scrying effects as if its spell level were 1 higher than its actual level. On a success, the divination effect functions normally except that it detects nothing about the target and its possessions. For instance, detect magic would still detect other magic in the area, but not any magic on the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DBaMtFHRPEg1JeLs]{Spell Effect: Mind Blank}

Spell Effect: Mind Blank.name: 法术效果：心灵屏障 Spell Effect: Mind Blank
Spell Effect: Mind Blank.description:
强大的结界使一个生物免受占卜魔法的侦测。目标获得+4状态加值于对抗精神效果的豁免。心灵屏障会尝试反制任何侦测、启示以及探知效果，如同其法术等级比其实际等级高1。若成功，占卜效果仍正常运作，但不会侦测到任何关于目标及其随身物品的信息。例如，侦测魔法仍会侦测到区域内的其他魔法，但不会侦测到目标身上的任何魔法。

Powerful wards hide a creature from divination magic. The target gains a +4 status bonus to saves against mental effects. Mind blank attempts to counteract any detection, revelation, and scrying effects as if its spell level were 1 higher than its actual level. On a success, the divination effect functions normally except that it detects nothing about the target and its possessions. For instance, detect magic would still detect other magic in the area, but not any magic on the target.

De-Artifice Convention.name: 去工艺公约 De-Artifice Convention
De-Artifice Convention.description:
频率 每 1 分钟一次

效果 阿达达在 300 尺半径内瓦解秩序。无人持用且不具有魔法（特征）的物体变为破损。由于地面开裂、移位并变形为无形的荒诞，该区域变为困难地形。半径内所有生物因美学的骤然转变而受到 @Damage[12d10[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:38|basic:true] 豁免。

Frequency Once per 1 minute

Effect The adada unmakes order in a 300 foot radius. Unattended objects without the magical trait become broken. The area becomes difficult terrain as the ground cracks, shifts, and transforms into formless absurdity. All creatures in the radius @Damage[12d10[bludgeoning]] damage from the sudden shift of aesthetics, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:38|basic:true] save.

Rhetoric of Violence.name: 暴力修辞 Rhetoric of Violence
Rhetoric of Violence.description:
阿达达咿呀怪叫着奇异而暴力的言辞，使其能够将三次令人困惑的攻击合而为一。它用舌头进行三次打击，每次针对不同的目标。这些只算作一次攻击来计算其多重攻击减值。

The Adada babbles strange violent rhetoric, allowing it to make three confounding attacks as one. It Strikes three times with its tongue, each against a different target. These count as only one attack for its multiple attack penalty.

Adada.publicNotes:
当习俗与强制性的结构碾碎了艺术家的梦想——而这些艺术家本可能成为千载难逢的天才——由此产生的集体挫败感会孕育或吸引一种可怖的虚无之怪物：阿达达（adada）。阿达达所到之处会散布非传统性与不规则的艺术视野，且常常以引发灾难性伤害作为副作用。只有真正愚蠢的人才会想着刻意召唤一只难以预测的阿达达。

不可测的存在

阿达达并非恶意的生物，但为了其使命，它们对可能被自己毁掉的生命与财产几乎毫不在意。尽管这种粗心的漠视会使它们成为骇人的毁灭者，它们也可能通过对抗试图规定审美感受的暴政势力，而成为非传统的救世主。与此同时，阿达达还可能吸引敌对的力量。当阿达达与其宿敌之一发生冲突时，其结果往往比任一生物单独出现时都更具毁灭性。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 1,875/4,300/8,000 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（穿刺、挥砍）、护甲（轻型、中型）、察觉物品、技能物品（奥秘、运动、制作、学识[艺术]、表演）

符合条件的灌注属性 破敌、混乱、魅力、体质、敏捷、延伸、能量抗性（正能量）、智力、法术（神术：行动自由、心灵屏障、传送）、力量、狂野、有翼

When convention and mandated structure crush the dreams of artists who would otherwise become once-in-a lifetime talents, the collective frustration from this loss spawns or attracts a terrifying creature of meaninglessness, an adada. Adadas spread unconventionality and irregular artistic visions in their wake, often causing calamitous damage as a side effect. Only the truly foolish would think to summon an unpredictable adada by design.

Unfathomable Beings

Adadas are not malign creatures, but they have little to no regard for lives and property that they may ruin for the sake of their mission. But though their careless disregard can make them terrifying destroyers, they can also become unconventional saviors by battling tyrannical forces trying to dictate aesthetic sensibilities. At the same time, an adada might attract rival powers. When an adada clashes with one of its nemeses, the results are often more devastating than the emergence of either creature alone.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 1,875/4,300/8,000 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (piercing, slashing), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Arcana, Athletics, Crafting, Lore [Art], Performance)

Eligible Imbued Properties bane, chaotic, charisma, constitution, dexterity, elongating, energy resistant (positive), intelligence, spells (Divine: freedom of movement, mind blank, teleport), strength, wild, winged

Abandoned.name: 遗弃 Abandoned

Blinded by Grief.name: 为悲痛所盲 Blinded by Grief
Blinded by Grief.description:
被遗弃者的双眼充满了苦涩的坏死泪水，泪水缓慢渗出，在它脸颊上留下冒烟的伤口。这种混合物妨碍了被遗弃者的视野，使其在大多数环境下处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled}。一旦被遗弃者在同一段10分钟内使用了三次“恶意之泪”，它会失去目眩（状态），但也不再满足使用“恶意之泪”的需求。10分钟后，随着该生物腐烂的泪管产生更多坏死泪水，目眩（状态）会再次出现。

An abandoned's eyes are filled with bitter necrotic tears, which slowly leak out, leaving smoking wounds on their cheeks. This mixture hampers the abandoned's vision, causing it to be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} in most circumstances. Once an abandoned has used Malicious Tears three times in the same 10 minute period, it loses the dazzled condition but also no longer meets the requirements to use Malicious Tears. The dazzled condition returns after 10 minutes, as the creature's decaying tear ducts produce more necrotic tears.

Retributive Torrent.name: 惩戒洪流 Retributive Torrent
Retributive Torrent.description:
需求 The abandoned is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} by its necrotic tears

触发 The abandoned takes slashing 伤害 from a 生物 within 15 feet

效果 The abandoned uses Malicious Tears; the cone must include the triggering 生物.

Requirements The abandoned is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} by its necrotic tears

Trigger The abandoned takes slashing damage from a creature within 15 feet

Effect The abandoned uses Malicious Tears; the cone must include the triggering creature.

Sorrow of Isolation.name: 孤绝之悲 Sorrow of Isolation
Sorrow of Isolation.description:
20英尺。孤立的沉重感笼罩着一处被遗弃之地，而靠得太近的敌人会被这种情绪压垮。任何进入该灵光的敌人都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:15] 意志豁免，并承受以下效果。

成功 该生物不受影响

失败 该生物在1分钟内无法协助其盟友。它不再提供夹击，也无法对其盟友进行援助。

大失败 同失败，且该生物变得极度渴望恢复它的陪伴感，以至于侵入其盟友的个人空间。在它的回合上，如果该生物不与某个盟友相邻，它必须移动直到与某个盟友相邻，然后才能进行任何其他动作。

20 feet. The weight of isolation hangs around an abandoned, and enemies who draw too close can be overwhelmed by the emotion. Any enemy that enters the aura must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:15] save, with the following effects.

Success The creature is unaffected

Failure The creature can't assist its allies for 1 minute. It no longer grants flanking and can't Aid its allies.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature becomes so desperate to restore its sense of companionship that it encroaches on its allies' personal space. On its turn, if the creature isn't adjacent to an ally, it must move until it's adjacent to an ally before taking any other actions.

Malicious Tears.name: 恶意之泪 Malicious Tears
Malicious Tears.description:
需求 该遗弃者因悲伤致盲而处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{目眩} 状态

效果 该遗弃者喷洒出一个由苦涩的死灵孤寂泪液构成的 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 。区域内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18] 豁免，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物目眩 1 轮。

失败 该生物 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{目盲} 1 轮。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物目盲 1 分钟。

Requirements The abandoned is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Dazzled]{Dazzled} by Blinded by Grief

Effect The abandoned sprays a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of liquid, composed of bitter necrotic tears of isolation. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:18] save, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is dazzled for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Blinded]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is blinded for 1 minute.

Dazzled.name: 目眩 Dazzled
Dazzled.description:
你的眼睛受到了过度刺激。如果视野是你唯一的精确感官，所有生物和物体对你而言都是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

Your eyes are overstimulated. If vision is your only precise sense, all creatures and objects are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from you.

Abandoned.publicNotes:
有些人早在吐出最后一口吐息之前就已死去。被遗弃者是在生命最后几天或最后片刻体会到孤立苦楚的亡灵，他们无助地看着自己所爱与信任之人将自己抛下。他们的最后时刻往往充斥着深切的羞耻，以及对遗弃他们之人复仇的绝望渴望。

乍看之下，被遗弃者似乎只是普通的丧尸，但即便是随意观察也能发现他们的行动从容而聪慧。被遗弃者比蹒跚丧尸强壮得多，并且有能力使用工具、策划简单的伏击。在战斗中，被遗弃者难以击中他们的敌人，但他们能释放孤独与隔绝之泪来致盲他们的敌人。在流下足够多的眼泪后，他们的视野会变得清晰，从而能更有效地宣泄他们的挫败感。当一个被遗弃者被摧毁时，他们常会在最后一口嘶哑的吐息中尖叫出遗弃他们之人的名字。

杀戮的意志

被遗弃者将对遗弃他们之人的复仇置于首位。他们常被发现徘徊巡逻于住宅与其他与幸福时代相关的地点，一边啜泣一边重温回忆。若他们复仇成功，受害者的负罪感常会使其以蹒跚丧尸的形态复起，在死亡中陪伴那些他们生前没能相伴之人。

建议的怪物部件

怪物部件 5/12/22 gp

符合条件的精炼 武器（钝击），护甲（轻型、中型），察觉 物品，技能 物品（运动）

符合条件的灌注属性 强酸，体质，敏捷，能量抗性（负能量），邪恶，精神，负能量，毒素，力量，投掷，荒野

Some people die long before they draw their final breath. Abandoned are undead that felt the bitter sting of isolation in their final days or final moments, watching helplessly as those they loved and trusted left them behind. Their last moments were often filled with a deep shame and a desperate desire for revenge against those who abandoned them.

At first glance, abandoned appear to be simple zombies, but even casual observation reveals that they move deliberately and intelligently. Abandoned are much stronger than a zombie shambler and have the ability to use tools and plan simple ambushes. In combat, abandoned struggle to land blows against their foes, but they can unleash tears of loneliness and isolation to blind their enemies. After shedding enough tears, their vision clears, and they can unleash their frustration more effectively. When an abandoned is destroyed, they often scream the names of the people who abandoned them with a final rasping breath.

A Will to Kill

Abandoned prioritize revenge against those who left them behind. They're often found patrolling homes and other locations associated with happier times, reliving memories while sobbing. Should they succeed in their revenge, the guilt of their victims causes them to often rise as zombie shamblers to accompany in death those they failed in life.

Suggested Monster Parts

Monster Parts 5/12/22 gp

Eligible Refinements weapons (bludgeoning), armor (light, medium), perception item, skill items (Athletics)

Eligible Imbued Properties acid, constitution, dexterity, energy resistant (negative), evil, mental, negative, poison, strength, throwing, wild
